arpaṇam kiñcid bodhet vikṛti darśanam ūrū mūla ādideśe ca tad pāṇi pratipīḍanam evam eva yathoddiṣṭam strī vṛttam yā anutiṣṭhati iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi strī dharma varṇanam nāma paṃcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti uktvā bhagavān brahmā strī lakṣaṇam aśeṣatas sat vṛttam ca tathā strīṇām jagāma sa nija ālayam ṛṣayaḥ ca tathā jagmuḥ svāni dhiṣṇyāni aśeṣatas strī lakṣaṇam tathā vṛttam śrutvā kṛtsnam mahīpate ittham lakṣaṇa sampannām bhāryām prāpya mahīpate pañcayajña vidhānam tu paktim kuryāt sadā gṛhī peṣaṇī cullī udakumbhīḥ pramārjanī manīṣibhiḥ pañca uddiṣṭāḥ mahā yajñāḥ pratyaham gṛhamedhinām adhyāpanam brahmayajñaḥ pitṛ yajñaḥ ca tarpaṇam pañca etāni yaḥ mahā yajñāt na hāpayati śaktitas devatā atithi bhṛtyānām pitṝṇām ātmanaḥ ca yaḥ uvāca yasya na asti gṛhe tu agniḥ saḥ mṛtaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ na saḥ pūjayitum śaktaḥ deva ādīn brāhmaṇa uttamaḥ prītāḥ syuḥ śāntaye tasya param kautūhalam mama sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi rāja indra śrūyatām paramam vacaḥ anagnayaḥ tu ye viprāḥ teṣām śreyaḥ abhidhīyate vrata upavāsa niyamaiḥ nānā dānaiḥ tathā nṛpa deva ādayaḥ bhavanti eva prītāḥ teṣām na saṃśayaḥ prītāḥ deva ādayaḥ teṣām bhavanti kuru nandana uvāca bhagavan tvam tithīn brūhi tithīnām ca vidhim hi me prāśanam gṛhya dharmān ca upavāsa vidhīn api saṃsārāt ca api vipra indra śreyase jagantaḥ tathā śṛṇu kaurava karmāṇi tithi guhya āśritāni tu śrutāni ghnanti pāpāni upoṣita phalāni ca pratipadi kṣīraprāśanam dvitīyāyām lavaṇa varjanam tṛtīyāyām tila annam prāśnīyāt caturthyām kṣīra aśanaḥ ca pañcamyām phala aśanaḥ sadā ṣaṣṭhyām śāka aśanaḥ saptamyām bilva āhāraḥ aṣṭamyām tu piṣṭa aśanaḥ navamyām anagni pāka āhāraḥ daśamyām ekādaśyām ghṛta āhāraḥ dvādaśyām pāyasa āhāraḥ trayodaśyām go mūtra āhāraḥ caturdaśyām yava anna āhāraḥ tad udaka prāśanaḥ paurṇamāsyām haviṣya āhāraḥ amāvāsyāyām avāpnoti tathā aṣṭa māsa pāraṇe rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām sahasraguṇa phalam avāpnoti yaḥ evam niyamān rājan āśvayuja navamyām māgha māsasya saptamyām vaiśākha tṛtīyāyām kārttika paurṇamāsyām tithi vratāni gṛdṛṇāti brahmacārī gṛhasthaḥ vanasthaḥ nārī naraḥ vā śūdraḥ prayata mānasaḥ dīrgha āyuṣyam savituḥ sālokyam vrajati yaiḥ ca api purā rājñ anena vidhinā etāsu tithiṣu anya janmāntare upavāsa vidhiḥ kṛtaḥ dānāni dattāni vividha prakārāṇi brāhmaṇānām tapasvi janeṣu vā tri rātra upavāsinām tīrtha yātrā tapaḥ guru mātā pitṛ śuśrūśā niratānām teṣām svarga ādi bhoga vāsanāt iha āgatānām phala niṣpatti cihnāni manuṣya loke pratyakṣatas eva dṛśyante hasti aśva yāna yugya dhana ratna kanaka hiraṇya kaṭaka keyūra graiveyaka kaṭisūtra karṇa alaṅkāra mukuṭa vara vastra vara nārī vara vilepana surūpa guṇa dīrgha āyuṣaḥ vigata adhivyādhayaḥ dāna upavāsa ratānām phalāni etāni nṛtya gīta vāditra maṅgala pāṭhaka śabdaiḥ iha adya api puṇya kṛtaḥ bodhyamānāḥ dṛśyante iti tathā a kṛta upavāsāḥ api hi dṛśyante tathā adatta dānāḥ akṛta puṇyāḥ ca pratyakṣatas eva dṛśyante tat yathā kāṇa kuṣṭhi badhira jaḍa mūka vyaṅgāḥ roga dāridrya upasarga vyādhi hata āyuṣaḥ ca dṛśyaṃte adya api mānavāḥ uvāca rahasyam yat tithīnām tu devānām ca viceṣṭitam yāni iṣṭāni ca devānām bhojyāni niyamāḥ tathā devatānām rahasyāni vratāni niyamāḥ tathā tān śṛṇuṣva mahā bāho gadataḥ mama nārada sṛṣṭim pūrvam vadiṣyāmi saṃkṣepeṇa tithim prati mahā brahmā samāgatya asṛjat ātmānam ātmanā saṃbhūta ātmā eva ātmā asau aṇḍa madhyāt viniḥsṛtaḥ ātmanā eva ātmanaḥ hi aṇḍam sṛṣṭvā sa vibhuḥ āditas brahmā nārāyaṇa ākhyaḥ asau sṛṣṭim kartum samudyataḥ tābhyām sa uṇḍa kapālābhyām divam bhūmim ca nirmame diśaḥ ca eva upadiśaḥ ca eva deva ādīn dānavān tathā tithim pūrvām imām rājñ cakāra atha vibhuḥ svayam tithīnām pravarā yasmāt brahmanā samudāhṛtā asmāt padāt tu tithayaḥ yasmāt tu anyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ kārttikyām māgha saptamyām vaiśākhasya yuga ādiṣu yadā tu pratipadyām vai gṛhṇīyāt niyamam nṛpaiḥ caturdaśyām kṛta āhāraḥ saṃkalpam parikalpayet amāvāsyām na bhuñjīta tri kālam snānam ācaret pavitraḥ hi japet nityam gāyatrīm śirasā saha śaktyā kṣīram pradadyāt tu brahmā mama prīyatām prabhuḥ tatas bhuñjīta go kṣīram anena vidhinā nṛpa eṣaḥ eva vidhiḥ dṛṣṭaḥ sarvāsu tithiṣu nṛpa vimukta pāpaḥ śuddha ātmā divya dehasya dehinaḥ brahmā dadāti saṃtuṣṭaḥ vimānam ati tejasam veda vedāṃga vidyaḥ ca dīrgha āyūḥ ca eva su prabhaḥ brāhmaṇa tva jigīṣayā tapaḥ cacāra vipulam saṃtāpāya divaukasām tatas tu niyamāt teṣām tithīnām pravarā tithiḥ upoṣitāḥ bahuvidhāḥ jñātvā brahma priyām tithim tithīnām pravarā hi eṣā tithīnām uttamā tithiḥ kṣatriyaḥ vaiśya śūdrau vā brāhmaṇa tvam avāpnuyuḥ evam tithiḥ iyam rājñ kāma dā kañjaja priyā haihayaiḥ tālajaṅghaiḥ ca turuṣkaiḥ yavanaiḥ śakaiḥ upoṣitāḥ iha atra eva brāhmaṇa tvam abhīpsubhiḥ iti eṣā paramā puṇyā śivā pāpa harā tathā paṭhita upāsitā rājan śraddhayā ca śrutā tathā māhātmyam ca api yaḥ pīḍā asyāḥ śṛṇuyāt mānavaḥ nṛpa ṛddhim vṛddhim tathā kīrtim śivam divam vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pratipad kalpa varṇanam nāma ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ pratipad kalpa viṣaye brahmaṇaḥ pūjā uvāca manaḥ rājñ kathayāmi eṣa śānti dam pūrvam ekārṇave ghore naṣṭe sthāvara jaṅgame sasarja lokān devān ca bhūtāni vividhāni ca kāyena manasā vācā jaṅgama sthāvarāṇi ca pitā yaḥ sarva devānām bhūtānām ca pitāmahaḥ tasmāt eṣa sadā pūjyaḥ yatas loka guruḥ paraḥ sṛjati eṣa jagant kṛtsnam pāti saṃharate tathā uvāca uvāca ha śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ rājñ kathayāmi eṣa śānti dam pūrvam ekārṇave ghore naṣṭe sthāvara jaṅgame svayambhuḥ abhavat devaḥ surajyeṣṭhaḥ caturmukhaḥ sasarja lokān devān ca bhūtāni vividhāni ca kāyena manasā vācā jaṅgama sthāvarāṇi ca pitā yaḥ sarva devānām bhūtānām ca pitāmahaḥ tasmāt eṣa sadā pūjyaḥ yatas loka guruḥ paraḥ sṛjati eṣa jagant kṛtsnam pāti saṃharate tathā mukhebhyaḥ caturaḥ vedāḥ vedāṃgāni ca kṛtsnaśas deva apsaras sa gandharvāḥ sa yakṣa uraga rākṣasāḥ pūjayanti sadā vīraiḥ viriñcim sura nāyakam sa nāka rājya mokṣeṣu kṣipram bhavati bhājanam tasmāt saumya manāḥ bhūtvā yāvajjīvam pratijñayā manuṣya carmaṇā naddhaḥ sa vedhāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ iti vijñāya yatnena pūjanī yaḥ sadā vidhiḥ yaḥ brahmānam dveṣṭi mohāt sarva deva namaskṛtam naraḥ naraka gāmī syāt tasya sambhāṣaṇāt api brahmanā ūrcām pratiṣṭhāpya sarva yatnaiḥ vidhānāt yat puṇyam phalam āpnoti tat ekāgra manāḥ śṛṇu tad phalam koṭi guṇitam labhet vedhaḥ pratiṣṭhayā sthāpayet yaḥ tu kṛtvā śālām manoramām puṇyam koṭi koṭi guṇam labhet mātṛ jān pitṛ jān ca eva yām ca eva udvahate striyam atha vā rājyam ākāṅkṣet jāyate sambhava antare trisaṃdhyam yaḥ japet brahma kṛtvā aṣṭadala paṅkajam paurṇamāsyām pratipadi tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu tat tat sarva martyānām darśanāt sparśanāt api uddhṛtya divi saṃsthāpya kulānām ekaviṃśatim puṇya kṣayāt kṣitim prāpya bhavet kṣitipatiḥ mahān mṛd dāru iṣṭakā śailaiḥ vā yaḥ kuryāt brahmaṇaḥ gṛham mṛd mayāt koṭi guṇitam phalam dāru iṣṭakāmaye puṇyam kṛte śaila maye gṛhe krīḍamānaḥ api yaḥ kuryāt śālām vai brahmanaḥ nṛpa puṣpa mālā parikṣiptam kiṅkiṇī jāla bhūṣitam dolā vikṣepa saṃpannam ghaṇṭā cāmara bhūṣitam brahmaloke mahīyate tasya ante sa catur vedaḥ surūpaḥ priya darśanaḥ āḍhyaḥ sarva guṇa upetaḥ rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ yaḥ kuryāt brahmaśālām su mānadaiḥ tāvat dhamanti saṃsāre duḥkha śoka bhaya plutāḥ na bhavanti suraśreṣṭhe yāvat raktāḥ mahīpate khaṇḍa sphuṭita saṃskāram śālāyām yaḥ karoti vai na asti brahma samam jñānam na asti vedhas samam tapaḥ parva kāleṣu puṇye paurṇamāsyām viśeṣataḥ śaṅkha bherī ādi nirghoṣaiḥ mahā bhigeṃya saṃyutaiḥ kuryāt nīrājanam deve surajyeṣṭhe caturmukhe yāvat parvāṇi vidhinā kuryāt nīrājanam nṛpaiḥ snāna kāle trisaṃdhyam tu yaḥ kuryāt nṛtya vādanam śṛṇu snāpayet mantra pūtena brāhmam snānam hi tat smṛtam snānam śataguṇam jñeyam itareṣām narādhipaiḥ deva agni kāryam uddiśya kapilām āharet sadā brahma kṣatra viśaḥ ca eva na śūdraḥ tu kadācana surajyeṣṭha ghṛta abhyaṅgāt dahet sarvam na saṃśayaḥ pratipadi sakṛt kṛtvā tu kāñja jam tad kula ekaviṃśam uttārya viṣṇu loke mahī yate ayutam yaḥ gavām dadyāt bhaktyā vai vedapārage vastra hema ādi yuktānām kṣīra snānena yat phalam snāpya dadhinā sakṛt vīra kañja jam viṣṇum āpnuyāt sa sarvakālam tṛpta ātmā loka vaśya tvam ā pnuyāt pāṭalā utpala padmāni karavīrāṇi sarvadā snāna kāle prayojyāni sthirāṇi surabhīni ca teṣām ekatamam snānam bhaktyā kṛtvā tu vedhasi gāyatrī śata japtena vimalena ambhasā vibhum snāpya tatas paścāt ghṛta snānam kṛtvā pāpaiḥ vimucyate etad snāna trayam kṛtvā pūjayitvā tu bhaktyāḥ mṛd kumbhaiḥ tāmra jaiḥ kumbhaiḥ snānam śataguṇam bhavet raupye lakṣa uttaram proktam haimaiḥ koṭi guṇam bhavet brahmaṇaḥ darśanam puṇyam darśanāt sparśanam param sparśanāt arcanam śreṣṭham ghṛta snātam atas param vācikam mānasam pāpam ghṛta snānena dehinām padmajaḥ yasmāt tasmāt snānam samācaret śuci vastra dharaḥ snātaḥ kṛta nyāsaḥ ca bhārataiḥ akṣaram vihitam ca anyat pattra bhāge prakīrtitam nānā varṇaka saṃyogāt likhet ca eva anupūrvaśas tu madhyam syāt pīta raktam tathā param prabhā kuṇḍalakaiḥ bāhyaiḥ veṣṭayet cakranāyakam mūrdhanaḥ pāda talam yāvat praṇavam vinyaset budhaḥ nāda rūpam nyaset tāvat yāvat śabdasya śūnyatā tatkāram vinyaset mūrdhani sakāram mukha maṇḍale vikāram kaṇṭha deśe tu tukāram sarva saṃdhiṣu bakāram hṛdi madhye tu rekāram pārśvayoḥ dvayoḥ dakṣiṇe kukṣau yakāram vāma saṃjñake bhakāram kaṭi nābhi stham r gokāram jānu parvasu hakāram jaṅghayoḥ nyasya vakāram pāda padmayoḥ tyakāram aṅguṣṭhayoḥ nyasya dhīkāram ca urasi nyaset makāram jānu deśe tu hikāram guhyam āśritam hṛdaye nyasya yokāram ca oṣṭhayoḥ nyaset nakāram nāsikā agre tu prakāram netram āśritam cokāram tu bhuvoḥ madhye dakāram prāṇam āśritam yākāram vinyaset mūrdhani takāram keśam āśritam nyāsam kṛtvā ātmanaḥ dehe deve kuryāt tathā nṛpaiḥ sarva upacāra saṃpannam kṛtvā samyak nirīkṣayet āsane pṛthivī jñeyā sarva sattva dharā matā hrasva uṃkāre matā sā tu dīrgha uṃkāre tu tu vyāpayet bhāvam mokṣa dam ca amṛta ātmakam yatna sthaḥ na nivarteta yogī prāṇa parāyaṇaḥ māvāhanam tatas kuryāt akṣareṇa pareṇa tu tejaḥ rūpam tu nyaset mantra varān tatas sraṣṭāram sarva jagantām viṣṇu rudra vidhāna gam saṃbhāvya gandha puṣpa ādi saṃbhārān kramāt sarvān prakalpayet puṣpam dhūpam tathā dīpam naivedyam su manoharam khaṇḍa laḍḍuka śrīveṣṭaka āsāra aśoka vartikāḥ phalāni ca eva pakvāni lagna khaṇḍa guḍāni ca anyān ca vividhān dadyāt pūpāni vividhāni ca evamādīni sarvāṇi dāpayet aśaktitas nṛpaiḥ prāṇāyāma trayam kṛtvā deha saṃśodhanāya vai māvāhayet tatas nantam dhārayantam vacaḥ sadā ṛgvedam tu yajurvedam sāmavedam ca pūjayet bhāna vairāgyam aiśvaryam dharmam saṃpūjayet budhaḥ mahā īśāna ādi kramāt rājñ vidiśāsu samantataḥ śikṣā kalpaḥ vyākaraṇam niruktam chandaḥ eva ca yotiṣam ca mahā bāho upavedāḥ ca kṛtsnaśas itihāsa purāṇāni yathāyogyam yathākramam śikṣā kalpaḥ vyākaraṇam devasya puratas sadā kalpa ādayaḥ tatas ca anye diśāsu vidiśāsu ca mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ sarvāḥ praṇavena samanvitāḥ śaktayaḥ brahmaṇaḥ tu etāḥ loka rūpāḥ vyavasthitāḥ pūjanīyāḥ prayatnena mantra rūpāḥ sthitāḥ svayam paraka antara saṃsthān ca ṣaṭ samudrān samarcayet nakṣatrāṇi grahāḥ ca eva rāśayaḥ ca viśeṣataḥ pūjyāḥ sarve yathānyāyam surā agreṣu vyavasthitāḥ nāgāḥ ca garuḍaḥ ca eva pūjanīyaḥ tathā agratas devatāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca eva sahitāḥ kulaparvatāḥ tad tejaḥ nilayāḥ sarve pūjanīyāḥ prayatnāt mantra pūtena vāriṇā hṛdaya ādīn nyaset aṅgān hṛdaya ādiṣu kṛtsnaśas mahendra ādi diśaḥ ca etāḥ pūjayet vidhivat nṛpaiḥ hṛdayam puratas pūjyam śiraḥ devasya pṛṣṭhatas pūrvam saṃpūjayet devam mūlamantreṇa kṛtsnaśas aṅkuśam nara śārdūlaiḥ hi āhvāne kañjam ādiśet upoṣya pañcadaśyām tu saḥ yāti paramam padam ro apaḥ hiṣṭhā iti mantraḥ ayam hṛdayam parikīrtitam ṛtam satyam śikhā proktā udutyam netram ādiśet varmaṇā te chādayāmi kavacam samudāhṛtam gāyatrī mūla tantraḥ tu sādhakaḥ sarva karmaṇām gāyatryā pūjayet devam oṃkāreṇa abhimantritam praṇavena aparān sarvān ṛgveda ādīn prapūjayet āhvāne pūjane vīra visarge brahmaṇaḥ tathā gāyatrī paramaḥ mantraḥ vedamātrī vibhāvinī iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pratipad kalpe brahmaṇoḥ arcanavidhivarṇanam nāma saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ paurṇamāsī upavāsam tu kṛtvā bhaktyā narādhipaiḥ ṛgbhiḥ viśeṣataḥ devī viriñceḥ vāstu devatāḥ yām kṛtvā mānavaḥ bhaktyā yāti brahma salokatām kārtike māsi rāja indra paurṇamāsyām caturmukham mārgeṇa carmaṇā sārdham sāvitryā ca parantapa bhrāmayet nagaram sarvam nānā vādyaiḥ samanvitam sthāpayet bhrāmayitvā tu sa lokam nagaram nṛpa brāhmaṇam bhojayitya agre śāṇḍileyam prapūjya ca ratha agre śāṇḍilīputram pūjayitvā vidhānāt bāhmaṇān vācayitvā ca kṛtvā puṇya aha maṅgalam nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ brahmaghoṣaiḥ ca puṣkalaiḥ kṛtvā prajāgaram hi evam prabhāte brāhmaṇam nṛpa bhojayitvā yathāśaktyā bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ anekaśas pūjayitvā janam vīra vajreṇa vidhivat nṛpa bījena ca mahā bāho payasā pāyasena ca brāhmaṇān vācayitvā ca chāndena vidhinā nṛpa kṛtvā puṇyāha śabdam ca ratham ca bhrāmayet pure bahvṛca ātharvaṇa uccāraiḥ chandoga adhvaryubhiḥ tathā pradakṣiṇam puram sarvam mārgeṇa su samena tu na voḍhavyaḥ rathaḥ vīraiḥ śūdreṇa śubham icchatā na āruheta ratham prājñaḥ muktvā ekam bhojakam nṛpa brahmaṇaḥ dakṣiṇe pārśve sāvitrīm sthāpayet nṛpaiḥ bhojakaḥ vāma pārśve tu puratas kañjajam nyaset evam tūrya ninādaiḥ tu śaṅkha śabdaiḥ ca puṣkalaiḥ bhrāmayitvā ratham rājñ puram sarvam pradakṣiṇam sva sthāne sthāpayet bhūyas kṛtvā nīrājanam budhaḥ yaḥ evam kurute yātrām bhaktyā paśyati śālāyām brahmaṇaḥ kuryāt sa gacchet brahmaṇaḥ padam pratipadi brāhmaṇān ca api guḍa miśraiḥ pradīpakaiḥ tasyām pratipadāyām tu sa gacchet brahmaṇaḥ padam mahā puṇyā tithiḥ iyam bali rājya pravartinī brahmaṇaḥ su priyā nityam bāleyā parikīrtitā brāhmaṇān pūjayitvā asyām ātmānam ca viśeṣataḥ sa yāti paramam sthānam viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ puṇyā pratipadā parā tasyām yaḥ śvapacam spṛṣṭvā snānam kuryāt narottamaiḥ divyam nīrājanam tat hi sarva roga vināśanam bhūṣayet brāhmaṇānām tathā bhojyam kuryāt kuru kula udvahaiḥ snānam dānam śataguṇam kārttike yā tithiḥ nṛpa bali rājya āpti sukha dā nāma aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ maryāti ākhyāne puṣpa dvitīyā varṇanam dvitīyāyām tu rāja indra aśvinaḥ soma pītinaḥ uvāca cyavanena hi devānām paśyatām tat vadasva me tatra śaryātiḥ āyātaḥ snātum antar puraiḥ saha tatra mūḍham janapadam apaśyat pathini ceṣṭanam durmanāḥ rājā amātyān svān purogamān na ca uvāca yadā kaścid tasya rājñaḥ tu pṛcchataḥ tadā sutā sukanyā asya provāca pitaram vacaḥ mayā dṛṣṭam tu yat tāta sakhibhiḥ saha kautukam tat te vacmi nibodha tvam śṛṇu tāta mahā adbhutam śiñjita ārāva bahulāḥ kāñcī nūpura mekhalāḥ gāyatyaḥ vilapatyaḥ ca kīḍatyaḥ ca atra kānane kokila dhvanim aśrauṣam vyakta avyakta akṣaram kṛśam tatra gatvā adbhutam tāta paśyāmaḥ kila pāvakau dīpau iva acala śikhau bhūyas kanyāḥ uvāca ha yatra āste bhārgavaḥ kaṣṭam valmīka antargataḥ muniḥ sa tam provāca nṛpatim mayā jñātam narādhipa su kanyām me prayacchasva niveśa arthī hi aham nṛpa sukanyā api patim labdhvā su prītā ārādhayat tadā rājya śriyam parityajya valkala ajina dhāriṇī tapas udyotita sarva aṅgām rūpa udāra aguṇa anvitām snātām sva bhāryām cyavanaḥ uvāca madhura akṣaram hi ehi ehi bhadre bhadram te śayanīyam samāśraya evam uktā tu sā kanyā prāñjaliḥ patim abravīt na arhasi adya su kalyāṇa saṅgamam sthaṇḍile asame pitṛ gehe yathā atiṣṭham śayanīye susaṃskṛte bahu gairika varṇa ādyaiḥ śveta pīta aruṇa ākule vastra alaṅkāra gandha āḍhyam paśyeyam yena sa ādaram sukanyāyāḥ vacaḥ śrutvā cyavanaḥ prāha durmanāḥ sa kadham bhūṣayāmi adya surūpaḥ ca katham vada provāca sā patim bhūyas prahasatī kṛtāñjaliḥ cyavanaḥ prāha bhāryām tām na kariṣye tapaḥ vyayam evam uktvā tapaḥ ca ugram tatāpa su ciram tadā atha tatra āgatau vīrau aśvinaḥ kāla paryayāt dṛṣṭavantau sukanyām tau dīptyā vai devatām iva upagamya ūcatuḥ tām tau kā tvam sundari rūpiṇī kimartham iha ekā tvam tiṣṭhase kaḥ tava āśrayaḥ sā tau uvāca tanvaṅgī śaryāti duhitrī hi aham ūcatuḥ ca aśvinaḥ devau āvām viddhi nṛpa ātmaje kim kariṣyasi tena tvam jīrṇena ca kṛśena ca bhartāram anurakta aṅgā yathā svāhā vibhāvasoḥ ūcatuḥ āyātu ca viśatu adya cyavanaḥ vaiṣṇavī jalam tatas āvayoḥ madhya gam hi ekam vṛṇīṣva anyam yam icchati tau abrūtām sukanyām tu gatvā pṛccha svakam patim tam ca pṛṣṭvā punar ca atra āgaccha āvayoḥ saṃnidhau punar nau atra eva tiṣṭhāvaḥ yāvat āgamanam tava sā gatvā prāha bhartāram aśvinaḥ eva sūcatuḥ rūpavantam ca bhartāram kariṣyāvaḥ yam icchasi evam astu iti tām prāha bhāryām cyavanaḥ tvaran sā tam gṛhya jagāma āśu yatra tau bhiṣajā ubhau kurutam hi aśvinau kṣipram sukanyā ca īpsitam vṛṇot tau tam saṅgṛhya gaṅgāyām praviṣṭau muninā saha muhūrtāt tu samuttiṣṭhan rūpāt ca śriyā vṛtāḥ udakāt utthitāḥ tasmāt sarve te sama rūpakāḥ sukanyā tu tatas dṛṣṭvā bhartāram deva rūpiṇam harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭā na ca tam veda bhārataiḥ sama kāyāḥ sama vayaḥ sama rūpāḥ sama śriyaḥ vastra alaṃkāra sadṛśān dṛṣṭvā cintām gatā ciram bhavadbhiḥ ātma saṃdṛśam katham tyaktvā vṛṇe param tayā sa bahu mānam tau prāñjalyā prārthitau tadā sukanyā nipuṇam tau tu su nirīkṣya ca vihvalā ayam ca sarajāḥ mlānaḥ bhūmim āśritya tiṣṭhati nimeṣam ca eva tasya evam jñātvā vai cyavanaḥ vṛtaḥ cyavane vṛte sukanyayā puṣpa vṛṣṭiḥ papāta ha bhāryā dattā kṛtam rūpam devānām api durlabham upakāram variṣṭham yaḥ na karoti upakāriṇaḥ tasmāt aham variṣṭham vai kariṣye aham amānuṣam upakāram bhavadbhyām tu prītaḥ kuryām su niścitam puṇyam sahabhāryaḥ mudā anvitaḥ atha śuśrāva śaryātiḥ cyavanam deva rūpiṇam jagāma ca mahā tejāḥ draṣṭum muni varam vaśī tam dṛṣṭvā praṇipatya ādau pratipūjya yathārhāt sukanyām tu tatas dṛṣṭvā praṇipatya abhinandya ca sā tasyāḥ sasvaje premṇā ānanda aśru pariplutā saṃsthāpya tām mudā yuktaḥ nṛpatiḥ saha bhāryayā bhūyas abravīt su saṃtuṣṭam cyavanaḥ tam narādhipam sambhāram kuru yajña artham yājayiṣye narādhipaiḥ jagāma sva puram hṛṣṭaḥ yajña artham yatnam ācarat sa preṣyān preṣayan kṣipram yajña arthe dravyam āharat mantri purohita ācāryān ānayāmāsa sa tvaram samānīteṣu sarveṣu teṣu dravyeṣu bhārata ājagāma viśuddha ātmā cyavanaḥ saha bhāryayā sampūjitaḥ ca śuśrāva mahantam tyāgam aujasam mā āhūtāḥ svāgatāḥ sarve bhāga artham tridiva ālayāḥ yajña bhāge pravṛtte tu śāstra uktena vidhānāt māṇe kriyamāṇe tu aśvibhyām tu tadā nṛpa devānām bhiṣajā etau na bhāga arhau na daivatau mama upakāriṇaḥ etau dadmi bhāgam na saṃśayaḥ tatas hi uvāca sa krodhaḥ sa śakraḥ cyavanam ruṣā sa stambhayitvā tu indram tu bhāgam dattvā aśvinā urvaśī samāpayāmāsa tadā yajña karma yathārtha vat atha ājagāma āśu āha ca cyavanam tadā uttambhyatām ayam lekhaḥ bhāgaḥ ca astu aśvinoḥ iha jānāmi śaktim tapasaḥ cyavana iha te uttamām khyāpana artham hi tapasaḥ tava etat kṛtam mayā yaḥ tu imām tapasaḥ khyātim tvadīyām vai paṭhiṣyati śṛṇuyāt vā api śuddha ātmā tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu yauvana yuktaḥ sa krīḍāḥ tiṣṭhati iti na saṃśayaḥ evam uktvā jagāma āśu devaḥ sva bhavanam vaśī cyavanaḥ api sa bhāryaḥ vai śaya ārtiḥ ca āśramam gataḥ atha apaśyat vimāna ābham bhavanam deva nirmitam mad āsana varaiḥ juṣṭam sarva kāma samṛddhimat udyāna vāpī juṣ deva indra samāhṛ subhūṣaṇāni divyāni ratnavanti mahanti ca ca vastrāṇi divya prāvaraṇāni ca mudam paramakām lebhe śakram ca praśaśaṃsa ha evam iṣṭā tithiḥ iyam dvitīyā aśvinoḥ nṛpa deva tvam yajña bhāgam ca samprāptau iha bhārataiḥ upoṣyāḥ vidhinā yena tam śṛṇuṣva narādhipaiḥ rūpam surūpam yaḥ vāñchet dvitīyāyām narādhipaiḥ puṣpa āhāraḥ varṣam ekam bhavet sa niyata ātmavān kāla prāptāni yāni syuḥ haviṣyam kusumāni tu bhuñjīyāt tāni dattvā tu brāhmaṇebhyaḥ narādhipaiḥ sauvarṇa raupya puṣpāṇi atha vā jala jāni ca iha ca āgatya kalpa ante jātaḥ vipraḥ puraskṛtaḥ veda vedāṅga vidvasaḥ sapta janma antarāṇi asau jātaḥ jātaḥ bhavet vidvāḥ brāhmaṇaḥ asau kṛte yuge dātā yajñapatiḥ vāgmī ādhi vyādhi vivarjitaḥ iti eṣā kathitā te dvitīyā puṣpa saṃjñitā phala saṃjñā tathā anyā syāt sute vai muñjakeśini suṣṭhu puṇyā pāpa harā viṣṭaraśravasaḥ priyā a śūnya śayanā loke prakhyātā kuru nandana tām upoṣya naraḥ rājñ śraddhā bhakti puraskṛtaḥ ṛddhim vṛddhim śriyam vā atha bhāryayā saha modate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi dvitīyā kalpe śaryātyākhyāne puṣpadvitīyāvarṇanam nāma ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāmnyāḥ dvitīya atitheḥ mahattvam uvāca brūhi mama dvijaśārdūlaiḥ dvitīyām phala saṃjñitām patnyā naraḥ muni śreṣṭha bhāryā ca patinā saha tām aham śrotum icchāmi vidhavā strī na jāyate tat me brūhi dvijaśreṣṭha śreyaḥ artham nara yoṣitām a śūnyaśayanām nāma dvitīyām śṛṇu bhārata hete jagatpatiḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śriyā sārdham yadā nṛpa nāma tadā grāhyā hi sā tithiḥ ha kṛṣṇa pakṣe dvitīyāyām śrāvaṇe māsi bhārataiḥ śrīvatsa dhāriṇam devam bhaktyā abhyarcya śriyā saha śrīvatsa dhārin śrīkānta śrīvatsa śrīpate avyaya gārhasthyam mā praṇāśam mama yātu dharma artha kāma dam mā praṇaśyantu mā praṇaśyantu mama janāḥ mā praṇaśyantu mattaḥ dāmpatya bhedataḥ lakṣmyāḥ na śūnyam vara da yathā te śayanam sadā mama api a śūnyā astu tathā tu madhusūdana evam pramādya pūjām ca kṛtvā lakṣmyāḥ tathā hareḥ phalāni dadyāt chāyāyām abhīṣṭāni jagatpatim naktam praṇamya āyatane haviḥ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ brāhmaṇāya dvitīye ahani śaktyā dadyāt ca dakṣiṇām uvāca kāni tāni abhīṣṭāni keśavasya phalāni tu kim ca dānam dvitīye ahani dātavyam brāhmaṇasya tu madhurāṇi su tīvrāṇi na ca api kaṭukāni tu dātavyāni nṛpa śreṣṭha sva śaktyā śayane nṛpa yoṣit ca kuru śārdūlaiḥ bhartuḥ vallabha tām iyāt tasmāt kaṭuka tīvrāṇi strī liṅgāni vivarjayet kharjūra mātuliṅgāni śvetena śirasā saha deyāni kuru śārdūlaiḥ sva śaktyā muñja keśine vāsaḥ dānam tathā dhānya phala dāna samanvitam gāṅgeyasya viśeṣeṇa dhānya dānam pracakṣate evam karoti yaḥ samyak naraḥ māsa catuṣṭayam a śūnya śayanaḥ ca asau dharma kāma artha sādhanaḥ bhavati avyāhata aiśvaryaḥ puruṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ nārī ca rājan dharma jñā vratam etat yathāvidhi kharjūra mātuliṅgāni bṛhatphala śirāṃsi ca dattvā dvijebhyaḥ rāja indraiḥ madhurāṇi parāṇi ca tasmāt sva śaktyā yat tena deyāni madhurāṇi ca iti eṣā kathitā kṛṣṇa dvitīyā tithiḥ uttamā yām upoṣya naraḥ rājñ ṛddhim vṛddhim tathā vrajet uvāca aśvibhyām dvijaśārdūlaiḥ katham asyām janārdanaḥ sampūjyaḥ phala saṃjñāyām kathitaḥ padmayā saha yad a śūnya śayanā dattā viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ aśvibhyām kuru śārdūlaiḥ prītaye muñjakeśinaḥ tau eva kuru śārdūla pūjyete atra mahīpate nāsatyau bhagavant viṣṇuḥ dattaḥ ca śrīḥ vibhāvyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi dvitīyā kalpa samāptau viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ tṛtīya atithi vrata māhātmyam pativratā pati prāṇā pati śuśrūṣaṇe ratā evaṃvidhā api yā proktā śuciḥ saṃśobhanā satī sa upavāsā tṛtīyām tu lavaṇam parivarjayet sā gṛhṇāti ca vai bhaktyā vratam āmaraṇāntikam gaurī dadāti santuṣṭā rūpam saubhāgyam eva ca lāvaṇyam lalitam hṛdyam ślāghyam puṃsām manoramam puṃsaḥ manoramā nārī bharttā nāryāḥ manoramaḥ idam vratam prati vibho dharmarājasya śṛṇvataḥ mayā vratam idam sṛṣṭam saubhāgya karaṇam nṛṇām yā ca kanyā na bhartāram vindate śobhanā satī sā tu idam vratam uddiśya bhavet akṣāra bhojanā gaurīm saṃsthāpya sauvarṇām gandha alaṃkāra bhūṣitām vastra alaṅkāra saṃvītām puṣpa maṇḍala maṇḍitām lavaṇam guḍam ghṛtam tailam devyai śaktyā nivedayet pattra śākam ca bhārata guḍa ghṛṣṭān tathā apūpān khaḍaveṣṭān tathā nṛpaiḥ śuklapakṣe sadā deyā yathā śaktyā hiraṇmayā dhana hīne tu bhaktyā ca madhu vṛkṣa mayā nṛpa arcyā nityam saṃnidhānāt tatra gaurī na saṃśayaḥ akṣāra lavaṇam rātrau bhuṃkte ca eva suvāgyatā gaurī sannihitā nityam bhūmau prastara śāyinī tat śṛṇuṣva mahā bāho kathyamānam mahā phalam su ciram saha vai bhartrā krīḍayitvā iha eva sā heli lokam candra lokam lokam citraśikhaṇḍinaḥ vidhavā tu yadā rājan devyāḥ vrata parāyaṇā bharttāram niyatā nityam sadā arcana parāyaṇā iha ca utsṛjya deham svam dṛṣṭvā hari pure priyam varṣa koṭim daśaguṇām ramitvā sā iha āgatā indrāṇyā api vratam idam putra arthinyāḥ narādhipa arundhatyā tathā cīrṇam vasiṣṭham prati kāmatas dṛśyate divi ca adya api vasiṣṭhasya samīpatas rohiṇyāḥ lavaṇa tyāgāt sa pannī gaṇa mardanam iti eṣā tithiḥ iti eva tṛtīyā loka pūjitā sadā viśeṣataḥ puṇyā vaiśākhe māsi yā bhavet puṇyā bhādrapade māsi māghe pi evam na saṃśayaḥ māghe bhādrapade ca api strīṇām dhanyā pracakṣate sādhāraṇā tu vaiśākhe sarva lokasya bhārata māgha māse tṛtīyāyām guḍasya lavaṇasya ca dānam śreyaskaram rājan strīṇām ca puruṣasya ca guḍena tuṣyate dattaḥ lavaṇena tu viśva bhūḥ guḍa pūpāḥ tu dātavyāḥ māsi bhādrapade tathā tṛtīyāyām tu māghasya vāmadevasya prītaye ca vaiśākhe māsi rāja indra tṛtīyā candanasya ca vāriṇā tuṣyate vedhāḥ modakaiḥ bhīmaḥ eva hi dānāt tu candanasya iha kañja jaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ yātu eṣā kuru śārdūla vaiśākhe māsi vai tithiḥ tṛtīyā sā akṣayā loke gīrvāṇaiḥ abhinanditā āgatā iyam mahā bāho bhūri candram vasuvratā kaladhautam tathā annam ca ghṛtam ca api viśeṣataḥ yat yat dattam tu akṣayam syāt tena iyam akṣayā smṛtā yat kiṃcid dīyate dānam su alpam vā yadi vā bahu tat sarvam akṣayam syāt vai tena iyam akṣayā smṛtā dadāti karakan vāri bīja samanvitān sa yāti puruṣaḥ vīra lokam vai hema mālinaḥ iti eṣā kathitā vīraiḥ tṛtīyā tithiḥ uttamā yām upoṣya naraḥ rājñ ṛddhim vṛddhim śriyam bhajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām brāhme parvaṇi tṛtīyākalpavidhi varṇanam nāma ekaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ caturthyām tu sadā rājñ nirāhāra vrata anvitaḥ yāti bhāgya nivāsam hi krīḍate vibhavaiḥ saha iha ca āgatya puṇya ante divyaḥ divya vapūḥ yaśāḥ matimān dhṛtimān vāgmī bhāgyavān kāma kāravān asādhyāni api sādhya iha kṣaṇāt eva mahanti api rājā bhavati dīrgha āyūḥ sapta janmāni asau nṛpa etat dadāti santuṣṭaḥ vighna hantā vināyakaḥ uvāca kaumāre lakṣaṇe puṃsām strīṇām ca sukṛte kṛte vighnam cakāra vighneśaḥ gāṅgeyasya vināyakaḥ tam tu vighnam viditvā asau kārttikeyaḥ ruṣā anvitaḥ utkṛṣya dantam tasya āsyāt hantum tam ca samudyataḥ nivārya apṛcchat deveśaḥ roṣaḥ kāryaḥ kutas tvayā tam ca ācakhyau sa pitre vai kṛtam pūruṣa lakṣaṇam tatra vighna kṛte mahyam yoṣitā na ca lakṣaṇam mama kim lakṣaṇam putra paśyase tvam vadasva me avicāreṇa saṃsthāpyam kapālī tena ca ucyate sa tat lakṣaṇam ādāya samudre prākṣipat ruṣā aham jyāyān aham jyāyān vivādaḥ abhūt tayoḥ dvayoḥ evam bruvati brahmaṇaḥ pañcamam śiraḥ mukta aṭṭahāsam provāca tvām aham veditā bhava tasmin sthānāt tasmāt tu brahmaṇaḥ roṣāt viniḥsṛtaḥ tu anyaḥ puruṣaḥ śveta kuṇḍalī kavacī sa śiraskaḥ ca sa śaraḥ sa śarāsanaḥ anirdeśya vapūḥ sragvī kim karomi sa ca abravīt atha uvāca ruṣā brahmā hanyatām sa su durmatiḥ rudraḥ api viṣṇu tejobhiḥ praviṣṭaḥ sa tu adhiṣṭhitaḥ haraḥ nārāyaṇam devam vaikuṇṭham aparājitam haram dṛṣṭvā atha samprāptam kāryam ca asya vicintya ca uvāca śūlinam devaḥ bhindhi śūlena mama bhujam sa bibheda mahā tejāḥ bhujam śūlena tam haraḥ śūlabhedāt asṛk ca ūrdhvam jagāma āvṛtya rodasī vinivṛtya tatas paścāt kapāle nipapāta ha tadā tu vyasṛjat toyam sa kṛtvā vāruṇām tanum hanta āmukta kavacam raktam rakta kuṇḍalinam naram atha uvāca bhavam devam kim karomi iti mānada asau api sasarja atha śveta kuṇḍalinam naram yathā rājan balīyasau kuja ketū yuga atyaye na ca adṛśyata vijayaḥ ekasya api tadā tayoḥ atha antarikṣe tau dṛṣṭvā vāc uvāca aśarīriṇī bhū loka bhāvam nirdhūya bhūyas gantā surālayam evam uktvā tu vaikuṇṭhaḥ dadau ekam raveḥ tadā śveta kuṇḍalinam dṛptam tam jagrāha raviḥ mudā indrasya api tatas paścāt rakta kuṇḍalinam dadau atha uvāca tadā rudram devaḥ kamala saṃsthitaḥ ye ca vratam tvadīyam vai dhārayiṣyanti mānavāḥ māhūya ca samudram sa pratyuvāca avicārayān kuruṣva ābharaṇam strīṇām lakṣaṇam yat vilakṣaṇam sa ca āha mama nāmnā idam bhavet puruṣa lakṣaṇam prayaccha asya viṣāṇam vai niṣkṛṣṭam yat tvayā adhunā ṛte vināyakam tat vai daivayogāt na kāmatas gṛhāṇa etat sāmudram yat tvayā parikīrtitam strī puṃsoḥ lakṣaṇam śreṣṭham sāmudram iti viśrutam imam ca sa viṣāṇam vai kuru deva vināyakam dadmi ca asya aham te na yadā tu ayam viṣāṇam ca muktvā tu vicariṣyati tadā viṣāṇa muktaḥ san bhasma kariṣyati evam astu iti tam ca uktvā viṣāṇam tad kare dadau adya api dṛśyate pratimā nṛpa bhīma sūnoḥ mahā bāhoḥ vighnam karttum mahātmanaḥ etat rahasyam devānām mayā te samudāhṛtam yaḥ idam śrāvayet vidvāḥ brāhmaṇān vedapāragān kṣatriyān ca sva vṛtti sthān viś śūdrān ca guṇa anvitān nirvighnam sarva kāryāṇi sādhayet na atra saṃśayaḥ ṛddhim vṛddhim śriyam ca api vindeta bharata uttama iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpa varṇanam nāma dvāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca kena ayam bhīma jaḥ vipra pramatha adhipatiḥ kṛtaḥ bhartṛ tve ca api vighnānām adhikārī katham babhau sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi rāja indra yat ayam vighna kārakaḥ tat te vacmi mahā bāho śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ adhunā dṛṣṭvā karmāṇi siddhāni vinā vighnena bhārataiḥ agata kleśām prajām dṛṣṭvā garvitām kṛtsnaśas nṛpa gaṇānām ca ādhipatye ca bhīmaḥ kañjaja sāttvataiḥ tata upasṛṣṭaḥ yaḥ tasya lakṣaṇāni nibodha mama svapna iva gāhate kāṣāya vāsasaḥ ca eva kravyādān ca adhirohati vimanāḥ viphala ārambhaḥ saṃsīdati animittatas karaṭa ārūḍham ātmānam ambhasaḥ antara gam tathā pattibhiḥ ca āvṛtam yāntam saṃgamana antikam nṛpa paśyate kuru śārdūla svapna ante na atra saṃśayaḥ cittam ca vikṛta ākāram karavīra vibhūṣitam kumārī na ca bhartāram apatyam garbhiṇī tathā ācārya tvam śrotriyaḥ ca śiṣyāḥ ca adhyayanam tathā vaṇij lābham ca na āpnoti kṛṣim ca eva kṛṣīvalaḥ śukla pakṣe caturthyām tu vāsare dhiṣaṇasya ca bhadrāsana upaviṣṭasya svasti vācya dvijān śubhān sampūjya kṛṣṇam sa pitaram tāta pavamānam sitam tathā dhiṣaṇam ca indu putram ca koṇam ketum ca bhārata aśva sthānāt gaja sthānāt valmīkāt saṅgama adhradāt mṛttikām rocanām gandhān guggulam ca apsu nikṣipet yat āhṛtam hi eka varṇaiḥ caturbhiḥ kalaśaiḥ hradāt carmaṇi ānaḍuhe rakte sthāpyam bhadrāsanam tathā sahasrākṣam śatadhāram ṛṣibhiḥ pāvanam kṛtam tena tvām abhiṣiñcāmi pāvamānyaḥ punantu te bhagam te varuṇaḥ rājā bhagam sūryaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ lalāṭe karṇayoḥ akṣṇoḥ apaḥ tat hanantu te sadā snātasya sārṣapam tailam suveṇa audumbareṇa tu mitaḥ ca sammitaḥ ca eva tathā ca śālakaṇṭakaḥ kūṣmāṇḍaḥ rāja śreṣṭhāḥ te agnayaḥ svāhā samanvitāḥ dadyāt catuṣpathe śūrpe kuśān āstīrya sarvatas kṛta akṛtān taṇḍulān ca palala odanam eva ca matsyān pakvān tathā eva āmān māṃsam etāvat eva tu puṣpam citram sa gandham ca surām ca trividhām api mūlakam pūrikāḥ pūpān tathā eva uṇḍerikā srajam dadhi pāyasam annam ca guḍa veṣṭān samodakān dūrvā sarṣapa puṣpāṇām dattvā puṣpa añjali trayam putrān dehi dhanam dehi sarvān kāmān ca dehi me acalām buddhim me dehi dharāyām khyātim eva ca tatas śukla ambara dharaḥ śukla mālya anulepanaḥ evam vināyakam pūjya grahān ca eva vidhānāt phalam āpnoti śriyam prāpnoti anuttamām mad sadā pūjām tilakam svāminaḥ tathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpa varṇanam nāma trayoviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca narāṇām yoṣitām ca eva lakṣaṇāni mahāmate kruddhena yāni kṣiptāni īśvareṇa mahā udadhau kṛṣṇasya vacanāt bhūyas samudreṇa arpitāni vai yathā guhena rāja indra strī puṃsām lakṣaṇāni vai proktāni kuru śārdūla tathā te kathayāmi vai tat pātāt hate krauñce vyomakeśasya sūnunā asau api mahā tejāḥ praṇamya śirasā vibhum pitāmaham babhāṣa idam lakṣaṇam brūhi mama vibho narāṇām yuvatīnām ca kautukam paramam mama yat mayā uktam purā deva prakṣiptam lavaṇārṇave prāptam ca vismṛtam bhūyas tat mama brūhi hi aśeṣatas sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi deveśa bhīmasya ānanda vardhana lakṣaṇāni nibodha tvam puruṣāṇām aśeṣatas pūrvāhṇe maṅgalaiḥ yukte parīkṣeta vicakṣaṇaḥ pramāṇam saṃhatim chāyām gatim sarva aṅga lakṣaṇam danta keśa nakha śmaśru etat sarvam vicakṣaṇaḥ pūrvam āyuḥ parīkṣeta paścāt lakṣaṇam ādiśet kṣīṇe hi āyuṣi martyānām lakṣaṇaiḥ kim prayojanam aṣṭottaraśatam yasya uttamam tasya lakṣaṇam pramāṇa lakṣaṇam proktam samudreṇa śubha aśubham atas param pravakṣyāmi deha avayava lakṣaṇam pādaiḥ sa māṃsakaiḥ snigdhaiḥ raktam saumyaiḥ su śobhanaiḥ unnataiḥ sveda rahitaiḥ sirā hīnaiḥ ca pārthivaḥ yasya pāda tale rekhā sāṃkuśā iva prakāśate satatam hi sukham tasya puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ tāmra nakhau supārṣṇī uṣṇau śirā virahitau gūḍha gulphau ca bhīmaja śūrpa ākṛtī mahā bāho rūkṣau śveta nakhau tathā vakrau śira asantatau ca saṃśuṣkau virala aṅgulī pītau agamyā niratau kṛṣṇau pāna ratau sadā aṅguṣṭhau pṛthulau yeṣām te narāḥ bhāgya varjitāḥ kliśyante vikṛta aṅguṣṭhāḥ te narāḥ pāda gāminaḥ cipiṭaiḥ vikṛtaiḥ bhagnaiḥ aṅguṣṭhaiḥ ati ninditāḥ vakraiḥ bhagnaiḥ tathā hrasvaiḥ aṅguṣṭhaiḥ kleśa bhāginaḥ śūrpa ākāraiḥ ca vikṛtaiḥ bhagnaiḥ vakraiḥ sirā tataiḥ sa svedaiḥ pāṇḍu rūkṣaiḥ ca caraṇaiḥ ati ninditāḥ yasya pradeśinī dīrghā aṅguṣṭham yā atikramet strī bhogam labhate nityam puruṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ kaniṣṭhāyām tu dīrghāyām suvarṇasya tu bhāginaḥ cipiṭāḥ viralāḥ śuṣkāḥ yasya aṅgulyaḥ bhavanti vai śvetaiḥ nakhaiḥ virūkṣaiḥ ca puruṣāḥ duḥkha jīvinaḥ kuśīlāḥ kunakhaiḥ jñeyāḥ kāma bhoga vivarjitāḥ vikṛtaiḥ sphuṭitaiḥ ūkṣaiḥ nakhaiḥ dāridrya bhāginaḥ indragopaka saṃkāśaiḥ nakhaiḥ nṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ śaṅkha āvarta pratīkāśaiḥ nakhaiḥ bhavati pārthivaḥ tāmraiḥ nakhaiḥ tathā aiśvaryam dhanyāḥ padma nakhāḥ narāḥ sūkṣmaiḥ upacitaiḥ tāmraiḥ nakhaiḥ nṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ romaśābhyām ca jaṅghābhyām duḥkha dāridrya bhāginaḥ bandhanam hrasva jaṅghānām aiśvaryam ca eva nirdiśet mṛgajaṅghāḥ ca rājānaḥ jāyante na atra saṃśayaḥ dīrgha jaṅghāḥ sthūla jaṅghāḥ nityam bhāgya vivarjitāḥ śṛgāla jaṅghāḥ puruṣāḥ nityam bhāgya vivarjitāḥ kākajaṅghāḥ narāḥ ye tu bhaveyuḥ duḥkha bhāginaḥ pīnajaṅghāḥ tathā aiśvaryam prāpnuvanti na saṃśayaḥ siṃha vyāghra samāḥ jaṅghāḥ dhaninaḥ parikīrtitāḥ pārthivānām bhavet roma ca ekaikam romakūpake paṇḍita śrotriyāṇām ca dve dve jñeye mahāmate tribhiḥ tribhiḥ tathā niḥsvāḥ mānavāḥ duḥkha bhāginaḥ keśāḥ ca eva mahā bāho ninditā pūjitāḥ tathā nimnaiḥ sva strī jitāḥ jñeyāḥ sa māṃsaiḥ rājya bhāginaḥ haṃsa bhāsa śukānām ca tulyā yasya gatiḥ bhavet anyeṣām api śastānām pakṣiṇām ca śubhā gatiḥ vṛṣa siṃha gaja indrāṇām 6gatiḥ bhoga vivardhinī jala ūrmi sadṛśī yā ca kāka ulūka samā ca yā gatiḥ dravya vihīnānām duḥkha śoka bhayaṅkarā mahiṣāṇām khara sūkarayoḥ tathā gatiḥ meṣa samā yeṣām te narāḥ bhāgya varjitāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma caturviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ puruṣa lakṣaṇa varṇanam prasū sthūlaiḥ sirālaiḥ viṣamaiḥ liṅgaiḥ dāridryam ādiśet ṛjubhiḥ vartula ākāraiḥ puruṣā putrabhāginaḥ nimna pāda upaviṣṭasya bhūmim spṛśati mehanaḥ duḥkhitam tam vijānīyāt puruṣam na atra saṃśayaḥ bhūmau pāda upaviṣṭasya gulphau spṛśati mehanaḥ īśvaram tam vijānīyāt pramadānām ca vallabham pārthivaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ samudra vacanam yathā pravāla sadṛśaiḥ snigdhaiḥ maṇibhiḥ pārthivaḥ bhavet pāṇḍuraiḥ malinaiḥ rūkṣaiḥ dīrgha vyāsaiḥ diśaḥ vrajet dhana rakṣāḥ tathā strīṇām bhoktāraḥ te bhavanti hi yuvatīnām mahā bāho niḥsvāḥ ca api bhavanti te na ulbaṇaiḥ ca api dhaninaḥ narāḥ vīrāḥ bhavanti hi mūtradhārā patet ekā valitā dakṣiṇā yadi sa bhavet pārthivaḥ pṛthvyāḥ samudra vacanam yathā bahu dhārāḥ tathā rūkṣāḥ sa śabdāḥ puruṣa adhamāḥ havi gandhi bhavet yasya dhana āḍhyaḥ śrotriyaḥ smṛtaḥ mūṣagandhiḥ bhavet putrī padmagandhiḥ nṛpaḥ smṛ śīghra maithuna gāmī yaḥ sa dīrgha āyūḥ atas anyathā alpa āyūḥ deva śārdūlaiḥ vijñeyaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ tanu śukraḥ strī janakaḥ māṃsa gandhī ca bhogavān yat kiṃcid raktam tathā kṛṣṇam bhavet yasya tu śoṇitam adhamaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ sadā duḥkha eka bhājanam pravāla sadṛśam snigdham bhavet yasya ca śoṇitam rājānam tam vijānīyāt saptadvīpā adhipam guha vistīrṇā māṃsalā snigdhā vastiḥ puṃsām praśasyate nirmāṃsāḥ vikaṭāḥ rūkṣāḥ vastiḥ yeṣām na te śubhāḥ gomāyu sadṛśā yasya śvāna uṣṭra mahiṣasya ca sa bhavet duḥkhitaḥ nityam puruṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ yaḥ ca eka vṛṣaṇaḥ tāta jale prāṇān vimuñjati strī cañcalaḥ tu viṣamaiḥ samaiḥ rājyam pracakṣate ūrdhva gaiḥ ca api hrasva āyūḥ śatañjīvī sthūla sphic bhavati kṣemī dravya yuktaḥ sa māṃsa dhṛk rājā maṇḍūka sphic maṇḍalaḥ dvi maṇḍalaḥ mahā bāho siṃha sphic sārvabhauma tā uṣṭra vānarayoḥ yaḥ tu dhārayet sphic mahāmate maṇḍūka sadṛśam yasya puruṣasya udaram bhavet sa bhavet pārthivaḥ puṣṭyā samudra vacanam yathā māṃsalaiḥ ṛjuṣu vṛttaiḥ pārśvaiḥ nṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ īśvaraḥ vyāghrapṛṣṭhaḥ tu senāyāḥ ca eva nāyakaḥ kūrmapṛṣṭhāḥ tu rājānaḥ dhana saubhāgya bhāginaḥ śata āyuṣaḥ vijānīyāt bhoga bhājaḥ mahādhanān tasya sidhyati vāṇijyam puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ yajña yājī bhavet nityam bahu vittaḥ ca mānavaḥ śailam vā api atha vā vṛkṣaḥ kara madhye tu dṛśyate acalām śriyam āpnoti bahu bhṛtya samanvitaḥ śakti tomara bāṇa asi rekhā cāpa upamā tathā dhvaja bhrāpī atha vā śaṅkhaḥ kara madhye tu dṛśyate śrīvatsam atha vā padmam vajram vā cakam eva ca rājānam tam vijānīyāt para sainya vidāraṇam dakṣiṇe tu kara aṅguṣṭhe yavaḥ yasya tu dṛśyate yasya pāṇi tale rekhā kaniṣṭhā mūlam utthitā gatāḥ madhyam pradeśinyāḥ sa jīvet śaradaḥ śatam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma pañcaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaḍaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ puruṣa lakṣaṇa varṇanam māyāvī kukṣiḥ tathā kuhaka kṛt sadā rājā syāt nimnakukṣiḥ tu sārvabhaumaḥ mahā balaḥ vistīrṇābhiḥ maṇḍalābhiḥ unnatābhiḥ ca nābhibhiḥ valiḥ madhyaṅga tā vīrāḥ viṣamā ca viśeṣataḥ dhana hānim tathā śūlam nityam janayate vibho vāmā vārttā sadā śāntim karoti iti viduḥ budhāḥ karoti medhām dakṣiṇena saṃpravṛttā divaspate pārśva āyatā dīrgham āyuḥ aiśvaryam ūrdhvatas smṛtam go āḍhya tām adhastāt tu karoti iti viduḥ budhāḥ śatapattra karṇikā ābhā nābhiḥ yasya mahāmate bhūpa tvam kurute sā tu puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ śastreṇa antam vrajet vīraiḥ strī bhogam ca āpnuyāt tathā ācāryaḥ bahu putraḥ ca yathāsaṃkhyam vinirdiśet agamyā gāminaḥ jñeyāḥ viṣamābhiḥ na saṃśayaḥ māṃsalaiḥ mṛdubhiḥ rājā syāt na atra saṃśayaḥ rājānaḥ sukhinaḥ ca api bhavanti iha na saṃśayaḥ avepanam māṃsalam ca pārthivānām na saṃśayaḥ khara roma citam vīraśirālam ca viśeṣataḥ adhanānām bhavet eva hṛdayam ṛbhavaḥ uttama sama vakṣasaḥ artha yutāḥ pīnaiḥ śūrāḥ smṛtāḥ budhaiḥ tanubhiḥ dravya hīnāḥ syuḥ asamaiḥ ca api akiñcanāḥ nirmāṃsaiḥ viṣamaiḥ vīra niḥsvaḥ nimnaiḥ pracakṣyate śūraḥ syāt mahiṣa grīvaḥ mṛga grīvaḥ bhaya āturaḥ bhavet rājā lamba kaṇṭhaḥ agra lakṣaṇaḥ nimāṃsau romaśau bhagnau alpau vā api viśeṣataḥ bhavet aromaśam pṛṣṭham dhaninām bhīma sambhava sa lomaśam tathā vakram nirdhanānām bala adhipa asvedanau unnatau ca tathā pīnau ṣaḍānana mad īdṛśau aṃsau nagaja ānanda vardhana dīrgha bāhuḥ bhavet rājā samudra vacanam yathā pralamba bāhuḥ vijñeyaḥ naraḥ sarva guṇa anvitaḥ ye tu dīrgha āyata bhujāḥ ca ye sampūrṇa bāhuḥ rājā syāt iti āha sa payonidhiḥ grīvā ca 1vartula ākārā kambu rekhā samāvṛtā dīrgha grīvāḥ baka grīvā śuka grīvāḥ ca ye narāḥ uṣṭra grīvāḥ kari grīvāḥ sarve te nirdhanāḥ smṛtāḥ ibha aṅga sadṛśau vṛttau samau pīnau ca suvrata ājānu lambinau bāhū pārthivānām na saṃśayaḥ daridrāṇām lomaśau hrasvau bāhū jñeyau surottama taskarāṇām ca viṣamau sthūlau sūkṣmau ca suvrata bhavet ārbhava śārdūla tathā bhīruḥ ca mānavaḥ uttāna kara talaḥ dātā bhavati iti na saṃśayaḥ bhavanti viṣamaiḥ nimnāḥ ca api viśeṣataḥ kara talaiḥ deva śārdūlaiḥ lākṣā ābhaiḥ īśvarāḥ smṛtāḥ agamyā gamanam pītaiḥ rūkṣaiḥ nirdhana tā smṛtā apeya pānam kurvanti nīla kṛṣṇaiḥ sadā eva hi nimnāḥ snigdhā bhavet nṛṇām rekhā kara tale guha dhaninām na daridrāṇām iti āha sa payonidhiḥ dhaninaḥ tu mahā bāho ye ghana aṅgulayaḥ narāḥ ādiśet śuṇḍa vaktrāḥ narāḥ ye tu durbhagāḥ te na saṃśayaḥ hari vaktrāḥ jihma vaktrāḥ vikṛta āsyāḥ tathā narāḥ bhagna vatrāḥ karāla āsyā sarve te taskarāḥ smṛtāḥ sampūrṇa vaktrāḥ rājānaḥ gaja siṃha ānanāḥ tathā chāga vānara vaktrāḥ ca dhaninaḥ parikīrtitāḥ bhavet nityam bahu vittaḥ ca mānavaḥ siṃha vyāghra gaja indrāṇām kapolaḥ sadṛśaḥ yadi mahā bhogī sa vijñeyaḥ senāyāḥ ca eva nāyakaḥ vadanam tu samam ślakṣṇam saumyam saṃvṛtam eva hi pārthivānām mahā bāho viparītam tu duḥkha dam strī mukham putra nāśāya maṇḍalam sukhitām vrajet dravya nāśāya vai dīrgham pāpa dam bhaya dam tathā dhūrtānām caturasram syāt putra hāni karam śṛṇu hrasvam kīnāśe pūrṇa kāntam ca bhoginām sthūla uṣṭhāḥ hanu mūlāḥ ca śuṣkaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ ca duḥkhitāḥ asphoṭita agram snigdham ca natam mṛdu tathā guha sampūrṇam ca sadā śastam śmaśru bhūmipateḥ guha raktaiḥ ca alpaiḥ tathā rūkṣaiḥ śmaśruṣu bhīma nandana narāḥ caurāḥ bhavanti eva paradāra ratāḥ tathā nirmāṃsau yasya vai karṇau saṃgrāmāt nāśam ṛcchati cipiṭābhyām bhavet rogī hrasvau ca kṛpaṇasya ca śaṅkukarṇaḥ ca bhūnāthaḥ sarva śatru bhayaṃkaraḥ dīrgha āyūḥ romaśābhyām tu vipulābhyām narādhipaḥ bhogī ca saḥ bhavet nityam deva brāhmaṇa pūjakaḥ madhya avabaddhau krūrasya vyālambau ca viśeṣataḥ bhogī syāt nigaṇḍaḥ vai mantrī sampūrṇa gaṇḍakaḥ cirajīvī śuṣka nāsikaḥ kunda kuṇḍala saṃkāśaiḥ prakāśaiḥ daśanaiḥ nṛpaḥ ṛkṣa vānara dantāḥ ca nityam kṣudh paripīḍitāḥ hasti dantāḥ khara dantāḥ snigdha dantāḥ guṇa anvitāḥ karālaiḥ viralaiḥ rūkṣaiḥ daśanaiḥ duḥkha jīvinaḥ dvātriṃśat dantāḥ rājānaḥ ekatriṃśat ca bhogavān triṃśat dantāḥ narāḥ nityam sukha duḥkhi tva bhāginaḥ daśanaiḥ puruṣāḥ duḥkhabhāginaḥ bhavet preṣyaḥ sa valayā tu jihvayā śveta jihvāḥ narāḥ jñeyāḥ śauca ācāra samanvitāḥ padma pattra samā jihvā sūkṣmā dīrghā su śobhanā sthūlā ca na ca vistīrṇā yeṣām te manuja adhipāḥ nimnā snigdhā ca hrasvā ca rakta agrā rasanā yadi kṛṣṇa tāluḥ naraḥ yaḥ tu saḥ bhavet kula nāśanaḥ sukha bhāgī duḥkha bhāgī pīta tāluḥ narādhipaḥ vikṛtam sphuṭitam rūkṣam tālukam na praśasyate padma tāluḥ bhavet rājā śveta tāluḥ dhaneśvaraḥ haṃsa svarāḥ narāḥ dhanyāḥ megha gambhīra niḥsvanāḥ krauñca svanāḥ ca rājānaḥ bhogavantaḥ mahādhanāḥ cakravāka svanāḥ dhanyāḥ rājānaḥ dharma vatsalāḥ rūkṣa dīrgha svarāḥ krūrāḥ paśūnām sadṛśāḥ na tu puruṣa kleśa bhāgin cāṣa svanāḥ bhāgya yutāḥ bhinna kāṃsya svarāḥ ca ye kṣīṇa bhinna svarāḥ ye syuḥ adhamāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ pārthivāḥ tanu nāsāḥ ca dīrgha nāsāḥ ca bhoginaḥ hrasva nāsāḥ narāḥ ye tu dharma śīlāḥ tu te matāḥ hasti aśva siṃha nāsāḥ ca sūcī nāsāḥ ca ye narāḥ teṣām sidhyati vāṇijyam hayānām ca eva vikrayaḥ vikṛtā nāsikā yasya sthūla agrā rūpa varjitā pāpa karmā sa vijñeyaḥ sāmudra vacanam yathā dāḍima puṣpa saṃkāśe bhavetām yasya locane bhūpati tad tu vijñā saptadvīpā adhipa guha biḍāla haṃsa netrāḥ ca bhavanti puruṣa adhamāḥ mapūra nakula akṣāḥ ca narāḥ te madhyamāḥ smṛtāḥ rājānaḥ sarva bhoga samanvitāḥ rocanā haritā lākṣā guñjā piṅgāḥ dhaneśvarāḥ bala sattva guṇa upetāḥ pṛthivī cakravartinaḥ dvi mātrā vīkṣaṇāḥ nityam jīvanti parama āśritāḥ tri mātrā syandinaḥ jñeyāḥ puruṣāḥ sukha bhāginaḥ catur mātrā nimeṣaiḥ ca nayanaiḥ īśvarāḥ smṛtāḥ dīrgha āyuṣaḥ dharma ratāḥ pañca mātrā nimeṣiṇaḥ hrasva karṇāḥ mahābhāgāḥ mahā karṇāḥ ca ye narāḥ dīrgha āyuṣaḥ śukti karṇāḥ śaṅkha karṇāḥ mahādhanāḥ dīrgha āyuṣaḥ dīrgha karṇāḥ lamba karṇāḥ tapasvinaḥ lalāṭena ardhacandreṇa bhavanti pṛthivīśvarāḥ vipulena lalāṭena mahā dhanapatiḥ smṛtaḥ rekhā pañca lalāṭe tu striyāḥ vā puruṣasya vā śatam jīvati varṣāṇām aiśvaryam ca adhigacchati catūrekhām aśītim tu tribhiḥ saptatim eva ca dvābhyām ṣaṣṭim tu rekhābhyām catvāriṃśat tathā ekayā arekhena lalāṭena vijñeyā pañcaviṃśatiḥ rekhā chedaiḥ tu vijñeyāḥ hīna madhya uttamāḥ narāḥ alpa āyuṣaḥ tathā alpābhiḥ vyādhibhiḥ paripīḍitāḥ triśūlam paṭṭiśam vā api lalāṭe yasya dṛśyate bhoginam kīrtim āśritam candra ākāram narendrāṇām go āḍhyam maṅgalam smṛtam viṣamam tu daridrāṇām śiraḥ dīrgham tu duḥkhinām nāga kumbha nibham rājñaḥ samam sarvatra bhoginaḥ kapilaḥ sphuṭitaiḥ rūkṣaiḥ sthūlaiḥ ca śikhareśayaiḥ duḥkhitā puruṣāḥ jñeyāḥ roma śmaśruṣu eva ca rūkṣāḥ vivarṇāḥ nistejāḥ kharāḥ sthūlāḥ ca mūrdhajāḥ na atistokāḥ na bahuśas mūrdhajāḥ duḥkha bhāginaḥ viralāḥ ca mṛdu snigdhāḥ bhramara añjana saprabhāḥ kacāḥ yasya tu dṛśyante saḥ bhavet pṛthivīpatiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma ṣaḍviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha saptaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ puruṣa lakṣaṇa varṇanam saṃkṣepāt mama vibho lakṣaṇāni nṛpasya tu śubhāni ca aṅga jātāni brūhi mama vadatām vara śṛṇu vakṣya iṅga jātāni pārthivasya śubhāni ca pārthivaḥ jñāyate yaiḥ tu narāṇām madhya bhāgāt udyatāni tathā ṣaḍ vai gambhīrāṇi ca trīṇi vai dīrghāni ca api sūkṣmāṇi bhavanti yasya pañca vā nābhiḥ saṃdhiḥ svanaḥ ca iti gambhīrāṇi ca trīṇi vai sa rājā na atra sandehaḥ śṛṇuṣva eva unnatāni ca yadhā ca āsyam nakhāḥ vakṣaḥ atha nāsikā kakṣe ca api mahā bāho ṣaḍ etāni viduḥ budhāḥ liṅgam pṛṣṭham tathā grīvā jaṅghāḥ hrasvāṇi suvrata jihvā raktā nakhāḥ ca eva sapta etāni mahāmate tvacaḥ kararuhāḥ keśāḥ daśanāḥ ṛbhavaḥ uttama sūkṣmāṇi etāni ca guha pañca ca api viduḥ budhāḥ nāsikā locane bāhū stanayoḥ antaram hanuḥ iti dīrgham idam proktam pañcakam bhūbhujām nṛpa kṣutam rājñām sakṛt dvis tris nāditam hrāditam tathā dīrgha āyuṣām prayuktam te hasitam ca viduḥ budhāḥ madhu piṅgaiḥ mahātmānaḥ narāḥ jñeyāḥ surādhipaiḥ bhīravaḥ hi kṛśa akṣāḥ tu caurāḥ maṇḍala cakrakaiḥ nīlotpala ābhaiḥ veda vidaḥ bhṛśam kṛṣṇaiḥ tathā arthitā śyāma akṣāḥ subhagāḥ jñeyāḥ dīna akṣaibhra daridra tā abhyunnatābhiḥ hrasva āyuḥ viśālābhiḥ sukhī bhavet bhruvaḥ bāla indu sadṛśāḥ dhaninām ārbhava uttamaiḥ kṣīṇābhiḥ artha hīnāḥ syuḥ narāḥ jñeyāḥ surottamaiḥ viralaiḥ unnataiḥ śaṅkhaiḥ dhanyāḥ syuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ nimnaiḥ stuti artha saṃsaktāḥ unnataiḥ ca janādhipāḥ syuḥ ācāryāḥ śukti sadṛśaiḥ narāḥ syuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ unnata śirobhiḥ āḍhyāḥ narāḥ jñeyāḥ sadā guha vadha bandha bhāginaḥ vīrāḥ narāḥ ninna lalāṭinaḥ bhṛśam unnataiḥ ca mūrkhāḥ ca kṛpaṇāḥ ca tathā nataiḥ śubha āvaham manuṣyāṇām vadanam syāt yathā śṛṇu adīnam ānanam snigdham sa smitam ca viśeṣataḥ sa aśru dīnam tathā rūkṣam asnigdham ninditam guha asambhāvyam mukham jñeyam narāṇām naga dāraṇaiḥ akampam gubha dam jñeyam narāṇām hasitam guha nimīlita akṣam pāpasya hasitam ca ārbhava uttama maṇḍalam śiraḥ yasya saḥ go āḍhyaḥ naraḥ bhavet cipiṭa ākārita śirāḥ hanyāt vai pitarā naraḥ ghaṇṭā ākṛti śiras dhvānam asakṛt sevate naraḥ nimnam śiraḥ nartha dam syāt narāṇām arbhava uttama bahulāḥ kapilāḥ sthūlāḥ viṣamāḥ sphuṭitāḥ tathā paruṣāḥ hrasva ati kuṭilāḥ daridrāṇām kacāḥ ghanāḥ iti uktam lakṣaṇam śubham vā aśubham eva ca yoṣitām tat idānīm te lakṣaṇam vacmi bhīmaja iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma saptaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ strī lakṣaṇa varṇanam śṛṇu idānīm mahā bāho strī lakṣaṇam anuttamam yat mayā uktam purā vīra nāradasya mahātmanaḥ ninditam ca praśastam ca strīṇām vakṣyāmi lakṣaṇam mātaram pitaram ca eva bhrātaram mātulam tathā dvijaiḥ tu saha vā āgamya kanyām vīkṣeta śāstra vid pāṇim eva ca jaṅghe ca kaṭi nāsā ūrū eva ca jihvām ca uṣṭhau ca dantāḥ ca kapolam galakam tathā cakṣuḥ nāsāḥ lalāṭam ca śiraḥ keśān tathā eva ca romarājim svaram varṇam āvartāni tu vā punar yasyāḥ tu rekhā grīvāyām yā ca rakta anta locanā lalāṭe dṛśyate yasyāḥ triśūlam deva nirmitam bahūnām strī sahasrāṇām svāminīm tām vinirdiśet rājahaṃsa gatiḥ yasyāḥ mṛga akṣā mṛga varṇakā sama śukla agra dantā ca kanyām tām uttamām viduḥ maṇḍūka kukṣī yā kanyā nyagrodha parimaṇḍalā haṃsa svarā mṛdu vacāḥ yā kanyā madhu piṅgalā āyatau śravaṇau yasyāḥ surūpā ca api nāsikā bhruvau ca indrāyudha ākārau sā atyantam sukha bhāginī tanvī śyāmā tathā kṛṣṇā snigdha aṅgā mṛdu bhāṣiṇī bhavet aiśvarya bhāginī vistīrṇam jaghanam yasyāḥ vedi madhyā tu yā bhavet maśakam tilakam vā api sā pūrvam janayet sutam rakta akṣā rakta caraṇā sā atyantam sukha bhāginī yena kenacid aṃśena māṃsam yasyāḥ vivardhate rāsabhīm tādṛśām vidyāt na sā kalyāṇam arhati pāde pradeśinī yasyāḥ aṅguṣṭham samatikramet duḥśīlā durbhagā jñeyā kanyām tām parivarjayet pāde madhyamikā yasyāḥ kṣitim na spṛśate yadi ramate sā na kaumāre svacchandā kāma cāriṇī pāde anāmikā yasyāḥ kṣitim na spṛśate yadi dvitīyam puruṣam hatvā tṛtīye sā pratiṣṭhitā pāde kaniṣṭhā yasyāḥ tu kṣitim na spṛśate yadi dvitīyam puruṣam hatvā tṛtīye sā pratiṣṭhitā ca kanyām tām parivarjayet na etāḥ patiṣu rajyante yāḥ ca nakṣatra nāmakāḥ āvartaḥ pṛṣṭhatas yasyāḥ nābhim samanuvindati pṛṣṭha āvartā patim hanti na abhyāvartā pativratā yasyāḥ tu hasamānāyāḥ gaṇḍe jāyet kūpakam ramate sā na kaumāre svacchandā kārya kāriṇī yasyāḥ tu gacchamānāyāḥ ṭiṭṭīkāyati jaṅghikā putram vyavasyet sā kartum pati tve na atra saṃśayaḥ sthūla pādā ca yā kanyā sarva aṅgeṣu ca lomaśā sthūla hastā ca yā syāt vai dāsīm tām nirdiśet budhaḥ yasyāḥ ca utkaṭakau pādau mukham ca vikṛtam bhavet uttara uṣṭhe ca romāṇi sā kṣipram bhakṣayet patim trīṇi yasyāḥ pralambante lalāṭam udaram sphicau trīṇi bhakṣayate sā tu devaram śvasuram patim samudbhūṣita cāritrā guru bhaktā pativratā deva brāhmaṇa bhaktā ca mānuṣīm tām vinirdiśet nityam snātā sugandhā ca nityam ca priya vādinī alpa āśinī alpa roṣā ca devatām tām vinirdiśet hadayam syāt ca durgrāhyam mārjārī tām vinirdiśet nīceṣu ramate nityam rāsabhī tām vinirdiśet pratikūla karā nityam bandhūnām bhartuḥ eva ca svacchande lalitām ca eva āsurīm tām vinirdiśet bahu āśī bahu vākyā ca nityam ca apriya vādinī hinasti sva patim yā tu rākṣasīm tām vinirdiśet mad ācāra paribhraṣṭā rūpa bhraṣṭā bhayaṅkarā prasveda mala paṅkā ca piśācīm tām vinirdiśet nityam snātām sugandhām ca māṃsa madya priya ādinīm capalā cañcalā ca eva nityam paśyet diśaḥ tathā cala svabhāvā lubdhā ca vānarīm tām vinirdiśet candra ānanām śubha aṅgām tu matta vāraṇa gāminīm mārakta nakha hastām tu vidyāt vidyādharīm budhaḥ vīṇā vāditra śabdena vaṃśa gīta raveṇa ca puṣpa dhūpa prasaktām ca gāndharvām tām vinirdiśet strīṇām tathā puṃstvavatām ca vīra yat lakṣaṇam pārthiva loka pūjyam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe strīlakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma aṣṭāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca gakāra akṣara devasya gaṇeśasya mahātmanaḥ brūhi sa aṅgam mantra samanvitam yatheṣṭam ceṣṭataḥ siddhiḥ sadā bhavati kāmakā mūlam saṅgṛhya kuryāt gaṇapatim budhaḥ aṅguṣṭha parva mātram tu padmāsana gatam tathā nāga yajñopavīta aṅgam śaśāṅka kṛta śekharam tṛtīye paraśum dadyāt caturthe modakam nyaset vāsobhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ raktaiḥ mālyaiḥ ca ārādhayet gaṇam evam pūjya agratas tasya bhojayet brāhmaṇam budhaḥ māśīrvādam tatas tasmāt prāpya siddhim avāpnuyāt bhaktyā kuru kula śreṣṭha śṛṇu mantra padāni vai gaṃ svāhā mūlamantraḥ ayam praṇavena samanvitaḥ gāṃ namaḥ hadayam jñeyam gīṃ śiraḥ parikīrtitam śikhā ca gūṃ namaḥ jñeyaḥ gaiṃ namaḥ kavacam smṛtam gauṃ namaḥ netram uddiṣṭam gaḥ phaṭ kāmāstram ucyate puṣpa ulkāya namaḥ puṣpa mantraḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ dhūpa ulkāya namaḥ dhūpa mantraḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ dīpolkāya namaḥ dīpa mantraḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ om gaṃ mahā ulkāya namaḥ bali mantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ mahākarṇāya vidmahe vakratuṇḍāya dhīmahi tat naḥ dantī pracodayāt gāyatrī japaḥ pūrvatas mahāgaṇapataye vīra svāhā dakṣiṇatas sadā maholkāya paścimatas kūśmāṇḍāya uttareṇa tu ekadanta tripurāntakāya āgneyyām vīra nirdiśet prāṇāya svāḥ nairṛtyām vāyavyām padma daṃṣṭrāya narāya iti aiśānyām homayet budhaḥ na yadā vaśyā bhavati tila āhutim aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt tri rātreṇa rājā vaśyaḥ bhavati om lamba rājñe namaḥ mukhaḥ bhūtvā aṣṭa sahasram japet mad upoṣya gandha puṣpa ādibhiḥ arcanam kṛtvā tila taṇḍulān juhuyāt apāmārga samidbhiḥ agnim prajvālya ekaviṃśati āhutīḥ yaḥ juhuyāt tri rātrāt śatrum vyāpādayati yad mūle kajjalam saṅgṛhya saptabhiḥ mantritam kṛtvā netrāṇi añjayet yam paśyati sa vaśī bhavati puṣpam phalam mūlam ca aṣṭa sahasra abhimantritam kṛtvā yasmai dadāti sa vaśyaḥ bhavati sarve grahāḥ su prītāḥ bhavanti nagara dvāram gatvā aṣṭa sahasram dvāram nirūpayet puram dvāreṇa gṛhyate prāc mukhaḥ yajati saḥ uccāṭayati lūnayati chedayati nṛtyayati ākarṣayati stambhayati yojana śatāt strī puruṣān ākarṣayati om vakatuṇḍāya svāhā om ekadaṃṣṭrāya svāhā om kṛtakṛṣṇāya svāhā om gajakarṇāya svāhā om lambodarāya svāhā om vikaṭāya svāhā om dhūmravarṇāya svāhā om gaganakūjāya svāhā om vināyakāya svāhā om gaṇapataye svāhā om hastimukhāya svāhā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe atha triṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sarva jana priyaḥ bhavati śveta arka mūla aṅguṣṭha mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā dhūpa ādibhiḥ arcayitvā sarvān varṇān vaśam ānayati hvetacandanam aṅguṣṭha mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā puṣpa gandha ādibhiḥ arcayitvā śukla caturthyām aṣṭamyām vā balim kuryāt aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt dadhinā pāyasena rājānam vaśam ānayati raktacandana mayam gaṇapatim aṅguṣṭha mātram kṛtvā bhautikam balim dadyāt dadhi madhu ghṛta āhutīnām gaṇapatim aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt ātma prajām vaśam ānayati rakta karavīra mūla aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kārayet tila puṣpa gandha upahāraiḥ balim dadyāt tila lavaṇa ghṛtena aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt daśa grāmān vaśam ānayati mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā tila piṣṭa dadhi ghṛta kṣīra haridrā miśreṇa aṣṭa sahasram huyāt veśyām vaśam ānayati aśvattha mūla aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā gandha puṣpa dhūpa balim dattvā śatam juhuyāt śatrum vaśam ānayati arka mūla aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā gandha puṣpa dhūpa balīn dadyāt tinduka aṣṭaśatam juhuyāt śatrum vaśam ānayati bilva mūla mayam aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā gandha puṣpa dhūpa arcitam kṛtvā trimadhu aktānām aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt rāja amātyān vaśam ānayati śirasi dhūpān dhṛtvā gacchet rājadvāram vigrahe jayaḥ bhavati hasti danta mṛttikā mayam aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kārayet kṛtvā sapta vārān japet nityam nārīṇām subhagaḥ bhavati kārayet gandha puṣpa arcitam kṛtvā guggulu dhūpam dadyāt ghoṣapatim vaśam ānayati atha vā valmīka mṛttikā aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kārayet unmattaka kāṣṭhena agnim prajvālya āhutīnām aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt tila sarṣapa miśreṇa sarva dhūpam dadyāt trikaṭukena lepayet om gaṇapataye vakratuṇḍāya gaja dantāya gulagula iti ninādāya caturbhujāya trinetrāya musala pāśa vajra hastāya sarva bhūta damanāya sarva loka vaśaṃkarāya sarva duṣṭa upaghāta jananāya sarva śatru vimardanāya sarva rājya samīhanāya rājānam iha vaśam ānaya hana hana paca paca vajrāṅkuśena gaṇeśaiḥ phaṭ svāhā om gām gīṃ gūṃ gaiṃ gauṃ gaḥ svāhā namaḥ hadayam mūlamantrasya paḥ śiraḥ om khaḥ śikhā om gaḥ hadayam om guḥ vaktram om gaiṃ netram om ghaḥ kavacam om ṅaḥ āvāhanam hadayasya āvāhana aṅgāni bhavanti om namaḥ hadayam mūlamantrasya om gāḥ śiraḥ om gaiḥ namaḥ śikhā om gauḥ namaḥ kavacam om gaṃ namaḥ netre om gaḥ phaṭ astram om aṅguṣṭha ulkāya svāhā āvāhanam hadayasya svāhā visarjanam hadayasya om gandha ulkāya svāhā mantraḥ om dharma bhūta ulkāya svāhā mantraḥ pūrveṇa om dhūrjaṭaye dakṣiṇena paścimatas om gaṇapataye uttaratas om gaṇādhipataye aiśānyām om mahāgaṇapataye āgneyyām om kūśmāṇḍāya nairṛtyām padma daṃṣṭra mālā prakarṣaṇī paraśu aṃkuśa pāśa paṭaha mudrāḥ aṣṭau mudrāḥ darśayitvā tatas karmāṇi kārayet bhāga kṛṣṇa tila āhutīnām aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt rājānam vaśam ānayet māvāhana ādi ekādaśa mudrāḥ naivedya antam kramāt darśayet ārādhayet yena vidhinā trinetram śūlinam haram tena eva ārādhayet devam vighneśam gaṇapam nṛpaiḥ tat eva maṇḍalam ca asya aṅganyāsaḥ tathā eva ca naśyanti tasya vighnāni na ca ariṣṭam kadācana yaḥ ca upavāsam kṛtvā tu caturthyām pūjayet naraḥ sarve tasya samārambhāḥ sidhyeyuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ yasya anukūlaḥ vighneśaḥ śivayoḥ kula nandana tasmāt ārādhayet enam bhakti śraddhā samanvitaḥ tathā eva uṇḍīraka srajā śukla pakṣe caturthyām tu vidhinā anena pūjayet ekadante jagannāthe gaṇeśe tuṣṭim āgate pitṛ deva manuṣya ādyāḥ sarve tuṣyanti bhārataiḥ tasmāt ārādhayet enam sadā bhakti puraḥsaram karṇalepaiḥ tuṇḍikābhiḥ modakaiḥ ca mahīpate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe adhyāyaḥ atha ekatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ pūjanam śivā śāntā sukhā rājan caturthā trividhā smṛtā māsi bhādrapade śuklā śivā lokeṣu pūjitā tasyām snānam tathā dānam upavāsaḥ japaḥ tathā ca kriyamāṇam śataguṇam prasādāt dantinaḥ nṛpa guḍa lavaṇa ghṛtānām tu dānam śubha karam smṛtam guḍa apūpaiḥ tathā vīraiḥ puṇyam brāhmaṇa bhojanam yāḥ tasyām nara śārdūlaiḥ pūjayanti sadā striyaḥ guḍa lavaṇa pūpaiḥ ca śvaśrūm śvasuram eva ca tāḥ sarvāḥ subhagāḥ syuḥ vaḥ vighra īśasya anumodanāt kanyakā tu viśeṣeṇa vidhinā anena pūjayet iti śivā kalpaḥ māghe māsi tathā śuklā yā caturthī mahīpate sā śāntā śānti dā nityam śāntim kuryāt sadā eva hi snāna dāna ādikam karma sarvam asyām kṛtam vibho kṛta upavāsaḥ yaḥ tasyām pūjayet vi ghnanāyakam lavaṇam ca guḍam śākam guḍa pūpān ca bhārataiḥ yaḥ rājñ pūjayantaḥ gurum nṛpa guḍa lavaṇa ghṛtaiḥ vīra sadā syuḥ bhāgya saṃyutāḥ iti śāntā kalpaḥ ca su sukhā saubhāgya karaṇā param caturthī kuru śārdūlaiḥ rūpa saubhāgya dā śubhā mahā puṇyam rūpa dam bhāgya dam tathā hasitam lalitam ca uktam ceṣṭitam ca sukha āvaham savilāsa bhuja kṣepaḥ caṅkramaḥ ceṣṭitam śubham kṛtyena pūjite ca īśe vighreśe śivayoḥ sute tadā sā sukha dā jñeyā caturthā vai sukhā iti ca purā maithunam āśritya sthitābhyām tu himācale bhīma umābhyām mahā bāho rakta binduḥ cyutaḥ kṣitau aṅga doṅga upakāraḥ ca aṅgānām tu pradaḥ nṛṇām saubhāgya ādi karaḥ yasmāt tasmāt aṅgārakaḥ mataḥ upavatsyati nā rājan nārī vā na anya mānasā yojayet pūrvam ca kṛta saṅkalpaḥ snānam kṛtvā yathāvidhi gṛhītvā mṛttikām vandet mantreṇa anena bhārataiḥ iha tvam vanditā pūrvam kṛṣṇena uddharatā kila tasmāt mama daha pāpmānam yat mayā pūrva sañcitam imam mantram paṭhan vīraḥ ādityāya pradarśayet mad ad iti dattvā mṛdam śirasi tām sarva aṅgeṣu ca yojayet tvam apaḥ yoniḥ sarveṣām daitya dānava dyaukasām sveda aṇḍaja udbhidām ca eva rasāṇām pataye namaḥ taḍāgeṣu ca sarveṣu mānasa ādi saraḥsu ca nadīṣu devakhāteṣu su tīrtheṣu hradeṣu vai dhyāyan yaṭhan imam mantram tatas snānam samācaret tatas snātvā śuciḥ bhūtvā gṛham āgatya vai spṛśet dūrvā aśvatthau śamīm spṛṣṭvā gām ca mantreṇa mantra vid tvam dūrve amṛta nāmā asi sarva devaiḥ tu vanditā mahīpate pavitrāṇām pavitrām tvam kāśyapī prathitā śrutau śamī śamaya mama pāpam nūnam vetsi dharādharān śaktānām ca samudyogam aśvattha tvam kṣamasva me imam mantram paṭhan vīraiḥ kuryāt vai sparśanam budhaḥ tatas devyai tu gām dadyāt vīram kṛtvā pradakṣiṇām tasmāt spṛśāmi vande tvām vanditā pāpa hā bhava imam mantram paṭhan vīraiḥ bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ pradakṣiṇam tu yaḥ kuryāt arjunam kuru nandana pradakṣiṇīkṛtā tena pṛthivī syāt na saṃśayaḥ prakṣālya ca mṛdā pādau ācānta ugni gṛham viśet śarvāya śarva putrāya kṣoṇī utsaṅga bhavāya ca kujāya lalitāṅgāya lohitāṅgāya vai tathā oṃkāra pūrvakaiḥ mantraiḥ svāhākāra samanvitaiḥ aṣṭottaraśatam vīraiḥ ardha ardham ardham eva ca bhakṣyaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ ca anyaiḥ śaktyā bhaktyā samanvitaḥ hutvā āhutīḥ tatas vīra devam saṃsthāpayet kṣitau sauvarṇam rājatam vā api śaktyā dāru mayam nṛpa devadāru mayam vā api śrīkhaṇḍa candanaiḥ api tāvat vivardhate puṇyam dātum śatasahasrikam anye tāmra maye pātre vaṃśa je mṛd maye api vā pūjayanti narāḥ śaktyā kṛtvā kuṅkuma kesaraiḥ puruṣa ākṛti kṛtam pātre imam mantraiḥ samarcayet guḍa odanam ghṛtam kṣīram godhūmān śāli taṇḍulān avekṣya śaktim dadyāt vai daridraḥ vittavān tathā vitta śāṭhyam na kartavyam vidyamāne dhane nṛpa vitta śāṭhyam hi kurvāṇaḥ na amutra bala bhāj bhavet uvāca aṅgārakeṇa saṃyuktā caturthī naktabhojanaiḥ upoṣyā kati mātrā tu uta aho sakṛt eva tu caturthī sā caturthā sā yadā aṅgāraka saṃyutā caturthyām ca caturthyām ca vidhānam śṛṇu yādṛśam sauvarṇam tu kujam kṛtvā sa vināyakam ādarāt viṃśat palāni pātrāṇi viṃśati ardha palāni vā viṃśat karṣāṇi vā vīra viṃśat ardha ardham eva vā pratiṣṭhāpya graha īśam vai vastraiḥ sampariveṣṭitam brāhmaṇāya sadā dadyāt dakṣiṇā sahitam nṛpaiḥ bāho iti te kathitā puṇyā tithīnām uttamā tithiḥ yām upoṣya naraḥ rūpam divyam āpnoti bhārataiḥ kāntyātreya samam vīram tejasā ravi saṃnibham īdṛś rūpam samāpya iha yāti bhaumasadaḥ nṛpa prasādāt vighnanāthasya tathā gaṇapateḥ nṛpa paṭhatām śṛṇvatām rājñ kurvatām ca viśeṣataḥ brahmahatyā ādi pāpāni kṣīyante na atra saṃśayaḥ ṛddhim vṛddhim tathā lakṣmīm labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe sukhāvahāṅgārakacaturthīvratanirūpaṇam nāma ekatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ samāptaḥ ca ayam caturthīkalpaḥ atha dvātriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ pūjanam pañcamā dayitā rājñ nāgānām nandi vardhinī pañcamyām kila nāgānām bhavati iti utsavaḥ mahān airāvataḥ dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ karkoṭaka dhanañjayau ete prayacchanti abhayam prāṇinām prāṇa jīvitām pañcamyām snapayanti iha nāgān kṣīreṇa ye narāḥ teṣām kule prayacchanti te abhaya prāṇa dakṣiṇām śaptāḥ nāgāḥ yadā mātrā dahyamānāḥ divāniśam nirvāpayanti snapanaiḥ gavām kṣīreṇa miśritaiḥ teṣām kule sarpa bhayam na bhavet iti niścayaḥ uvāca mātrā śaptāḥ katham nāgāḥ kim samuddiśya kāraṇam katham ca ānanda karaṇam kasya vā samprasāda jam uccaiḥśravāḥ aśvaratnam śvetaḥ jātaḥ amṛtodbhavaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā ca abravīt kadruḥ nāgānām jananī svasām kṛṣṇān ca vīkṣase bālān sarvam śvetam uta ambare sarva śvetaḥ haya varaḥ na asya kṛṣṇaḥ na lohitaḥ katham paśyasi kṛṣṇam tvam vinatā uvāca tām svasām uvāca mama eka nayanā kṛṣṇa bāla samanvitam aham dāsī bhavitrī te kṛṣṇe keśe pradarśite māhūya putrān provāca bālā bhūtvā haya uttame tiṣṭhadhvam vipaṇe jeṣye vinatām jaya garddhinīm procuḥ te jihma buddhim tām nāgāḥ mātām vigṛhya tu tān śaśāpa ruṣā kadruḥ pāvakaḥ vaḥ pradhakṣyati tasmin sattre sa tigmāṃśuḥ pāvakaḥ vaḥ pradhakṣyati evam śaptvā ruṣā kadruḥ kiṃcid na uktavatī tu sā mātrā śaptāḥ tathā nāgāḥ kartavyam na anvapatsata brahmā provāca sāntvayan mā śucaḥ vāsuke atyartham śṛṇu mad vacana param iti bhavitā tasya putraḥ āstīkaḥ iti viśrutaḥ sa tat satram pravṛddham vai nāgānām bhaya dam mahat tat imām bhaginīm rājan tasya tvam pratidāsyasi yad jaratkārum jaratkāroḥ pradadyāḥ a vicārayan tat kartavyam aśaṅkena yadi iccheḥ śreyaḥ ātmanaḥ pitāmaha vacaḥ śrutvā vāsukiḥ praṇipatya ca punar jātam iva ātmānam menire bhujaga uttamāḥ proktam ca viṣṇunā pūrvam dharmaputrasya dhīmataḥ avaśyam tasya bhavitā nāgānām bhaya kārakam tasmāt kāla antarāt rājñ sāgre varṣa śate gate tat sattram bhavitā ghoram nāgānām kṣaya kārakam yāsyanti adharma bharitāḥ dandaśūkāḥ viṣa ulbaṇāḥ koṭi saṃkhyāḥ mahā rāja nipatiṣyanti aharniśam apūrve tu nimagnānām ghore raudra agni sāgare āstīkaḥ tatra bhavitā teṣām nauḥ vahni sāgare śrutvā sa ca agnim rājānam ṛtvijaḥ tad anantaram nivartayiṣyate yāgam nāgānām mohanam param pañcamyām tatra bhavitā brahmā provāca lelihān tasmāt iyam mahā bāho pañcamā dayitā sadā nāgānām ānanda karā dattā vai brahmanā purā kṛtvā tu bhojanam pūrvam brāhmaṇānām tu kāmāt visṛjya nāgāḥ prīyantām ye kecid pṛthivī tale ye nadīṣu mahā nāgāḥ ye sarasvatī gāminaḥ ye ca vāpī taḍāgeṣu teṣu sarveṣu vai namaḥ nāgān viprān ca sampūjya visṛjya ca yathārthāt tatas paścāt tu bhuñjīta saha bhṛtyaiḥ narādhipaiḥ pūrvam madhuram aśnīyāt tatas bhuñjīta kāmatas mṛtaḥ nāgapuram yāti pūjyamānaḥ apsaraḥ gaṇaiḥ vimāna varam ārūḍhaḥ ramate kālam īpsitam iha ca āgatya rājā asau ayutānām varaḥ bhavet sarva ratna samṛddhaḥ syāt vāhana āḍhyaḥ ca jāyate pañca janmāni asau rājā dvāpare dvāpare bhavet patnī putra sahāyavān tasmāt pūjyāḥ ca pālyāḥ ca ghṛta pāyasa guggulaiḥ uvāca daśanti ye naram vipra nāgāḥ krodha samanvitāḥ nāga daṣṭaḥ naraḥ rājñ prāpya mṛtyum vrajati adhas adhas gatyā bhavet sarpaḥ nirviṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ uvāca nāga daṣṭaḥ pitā yasya bhrātā vā duhitā api vā mātā putraḥ atha vā bhāryā kim kartavyam vadasva me mokṣāya tasya vipra indra dānam vratam upoṣaṇam upoṣyā pañcamī rājan nāgānām puṣṭi vardhinī tvam evam ekam rāja indra vidhānam śṛṇu bhārataiḥ māsi bhādrapade yā tu kṛṣṇa pakṣe mahīpate mahā puṇyā tu sā proktā grāhyā api ca mahīpate jñeyāḥ dvādaśa ṣañcamyaḥ hāyane bharata ṛṣabha kṛtvā dāru mayān vā api atha vā mṛd mayān nṛpa pañcamyām arcayet bhaktyā nāgānām pañcakam nṛpaiḥ karavīraiḥ śatapattraiḥ jātī puṣpaiḥ ca suvrata brāhmaṇam bhojayet paścāt ghṛta pāyasa modakaiḥ anantaḥ vāsukiḥ śaṅkhaḥ padmaḥ kambalaḥ eva ca tathā karkoṭakaḥ nāgaḥ nāgaḥ hi aśvataraḥ nṛpaiḥ dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ śaṅkhapālaḥ kāliyaḥ takṣakaḥ tathā piṅgalaḥ ca tathā nāgaḥ māsi māsi prakīrtitāḥ syāt bhojayet bahūn itihāsa vide nāgam gairikeṇa kṛtam nṛpa tathā arcanā pradātavyā vācakāya mahīpate eṣa vai nāgapañcamyāḥ vidhiḥ proktā budhaiḥ nṛpa te pitrā kṛtaḥ ca eva pituḥ mokṣāya bhārataiḥ suvarṇa bhāra niṣpannam nāgam dattvā tathā ca gām āpnuyāḥ te pitrā kṛtā hi evam pañcamī upāsanā nṛpa utsṛjya na āgatām vīra tava pūrva pitāmahaḥ puṣpa uttaram sadaḥ gatvā tathā puṣpa sadaḥ nṛpa daṣṭakaḥ mokṣyate teṣām śubham sthānam avāpsyati yaḥ ca idam śṛṇuyāt nityam naraḥ śraddhā samanvitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe nāgapañcamīvratavarṇanam nāma dvātriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha trayastriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sarpāṇām kati rūpāṇi ke varṇāḥ kim ca lakṣaṇam kā jātiḥ tu bhavet teṣām keṣu yoni kuleṣu vā sarpāṇām kati rūpāṇi kim cihnam kim ca lakṣaṇam jātim kulam tadhā varṇān brūhi sarvam prajāpate tatham vā jāyate sarpaḥ muñcet viṣam prabho viṣa vegāḥ kati proktāḥ kati eva viṣa nāḍikāḥ daṃṣṭrāḥ katividhāḥ proktāḥ kim pramāṇam viṣa āgame gṛhṇīte tu kadā garbham katham ca iha prasūyate kīdṛśī strī pumān ca eva kīdṛśaḥ ca napuṃsakaḥ tasya tat vacanam śrutvā kaśyapaḥ pratyabhāṣata śṛṇu gautama tattvena sarpāṇām iha lakṣaṇam māsi āṣāḍhe tathā jyeṣṭhe pramādyanti bhujaṃgamāḥ caturaḥ vārṣikān māsān nāgī garbham adhārayat tatas kārttika māse tu aṇḍakāni prasūyate aṇḍakānām tu vijñeye dve śate dve ca viṃśatī tāni eva bhakṣayet sā tu bhoga ekam ghṛṇayā tyajet svarṇa arka varṇāt vai tasmāt pumān sañjāyate aṇḍakāt tāni eva khādate sarpa ahorātrāṇi viṃśatim svarṇa ketaka varṇa ābhāt dīrgha rājīva sannibhāt tasmāt utpadyate strī vai aṇḍāt brāhmaṇa sattama mā śirīṣa puṣpa varṇa ābhā daṇḍakāt syāt napuṃsakaḥ tatas bhinatti ca aṇḍāni ṣaṣ māsena tu gautama tatas asau sapta rātreṇa kṛṣṇaḥ bhavati pannagaḥ āyus pramāṇam sarpāṇām śatam viṃśa uttaram smṛtam mṛtyuḥ ca aṣṭavidhaḥ jñeyaḥ śṛṇuṣva atra yathākramam mayūrāt mānuṣāt vā api cakorāt gokhurāt tathā biḍālāt nakulāt ca eva varāhāt vṛścikāt tathā eteṣām yadi mucyeta jīvet viṃśa uttaram śatam sapta ahe tu tatas pūrṇe daṃṣṭrāṇām ca adhirohaṇam biṣasya āgamanam tatra nikṣipet ca punar punar evam jñātvā tu tattvena viṣa karma ārabheta vai ekaviṃśati rātreṇa viṣa daṃṣṭrā su jāyate nāgī pārśva samāvartī bālasarpaḥ saḥ ucyate pañcaviṃśati rātraḥ tu sadyas prāṇa haraḥ bhavet māsāt jāta mātraḥ tu kañcukam vai pramuñcati pādānām ca api vijñeye dve śate dve ca viṃśatī goloma sadṛśāḥ pādāḥ praviśanti kramanti ca saṃdhīnām ca asya vijñeye dve śate viṃśatī tathā aṅgulayaḥ ca api vijñeyāḥ dve śate viṃśatī tathā akāla jātāḥ ye sarpāḥ nirviṣāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ pañca saptati varṣāṇi āyuḥ teṣām prakīrtitam rakta pīta śukla dantāḥ anīlāḥ manda veginaḥ ete alpa āyuṣaḥ jñeyaḥ anye ca bhīravaḥ smṛtā dvātriṃśat daśanāḥ proktāḥ pannāgānām na saṃśayaḥ teṣām madhye catasraḥ tu daṃṣṭrāḥ yāḥ su viṣa āvahāḥ makarī karālī kālarātriḥ yamadūtī tathā eva ca sarvāsām ca eva daṃṣṭrāṇām devatāḥ parikīrtitāḥ prathamā brahma devatyā dvitīyā viṣṇu devatā tṛtīyā rudra devatyā caturthī yama devatā hīnā pramāṇāt sā tu vāmanetram samāśritā na asyām mantrāḥ prayoktavyāḥ na auṣadham na eva bheṣajam vaidyaḥ parāṅmukhaḥ yāti mṛtyuḥ tasyāḥ vilekhanāt makarīm māsikām vidyāt karālī ca dvi māsikā bhavet makarīm guḍa odanam dadyāt kaṣāya annam karālikām bhālarātrim kaṭu yutam dūtīm vai sāṃnipātikam makarī śastrakam vidyāt karālī kākapādikā kara ākṛtiḥ kālarātriḥ yāmyā kūrma ākṛtiḥ smṛtā makarī vātulā jñeyā karālī paittikā smṛtā śuklā tu makarī jñeyā karālī rakta saṃnibhā bhavet pītā kṛṣṇā ca yamadūtikā vāmā śuklā ca kṛṣṇā ca raktā pītā ca dakṣiṇā samāsena tu vakṣyāmi yathā etāḥ varṇāt smṛtāḥ śuklā tu brāhmaṇī jñeyā raktā tu kṣatriyā smṛtā vaiśyā tu pītikā jñeyā kṛṣṇā śūdrā tu kathyate atas param pravakṣyāmi daṃṣṭrāṇām viṣa lakṣaṇam daṃṣṭrāṇām tu viṣam na asti nityam eva bhujaṃgame dakṣiṇam netram āsādya viṣam sarpasya tiṣṭhati mastakāt dhamanim yāti tatas nāḍīṣu gacchati nāḍībhyaḥ padyate daṃṣṭrām viṣam tatra pravartate tat sarvam kathayiṣyāmi yathāvat anupūrvaśas aṣṭabhiḥ kāraṇaiḥ sarpaḥ daśate na atra saṃśayaḥ ākrāntaḥ daśate pūrvam dvitīyam pūrva vairiṇam tṛtīyam daśate bhītaḥ caturtham mada darpitaḥ pañcamam tu kṣudhā āviṣṭaḥ ṣaṣṭham ca iha viṣa ulbaṇaḥ saptamam pura rakṣā artham aṣṭamam kāla coditaḥ bala bhugna ākṛtim daṃṣṭrām ākrāntam tam vinirdiśet yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya gabhīram dṛśyate vraṇam vaira daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā ekam daṃṣṭra padam yasya avyaktam na ca kalpitam bhīta daṣṭam vijānīyāt yathā uvāca prajāpatiḥ mada daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā dve ca daṃṣṭra pade yasya dṛśyante ca mahā kṣatam kṣudhā āviṣṭam vijānīyāt yathā uvāca prajāpatiḥ vijānīyāt na atra apatya rakṣaṇa arthāya jānīyāt tam na saṃśayaḥ mahānāgaḥ iti proktam kāladaṇḍam vinirdiśet trividham daṣṭa jātaiḥ tu lakṣaṇam samudāhṛtam daṣṭa anupītam vijñeyam kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā asādhyaḥ ca api vijñeyaḥ catur daṃṣṭra abhipīḍitaḥ bhavet itas daṃśaḥ tatas śuddhaḥ vyantaraḥ parikīrtitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe sarpadaṃṣṭrāvarṇanam nāma trayastriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ lakṣaṇam uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi kāla daṣṭasya lakṣaṇam śṛṇu gautama tattvena yādṛśaḥ bhavate naraḥ yathā hṛd śūlam cakṣurbhyām ca na paśyati daṃśam ca dagdha saṃkāśam pakva jambu phala upamam vaivarṇyam ca eva dantānām śyāvaḥ bhavati varṇāt sarveṣu aṅgeṣu śaithilyam purīṣasya ca bhedanam bhagna skandha kaṭi grīvaḥ ūrdhva dṛṣṭiḥ adhomukhaḥ daṇḍena tāḍyamānasya daṇḍa rājī na jāyate daṃśe kākapadam su nīlam asakṛt jambu phala ābham ghanam ucchūnam rudhira ārdra seka bahulam kṛcchrāt nirodhaḥ bhavet hikkā śvāsa galagrahaḥ ca su mahān pāṇḍuḥ tvacā dṛśyate śuṣka aṅgaḥ pravadanti śāstra nipuṇāḥ tat kāladaṣṭam viduḥ daṃśe yasya atha śothaḥ pracalita valitam maṇḍalam vā su nīlam prasvedaḥ gātra bhedaḥ sravati ca rudhiram sa anunāsam ca jalpet danta uṣṭhābhyām viyogaḥ bhramati ca hṛdayam saṃnirodhaḥ ca tīvraḥ divyānām eṣa daṃśaḥ sthala vipula mayaḥ viddhi tam kāla daṣṭam dantaiḥ dantān spṛśati bahuśas dṛṣṭiḥ āyāsa khinnā sthūlaḥ daṃśaḥ sravati rudhiram kekaram cakṣuḥ ekam pratyādiṣṭaḥ śvasiti satatam sa anunāsam ca bhāṣet pāpam brūte sakala gaditam kāladaṇḍam tam āhuḥ grīvā bhaṅgaḥ calā nābhiḥ kāladaṣṭam vinirdiśet darpaṇe salile vā api ātma chāyām na paśyati manda raśmim tathā tīvram tejaḥ hīnam divākaram sa yāti nidhanam jantuḥ kāladaṇḍam vinirdiśet aṣṭamyām ca navamyām ca kṛṣṇa pakṣe caturdaśīm nāgapañcamī daṣṭānām jīvitasya ca saṃśayaḥ mārdrā āśleṣā maghā ābharaṇī kṛttikāsu viśeṣataḥ viśākhām triṣu pūrvāsu mūla svāti śata ātmake sarpa daṣṭāḥ na jīvanti viṣam pītam ca yaiḥ tathā śūnya āgāre śmaśāne ca śuṣka vṛkṣe tathā eva ca na jīvanti narāḥ daṣṭāḥ nakṣatre tithi saṃyute aṣṭa uttaram marma śatam prāṇinām samudāhṛtam teṣām madhye tu marmāṇi daśa dve ca api kīrtite madhye netre bhruvoḥ madhye vastibhyām vṛṣaṇa uttare daṃśaiḥ śastreṇa vā hataḥ na jīvati naraḥ loke kāla daṇḍam vinirdiśet dūtaḥ vā daṇḍa hastaḥ bhavati ca yugalam pāśa hastaḥ tathā vā rakta vastram ca kṛṣṇam mukha śirasi gatam eka vastraḥ ca dūtaḥ pravakṣyāmi īśānena tu bhāṣitam brahmaṇā tu purā sṛṣṭāḥ grahāḥ nāgāḥ tu anekaśas anantam bhāskaram vidyāt somam vidyāt tu vāsukim takṣakam bhūmiputram tu karkoṭam ca budham viduḥ padmam bṛhaspatim vidyāt mahāpadmam ca bhārgavam kulikaḥ śaṃkhapālaḥ ca dvau etau tu śanaiścaraḥ pūrva pādaḥ śaṅkhapālaḥ dvitīyaḥ kulikaḥ tathā bhāge divārātre tu iha ucyate grahāḥ ca bhuñjate ca eva śeṣam bhāgasya lakṣaṇam ravi vāre sadā jñeyau pādau daśa caturdaśa aṣṭa dvādaśa vai candre daśa ṣaṣṭhe kuje tathā guroḥ dvitīyaḥ ṣaṣṭhaḥ ca ṣoḍaśasya tu varjayet hanaiścara dine pādam tyajet ca eva su dāruṇam dvitīyam dvādaśam ca eva ṣoḍaśasya tu varjayet muhūrta ghaṭikāt ūrdhvam ghaṭikā caturtham bhāgam viṃśatiḥ ca kuhūsutam budbudam nimeṣam etat kālasya lakṣaṇam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe daṃśadaṣṭakadūtalakṣaṇam nāma catustriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ lakṣaṇam uvāca sa viṣā daṃṣṭrayoḥ madhye yamadūtī tu vai bhavet na cikitsā budhaiḥ kāryā tam gatāsum viḥ nidaśet prahara ardham divārātrau ekaikam bhuñjate bahis ekasya ca samānam ca dvitīyam ṣoḍaśam tathā kāla daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā tad mātram sravate daṃṣṭrāḥ viṣam sarpasya dāruṇam nāḍī śate tu sampūrṇe dehe saṅkramate viṣam yāvat saṅkrāmayet bāhum kuñcitam vā prasārayet anena kṣaṇa mātreṇa viṣam gacchati mastake vardhate āsādya tatas samīritaḥ tatas sthāna śatam prāpya tvacā sthānam viceṣṭitam tvacāsu dviguṇam vidyāt śoṇiteṣu caturguṇam pitte tu triguṇam yāti śleṣme vai ṣoḍaśam bhavet triṃśadguṇam ca eva majjā ṣaṣṭiguṇam tathā prāṇe ca ekārṇavībhūte sarva gātrāṇi sandhayet śrotre nirudhyamāne ca yāti daṣṭaḥ tu asādhyatām niṣkrānte tu tatas jīve bhūte pañcatvam āgate pṛthivī apaḥ tathā tejaḥ vāyuḥ ākāśam eva ca iti eṣām eva saṅghātaḥ śarīram abhidhīyate pṛthivī pṛthivīm yāti toyam toyeṣu līyate madhye ca evam ākāśe saha tena eva gacchati tṛtīye viṣa vege tu kampaḥ gātreṣu jāyate pañcame viṣa vege tu hikkā gātreṣu jāyate ṣaṣṭhe ca viṣa vege tu prāṇebhyaḥ api pramucyate sapta dhātu vahāḥ hi ete vainateyena bhāṣitāḥ tvacaḥ sthāne viṣe prāpte tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu arka mūlam apāmārgam priyaṅgum tagaram tathā tvacaḥ sthānam tatas bhittvā rakta sthānam pradhāvati viṣe ca raktam saṃprāpte tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya rakta gatam viṣam uśīram candanam kuṣṭham utpalam tagaram tathā bṛhatī vṛścikā kālī indra vāruṇi mūlakam sinduvāram tathā hiṅgum tṛtīye kārayet budhaḥ tasya pānam ca kurvīta añjanam lepanam tathā pitta sthāna gate vipraiḥ viṣa rūpāṇi mama śṛṇu paśyati prabalā ca bhavat mūrcchā na ca ātmānam vijānate pippalyaḥ madhukam ca eva madhu khaṇḍam ghṛtam tathā madhusāram alābūm ca jātim śaṃkaravālukām indravāruṇikā mūlam gavām mūtreṇa peṣayet nasyam tasya prayuñjīta pānam ālepana añjanam śleṣma sthānam tatas prāpte tasya rūpāṇi mama śṛṇu gātrāṇi tasya rudhyante niḥśvāsaḥ ca na jāyate etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya śleṣma gatam viṣam trikuṭakī śleṣmātakaḥ lodhram ca madhusārakam etāni sama bhāgāni gavām mūtreṇa peṣayet tasya pānam ca kurvīta añjanam lepanam tathā tatra rūpāṇi vakṣyāmi vāyu sthāna gate viṣe ādhmāyate ca jaṭharam bāndhavān ca na paśyati īdṛśam kurute rūpam vṛṣṭi bhaṅgaḥ ca jāyate etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya vāyu gatam viṣam śoṇā mūlam priyālam ca raktam ca gajapippalīm bhārṅgīm vacām pippalīm ca devadārum madhūkakam madhūka sāram saha sinduvāram hiṅgum ca piṣṭāḥ guṭikām ca kuryāt dadyāt ca tasya añjana lepana ādi eṣaḥ agadaḥ sarpa viṣāṇi hanyāt añjanam ca eva nasyam ca kṣipram dadyāt viṣa anvite vāyu sthānam tatas muktvā majjā sthānam pradhāvati majja āgate vipra tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu dṛṣṭiḥ ca hīyate tasya bhṛśam aṅgāni muñcati etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya majja āgatam viṣam pā madhu śarkarā anvitam uśīram candanam tathā etat āloḍya dātavyam pānam nasyam ca suvrataiḥ tatas praṇaśyate duḥkham tatas saṃpadyate sukham majjā sthānam tatas gatvā marma sthānam pradhāvati bhavet viṣe tu marma saṃprāpte śṛṇu rūpam yathā bhavet niśceṣṭaḥ patate bhūmau karṇābhyām badhiraḥ bhavet madhunā sicyamānasya romaharṣaḥ na jāyate daṃḍena hanyamānasya daṇḍa rājī na jāyate keśeṣu lucyamāneṣu na eva keśān pravedate yasya karṇau ca pārśve ca hasta pādam ca saṃdhayaḥ mithilāni bhavanti iha saḥ gatāsuḥ iti śrutiḥ etāni yasya rūpāṇi viparītāni gautama mṛtam tu na vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā kuśikṣitāḥ tasya agadam pravakṣyāmi svayam rudreṇa bhāṣitam mayūra pittam mārjāra pittam gandhanāḍī mūlam eva ca kuṅkumam tagaram kuṣṭham kāsamarda tvacam tathā etāni sama bhāgāni go mūtreṇa tu peṣayet kāla ahinā api daṣṭena kṣipram bhavati nirviṣaḥ kṣipram eva pradā tavyam mṛtasaṃjīvanī auṣadham añjanam ca eva nasyam ca kṣipram dadyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ na asti adhyāyaḥ kīdṛśam sarpa daṣṭasya sarpiṇyāḥ kīdṛśam bhavet kumāra daṣṭaḥ kīdṛṅ syāt sūtikā daṃśitasya ca rūpam napuṃsakena iha vyantareṇa ca kīdṛśam etat ākhyāhi me sarvam ebhiḥ daṣṭasya lakṣaṇam uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi nāgānām rūpa lakṣaṇam sarpa daṣṭasya ca tathā samāsāt dvija puṃgavaiḥ atha sarpeṇa daṃś ūrdhva dṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate sarpī daṣṭasya ca tathā adhas dṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate kanyā daṣṭasya vāmā syāt ṛṣṭiḥ dvijavara uttamaiḥ kumāreṇa api daṣṭasya dakṣiṇā eva jāyate garbhiṇyāḥ vā atha daṣṭasya tathā svedaḥ ca jāyate romāñcaḥ sūtikāyāḥ tu vepathuḥ ca api jāyate napuṃsakena daṣṭasya aṅgamardaḥ prajāyate napuṃsakaḥ tu saṃdhyāyām kaśyapena tu bhāṣitam daṣṭa rūpāṇi a jānan vai katham vaidya cikitsitam caturvidhāḥ iha proktāḥ pannagāḥ tu mahātmanā harvīkarāḥ maṇḍalinaḥ rājilāḥ vyantarāḥ tathā smṛtāḥ śleṣmalāḥ rājilrāḥ jñeyāḥ vyantarāḥ sāṃnipātikāḥ raktam parīkṣayet eṣām sarpāṇām tu pṛthak pṛthak bhaumam darvīkarāṇām tu jāyate na alpam ulbaṇam raktam ghanam ca bahuśas śoṇitam maṇḍalā kṛtam sarpāḥ jñeyāḥ tu catvāraḥ pañcamaḥ na upalabhyate brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyaḥ vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ ca eva caturthakaḥ yaiśye karṣa phalam dadyāt śūdre tri sthūṇam eva ca brāhmaṇena tu daṣṭasya dāhaḥ gātreṣu jāyate mūrchā ca prabalā syāt vai na ātmānam abhijānate śyāma varṇam mukham ca syāt majjā stambhaḥ ca jāyate aśvagandhā api apāmārgaḥ sinduvāram surāmayam kṣatriyeṇa tu daṣṭasya kampaḥ gātreṣu jāyate mūrchā mohaḥ tathā syāt vai na ātmānam abhivetti saḥ jāyate vedanā tasya ūrdhvam ca eva nirīkṣate arka mūlam apāmārgam priyaṅgum indravāruṇīm etat sarpiḥ samāyuktam pānam nasyam ca dāpayet vaiśyena api hi daṣṭasya śṛṇu rūpāṇi yāni tu mūrchā ca prabalā yasya ātmānam na abhinandati aśvagandhā sa go mūtrā gṛha dhūmam sa guggulam śirīṣa arka palāśena śvetā ca girikarṇikā go mūtreṇa samāyuktam pānam nasyam ca dāpayet eṣa vaiśyena daṣṭānām agadaḥ parikīrtitaḥ śūdreṇa api hi daṣṭasya śṛṇu tattvena gautama aṅgāni culuculāyante śūdra daṣṭasya lakṣaṇam madhūka sāram madhu ca śvetām ca girikarṇikām etāni sama bhāgāni peṣayet śīta vāriṇā pāna lepa añjanaiḥ nasyaiḥ sukhī bhavati mānavaḥ tat saṃdhyā caraḥ bhavet hāraḥ vāyupuṣpāṇi brāhmaṇānām viduḥ budhāḥ mūṣikā kṣatri yāṇām ca āhāraḥ dvijasattama vaiśyāḥ maṇḍūka bhakṣāḥ ca śūdrāḥ sarva āśinaḥ tathā mada kāle tu saṃprāpte pīḍyamānāḥ mahāviṣāḥ avelāyām vai maithuna ārtāḥ bhujaṃgamāḥ puṣpa gandhāḥ smṛtāḥ viprāḥ kṣatriyāḥ candana āvahāḥ ca vai syuḥ vāsam teṣām pravakṣyāmi yathāvat anupūrvaśas vasanti brāhmaṇāḥ sarpāḥ grāma dvāre catuṣpathe mad as as iti vasanti kṣatriyāḥ nityam toraṇeṣu saraḥsu ca śmaśāne bhasmaśālāsu palāleṣu taṭeṣu ca goṣṭheṣu pathi vṛkṣeṣu vipra vaiśyāḥ vasaṃti ca śūnya āgāre śmaśāne ca śūdrāḥ vipra vasanti ca śvetāḥ ca kapilāḥ ca eva ye sarpāḥ tu anala prabhāḥ manasvinaḥ sāttvikāḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ te budhaiḥ smṛtāḥ rakta varṇāḥ suvarṇa ābhāḥ pravāla maṇi saṃnibhāḥ sūrya prabhāḥ tathā vipra kṣatriyāḥ te bhujaṃgamāḥ nānā vicitra rājībhiḥ atasī varṇa sannibhāḥ puṣpa savarṇa ābhāḥ vaiśyāḥ te vai bhujaṃgamāḥ kākodara nibhāḥ kecid ye ca añjana saṃnibhāḥ kāka varṇāḥ dhūmra varṇāḥ te śūdrāḥ parikīrtitāḥ yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya daṃśam aṅguṣṭha antaram bāla daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya daṃśam dvi aṅgulam antaram vṛddha daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā anantaḥ prekṣate pūrvam vāma pārśve tu vāsukiḥ takṣakaḥ dakṣiṇena iha karkoṭaḥ pṛṣṭhatas tathā visaṃjñaḥ tiṣṭhate ca eva śaṅkhapālaḥ muhur muhur sarveṣām kurute rūpam kulikaḥ pannaga uttamaḥ tasya anantasya diśā pūrvā vāsukeḥ tu hutāśanī dakṣiṇā takṣakasya uktā karkoṭasya tu nairṛtī paścimā padmanābhasya mahāpadmasya vāyu jā uttarā śaṅkhapālasya aiśānī kambalasya tu ananta kapilau viprau kṣatriyau śaṅkha vāsukī padma karkoṭakau śūdrau sadā jñeyau manīṣibhiḥ takṣakaḥ ca mahāpadmaḥ īṣat pītau babhū vatuḥ hayam yānam vṛṣam chattram rājānam atha pāvakam dharaṇīm utpādya dhṛtān etān siddhi karān viduḥ pūrṇa kumbhaḥ pātākā ca kāñcanam maṇayaḥ tathā māṇikam kaṇṭhe jīvajīva iti suvrata eteṣām darśanam śreṣṭham kanyā ca ekaprasūyikā catuḥṣaṣṭiḥ samākhyātāḥ bhoginaḥ ye tu pannagāḥ adṛśyāḥ teṣu ṣaṭtriṃśat dṛśyāḥ triṃśat mahī carāḥ mahā viṃśat ca sragviṇaḥ proktāḥ sapta maṇḍalinaḥ tathā rājīvantaḥ daśa proktāḥ darvyaḥ ṣoḍaśa pañca ca dundubhaḥ ḍuṃḍubhaḥ ca eva ceṭabhaḥ ca indravāhanaḥ nāgapuṣpa savarṇa ākhyāḥ nirviṣāḥ ye ca pannagāḥ evam eva tu sarpāṇām śata dvi navati smṛtam marāhakarṇīm gajapippalīm ca gāndhārikām pippala devadāru madhūka sāram saha sinduvāram hiṅgum ca piṣṭvā guṭikā ca kāryā uvāca lakṣaṇam sarva aināgānām rūpa varṇau viṣam tathā tasmāt saṃpūjayet nāgān sadā bhaktyā samanvitaḥ viśeṣataḥ tu pañcamyām payasā pāyasena ca māsi pañcamyām śukla pakṣe narādhipa dvārasya ubhayatas lekhyāḥ gomayena viṣa ulbaṇāḥ pūjayet vidhivat dvāram dadhi dūrvā akṣataiḥ kuśaiḥ gandha puṣpa upahāraiḥ ca brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ ye tu asyām pūjanti iha nāgān bhakti puraḥsarāḥ na iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamī kalpe śrāvaṇikanāgapañcamīvratavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭtriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tathā bhādrapade māsi pañcamyām śraddhayā anvitaḥ atha ālekhya naraḥ nāgān kṛṣṇa varṇa ādi varṇakaiḥ pūjayet gandha puṣpaiḥ ca sarpiḥ pāyasa guggulaiḥ tasya tuṣṭim samāyānti pannagāḥ takṣaka ādayaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatarddha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe
