bhādrapadikanāgapañcamīvratavarṇanam nāma saptatriṃśaḥ udhyāyaḥ uvāca tathā ca āśvayuje māsi pañcamyām kuru nandana prakṛtvā kuśa mayān nāgān gandha andyaiḥ saṃprapūjayet ghṛta udakābhyām payasā snapayitvā viśām pate yaḥ tu asyām vidhivat nāgān śuciḥ bhaktyā samanvitaḥ pūjayet kuru śārdūlaiḥ tasya śeṣa ādayaḥ nṛpaiḥ nāgāḥ prītāḥ bhavanti iha śāntim āpnoti vā vibho sa śānti lokam āsādya modate śāśvatāḥ samāḥ om kurukulle phaṭ svāhā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām Â saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi paṃcamīkalpe samāptikathanam nāma aṣṭatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ tu bhala aśanaḥ rājan viśeṣāt kārttike nṛpa rājya cyutaḥ viśeṣeṇa svam rājyam labhate acirāt mahā rāja sarvadā sarva kāma dā upoṣyā tu prayatnena sarvakālam jaya arthinā kārttikeyasya dayitā eṣā ṣaṣṭhī mahātithiḥ deva senā ādhipatyam hi prāptam tasyām mahātmanā asyām hi śreyasā yuktaḥ yasmāt skandaḥ bhava agraṇī tasmāt ṣaṣṭhyām nakta bhojī prāpnuyāt īpsitam sadā dattvā arghyam kārttikeyāya sthitvā vai dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ prīyatām devasenā nīḥ sampādayatu hṛdgatam paścāt bhuṅkte tu asau rātrau bhūmim kṛtvā tu bhājanam evam ṣaṣṭhyām vratam snehāt proktam skandena yatnatas bhaviṣyati śuklā kṛṣṇāsu niyataḥ brahmacārī samāhitaḥ tasya siddhim dhṛtim tuṣṭim rājyam āyuḥ nirāmayam pāratrikam ca aihikam ca dadyāt skandaḥ na saṃśayaḥ svarge ca niyatam vāsam labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ devānām api vandyaḥ asau rājñām rājā bhaviṣyati yaḥ ca api śṛṇuyāt kalpam ṣaṣṭhyāḥ kuru kula udvahaiḥ tasya siddhiḥ tathā tuṣṭiḥ dhṛtiḥ syāt khyāti sambhavā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhīkalpavarṇanam nāma ekonacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca aho vratam mahat kaṣṭam saṃśayaḥ hṛdi vartate māhātmyam śrutvā janma tathā dvija jātiḥ śreṣṭhā bhavet vīre uta karma bhavet varam saṃśayaḥ tu mahān atra dṛṣṭvā mama kṛttikāsutam imam artham purā pṛṣṭaḥ brahmā śiṣyaiḥ manīṣibhiḥ surajyeṣṭham sukha āsīnam abhigamya mahā ṛṣayaḥ praṇamya ca mahā bāho viśvāmitrasya vipra tām dṛṣṭvā vismayam āgatya kautūhala samanvitāḥ bhaktim śraddhām purodhāya praṇamya ānata kaṃdharāḥ ūcuḥ bho brahman nāda kalpe hi brāhmaṇyam brūhi kim bhavet jāti adhyayana deha ātma saṃskāra ācāra karmaṇām bāhya ābhyantara sāmānya viśeṣāḥ yadi kṛtrimāḥ manaḥ vāc karma śārīra jāti dravya guṇa ātmakāḥ vastu bhūtāḥ parokṣaiḥ vā pramāṇaiḥ na viniścitāḥ na puṣṇāti bhavataḥ śemuṣī balam śṛṇudhvam yoginaḥ vākyam sa tarkam śiṣya śreyase spaṣṭa yogya artha viṣayam pratyakṣam tāvat īkṣate kāryāḥ viśeṣāḥ veda uktāḥ na yuktam akṛtam vacaḥ tālu ādi karaṇānām ca vyāpāra anantaram śrutyāḥ vyāpārāt paratas tasya prāgabhāva viśeṣāt tasmāt dhūma agni vat vā artha phala bhāvaḥ avatiṣṭhate puruṣa anugatā jātiḥ brāhmaṇa tva ādikā asti ced dvi varṇa jāti bhedena pratyākṣa artha upalakṣaṇāt ca gataḥ yathāśvas nirdhāryate jñaiḥ su vicakṣaṇa tvāt manuṣya bhāvāt aviśiṣyamāṇaḥ tadvat dvijaḥ śūdra gaṇāt na bhinnaḥ manuṣya jātyāḥ na paraḥ viśeṣaḥ yaḥ kalpyate sarva nara anuyāyī saṃskāra yuktāḥ hi kriyā viśiṣṭāḥ dvijanmanām śūdra viveka hetuḥ brāhmaṇaḥ proktaḥ yaiḥ a tattva jña mānavaiḥ prabhraṣṭa brāhmaṇa tvāḥ te jāyante viprasaṅgāt jarā janma antara kleśa duṣṭa grāha kulākulam śvānu śūkara cāṇḍāla kṛmi kūrma ādi kāyakam bhūri pāpa bhara ākrāntaḥ sa jīvaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ katham sapta vyādha kathāḥ viprāḥ manunā parikīrtitāḥ tam niśamya yaduśreṣṭha nityam jāti padam tyajet sapta vyādhāḥ daśārṇeṣu mṛgāḥ kālañjare girau cakravākāḥ sarit dvīpe haṃsāḥ sarasi mānase te api jātāḥ kurukṣetre brāhmaṇāḥ vedapāragāḥ prasthitāḥ dīrgham adhvānam mṛyam kim avasīdatha tasmāt na jīve brāhmaṇyam paśyāmaḥ hi kathaṃcana śastra ādimat bhārgava jāti yuktaḥ gaja aśva goja uṣṭra khara ādikānām śaktyā kṛtaḥ hi aṅga ja varṇa dharmaiḥ bhedaḥ sphuṭam lakṣaṇāt tad uttarāt na eva vikartanīyā brāhmaṇya jāti nṛṣu na asti kācid sita ādi asādhāraṇa tulya rūpāḥ sanātanaḥ aṅgeṣu na varṇa bhedaḥ sāṅketikam sukṛta leśa viśeṣa labdham vāṇijya bheṣaja kṛtām iva jāti bhedāḥ kim brāhmaṇāḥ ye sukṛtam tyajanti kim kṣatriyāḥ lokam apālayantaḥ svadharma hīnāḥ hi tathā eva vaiśyāḥ śūdrāḥ sva mukhya kriyayā vihīnāḥ evam pramāṇaiḥ pratiṣidhyamānām sāṅketikīm yāti naraḥ vyavasthām svakīya siddhām sva mataiḥ niṣiddhām na budhyate mūḍha manāḥ varākaḥ go mahiṣī aja vāji uṣṭra vāneya avi gaja adhipāḥ preṣya vārddhuṣika ākārya karaṇa udyata mānasāḥ divyāḥ te api ca ye dvijāḥ vinaṣṭāḥ te tu vijñeyāḥ kravyādāḥ ca kuśīlavāḥ palāṇḍu laśuna ādāḥ ca mṛgī uṣṭrī kṣīra pāyinaḥ māṃsa sarva rasa kṣīra kraya vikraya kāriṇaḥ punarbhū vṛṣalī veśyā cāṇḍāla strī niṣeviṇaḥ śūdra anna rasa puṣṭa aṅgāḥ preta vastra anna bhojanāḥ mṛta sūtaka labdha anna pāna ādi abhyavahāriṇaḥ brahma deva pitṛ bhūta manuṣyeṣu bahiṣkṛtāḥ mātsarya mada vidveṣa tṛṣṇā kāma tamaḥ mayāḥ hīna ācārāḥ hi ye kecid apare piśunāḥ dvijāḥ evam śāstra udita nyāya mārga bhraṣṭāḥ tu ye narāḥ viśiṣṭa gotra saṃskāra kalāpa sakala ātmakāḥ vedān adhyāpayantaḥ api te adhīyānāḥ śruti kramāt brāhmaṇa tvāt vihīyante durācāra vighāyinaḥ tasmāt na jātiḥ ekatra bhūtātmā asti anapāyinī tvāt atra ca ślokān mānavāḥ samadhīyate sadyas patati māṃsena lākṣayā lavaṇena ca tri aheṇa śūdraḥ bhavati brāhmaṇaḥ kṣīra vikayī preṣyān vārddhuṣikān ca eva śūdrāḥ tān manuḥ abravīt śūdraḥ brāhmaṇa tām eti brāhmaṇaḥ ca eti śūdra tām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe yad kārtikeyavarṇane jātivarṇanam nāma catvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ vipra vat vaiśya rājanyau rākṣasāḥ rāvaṇa ādayaḥ śva āda cāṇḍāla dāsāḥ ca lubdhaka ābhīra dhīvarāḥ ye nye api vṛṣalāḥ kecid te api vedān adhīyate yadā deśa antaram gatvā brāhmaṇyam kṣatriyam śritāḥ vyāpāra ākāra bhāva ādyaiḥ vipra tulyaiḥ prakalpitaiḥ vedān adhītya vedau vā vedam vā api yathākramam prodvahanti śubhām kanyām śuddha brāhmaṇa jāḥ narāḥ athavā adhītya vedān tu kṣatra vaiśyaiḥ tu vā narāḥ gauḍa pūrvām kṛtām eyuḥ jātim vā dākṣiṇātya jām a parijñāta śūdra tvāt brāhmaṇyam yānti kāmatas tasmāt na jñāyate bhedaḥ veda adhyāya kriyā kṛtaḥ śāstra kāraiḥ tathā ca uktam nyāya mārga anusāribhiḥ te sādhu matam ākarṇya santaḥ santi vimatsarāḥ ācāra hīnān na punanti vedāḥ yadi api adhītāḥ saha sadbhiḥ aṅgaiḥ śilpam hi veda adhyayanam dvijānām vṛttam smṛtam brāhmaṇa lakṣaṇam tu na tena kriyate kāryam strī ratnena iva ṣaṇḍhakaḥ śikhā praṇava saṃskāra sandhyā upāsana mekhalāḥ daṇḍa ajina pavitra ādyāḥ śūdreṣu api niraṅkuśāḥ prasaṅgaḥ api hi śūdrāṇām na śakyaḥ vinivāritum tasmāt na ete api lakṣyante vilakṣaṇa tayā nṛṇām yajñopavīta saṃskāra mekhalā cūlikā ādayaḥ ābhicārika mantra ādyaiḥ durlabha tva ādi bhāṣaṇaiḥ tapaḥ satya ādi māhātmyāt devatā samaya smṛtiḥ mantra śaktiḥ nṛṇām eṣām sarveṣām api vidyate śūdra brāhmaṇayoḥ tasmāt na asti bhedaḥ kathaṃcana śāpa anugraha kāri tvam śakti bhedaḥ na vidyate caura cāṭa ādi rājanya durjana abhihate nṝṇām ātma aduḥkha udaya apāyam sveṣu jantuṣu rakṣaṇam mā bhūt yuge kalau etad deśe ca akārya kṛt dvije syāt anya deśa kāla ādau dvijānām atiśāyinām saṃsāra ārakta cetaskāḥ moha andhatamasā āvṛtāḥ bāti dharmaḥ svayam kiṃjit viśeṣaḥ śruti saṃgamāt asiddhaḥ śūdra jātīnām prasiddhaḥ vipra jātiṣu saṃskāraḥ yoni sādhyaḥ vā sāmagrī prabhavaḥ atha vā śūdrebhyaḥ atiśayam dhatte yaḥ sādhāraṇa tā guṇaḥ na jāti jaḥ trayī jaḥ vā viśeṣaḥ yukti bādhakāt svāntaḥ śarīra vṛtti sthaḥ śruti yogāt udeti yaḥ dṛśya svabhāvam kim abhīṣṭam etat brāhmaṇyam āhosvit adṛṣṭa rūpam sāmagrī abhāvāt paramam viśeṣam bhūdeva gātra stham abhūmidevāḥ sāmagrī anuṣṭhāna guṇaiḥ samagrāḥ śūdrāḥ yatas santi samāḥ dvijānām tasmāt viśeṣaḥ dvija śūdra nāmnoḥ na ādhyātmikaḥ bāhya nimittakaḥ vā na eṣām jāti ādīnām asaṃbhavāt ca adhīte na viśeṣataḥ saṃskāra atiśaya abhāvāt antarasya āgate paraiḥ dharmāt atiśayaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ krūra sāhasika ādiṣu tasmāt vipreṣu jāti ādi sāmagrī prabhavaḥ na saḥ sukha ādau na ca aiśvarye na ājñāyām na abhayeṣu api na vīrye na ākṛtau na akṣe na vyāpāre na ca āyuṣi na prajñāyām na vairāgye na dharme na parākrame mṛgyamāṇaḥ api yatnataḥ ukta mātrā visambhūtiḥ vicāra krama kāribhiḥ vṛddha vṛndāraka adhīśaiḥ apradhṛṣyam idam vacaḥ na brāhmaṇāḥ candra marīci śubhrāḥ na kṣatriyāḥ kiṃśuka puṣpa varṇāḥ na ca iha vaiśyāḥ haritāla tulyāḥ śūdrāḥ na ca aṅgāra samāna varṇāḥ pāda pracāraiḥ tanu varṇa keśaiḥ sukhena duḥkhena ca śoṇitena samānāḥ catuṣprabhedāḥ hi katham bhavanti varṇa pramāṇa ākṛti garbha vāsa vāc buddhi karma indriya jīviteṣu bala trivarga āmaya bheṣajeṣu na vidyate jāti kṛtaḥ viśeṣaḥ saḥ ekaḥ eva atra patiḥ prajānām katham punar jāti kṛtaḥ prabhedaḥ pramāṇa dṛṣṭānta naya pravādaiḥ parīkṣyamāṇaḥ vighaṭa tvam eti catvāraḥ ekasya pituḥ sutāḥ ca teṣām sutānām khalu jātiḥ ekā evam prajānām hi pitā ekaḥ evam pitṛ aika bhāvāt na ca jāti bhedaḥ ye kauśikāḥ kāśyapa gautamāḥ ca kauṇḍinya māṇḍavya vaśiṣṭha gotrāḥ maudgalya kātyāyana bhārgavāḥ ca gotrāṇi nānāvidha jātayaḥ ca bhrātṛ snuṣā maithuna putra bhāvāḥ vaivāhikam karma na varṇa bhedaḥ sarvāṇi śilpāni bhavanti teṣām ye ca anye paṇḍitāḥ prāhuḥ deha brāhmaṇatām narāḥ teṣām durdṛṣṭi timiram apanīya anukampya ca nyāya añjana auṣadhaiḥ divyaiḥ pariṇāma sukha āvahaiḥ upanītaḥ prayatnena su dṛṣṭim saṃvidadmahe mṛtimat tvāt ca nāśi tvam nāśi tvāt śeṣa bhūta vat deha ādhāra niviṣṭānām brāhmaṇyam na prakalpyate ekaikaḥ avayavaḥ teṣām na brāhmaṇyam samaśnute pṛthivī udaka vāyi agni pariṇāma viśeṣāt dehāt sarva bhūtānām brāhmaṇa tva prasaṅgāt śarīrasya teṣām na brahma tā bhavet tasmāt na dehe brāhmaṇyam na api deha ātmakam bhavet prasajyate deha śakti guṇaiḥ kṣīṇaiḥ kāya bhasma ādi rūpa vat iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe brāhmaṇyavivekavarṇanam nāma ekacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvācatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ brāhmaṇa saṃskāra viveka varṇanam aparaiḥ ca sat ācāra yoga yuktaiḥ manīṣibhiḥ yat akāri mahāsattvaiḥ subhāṣitam idam śṛṇu jāti kula rūpa vayaḥ varṇa aneka śruta mada andhāḥ klībāḥ jñātvā bhava parivarte jātīnām koṭi śata sahasreṣu na ekān jāti viśeṣān indriya nivṛtti pūrvakān sarvān karma vaśāt gacchati atra kasya ekā śāśvatā jātiḥ nyāya jñaiḥ sa nirākāryaḥ vākyaiḥ nyāya anusāribhiḥ vai cūḍa upanayanam ca asya vrata ādeśaḥ tathā eva ca iti evamādi saṃskāra vidhānaiḥ ye atisaṃskṛtāḥ te eva brāhmaṇāḥ yeṣām nairantaryeṇa kāmanāḥ yasmāt vai brāhmaṇāḥ jātāḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ kṛta saṃskṛtaiḥ na āyuḥ śaktiḥ hi kānti ādi viśeṣaḥ vidyate sphuṭaḥ tau vā brāhmaṇa gātra utthau saṃskṛta asaṃskṛtau narau na bhidyete parasparam jñāna adhyayana mīmāṃsāḥ niyama indriya nigrahaiḥ vinā saṃskāra yoge api puṃsaḥ śūdrāt na bhinna tā saṃskāraḥ kriyamāṇaḥ ca na śūdre ca pravartate saṃskṛta aṅgaḥ ca pāpebhyaḥ na paśyati nivartate vyāmuhyanti sat ācārāt brāhmaṇa tvāt patanti ca mānavaḥ niḥsaṃskāraḥ sat ācāraḥ bhavet vipra uttamaḥ sadā brāhmaṇyāt avikalpam sa paścāt duścaritaḥ naraḥ duranuṣṭhāna saktānām puṃsām puruṣa puṃgavaiḥ kim kvacid dṛṣṭam eva etat kim vā spardhā vidati ayam mad anuṣṭhintaḥ vyāsa ādi muni sattamāḥ garbhādhāna ādi saṃskāra kalāpa rahitāḥ sphuṭam jātaḥ vyāsaḥ tu kaivartyāḥ śvapākyāḥ ca parāśaraḥ śukyāḥ śukaḥ kaṇāda ākhyaḥ tathā ulūkyāḥ sutaḥ abhavat mṛgī jothā ṛṣaśṛṅgā upi vasiṣṭhaḥ gaṇikā ātmajaḥ mandapālaḥ muni śreṣṭhaḥ nāvika apatyam ucyate māṇḍavyaḥ muni rājaḥ tu maṇḍūkī garbha sambhavaḥ hariṇī garbha sambhūtaḥ ṛṣyaśṛṅgaḥ mahā muniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam śvapākī garbha sambhūtaḥ pitā vyāsasya pārthiva tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam ulūkī garbha sambhūtaḥ kaṇāda ākhyaḥ mahā muniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam gaṇikā garbha sambhūtaḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca mahā muniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam nāvikā garbha sambhūtaḥ mandapālaḥ mahā muniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam labdha saṃskāra dehāḥ ca mahāpātakinaḥ narāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe brāhmaṇasaṃskāravivekavarṇanam nāma dvācatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tricatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ kim ca anyat aparam yūyam veda mantra vidaḥ janāḥ praṣṭavyāḥ kasya saṃskāre viśeṣam upagacchata śukra śoṇita sambhūtaḥ śamala udbhava kīṭa vat niṣeka ādi śmaśāna antaiḥ vividhaiḥ vidhi vistaraiḥ teṣām gūḍha manaḥ kāya vāc viduṣṭaiḥ su ceṣṭitaiḥ asaṃyata manuṣyāṇām pakṣaḥ ayam dūṣyate mayā sarva kārya karān sarvān vṛṣalān atiśerate tenaḥ go ghnaḥ surā pāṇaḥ para strī ramaṇa priyaḥ uddhataḥ dhūrtaḥ naṭaḥ śaṭhaḥ pāpī sarva āśī sarva vikrayī vāc manaḥ kāya jaiḥ duṣṭaiḥ hatāḥ ye brāhmaṇa adhamāḥ śūdrāṇām yāni aniṣṭāni sampadyante svabhāvāt tasmāt mantra ugnihotram vā vedyām paśu vadhaḥ api vā hetavaḥ na hi vipra tve śūdraiḥ śakyā kriyā yathā saṃsāra anala saṃtāpa viklavīkṛta mānasāḥ te janma maraṇa aṭavyām sukha amṛta pipāsavaḥ catur varṇāḥ narāḥ ye tu tad tad vīrye nara adhamāḥ teṣām sarva ātmanā sarvaiḥ dharmaiḥ sāṃkaryam īkṣyate tad anuṣṭhāna vaidharmya viyoga maraṇa ādibhiḥ asevya sevanaiḥ anyaiḥ śūdra vipra ādayaḥ samāḥ buddhyā śaktyā svabhāvena dharmaiḥ jāti ādibhiḥ śriyā kartavyaiḥ puṇya pāpābhyām śanais sarva śarīra gaiḥ bandhanaiḥ rodhanaiḥ nānā yātanā upāya pīḍanaiḥ daṇḍaiḥ adaṇḍa karaṇaiḥ viṣāda parivedanaiḥ sāttvikaḥ pratidharma ādyaiḥ rājasaiḥ citra veṣṭitaiḥ tāmasaiḥ tāpa moha ādyaiḥ dūyamānāḥ punar punar śleśma māruta pitta ādyaiḥ mahā bībhatsa darśanaiḥ kvacid vṛtti nivṛttibhyām amṛta anṛta hita ahitaiḥ alaṃkāra upayogena manmatha ādyaiḥ viceṣṭitaiḥ dhana lābha āśayāna eka jantu saṃghāta pātanaiḥ ati kṣība tva saṃkṣobha kṣuta kṣāma kṣama āmayaiḥ yātanā upāya paiśunya śūnyatva upaśamaiḥ tathā apraśastaiḥ anuṣṭhānaiḥ samīpa sthāpadaḥ samāḥ hiṃsakāḥ prāṇinaḥ pāpa vitatha ālāpa bhāṣiṇaḥ sādhūnām bhāṣakāḥ stenāḥ nirdayāḥ pāradārikāḥ bhakṣāḥ piśāca vat duṣkulīnāḥ durācārāḥ nṛpāṇām upajīvinaḥ lubdhakāḥ hariṇān hatvā vāsam kṛtvā yathā vane tathā khādanti piśunāḥ bahavaḥ ca kriyā vaśāt māṇi ghāta abhiśaṃsinaḥ puṣṇanti kapaṭaiḥ arthān veda vikrayiṇaḥ adhamāḥ cāṭāḥ kārpaṭikāḥ kūrāḥ kadaryāḥ kalaha priyāḥ vācāṭa duṣṭa kulaṭāḥ aṭantaḥ bhāṭakaiḥ saha bhaṇḍa mānyāḥ bhaṭa āṭopaiḥ saṃkruddhāḥ su viluṇṭhakāḥ paryaṭāḥ bhāṭakāḥ jīvāḥ kaṇṭhaka śloka bhāṣiṇaḥ śūdra karma anutiṣṭhantaḥ nistapāḥ te nara adhamāḥ sevā adhyāpana vāṇijya kṛṣi ādi ārambha lambhitāḥ gṛhṇantaḥ sampadaḥ bāhayāt dravya dhānya dhana ādikāḥ krodhāt ābhyantarān doṣān tathā duṣṭa manorathān atyajantaḥ viśiṣṭānām śreṣṭhāḥ te kaca mardinaḥ na upadeyāni vastrāṇi nityam ādadate dvijāḥ dantikāḥ diṇḍikāḥ bhaṇḍāḥ caṇḍāḥ caṇḍāla ceṣṭitā vaitaṇḍakāḥ te nighnanti yathā siṃhaḥ mṛgān paśūn paribhūya avatiṣṭhante dhik tān riktān sa vairiṇaḥ tasmāt saṃsārikāḥ sattvāḥ citta kleśa kalaṅkitāḥ dauḥśīlya daurmanasya ādyaiḥ tulya jātīya bandhanāt śūdrām prarocate vipraḥ rāgiṇīm maithunam prati kāma kāma āturābhyaḥ tu rocante śūdra mānavāḥ maithunam prati brāhmaṇye te api tāsām sukha āvahāḥ ye tu jāti ādibhiḥ bhinnāḥ go aśva uṣṭ mataṃga jāḥ anaḍvān eva goḥ eva kāmam puṣṇāti saṅgame ghoṭakāḥ ca ratim samyak kurvate vaḍabāsu ca tiryañc jātiḥ striyā sākam kurvāṇā api hi maithunam na tasyāḥ kurute garbham naraḥ na api sukhāsikām tiraścā saha kurvāṇā maithunam manuja aṅganā na ādhatte tad kṛtam garbham na yuktam maithunam tayoḥ yena saṃkṣīyate bhedaḥ prasphuṭam dvija śūdrayoḥ bahubhiḥ jaḍa saṃghātaiḥ aviśiṣṭe pade ahani rāga dveṣa ādibhiḥ doṣaiḥ adhikam paripīḍite kulāla cakra vat bhrānta mānase viṣaya arṇave ghora duḥkha bhaya ākrānte samāje anīśvara ātmani janma mṛtyu jarā śoka aniṣṭa yoga agni pīḍite hīna sattva śarīra ādau na viśeṣaḥ vibhāvyate brāhmaṇyam brāhmaṇa āsaṅgāt brāhmaṇī ca upasevate bandhakī ceṭakaiḥ api pracyavante anye mahāpātaka sevitāḥ vyalīka kalpanā eva eṣā tasmāt jāti ādi kalpanā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe nāma atha catuścatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ heya upādeya tattva jñāḥ tyakta anyāya patha āgamāḥ mad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad niyama ācāra vṛtta sthāḥ hita anveṣaṇa tatparāḥ saṃsāra rakṣaṇa upāya kriyā yukta manorathāḥ svādhyāya bhakta hṛdayāḥ tyakta saṅgāḥ vimatsarāḥ viśokāḥ vimadāḥ śāntā sarva prāṇi hita eṣiṇaḥ sukha duḥkha samālokāḥ vivikta sthāna vāsinaḥ vrata upayukta sarva aṅgāḥ dhārmikāḥ pāpa bhīravaḥ nirmamāḥ nirahaṃkārāḥ dāna śūrāḥ dayā pare satya brahma vidaḥ śāntā sarva śāstreṣu niṣṭhitāḥ mātṛ īśvareṇa devena nābheyena bhava chidā brahmaṇā kṛta maryādāḥ te evam brāhmaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ sarva loka hita arthāya nipuṇam su pratiṣṭhitam vṛhat tvāt bhagavān brahmā nābheyaḥ tasya ye janāḥ bhakti āsaktāḥ prapannāḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ kṣatriyāḥ tu kṣata trāṇāt vaiśyāḥ vārttā praveśanāt ye tu śrutyāḥ drutim prāptāḥ śūdrāḥ tena iha kīrtitāḥ ye ca ācāra ratāḥ prāhuḥ brāhmaṇyam brahma vādinaḥ kṣamā damaḥ dayā dānam satyam śaucam dhṛtiḥ ghṛṇā mārdava ārjava saṃtoṣa anahaṃkāra tapaḥ śamāḥ dharmaḥ jñānam apaiśunyam brahmacaryam amūḍha tā dhyānam āstikyam adveṣaḥ vairāgyam ca śama ātma tā pāpa bhīru tvam asteyam amātsaryam atṛṣṇa tā naiḥsaṅgyam guru śuśrūṣā manaḥ vāc kāya saṃyamaḥ ye evambhūtam ācāram anutiṣṭhanti mānavāḥ brāhmaṇyam puṣkalam teṣām nityam eva pravardhate te sva mata āsvāda labdha varṇa ācārāḥ mahā ojasaḥ sarva śāstra avirodhena pavitrīkṛta mānasāḥ sat jana abhimatāḥ prājñāḥ purāṇa āgama paṇḍitāḥ gīta gīta āgama ācārāḥ smṛti kārāḥ paṭhanti ca varṇa āśrama ācāra kṛtam karma siddhi ati anuttamam saṃsiddhāyām tu vārttāyām tatas teṣām svayam prabhuḥ maryādām sthāpayāmāsa yathā ārabdham parasparam ye vai parigṛhītāraḥ teṣām sattva bala adhikāḥ itareṣām kṣata trāṇān sthāpayāmāsa kṣatriyān upatiṣṭhanti ye tān vai yācantaḥ narmadāḥ sadā ye ca anye api abalāḥ teṣām vaiśya karmaṇi saṃsthitāḥ kīlāni nāśayanti sma pṛthivyām prāk atandritāḥ vaiśyān eva tu tān āha kīnāśān vṛttim āśritān śocantaḥ ca dravantaḥ ca paricaryāsu ye narāḥ nistejasaḥ alpa vīryāḥ ca śūdrān tān abravīt tu saḥ brāhmaṇa kṣatriya viśām śūdrāṇām ca parasparam śamaḥ tapaḥ damaḥ śaucam kṣāntiḥ ārjavam eva ca brahma karma svabhāva jam śauryam tejaḥ dhṛtiḥ dākṣyam yuddhe ca api apalāyanam dānam īśvara bhāvaḥ ca kṣātram karma svabhāva jam kṛṣi gorakṣa vāṇijyam vaiśya karma svabhāva jam yogaḥ tapaḥ dayā dānam satyam dharma śrutiḥ ghṛṇā jñānam vijñānam āstikyam etat brāhmaṇa lakṣaṇam śikhā jñāna mayī yasya pavitram ca tapaḥ mayam brāhmaṇyam puṣkalam tasya manuḥ svāyambhuvaḥ abravīt yatra vā tatra vā varṇe uttama adhama madhyamāḥ nivṛttaḥ pāpa karmebhyaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ sa vidhīyate śūdraḥ api śīla sampannaḥ brāhmaṇāt adhikaḥ bhavet brāhmaṇaḥ vigata ācāraḥ śūdrāt hīnataraḥ bhavet na surām sandhayet yaḥ tu āpaṇeṣu gṛheṣu ca yadi ekā sphuṭam eva jātiḥ aparā kṛtyāt param bhedinī kim na asau pratipatti gocara patham yāyāt vibhaktyā nṛṇām śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe barṇavibhāgavivekavarṇanam nāma catuścatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ idam śruṇu mayā ākhyātam tarka pūrvam idam vacaḥ tvad saṃśaye jāte kṛte vai jāti karmaṇoḥ saṃsiddhim yānti manujāḥ jāti karma samuccaya evam saṃsiddhim āyāti puruṣaḥ jāti karmaṇoḥ iti evam uktavan pūrvam śiṣyāṇām bodhane purā yogi īśvaraḥ mahā tejāḥ samāsāt na tu vistarāt iti pṛṣṭaḥ purā brahmā ṛṣīn provāca bhārataiḥ sa vitarkam idam vākyam viprarṣe jāti karmaṇoḥ tasmāt tvayā mahā bāho na kāryaḥ vismayaḥ nṛpa ha kārttikeyam prati sadā devānām durvidā gatiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhahasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe nāma pañcacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ tad iyam bhādrapade māsi ṣaṣṭhī ca bharata ṛṣabha su puṇyā iyam pāpa harā śivā śāntā guhapriyā snāna dāna ādikam sarvam yasyām akṣayyam ucyate paśyanti gāṅgeyam dakṣiṇāpatham āśritam brahmahatyā ādibhiḥ pāpaiḥ mucyante na atra saṃśayaḥ tasmāt asyām sadā paśyet kārttikeyam nṛpa uttama pūjayanti guham ye asyām narāḥ bhakti samanvitāḥ yaḥ tu kārayate veśma su dṛḍham su pratiṣṭhitam dārvam śaila mayam ca api bhaktayā śraddhā samanvitaḥ gāṅgeyam yānam āruhya gacchet gāṅgeya sadma vai sammārjana ādi yaḥ karma kuryāt guha gṛhe naraḥ gaja aśva ratha yāna āḍhyam saināpatyam avāpnute rājñām pūjyaḥ sadā proktaḥ kārttikeyaḥ mahīpate pārttikeyam ṛte na anyam rājñām pūjyam pracakṣate saṃgrāmam gacchamānaḥ yaḥ pūjayet kṛttikāsutam sa śatrum jayate vīra yathā indraḥ dānavān raṇe tailam ṣaṣṭhyām na bhuñjīta na divā kuru nandana yaḥ tu ṣaṣṭhyām naraḥ naktam kuryāt hi bharata ṛṣabhaiḥ tri kṛtvas dakṣiṇām āśām gatvā yaḥ śraddhayā anvitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām ṣaṣṭhī kalpe kārttikeyamāhātmayavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti ṣaṣṭhī kalpaḥ samāptaḥ atha saptacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ saptamyām sa upavāsaḥ tu nakta āhāraḥ api vā bhavet saptamyām devadevena labdham svam rūpam ādarāt aṇḍena saha jātaḥ vai aṇḍa sthaḥ buddhim āptavan aṇḍa sthasya eva dakṣeṇa bhāryām dattvā svakām sutām nāmnā rūpa iti rūpeṇa na anyā nārī tathā bhavet aṇḍa sthaḥ eva su ciram sthitaḥ mārtaṇḍaḥ iti atas dakṣa ājñayā viśvakarmā vapuḥ asya prakāśayan prakāśataḥ tatas nām tasya jātam narādhipa dākṣāyaṇī tasya bhāryā vairāgyāt tanu madhyamā cintayāmāsa sā devī duḥkhāt nirvedam āgatā aho tejaḥ mayam rūpam kāntam kāntasya kāntimat na ca asya kiñcid paśyāmi aṅgam tejaḥ vimohitam śubham kanaka tulyam mama rūpam kāntam su kāntimat sāṃpratam śyāma tām yātam dagdham etasya tejasā tasmāt tapsye tapaḥ ca aham gatvā vai uttarān kurūn svām chāyām atra nikṣipya bhayāt śāpasya rūpiṇī nikṣipya uvāca tām bālām mā ca asmai vai vadiṣyasi evam sā niścayam kṛtvā gatā vai uttarān kurūn sva rūpam tatra nikṣipya vaḍabā rūpa dhāriṇī cacāra sā mṛgaiḥ sārdham bahūn varṣa gaṇān nṛpa asau api ca mārtaṇḍaḥ chāyām bhāryām amanyat śanim ca tapatīm ca eva dve apatye ca jajñivān atha tābhyām vivādaḥ abhūt āditya duhitroḥ dvayoḥ yamaḥ api yamunā bhrātā chāyayā tāḍitaḥ bhṛśam mama tasmāt te karma bībhatsam prāṇinām prāṇa hiṃsanam bhaviṣyati ciram mūḍhaḥ ācandrārkam na saṃśayaḥ pādam ca yadi bhūmau tvam imam saṃsthāpayiṣyasi kṛmayaḥ bhakṣayiṣyanti mad śāpa kaluṣīkṛtam teṣām vivadamānānām mārtaṇḍaḥ abhyāgamat tatas pāha mahātmānam mārtaṇḍam loka pāvanam tāta nityam iyam ca api krūra bhāvena paśyati na ca asyāḥ su samā dṛṣṭiḥ asme asti iti lakṣyate provāca atha saḥ tām chāyām mārtaṇḍaḥ bhṛśa kopanaḥ same apatye kim mūḍhe sama tvam na anupaśyasi yamaḥ provāca pitaram na iyam mātā pitar mama mātuḥ chāyā tu iyam pāpā śaptaḥ aham anayā pitar atha provāca mārtaṇḍaḥ mā te pādaḥ mahī tale māṃsam rudhiram ādāya kṛmayaḥ yāntu bhū talam yamunāyāḥ ca yat toyam gaṅgā tulyam bhaviṣyati narmadāyāḥ tapatyāḥ ca samam puṇyena vai dvija tad sāyujya tayā sāgram gaṅgā yāsyati śobhanā gaṅgām āsādya yamunā gaṅgā sā eva bhaviṣyati saurī ca vaiṣṇavī ca ubhe mahā pāpa bhaya apahe tvam putra lokapāla tvam brahmaṇaḥ ajñām sabhājayan evam saṃsthāpya svām bhāryām apatyāni tathā eva ca ājagāma sakāśam vai dakṣasya āha ca kāraṇam dakṣaḥ vijñāya tat sarvam mārtaṇḍam idam āha vai rūpam na paśyatī tubhyam sā bhāryā uttarān gatā rūpam te prakaṭiṣyāmi yadi śakṣyasi vedanām asau provāca śakṣye aham prakāśī kuru me vapuḥ atha sasmāra takṣāṇam smṛtaḥ eva ājagāma saḥ provāca dakṣaḥ takṣāṇam mārtaṇḍam vai prakāśaya takṣā provāca mārtaṇḍam vedanāḥ visahiṣyase provāca takṣāṇam dakṣa coditaḥ atha takṣā prakāśam vai tasya rūpam vibhāvasau mukhāt ārabhya pāda antam tatakṣa karaṇaiḥ svakaiḥ kiraṇaiḥ tudyamāneṣu tasya aṅgeṣu punar punar prakṣaṇekṣaṇe mūrchayati mārtaṇḍaḥ vedanā āturaḥ tasya śāpa bhayāt takṣā pādau gulpha ādi yāvataḥ cakāra atho nirākārāḥ aṅgulyaḥ na prakāśayat paryāptam takṣa karma idam vedanā mama bādhate takṣā provāca mārtaṇḍam vedanām jahi gopate karāt ārabhya gātrāṇi vilimpe deha jāni te atas ca imāni ceṣṭāni mārtaṇḍasya iha bhūpate itihāsa purāṇābhyām suparṇa guggulam tathā mārtaṇḍasya aṇḍa jam tejaḥ gṛhītvā kila bhārataiḥ cakāra vajram ajaram śatru lekhā ādi nāśanam mārtaṇḍaḥ parituṣṭaḥ abhūt labdhvā rūpam gata vyathaḥ jagāma sa kurūn vegāt sva bhāryā darśana utsukaḥ mṛga madhya gatām dṛṣṭvā vaḍabā rūpa dhāriṇīm aśva rūpam tatas kṛtvā sva bhāryām adhiruhya saḥ para puruṣa āśaṅkayā sā sthitā devasya saṃmukhā tejaḥ nāsā puṭābhyām tu yugapad sā akṣipat punar tatra jātau devabhiṣajau nāsatyau aśvinau iti tapatī śaniḥ ca sāvarṇiḥ chāyā apatyāni vai viduḥ yamunā yamaḥ ca pūrva uktau saṃjñā yāḥ ca tathā ātmajau bhāryā labdhāḥ vapuḥ divyam tathā putrāḥ ca bhārataiḥ anena kāraṇena iṣṭā sadā devasya saptamī saptamyām sa upavāsaḥ tu rātrau bhuñjīta yaḥ naraḥ kṛtvā upavāsam ṣaṣṭhyām tu pañcamyām eka kāla bhuj dattvā su saṃskṛtam śākam bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ samanvitam devāya brāhmaṇebhyaḥ ca rātrau bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ mṛtaḥ ca svargam āyāti vimāna varam āsthitaḥ iha ca āgatya kāla ante nṛpaḥ samanvitaḥ putra pautraiḥ parivṛtaḥ dātā syāt nṛpatiḥ ciram upoṣya labdham tat tīrtham pitryam vai rāja saṃjñikam kuruṇā tava pūrveṇa śāka āhāreṇa saptamīm dharma kṣetram kurukṣetram kṛtam tasya vivasvantā saptamī navamī ṣaṣṭhī tṛtīyā pañcamī nṛpa saptamī māgha māse tu navamī āśvayuje matā ṣaṣṭhī bhādrapade dhanyā vaiśākhe tu tṛtīyikā puṇyā bhādrapade proktā pañcamī nāgapañcamī iti etāḥ teṣu māseṣu viśeṣāḥ tithayaḥ smṛtāḥ śākam su satkṛtam kṛtvā yaḥ ca bhaktyā samanvitaḥ dattvā vipre yathāśaktyā paścāt bhuṅkte niśi vratī catubhiḥ vā api māsaiḥ tu pāraṇam prathamam smṛtam agastya kusumaiḥ ca atra pūjā kāryā vibhāvasoḥ tu ca eva snānam ca pañcagavyena tam eva prāśayet tatas tat eva deyam viprāṇām śākam bhakṣyam atha ātmanā śubha śāka samāyuktam bhakṣya peya samanvitam dvitīye pāraṇe rājñ śubha gandhāni yāni vai puṣpāṇi tāni devasya tathā śvetam ca candanam aguruḥ ca api dhūpaḥ atra naivedyam guḍa pūpakāḥ snānam kuśa udakena atra prāśanam gomayasya tu tṛtīye karavīrāṇi tathā raktam ca candanam dhūpānām guggulaḥ ca atra priyaḥ devasya sarvadā śālyodanam tu naivedyam dadhi miśram mahāmate bho yuktam dadyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ tasya eva prāśanam dhanyam sarva pāpa haram śubham tṛtīye pāraṇasya ante mahat brāhmaṇa bhojanam śravaṇam ca purāṇasya vācanam ca api śasyate daivasya puratas tāta brāhmaṇānām tathā agratas brāhmaṇāt vācakāt śrāvyam na anya varṇa samudbhavāt atha tān brāhmaṇān sarvān bhaktyā śaktyā ca pūjayet vācake pūjite devaḥ sadā tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ bharavīram yathā iṣṭam tu tathā raktam ca candanam yathā iṣṭam guggulam tasya yathā iṣṭam pāyasam sadā yathā iṣṭāḥ modakāḥ tasya yathā vai tāmra bhājanam yatheṣṭam ca ghṛtam tasya yatheṣṭaḥ vācakaḥ sadā purāṇam ca yatheṣṭam vai savituḥ kuru nandana iti eṣā saptamā puṇyā śāka āhvā gopateḥ sadā yām upoṣya naraḥ bhaktyā bhāgyavān ca prajāyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe mākasaptamīvratavarṇanam nāma saptacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam uvāca atra eva āhuḥ mahātmānaḥ samvādam puṇyam uttamam iha amutra hitam śāmbaḥ papraccha jñānam uttamam prāpnoti vividhān kāmān katham ca madhusūdana anubhūya ucitam kālam katham muktim avāpnute dṛṣṭvā evam mama nirvedaḥ jātaḥ vyādhiḥ janārdana dṛṣṭvā imam jīvita āśā api rocate na hi me kṣaṇam kim tu evam akṛtārthaḥ asmi yat mama prāṇāḥ na yānti hi saṃsāre na patiṣyāmi jarā vyādhi samanvite ādhi vyādhi vinirmuktaḥ yathā aham syām tathā vada uvāca devatāyāḥ prasādaḥ anyaḥ sarvasya paramaḥ mataḥ upāyaḥ śāśvataḥ nityaḥ iti mama niścitā matiḥ anumāna āgama ādyaiḥ ca samyak utpāditā mayā yadā tām ca samuddiśya kṛtā tad vedinā tathā tatas viśiṣṭā devatā samyak viśiṣṭena eva dehinā mad ad ad ad ad ad phalam īhitam uvāca na ca saṃdehaḥ keṣāṃcid devatām prati na asti iti niścayaḥ anyeṣām viśiṣṭāḥ tvam kathāḥ kuruḥ uvāca pramāṇam asti yasya idam siddhā yasya iha ca astitā pratyakṣeṇa api ca astitvam devatāyām prasādhyate tat ca avaśyam pramāṇam ca dṛṣṭam sarva śarīriṇām uvāca anumāna āgamābhyām ca tad artham prayojanam uvāca anumāna āgamaiḥ gamyāḥ santi ca anyāḥ sahasraśas uvāca yā ca akṣa gocarā kācid viśiṣṭa iṣṭa phala pradā tām eva ādau mama ācakṣva kathayiṣyasi atha aparām uvāca pratyakṣam devatā sūryaḥ jagant cakṣuḥ divākaraḥ tasmāt abhyadhikā kācid devatā na asti śāśvatā yasmāt idam jagant jātam layam yāsyati yatra ca kṛta ādi lakṣaṇaḥ kālaḥ smṛtaḥ sākṣāt divākaraḥ graha nakṣatra yogāḥ ca rāśayaḥ karaṇāni ca mad ādityāḥ vasavaḥ rudrāḥ aśvinaḥ vāyavaḥ analaḥ lokāḥ sarve nagāḥ nāgāḥ saritaḥ sāgarāḥ tathā prasādāt asya lokaḥ ayam ceṣṭamānaḥ pradṛśyate astam yāti iti adṛśyeṇa kim etat kathyate mayā tasmāt atas param na asti na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati itihāsa purāṇeṣu antarātmā iti gīyate bāhya ātmā eti suṣumṇā sthaḥ svapna sthaḥ jāgrataḥ sthitaḥ astam yāti iti adṛṣṭena kim etat kathyate mayā tasmāt atas param na asti na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati vaktum varṣa śataiḥ na asau śakyaḥ saṃkṣepāt mayā tasmāt guṇa ākara khyā sarvatra ayam divākara matsya ādayaḥ samyak gatimantaḥ maheśvarāt maṇḍala vyatiriktam ca jānāmi paramārthāt tathā asya maṇḍalam kṛtvā yaḥ hi enam upatiṣṭhate prātar sāyam ca madhyāhne sa yāti paramām gatim tasmāt tvam iha duḥkhānām antam kartum yadi icchasi iha amutra ca bhogānām bhuktim muktim ca śāśvatām aṅgaiḥ vṛtam vṛte ca eva sthāne śāstreṇa śodhite na bhayam vidyate teṣām prapannāḥ ye divākaram iha amutra sukham teṣām acchidram jāyate sukham sūryeṇa idam mama uddiṣṭam sākṣāt yat jñānam uttamam etat saṃkṣiptam uddiṣṭam kṣipra siddhi karam param yathā na anyat atas asti iti svayam tūryeṇa bhāṣitam upāyaḥ ayam samākhyātaḥ te saṃkṣepāt tu iha yasmāt parataraḥ na asti hita upāyaḥ śarīriṇām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ha ādityamāhātmyavarṇanam nāma aṣṭacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya māhātmya varṇanam uvāca yatas tatas pravakṣyāmi snānam ādau samāsatas mudrayā śuci śuddhayā kṛtvā nīrājanam putra saṃśodhya ca jalam tatas dvis ācamya atha samprokṣya tanum sapta akṣareṇa ca dattvā tena japitvā tam svakam dhyātvā arka vat hṛdi gatvā ca āyatanam śubhra mārka mārkī tanum yajet pūrakam kumbhakam kṛtvā recakam ca samāhitaḥ kṛtvā uṅkāreṇa doṣān tu hanyāt kāya ādi sambhavān tat kilviṣam vāruṇa adbhiḥ ca hanyāt siddhi artham ātmanaḥ śoṣaṇam dahanam stambham plāvanam ca yathākramāt vāyu agni indra jana ākhyābhiḥ dhāraṇābhiḥ kṛte sati dhyātvā viśuddham ātmānam praṇamet arkam āsthitam sūkṣmam sthūlam tathā akṣāṇi sva sthāneṣu prakamya ca vinyasya aṅgāni kha ādīni hṛd ādyāni hṛdi ādiṣu kha svāhā hadayam bhānoḥ kham arkāya śiraḥ tathā ulkā svāhā śikhā arkasya yai ca hum kavacam param khāṃ phaṭ astram ca saṃhārāḥ ca āditas praṇavaḥ kṛtaḥ samprokṣya pūjayet sūryam gandha puṣpa ādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ tatas mūrtiṣu sarvāsu rātrau agnau prapūjayet prāñc paścima udañc abhyagrām prātar sāyam niśāsu vai sapta akṣareṇa tat mantram dhyātvā ca padma karṇikām prabhā maṇḍala madhya stham dhyātvā deham yathā purā raktacandana miśraiḥ vā vastraiḥ āvaraṇaiḥ śubhaiḥ pāvāhana ādi karmāṇi rakṣām tu hṛdayena ca tad cittaḥ ca sadā kuryāt jñātvā karma kramam budhaḥ kṛtvā ca āvāhanam mantraiḥ ekatra sthāpanam tatas yāvat yāga avasānam tu sāṃnidhyam tatra kalpya ca dattvā pādya ādikām pūjām śaktyā vā arghyam nivedya ca eṣa karma kramaḥ proktaḥ sarveṣām yajana kramāt pravakṣyāmi japa sthānam padmeśa āvaraṇe tathā mādityam karṇikā saṃstham daleṣu aṅgāni pūrvaśas soma ādīn rāhu paryantān grahān ca eva udañc ādeḥ mūrtimat lokapālān ca kramāt āvaraṇeṣu atha tad astrāṇi ca rakṣā artham sva mantraiḥ pūjayet kramāt praṇavaiḥ ca abhidhānaiḥ ca caturthyām hi abhiyojitaiḥ sarveṣām kathitāḥ mantrāḥ mudrāḥ ca kathayāmi atas pañcamudrāḥ samākhyātāḥ sarva karma prasiddhaye uttānau tu karau kṛtyāḥ aṅgulayaḥ grathitāḥ kramāt mudrā iyam sarva mudrāṇām vyoma mudrā iti kīrtitā padma vat prasṛtāḥ sarvāḥ mahā śvetā raveḥ smṛtā mahā java saṃnihitaḥ nityam ratha ārūḍhaḥ raviḥ smṛtaḥ hastau ūrdhva mukhau kṛtvā vāma aṅguṣṭhena yojitau dravyāṇām śodhane yojyāḥ rakṣā artham ca viśeṣataḥ anayā mudrayā sarvam rakṣitam śodhitam bhavet arghyam da tvā prayoktavyā pūjā ante ca viśeṣataḥ sa labheta īpsitān kāmān iha amutra na saṃśayaḥ rājya bhraṣṭaḥ labhet rājyam aputraḥ putram āpnuyāt prajñā medhā samṛddhīḥ ca ciram jīvati mānavaḥ surūpām labhate kanyām kulīnā puruṣaḥ dhruvam saubhāgyam strī kulīnā api kanyā ca puruṣa uttamam nitya yāgaḥ smṛtaḥ hi eṣa dhana dhānya sukha āvahaḥ prajā paśu vivṛddhiḥ ca niṣkāmasya api jāyate bhaktyā tam pūjayet yaḥ tu naraḥ puṇyataraḥ sadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryamāhātmyavarṇanam nāma ekonapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ saptamī māhātmya varṇanam uvāca naimittikam tatas vakṣye yat jñātvā ca samāsatas saptamyām grahaṇe ca eva saṃkrāntiṣu viśeṣataḥ samyak ācamya saṃdhyāyām vāruṇam praṇipatya ca indriyāṇi ca saṃyamya kṛtam dhyātvā svapet adhas darbha śayyā gataḥ rātrau prātar snātaḥ su saṃyataḥ tatas saṃdhyām upāsya atha pūrva uktam ca manum japet juhuyāt ca tadā vahnim sūrya agnī parikalpya ca sūrya agni karaṇam vakṣye tarpaṇam ca samāsatas prakṣipya āstīrya darbhaḥ ca pātra ādi ālabhya ca kramāt pavitram dvi kuśam kṛtvā sāgram prādeśa sammitam tena pātrāṇi samprokṣya saṃśodhya adha vilokya ca paryagnikaraṇam kṛtvā tathā ājyotyavanam tridhā parimṛjya sruva ādīn śra darbhaiḥ samprokṣayet tatas abhūmau sthita pātreṇa viṣṭareṇa tu pāṇinā dānena yadu śārdūlaiḥ na āntarikṣe sthale kvacid dakṣiṇena sruvam gṛhya juhuyāt pāvakam budhaḥ hadayena kriyāḥ sarvāḥ kartavyāḥ pūrva coditāḥ arkāt āramya saṃjñā artham dadyāt tūṣṇīm hutim sthitaḥ varuṇāya śataiḥ māghe saptamyām varuṇam yajet yathāśaktyā tu viprebhyaḥ pradadyāt khaṇḍa veṣṭakān dadyāt ca dakṣiṇām śaktyā prāpnoti yācitam phalam evam vai phālgune sūryam caitre vaiśākhe eva ca yajet āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi nabham bhādrapade yamam tathā āśvayuji parjanyam tvaṣṭāram kārttike yajet mārgaśīrṣe ca mitram ca pauṣe viṣṇum yajet yadi tat sarvam āpnuyāt kṣipram bhaktyā śraddhā anvitaḥ vratī evam saṃvatsare pūrṇe kṛtvā vai kāñcanam ratham madhye śuddha hemnā kṛtām śubhām ratnaiḥ alaṅkṛtām kṛtvā hema padma upari sthitām vṛtam dvādaśabhiḥ vipraiḥ kramāt māsa adhipa ātmabhiḥ madhye kṛtvā svam ācāryam pūjayitvā yathāśrutiḥ evam māsa adhipān viprān sampūjya atha nivedayet śubhām ācāryāya ratham chattram grāmam gāḥ ca mahīm śubhām evam bhaktyā yathāśaktyā hema ratna ādi bhūṣaṇam atas ūrdhvam na doṣaḥ atra vratasya akaraṇeṣu api bahvīḥ ca eva āśiṣaḥ dattvā pravadet prīyatām iti ādityaḥ yena kāmena tvayā ārādhitaḥ vrataiḥ tubhyam dadātu tam kāmam sampūrṇam bhavatu vratam ācāryān vipra rūpaiḥ tu praviṣṭaḥ bhāskaraḥ svayam dīna andha kṛpaṇebhyaḥ ca śaktyā dattvā ca dakṣiṇām kṛtvā evam saptamīm abdam rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ puruṣaḥ strī bhavet rājñām tādṛśām atha vallabhā śata yojana vistīrṇam niḥsapatnam akaṇṭakam niṣpanna maṇḍalam bhuṅkte sāgram varṣa śatam sukhī dadyāt vrata avasāne tu kṛtvā sarvam yathā uditam bhuṅkte vistīrṇam maṇḍalam nṛpaḥ evam piṣṭa mayam yaḥ api vitta hīnaḥ karoti nā bhuṅkte dīrgha āyūḥ nīrujaḥ sukhī māpadaḥ na spṛśanti enam nīhārāḥ iva bhāskaram yatas evam tatas jñātvā vidhānam kalpa coditam iti etat kathitam sāmba purā sūryeṇa mama śubham mayā asya eva prasādena prāptāḥ putrāḥ sahasraśas asurāḥ nirjitāḥ ca eva surāḥ sarve vaśīkṛtāḥ yad inā adhiṣṭhitam cakram idam sūrya aṃśubhiḥ svayam aham etam japan nityam yajan dhyāyan ca śaktitas jātaḥ asmi sarva kāmānām pūjyaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ ca tejasā tvam abhyasya eva manasā vācā vā karmaṇā api vā śṛṇuyāt bhakti yuktaḥ yaḥ naraḥ śraddhā samanvitaḥ mahānam ādeḥ putra saptamīm kurute ca yaḥ prāpyā akhilam kāmam ārogyam ca jayam tathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saptamīmāhātmyavarṇanam nāma pañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca eka bhaktam sadā ākhyātam ṣaṣṭyām naktam udāhṛtam mās mās mās saptamyām pāraṇam kila tu kṛta upavāsaḥ ṣaṣṭhyām tu pūjayet bhāskaram budhaḥ pūjayet devadeveśam śaṃkaram bhāskaram ravim evam hi caturaḥ māsān māgha ādīn pūjayet ravim ātmanaḥ ca api śudhi artham prāśanam gomayasya ca brāhmaṇān divya bhaumān ca bhojayet ca api śaktitas jyeṣṭha ādiṣu atha māseṣu śvetacandanam ucyate śvetāni ca api puṣpāṇi śubha gandha anvitāni vai kṛṣṇa agaruḥ tathā dhūpaḥ naivedyam pāyasam smṛtam tena eva brāhmaṇān tuṣṭān bhojayet ca mahāmate kārttika ādiṣu māseṣu agasti kusumaiḥ smṛtam pūjayet nara śārdūlaiḥ dhūpaiḥ ca eva aparājitaiḥ naivedyam guḍa pūpāḥ tu tathā ca ikṣu rasam smṛtam tena eva brāhmaṇān tāta bhojayasva sva śaktitas kuśa udakam prāśayethāḥ snānam ca kuru śuddhaye tṛtīye pāraṇa asya ante māghe māsi mahāmate bhojanam tatra dānam ca dviguṇam samudāhṛtam iti eṣā kathitā putra rathāhvā saptamā śubhā mahāsaptamī vikhyātā mahā puṇyā mahā udayā yām upoṣya dhanam putrān kīrtim vidyām avāpnuyāt tathā akhilam kuvalayam candreṇa ca sama ūrciṣā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe mahāsaptamīvratavarṇanam nāma ekapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvipañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya pūjā varṇanam iti uktvā bhagavant devaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ antardhānam gataḥ vīram śāmbasya iha prapaśyataḥ api kṛtvā vidhivat saptamīm rathasaptamīm uvāca ratha yātrā katham kāryā rathaḥ kāryaḥ ratham raveḥ imam artham purā pṛṣṭaḥ padmayoniḥ prajāpatiḥ rudreṇa kuru śārdūlaḥ āsīnaḥ kāñcane girau padmāsanam padmayonim sukha āsīnam prajāpatim uvāca yathā divi bhramet tātaiḥ ratha ārūḍhaḥ raviḥ sadā rathena hi eka cakreṇa pañca areṇa tri nābhinā triguṇā ca rathopasthāt īvā daṇḍa pramāṇāt nābhayaḥ tisraḥ tu cakrasya trayaḥ kālāḥ prakīrtitāḥ mārāḥ pañca ṛtavaḥ tasya nemyaḥ ṣaṣ ṛtavaḥ smṛtāḥ muhūrtāḥ iṣavaḥ tasya śamyāḥ ca asya kalāḥ smṛtāḥ tasya kāṣṭhāḥ smṛtāḥ koṇāḥ akṣadaṇḍaḥ kṣaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ nimeṣāḥ ca asya karṣāḥ syāt īṣā daṇḍaḥ lavāḥ smṛtāḥ yuga akṣi koṭī te tasya artha kāmau ubhau smṛtau aśvarūpāṇi chandāṃsi vahante vāmatas dhuram gāyatrī ca eva triṣṭubh ca jagatī anuṣṭubh eva ca paṅktiḥ ca bṛhatī ca eva uṣṇih eva tu saptamā kulāla cakra vat yāti maṇḍalam sarvatodiśam yuga akṣa koṭī te tasya dakṣiṇe syandanasya tu ṛk yajurbhyām gṛhītena vicakra aśvena vai dhruve hrasete tasya raśmī tu maṇḍaleṣu uttarāyaṇe dakṣiṇe atha samṛddhe tu bhramataḥ maṇḍalāni tu ākṛṣyete dhruveṇa iha samam tiṣṭhati suvrata tadā sa abhyantaram devaḥ bhramate maṇḍalāni tu tathā eva bāhyatas sūryaḥ bhramate maṇḍalāni tu aśīti maṇḍala śatam kāṣṭhayoḥ ubhayayoḥ api dhātā aryamā pulastyaḥ ca pulahaḥ ca prajāpatiḥ khaṇḍakaḥ vāsukiḥ ca eva sa karṇaḥ raśmiḥ eva ca ca rakṣaḥ hetiḥ prahetiḥ ca yātudhānau ca tau ubhau tathā grīṣmau tu dvau māsau mitraḥ ca varuṇaḥ ca ha ṛṣiḥ atriḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca takṣakaḥ anantaḥ eva ca menakā sahajanyī ca ca hahā hūhūḥ indraḥ ca eva vivasvant ca aṅgirāḥ bhṛguḥ eva ca elāparṇaḥ tathā sarpaḥ śaṅkhapālaḥ ca pannagāḥ tathā sarpaḥ tathā brāhmaḥ ca tau ubhau śaradi ete punar śubhrāḥ nivasanti sma devatāḥ parjanyaḥ ca eva pūṣā ca bhāradvājaḥ sa gautamaḥ viśvācī ca ghṛtācī ca te ubhe puṇya lakṣaṇe nāgaḥ tu airāvataḥ ca eva viśrutaḥ ca dhanañjayaḥ senajit ca suṣeṇaḥ ca senānīḥ grāmaṇīḥ tathā apaḥ vātaḥ ca dvau etau yātudhānau prakīrtitau aṃśau bhagaḥ ca dvau etau kaśyapaḥ ca kratuḥ tathā bhujaṃgaḥ ca mahāpadmaḥ sarpaḥ karkoṭakaḥ tathā apaḥ vātaḥ ca dvau etau yātudhānau prakīrtitau citrāṅgadaḥ ca gandharva ūruṇāyuḥ ca eva tau ubhau pūṣā jiṣṇuḥ jamadagniḥ viśvāmitraḥ tathā eva ca kādraveyau mahā nāgau kambala aśvatarau ubhau gandharvaḥ dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ ca sūryavārcāḥ ca tau ubhau senajit ca eva satyajit ca mahā tapāḥ vada brahman kathām divyām yām aham praṣṭum āgataḥ diviṣṭham bhāskaram dṛṣṭvā namet kena vidhānāt śṛṇu rudra samāsena bhāskarasya nati kriyām yām kṛtvā roga duḥkha ārtāḥ mucyante pāpa saṃcayāt sthaṇḍile maṇḍalam kṛtvā dvādaśa aṅgula mānāt pūjayitvā gaṇeśa ādīn vāsudevam ca sātyakim satyabhāmām tathā lakṣmīm umām devīm ca śaṃkaram tatas pradakṣiṇīkṛtya daṇḍa vat praṇamet sakṛt śatam sahasram ayutam lakṣam vā nija pāpāt dṛṣṭvā śaktim praṇamya atha sadā saṃyata mānasaḥ viprāya dakṣiṇām dadyāt nirucchvāsaḥ samāhitaḥ māṣakāṇām catuṣkam ca ayutam daśaguṇam diśet dakṣe daśaguṇam proktam dadyāt roga vimuktaye evam kṛte virūpākṣa sarva rogāt vimucyate idam rahasyam paramam śṛṇuyāt yaḥ hi mānavaḥ tasya rogāḥ vinaśyanti mārtaṇḍasya prasādataḥ anyat ca te pravakṣyāmi yat ca apṛṣṭam umāpate tat śṛṇuṣva mayā proktam ratha yantṛ niyāmakam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryavarṇanam nāma dvipañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tripañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam tatra aruṇaḥ mayā pūrvam sārathye sanniyojitaḥ indreṇa māṭharaḥ nāma vāyunā kalmaṣeṇa tu kālena daṇḍaḥ mahā daṇḍa āyudhaḥ bhavatā śeṣāḥ mahā gaṇādhipaḥ vaiśākhena rājñā vasubhid āyudha aṅgārikau dvau agninā piṅgalaḥ saṃyantā mahā daṇḍa āyudhaḥ bhavatā śeṣaḥ mahā gaṇādhipaḥ viṣṇuḥ aśvibhyām kāla upakālau vā akṣa pradhānakau nara nārāyaṇābhyām kṣārau dhārau dhiṣaṇa kṛṣṇau vairāja śaṅkhapāla parjanya rajasām diśāsu vidiśāsu diśām pālanam viśvedevāḥ daduḥ oṃkāraḥ vaṣaṭkāraḥ veda nisvanaḥ pinākī vināyakaḥ śeṣaḥ anantaḥ vāsukiḥ ca nāga sahasreṇa ātma tulyena ādityasya ratham anuyānti gāyatrī sāvitrī rathe sthite ubhe saṃdhye sadā sā devatā yā ravi maṇḍalam na apaiti etat vai sarva daivatyam maṇḍalam brahma vādinam brahmayajña vādinīm yajñaḥ bhagavat bhaktānām parama ādityaḥ yam viṣṇuḥ māheśvarāṇām sthāna abhimāninaḥ hi ete sadā vai vṛṣabhadhvaja sarpāḥ vahanti vai sūryam yātudhānāḥ tu yānti ca atha dakṣiṇe pārśve kañjajaḥ vāmatas sthitaḥ sarve te pṛṣṭha gāḥ jñeyāḥ grahāḥ lokeṣu pūjitāḥ uparāga śikhī ca ubhau agratas na atra saṃśayaḥ manuṣya dharmāḥ dakṣiṇatas uttareṇa pracetasaḥ sambhavanti tathā kṛṣṇaḥ ubhau etau sadā agragau vāmena vītihotraḥ tu pṛṣṭhatas tu hariḥ sadā ratha pīṭhe kṣamā jñeyā antarāle nabhaḥ tathā āśritya ratha jām kāntim kham divaḥ samayaḥ sthitaḥ dhvajaḥ daṇḍaḥ ca vijñeyaḥ dhvaja agre vṛṣaḥ eva ca mad ṛddhiḥ vṛddhiḥ tathā śrīḥ ca patākā dhvaja daṇḍa agre garuḍaḥ tad agre varuṇālayaḥ mainākaḥ chattra daṇḍaḥ tu himavant chattram ucyate chattra daṇḍaḥ tathā kleśaḥ kleśam chattram viduḥ budhāḥ eteṣām eva devānām yathā vīryam tathā tapaḥ yathāyogam tathā sattvam yathā sattvam tathā balam tathā tapati asau sūryaḥ teṣām siddhaḥ sva tejasā bhūtānām aśubham karma vyapohanti ca kīrtitāḥ prīṇāti devān amṛtena sūryaḥ somena sūktena vivardhayitvā śuklena pūrṇā divasa krameṇa tam kṛṣṇa pakṣe vibudhāḥ pibanti pītam hi somam dvi kalā avaśeṣam kṛṣṇe tu pakṣe rucibhiḥ jvalantam sudhā amṛtam tat pitaraḥ pibanti ūrjāḥ ca saumyāḥ ca tathā eva kalpāḥ sūryeṇa gobhiḥ ca samṛddhitābhiḥ adbhiḥ punar ca eva samujjitābhiḥ māsa ardha tṛptiḥ tu matābhiḥ adbhiḥ māsena tṛptiḥ svadhayā pitṝṇām dvyaśīti maṇḍala śatam īhanti abdena vai hayāḥ vīthyā agryayā vicarate nakṣatrāṇi yathā śaśī madhya gāḥ ca amarāvatyām yadā bhavati bhāskaraḥ yamane uttiṣṭhan dṛśyate tadā sukhāyām ardha rātram tu vibhāyām astam eti ca sukhāyām atha vāruṇyām uttiṣṭhan dṛśyate tadā soma puryām vibhāyām tu madhya gaḥ ca aryamā yadā māhendrasya amarāvatyām uttiṣṭhati divākaraḥ ardha rātram saṃyamane vāruṇyām astam eti ca evam caturṣu pārśveṣu meroḥ kurvan pradakṣiṇam udaya astamane ca asau uttiṣṭhati punar punar pūrvāhṇe ca aparāhṇe ca dvau dvau devālayau punar uditaḥ vardhamāna abhirāma adhyāhnāt tapet raviḥ yatra udyan dṛśyate sūryaḥ saḥ teṣām udayaḥ smṛtaḥ praṇāśam gacchate yatra sa teṣām astam ucyate yojana agreṇa saṅkhyām tu muhūrtasya nibodha me pūrṇam śata sahasra āśam sahasram tu trilocana pañcāśat ca tathā alpāni sahasrāṇi adhikāni tu nimeṣa antara mātreṇa divi sūryaḥ prasarpati bhraman vai bhramamāṇeṣu ṛkṣeṣu vicarati asau indraḥ pūjayate sūryam uttiṣṭhantam dine dine madhyāhne ca yamaḥ paścāt astam yāntam apām patiḥ viṣṇuḥ bhavān aham rudraḥ pūjayāma niśā kṣaye evam agniḥ nirṛtiḥ ca vāyuḥ īśānaḥ eva ca pūjayanti krameṇa eva bhramamāṇam divākaram hreyaḥ artham deva śārdūla sarve brahma ādayaḥ surāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamī kalpe sūryagativarṇanam nāma tripañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuṣpañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aho haṃsasya māhātmyam varṇitam bhavatā īdṛśam kathyatām punar eva idam māhātmyam bhāskarasya tu na asti ātmā sarva loka īśaḥ devadevaḥ prajāpatiḥ agnau prāsta āhutiḥ samyak ādityam upatiṣṭhati mādityāt jāyate vṛṣṭiḥ vṛṣṭyāḥ annam tatas prajāḥ bhāva abhāvau hi lokānām ādityāt niḥsṛtau purā etat tu dhyāninām dhyānam mokṣam ca api eṣa mokṣiṇām atra gacchanti nirvāṇam jāyante asmāt punar prajāḥ pakṣāḥ ca nityaśas māsāḥ saṃvatsarāḥ ca eva ṛtavaḥ atha yugāni ca tad sat ādityāt ṛte hi eṣā kāla saṅkhyā na vidyate ṛtūnām avibhāgāt ca puṣpa mūla phalam kutas kutas sasya viniṣpattiḥ tṛṇa oṣadhi gaṇāḥ kutas abhāvaḥ vyavahārāṇām jantūnām divi ca iha ca na avṛṣṭyā tapate sūryaḥ na avṛṣṭyā pariviśyate na avṛṣṭyāḥ vikṛtim dhatte vāriṇā dīpyate raviḥ vasante kapilaḥ sūryaḥ grīṣme kāñcana saprabhaḥ śvetaḥ varṇena varṣāsu pāṇḍuḥ śaradi bhāskaraḥ iti varṇāḥ samākhyātāḥ śṛṇu varṇa phalam haraiḥ kṛṣṇa ubhayāya jagataḥ tāmraḥ senāpatim vināśayati iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamī kalpe sūryamahimavarṇanam nāma catuṣpañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya ratha yātrā varṇanam ratha yātrā katham kāryā bhāskarasya iha mānavaiḥ phalam ca kim bhavet teṣām yātrām kurvanti ye raveḥ katham ca bhrāmayet devam ratha ārūḍham divākaram teṣām ca kim phalam proktam ye ca nṛtya karāḥ narāḥ bhramanti ye na ca devena nṛtya gīta parāyaṇāḥ prajāgaram ca kurvanti bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitāḥ teṣām ca kim phalam proktam ratham yacchanti ye raveḥ lokānām śreyase deva param kautūhalam hi mama sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi bhūteśa gaṇeśaḥ asi trilocana śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ vacmi yathāpraśnam sa vistaram martya loke śānti hetoḥ lokānām loka pūjita tasmāt kāryau imau bhaktyā durbhikṣasya iha śāntaye haraiḥ tu ghṛtena abhyaṅgayet devam pañca pūta aṅga jena vai abhyaṅgayet maheśam yaḥ sarṣapaiḥ śraddhayā anvitaḥ dine dine jagannātham praviṣṭam varṇake ravim sa gacchet yānam ārūḍhaḥ gairikam kiṅkiṇī kṛtam madhu odanam khaṇḍa miśram vajram vajra samanvitam ārūḍhaḥ sa vimānam tu jvālā mālā ākulam śubham varṇa bhaktam pradātavyam praviṣṭasya iha varṇakam ghṛta pūrṇam khaṇḍaveṣṭam kāsāram modakam payaḥ dadhi odanam pāyasam ca saṃyāvam guḍa pūpakān abhyaṅgāya ghṛtam deyam sa yāti paramām gatim sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra devaḥ divākaraḥ tatas tam snāpayet devam pauṣe māsi vidhānāt saptamyām śukla pakṣasya śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ tathā tīrtha udakam upānīya anyat vā atha jalam śubham prayāgam puṣkaram devam kurukṣetram ca naimiṣam pṛthūdakam candrabhāgām śauram gokarṇam eva ca brahmāvartam kuśāvartam bilvakam nīlaparvatam gaṅgādvāram tathā puṇyam gaṅgāsāgaram eva ca kālapriyam mitravanam śuṇḍīrasvāminam tathā cakratīrtham tathā puṇyam rāmatīrtham tathā śivam vitastā harṣa pathī vai tathā vai devikā smṛtā gaṅgā sarasvatī sindhuḥ candrabhāgā sa narmadā ca śatarudrā puṣkariṇī kauśikī sarayūḥ tathā tathā āśramāḥ puṇyatamāḥ divyāni āyatanāni ca evam snāna vidhim kṛtvā arcayitvā praṇamya ca tri rātram sapta rātram vā māsam māsa ardham eva ca catvare lepayet vedim catur asrām śubhe kṛtām tu māghasya saptamyām tripurāntakaiḥ kṛtvā agnikāryam vidhivat kṛtvā brāhmaṇa bhojanam śaṅkha bherī ninādaiḥ tu brahmaghoṣaiḥ ca puṣkalaiḥ puṇya aha ghoṣa vividhaiḥ brāhmaṇān svasti vācya ca rathena darśanīyena kiṅkiṇī jāla mālinā prīṇayitvā janam sarvam dakṣiṇā bhojana ādinā prapūjya brāhmaṇān divyān bhaumān ca api su vācakān itihāsa purāṇābhyām vācakaḥ brāhmaṇa uttamaḥ tatas devaḥ ca iṣṭaḥ ca sampūjyaḥ yatnatas tadā a yācitam caturthyām tu ṣaṣṭhyām naktam prakīrtitam saptamyām upavāsam tu āśramāt ropayet ratham agni kāryam tu vai kṛtvā rathasya puratas śiva ṣaṣṭhyām ca rātrau bhūteśa rathasya iha adhivāsanam brāhmaṇān bhojayitvā tu divyān bhaumān ca vācakān sitāyām māgha māse tu tasya devālaya agratas nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ dīpavṛkṣa upaśobhitaiḥ śaṅkha tūrya ninādaiḥ ca brahmaghoṣaiḥ ca puṣkalaiḥ nagarasya uttaram dvāram śaṅkha bherī nināditam tatas pūrvam dakṣiṇam ca dvāram ca api tathā param evam hi kriyamāṇāyām yātrāyām vatsara avadhau mānavāḥ sukham edhante rājā jayati ca ahitān nīrujaḥ ca janāḥ sarve gavām śāntiḥ bhavet tathā yātrāyāḥ bhavanti hi voḍhāraḥ ca tathā vatsa sūrya lokam yajanti vai katham sañcālyate brahman sthāpitā pratibhā sakṛt pūrvam eva sahasrāṃśoḥ yāna hetoḥ mahātmanaḥ sarveṣām tu rathānām vai sa rathaḥ prathamaḥ smṛtaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā tu tatas tu anye syandanāḥ viśvakarmaṇā te kalpitāḥ sarva devānām soma ādīnām anekaśas manunā ikṣvākave dattam martyaiḥ sampūjyatām raviḥ tasmāt na cālane doṣaḥ savituḥ calaḥ eva saḥ adṛṣṭam calate yasmāt tasmāt vai pārvatīpriya tat evam ratha yātrāsu dṛṣṭam bhānoḥ manīṣibhiḥ anyeṣām cālanam na iṣṭam devānām pārvatīpriya brahma viṣṇu śiva ādīnām sthāpitānām vidhānāt tasmāt rathena devasya yātrā kāryā vidhānāt prajānām iha śānti artham pratisaṃvatsaram sadā kāñcanaḥ vā atha raupyaḥ vā vā dṛḍha akṣa yuga cakraḥ ca rathaḥ kāryaḥ su yantritaḥ māropya pratimām yatnāt yojayet vājinaḥ śubhān kuṅkumena samālabdhān cāmara sraj vibhūṣitān tu dhūpa mālya anulepanaiḥ dīna andha kṛpaṇa ādīn ca sarvān saṃtarpya śaktitas sūryakratau tu vitate evam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ yaḥ cintayati bhagna āśaḥ kṣudhā vāta prapīḍitaḥ yajñaḥ ca dakṣiṇā hīnaḥ savituḥ na praśasyate tasmāt nānāvidhaiḥ kāmaiḥ bhakṣya lehya samanvitaiḥ balim gṛhṇantu me devāḥ ādityāḥ vasavaḥ tathā marutā utha aśvinaḥ rudrāḥ suparṇāḥ pannagāḥ grahāḥ asurāḥ yātudhānāḥ ca ratha sthāḥ yāḥ tu devatāḥ digpālāḥ lokapālāḥ ca ye ca vighna vināyakāḥ mā vighnam mā ca me pāpam mā ca me paripanthinaḥ saumyāḥ bhavantu tṛptāḥ ca devāḥ bhūta gaṇāḥ tathā ākṛṣṇena rajasā ṛcam ekām udāharet tatas puṇyāha śabdena kṛta vāditra niḥsvanaiḥ puruṣaiḥ ca api voḍhavyaḥ sūrya bhakti samanvitaiḥ triṃśadbhiḥ ṣoḍaśaiḥ vā api pratimām bhāskarasya tu rājñī ca nikṣubhā rudra bhārye tasya mahātmanaḥ nikṣubhām dakṣiṇe pārśve rājñīm ca api uttare tathā dvau eva brāhmaṇau tasmin divyaḥ bhaumaḥ ca pārśvayoḥ pṛṣṭhatas ca asya valgamānam prakalpayet mātapatram tathā śvetam svarṇa daṇḍam anaupamam bhūteśa nānā varṇābhiḥ saptabhiḥ kāmanāśanaḥ sārathyam rudra kuryāt vai śreyaḥ artham ātmanaḥ sadā kṣatriyaiḥ ca api vaiśyaiḥ ca na tu śūdraiḥ kadācana nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ purāṇa śravaṇena ca nānāvidhaiḥ brahma ghoṣaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ sthitvā tu tatra aṣṭamī antam navamyām calate punar sthite atra taiḥ pūjyamānaḥ yathā rājñā tathā nṛpaiḥ tatrastham pūjayanti sma brāhmaṇāḥ śraddhayā anvitāḥ śaṅkha vāditra nirghoṣaiḥ tathā prekṣaṇakaiḥ varaiḥ brahma ghoṣaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ samantāt dīpakaiḥ śubhaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ vitta dānaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ dīna andha kṛpaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ tripurāntakaiḥ tatra sthitaḥ pūjanīyaḥ bhavet paureṇa kṛtsnaśas pūjyamānaḥ tu ahorātram ratha ārūḍhaḥ tu tiṣṭhati trayodaśyām vyatītāyām caturdaśyām trilocana iti śro bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamī kalpe rathayātrāvarṇanam nāma pañcapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṭapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya ratha yātrā varṇanam uvāca anugāḥ ca katham ca asya ke ca te kramāt bhūyas bhūyas suraśreṣṭha vistarāt mama śreyase pratīhāra ratham pūrvam nayet mārga viśuddhaye tasmāt anantaram rudraiḥ daṇḍanāyakam ādarāt piṅgalam ca tatas tasya pṛṣṭha gam ca ādarāt nayet rakṣakaḥ dvārakaḥ yasmāt ratha ārūḍhau tu pṛṣṭhatas ratha ārūḍhaḥ tathā diṇḍī devasya puratas sthitaḥ yuga akṣa cakra bhaṅgaḥ vā yathā na syāt trilocana mīṣā bhaṅge dvija bhayam bhagne akṣe kṣatriya kṣayaḥ tulā bhaṅge tu vaiśyānām śayyā śūdra kṣayaḥ bhavet yuga bhaṅge tu anāvṛṣṭiḥ pīṭha bhaṅge prajā bhayam vyaṅgita pratimāyām tu rājñaḥ maraṇam ādiśet utpanneṣu evamādyeṣu utpāteṣu aśubheṣu ca brāhmaṇān vācayet bhūyas dadyāt dānāni ca eva hi prathamam ca agnaye svāhā svāhā somāya ca eva hi svāhā prajāpataye ca deyāḥ āhutayaḥ kramāt śam prajābhyaḥ tathā eva astu śam sat ātmani ca astu vai bhūḥ śāntiḥ astu deveśaiḥ bhuvaḥ śāntiḥ tathā eva ca svaḥ ca eva astu tathā śāntiḥ sarvatra astu tathā raveḥ tvam deva jagantaḥ sraṣṭā poṣṭā ca eva tvam eva hi prajāpāla graha īśāna śāntim kuru divaspate idam anyat ca vakṣyāmi śāntyā parama kāraṇam yātrā kāraṇa bhūtasya puruṣasya sva janmanaḥ duḥsthān grahān ca vijñāya graha śāntim samācaret prādeśa mātrāḥ karttavyāḥ samidhaḥ atha pramāṇataḥ arka mayyaḥ raveḥ kāryā pālāśāḥ śaśinaḥ smṛtāḥ khādiryaḥ ca eva bhaumāya āpāmārgyaḥ abjasūnave āśvatthyaḥ ca atha jīvāya audumbaryaḥ sitāya ca asitāya śamī mayyaḥ dūrvā kāryaḥ tu rāhave tu kuśāḥ kāryāḥ dakṣiṇāḥ ca api atas śṛṇu sūryāya śobhanām dhenum śaṅkham dadyāt atha indave raktam anaḍvāham bhaumāya kāñcanam soma sūnave jīvāya vāsasī deye śukrāya aśvam sitam hara manaiścarāya gām nīlām rāhave bhāṇḍapāyasam chāgam tu ketave dadyāt śṛṇu eṣām bhojanāni api guḍa odanam tu sūryāya somāya ghṛta pāyasam haviṣyam annam bhaumāya kṣīra annam soma sūnave dadhyodanam tu jīvāya śukrāya atha ghṛta aśanam tila piṣṭān ca māṣāḥ ca sūryaputrāya dāpayet sauvīram āranālam ca svinna bījam ca kāñjikam yathā bāṇa prahārāṇām vāraṇam kavacam smṛtam tathā daiva upaghātānām śāntiḥ bhavati vāraṇam nityam ca niyama sthasya sadā sa anugrahāḥ grahāḥ grahāḥ pūjyāḥ sadā rudraḥ icchatā vipulam yaśaḥ śrī kāmaḥ śānti kāmaḥ vā graha yajñam samācaret yā anapatyā bhavet nārī duṣprajāḥ ca api yā bhavet bālāḥ yasyāḥ pramriyante yā ca kanyā prajā bhavet graha yajñaḥ smṛtaḥ teṣām mānavānām manīṣibhiḥ tasmāt asau sadā kāryaḥ śreyaḥ artham jānatā hara dattapuṣpaḥ ca puṣpajaḥ dhiṣaṇaḥ tathā sita asitau tathā rudraḥ uparāgaḥ śikhī tathā ete grahāḥ mahā bāho vidvobhiḥ pūjitāḥ sadā tāmrakāt sphāṭikāt raktacandanāt svarṇakāt api rājatāt āyasāt sīsāt grahāḥ kāryāḥ prayatnāt svarṇe vā atha paṭe lekhyāḥ yathāśāstram maheśvara yathāvarṇam pradeyāni vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca gandhāḥ ca balayaḥ ca eva dhūpaḥ deyaḥ ca guggulaḥ mama imam devāḥ agniḥ mūrdhā divaḥ kakud udbudhyasva yathāsaṃkhyam ṛcaḥ etāḥ prakīrtitāḥ śam naḥ devī tathā kāṇḍāt ketum kṛṇvan imāḥ kramāt pūrva uktāḥ samidhaḥ tu atra yathāśāstram prahomayet ekaikasya aṣṭaśatakam aṣṭāviṃśatiḥ eva vā śaktitas vā yathālābham dakṣiṇā tu vidhānataḥ mayā eṣā hi varaḥ dattaḥ pūjitāḥ pūjayiṣyatha graha adhīnāḥ narendrāṇām ucchrayāḥ patanāni ca bhāva abhāvau ca jagantaḥ tasmāt pūjyatamāḥ grahāḥ grahāḥ gāvaḥ narendrāḥ ca guravaḥ brāhmaṇāḥ tathā pūjitaḥ pūjayanti ete nirdahanti apamānitāḥ tathā samutthitām pīḍām grahaśāntyā praśāmayet yajvanām satya vākyānām tathā nitya upavāsinām japa homa pareṣām ca sarvam duṣṭam praśāmyati evam kṛtvā prajā śāntim kṛtvā ca svastivācanam punar sajjam ratham kṛtvā kuryāt prakamaṇam haraiḥ mārgam śeṣam nayitvā tu nayet devālayam ravim pūjayitvā tatas pūrvāḥ yāḥ proktāḥ ratha devatāḥ yathā pūjyāḥ grahāḥ sarve utpāteṣu trilocana ratha devāḥ tathā pūjyāḥ yāḥ sthitāḥ ratham āśritāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe mahimavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭpañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha saptapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ratha yātrā varṇanam kṣīram yavāgūḥ brahmaṇe syāt paramānnam trilocanaiḥ phalāni kārttikeyasya dadyāt bhūteśa prītaye puruhūtāya bhakṣyāṇi sa anugāya nivedayet haviḥ annam agnaye syāt agra annam viṣṇave tathā rākṣasebhyaḥ sa maireyam dadyāt māṃsa odanam haraiḥ saṃskṛtam piśita annam ca revatāya nivedayet tila annam pitṛrājāya dadyāt tripurasūdanaiḥ odanam pitṛbhyaḥ pāyasam dadyāt ghṛta aktam madhunā saha kātyāyanyai yavāgūm ca śriye dadyāt tathā dadhi māḍava annam dhanapatau evam mitre trilocana māṃsa anna bhakta sūpān ca mātṛbhyaḥ vai nivedayet ullepikāḥ ca bhūtebhyaḥ jalam sūryāya vai hara dadyāt gaṇādhipataye modakān tripurāntakaiḥ śaṣkulyaḥ tu nairṛtāya deyāḥ syuḥ gaṇanāyaka sarva bhakṣyāṇi viśvebhyaḥ dātavyāni samantataḥ kṣīraudanam ṛṣibhyaḥ tu kṣīram nāgebhyaḥ eva hi udvartanam surā māṃsam tad vāhebhyaḥ ca bhārataiḥ mājyam ca brahmaṇe dadyāt tryambakāya tilān tathā svāhātanaye vai lājāḥ dātavyāḥ tripurāntakaiḥ bhāskarāya sadā dadyāt kovidāram trilocanaiḥ rājavṛkṣam tathā indrāya haviṣyam pāvakāya ca deyam syāt karṇikāram tu aśvibhyām vṛṣabhadhvajaiḥ śriye padmāni deyāni caṇḍikāya su candanam puṣpāṇi apsarasām rudra mālatyāḥ parikīrtitam varuṇāya agnimantham tu phalam mūlam nirṛtaye bilvam dadyāt kuberāya kapittham marutām tathā dadyāt pitṛbhyaḥ piṇḍa mūlāni bhūtebhyaḥ ca vibhītakam gobhyaḥ yavān pradadyāt vai mātṛbhyaḥ ca akṣatān haraiḥ mahmavṛkṣam tu nāgebhyaḥ viṣam uttamam sāyam prātar tu madhyāhne sadā ekāgra manāḥ hara sarveṣām śaktitas bhaktyā dahet dhūpam vicakṣaṇaḥ śānti artham brāhmaṇebhyaḥ tu tilān dadyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ vaiśvānare vā juhuyāt ghṛtena sahitān hara devānām amṛtam hi ete pitṝṇām hi svadhā amṛtam śaraṇam brāhmaṇānām ca sadā hi etān viduḥ budhāḥ masyapasya aṅga jāḥ hi ete pavitrāḥ ca tathā hara snāne dāne tathā home tarpaṇe ihi aśane parāḥ ittham devān grahān ca eva pūjayitvā prayatnāt avatārya rathāt ca enam maṇḍale sthāpayet punar yatnāt dīpa toya yava akṣataiḥ kārpāsa bīja lavaṇa tuṣaiḥ durdṛṣṭi śāntaye ha vedim āropayet paścāt patnībhyām saha suvrata haraiḥ daśāhikā iti vikhyātā yā pūjā bhū tale haraiḥ abhyaṅga bhojana ādyaiḥ tu pūjā satkāra maṇḍalaiḥ anena vidhinā pūjya daśa ahāni divākaram iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamīkalpa mahimavarṇanam nāma saptapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ratha yātrā varṇanam yātrām bhagavantaḥ bhaktyā bhāskarasya amita ojasaḥ sa para ardham tu varṣāṇām sūrya loke mahīyate tīrtha udakam tu yaḥ bhaktyā gaṅgāyāḥ ca tathā udakam bhaktyā varṇa trayam dadyāt bhāskarasya trilocanaiḥ samāpya iha akhilān kāmān prāpnuyāt varuṇālayam rakta varṇam tu yaḥ dadyāt haviṣya annam guḍa odanam snāpayet yaḥ tu vā bhaktyā bhāskaram pūjayet tathā sa gacchet dīptimān rudraiḥ sūrya lokam na saṃśayaḥ sa yāti vāta sālokyam vāta tulya parākramaḥ sa lokam prāpnuyāt puṇyam mārutam na atra saṃśayaḥ sa lokam prāpnuyāt puṇyam yaḥ kuryāt mārgam ādarāt puṣpa prakara śobhā āḍhyam śubha toraṇa maṇḍitam śaṅkha tūrya nināda āḍhyam tathā prekṣaṇaka anvitam sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra devaḥ vibhāvasuḥ sa sukhī puṇyavān nityam modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ bhakta dāsa ādikam sarvam yaḥ dadāti raveḥ naraḥ samprāpya iha akhilān kāmān sūrya lokam avāpnuyāt durlabham deva śārdūlaiḥ viśeṣāt puratas vrajan uttara abhimukham yāntam tathā vai dakṣiṇā mukham tatas vai dvādaśe varṣe kartavyam na antarā punar yātrāyāḥ ca api ye bhaṅgam kurvanti vṛṣabhadhvajaiḥ mandehāḥ nāma te jñeyāḥ rākṣasāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ indra ādi devāḥ te jñeyāḥ gatāḥ ca paramam padam punar yātrā vidhim ca imam samāsāt kathayāmi te yam śrutvā sarva pāpebhyaḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ dyauḥ mahī ca dvi mūrti sthe yathāpūrvam pratiṣṭhite tathā eva rājñī dyauḥ jñeyā nikṣubhā pṛthivī smṛtā etābhyām api devībhyām yathā eva savituḥ tathā diṇḍinaḥ piṅgala ādīnām pṛthuḥ kāryaḥ ratha kramaḥ manasā cintayet anyām yathā sthāneṣu devatām dikpālān lokapālān ca kalpayet manasā eva tu maṇḍala mṛj mayam ca eva chandāṃsi āsyam prakīrtitam gāyatrī ca eva triṣṭubh ca jagatī anuṣṭubh eva ca paṃktiḥ ca bṛhatī ca eva uṣṇih eva ca saptamā yathā ukta karaṇāt rudraiḥ sadā śāntiḥ bhavet nṛṇām nāyakaḥ ca api sarveṣām devānām tu divākaraḥ digdeva anucarān ca eva pūjayet pūjyate śriyā tad tad bhūta kṛtam pādyam na pragṛhṇanti devatāḥ yātrā kāle tu samprāpte savituḥ dīkṣitām tanum ye drakṣyanti narāḥ bhaktyā te bhaviṣyanti akalmaṣāḥ paurṇamāsyām amāyām ca darśanam puṇya dam smṛtam saptamyām ca tathā ṣaṣṭhyām dine tasya raveḥ tathā āṣāḍhī kārttikī māghī tithayaḥ puṇyatamāḥ smṛtāḥ mahābhāgyam tithe puṇyam yathā śāstreṣu gīyate kārttikyām tu viśeṣeṇa mahākārttikī udāhṛtā evam kāla samāyogāt yātrā kālaḥ viśiṣyate darśanam ca mahā puṇyam sarva pāpa haram bhavet devaḥ ayam yajñapuruṣaḥ loka anugraha kāṃkṣayā pratimā avasthitaḥ bhūtvā pūjām gṛhṇāti anugrahāt snānāt dānāt japāt homāt saṃyogāt deva karmaṇaḥ yajñānām vapanāt ca eva dīkṣitaḥ puruṣaḥ bhavet kacānām vāpanam kāryam sūryabhaktaiḥ sadā naraiḥ sūryakratau śuciḥ tu evam dīkṣitaḥ puruṣaḥ bhavet caturṇām api varṇānām bhaktyā sūryasya nityadā evam ye atra kariṣyanti te narāḥ nitya dīkṣitāḥ cīrṇa vratāḥ mahātmānaḥ te yāsyanti parām gatim iti eṣā kathitā rudraiḥ ratha yātrā divaspateḥ yām śrutvā vācayitvā sarva rogaiḥ vimucyate yāti sūryasadaḥ naraḥ rathāhvā kathitā rudraiḥ samāsāt saptamā śubhā bhūyas api śrūyatām rudra saptamī gadataḥ mama iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe rathayātrā varṇanam nāma aṣṭapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāya atha ekonaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣaṣṭhyām upoṣitaḥ bhūtvā gandha puṣpa upahārāt brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt vitta śāṭhyam vivarjayet khaṇḍaveṣṭaiḥ modakaiḥ ca tathā ikṣu guḍa pūpakaiḥ atha saṃvatsare pūrṇe saptamyām kārayet budhaḥ tu yaḥ kṛtvā ratham ārohitam ravim paśyet bhaktyā jagannātham sa yāti paramām gatim tṛtīyāyām aika bhaktam caturthyām naktam ucyate pañcamyām a yācitam syāt ṣaṣṭhyām ca evam upoṣaṇam saptamyām pāraṇam kuryāt dṛṣṭvā devam rathe sthitam pūjayitvā ca vidhinā śaktyā bhaktyā trilocana sauvarṇam tu ratham kṛtvā tāmra pātra upari sthitam indranīlam atho yāmyām vāruṇyām marakatam haraiḥ śvetam pīta asitam ca api raktam ca andhaka sūdanaiḥ etāni tāta vastrāṇi dikṣu sarvāsu vinyaset patākā ākāra saṃsthānam ghaṇṭā ābharaṇa bhūṣitam yathānyāyam pūjayitvā bhāskarāya nivedayet bhojayitvā atha vā viprān ācāryāya nivedayet yaḥ adhīte saptamī kalpam sa upākhyānam ca bhārata mācāryaḥ sa dvijaḥ jñeyaḥ varṇānām anupūrvaśas saurāṇām vaiṣṇavānām tu śaivānām pārvatīpriya alābhe tu suvarṇasya ratham rājatam ādiśet abhāve ca api tāmrasya rathaḥ piṣṭa mayaḥ smṛtaḥ sa hiraṇyaḥ mahādeva tāmra bhājanam āśritaḥ pūrva uktāya mahādeva vācakāya mahātmane sva śaktyā tu virūpākṣa vitta śāṭhyam vivarjayet eṣā puṇyā pāpa harā rathāhvā saptamā haraiḥ kathitā te mayā rudra mahatī iyam prakīrtitā snānam dānam atho homaḥ pūjā grahapateḥ haraiḥ śata sāhasram bhavet asyām kṛtam bhūdhara vidyate evam eṣā puṇyatamā māghe proktā tu saptamī brāhmaṇaḥ yāti deva tvam kṣatriyaḥ vipra tām vrajet vaiśyaḥ kṣatriya tām yāti śūdraḥ vaiśya tvam eti ca aputrā strī sutam vindet saumāgyam ca gaṇādhipaiḥ ca api upoṣya imām evaṃvidhā saptamī te kathitā vṛṣabhadhvaja yām śrutvā mānavaḥ bhaktyā mucyate brahma hatyayā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe rathasaptamīmāhātmyavarṇanam nāma ekonaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ratha yātrā varṇanam iti uktvā saḥ jagāma āśu surajyeṣṭham trilocanam ratha yātrā mahā bāho sūryasya iti amita ojasaḥ uvāca yam ārādhya jagannātham mama pūrva pitāmahāḥ tuṣṭi artham brāhmaṇānām tu annam āpuḥ caturvidham tasya devasya māhātmyam śrutam ca bahuśas mayā karābhyām yasya deveśau ka viṣṇū loka pūjitau utpannau dvijaśārdūlaiḥ lalāṭāt tripurāntakaḥ tasya devasya kaiḥ śakyāḥ vaktum sarvāḥ vibhūtayaḥ śrotum ārādhanam yena nistareyam bhava arṇavam dānaiḥ vṛta upavāsaiḥ vā homaiḥ jāpyaiḥ atha api vā bhavet sā ekā vidyā hi vidyānām yayā tuṣyati sarva kṛt śrutānām api tat puṇyam yatra bhānoḥ prakīrtanam rahasyānām rahasyam tat yena haṃsaḥ prasīdati ekaḥ śreṣṭhatamaḥ mantraḥ tat ekam paramam vratam upoṣitam ca tat śreṣṭham yena bhānuḥ prasīdati sā ca ekā rasanā dhanyā mārtaṇḍam stauti yā sadā ślāghyānām api tau ślāghyau iha loke paratra ca sadā dvija śārdūla bhānoḥ pūjā karau karau tat ekam kevalam dhanyam śarīram sarva jantuṣu sā jihvā kaṇṭha tālūkam atha vā pratijihvikā prākāraiḥ tu āvṛte viṣvak vṛthak tāni viduḥ budhāḥ śreyasām na hi samprāptau puruṣāṇām viceṣṭitam janmani aviphalā sevā kṛtā yā āśritya bhāskaram durga saṃsāra kāntāram apāram abhidhāvatām ekaḥ bhānu namaskāraḥ saṃsāra arṇava tārakaḥ ratnānām ākaraḥ meruḥ sarva āścarya mayam nabhaḥ tīrthānām āśrayaḥ gaṅgā devānām āśrayaḥ raviḥ śrutaḥ mama bahuśas siddhaiḥ gīyamānaiḥ tathā amaraiḥ ārādhayitum īśa īśam bhāskaram ca amita ojasam mārtaṇḍam bhuvana ādhāram smṛta mātra agha dāriṇam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryaparicaryāvarṇanam nāma ṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya mahimā varṇanam pravakṣyāmi yathāpūrvam viriñcena mahātmanā ṛṣīṇām kathitam pūrvam tam nibodha narādhipa hi te savituḥ mahātmā padmasaṃbhavaḥ yogam brahma param prāha mahā ṛṣīṇām yathā prabhuḥ viṣayāḥ durjayāḥ prabho cetasaḥ ca api cañcalasya api durdharā rāga ādayaḥ katham jetum śakyāḥ varṣa śataiḥ api alpa āyuṣaḥ ca puruṣāḥ brahman kṛta yuge ipi amī duḥkha ambu magnāḥ puruṣāḥ prāpya brahman mahā plavam evam uktaḥ tadā brahma akriyā yogam mahātmanām teṣām ṛṣīṇām ācaṣṭa narāṇām hita kāmyayā mārādhayata viśveśam divākaram atandritāḥ bāhya ālambana sāpekṣāḥ tam ajam jagantaḥ patim brata upavāsaiḥ vividhaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇam taiḥ taiḥ ca abhimataiḥ kāmaiḥ ye ca cetasi tuṣṭi dāḥ tad niṣṭhāḥ tad gata dhiyaḥ tad karmāṇaḥ tad āśrayāḥ saṃnyasadhvam sa vaḥ karttā samasta āvaraṇa kṣayam paraḥ pareṣām paramaḥ sa ekaḥ sumanasām paraḥ iti te brahmanaḥ śrutvā rahasyam ṛṣi sattamāḥ narāṇām upakārāya yoga śāstrāṇi cakrire kriyā yoga parāṇi iha mukti kārīṇi anekaśas mad bhagavant tad anuṣṭhāna tatparaiḥ paramātmā sa mārtaṇḍaḥ sarva īśaḥ sarva bhāvanaḥ tāni te kuru śārdūla sarva pāpa harāṇi aham saṃsāra arṇava magnānām viṣaya ākrānta cetasām haṃsa potam vinā na anyat kiṃcid asti parāyaṇam uttiṣṭhan ciṃtaya ravim vrajan ciṃtaya gopatim bhuñjan ciṃtaya mārtaṃḍam svapān ciṃtaya bhāskaram janma mṛtyu mahā grāham saṃsāra ambhaḥ tariṣyasi graheśam īśam vara dam purāṇam jagat vidhātāram ajam ca nityam samāśritāḥ ye ravim īśitāram teṣām bhavaḥ na asti vimukti bhājām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryayogamahimavarṇanam nāma ekaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dviṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya diṇḍī saṃvādam sūryasya diṇḍinā sārdham sarva pāpa praṇāśanam brahmahatyā abhibhūtaḥ tu parā diṇḍiḥ mahā tapāḥ mahātmanaḥ śrutvā tasya arthāt stotram tutoṣa bhagavān raviḥ uvāca devadevaḥ tam diṇḍinam gaṇanāyakam uvāca vara vṛṇīṣva dharma jña yat te manasi vartate uvāca eṣaḥ eva varaḥ ślāghyaḥ yat prāptaḥ asi mama antikam yathā eṣā brahmahatyā me āgatā loka garhitā bhavān jānāti sarva īśaḥ hadisthaḥ sarva dehinām tvad prasādāt mama īśāna nāśam āśu prayātu vai jñātam mayā hi mārtaṇḍe na aprasanne vibhūtayaḥ sukhāni tāni ca eva ante teṣām duḥkham na tat sukham yadā tu duḥkham āgāmi kim vā kasya eva bhakṣaṇāt jñāna dānena yena evam uttareyam bhava arṇavam iti uktaḥ tena mārtaṇḍaḥ kathayāmāsa yoga vid śrutvā yogam tu tam diṇḍiḥ nirbījam niṣkalam babhau viṣayāḥ durjayāḥ puṃbhiḥ indriya ākarṣiṇaḥ sadā indriyāṇām jayaḥ yuktaḥ kaḥ śaktānām kariṣyati mama mama iti vikhyātiḥ durjayam cañcalam manaḥ rāga ādayaḥ tathā tyaktum śakyāḥ janmāntaraiḥ yadi rāga ādibhiḥ amartya tvam prāpuḥ prakṣīṇa kalmaṣāḥ uvāca yadi evam mukti kāmaḥ tvam gaṇanātha śṛṇuṣva tam priyā yogam samastānām kleśānām hāni kārakam mām eva eṣyasi yuktvā evam ātmānam mad parāyaṇaḥ mad bhāvanāḥ mad yajanāḥ mad bhaktāḥ mad parāyaṇāḥ mama pūjā karāḥ ca eva mayi yānti layam narāḥ sarva bhūteṣu mām paśyat mama avasthitam īśvaram jaṅgama ajaṅgame jñāte mayi āsakte samantataḥ rāga lobha ādi nāśena bhavitrī kṛtakṛtya tā mayi āveśam dadhat bhūyas kuru mad rūpiṇīm tanum tasya āśritam samāviśya sarva bhāvena sarvadā pūjitā sā eva te bhaktyā dhyātā ca eva upakāriṇī gacchan tiṣṭhan svapan bhuñjaḥ tām eva agre ca pṛṣṭhatas vāsobhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ bhakṣyaiḥ gīta vādyaiḥ manoramaiḥ bhakti namraḥ gaṇaśreṣṭha prīṇayasva kṛtim mama rāgeṇa ākṛṣyate tāta gandharva abhimukham yadi mayi buddhim samāveśya gāyethāḥ yāḥ kathāḥ mama śrotavyāḥ prīti yogena mad sva rūpa udayāḥ kathāḥ evam samarpita manāḥ cetasaḥ ye atha āśrayāḥ akṣīṇa rāga dveṣaḥ api mad priyaḥ paramaḥ param padam āpnoṣi mā bhaiṣīḥ mayi arpita manāḥ bhava uvāca mad hitāya jagannāthaiḥ kriyā yoga amṛtam mama uvāca mākhyāsyate tat akhilam nirvikalpam gaṇādhipa sa ca diṇḍiḥ mahā tejāḥ jagāma āśu nabhogatim iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi diṇḍi ādityasaṃvādavarṇanam nāma dviṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāya atha triṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam praṇamya śirasā devam surajyeṣṭham caturmukham uvāca saḥ mahā tejāḥ diṇḍiḥ lokeśam ādarāt kriyā yoga amṛtam sarvam ākhyāsyati bhavān kila sa tvām pṛcchāmi aham brahman kriyā yogam nirantaram mad sakāśam ca mad samīpe gaṇādhipa brahmahatyā praṇaṣṭā te darśanāt eva tasya tu anugrāhyaḥ asi bhūteśa bhāskarasya amita ojasaḥ manaḥ bhagavantam anādi antam bhava dīkṣā guṇa anvitaḥ na hi a dīkṣā anvitaiḥ bhānuḥ jñātu stotum ca tattvāt draṣṭum vā śakyate mūḍhaiḥ praveṣṭum kutas eva hi bhavanti bhagavant saurāḥ tadā dīkṣā guṇa anvitāḥ na akṣīṇe jāyate puṃsām mārtaṇḍa abhimukhā matiḥ pradveṣam yāti mārtaṇḍe dvijān vedān ca nindati yaḥ naraḥ tam vijānīyāt pāpa bīja samudbhavam pākhaṇḍeṣu ratiḥ puṃsām hetuvāda anukūla tā jāyate viṣṇu māyā ambhaḥ patitānām durātmanām yadā pāpa kṣayaḥ puṃsām tadā veda dvija ādiṣu ravau ca devadeveśe śraddhām bhavati niścalā yadā su alpa avaśeṣaḥ tu narāṇām pāpa sañcayaḥ tadā dīkṣā guṇān sarve bhajante na atra saṃśayaḥ bhramatām atra saṃsāre narāṇām pāpa durgame bhāskaraḥ uvāca mad lakṣaṇāḥ narāḥ dīkṣām arhanti padmasaṃbhavaiḥ karmaṇā manasā vācā prāṇinām yaḥ na hiṃsakaḥ bhāva bhaktaḥ ca mārtaṇḍe tasya dīkṣā guṇa anvitā brāhmaṇān ca eva devān ca nityam eva namasyati na ca drogdhā param vāde sa mārtaṇḍam samarcati sarvān devān ravim vetti sarva lokān ca bhāskaram tebhyaḥ ca na anyam ātmānam sa naraḥ saura tām vrajet devam manuṣyam anyam vā paśu pakṣi pipīlikān taru pāṣāṇa kāṣṭhāni bhūmi ambhaḥ gaganam diśaḥ mānam ca api deveśāt vyatiriktam divākarāt yaḥ na jānāti yatiṣu sa vai dīkṣā guṇān bhajet karmaṇā manasā vācā sa tu dīkṣām samarhati tām gatim na narāḥ yānti yām gatāḥ sūryam āśritāḥ yena sarva ātmanā bhānau bhaktyā bhāvaḥ niveśitaḥ gaṇeśvara kṛtārtha tvāt ślāghyaḥ sauraḥ sa mānavaḥ kārayati deva arcām hṛdaya ālambanam raveḥ sa sapta puruṣān lokam bhānoḥ nayati mānavaḥ yāvanti ā abdāni deva arcā raveḥ tiṣṭhati mandire tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate deva arcā lakṣaṇa upetā tad gṛhe saṃtataḥ vidhiḥ niṣkāmam ca manaḥ yasya sa yāti akṣara sāmyatām puṣpāṇi ca sugandhīni manojñāni ca yaḥ pumān prayacchati sahasrāṃśoḥ sadā prayata mānasaḥ dhūpān ca tān tān vividhān gandha āḍhyam ca anulepanam naraḥ yajñam karoti ārādhanam raveḥ yajñeśaḥ bhagavān pūṣā sadā kratubhiḥ ijyate bahu upakaraṇāḥ yajñāḥ nānā sambhāra vistarāḥ bhaktyā tu puruṣaiḥ pūjā kṛtā dūrvā aṅkuraiḥ api yāni puṣpāṇi hṛdyāni dhūpa gandha anulepanam dayitam bhūṣaṇam yat ca prītaye ca eva vāsasī yāni ca abhyavahāryāṇi ca phalāni vai prayaccha tāni mārtaṇḍe bhavethāḥ ca eva tad manāḥ mādyam tam bhuvana ādhāram yathāśaktyā prasādaya kṣīreṇa snāpayet bhānum graheśam gopatim khagam dadhi kṣīra hradān puṇyān tatas lokān madhu cyutaḥ prayāsyati gaṇa śreṣṭha nirvṛttim ca vilakṣaṇām stotraiḥ gītaiḥ tathā vādyaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ mayā sargaḥ pravartitaḥ viṣṇuḥ ca pālayet lokān tam ārādhya divākaram rudraḥ ca prāptavan devīm bhavānīm tad prasādāt dīpyante ṛṣayaḥ ca api tam ārādhya divākaram toṣaya abdam hi tuṣṭaḥ asau bhānuḥ dvaṃdva praśānti daḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe brahmadiṇḍi saṃvāde ādityakriyāyogavarṇanam nāma triṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuḥṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca upavāsaiḥ suraśreṣṭhaiḥ katham tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ parihārān tathā ācakṣva ye tyājyāḥ ca upavāsibhiḥ taḥ smṛtaḥ sampūjitaḥ dhūpa puṣpa annaiḥ bhānuḥ ādarāt bhoginām upakārāya kim punar ca upavāsinām upāvṛttasya pāpebhyaḥ yaḥ tu vāsaḥ guṇaiḥ saha bhaktam eva ca upavāsī ravim yaḥ tu bhaktyā dhyāyati mānavaḥ niṣkāmaḥ puruṣaḥ diṇḍe sa brahma param āpnuyāt yam ca kāmam abhidhyāya māskara arpita mānasaḥ uvāca brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ vaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ strībhiḥ ca kañja ja an ārādhya jagannātham gopatim dhvānta nāśanam tat ārādhaya sarva īśam bhāskaram jyotiṣām patim vāsobhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ bhakṣyaiḥ upavāsa parāyaṇaḥ tat ārādhaya mārtaṇḍam bhakti pravaṇa cetasā puṣpāṇi yadi te na snuḥ śasta pādapa pallavaiḥ dūrvām karaiḥ api diṇḍe tad abhāve arcaya aryamam pūjitaḥ tuṣṭim atulām bhaktyā yāti ekacetasā yaḥ sat āyatane bhānoḥ kurute mārjana kriyām yāvatyaḥ pāṃsu kaṇikāḥ mārjyante bhāskara ālaye yaḥ ca anulepanam kuryāt bhānoḥ āyatane naraḥ mṛdā dhātu vikāraiḥ vā varṇakaiḥ gomayena vā upalepana kṛt yāti mad puram yānam āsthitaḥ udaka abhyukṣaṇam bhānoḥ yaḥ karoti sadā gṛhe sarva samāpnoti naraḥ dattvā dīpakam bhāskara ālaye yaḥ tu saṃvatsaram pūrṇam tila pātra pradaḥ naraḥ hanti vātena dātuḥ ajñānāt kṛtam pāpam kartuḥ gṛhe bhānoḥ divā rātrau narādhipaiḥ upāste prāpnoti gaṇāśārdūla kṛtvā pustakavācanam evam khageśvaraḥ bhaktyā yena bhānuḥ upāsitaḥ sa prāpnoti gatim ślādhyām yām yām icchati cetasā śakraḥ kratu śatena īśam ārādhya jyotiṣām patim brahmacāri gṛhasthānām vanasthānām gaṇādhipa na anyaḥ pūjyaḥ tathā strīṇām ṛte devam divākaram madhye parivrājakānām sahasrāṃśum mahātmanām mokṣa dvāram viśanti iha tam ravim vijita ātmanām evam sarva āśramāṇām hi sahasrāṃśuḥ parāyaṇam sarveṣām ca eva varṇānām graha īśaḥ vai gatiḥ parā śṛṇuṣva gadataḥ kāmyān upavāsān tathā aparān śṛṇu diṇḍe mahā puṇya phalakām saptamīm parām hara ārādhanāya enām sarva pāpa harām śivām sā upoṣyā prathamam tāta vidhānam śṛṇu tatra vai a yācitam caturthyām tu pañcamyām eka bhojanam upavāsa paraḥ ṣaṣṭhyām jita krodhaḥ jita indriyaḥ pradhyāyan manasā devam sarva bhūta ārti nāśanam sarva doṣa praśamanam sarva pātaka nāśanam pūjayitvā dinakaram puṣpa dhūpa vilepanaiḥ kharjūra nālikerāṇi tathā āmra phalāni tu mātuluṅga phalāni eva kathitāni manīṣibhiḥ tathā eṣām ca api abhāvena śṛṇu ca anyāni suvrata madhu godhūma piṣṭāni kārayet gaṇanāyakaiḥ guḍa garbha kṛtāni iha ghṛta pākena pāvayet pañca cāturyāvaka miśrāṇi ādityāya nivedayet agnikāryam atho kṛtvā brāhmaṇān bhojayet tatas ittham dvādaśa vai māsān kāryam vratam anuttamam māsi māsi phala āhāraḥ phala dāyī phala arcanaḥ tu atha kurvīta snāna prāśanayoḥ ca api vidhānam śṛṇu suvrata go mūtram gomayam kṣīram dadhi sarpiḥ kuśa udakam tila sarṣapayoḥ kalkam śvetā mṛd ca api suvrataiḥ dūrvā kalkam ghṛtam ca api gośṛṅga kṣālitam jalam jāti gulma viniryāsaḥ praśastaḥ snāna karmaṇi prāśane ca api atha etāni sarva pāpa harāṇi vai ādau kṛtvā bhādrapadam yathā saṃkhyam viduḥ budhāḥ ittham varṣa antam āsādya bhojayitvā dvijottamān phalāni tāta haimāni yathā śaktyā gaṇādhipa sa vatsām atha vā dhenum bhūmim sasya anvitām atha dadyāt śuklāni vastrāṇi tāmra pātram sa vidrumam phalāni piṣṭakāni eṣām tila cūrṇa anvitāni tu bhojayitvā dvijān dadyāt rājatāni phalāni tu ittham samāpyate tāta pāraṇam vārṣika antikam iti eṣā vai puṇyatamā saptamā durita apahā upoṣya sarve yānti pūjay sadā deva gandharva apsaras gaṇa anayā mānavaḥ nityam pūjayet bhāskaram sadā brāhmaṇaḥ mokṣam āyāti kṣatriyaḥ ca indra tām vrajet vaiśyaḥ dhanada sālokyam śūdraḥ vipra tvam āpnuyāt yām upoṣya ca nārī imām saptamīm loka pūjitām vidhavā vā satī bhaktyā anayā pūjayet ravim na anya janmani vaidhavyam nārī prāpnoti mānada cintāmaṇi samā hi eṣā vijñeyā phalasaptamī paṭhatām śṛṇvatām diṇḍe sarva kāma pradā smṛtā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi brahma diṇḍi saṃvāde saptamīkalpe phalasaptamīvarṇanam nāma catuḥṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāya atha pañcaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam atas param pravakṣyāmi rahasyām nāma saptamīm saptamā kṛta mātrā iyam narān tārayate bhavāt sapta aparān sapta pūrvān pitṝn ca api na saṃśayaḥ rogān chinatti duśchedyān durjayān jayate hi arīn arthān prāpnoti duṣprāpān yaḥ kuryāt nāma saptamīm putra arthī labhate putrān dharma arthī dharmam āpnuyāt samayān pālayan sarvān kuryāt ca imām vicakṣaṇaḥ samayān śṛṇu bhūteśa śreyase gadataḥ mama mad bhaktaḥ puruṣaḥ saptamyām gaṇanāyaka maitrīm sarvatra vai kuryāt bhāskaram vā api ciṃtayet saptamyām na spṛśet tailam nīlam vastram na dhārayet na ca api āmālakaiḥ snānam na kuryāt kalaham kvacid uvāca kaḥ ca doṣaḥ bhavet deva nīla vastrasya dhāraṇāt mahā bāho nīla vastrasya dhāraṇe hasti dūṣaṇam gaṇa śārdūla gadataḥ mama kṛtsnaśas snānam dānam japaḥ homaḥ svādhyāyaḥ pitṛ tarpaṇam vṛthak tasya mahā yajñāḥ nīla sūtrasya dhāraṇāt nīlī raktam yadā vastram vipraḥ tu aṅgeṣu dhārayet ahorātra uṣitaḥ bhūtvā pañcagavyena śuddhi ati nīlī madhyam yadā gacchet pramādāt brāhmaṇaḥ kvacid ahorātra uṣitaḥ bhūtvā pañcagavyena śuddhi ati nīlī dāru yadā bhindyāt brāhmaṇānām śarīrake śoṇitam dṛśyate yatra dvijaḥ cāndrāyaṇam caret kuryāt ajñānatas yaḥ tu nīleḥ vā dantadhāvanam kṛtvā kṛcchra dvayam diṇḍe viśuddhaḥ syāt na saṃśayaḥ bāpayet yatra nīlīm tu bhavet tatra aśuciḥ mahī pramāṇa dvādaśa abdāni tatas ūrdhvam śuciḥ bhavet saptamyām spṛśataḥ tailam iṣṭā bhāryā vinaśyati na ca eva khādet māṃsāni madyāni na pibet budhaḥ na avabhāṣeta cāṇḍālam striyam na eva rajasvalām na vā api saṃspṛśet hīnam mṛtakam na avalokayet na āsphoṭayet na atihaset gāyet ca api na gītakam na nṛtyet ati rāgeṇa na ca vādyāni vādayet na rudyāt aśru pātena na ca vācyam ca śaukikam ākṛṣet na śiraḥ yūkāḥ na vṛthāvādam ācaret na ca eva hi divā svapnam dambham śāṭhyam ca varjayet rathyāyām aṭanam vā api yatnatas parivarjayet atha aparaḥ vidhiḥ ca atra śrūyatām tripurāntakaiḥ dhātā iti caitra māse tu pūjanīyaḥ divākaraḥ aryamā iti ca vaiśākhe jyeṣṭhe mitraḥ prakīrtitaḥ āṣāḍhe varuṇaḥ jñeyaḥ indraḥ nabhasi kathyate pūṣā kārttika māse tu mārgaśīrṣa iṣuḥ ucyate bhagaḥ pauṣe bhavet pūjyaḥ tvaṣṭā māghe tu śasyate viṣṇuḥ ca phālgune māsi pūjyaḥ vandyaḥ ca bhāskaraḥ sa ghṛtam bhojanam deyam bhojayitvā vidhānāt bhojakāya eva viprāya dakṣiṇām svarṇamāṣakam bhojakānām tu dakṣiṇīyāḥ dvijottamāḥ tathā eva bhojanīyāḥ ca śraddhayā parayā vibho viśeṣataḥ vācakaḥ ca bāhmaṇaḥ kalpa vid sadā iti eṣā kathitā te saptamī gaṇanāyaka śrutā satī pāpa harā sūrya loka pradāyinī iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi brahmadiṇḍi saṃvāde saptamī kalpe ādityamahātmyavarṇane saptamīvarṇanam nāma pañcaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam iti uktvā bhagavān brahmā jagāma adarśanam vibhoḥ sūryam ārādhayat diṇḍī sūryasya anucaraḥ abhavat uvāca śṛṇvataḥ na asti mama tṛptiḥ amṛtasya iva suvrata hi avahitaḥ rājñ samvādam dvija śaṅkhayoḥ yam śrutvā sarva pāpebhyaḥ mucyate mānavaḥ nṛpa mad āsīnam āśrame śaṅkham dvijaḥ draṣṭum jagāma ha phala bhāra ānata chāye vṛkṣa vṛnda samākule paraspara mṛga śṛṅga kaṇḍūyita mṛga āvṛte tad tad tad tad tad tad tad tad tad tad tad tad tad tad muṇḍaiḥ ca jaṭilaiḥ ca eva tāpasaiḥ upaśobhite āśrame tam muni śreṣṭham śaṅkha āhvam sukham āsthitam stotraiḥ stotum sahasrāṃśum tad bhaktam tad parāyaṇam tatas saṃhatya sahasā tam bhojaka kumārakāḥ mad asaneṣu upaviṣṭāḥ te upaviṣṭam atha abruvan vinayena upapannānām kumārāṇām tatas muniḥ anādīn caturaḥ vedān uvāca prīta mānasaḥ teṣām tu paṭhatām eva āśramam tu yadṛcchayā muni śreṣṭhaḥ atha tam deśam ājagāma dvijaḥ nṛpa śiṣṭa āgamāt anadhyāyaḥ sa ca jātaḥ viramyatām yathā ājñāpayasi iti āhuḥ kumārāḥ te ṛṣim tatas śaṅkhaḥ uvāca mahā rāja kumārāḥ bhojaka ātmajāḥ sa sūtra kalpān caturaḥ vipra vedān adhīyate agni kārya vidhānam ca pratiṣṭhā kalpam āditas adhyaṅga lakṣaṇam brahman ratha yātrā vidhim tathā gandha puṣpa pradīpānām kim phalam ravi mandire dhūpa puṣpa upahāra ādi kim ca deyam vivasvante viśeṣataḥ tu māhātmyam brūhi mām bhāskarasya hi uvāca imam artham vasiṣṭhena pṛṣṭaḥ sāmbaḥ yathā purā sa ca uvāca vasiṣṭhāya tat aham kathayāmi te atra āśrame puṇyatame tīrthānām uttame prabhuḥ vavande niyata ātmānam vasiṣṭham muni sattamam kṛta praṇāmam sa ambam tu bhakti prahvī kṛta ānanam sarvatas sphuṭitam gātram kuṣṭhena mahatā tava ghora rūpeṇa tīvreṇa katham tat vigatam tava katham ca lakṣmīḥ adhikā rūpam ca ati manoharam uvāca darśanam ca gataḥ sākṣāt dattavan ca varān mama uvāca katham ārādhitaḥ sūryaḥ tvayā yādava nandana uvāca śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ brahman sarvam eva mayā yathā tatas aham tasya śāpena mahākuṣṭham avāptavan tatas aham pitaram gatvā kuṣṭha yoga abhipīḍitaḥ tāta sīdati mama gātram svaraḥ ca parihīyate ghora rūpaḥ mahā vyādhiḥ vapuḥ eṣa jighāṃsati aśeṣa vyādhi rājñā aham pīḍitaḥ krūra karmaṇā iti ukta vākyaḥ sa pitā sutra śoka abhipīḍitaḥ pitā kṣaṇam tatas dhyātvā mām evam vākyam uktavan dhairyam āśrayatām putra mā śoke ca manaḥ kṛthāḥ hanti śoka arditam vyādhiḥ śuṣkam tṛṇam iva analaḥ imam artham purā pṛṣṭaḥ padmayoniḥ sanātanaḥ yājñavalkyena ṛṣiṇā yogi īśena mahātmanā tat śṛṇuṣva śuciḥ bhūtvā ātmanaḥ śreyase suta surajyeṣṭham sukha āsīnam padmayonim prajāpatim yājñavalkyaḥ mahā tejāḥ paryapṛcchat pitāmaham gṛhasthaḥ brahmacārī vā vānaprasthaḥ atha bhikṣukaḥ yaḥ icchet mokṣam āsthātum devatām kām yajeta saḥ tu kaḥ devaḥ pitṝṇām ca eva kaḥ pitā kena sṛṣṭam idam viśvam brahman sthāvara jaṅgamam sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi bhavatā tuṣṭaḥ ca asmi mahāmate tathayiṣye dvijaśreṣṭhaiḥ śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ adhunā ātmanaḥ śreyase vipra śuciḥ bhūtvā samāhitaḥ anādi nidhanaḥ hi eṣaḥ puruṣaḥ śāśvataḥ avyayaḥ dīpayati eva lokān trīn raviḥ raśmibhiḥ ulbaṇaiḥ sarva deva ātmakaḥ hi eṣa tapasā ca aṃśu tāpanaḥ sarvasya jagantaḥ nāthaḥ karma sākṣī śubha aśubhe kṣapayati eṣa bhūtāni tathā visṛjate punar eṣa dhātā vidhātā ca pūṣā prakṛti bhāvana na hi eṣa kṣayam āyāti nityam akṣaya maṇḍalaḥ pitṝṇām hi pitā devatānām ca devatā dhruvam sthānam smṛtam hi eṣa ādhāraḥ jagantaḥ tathā sarva kāle jagat kṛtsnam ādityāt saṃprasūyate yoginaḥ ca atra saṃlīnāḥ tyaktvā gṛha
