kalevaram viśanti tasya raśmi sahasrāṇi śākhāḥ iva vihaṃgamāḥ janaka ādayaḥ gṛhasthāḥ tu rājānaḥ yoga dharmiṇaḥ ca eva brahmacāriṇaḥ vyāsa ādayaḥ vanasthāḥ ca bhikṣuḥ pañcaśikhaḥ tathā sarve te yogam āsthāya praviṣṭāḥ sūrya maṇḍalam śukaḥ vyāsa ātmajaḥ śrīmān yoga dharmam avāpya tu māntavan śabda mātrāḥ śruti sukhāḥ brahma viṣṇu śiva ādayaḥ pratyakṣaḥ ayam smṛtaḥ devaḥ sūryaḥ timira nāśanaḥ hṛṣṭena sādhyate yasmāt adṛṣṭam nityam eva hi tvayā atas satatam vipraiḥ arcanīyaḥ divākaraḥ uvāca devatā sarva devānām na etat mithyā prajāyate tasya devasya māhātmyam śrutam su bahuśas mayā dakṣiṇāt kiraṇāt yasya sambhūtaḥ bhagavant hariḥ lālāṭa ādyasya rudraḥ tu kā tulyā tena devatā śrotum ārādhanam yena nistareyam bhava arṇakam bhās bhās bhās bhās daḥ raviḥ mā śakyaḥ samārādhayitum katham śaṃsa prajāpate dharma artha kāma samprāptau puruṣāṇām viceṣṭatām janmani avitathā sā ekā kriyā yā arkam samāśritā durga saṃsāra kāntāram apāram abhidhāvatām ekaḥ sūrya namaskāraḥ mukti mārgasya deśakaḥ mārādhayitum gopālam graheśam amita ojasam śaṃkaram jagantaḥ dīpam smṛta mātrā agha nāśanam tam anādyam suraśreṣṭham prasādayitum icchataḥ jagāma paritoṣam sa padmayoniḥ mahā tapāḥ yat pṛcchasi dvijaśreṣṭha sūryasya ārādhanam prati vrata upavāsa japya ādi tat iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu tad kṣobhaka tvāt brahmāṇḍam sṛṣṭyāḥ hetuḥ nirañjanaḥ pradhāna puruṣa tvam ca tathā eva īśvara līlayā tatas sthitau pālayitā viṣṇu tvam jagantaḥ kṣaye bheda abheda svarūpam tam praṇipatya divākaram varṇayiṣye akhilam vipra tasya eva ārādhanam raveḥ guhyam ca api tathā tasya bhāskarasya śṛṇuṣva vai tuṣṭena hi purā mahyam kathitam bhāskareṇa tu iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi yājñavalkya brahma saṃvāde saptamī kalpe ādityamāhātmyavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha saptaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ yajantam ca aparam devam bhakti namram mahāmatiḥ aham ca kṛtavan praśnam dṛṣṭvā pratyakṣatas ravim vedeṣu ca purāṇeṣu sa aṅga upāṅgeṣu gīyase tvam ajaḥ śāśvataḥ dhātā mahābhūtam anuttamam catvāraḥ hi āśramāḥ deva sarve gārhasthya mūlakāḥ yajante tvām aharahar nānā mūrti samāśritāḥ pitā mātā hi sarvasya daivatam tvam hiṃ śāśvatam kathyatām mama deveśa param kautūhalam hi mama sa hi antarātmā bhūtānām kṣetrajñaḥ ca iti kathyate sāṃkhye ca paṭhyate śāstre nāmabhiḥ bahuṣu sadā viśvagaḥ viśvabhūtaḥ ca viśvātmā viśva sambhavaḥ dhṛtam ca eva ātmakam yena idam trailokyam ātmanā aśarīraḥ śarīreṣu lipyate na ca karmabhiḥ mama antarātmā tava ca ye ca anye deha saṃjñakāḥ sarveṣām sākṣi bhūtaḥ asau na karoti na lipyate sa guṇaḥ nirguṇaḥ viṣṇuḥ jñāna gamyaḥ hi asau smṛtaḥ sarvatas pāṇi pādaḥ asau sarvatas akṣi śiraḥ mukhaḥ viśva mūrdhā viśva bhujaḥ viśva pāda akṣi nāsikaḥ ekaḥ carati kṣetreṣu svaira cārī yathāsukham kṣetrāṇi asya śarīrāṇi bījam ca api śubha aśubham tāni vetti saḥ yoga ātmā atas kṣetrajñaḥ ucyate pure śete tena asau puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ tasmāt saḥ bahu rūpa tvāt viśvarūpaḥ iti smṛtaḥ mahāpuruṣa śabdam hi bibharti eṣa sanātanaḥ sa tu vai vikriyā āpannaḥ sṛjati ātmānam ātmanā ākāśāt patitam toyam yāti svādu antaram yathā bhūmyāḥ rasa viśeṣeṇa tathā guṇa vaśāt tu saḥ ekaḥ eva yathā vāyuḥ dehe tiṣṭhati pañcadhā ekatvam ca pṛthaktvam ca tathā tasya na saṃśayaḥ sthāna antara viśeṣeṇa yathā agniḥ labhate parām saṃjñām dāva agrika ādyeṣu tathā devaḥ hi asau smṛtaḥ yathā dīpa sahasrāṇi dīpe ekaḥ prasūyate tathā rūpa sahasrāṇi saḥ eva ekaḥ prasūyate tam ekam īśānam puruṣam bīja saṃjñitam avyakta avyakta bhāva sthā yā sā prakṛtiḥ ucyate na asti tasmāt paraḥ hi anyaḥ sa pitā sa prajāpatiḥ ātmā mama saḥ vijñeyaḥ tatas tam pūjayāmi aham te tad prasādāt gacchanti tena ādiṣṭāḥ parām gatim tam devāḥ ca asurāḥ ca eva nānā mata samāśritāḥ bhaktyā sampūjayanti ādyam gatim ca eṣām dadāti saḥ evam jñātvā tam ātmānam pūjayāmi sanātanam bhāskaram devadeveśam sarva bhūta īśam acyutam iti uktavan purā pṛṣṭaḥ mayā devaḥ divākaraḥ pūjaya tvam mahātmānam tapantam vipulam tapaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi vrahma yājñavalkya saṃvāde saptamīkalpe sūryamahimavarṇanam nāma saptaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ maheśvara ārādhay yad deva brahman viṣṇu maheśvara māti puṣpaiḥ dvijaśreṣṭhaiḥ dhūpena vijayena tu ṛṣaṇam sihlakam vipra śrīkhaṇḍam agaruḥ tathā karpūram ca tathā mustā śarkarā sa tvacā dvija keśavaḥ cakra rūpam tu sadā sampūjayet ravim dhūpena aguru saṃjñena bhakti śraddhā samanvitaḥ mayā sa pṛṣṭaḥ deveśaḥ tasya eva ārādhanāya vai kāni puṣpāṇi ca iṣṭāni sadā bhāskara pūjane tena ca uktāni puṣpāṇi svayam tāni nibodha mama mallikāyāḥ tu kusumaiḥ bhogavān jāyate naraḥ saubhāgyam puṇḍarīkaiḥ ca bhajati eva ca śāśvatam mandāra puṣpaiḥ pūjā tu sarva kuṣṭha vināśinī pradadyāt ūpiṇīm kanyām arcitaḥ bakula srajā bhāskaraḥ kiṃśukaiḥ arcitaḥ devaḥ na pīḍayati bhāskaraḥ haṃsa yuktena yānena raveḥ sālokya tām vrajet śata puṣpa sahasraiḥ tu pūṣa sālokya tām vrajet baka puṣpaiḥ dvijaśreṣṭhaiḥ yāti bhānu salokatām pañcabhūta ālaya sthānam āpnuyāt na atra saṃśayaḥ prāpnuyāt mahatīm lakṣmīm rogaiḥ ca api pramucyate aṣṭādaśa iha kuṣṭhāni ye ca anye vyādhayaḥ nṛṇām vilepanānām sarveṣām raktacandanam uttamam puṣpāṇām karavīrāṇi praśastāni pracakṣate na atas parataram kiṃcid bhāsvantaḥ tuṣṭi kārakam pūjayet yaḥ bhāskaram śraddhayā anvitaḥ sarva kāma samṛddhaḥ asau sūrya kāmam avāpnuyāt bilepya āyatanam yaḥ tu kuryāt maṇḍalakam śubham sa sūrya lokam āsādya modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ pañcabhiḥ vipulam dhānyam ṣaḍbhiḥ āyuḥ balam yaśaḥ sapta maṇḍala kārī syāt maṇḍala adhipatiḥ naraiḥ ghṛta pradīpa dānena cakṣuṣmān jāyate naraḥ taila pradānena sa śatrūn jayate naraḥ saṃpūjya vidhivat devam puṣpa dhūpa ādibhiḥ budhaḥ yathāśaktyā tatas paścāt naivedyam bhaktyāḥ nyaset puṣpāṇām pravarā jātī dhūpānām vijayaḥ paraḥ gandhānām kuṅkumam śreṣṭham lepānām raktacandanam dīpa dāne ghṛtam śreṣṭham naivedye modakaḥ paraḥ evam saṃpūjya vidhivat kṛtvā ca api pradakṣiṇam praṇamya śirasā devam devadevam divākaram ekam siddhārthakam kṛtvā haste pānīya saṃyutam kāmam yatheṣṭam hṛdaye kṛtvā tam vāñchitam naraḥ pibet sa toyam tam vipra a spṛṣṭam daśanaiḥ sakṛt dvitīyāyām tu saptamyām dvau gṛhītvā tu suvrataiḥ tṛtīyāyām tu saptamyām grahītavyāḥ trayaḥ api ca jñeyāḥ caturthyām catvāraḥ pañcamyām pañca eva hi pibet ca api ṣaṣṭhyām tu iti iyam vaidikā śrutiḥ tathā mām api siddhārtham arthāt kurutām raviḥ hutāśanam ca juhuyāt vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā evam eva parāḥ kāryā saptamyaḥ sapta sarvadā ekāt prabhṛti kāryā sā sarvadā udakasaptamī trīn tathā madhunā sārdham dadhinā caturaḥ eva ca yukta anna payasā pañca ṣaṭ ca gomaya saṃyutān iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe siddhārthasaptamīvratavarṇanam nāma aṣṭaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ svapne dṛṣṭe ca saptamyām puruṣaḥ niyata vrataḥ pūjayitvā dineśam tu yathāvibhavam ātmanaḥ śakra dhvajam tathā candram tasya sarvāḥ samṛddhayaḥ dṛśyam janam tathā śaktim sragvi go veṇu nisvanāḥ mahā abja cāmara ādarśa kanaka asi suta udbhavam śvetāyāḥ pañca pūtāyāḥ darśanam vṛddhi kārakam prajāpateḥ ghṛta aktasya darśanam putra dam smṛtam masta vṛkṣa abhirohaḥ ca kṣipram aiśvarya kārakaḥ dohanam mahiṣī siṃhī go dhenūnām svake mukhe dhanuṣām ca śarāṇām ca nābhau ca druta nirgatiḥ abhihanyāt svayam khādet siṃhān gāḥ bhujagān tathā svāṃgaśīrṣam hutavahe tasya śrīḥ agratas sthitā rājate haimane pātre yaḥ bhuṃkte pāyasam dvijaḥ mālya ambarāṇām yuktānām śastānām śuklapakṣiṇām sadā lābham praśaṃsanti tathā viṣṭhā anulepanam sva aṅgasya kartane kṣepe ratha yāne prajā gamaḥ nānā śiraḥ bāhu tā ca hastānām kurute śriyam praśasta darśanam ca eva abhiṣekaḥ nṛpa śriyāḥ syāt rājyam śiraḥ chedena bahudhā sphuṭitena tu turaṃgam vṛṣabham padmam rājānām śveta kuñjaram parivartayan unmūlayan parvatān ca rājya lābham avāpnuyāt dehāt niṣkrāntiḥ antrāṇām taiḥ vā vṛkṣasya veṣṭanam pātaḥ samudra saritām aiśvaryāṇi sukhāni ca udadhim saritam vā api tīrtvā pāram prayāti ca adrim laṅghayateḥ ca api bhavanti artha jaya āyuṣaḥ ujjvalā strī viśet aṅkam āśīrvāda parāḥ striyaḥ bhavati artha āgamaḥ śīghram kṛmibhiḥ yadi bhakṣyate svapne svapnaḥ iti jñātam dṛṣṭa prakathanam tathā maṅgalānām ca sarveṣām śubham darśanam eva ca aiśvarya rājya lābhāya yasmin svapnaḥ udāhṛtaḥ taiḥ dṛṣṭaiḥ rogiṇaḥ rogāt mucyante na atra saṃśayaḥ na svapnam śobhanam dṛṣṭvā svapyāt prātar ca kīrtayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe tathā purāṇa vidvasaḥ itihāsa vidaḥ dvijān raktāni vastrāṇi tathā ca gāvaḥ sugandha mālya ādi haviṣyam annam ye mantra vid brāhmaṇa pāṭhakāḥ ca ye ye api sāma adhyayaneṣu yuktāḥ prathamam bhojakāḥ bhojyāḥ saha teṣām ṛte mantra vidaḥ tathā veda vidaḥ dvijāḥ śraddadhānaḥ anasūyaḥ ca anantam prāpnuyāt sukham daśānām aśvamedhānām kṛtānām yat phalam labhet tad phalam saptamī sapta kṛtvā prāpnoti mānavaḥ kuṣṭhāni ca api sarvāṇi durucchedyāni api dhruvam apayānti yathā nāgāḥ garuḍasya bhaya arditāḥ imam vidhim dvijaśreṣṭha śrutvā kṛtvā ca mānavaḥ sahasraraśmim sa viśeṣāt na atra kāryā vicāraṇā suraiḥ vā munibhiḥ vā api purāṇa jñaiḥ idam śrutam idam ākhyānam ārṣeyam yat mayā abhihitam tava sūryabhakta dātavyam na itara kadācana yaḥ ca etat śrāvayet nityam yaḥ ca etat śṛṇuyāt naraḥ sa sahasra arciṣam devam praviśet na atra saṃśayaḥ mucyet ārtaḥ tathā rogāt śrutvā imām āditas kathām mad a bhavati kāmān bhaktaḥ sūrya gatim labhet prāpya etat paramam guhyam bhūtvā sūryavrataḥ naraḥ prāpnoti paramam sthānam bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ evam etat mama ākhyātam bhāskareṇa amita ojasā mayā api te mā ākhyātam bhaktyā bhānoḥ idam dvija pūjanīyaḥ tvayā bhānuḥ sarva pāpa upaśāntaye dvādaśa ātmā sa deveśaḥ prīyatām te adityāḥ sutaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe māhātmye sarṣapasaptamīvarṇanam nāma saptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tāni te kīrtayāmi eṣa yathāvat anupūrvaśas namaḥ sūryāya nityāya ravaye kārya bhānave bhāskarāya mataṅgāya mārtaṇḍāya vivasvate māline ādidevāya namaḥ te raśmimāline divākarāya dīptāya agnaye mihirāya ca pūṣṇe bhagāya mitrāya parjanyāya aṃśave namaḥ pataye nityam sarva prāṇabhṛte namaḥ hitāya sarva bhūtānām śivāya ārti harāya ca namaḥ te namaḥ tārāsutāya ca bhīmajāya namaḥ te pāvakāya ca vai namaḥ dhiṣaṇāya namaḥ nityam namaḥ kṛṣṇāya nityadā etāni āditya nāmāni mayā proktāni vai purā sāyam prātar śuciḥ bhūtvā yaḥ paṭhet su samāhitaḥ sa prāpnoti akhilān kāmān yathā aham prāptavan purā śrī kāmaḥ śriyam āpnoti dharma arthī dharmam āpnuyāt rājya arthī rājyam āpnoti kāma arthī kāmam āpnuyāt iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe durvāsas śāpa visarjana varṇanam ittham brahma vacaḥ yogī śrutvā rājñ divākaram vyoma rūpam samārādhya gataḥ sūrya salokatām gamiṣyasi param sthānam devānām api durlabham uvāca mahat sthānam raveḥ kutra jambūdvīpe mahā mune yatra pūjām vidhāna uktām pratigṛhṇāti asau raviḥ pūrvam indravanam nāma tathā muṇḍīram ucyate tṛtīyam tu triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam candrabhāgā taṭe nāmnā puram yat sāmba saṃjñitam sthānam yatra sūryasya nitya tā tatra dvādaśa bhāgena mitraḥ maitreṇa cakṣuṣā avalokan jagant sarvam śreyaḥ artham tiṣṭhate sadā prayuktām vidhivat pūjām gṛhṇāti bhagavant svayam uvāca sāmbaḥ sutaḥ kasya kasya prītaḥ divākara yasya ca ayam sahasrāṃśuḥ vara daḥ puṇya karmaṇaḥ ye ete dvādaśa ādityāḥ virājante mahā balāḥ teṣām yaḥ viṣṇu saṃjñaḥ tu sarva lokeṣu viśrutaḥ tasmāt sāmbaḥ sutaḥ jajñe jāmbavatyām mahā balaḥ sa tu pitrā bhṛśam śaptaḥ kuṣṭha rogam avāptavān tena ayam sthāpitaḥ sūryaḥ sva anāmnā ca puram kṛtam uvāca na alpam hi kāraṇam vipra yena asau śaptavan sutam mad śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ rājñ tasya yat śāpa kāraṇam durvāsāḥ nāma bhagavant rudrasya aṃśa samudbhavaḥ aṭamānaḥ saḥ bhagavant trīn lokān pracacāra ha atha prāptaḥ dvāravatīm madhu saṃjñā ucitām purā tam āgatam ṛṣim dṛṣṭvā sāmbaḥ rūpeṇa garvitaḥ piṅga akṣam kṣudhitam rūkṣam virūpam su kṛśam tathā dṛṣṭvā tasya mukham sāmbaḥ cakre tathā ātmanaḥ atha kruddhaḥ mahā tejāḥ durvāsāḥ ṛṣi sattamaḥ yasmāt virūpam mām dṛṣṭvā sva ātma rūpeṇa garvitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe tad ambāya durvāsasā śāpavisarjanam nāma dvisattatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sāmba kṛta sūrya ārādhana varṇanam etasmin eva kāle tu nāradaḥ bhagavān ṛṣiḥ brahmanaḥ mānasaḥ putraḥ triṣu lokeṣu viśru vāsudevam sa vai draṣṭum nityam dvāravatīm purīm jayati ṛṣibhiḥ sārdham krodhanaḥ muni sattamaḥ pradyumna prabhṛtayaḥ ye prahvāḥ ca avanatāḥ sthitāḥ abhivādya arghya pādyābhyām pūjām cakruḥ samantataḥ sāmbaḥ tu avaśya bhāvi tvāt tasya śāpasya kāraṇam avajñām kurūte nityam nāradasya mahātmanaḥ rataḥ krīḍāsu vai nityam rūpa yauvana garvitaḥ avinītam tu tam dṛṣṭvā cintayāmāsa nāradaḥ evam tu vāsudevam atha abravīt imāḥ ṣoḍaśa sāhasrāḥ striyaḥ yādava sattama sarvāsām hi sadā sāmbe bhāvaḥ deva samāśritaḥ rūpeṇa apratimaḥ sāmbaḥ loke ismin sacarācare sadā hi icchanti tāḥ tasya darśanam ca api hi striyaḥ śrutvā evam nāradāt vākyam cintayāmāsa keśavaḥ vacanam śrūyate loke cāpalyam strīṣu vidyate ślokau ca imau purā gītau citta jñaiḥ yoṣitām dvijaiḥ pauṃścalyāt cala citta tvāt naiḥsnehyāt ca svabhāvāt rakṣitāḥ sarvatas hi etāḥ vikurvanti hi bhartṛṣu na etāḥ rūpam parīkṣante na āsām vayasi niścayaḥ surūpam vā virūpam vā pumān iti eva bhuñjate manasā cintayan eva kṛṣṇaḥ nāradam abravīt na hi aham śraddadhāmi etat yat etat bhāṣitam tvayā bruvāṇam evam devam tu nāradaḥ vākyam abravīt tathā aham tat kariṣyāmi yathā śraddhāsyate bhavān tatas katipaya ahobhiḥ dvārakām punar abhyagāt anubhūya jala krīḍām pānam āsevate rahaḥ nānā jalaja phullābhiḥ dīrghikābhiḥ alaṅkṛte haṃsa sārasa saṃghuṣṭe cakravāka upaśobhite hāra nūpura keyūra raśanā ādyaiḥ vibhūṣaṇaiḥ bhūṣitānām vara strīṇām cāru aṅgānām viśeṣataḥ tābhiḥ sampīyate pānam śubha gandha anvitam śubham uvāca nāradaḥ sāmbam sāmba uttiṣṭha kumārakaiḥ tvām samāhvāyate devaḥ na yuktam sthātum atra te gatvā tu sa tvaram sa ambaḥ praṇāmam akarot prabhoḥ sa aṣṭāṅgam ca hareḥ sa ambaḥ vidhivat vallabhasya ca tam dṛṣṭvā sundaram sa ambam sarvāḥ cukṣubhire striyaḥ na sa dṛṣṭaḥ purā yābhiḥ antaḥpura nivāsibhiḥ madya doṣāt tatas tāsām smṛti lopāt tathā nṛpa śrūyate ca api ayam ślokaḥ purāṇa prathitaḥ kṣitau hṛdyam hi puruṣam dṛṣṭvā yoniḥ saṃklidyate striyāḥ lajjām muñcanti niḥśaṅkāḥ hrīmatyaḥ hi api hi striyaḥ sa māṃsaiḥ bhojanaiḥ snigdhaiḥ yānaiḥ sīdhu surā āsavaiḥ sīdhu prayuktam śukreṇa satatam sādhu hi icchatā madyam na peyam atyartha puruṣeṇa vipaścitā nāradaḥ upi atha tam sāmbam preṣayitvā tvarā anvitaḥ āyāntam tam tāḥ ca tam dṛṣṭvā priyam saumanasam ṛṣim sahasā eva utthitāḥ sarvāḥ striyaḥ tam mada vihvalāḥ tāsām atha utthitānām tu vāsudevasya paśyataḥ bhittvā vāsāṃsi śubhrāṇi pattreṣu patitāni tu tāḥ dṛṣṭvā tu hariḥ kruddhaḥ sarvāḥ tāḥ śaptavan striyaḥ yasmāt gatāni cetāṃsi mām muktvā anyatra ca striyaḥ tasmāt pati kṛtān lokān āyuṣaḥ ante na yāsyatha bhūtvā ca aśaraṇāḥ yūyam dasyu hastam gamiṣyatha hari śāpa doṣāt tatas tasmāt tāḥ striyaḥ svargate harau hṛtāḥ pāñjanadaiḥ cauraiḥ arjunasya tu paśyataḥ alpa sattvāḥ tu yāḥ tu āsan gatāḥ tāḥ dūṣaṇam striyaḥ rukmiṇī satyabhāmā ca tathā jāmbavatī priyā śaptvā eva tāḥ striyaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sāmbam api aśapat tatas yasmāt atīva te kāntam rūpam dṛṣṭvā imāḥ striyaḥ kṣubdhāḥ sarvāḥ yatas tasmāt kuṣṭha rogam avāpnuhi tasya tat vacanam śrutvā sāmbaḥ kṛṣṇasya bhārata uvāca prahasan rājñ saṃsmaran ṛṣi bhāṣitam prāptavan kuṣṭha rogi tvam virūpa tvam ca bhārataiḥ tad śāpāt musalam jātam kulam yena asya ghātitam hi avinayāt doṣān sāmbena āptān kṣamādhipaiḥ nityam bhāvyam vinītena guru deva dvijātiṣu kim tvayā na śrutau ślokau yau uktau vedhasā purā yaḥ dharma śīlaḥ jita māna roṣaḥ vidyā vinītaḥ na para upatāpī na tathā śītala salilam na candana rasaḥ na śītalā chāyā prahlādayati ca puruṣam yathā madhura bhāṣiṇī vāṇī tatas śāpa abhibhūtena samyak ārādhya bhāskaram sāmbena āptam tathā ārogyam rūpam ca paramam punar tathā arogyam bhāskarāt hari sūnunā niveśitaḥ raviḥ bhaktyā sva nāmnā kṣmādhipa īśvaraiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbakṛtasūryārādhanavarṇanam nāma trisaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhū uvāca tasmāt nadyam idam sthānam yathā etat bhāṣate bhavān ādyam sthānam idam bhānoḥ paścāt sāmbena bhārata atra ādyaḥ lokanāthaḥ asau raśmimālī jagatpatiḥ sṛṣṭvā prajāpatīn brahmā sṛṣṭvā ca vividhāḥ prajāḥ lalāṭāt kuru śārdūla nīraja akṣam digambaram ṛbhavaḥ pādāt sarve sṛṣṭāḥ tena mahātmanā tatas śata sahasra aṃśuḥ avyaktaḥ puruṣaḥ svayam kṛtvā dvādaśadhā ātmānam aditau udapadyata indraḥ dhātā ca parjanyaḥ pūṣā tvaṣṭā aryamā bhagaḥ vivasvant aṃśuḥ viṣṇuḥ ca varuṇaḥ mitraḥ eva ca kṛtsnam jagant idam vyāptam mūrtibhiḥ tu narādhipaiḥ tasya yā prathamā mūrtiḥ ādityasya indra saṃjñitā sthitā sā devarāja tve dānava asura nāśinī dvitīyā ca asya yā mūrtiḥ nāmnā dhātā iti kīrtitā sthitā prajāpati tve sā vidhātrī sṛjate prajāḥ tṛtīyā tasya yā mūrtiḥ parjanyaḥ iti viśrutā caturthī tasya yā mūrtiḥ nāmnā pūṣā iti viśrutā mantreṣu avasthitā sā tu prajāḥ puṣṇāti bhārataiḥ mūrtiḥ yā pañcamā tasya nāmnā tvaṣṭā iti viśrutā vanaspatiṣu sā nityam oṣadhīṣu ca vai sthitā mūrtiḥ tu yā tasya aryamā iti ca viśrutā prajā saṃvaraṇa artham sā pureṣu eva sthitā sadā bhānoḥ yā saptamā mūrtiḥ nāmnā bhagaḥ iti smṛtā bhūmau vyavasthitā sā tu kṣmādhareṣu ca bhārata aṣṭamā ca asya yā mūrtiḥ vivasvant iti saṃjñitā agnau vyavasthitā sā tu pacate annam śarīriṇām navamī citrabhānoḥ yā mūrtiḥ añśuḥ iti smṛtā mūrtiḥ yā daśamā tasya viṣṇuḥ iti abhidhīyate prādurbhavati sā nityam gīrvāṇa ari vināśinī mūrtiḥ tu ekādaśā yā tu bhānoḥ varuṇa saṃjñitā jīvāyayati sā kṛtsnam jagant hi samupāśritā tu apām sthānam samudraḥ tu varuṇaḥ atra pratiṣṭhitaḥ tasmāt vai procyate vīraiḥ sāgaraḥ varuṇālayaḥ mūrtiḥ yā dvādaśā bhānoḥ nāmnaḥ mitra saṃjñitā lokānām sā hita artham tu sthitā candrasarit taṭe vāyubhakṣā tapaḥ tepe yuktā maitreṇa cakṣuṣā anugṛhṇan sadā bhaktān varaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ sadā evamādyam idam sthānam puṇyam mitra padam smṛtam tayā ārādhya mahā bāho sāmbena amita tejasā tad prasādāt tad ādeśāt pratiṣṭhā tasya vai kṛtā pañcabhiḥ dvādaśabhiḥ tena bhāskareṇa mahātmanā kṛtsnam jagant idam vyāptam mūrtibhiḥ tu narādhipaiḥ te yāsyanti param sthāna sthāpayet yatra ambujeśvaraḥ iti evam dvādaśa ātmānam ādityam pūjayet tu yaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryadvādaśamūrtivarṇanam nāma catuḥsaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca katham sāmbaḥ prapannaḥ arkam kena vā pratipāditaḥ ugram śāpam ca tam prāpya pitaram sa ka uktavan uktam eva purā vīra yathā śaptaḥ sa yādavaḥ pitrā sāmbaḥ mahā rāja hariṇa ambuja dhāriṇā atha śāpa abhibhūtaḥ tu sāmbaḥ pitaram abravīt vinaya avanam bhūtvā prāñjaliḥ śirasā gataḥ kim mayā apakṛtam deva yena śaptaḥ asmi aham tvayā aham tvad ājñayā deva tvaramāṇaḥ utre āgataḥ kasmāt nipātitaḥ śāpaḥ mayi te anapakāriṇi na vai jānāmi aham kiṃcid prasīda jagantaḥ pate kaśmalena abhibhūtaḥ aham yena mucyeya kilbiṣāt tam uvāca tatas kṛṣṇaḥ sa ambam buddhvā hi anāgasam asya ayam jagataḥ nāthaḥ dvādaśa ātmā divākaraḥ mayā adhunā ca eva yathā tvam nāradena tu roṣāt visarjitaḥ putra mad sakāśam mahātmanā ākhyāsyati sa te devam śāpam yaḥ te apaneṣyati atha etat sa pituḥ vākyam śrutvā jāmbavatī sutaḥ dīnaḥ śoka parīta ātmā tatas sañcintya bhārata dvāravatyām sthitam viṣṇum kadācid draṣṭum āgatam ye me nīrujam kāyam kaśmalam ca praṇaśyati uvāca yaḥ stutyaḥ sarva devānām namasyaḥ pūjyaḥ eva ca pūjayitvā āśu tam devam tatas vyādhim prahāsyasi uvāca kaḥ stutyaḥ sarva devānām namasyaḥ pūjyaḥ eva ca sarvagaḥ ca sarvatra śaraṇam yam pitṛ śāpa analena aham dahyamānaḥ mahā mune śānti artham asya kam devam śaraṇam ca vrajāmi aham hitvā tu kāma jam vīra nāradaḥ vākyam abravīt bhāskaraḥ yadu śārdūla brahma ādīnām sadā anaghaiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi sāmbopākhyāne sāmbam prati kṛṣṇa śāpe sāmbasya nārada upasaṃgamana varṇanam nāma pañcasaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nārada sāmba saṃvāde sūrya parivāra varṇanam uvāca kadācid paryaṭan lokān sūrya lokam aham gataḥ tatra dṛṣṭaḥ mayā sūryaḥ sarva deva gaṇaiḥ vṛtaḥ rakṣanti udgata śastrāḥ tam yakṣa rākṣasa pannagāḥ ṛcaḥ yajūṃṣi sāmāni mūrtimanti iha sarvaśas mūrtimatyaḥ sthitāḥ tatra tisraḥ saṃdhyāḥ śubha ānanāḥ gṛhīta vajra nārācāḥ parivārya ravim sthitāḥ aruṇā varṇāt pūrvā madhyamā ca indu saṃnibhā tṛtīyā akṣmā aja saṃkāśā saṃdhyā ca eva prakīrtitā marutaḥ utha aśvinaḥ tathā tu indraḥ tatra eva tiṣṭhati dina ādau ambuja ākāram pūjayet ambujāsanam cakra rūpam tu madhyāhne ghṛtārciḥ pūjayet sadā pūjayet sa gaṇam rātrau vipula ājya svarūpiṇam ravim bhaktyā sadā devam kañja ardha kṛta śekharaḥ dve bhārye pārśvayoḥ tasya rājñīnikṣubha saṃjñitā tathā anyaiḥ nāmabhiḥ devāḥ parivārya ravim sthitāḥ piṅgalaḥ lekhakaḥ tatra tathā anyaḥ daṇḍanāyakaḥ ca dvau dvāre sthitau kalmāṣa pakṣiṇaḥ tatas vyoma catur śṛṅgam meroḥ sadṛśa lakṣaṇam diṇḍiḥ tathā agratas tasya dikṣu ca anye sthitāḥ surāḥ brahma ādyaiḥ saṃstutam devam gīrvāṇaiḥ ṛṣabha uttamam vraja uvāca kati vā raśmayaḥ tasya mūrtayaḥ ca kati smṛtāḥ kā rājñī nikṣubhā kā ca kaḥ ca ayam daṇḍanāyakaḥ piṅgalaḥ ca api kaḥ tatra kim ca asau likhate sadā rājāśra ūṣau ca kau tatra kau ca kalmāṣa pakṣiṇaḥ kim daivatyam ca tat vyom meroḥ sadṛśa lakṣaṇam kaḥ diṇḍiḥ agratas tatra ke devāḥ dikṣu ye sthitāḥ yena aham tattvāt jñātvā vrajāmi śaraṇam dvija iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne nārada sāmba saṃvāde sūryaparivāravarṇanam nāma ṣaṭsaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sāmba upākhyāne sūrya varṇanam uvāca vistareṇa ānupūrvayā ca sūryam nigadataḥ śṛṇu tatas śeṣān pravakṣye aham namaskṛtya vivasvante pradhānam prakṛtiḥ ca iti yam āhuḥ tattva cintakāḥ anādi antam ajam sūkṣmam triguṇam prabhava apyayam anākāram avijñeyam tam āhuḥ puruṣam param tasya ātmanā sarvam idam jagant vyāptam mahātmanaḥ tasya īśvarasya pratimā jñāna vairāgya lakṣaṇā dharma īśvarya kṛtā buddhiḥ brāhmā tasya abhimāninaḥ sāttvikam puruṣa tve ca guṇa vṛttam svayambhoḥ brahmatve sṛjate lokān kālatve ca api saṃkṣipet udāsīnaḥ tisraḥ avasthāḥ prajāpateḥ mṛtaḥ deveṣu sa mahān devaḥ mahādevaḥ smṛtaḥ tatas sarva īśa tvāt ca lokasya adhīśa tvāt ca īśvaraḥ pāti yasmāt prajāḥ sarvāḥ prajāpatiḥ atas smṛtaḥ na utpādya tvāt apūrva tvāt svayambhuḥ iti viśrutaḥ hiraṇya aṇḍa gataḥ yasmāt graha īśaḥ vai divaspatiḥ apaḥ nārāḥ iti proktāḥ ṛṣibhiḥ tattva darśibhiḥ ayanam tasya tāḥ āpaḥ tena nārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ araḥ iti eṣa śīghra arthaḥ nipātaḥ kavibhiḥ smṛtaḥ apaḥ eva arṇavāḥ bhūtvā na śīghrāḥ tena tāḥ narāḥ ekārṇave purā tasmin naṣṭe sthāvara jaṅgame nārāyaṇa ākhyaḥ puruṣaḥ suṣvāpa salile tadā sahasra śīrṣā sumanāḥ sahasra akṣaḥ sahasra pād āditya varṇaḥ bhuvanasya goptā apūrvaḥ ekaḥ puruṣaḥ purāṇaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne sūryavarṇanam nāma saptasaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭasaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam uvāca tulyam yuga sahasrasya naiśam kālam upāsya saḥ salilena āplutām bhūmi dṛṣṭvā kāryam vicintya saḥ bhūtvā sa tu varāhaḥ vai apaḥ saṃviśate prabhuḥ sañcitya evam sa deveśaḥ bhūmyāḥ uddharaṇe kṣamaḥ uttiṣṭhataḥ tasya jala ārdra kukṣeḥ mahāvarāhasya mahīm vidhārya manasā janayāmāsa putrān ātma samān śubhān marīcim atha dakṣam ca vasiṣṭham navamam tathā nava prajāpatīn sṛṣṭvā tatas saḥ puruṣottamaḥ prādurbhūtaḥ aditeḥ putraḥ prajānām hita kāmyayā marīcāt kaśyapam putram yam vedhāḥ janayat jale prajāpatīnām daśamam tejasā brahmaṇaḥ samam bṛkṣakanyā aditiḥ nāmnā patnī sā kaśyapasya tu aṇḍam sā janayāmāsa bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar tri saṃyutam tatra utpannaḥ sahasrāṃśuḥ dvādaśa ātmā divākaraḥ vistārāḥ triguṇaḥ ca asya pariṇāhaḥ vibhāvasoḥ sahasra śīrṣā puruṣaḥ brāhma yogam udāharan ādatte sa tu raśmīnām sahasreṇa samantataḥ saurā prabhā yā devasya astam yāte divākare agnim āviśate rātrau tasmāt dūrāt prakāśate prakāśa tvam tathā uṣṇa tvam ca prakīrtite paraspara anupraveśāt āpyāyete divāniśam vyāpaka tvam ca raśmīnām nāmāni ca nibodha mama hetayaḥ kiraṇāḥ gāvaḥ raśmayaḥ atha gabhastayaḥ abhīṣavaḥ ghanam ca usrāḥ vasavaḥ atha marīcayaḥ nāḍyaḥ dīdhitayaḥ sādhyāḥ mayūkhāḥ bhānavaḥ oṃśavaḥ sapta arcayaḥ suparṇāḥ ca karāḥ pādāḥ tathā eva ca eṣām tu nāmnām raśmīṇām paryāyāḥ viṃśatiḥ smṛtāḥ candana ādīni vakṣyāmi nāmāni eṣām pṛthak pṛthak sahasram tāta kathitam śīta varṣa uṣṇa niḥśravam teṣām catur śatam nāḍyaḥ varṣante citra mūrtayaḥ candanāt ca eva mandāḥ ca kotanāma anumāḥ tathā amṛtāḥ nāma te sarve raśmayaḥ vṛṣṭi hetavaḥ himodvahāḥ tu tatra anye raśmayaḥ tri śatam smṛtāḥ saumya īśāḥ ca eva vāmaḥ ca hlādinaḥ hima sarjanāḥ śuklāḥ ca kakubhaḥ ca eva gāvaḥ viśva bhṛtaḥ tathā śuklāḥ te nāmataḥ sarve tri śatam dharma sarjanāḥ manuṣyān oṣadhībhiḥ tu svadhayā ca pitṝn na api oṣadhīṣu balam dhatte svadhāyām ca svadhām punar amareṣu amṛtam sūryaḥ trayam triṣu niyacchiti kāla agniḥ vatsaraḥ ca eva dvādaśa ātmā prajāpatiḥ tapatyeṣu suraśreṣṭhaḥ trīn lokān sacarācarān eṣa brahmā tathā viṣṇuḥ eṣaḥ eva maheśvaraḥ ṛcaḥ yajūṃṣi sāmāni eṣaḥ eva na saṃśayaḥ tat pūrvam madhyāhne yajurbhiḥ sadā sāmabhiḥ tu aparāhṇeṣu maheśānaḥ prapūjyate sadā eṣa tejasām rāśiḥ dīptimān sarva loka gaḥ brahma viṣṇu maheśānaiḥ pūjyamānaḥ tu nityaśas sūryaḥ gobhiḥ jagant kṛtsnam ādīpayati sarvaśas trīṇi raśmi śatāni asya bhūrlokam dyotayanti vai trīṇi trīṇi tathā ca anyau dvau lokau tāpayanti uta śatam ca api adhastāt tu pātālam tāpayanti uta iti etat maṇḍalam śuklam bhāsvaram heli saṃjñitam madhya madhya ca vidhu ṛkṣa grahāḥ sarve vijñeyāḥ raveḥ kara sahasram yat prāk mayā samudāhṛtam teṣām śreṣṭhāḥ punar sapta raśmayaḥ graha saṃjñitāḥ suṣumṇaḥ harikeśaḥ ca viśvakarmā tathā eva ca sūryaḥ ca eva aparaḥ raśmiḥ nāmnā viṣṇuḥ iti smṛtaḥ tāreyaḥ ca aparaḥ tatra guruḥ sumanasām tathā ugrāhvaḥ pañcamaḥ teṣām putraḥ anyaḥ vanamālinaḥ kaḥ śeṣaḥ saptamaḥ teṣām ete vai sapta raśmayaḥ na asti ātmā sarva loka īśaḥ devadevaḥ prajāpatiḥ agnau prāsta āhutiḥ samyak ādityam upatiṣṭhate mādityāt jāyate vṛṣṭiḥ vṛṣṭyāḥ annam tatas prajāḥ bhāva abhāvau tu lokānām ādityāt niḥsṛtau purā etat tu dhyāninām dhyānam mokṣaḥ ca api eva mokṣiṇām atra gacchanti nirvāṇam jāyante asmāt punar prajāḥ pakṣāḥ tu nityaśas māsāḥ samvatsarāḥ ca eva ṛtavaḥ atha yugāni ca atha ādityam ṛte hi eṣām kāla saṃkhyā na vidyate kālāt ṛte na niyamāḥ na agneḥ viharaṇa kriyā ṛtū nāma vibhāgāt ca puṣpa mūla phalam kutas abhāvaḥ vyavahārāṇām jantūnām divi ca iha ca na avṛṣṭyā tapate sūryaḥ na avṛṣṭyā pariveṣyate ādityasya ca nāmāni sāmānyāni iha dvādaśa dvādaśa eva pṛthaktvena tāni vakṣyāmi anekaśas mihiraḥ arkaḥ pratāpanaḥ mārtaṇḍaḥ bhāskaraḥ bhānuḥ citrabhānuḥ divākaraḥ raviḥ vai dvādaśaḥ ca eva jñeyaḥ sāmānya nāmbhiḥ vivasvant aṃśumant tvaṣṭā parjanyaḥ dvādaśa smṛtāḥ iti ete dvādaśa ādityāḥ pṛthaktvena prakīrtitāḥ uttiṣṭhanti sadā hi ete māsaiḥ dvādaśabhiḥ kramāt viṣṇuḥ tapati caitre ca vaiśākhe ca aryamā tathā tu parjanyaḥ śrāvaṇe māsi varuṇaḥ proṣṭha saṃjñake indraḥ ca āśvayuje māsi dhātā tapati kārttike mārgaśīrṣe tathā mitraḥ pauṣe pūṣā divākaraḥ taiḥ ca dvādaśabhiḥ viṣṇuḥ raśmīṇām dīpyate sadā dvisaptakaiḥ vivasvant tu aṃśumant pañcakaiḥ tribhiḥ indraḥ tu dviguṇaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ dhātā ekādaśabhiḥ śataiḥ dakṣiṇa upakrame bhūyas hrasante sūrya raśmayaḥ bhidyate ṛtu māsaiḥ tu sahasram bahudhā bhṛśam evam nāmnām caturviṃśatī ekasya eṣā prakīrtitā mad as parama yatnena bruvate bhinna darśanāḥ tāmasāḥ buddhi mohāt ca dṛṣṭāntāni bruvanti hi brahmānam kāraṇam kecid kecid āhuḥ divākaram kecid bhavam paratvena āhuḥ viṣṇum tathā apare tu smṛtāḥ hi ete nānā artheṣu sura uttamāḥ ekaḥ sa tu pṛthaktvena svayambhuḥ iti viśrutaḥ yathā anurajyate varṇeḥ vividhaiḥ sphāṭikaḥ maṇiḥ tathā guṇa vaśāt tasya svayambhoḥ anurañjanam ekaḥ bhūtvā yathā meghaḥ pṛthaktvena pratiṣṭhitaḥ varṇāt rūpāt ca eva tathā guṇa vaśāt tu saḥ nabhasaḥ patitam toyam yāti svāda antaram yathā bhūmyāḥ rasa viśeṣeṇa tathā guṇa vaśāt tu saḥ varṇāt rūpāt ca eva tathā guṇa vaśāt tu saḥ yathā dravya viśeṣāt ca vāyuḥ ekaḥ pṛthak bhavet sugandhiḥ pūti gandhiḥ vā tathā guṇa vaśāt tu saḥ yathā vā gārhapatya ugniḥ anyat saṃjñā antaram vrajet dakṣiṇa āhavanīya ādi brahma ādiṣu tathā hi asau eṣaḥ aṇḍajaḥ adhigaḥ ca eva eṣaḥ eva bhṛguḥ tathā eṣa vedāḥ ca yajñāḥ ca sarvaḥ ca eva na saṃśayaḥ yajyate pūjyate ca asau atra yāna ātmakaḥ raviḥ evaṃvidhaḥ hi ayam sūryaḥ sadā pūjyaḥ vijānatā yathā tava pitā sāmba yathā vedhāḥ yathā haraḥ ekībhūya yathā meghaḥ pṛthaktvena pratiṣṭhate varṇāt rūpāt ca eva tathā guṇa vaśāt tu saḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryamahimavarṇanam nāma aṣṭasaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ etat śrutvā tu kārtsnyena hṛṣṭaḥ jāmbavatī sutaḥ uvāca aho sūryasya māhātmyam varṇitam harṣa vardhanam tatas rājñīm mahābhāgām nikṣubhām ca mahā mune diṇḍinam piṅgala ādīn ca sarvān kathaya mama mune uvāca tayoḥ hi rājñī dyauḥ jñeyā nikṣubhā pṛthivī smṛtā māgha kṛṣṇasya saptamyām mahyā saha bhavet raviḥ bhūḥ ādityaḥ ca bhagavān gacchataḥ saṃgamam tathā ṛtusnātā mahī tatra garbham gṛhṇāti bhāskarāt sasya upayoga saṃhṛṣṭāḥ juhvati āhutayaḥ dvijāḥ svāhākāra svadhākāraiḥ yajanti pitṛ devatāḥ nikṣubhā sūyate yasmāt anna oṣadhi sudhā amṛtaiḥ martyān pitṝn ca devān ca tena bhūḥ nikṣubhā smṛtā yathā rājñī dvidhā bhūtā yasya ca iyam sutā matā apatyāni ca yāni asyāḥ tāni vakṣyāmi aśeṣatas marīciḥ brahmanaḥ putraḥ marīceḥ kaśyapaḥ sutaḥ tasmāt hiraṇyakaśiṣuḥ prahlādaḥ tasya ca ātmajaḥ virocanasya bhaginī saṃjñāyāḥ jananī śubhā hiraṇyakaśipoḥ pautrī dityāḥ putrasya sā smṛtā sā viśvakarmaṇaḥ putrī prāhlādī procyate budhaiḥ atha nāmnā surūpā iti marīceḥ duhitrī śubhā putrī hi aṅgirasaḥ sā tu jananī tu bṛhaspateḥ bṛhaspateḥ tu bhaginī viśrutā brahma vādinī prabhāsasya tu sā patnī vasūnām aṣṭamasya tu prasūtā viśvakarmāṇam sarva śilpa karam varam sa vai nāmrā punar tvaṣṭā tridaśānām ca vārddhakiḥ devācāryaḥ ca tasya iyam duhitrī viśvakarmaṇaḥ sureṇuḥ iti vikhyātā triṣu lokeṣu bhāminī rājñī saṃjñā ca dyauḥ tvāṣṭrī prabhā sā eva vibhāvyate tasya āt tu yā tanu chāyā nikṣubhā sā mahī mayī sā tu bhāryā bhagavataḥ mārtaṇḍasya mahātmanaḥ sādhvī pativratā devī rūpa yauvana śālinī na tu tām nara rūpeṇa sūryaḥ bhajati vai purā gātreṣu apratirūpeṣu na ati kāntam iva abhavat aniṣpattreṣu gātreṣu golam dṛṣṭvā pitāmahaḥ mārtaḥ tvam bhava ca aṇḍaḥ tu mārtaṇḍaḥ tena saḥ smṛtaḥ devānām ca yatas tu ādiḥ tena ādityaḥ iti smṛtaḥ atas param pravakṣyāmi prajāḥ tasya mahātmanaḥ trīṇi apatyāni saṃjñāyām janayāmāsa vai raviḥ varṣāṇām tu sahasram vai vasamānā pituḥ gṛhe bhartuḥ samīpam yāhi iti pitrā uktā sā punar punar agacchat vaḍabā bhūtvā tyaktvā rūpam yaśasvinī uttarān ca kurūn gatvā tṛṇāni anucacāra ha pituḥ samīpam yā bhāryā saṃjñā yā vacanena sā saṃjñāyāḥ dhārayat rūpam chāyā sūryam upasthitā dvitīyāyām tu saṃjñāyām saṃjñā iyam iti cintayan bhādityaḥ janayāmāsa putrau kanyām ca rūpiṇīm śrutaśravāḥ ca dharma jñaḥ śrutakarmā tathā eva ca śrutaśravāḥ manuḥ tābhyām sāvarṇiḥ yaḥ bhaviṣyati śrutakarmā tu vijñeyaḥ grahaḥ yaḥ vai śanaiścaraḥ kanyā ca tapatī nāma rūpeṇa apratirūpiṇī saṃjñā tu pārthivī teṣām ātmajānām yathā akarot na sneham pūrvajānām tu tathā kṛtavatī tu sā bahuśas yātyamānaḥ tu pituḥ patnyā su duḥkhitaḥ padā santarjayāmāsa saṃjñām vaivasvataḥ yamaḥ tam śaśāpa tatas krodhāt saṃjñā sā pārthivā bhṛśam yat mām pituḥ bhāryām garīyasam tasmāt tava eṣa caraṇaḥ patiṣyati na saṃśayaḥ tu niḥsnehān jyāyasaḥ hi asmāt kanīyāḥ sam bubhūṣati bālyāt vā yadi vā mohāt tat bhavān kṣantum arhati mama asmin loka īśa jananyā tapatām vara tava prasādāt caraṇaḥ trāyatām mahataḥ bhayāt asaṃśayam mahat putra bhaviṣyati atra kāraṇam yena tvām āviśat krodhaḥ dharma jñam dharma śālinam sarveṣām eva śāpānām pratighātaḥ tu vidyate na tu mātrā abhiśaptānām kvacid mokṣaḥ bhavet iha kṛmayaḥ māṃsam ādāya yāsyanti tu mahī tale kṛtam tasyāḥ vacaḥ satyam tvam ca trātaḥ bhaviṣyasi hau ādityaḥ tu abravīt śāyām kimartham tanayau ubhau ātmānam sa samādhāya vaktum tasyām apaśyat tām śaptu kāmaḥ bhagavant udyataḥ kupitaḥ tatas tatas chāyā yathāvṛttam ācacakṣe vivasvante vivasvant tu tatas kruddhaḥ śrutvā śvaśuram āgataḥ sā ca api tam yathānyāyam arcayitvā divākaram nirdagdhu kāmam roṣeṇa sāntvayāmāsa tam śanais te ati tejasā āviṣṭam idam rūpam su duḥsaham asahantī tu saṃjñā ca vane carati śādvale drakṣyate tām bhavān adya svām māyām śubha cāriṇīm rūpa artham bhavatā araṇye caratīm su mahat tapaḥ santuṣṭaḥ tasya tat vākyam bahu mene mahā tapāḥ tatas anvajānāt tvaṣṭāram rūpa nirvartanāya tu bhramim āropya tat tejaḥ śātayāmāsa tasya vai mājānu likhitaḥ ca asau nipuṇam viśvakarmaṇā tatra tat bhāsitam rūpam tejasā prakṛtena tu tatas kāntāt kāntataram bhūtvā adhikam śuśubhe tatas dadarśa yogam āsthāya svām bhāryām vaḍabām tathā adṛśyām sarva bhūtānām tejasā svena saṃvṛtām aśva rūpeṇa mārtaṇḍaḥ tām mukhena samāsadat maithunāya para pumāṃsaḥ viśaṅkayā sā tam vivasvataḥ śukram nāsābhyām samadhārayat devau tasyām ajāyetām aśvinaḥ bhiṣajām varau atas param svakam rūpam darśayāmāsa bhāskaraḥ tat dṛṣṭvā ca api saṃjñā tu tutoṣa ca mumoha ca tatas tu janayāmāsa saṃjñā sūrya sutam śubham rūpeṇa ca ātmanaḥ tulyam revatam nāma nāmnaḥ tat aśvam jāta mātraḥ palāyata sa tasmin sakṛt ārūḍhaḥ tam aśvam na eva muñjati tatas arkeṇa samādiṣṭau daṇḍanāyaka piṅgalau aśvam pratyānayethām mama mā tu pārśva sthau tiṣṭhataḥ tasya aśva chidra abhikāñkṣiṇaḥ plavan gacchati asau yasmāt saṃjñāyāḥ śānti daḥ sutaḥ manuḥ yamaḥ yamī ca eva sāvarṇiḥ sa śanaiścaraḥ tapatī ca aśvinaḥ ca eva revantaḥ ca raveḥ sutāḥ evam eṣā purā saṃjñā dvitīyā pārthivā smṛtā yā saṃjñā sā smṛtā rājñī chāyā yā sā tu nikṣubhā smṛtaḥ dhātuḥ rājā rājati yat sadā adhikam rājate yasmāt tasmāt rājā saḥ ucyate rājñaḥ patnī tu sā yasmāt tasmāt rājñī prakīrtitā saṃcalane dhātuḥ niścalā tena nikṣubhā bhavanti iti atha vā yasmāt svargīyāḥ vivarjitāḥ chāyām tām viśate divyām smṛtā sā tena nikṣubhā dṛṣṭvā janam sadā tāta bhṛśam pīḍita mānasam dharmeṇa rañjayāmāsa dharmarājaḥ tatas smṛtaḥ śuddhena karmaṇā tāta śubhena parama dyutiḥ pitṝṇām ādhipatyam ca lokapāla tvam āpa ca yasya anvavāye jātaḥ tu śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ yamasya bhaginī yā tu yamī kanyā yaśasvinī sā abhavat saritām śreṣṭhā yamunā loka pāvanā manuḥ prajāpatiḥ tu eṣa sāvarṇiḥ sa mahā yaśāḥ bhaviṣyan sa manuḥ tāta aṣṭamaḥ parikīrtitaḥ tapatī nāma yā nāmnā tayoḥ kanyā garīyāḥ sā babhūva śubhā patnī rājñaḥ saṃvaraṇasya tu tāpī nāma nadī ca iyam vindhya mūlāt viniḥsṛtā nityam puṇya jalā snāne paścima udadhi gāminī saumyayā saṅgatā sā tu sarva pāpa bhaya apahā vaivasvatī yathā vīra saṅgatā 1śiva kāntayā revantaḥ nāma yaḥ arkasya rūpeṇa arka samaḥ sutaḥ aśvānām ādhipatye tu yojitaḥ sa tu bhānunā tvaṣṭā api tejasā tena mārtaṇḍasya eva ca ājñayā bhojān utpādayāmāsa pūjāyai satya suvrata yaḥ idam janma devasya śṛṇuyāt vā paṭheta vā vivasvantaḥ hi putrāṇām sarveṣām amita ojasām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe māhātmyavarṇanam nāma ekonāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam ittham śrutvā kathām divyām heli māhātmyam āśritām uvāca sūrya pūjā phalam yat ca yat ca dāna phalam mahat yena sampūjayāmi eṣa bhānum devaiḥ sadā arcitam uvāca imam artham purā pṛṣṭaḥ brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ diṇḍinā yadu śārdūla śṛṇuṣva ekāgra mānasaḥ sukha āsīnam tathā devam surajyeṣṭham pitāmaham praṇamya śirasā diṇḍiḥ idam vacanam abravīt uvāca sūrya pūjā phalam brūhi brūhi dāna phalam tathā itihāsa purāṇābhyām kārite śravaṇe tathā upavāsena ṣaṣṭhyām ca sarva pāpaḥ pramucyate praṇidhāya śiraḥ bhūmau namaskāra paraḥ raveḥ tad kṣaṇāt sarva pāpebhyaḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ pradakṣiṇī kṛtā tena sapta dvīpā bhavet mahī sūryam manasi yaḥ kṛtvā kuryāt vyoma pradakṣiṇām pradakṣiṇī kṛtāḥ tena sarve devāḥ bhavanti hi parituṣṭāḥ ca te sarve prayacchanti gatim śubhām sarve devāḥ mahā bāho hi abhīṣṭam tu paraṃtapaiḥ eka āhāraḥ naraḥ bhūtvā ṣaṣṭhyām yaḥ arcayate ravim saptamyām vā mahā bāho sūrya lokam sa gacchati saptamyām vā atha ṣaṣṭhyām vā sa gacchet paramām gatim kṛṣṇa pakṣasya saptamyām sa upavāsaḥ jita indriyaḥ modakaiḥ ca gaṇa śreṣṭha sūrya lokam sa gacchati śukla pakṣasya saptamyām upavāsa rataḥ sadā sarva pāpa viśuddha ātmā vidhuḥ kāntyā na saṃśayaḥ uvāca upoṣya saptamīm yena gamiṣye śaraṇam raveḥ yathā sahasrakiraṇaḥ purā pṛṣṭaḥ aruṇena vai kathitāḥ sapta saptamyaḥ bhānunā śreyase nṝṇām aruṇasya gaṇa śreṣṭha pṛcchataḥ kāraṇa antare dhyānam āśritya tiṣṭhantam aruṇaḥ vākyam abravīt kimartham devadevaśa dhyānam āśritya tiṣṭhasi dinam na yāti deveśa kāraṇam mama kathyatām iti evam bhagavant pṛṣṭaḥ idam vacanam abravīt śṛṇu tvam dvijaśārdūlaiḥ yad artham dhyānam āśritaḥ arvāvasuḥ dvijaśreṣṭhaḥ sa ca aputraḥ khaga uttama mām nityam gandha puṣpa upahārakaiḥ putra kāmaḥ khaga śreṣṭhaiḥ na ca jānāti ayam yathā śrūyatām ca vidhiḥ sarve yena prītaḥ bhave nṛṇām gṛhṇīṣva saptamī kalpam gatvā brūhi dvijottamam śrutvā bhānoḥ kṣaṇāt eva jagāma sa khaga uttamaḥ tat sarvam bhānoḥ vacanam āditas brāhmaṇasya khaga śreṣṭha sa ca śrutvā dvijottamaḥ cakāra saptamī kalpam yathā ākhyātam khagena tu bhṛddhim vṛddhim tathā ārogyam prāpya putrān ca puṣkalān iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi tathā saptamīkalpamāhātmyavarṇanam nāma aśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ca vijayā ca eva jayantī ca aparājitā mahājavā ca nandā ca bhadrā ca anyā prakīrtitā tathā homam upavāsaḥ tathā eva ca sarvam vijayasaptamyām mahāpātaka nāśanam pañcamyām eka bhaktam syāt paṣṭhyām naktam pracakṣate upavāsaḥ tu saptamyām aṣṭamyām pāraṇam bhavet abhipretaḥ tu me ṣaṣṭhyām upavāsaḥ gaṇa uttama caturthyām eka bhaktam tu pañcamyām naktam ādiśet upavāsaḥ tu ṣaṣṭhyām syāt saptamyām pāraṇam bhavet upavāsa paraḥ ṣaṣṭhyām abda īśam pūjayet budhaḥ gandha puṣpa upahāraiḥ ca bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ japamānaḥ tu gāyatrīm saura sūktam atha api vā akṣaram vā mahā śvetam ṣaṣ akṣaram atha api vā vibuddhaḥ tu atha saptamyām kṛtvā snānam gaṇādhipaiḥ graha īśam pūjayitvā tu homam kṛtvā vidhānāt brāhmaṇān bhojayet bhaktyā śaktyā ca gaṇanāyaka śālyodanam apūpāḥ ca khaṇḍa veṣṭān ca śaktitas sa ghṛtam pāyasam dadyāt tathā vipreṣu śaktitas iti eṣā kathitā devaiḥ puṇyā vijayasaptamī karavīrāṇi raktāni kuṅkumam ca vilepanam vijayam dhūpam asyām tu bhānoḥ tuṣṭi karāṇi vai eṣā puṇyā pāpa harā mahāpātaka nāśinī atra dattam hutam ca api kṣīyate na gaṇādhipa snānam dānam tathā homaḥ pitṛ deva abhipūjanam sarvam vijayasaptamyām mahāpātaka nāśanam āditya vāreṇa yutā smṛtā vijayasaptamī iti eṣā kathitā vīraiḥ sarva kāma pradāyinī dhanyam yaśasyam āyuṣyam kīrtitam śravaṇam tathā smaraṇam tu tathā asyām tu puṇya dam tripurāntaka iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe vijayasaptamīvarṇanam nāma ekāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvyaśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca snāna dāna ādikam teṣām kim phalam syāt bravītu mama puṇyā sā saptamī proktā yuktā tena pitāmahaiḥ vijaya iti tathā nāma varṇyatām isya puṇya tā ye tu ādityadine brahman śrāddham kurvanti mānavāḥ naktam kurvanti ye tatra mānavāḥ sthairyam āśritāḥ japamānā param jāpyam ādityahadayam param japamānaḥ mahāśvetām īpsitam labhate phalam bhū bhū bhū tathā śvetām gacchet vairocanam padam dvādaśa iha smṛtāḥ vārāḥ ādityasya mahātmanaḥ śukla pakṣasya ṣaṣṭhyām tu māghe māsi gaṇādhipaiḥ yaḥ kuryāt sa bhavet bhūpaḥ sarva pāpa bhaya apahaḥ atra naktam smṛtam puṇyam ghṛtena snapanam raveḥ agastya kusumāni iha bhānoḥ tuṣṭi karāṇi tu dhūpaḥ tu guggulaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ naivedyam pūpam eva hi dattvā pūpam tu viprasya tatas bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ muhūrta ūnam dinam kecid pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ sa hiraṇyam ca dātavyam brāhmaṇe sa itihāsake dātavyaḥ mantrataḥ ca ayam maṇḍakaḥ grāhyaḥ eva hi kāma dam sukha dam dharmyam dhana dam putra dam tathā sadā astu te pratīcchāmi maṇḍakam bhāskara pripam apūpasya gaṇa śreṣṭha śreyase na atra saṃśayaḥ eṣa nanda vidhiḥ proktaḥ narāṇām śreyase vibho sūrya lokāt cyutaḥ ca asau rājā bhavati bhū tale paṭhatām śṛṇvatām ca idam vidhānam tripurāntakaiḥ dadāti acalam divyam ambujām acalām tathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe nanda vidhi varṇanam nāma dvayaśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tryaśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣaṣṭhyām gaṇa kula śreṣṭha sa bhadraḥ parikīrtay tatra naktam tu yaḥ kuryāt upavāsam atha api vā haṃsa yāna samārūḍhaḥ yāti haṃsa salokatām mālatī kusumāni iha tathā śvetam ca candanam vijayam ca tathā dhūpam naivedyam pāyasam param pūjāyām bhāskarasya iha kuryāt triṣurasūdanam dattvā tu dakṣiṇām śaktyā tatas bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ pāyasam gaṇa śārdūla sa guḍam sarpiṣā saha sarva kāmān avāpnoti putra dāra dhana ādikān eṣa bhadrā vidhiḥ proktaḥ mayā yaḥ te gaṇādhipa śrutvā kṛtvā ca yat pāpāt mucyate mānavaḥ bhuvi iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe bhadravidhivarṇanam nāma tryaśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha caturaśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nakṣatram rohiṇī vīra yadā vāre asya vai bhavet yāti asau saumya tām vīra sa saumyaḥ parikīrtitaḥ snānam dānam japaḥ homaḥ pitṛ deva ādi tarpaṇam naktam samāśritaḥ yaḥ atra pūjayet bhāskaram naraḥ yāti sugandhaḥ ca api dhūpaḥ tu naivedyam pāyasam tathā brāhmaṇāya ca dātavyam bhoktavyam ca ātmanā tathā sa vimuktaḥ tu pāpebhyaḥ tvāṣṭrām kāntim avāpnuyāt iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe saumyavidhivarṇanam nāma caturaśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ prāpte mārgaśire māsi śukla ṣaṣṭhyām tu yaḥ bhavet sa jñeyaḥ kāma daḥ vāraḥ sadā iṣṭaḥ bhāskarasya tu tatra yaḥ pūjayet bhānum bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ raktacandana miśrāṇi karavīrāṇi suvrataiḥ dhūpam ghṛta āhutim vīra bhāskarasya prayojayet naivedyam ca api kṛsaram sugandham tīkṣṇam eva ca kāmān dadāti sarvān vai atoyam kāma daḥ smṛtaḥ vidyā arthine śubhām vidyām ārogyam rogiṇe vibho anyān ca vividhān kāmān mantraiḥ sampūjitaḥ raviḥ dadāti gaṇa śārdūlaiḥ atoyam kāma daḥ smṛtaḥ dadyāt yaḥ maṇḍakam ca atra gopateḥ gotra bhūṣaṇaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe kāma da vidhi varṇanam nāma pañcāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaḍaśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ pañca tāram bhavet yatra nakṣatram te vṛṣadhvajaiḥ madhya tu devadevasya sa vāraḥ putra daḥ smṛtaḥ upavāsaḥ bhavet tatra śrāddham kāryam tathā bhavet prāśanam ca api piṇḍasya madhyamasya prakīrtitam bhūmau svapiti vai vīra japan śvetām mahāmate prātar utthāya ca snānam kṛtvā dattvā arghyam uttamam prapūjya graha bhūta īśam aṃśumantam trilocana vīram ca pūjayitvā tu tatas śrāddham prakalpayet trīn atra brāhmaṇān bhīmān prakalpya andhaka sūdanaiḥ kuryāt evam tatas śrāddham pārvaṇam bhāskara priyam śrāddhe tu atha samāpte tu dadyāt piṇḍam tu madhyamam saḥ eṣa piṇḍaḥ deveśaiḥ yaḥ abhīṣṭaḥ tava sarvadā prasādāt te deveśaḥ iti mama bhāvitam manaḥ dhanam dhānyam hiraṇyam ca ārogyam sukha dam tathā sūrya lokam ca samprāpya tatas rājā bhavet nṛṣu prabhayā dvija saṃkāśaḥ kāntyā ca ambuja saṃnibhaḥ vīryeṇa gopateḥ tulyaḥ gāmbhīrye sāgara upamaḥ dakṣiṇe tu ayane yaḥ syāt sa jayaḥ parikīrtitaḥ atra upavāsaḥ naktam ca snānam dānam japaḥ tathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavāra kalpe jayavāratithivarṇanam nāma adhyāyaḥ atha saptāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vāraḥ devasya yaḥ syāt vai tatra pūjyaḥ divākaraḥ dadāti deva śārdūla snāna dāna ādi karmaṇām ittham sampūjya deveśam kuryāt homam tatas tilaiḥ brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt modakān tila śaṣkulīḥ ittham yaḥ pūjayet bhānum mantreṇa eva gaṇādhipaiḥ snāna dāna japa ādīnām upavāsasya vai vibho iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe jayantavidhivarṇanam nāma tamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śukla pakṣasya saptamyām prājāpatya ṛkṣa saṃyutaḥ tatra koṭi guṇam sarva phalam puṇyasya karmaṇaḥ dadāti bhagavant devaḥ pūjay candanādhipaḥ snānam dānam japaḥ homaḥ pitṛ deva ādi pūjanam kuryāt koṭi guṇam sarvam pūjitaḥ hi atra gopatiḥ tasmāt atra sadā devam pūjayet bhaktimān naraḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe vijayavāra vidhi varṇanam nāma aṣṭāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha navāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tu sa āditya abhimukhaḥ jñeyaḥ śṛṇu ca asya vidhim param kṛtvā eka bhaktam kṛṣṇasya vāre tripurasūdana prātar kṛtvā tatas snānam pūjayitvā divākaram māditya abhimukhaḥ tiṣṭhet yāvat astamanam raveḥ japamānaḥ mahāśvetām lābham āśritya suvrata catur hastam ṛjam ślakṣṇam avraṇam su samam dṛḍham raktacandana vṛkṣasya stambham kṛtvā gaṇādhipaiḥ tam āśritya mahā bhaktyā devadevam divākaram paśyamānaḥ japan śvetām tiṣṭhet astamanāt raveḥ brāhmaṇe dakṣiṇām dattvā tatas bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ ittham etam tu yaḥ kuryāt āditya prītaye naraḥ bhānumant tasya prītaḥ syāt sarvam prītaḥ hi dhanam dhānyam tathā putram ārogyam bhārgavaḥ yaśaḥ tasmāt sampūjayet atra gīrvāṇa adhipatim haraiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe āditya abhimukha vidhi varṇanam nāma navāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ravi saṃkramaṇe yaḥ syāt raveḥ vāraḥ gaṇādhipaiḥ japet āditya hadayam saṃkhyayā aṣṭaśatam budhaḥ atha vā astamanam yāvat bhāskaram ciṃtayet hṛdi yaḥ atra sampūyet bhānum bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ sa kāmān labhate sarvān bhāskarāt hṛdaya sthitān tejasā yaśasā tulyaḥ prabhayā eṣām mahātmanaḥ śakra gopa aṇḍajānām tu gopateḥ govṛṣa īkṣaṇa iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe hṛdayavāra vidhi varṇanam pūṣṇaḥ bhavet yadā ṛkṣam bhavet ca bhaga daivatam arka pattra puṭe kṛtyā puṣpāṇi arkasya suvrataiḥ prāśayitvā arka puṣpam tu dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām bhaktyā ca pāyasam vīra rātrau svapiti bhū tale iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityakalpe rogahara vidhi varṇanam mahāśvetavāra vidhi varṇanam śasyaḥ proktaḥ priyaḥ loke khyātaḥ go śruti bhūṣaṇaḥ sa upavāsaḥ gaṇaśreṣṭhaḥ āditya grahaṇe śuciḥ japamānaḥ mahāśvetām khapoṣam atha vā śivam pūjayet jagatām īśam tamas nāśanam āśu gam pūjayitvā khapoṣam tu mahāśvetām tatas japet pūjayitvā mahāśvetām ravim devam samarcayet mahāśvetām pratiṣṭhāpya gandha puṣpaiḥ su pūjitām tasyāḥ eva bahis kāryam sthaṇḍilam su samāhitaḥ śucau bhūmi vibhāge tu vīram saṃsthāpya yatnatas kuryāt homam tilaiḥ snātaḥ sarpiṣā ca viśeṣataḥ mahāmate mukte dinakare paścāt snānam kṛtvā samāhitaḥ pūjayitvā mahāśvetām khaga ulkam ca grahādhipam brāhmaṇān vācayitvā ca tatas bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ snāna dāna japa ādīnām karmaṇām govṛṣa dhvaja anantam hi phalam teṣām bhavati asmin na saṃśayaḥ kṛtānām tu gaṇa śreṣṭhāḥ bhāskarasya vacaḥ yathā tasmāt dvija gaṇaiḥ kāryam puṇya karma vicakṣaṇaiḥ eka bhaktam ca naktam ca upavāsam gaṇādhipaiḥ dharmyam puṇyam yaśasyam ca putrīyam kāma dam tathā dvādaśā ete mahā bāho vīrabhānoḥ mahātmanaḥ tuṣṭi dāḥ kathitāḥ te sarva pāpa bhaya apahāḥ paṭhatām śṛṇvatām tāta kurvatām ca viśeṣataḥ kṛtvā ekam eṣām vidhivat vāram vṛṣabhavāhana prāpya ca atri jām acalām tathā tatas yāti param lokam vṛṣaketo mahātmanaḥ tejasā ambuja saṃkāśaḥ prabhayā aṇḍaja saṃnibhaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe mahāśvetavāravidhi varṇanam yeṣām dharma kriyāḥ sarvāḥ sadā eva uddiśya bhāskaram na kule jāyate teṣām daridraḥ vyādhitaḥ api vā śvetayā raktayā vā api pīta mṛttikayā api vā pūjayet sa upavāsaḥ tu sa kāmān īpsitān labhet ghṛtena dīpakam jvālya tila tailena vā raveḥ prayāti sūrya lokam sa dīpa koṭi śataiḥ vṛtaḥ dīpa tailam tilāḥ ca eva mahāpātaka nāśanāḥ dīpam dadāti yaḥ nityam bhāskara āyataneṣu vai catuṣpatheṣu tīrtheṣu rūpa ojasvī ha jāyate sa kāmān īpsitān prāpya vṛndāraka puram vrajet yaḥ samālabhate sūryam candana aguru kuṅkumaiḥ karpūreṇa vimiśraiḥ ca tathā kastūrikā anvitaiḥ śubham kālam koṭi śatam vihṛtya ca bhava ālaye punar sañjāyate bhūmau rājarājaḥ na saṃśayaḥ sarva kāma samṛddha ātmā sarva loka namaskṛtaḥ koṭi śatam tu varṣāṇām svarga loke mahīyate padme vasati varṣāṇām strī padma śata saṃvṛtaḥ tad kṣaṇāt sarva pāpebhyaḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ karpūra aguru dhūpena rājasūya phalam labhet pūrvāhṇe mānavaḥ bhaktyā śraddhayā yaḥ arcayet ravim paścimāyām tu saṃdhyāyām yaḥ arcayet bhāskaram naraḥ śuciḥ śukla ambara uṣṇīṣaḥ go sahasra phalam labhet jātismara tvam āpnoti kule jātaḥ vṛṣa anvitaḥ pradoṣa rātri velāyām yaḥ pūjayati bhāskaram sa gatvā sahasā vīra krīḍet saumanasam kṣayam daṇḍanāyaka velāyām prabhāta samaye punar pūjayitvā ravim bhaktyā vrajet animiṣa ālayam evam velāsu sarvāsu avelāsu ca mānavaḥ tu uttare sūryam atha vā dakṣiṇāyane viṣuveṣu uparāgeṣu ṣaḍaśīti mukheṣu ca pūjayitvā ravim bhaktyā na ātmānam śocate naraḥ santuṣṭaḥ bhāskaraḥ tasmai gatim iṣṭām prayacchati tad sarā pāyasa apūpa palala unmiśra modakaiḥ balim kṛtvā tu sūryāya sarva kāmam avāpnuyāt madhu māṃsa rasaiḥ ca api prīyate atīva bhāskaraḥ ghṛtena tarpaṇam kṛtvā sadā snigdhaḥ bhavet naraḥ tarpayitvā tu māṃsena sadyas pāpāt pramucyate kṛtvā gavām kṣīreṇa santarpya puṇḍarīka phalam labhet sūryāya taruṇīm dhenum gām ekām yaḥ prayacchati go śarīre tu romāṇi yāvanti tripurāntakaiḥ labhet ājya dhūmaḥ hi devānām prakṛtyā eva priyaḥ sadā bherī ādīni ca vādyāni śaṅkha veṇu ādikāni ca vimānaiḥ strī śata ākīrṇaiḥ krīḍayitvā ciram naraḥ mānuṣa tvam anuprāpya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ chatram dhvajam vitānam ca patākāḥ cāmarāṇi ca mānena sa divyena kiṅkiṇī jāla mālinā tatra uṣya suciram kālam svargāt pratyāgataḥ punar mānuṣye jāyate rājā sarva rāja namaskṛtaḥ dattvā vāsāṃsi sūryāya alaṅkārān tathā eva ca ābhūtasaṃplavam gīta vāditra nṛtyaiḥ ca kuryāt jāgaraṇam raveḥ gandharva apsarasām madhye krīḍate su ciram naraḥ pāṭhakāḥ cāraṇāḥ ca eva sarve te svarga gāminaḥ kāñcanam vā api raupyam vā maṇi ratna anvitam śubham sa yānena arka varṇena kiṅkiṇī jāla mālinā sa yāti arka savarṇena vimānena arka maṇḍalam yātrām kurvanti ye bhānoḥ narāḥ saṃvatsarāt api bhava māsāt vā gaṇa śreṣṭha teṣām puṇya phalam śṛṇu tām gatim pratipadyante sūrya vartma avagāhinaḥ arogāḥ ca adaridrāḥ ca jātau jātau bhavanti te hartāraḥ ratha yātrāyāḥ ye narāḥ bhāskarasya tu yātrā bhaṅgam tu yaḥ mohāt krodhāt vā kurute naraḥ mandehāḥ te narāḥ jñeyāḥ rākṣasāḥ pāpa kāriṇaḥ dhanam dhānyam hiraṇyam vā vāsāṃsi vividhāni ca gāḥ vā atha mahiṣīḥ vā api gajān aśvān ca śobhanān prayacchati sūryāya tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu tat tat sarvakāmīyam aśvamedha phalam labhet mahīm dadāti yaḥ arkāya kṛṣṭām phalavatī śubhām sa tārayati vai vaṃśyān daśa pūrvān daśa aparān krīḍati apsarasām madhye karī iva kariṇī gaṇe grāmam dadāti yaḥ bhaktyā sūryāya matimān naraḥ sa yāti paramām gatim mānasam vācikam vā api karma jam yat ca duṣkṛtam sarvam sūrya prasādena aśeṣam ca praṇaśyati ārtaḥ vā vyādhitaḥ vā api daridraḥ duḥkhitaḥ api vā mad ādityam śaraṇam gatvā na ātmānam śocate naraḥ eka ahena api yat bhānoḥ pūjāyāḥ prāpyate phalam kṛtvā prekṣaṇakam bhānoḥ divyam āyatane śubham akṣayam sarvakāmīyam rājasūya phalam labhet veśyā kadambakam yaḥ tu dadyāt sūryāya bhaktyāḥ sa gacchet paramam sthānam yatra tiṣṭhati bhānumant pustakam bhānave dadyāt bhāratasya gaṇādhipaiḥ sarva pāpa vimukta ātmā viṣṇu loke mahīyate rāmāyaṇasya da tvā tu pustakam tripurāntakaiḥ bhaviṣyam sāmba saṃjñam vā dattvā sūryāya pustakam rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām phalam prāpnoti mānavaḥ sarvān kāmān avāpnoti yāti sūrya salokatām sthitvā kalpa śatam tatra rājā bhavati bhū tale bhānoḥ āyatane yaḥ tu prapām kuryāt gaṇādhipaiḥ sa yāti paramam sthānam divyam saumanasam naraḥ śīta kāle ghanam dadyāt narāṇām śīta nāśanam itihāsa purāṇābhyām puṇyam pustaka vācanam itihāsa purāṇābhyām bhānoḥ āyatane śubham na anyat puṣṭi karam bhānoḥ tathā tuṣṭi karam param puṇya ākhyāna kathāḥ yāḥ tu yathā tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe bhānu mahima varṇanam atra ākhyānam uśanti iha saṃvādam gaṇa puṃgavaiḥ pitāmaha kumārābhyām puṇyam pāpa haram śivam sraṣṭāram sarva lokānām sukha āsīnam pitāmaham praṇamya śirasā devam śraddhā bhakti samanvitaḥ kumāraḥ deva śārdūlaḥ idam vacanam abravīt kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam devaḥ saḥ mayā pūjitaḥ raviḥ praṇamya śirasā bhaktyā parayā śraddhayā vibho anujñātaḥ tatas tena sukha āsīnaḥ hi aham sthitaḥ mayā tatra dṛṣṭam āścaryam adbhutam kāñcanena vimānena kiṅkiṇī jāla mālinā āgatam puruṣam tatra dṛṣṭvā devaḥ divākaraḥ gṛhītvā dakṣiṇe pāṇau puratas prāpya tam naram śirasi āghrāya deveśaiḥ pūjayāmāsa vai raviḥ upaviṣṭam tu tam bhānuḥ idam vacanam abravīt susvāgatam bhadra sukha kṛtā prītāḥ tvayā vayam samīpe mama tiṣṭha tvam yāvat ābhūtasaṃplavam āgataḥ puruṣaḥ devaḥ yatra tiṣṭhati bhāskaraḥ sa ca api evam naraḥ deva pūjitaḥ bhānunā tadā sāma pūrvam tathā uktaḥ tu praśraya avanataḥ sthitaḥ tatra me kautukam jātam dṛṣṭvā pūjām kṛtām tayoḥ bhānunā deva śārdūlaiḥ pṛṣṭaḥ bhānuḥ mayā tatas kim anena kṛtam deva yaḥ ayam pūrvam iha āgataḥ naraḥ tatra sakāśam vai yasya tuṣṭaḥ atra mama kautukam jātam vismayaḥ ca viśeṣataḥ tathā eva asya kṛtā pūjā dvitīyasya narasya ca brahma viṣṇu śiva ādyaiḥ tu pūjyate bhagavant sadā yaḥ tvam ābhyām param pūjām kṛtavan deva sattama yasya īdṛś paramam puṇyam phalam divyam avāpatuḥ uvāca sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi bhavatā karmaṇaḥ nirṇayam param yaḥ asau sūryam iha āyātaḥ tat śṛṇuṣva mahāmate mad aṃśa sambhūtaiḥ pārthivaiḥ pālitā sadā ayodhyā nāma nagarī prakhyātā pṛthivī tale tatra asau vaiśya jātīyaḥ dhanapālaḥ iti smṛtaḥ tasyāḥ puryām dvijaśreṣṭha divyam āyatanam vyadhāt tasmin āyatane divye hi āmnāya artham tathā āśritaḥ brāhmaṇānām viśiṣṭānām kadambakam itihāsa purāṇābhyām vācakam ca viśeṣataḥ pūjayitvā dvijaśreṣṭham muni śreṣṭham mahā munim pustakam ca api sampūjya gandha puṣpa upahārāt eṣa tiṣṭhati deveśaḥ sahasrakiraṇaḥ raviḥ cāturvarṇyam idam vā api śrotu kāmam kadambakam tiṣṭha ca iha dvijaśreṣṭha kuru pustakavācanam svarṇa niṣka śatam vipraiḥ tatas dāsye tathā aparam pūrṇe varṣe dvijaśreṣṭha śreyaḥ artham aham ātmanaḥ ṣaṣ māsa āgata mātre tu kāle suravara uttama tathā eva antarataḥ ca ayam kāladharmam upeyivāḥ mayā ca asya vimānam tu preṣitam kurvataḥ vratam iti eṣā karmaṇaḥ tuṣṭiḥ puṇya ākhyānaka ja arcitā prītiḥ deva vara śreṣṭha purāṇa śravaṇe yathā go suvarṇa hiraṇyānām vastrāṇām ca api kṛtsnaśas grāmāṇām nagarāṇām ca dānam prīti karam mama na tathā syāt suraśreṣṭha yathā prīti karam guha itihāsa purāṇābhyām śravaṇam sura sainyapaiḥ puṇya ākhyānāt ṛte deva guhyam etat prakītitam ekadā tu gataḥ ca ayam dharma śravaṇam uttamam śrotum bhaktyā d dvijaśreṣṭha śraddhayā parayā vṛtaḥ kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam tasya vācakasya mahātmanaḥ eṣa vipraḥ amara śreṣṭhaiḥ dattavan svarṇa māṣakam dattvā tu dakṣiṇām tasmai vācakāya amita ojase ānandam agamat vipraḥ prāptavan kāñcanam yathā yat anena kṛtā pūjā vācakasya mahātmanaḥ tena aham pūjitaḥ syām vai kaḥ viṣṇuḥ śaṃkaraḥ tathā tena aham pūjitaḥ syām vai daśa varṣāṇi pañca ca tapatī na tathā anviṣṭā yathā iṣṭaḥ vācakaḥ mama kṛtsnaśas devatānām ca indra ādīnām tathā bhavet brahma viṣṇu śiva ādīnām sa ca iṣṭhaḥ vācakaḥ mama prīte tasmin devatāḥ syuḥ sarvāḥ prītāḥ na saṃśayaḥ etat dṛṣṭvā aham āścaryam te abhyāśam iha āgataḥ śrutvā kumāra vacanam sarva loka pitāmahaḥ yad dṛṣṭau bhavatā tau hi su puṇyau puṇya kāriṇaḥ tasmāt etāni sarvāṇi nirgatāni samantataḥ itihāsa purāṇāni lokānām hita kāmyayā yathā etāni mama iṣṭāni purāṇāni mahāmate śṛṇvanti etāni ye bhaktyā nityam śraddhā samanvitāḥ dharma artha kāma mokṣāṇām spaṣṭīkaraṇam uttamam itihāsa purāṇāni mayā sṛṣṭāni suvrata catvāraḥ ye ime vedāḥ gūḍha arthāḥ satatam smṛtāḥ atas tu etāni sṛṣṭāni bodhāya eṣām mahāmate ādityāt bhāskaram prāpya yāti tat paramam padam dattvā tu dakṣiṇām tatra ādityasya puram vrajet kim āścaryam suraśreṣṭhaiḥ dāna pātram hi tat param brāhmaṇānām tathā śreṣṭhaḥ vācakaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ hetiḥ yathā tejasām tu sarasām sāgaraḥ yathā pūjitam sakalam tena jagatyāt na atra saṃśayaḥ tat śrutvā brahmanaḥ vākyam kumāraḥ vākyam abravīt aho hi dhanya tā tasya puṇya śravaṇa kāriṇaḥ dānam ca dadataḥ atyartham puṇya tā vācakāya vai kuryāt tu dharma śravaṇam sa yāti paramām gatim iti śrī bhaviṣya mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe puṇya śravaṇa māhātmya varṇanam varṇanam tribhiḥ pradakṣiṇām kṛtvā yaḥ namaskurute ravim bhūmau gatena śirasā sa yāti paramām gatim sa yāti narakam ghoram tāmisram nāma nāmnaḥ śleṣma mūtra purīṣāṇi samutsṛjati yaḥ tu vai snapana artham tu devasya ye dadati iha mānavāḥ sarva kāmān avāpya iha te yānti heli maṇḍalam snāpyamānam ravim bhaktyā ye paśyanti vṛṣadhvajaiḥ te aśvamedha phalam prāpya layam yānti vṛṣadhvaje labhante tat phalam bhīma rājasūya aśvamedhayoḥ tāmisram narakam yāti laṅghayet ca sa rauravān ghṛtena snāpayet devam kañjam āpnoti mānavaḥ ikṣu raseṇa saṃsnāpya payasā kañjaśadhvajam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhmeparvaṇi saptamīkalpe ādityālaya māhātmya varṇanam atha ṣaṇṇanavatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ma jaya anāmasaptamī varṇanam uvāca tāsām yā prathamā deva kathay sā sa vistara yāḥ tu anyāḥ deva śārdūlaiḥ tāḥ sarvāḥ kathayasva mama śuklapakṣasya saptamyām nakṣatram pañcatārakam yadā syāt sā tadā jñeyā jayā nāma iti saptamī tasyām dattām hutam jāpaḥ tarpaṇam deva pūjanam sarvam śataguṇam proktam pūjā ca api divākare bhāskarasya priyā hi eṣā saptamī pāpa nāśinī dhanyā yaśasyā putryā ca kāma dā kañjaja āvahā tam śṛṇuṣva vidhim mattaḥ yena kṛtvā artham aśnumate haṃse haṃsa mākye śuklā iyam saptamī purā tṛtīyā ahe syāt kathitam govṛṣa āvaham prathamam caturaḥ māsān pāraṇam kathitam budhaiḥ candanam ca tathā raktam dhūpa artham guggulam param kāsāram tu supakvam ca naivedyam bhāskarāya vai anena vidhinā pūjya mārtaṇḍam vibudha adhipam pūjayet brāhmaṇān bhīmaiḥ bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ yathāvidhi yad bhojayet viprān pāraṇe asmin vicakṣaṇaḥ svayam eva tathā aśnīyāt prayataḥ maunam āśritaḥ pañcamyām eka bhaktam tu ṣaṣṭhyām naktam pravartate kṛtvā upavāsam saptamyām aṣṭamyām pāraṇam bhavet tayā ṣaṣṭhyā sametā kartavyā na aṣṭamyā iyam kadācana yasya upavāsanāya eva ṣaṣṭhyām āhuḥ upoṣitam yathā ekādaśyām kurvanti upavāsam manīṣiṇaḥ upavāsanāya dvādaśyām tathā iyam parikīrtitā siddhārthakaiḥ snāna mantraḥ prāśanam gomayasya tu bhānuḥ mama prīyatām atra dantakāṣṭham tathā arka jam dvitīyam śrūyatām bhīma pāraṇam gadataḥ mama mālatī kusumāni iha śrīkhaṇḍam candanam tathā naivedyam pāyasam bhānoḥ dhūpam vijayam ādiśet brāhmaṇān bhojayet vā api tathā aśnīyāt svayam vibho dvitīye pāraṇe vīraiḥ vidhiḥ uktaḥ mayā adhunā tṛtīyam pāraṇam ca api kathyamānam nibodha mama samālambhanam atra uktam śrīkhaṇḍam kusumam tathā sihlakaḥ dhūpaḥ uddiṣṭaḥ bhānoḥ prīti karaḥ paraḥ śālyodanam tu naivedyam rasāla upari saṃyutam brāhmaṇānām tu dātavyam bhakṣayeta tathā ātmanā tu badaryāḥ dantadhāvanam prīyatām mama nāma devasya kīrtayet gandha puṣpa upahāraiḥ tu nānā prekṣaṇakaiḥ tathā go dānaiḥ bhūmi dānaiḥ vā brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ kṛtā iyam devadeveśa jayā nāma iti saptamī mayā te prasādena dhanyā pāpa harā śivā anena vidhinā vīraiḥ yaḥ kuryāt saptamīm imām kṛtvā imām saptamīm vīra puruṣaḥ prāpnuyāt yaśaḥ dhanam dhānyam suvarṇam ca putram ārya balam śriyam prāpya iha deva śārdūlaiḥ sūrya lokam sa gacchati iti eṣā kathitā vīra jayā nāma iti saptamī kṛtā smṛtā śrutā sā tu heli loka pradāyinī iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe jayānāmasaptamīmāhātmyavarṇanam nāma ṣaṇṇavatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ jayantī nāma tā proktā puṇyā pāpa harā śivā sā upoṣyā yena vidhinā śṛṇu tam pārvatīpriya pāraṇāni tu catvāri kathitāni atra paṇḍitaiḥ pañcamyām eka bhaktam tu ṣaṣṭhyām naktam prakīrtitam upavāsaḥ tu saptamyām aṣṭamyām pāraṇam bhavet baka puṣpāṇi ramyāṇi kuṅkumam ca vilepanam naivedyam modakān ca atra dhūpaḥ ājyam udāhṛtaḥ prāśanam pañcagavyam tu pavitrīkaraṇam param śālyodanam ca bhūteśa dadyāt śaktyā dvijeṣu vai dvitīye pāraṇe pūjya rājasūya phalam labhet pūjā artham atha bhānoḥ vai śata pattrāṇi suvrataiḥ naivedyam guḍa pūpāḥ tu prāśanam gomayasya tu bhojane ca api viprāṇām guḍa pūpāḥ prakīrtitāḥ dvitīyam idam ākhyātam pāraṇam pāpa nāśanam rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām phala dam bhāskara priyam tṛtīyam śṛṇu devasya pūjā arthe bhāskarasya tu māsi bhādrapade vīra tathā ca āśvayuje vibho mālatī kusumāni iha dhūpaḥ vijayaḥ ucyate kuśa udaka prāśanam tu kāya śuddhi karam param tṛtīyam api ca ākhyātam pāraṇam pāpa nāśanam rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām phala dam bhāskara priyam caturtham api te vacmi pāraṇam pāpa nāśanam rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām phala dam bhāskara priyam tat adya deva śārdūlaiḥ pāraṇam śreyase śṛṇu māsi mārgaśire vīra pauṣe māsi tathā śiva māghe ca deva śārdūlaiḥ śṛṇu puṇyāni aśeṣatas karavīrāṇi raktāni tathā raktam ca candanam amṛta ākhyaḥ tathā dhūpaḥ naivedyam pāyasam param mārjanīyam tathā takram prāśanam paramam smṛtam agarum candanam mustam silhakam tryūṣaṇam tathā nāmāni kathitāni atra bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ prīyatām iti sarvasmin pāraṇe vidhim ādiśet anena vidhinā yaḥ tu kuryāt pūjām vibhāvasoḥ kṛtvā evam saptamīm bhīma sarva kāmān avāpnute pūrṇe saṃvatsare bhīma kāryā pūjā divākare gandha puṣpa upahāraiḥ tu brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ pūjayā vācakasya tu ittham sampūjya deveśam brāhmaṇān ca abhipūjya ca ca pūjya idam vākyam udīrayet dharma kāryeṣu mama deva artha kāryeṣu nityaśas sarva pāpa viśuddha ātmā sūrya lokam sa gacchati tejasā ravi saṃkāśaḥ prabhayā pataga upamaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe jayantī kalpa varṇanam atha aṣṭanavatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam māsi bhādrapade śuklā saptamī yā gaṇādhipa aparājitā iti vikhyātā mahāpātaka nāśinī caturthyām eka bhaktam tu pañcamyām naktam ādiśet upavāsam tathā ṣaṣṭhyām saptamyām pāraṇam smṛtam pāraṇāni atra catvāri kathitāni manīṣibhiḥ puṣpāṇi karavīrasya tathā raktam ca candanam dhūpa kriyā guggulena naivedyam guḍa pūpakāḥ bhādrapada ādi māseṣu vidhiḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ śvetāni bhīma puṣpāṇi tathā śvetam ca candanam dhūpam ājyam iha ākhyātam naivadyam pāyasam raveḥ mārgaśīrṣa ādi māseṣu vidhiḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ śālyodanam ca naivedyam sarasam phālguna ādiṣu rakta utpalāni bhūteśaiḥ sa agurum candanam tathā anantaḥ dhūpaḥ uddiṣṭaḥ naivedyam khaṇḍapūpakāḥ māṃsa granthi sahitam aguruḥ silhakam tathā mustā tathā indram bhūteśa śarkarā gṛhyate tri aham śṛṇu nāmāni devasya prāśanāni ca suvrata sudhāṃśuḥ aryamā ca eva savitā tripurāntakaḥ pāraṇeṣu eva sarveṣu prīyatām iti kīrtayet go mūtram pañcagavyam tu ghṛtam ca uṣṇam payaḥ dadhi mad api trivargam na atra saṃśayaḥ tatas pūrṇeṣu māseṣu pūjayet śaktitas khagam gandha puṣpa upahāraiḥ tu purāṇa śravaṇena ca aśva dānena ca vibhoḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ vācakam pūjayitvā ca bhāskarasya priyam sadā bhāskarāya dhvajān dadyāt nānā ratna vibhūṣitān yaḥ ittham kurute vīra saptamīm yatnatas sadā sa parājitya vai śatrum yāti haṃsa salokatām śuklāśva udbhava yānena āpagena patākinā āpagā adhipa saṃkāśaḥ āpagā anucaraḥ bhavet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe aparājitā varṇanam nāma aṣṭanavatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śukla pakṣe tu saptamyām yadā saṃkramate raviḥ mahā jayā tadā sā vai saptamā bhāskarapriyā snānam dānam japaḥ homaḥ pitṛ deva abhipūjanam sarvam koṭi guṇam proktam bhāskarasya vacaḥ yathā kārpūreṇa vimānena kiṅkiṇī jāla mālinī tejasā hari saṃkāśaḥ kāntyā sūrya samaḥ tathā sthitvā tatra ciram kālam rājā bhavati ca añjasā mahā jaya eṣā kathitā saptamī tripurāntakaiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe mahājayākalpa varṇanam nāma ekonaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ yad anāman saptamī varṇanam mārgaśire māsi śukla pakṣe tu saptamī nandā sā kathitā vīraiḥ sarva ānanda karā śubhā pañcamyām eka bhaktam tu ṣaṣṭhyām naktam prakīrtitam saptamyām upavāsam tu kīrtayanti manīṣiṇaḥ pāraṇāni atra vai trīṇi śaṃsanti iha manīṣiṇaḥ mālatī kusumāni iha sugandham candanam tathā karpūra agaru sammiśram dhūpam ca atra vinirdiśet dhūpa artham bhāskarasya eṣa prathame pāraṇe vidhiḥ palāśa puṣpāṇi vibho dhūpaḥ yaḥ śakyaḥ eva ca pūram candanam kuṣṭham aguruḥ silhakam tathā sa granthi vṛṣaṇam bhīmaiḥ kuṅkumam gṛñjanam tathā harītakī tathā bhīmaḥ eṣa pakṣakaḥ ucyate dhūpaḥ prabodhaḥ ādiṣṭaḥ naivedyam khaṇḍa maṇḍakāḥ kṛṣṇa agaruḥ sitam kañjam bālakam vṛṣaṇam tathā candanam tagaraḥ mustā prabodhaśarkarā anvitā bhojayet brāhmaṇān ca api khaṇḍa khādyaiḥ gaṇādhipaiḥ nimba pattram tu samprāśya tatas bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ pāraṇasya dvitīyasya vidhiḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ nīlotpalāni śubhrāṇi dhūpam gauggulam āharet śṛṇu nāmāni devasya pāvanāni nṛṇām sadā viṣṇuḥ bhagaḥ tathā dhātā prīyatām udgiret ca vai sa kāmān iha samprāpya nandate śāśvatī samāḥ eṣā tu nanda jananī tava ākhyātā bhayā śiva iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe nandānāmasaptamīvarṇanam nāma śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kṣīreṇa ca tathā vīra punar ikṣu raseṇa ca nivapan yat asya śṛṅgam īśānam tatra vai mauktikam nyaset yat āgneyam tatra māṇikyam nyaset vā lohitam maṇim nairṛtye makaram dadyāt vāyavye padmarāgiṇam caturthyām eka bhaktam tu pañcamyām naktam ādiśet madhya a yācitam proktam upavāsaḥ hi atas paraḥ pāṣaṇḍinaḥ vikarma sthān baiḍālavratika antyajān saptamyām pālayet prājñaḥ divā svāpam vivarjayet tasmai bhadrāṇi sarvāṇi yacchanti ṛbhavaḥ sadā bhadram āsādya bhūteśa sadā bhadreṇa tiṣṭhati uvāca yaḥ ayam bhadraḥ iti proktaḥ katham kāryam prabhūṣaṇam dattvā ca kim phalam vidyāt vidhinā kena dīyate śāli piṇḍa mayam kāryam catuṣkoṇam anūpamam gavyena sarpiṣā yuktam khaṇḍaśarkarayā anvitam cāturjātaka pūrṇam tu drākṣābhiḥ ca viśeṣataḥ puṣparāgam marakatam padmarāgam tathā eva ca anaupamyam ca māṇikyam kramāt koṇeṣu vinyaset vācakāya atha vā dadyāt atha vā bhojake svayam brahma lokam tatas gacchet yāna ārūḍhaḥ na saṃśayaḥ tejasā goja saṃkāśaḥ kāntyā goja samaḥ tathā tasmāt etya punar bhūmau gopatiḥ syāt na saṃśayaḥ prasādāt gopateḥ vīra sarvajña adhipa pūjitaḥ iti eṣā kathitā bhīma bhadrā nāma iti saptamā śṛṇvanti ye paṭhanti iha kurvanti ca gaṇādhipa iti uktavan purā brahmā diṇḍine saptamīvratam mayā api uktam te vibho yathā jñātam yathāśrutam gṛhītvā saptamīkalpam mānavaḥ yaḥ tu bhū tale tyajet kāmāt bhayāt vā api saḥ jñeyaḥ patitaḥ abudhaḥ tyajamānaḥ bhavet vīraḥ ārūḍhapatitaḥ naraḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe bhadrā kalpa varṇanam nāma eka adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nakṣatra pūjā vidhi varṇanam yathā bahūnām bhāryāṇām bhartuḥ kācid priyā bhavet tasmāt asyām nareṇa iha pūjanīyaḥ divākaraḥ uvāca tithīnām adhipaḥ sūryaḥ sarvāsām kathitaḥ yadi purā pṛṣṭaḥ surajyeṣṭhaḥ divi sthitaḥ viṣṇunā kuru śārdūla tena uktam haraye yathā tathā te sarvam ākhyāsye śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ vibho sukha āsīnam surajyeṣṭham purā devam pitāmaham praṇamya śirasā deva kṛṣṇaḥ vacanam abravīt yadi eṣa bhānumant devaḥ tithīnām adhipaḥ smṛtaḥ evam uktaḥ surajyeṣṭhaḥ viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā muktvā ekām saptamīm sarvām samyak ārādhanena vai uvāca tṛtīyā yakṣarājāya gaṇeśāya caturthī api pañcamī nāga rājāya kārttikeyāya ṣaṣṭhī api saptamī sthāpitā ātma artham dattā rudrāya ca aṣṭamī durgāyai navamī dattā yamāya daśamī svayam viśvebhyaḥ ca atha devebhyaḥ dattā ca ekādaśī sadā dvādaśī viṣṇave dattā madanāya trayodaśī caturdaśī śaṃkarāya dattā somāya pūrṇimā pitṝṇām bhānunā dattā puṇyā pañcadaśī sadā tithyaḥ pañcadaśa etāḥ tu somasya parikīrtitāḥ pīyate kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu suraiḥ ebhiḥ yathā uditaiḥ śukla pakṣe prapūryante ṣoḍaśyā kalayā saha akṣayā sā sadā ekaikā tatra sākṣāt sthitaḥ raviḥ hi evam tena asau tad patiḥ smṛtaḥ dadāti gatim akṣīṇā dhyāna mātra sthitaḥ raviḥ anye pi iṣṭān yathākāmān prayacchanti sukhena vai tathā sarvam pravakṣyāmi kṛṣṇa saṃkṣepāt śṛṇu agnim iṣṭvā ca hutvā ca pratipadi amṛtam ghṛtam haviṣā sarva dhānyāni prāpnuyāt amitam dhanam brahmāṇam ca dvitīyāyām sampūjya brahmacāriṇam bhojayitvā ca vidyānām sarvāsām pāragaḥ bhavet tṛtīyāyām ca vitteśam vitta āḍhyaḥ jāyate dhruvam gaṇeśa pūjanam kuryāt caturthyām sarva karmasu avighnam vidviṣām vighnam kuryāt ca asya na saṃśayaḥ nāgān iṣṭvā ca pañcamyām na viṣaiḥ abhibhūyate striyam ca labhate putrān parām ca śriyam āpnuyāt sampūjya kārttikeyam tu ṣaṣṭhyām śreṣṭhaḥ prajāyate medhāvī rūpa sampannaḥ dīrgha āyūḥ kīrti vardhanaḥ saptamyām pūjya rakṣa īśam citrabhānum divākaram aṣṭamyām pūjitaḥ devaḥ govṛṣa ābharaṇaḥ haraḥ jñānam dadāti vipulam kāntim ca vipulām tathā mṛtyu hā jñāna daḥ ca eva pāśa hā ca prapūjitaḥ durgām sampūjya durgāṇi navamyām tarati icchayā daśamyām yamam ātiṣṭhet sarva vyādhi haraḥ dhruvam ekādaśyām yathā uddiṣṭāḥ viśvedevāḥ prapūjitāḥ prajām paśum dhanam dhānyam prayacchanti mahīm tathā dvādaśyām viṣṇum iṣṭvā iha sarvadā vijayī bhavet pūjyaḥ ca sarva lokānām yathā gopati gokaraḥ trayodaśyām surūpaḥ jāyate dhruvam iṣṭām rūpavatīm bhāryām labhet kāmān ca puṣkalān dṛṣṭvā īśvaram caturdaśyām sarva aiśvarya samanvitaḥ paurṇamāsyām tu yaḥ somam pūjayet bhaktimān naraḥ pitaraḥ sva dine diṇḍe dṛṣṭāḥ kurvanti sarvadā prajā vṛddhim dhanam rakṣām ca āyuṣyam balam eva ca pūjayā japa homaiḥ ca toṣitā bhaktyāḥ sadā mūlamantraiḥ ca saṃjñābhiḥ aṃśamantraiḥ ca kīrtitāḥ pūrvavat padma madhya sthāḥ karttavyāḥ ca tithi īśvarāḥ gandha puṣpa upahāraiḥ ca yathā śaktyā vidhīyate pūjā bāhyena vidhinā kṛtā api ca phala pradā mājya dhārā samidbhiḥ ca dadhi kṣīra anna mākṣikaiḥ mūlamantrāḥ ca saṃjñābhiḥ aṅgamantrāḥ ca kīrtitāḥ kṛtvā yajñān daśa dvau ca phalāni etāni bhaktyāḥ teṣām lokeṣu mantra jñaḥ yāvat teṣām tithiḥ sthitā dahet tasmāt tathā ariṣṭam tad rūpaḥ jāyate naraḥ strī vā napuṃsakaḥ vā api jāyate puruṣa uttamaḥ iti etāḥ kathitāḥ kṛṣṇaiḥ tithayaḥ yāḥ mayā te nakṣatra devatāḥ sarvāḥ nakṣatreṣu vyavasthitāḥ iṣṭān kāmān prayacchanti yāḥ tāḥ vakṣye mahīdhara candramāḥ yatra nakṣatre mahā vṛddhyā sthitaḥ sadā devatāḥ ca pravakṣyāmi nakṣatrāṇām yathākramam nakṣatrāṇi ca sarvāṇi yajñāḥ ca eva pṛthak pṛthak aśvinyām aśvinaḥ iṣṭvā dīrgha āyūḥ jāyate naraḥ bharaṇyām yamaḥ uddiṣṭaḥ kusumaiḥ asitaiḥ śubhaiḥ analaḥ kṛttikāyām tu iha sampūjitaḥ paraḥ pūjyaḥ prajāpatiḥ prītaḥ iṣṭaḥ dadyāt paśūn tathā rohiṇyām deva śārdūla pūjanāt iha gopate mṛgaśīrṣe sadā somaḥ jñānam ārogyam eva ca mārdrāyām tu śivam pūjya paścāt dvijaiḥ yam āpnuyāt padma ādibhiḥ sa divyaiḥ ca pūjitaḥ śam prayacchati gurūṇām tarpitā ca eva mātā iva parirakṣati puṣye bṛhaspatiḥ buddhim dadāti vipulām śubhām gītaiḥ gandha ādibhiḥ nāgāḥ āśleṣāyām prapūjitāḥ tarpitāḥ ca yathānyāyam bhakṣya ādyaiḥ madhuraiḥ sitaiḥ rakṣā āmiṣa ādibhiḥ taiḥ taiḥ prītim kurvanti mānadaiḥ maghāsu pitaraḥ sarve havyaiḥ kavyaiḥ ca pūjitāḥ prayacchanti dhanam dhānyam bhṛtyān putrān paśūn tathā phālgunyām atha vai pūṣā iṣṭaḥ puṣpa ādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ pūrvāyām vijayam dadyāt uttarāyām bhagam tathā bhartāram īpsitam dadyāt kanyāyai puruṣāya tām pūjitaḥ savitā haste viśva tejaḥ nidhiḥ sadā rājyam tu tvaṣṭā citrāyām niḥsapatnam prayacchati prītaḥ svātau vāyuḥ balam param indra agnī ca viśākhāyām jāta raktaiḥ prapūjya ca śriyaḥ bhajanti sarveṣām ciram jīvanti sarvadā jyeṣṭhāyām pūrvavat śakram iṣṭvā puṣṭim avāpnuyāt guṇaiḥ jyeṣṭhaḥ ca sarveṣām karmaṇā ca dhanena ca pūrvāṣāḍhe hi apaḥ pūjya hutvā tatra eva pūrvavat saṃtāpāt mucyate kṣipram śārīrāt mānasāt tathā paurṇamāsīṣu tathā viśva an uttarāṣāḍha yogāt śravaṇe tu sitaiḥ viṣṇum pītaiḥ nīlaiḥ ca bhaktyāḥ dhaniṣṭhāsu vasūn iṣṭvā na bhayam bhajate kvacid indram śatabhiṣāyām ca vyādhibhiḥ mucyate dhruvam āturaḥ puṣṭim āpnoti svāsthyam aiśvaryam eva ca ajam bhādrapadāyām tu śuddha sphaṭika saṃnibham uttarāyām ahirbudhnyam parām śāntim avāpnuyāt revatyām pūjitaḥ pūṣā dadāti satatam śubham te eva ete samākhyātāḥ yajñāḥ saṃkṣepāt mayā nakṣatra devatānām ca sādhakānām hitāya vai bhaktyā vitta anusāreṇa bhavanti phala dāḥ sadā nakṣatra devatā yajñam kṛtvā tat sarvam ācaret evam kṛte hi tat sarvam yātrā phalam avāpnuyāt ca yajñāt sa vijayam kuryāt kriyām kuryāt yathepsitām hari cakre atha vā sūryam rāśi cakre kalā ātmanā vibhūtiḥ eṣā ca uddiṣṭā kriyābhiḥ sādhyate dhruvam bhānoḥ ārādhanāt vā api prāpyate muktiḥ eva hi tasmāt ārādhaya ravim bhaktyā tvam madhusūdanaiḥ mahā brahman ijyā pūjā namaskāra śuśrūṣābhiḥ aharniśam vrata upavāsaiḥ vividhaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ yaḥ kārayati deva arcām hadaya ālambanam raveḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe nakṣatra pūjā vidhi varṇanam varṇanam yaḥ ca devālayam bhaktyā bhānoḥ kārayate sthiram sa sapta puruṣān lokān bhānoḥ nayati mānavaḥ yāvanti abdāni deva arcā raveḥ tiṣṭhati mandire deva arcā lakṣaṇa upetā yat gṛhe santataḥ vidhiḥ niṣkāmam vā manaḥ yasya saḥ yāti ravi sāmyatām puṣpāṇi ati sugandhīni manojñāni ca yaḥ pumān dhūpān ca vividhān tān tān gandha āḍhyam ca anulepanam dīpa bali upahārāḥ ca yat ca abhīṣṭam atha ātmanaḥ naraḥ saḥ anudinam yajñāt prāpnoti ārādhana ādrave bahu upakaraṇāḥ yajñāḥ nānā sambhāra vistarāḥ bhaktyā tu puruṣaiḥ pūjā kṛtā dūrvā aṅkuraiḥ api yāni puṣpāṇi bhakṣyāṇi dhūpa gandha anulepanam dayitam bhūṣaṇam yat ca raktake ca eva vāsasī yāni ca abhyupahārāṇi bhakṣyāṇi ca phalāni ca ādyam tam yajñapuruṣam yathāśaktyā prasādaya ārādhya sthāpitam devam tasmin eva nara ālaye kṣīreṇa snāpayet devam citrabhānum divākaram prayāsyati yaduśreṣṭha nirvṛtim vā api śāśvatām stotraiḥ gītaiḥ tathā vādyaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ manasaḥ ca eka tā yogāt ārādhaya vibhāvasum ārādhya tam videhānām puruṣāḥ saptasaptatiḥ mad as as ca pañcāśat amṛta tvam samāgatāḥ santoṣaya hi tuṣṭaḥ asau bhānuḥ bhavati śānti daḥ yat yat yat yat upavāsaiḥ citrabhānuḥ katham tuṣṭaḥ prajāyate paricaryā katham kāryā yā kāryā ca upavāsinā yat yat kāryam yadā ca eva bhānoḥ ārādhanam naraiḥ smṛtaḥ sampūjitaḥ dhūpa puṣpa ādyaiḥ sa sadā raviḥ bhoginām upakārāya kim punar ca upavāsinām upāvṛttaḥ tu pāpebhyaḥ yaḥ tu vāsaḥ guṇaiḥ saha hare upavāsī ravim yaḥ tu bhaktyā dhyāyati mānavaḥ niṣkāmaḥ pūjayitvā tam param brahma adhigacchati yaḥ ca kāmam abhidhyāya bhāskara arpita mānasaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ vaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ strībhiḥ tathā vibho atha ārādhya jagannātham bhāskaram timira apaham viṣaya agrāha vaiṣamyam na cittam bhāskara arpaṇam tat ārādhaya sarva īśam graheśam loka pūjitam tat ārādhaya kāla īśam yat ca iṣṭam te cetasā puṣpāṇi yadi tena syuḥ śastam pādapa pallavaiḥ dūrvā aṅkuraiḥ api kṛṣṇa tad abhāve arcayet ravim pūjitaḥ tuṣṭim atulām bhaktyā yāti ekacetasām yaḥ sat āyatane bhānoḥ kuryāt sammārjanam naraḥ sa pāṃsu deha saṃyogāt sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate yāvatyaḥ pāṃsu kaṇikāḥ mārjyante bhāskara ālaye sa bāhya abhyantaram veśma mārjate bhāskarasya yaḥ yaḥ ca anulepanam kuryāt bhānoḥ āyatane naraḥ mṛdā vā mṛd vikāraiḥ vā varṇakaiḥ gomayena vā udaka abhyukṣaṇam bhānoḥ yaḥ karoti tathā akṣaye sa gacchati naraḥ kṛṣṇaiḥ yatra āste gopatiḥ sadā samprāpnoti naraḥ dattvā dīpakam bhāskara ālaye pāpam dātuḥ gṛhe bhānuḥ divārātrau na saṃśayaḥ gīta vādya ādirbhiḥ devam yaḥ upāste vibhāvasum prāpnoti heleḥ āyatane puṇya ākhyāna kathā karaḥ na anyat prīti karam bhānoḥ puṇya ākhyānāt ṛte kvacid ekaḥ api heleḥ su kṛtaḥ praṇāmaḥ daśa aśvamedha avabhṛthena tulyaḥ daśa aśvamedhī punar eti janma heli praṇāmī na punarbhavāya evam deveśvaraḥ bhaktyā yena bhānuḥ upāsitaḥ sa prāpnoti gatim ślāghyām yām icchati ca cetasā tam ārādhya mayā prāptam brahma tvam loka pūjitam lekhaḥ kratu śatena īśam ārādhya enam divākaram striyāḥ ca bhartāram ṛte pūjyaḥ atyantam vibhāvasuḥ vaiśyānām api ca ārādhyaḥ tapobhiḥ tam anāśanaḥ dhyeyaḥ parivrājakānām sadā devaḥ vibhāvasuḥ evam sarva āśramāṇām hi citrabhānuḥ parāyaṇam sarveṣām ca eva varṇānām tam ārādhya āpnuyāt gatim iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sūryapūjāmahimavarṇanam nāma śṛṇuṣva saṃyataḥ kāmyān upavāsān tathā aparān tān tān āśritya yān kāmān kuruta īpsita mānasaḥ saptamyām śukla pakṣe tu phālgunasya iha mānavaḥ deva arcane ca aṣṭaśatam kṛtvā etat ca japet śuciḥ pākhaṇḍān patitān ca eva tathā eva a nyāya śālinaḥ idam ca udāharet bhānau manaḥ saṃdhāya tad paraḥ haṃsa haṃsa kṛpāluḥ tvam agatīnām gatiḥ bhava saṃsāra arṇava magnānām trātā bhava divākaraiḥ evam prasādya upavāsam kṛtvā niyata mānasaḥ pūrvāhṇe eva ca sakṛt prāśyāt ca ācamanīyakam martya loke gatim śreṣṭhām kṛṣṇa prāpnoti vai naraḥ utkrāntaḥ tu vrajet kṛṣṇaiḥ divyam haṃsa ālayam śubham vṛṣadhvaja prasādāt vai saṃkrandana śriyā vṛtaḥ māsi bhādrapade tathā upoṣya sampūjya tathā mārtaṇḍa iti ca kīrtayet go mūtra prāśana utpūtaḥ dhanī dhanapuram vrajet manaḥ ārādhitasya jagatām īśvarasya avyaya ātmanaḥ utkrānti kāle smaraṇam bhāskarasya tathā āpnuyāt kṣīrasya prāśanam kṛṣṇa vidhim ca eva yathā uditam kārttika ādi yathānyāyam kuryāt māsa catuṣṭayam tena eva vidhinā kṛṣṇaiḥ bhāskara iti ca kīrtayet sa yāti bhānu sālokyam bhāskaram smarati kṣaye cāturmāsye tu sampūrṇe kṛtvā pustaka vācanam kathām tu bhāskarasya iha saṅgītakam atha api vā dharma śravaṇam abhīṣṭam sadā dharmadhvajasya tu pūjayitvā tu tasmāt kāryam vipaścitā evam eva gatim śreṣṭhām devānām anukīrtanāt prāpnuyāt trividhām kṛṣṇaiḥ triloka ākhyām naraḥ sadā mānuṣaḥ adhipatyam tathā bhogān tatas prāpnoti mānuṣaḥ dvitīyena tathā bhogān gopateḥ prāpnuyāt naraḥ sūrya lokam tṛtīyena pāraṇena tathā āpnuyāt mad yaḥ śvetām saptamīm kuryāt sugatim śraddhayā naraḥ tathā bhaktyā ca vai nārī prāpnoti trividhām gatim eṣā dhanyā pāpa harā tithiḥ nityam upāsitā dharādharaiḥ paṭhatām śṛṇvatām ca api sarva pāpa bhaya apahā tathā dhanyā ca puṇyā ca trivarga ādi iṣṭa dā sadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe trivargasaptamīvratanirūpaṇam nāma atha pañca adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kāmadā saptamī vrata nirūpaṇam phālguna amala pakṣasya saptamyām kṣmādhara avyaya uttiṣṭhan prasvapan ca eva sūryam eva abhikīrtayet snātvā devam samabhyarcya dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām praṇipatya jagannātham iti vāṇīm udīrayet yam ārādhya purā devī sāvitrī kāmanāya vai sa me dadātu deveśaḥ sarvān kāmān vibhāvasuḥ samabhyarcyaḥ iti prāptān kṛtsnān kāmān yathā īpsitān kāmān samprāptavan rājyam sa me kāmam prayacchatu evam abhyarcya pūjām ca niṣpādya iha vivasvantaḥ caturbhiḥ pāraṇam māsaiḥ ebhiḥ niṣpāditam bhavet het dhūpam prāśyam gośṛṅga jam jalam naivedyam khaṇḍa veṣṭān tu dadyāt viprebhyaḥ eva ca tatas ca śrūyatām anyā hi āṣāḍha ādiṣu yā kriyā mātī puṣpāṇi śastāni dhūpaḥ gauggulaḥ ucyate samaśnīyāt naivedyam pāyasam matam svayam tat eva ca aśnīyāt śeṣam pūrvavat ācaret kārttika ādiṣu māseṣu go mūtram kāya śodhanam mahā aṅgaḥ dhūpaḥ uddiṣṭaḥ pūjā rakta utpalaiḥ tathā kāsāram ca atra naivedyam nivedyam bhāskarāya vai pratimāsam ca viprāya dātavyā dakṣiṇā tathā karpūram candanam mustām agarum tagaram tathā mūṣaṇam śarkarā kṛṣṇaiḥ sugandham silhakam tathā mahāṅgaḥ ayam smṛtaḥ dhūpaḥ priyaḥ devasya sarvadā prīṇanam ceṣṭayā bhānoḥ pāraṇe pāraṇe gate yathāśakti yathāyogam vitta śāṭhyam vivarjayet sadbhāvena eva saptāśvaḥ pūjitaḥ prīyate yatas pāraṇa ante yathāśaktyā pūjitaḥ snāpitaḥ raviḥ prīṇitaḥ ca īpsitān kāmān dadyāt avyāhatam hare eṣā puṇyā pāpa harā saptamī sarva kāma dā yathā abhilaṣitān kāmān labhate garuḍadhvaja upoṣya etām tribhuvanam prāptam indreṇa vai purā putram prāpat ca sāvitrī putrān tu aditiḥ tathā yadavaḥ kāmanām prāptāḥ dhaumyaḥ vedam avāptavan tvayā āptā bhārgavī kṛṣṇaiḥ śaṃkaraḥ śuddhim āptavan pitāmaha tvam prāptaḥ aham tad prasādāt janārdana anyaiḥ ca adhigatāḥ kāmāḥ tam ārādhya na saṃśayaḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ vaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ yoṣidbhiḥ eva ca yam yam kāmam abhidhyāyet tam tam prāpnoti upoṣaṇāt manaḥ prāpnoti asaṃdigdham bhānoḥ ārādhanāt yatas sarvān kāmān avāpnoti go gataḥ ca api modate na aputraḥ na adhanaḥ vā api na vā aniṣṭaḥ na nirghṛṇaḥ modate śāśvatāḥ samāḥ yānam ārūḍhaḥ tejasā ravi saṃnibhaḥ punar etya mahīm kṛṣṇa ghanāghana samaḥ nṛpaḥ syāt na saṃdehaḥ prasādāt gopateḥ naraḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe kāmadāsaptamīvrata nirūpaṇam nāma pañca adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṣ adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ pāpanāśinī vrata vidhi varṇanam punar ca etat mahābhāga śrūyatām gadataḥ mama uvāca tvattaḥ śru suratheṣṭha brūhi mama pāpa nāśinīm tathā uttarāyaṇam brūhi śastam yat bhāskara arcane tadā syāt sā mahā puṇyā saptamī pāpa nāśinī tasyām sampūjya deveśam citrabhānum jagadgurum sapta janma kṛtāt pāpāt mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ yaḥ ca upavāsam kurute tasyām niyata mānasaḥ dānam yat dīyate kiṃcid tam uddiśya divākaram ekaḥ ṛgvedaḥ puratas japtaḥ śraddhā pareṇa tu tārakāḥ iva rājante dyotamānāḥ divāniśam yatra pāpam aśeṣam vai nāśayati atra bhāskaraḥ kartavyā saptamī kṛṣṇaiḥ tena uktā pāpa nāśinī tejasā kavi saṃkāśaḥ prabhayā sūrya saṃnibhaḥ kāntyātreya samaḥ kṛṣṇaiḥ śaurye hari samaḥ sadā punar etya bhuvam kṛṣṇaiḥ bhavet vai kṣmādhipa adhipaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe pāpanāśinīvratavidhi varṇanam nāma ṣaṣ adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tathā anyat api dharma jña śṛṇuṣva gadataḥ mama svayam aṃśumantā kṛṣṇa lokānām hita kāmyayā vāmanasya padam kṛṣṇa jñeyam vai uttarāyaṇam deva ādyaiḥ sakalaiḥ vandyam dakṣiṇam dakṣiṇāyanam mama tvam ca sadā kṛṣṇa dakṣiṇam pādam arcataḥ śraddhā anvitau bhāskarasya hari īśau vāmam arcataḥ karoti ārādhanam tasya tuṣṭaḥ syāt bhānumant sadā uvāca uttare tu ayane kṛṣṇaiḥ snātaḥ niyata mānasaḥ ghṛta kṣīra ādibhiḥ devam snāpayet timira apaham cāru vastra upahāraiḥ ca puṣpa dhūpa anulepanaiḥ samabhyarcya tatas samyak brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ pada dvayam vratam yasya gṛhṇīyāt bhānu tatparaḥ bhuktvā annam citrabhānum tu citrabhānum vrajan tathā yāvat adya dināt prāptam kramaśas dakṣiṇāyanam tāvat vakṣye citrabhānum yāvat eva uttarāyaṇam yāvajjīvam ca yat kiṃcid jānataḥ jñānataḥ api vā kariṣye aham tathā ca eva kīrtayiṣyāmi tam prabhum yadā anṛtam kiṃcid vakṣye tadā vakṣyāmi tat vacaḥ ajñānāt atha vā jñānāt kīrtayiṣyāmi tam prabhum bhānu mayam param tam smaran maraṇe yāti yām gatim sā astu mama gatiḥ yamam te saṃsmariṣyāmi sa mama bhānuḥ parā gatiḥ yadi prātar tathā sāyam madhyāhne vā japāmi aham
