dikṣu kṣipet balim agnaye rakta netrāya jvālā mālā arcitāya vai śaktihastāya tīvrāya tathā ca eva aja vāhine na agri mantreṇa vahneḥ āvāhanam smṛtam daṇḍa hastāya kṛṣṇāya mahiṣottama vāhine sūryaputrāya devāya dharmarājāya vai namaḥ sarva bāhya adhipataye virūpa ākhyāya vai namaḥ yad pāśa hastāya varuṇāya iti kalpayet mantreṇa āvāhanam vidyāt pañca nadyaḥ sarasvatīm prāṇa ātmakāya dhūpāya avyaṅgāya anilāya ca tasya api āvāhanam vidyāt yat deva adeva heḍanam gadā hastāya somāya śuṣmiṇe nṛ gatāya ca gadā paṭṭiśa hastāya soma rājāya vai namaḥ bhū ca guhyā vai soma mantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ pṛṣṇa ajina niṣaṇṇāya namaḥ lambodarāya ca gaṇādhipataye deva nīlakaṇṭhāya śūline virūpākṣāya rudrāya trailokya adhipate namaḥ abhi tvā śūra naḥ mantraḥ īśānāya prakalpayet sarva nāga adhirājāya śveta varṇāya bhogine pañcarātra ādibhiḥ nyāsaḥ hi aṅganyāsaḥ prayujyate sūryakratum mahā puṇyam na eva kuryāt adakṣiṇam sā tu vṛddhi karā nityam sāṃnidhyāt ca sadā bhavet upāsate tri rātram ye bhānoḥ yātrā abhivāsane ātmīyam parakīyam vā pratimā sthāpanam raveḥ daśānām aśvamedhānām vājapeya śatasya ca phalam prāpnoti puruṣaḥ pratiṣṭhāpya divākaram yāvat kīrtiḥ puṇya kṛtā bhānoḥ sthāne niveśite tāvat sa tu yaduśreṣṭha sūrya loke mahīyate dhruvā dyauḥ ca dhruvā pṛthvī dhruvam viśvam idam jagant sthāpayitvā ravim bhaktyā vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā māse māse ṛtu phalam labhante na atra saṃśayaḥ eka ahena api yat bhānoḥ pūjayā prāpyate phalam kṛtvā api su mahat pāpam yaḥ paścāt sevate ravim na bhavet iṣṭakānām ca dravaṇam bhūmi saṃmiti yat phalam āpyate sikatāyām api gṛham yaḥ tu kuryāt vibhāvasoḥ śrī bhāgī bhavati naraḥ niketa kārī kalpānām vasati śatam sa sūrya loke iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne sūryapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam nāma ṣaṭtriṃśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ pratiṣṭhāpana vidhi varṇanam uvāca yaḥ prāsādam racayati pumān devatānām prayatnāt tatra prītyā sapadi kurute sthāpanām bhānu bhaktaḥ kurvanti teṣām mṛte api a paramārtha maye śarīre loke paribhramati kīrti mayam śarīram sādhāraṇam vidhānam śṛṇu devānām pratiṣṭhāpane vīra snātaḥ bhuktaḥ vastra alaṅkṛta kusumaiḥ gandhaiḥ pratimāyāḥ āstīrṇāyām śayyāyām sthāpanam kuryāt tu suptāyām tu sa nṛtya gītaiḥ jāgaraṇaiḥ samyak eva adhivāsya daivajñena pratidiṣṭa kāle saṃsthāpanam kuryāt abhyarcya kusuma gandha anulepanaiḥ śaṅkha tūrya nirghoṣaiḥ prādakṣiṇyena nayet āyatanasya prayatnena kṛtvā balim pratimām abhyarcya brāhmaṇān ca sādhūn dattvā hiraṇya kalaśam vidhinā nikṣipet piṇḍikā madhye su śvabhre sthāpaka daivajña dvijān samyak viśeṣataḥ abhyarcya akalpa antam bhogī bhavati iha paratra sukhī sāmānyam idam devānām adhivāsanam bhavati mayā kathitam pratiṣṭhāpanam idam te kathitam rājñ pratiṣṭhāpanam āditas yat kṛtvā savituḥ snānam naraḥ yāti manogatim ittham kuryāt naraḥ bhaktyā savituḥ sthāpanam budhaḥ itihāsa purāṇasya śravaṇam pāpa nāśanam tābhyām hi śravaṇāt vīra sāṃnidhyam yāti bhāskaraḥ kṛte tu āyatane tasmin ye ca anye ca api devatāḥ tasmāt kāryam budhaiḥ nityam dharma śravaṇam āditas vācakam pūjayitvā tu brāhmaṇān upapūjya ca kārayet vācanam vīra pustakasya agratas raveḥ iti eṣa kathitaḥ vīraiḥ pratiṣṭhā kalpaḥ āditas kṛtvā dṛṣṭvā ca śrutvā ca yam naraḥ arkam avāpnuyāt iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne pratiṣṭhāpanavidhivarṇanam nāma saptatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca yat uktam brahmanā pūrvam ṛṣabha adhipate puras kṛtāni upari cihnāni vāhanāni dhvajāni tu kīrtitaḥ sa ca tasya iha pramāṇam gadataḥ śṛṇu prāsāda vyāsa tulyasya dhvaja vaṃśa pramāṇāt devāgārasya ye proktāḥ mañjarī kalaśa ādayaḥ atha vā tad pramāṇaḥ tu dhvaja daṇḍaḥ prakīrtitaḥ antargṛhasya yā vediḥ sūtrāt parikalpitā tasyāḥ vyāsaḥ bhavet vaṃśaḥ prasādasya yadu uttamaiḥ atha vā mūlasūtreṇa yaḥ vyāsaḥ antargṛhasya tu prāsāda vyāsaḥ iti te proktaḥ ca iha na saṃśayaḥ catur hastāḥ bhavanti ete praśastāḥ kṛṣṇa nandana aṣṭa hasta pramāṇaḥ tu viṃśa ardhasya pramāṇāt sāmānyaḥ dhvaja daṇḍaḥ tu sarva sādhāraṇaḥ mataḥ daṇḍa pāṇi dhvajaḥ yaḥ tu smṛtaḥ ṣoḍaśa hastavān viṃśat hastāt paraḥ daṇḍaḥ na kāryaḥ sarvathā raveḥ catur aṅgula vistīrṇaḥ su vṛttaḥ dvi aṅgula upari na ati sūkṣmaḥ na ca sthūlaḥ na kāryaḥ nata parvakaḥ sama parvā tu kartavyaḥ su dṛḍhaḥ sūkṣmaḥ eva hi madhu putra vināśāya sa vraṇaḥ artha vināśanaḥ daśā ete kīrtitāḥ bhedāḥ dhvajasya ānanda sammitāḥ dvādaśa hastaḥ tu jaitreyaḥ śatru hantā kalā anvitaḥ mayāvahaḥ tu viṃśārdhaḥ nandaḥ āditya saṃnibhaḥ proktaḥ tathā indraḥ viṃśatiḥ smṛtaḥ dhvaja daṇḍaḥ mahā bāho atha vā vāstu mānāt patākā vai śubhā kāryā dhvaja vaṃśa avalambinī devāgārasya śikharāt tri bhāga parimārjanā sā proktā daśadhā vīraiḥ mānāt mānāt tathā aṅkuraḥ pallavaḥ ca eva skandhaḥ śākhā tathā eva ca bhāsa kadalī vīra ketuḥ lakṣma jayaḥ tathā aṅkuraḥ dvayaṅgulaḥ proktaḥ pallavaḥ catur aṅgulaḥ skandhaḥ ṣaṣ aṅgulaḥ proktaḥ śākhā ca aṣṭa aṅgulaḥ matā ekādaśa patākā tu kadalā ca caturdaśa ketuḥ tu ṣoḍaśaḥ proktaḥ lakṣmā aṣṭādaśam ucyate mayāḥ viṃśati vai proktāḥ etāvat tu aṅgulāni tu devāgārasya kumbhasya prasannā sā pramārjanī aṅkura iti patākā sā vijñeyā yadu nandana tri bhāga mārjanī skandhaḥ śākhā vai pañcamasya tu ṣaṣṭhasya uktā patākā tu kadalī saptamasya tu vṛṣa sthāna avamārgī tu dhvajaḥ tu parikīrtitaḥ gajaḥ meṣaḥ atha mahiṣaḥ kabandhaḥ tu vṛṣaḥ tathā evam daśavidhā proktā patākā tattva darśibhiḥ kartavyā sā yathāpūrvam tat śṛṇu tvam narādhipa śukla vastra mayā citrā sa ghaṇṭā su manoharā nānā cāmara sampannā kiṅkiṇī jāla maṇḍitā kāñcanaḥ vā atha raupyaḥ vā maṇi ratna mayaḥ api vā raṅgakaiḥ likhyate vā api tad vāhana sama ākṛtiḥ garutmant ātmān tu dhvajaḥ viṣṇoḥ īśvarasya dhvajaḥ vṛṣaḥ brahmanaḥ paṅkajam kāryam raveḥ dharmaḥ smṛtaḥ dhvajaḥ godhā ca api umā devyāḥ raivatasya hayaḥ smṛtaḥ pāvakasya tathā meṣaḥ āsuḥ gaṇapateḥ mataḥ brahmarṣīṇām kuśaḥ proktaḥ iti eṣā dhvaja kalpanā kuryāt patākā ca api pītā syāt garuḍasya samīpa gā īśvarasya dhvaje daṇḍaḥ rājataḥ yadu nandanaḥ patākā ca api śuklā syāt vṛṣabhasya samīpa gā pitāmaha dhvaje daṇḍaḥ smṛtaḥ tāmra mayaḥ budhaiḥ padma varṇā patākā syāt paṅkajasya samīpa gā mad ca sauvarṇaḥ dhvaje daṇḍaḥ prakīrtitaḥ pañca varṇā patākā syāt dharmasya adhas gatā nṛpa kiṅkiṇī jāla sampannā nāna budbuda saṃnibhā puṣpa mālā upasampannā nānā vādibhiḥ āvṛtā patākā bahu varṇā syāt kuñjarasya samīpa gā āyasaḥ ca api daṇḍa uktaḥ yama cihnam vicakṣaṇaiḥ patākā varṇāt kṛṣṇā mahiṣasya samīpa gā mahādhipa dhvajaḥ daṇḍaḥ rājataḥ parikīrtitaḥ patākā sarvatas śvetā vicitrā sā ca kathyate dhvaje ca api kuberasya daṇḍaḥ maṇi mayaḥ smṛtaḥ patākā ca api raktā syāt nara pāda samīpa gā patākā varṇāt śuklā tālasya adhas gatā smṛtā patākā rohiṇī tatra makarasya samīpa gā māyūram kārttikeyasya cihnam lokeṣu gīyate triloha daṇḍam ārūḍham bahu ratna vibhūṣitam bahu varṇaka citrā tu patākā kathitā budhaiḥ hasti danta bhavam daṇḍam kuryāt gaṇapateḥ nṛpaiḥ tāmra daṇḍam samāruḍham saṃśuddham sampratiṣṭhitam śuklā patākā kartavyā su pramāṇā mahīpate mātṝṇām ca api kartavyaḥ na eka rūpaḥ dhvajaḥ budhaiḥ cāmuṇḍā mandire kāryaḥ śiraḥ mālā ākulaḥ dhvajaḥ nīlā patākā kartavyā daṇḍaḥ loha mayaḥ tathā mātṝṇām revatasya ca kārayet patākā kṛṣṇa varṇā tu hariṇasya samīpa gā bhagavatyāḥ dhvajaḥ daṇḍaḥ sarva ratna mayaḥ smṛtaḥ patākā tu tri varṇā syāt siṃhasya adhas gatā nṛpa evaṃvidham imam kṛtvā dhvajam lakṣaṇa lakṣitam tatas sarva oṣadhībhiḥ ca snāpayitvā prayatnāt kalpayitvā śubhām vedim kalaśaiḥ upaśobhitām tasyām vedyām samāropya tām rātrim adhivāsayet nānā kusuma citrām ca srajam tasya anulambayet bali karma tatas kṛtvā kṛsarā apūpaka ādibhiḥ palāla pūpikābhiḥ ca dadhi pāyasa sūpakaiḥ uddiśya lokapālebhyaḥ balim dadyāt ca vāyasaiḥ brāhmaṇān svasti vācya atha kṛtvā puṇya aha maṅgalam vāditra kṛta nirghoṣam jalam saṃskāra saṃyutam nānā budbuda sapannam veṣṭitam nava vāsasā śubhe lagne dine ṛkṣe dhvajam ca āropayet budhaḥ tasmāt devālayam prājñaḥ dhvaja hīnam na kārayet śrīkaraḥ śrīnivāsaḥ ca jaya jaitra upaśobhita vyoma rūpa mahā rūpa dharma ātman tvam ca vai gatyāḥ sāṃnidhyam kuru daṇḍe asmin sākṣī ca dhruva tām vraja kuru vṛddhim sadā kartuḥ prāsādasya arka vallabhaiḥ mantreṇa anena rāja indraiḥ śvabhre daṇḍe niveśayet patākām pūrva mantreṇa sthityā pūrva mukhaḥ nṛpa kṣipet ūrdhvam atha ākāśam prāsāda śikharāt vibhoḥ paśyet prāsāda puratas vā api patākām pātayet yadi hi āgneyyām agni lokam tu yāmyām yama sadaḥ bhajet naiṛtyām naiṛtam lokam vāruṇyaḥ vāruṇam vrajet vāyavye vāyum āpnoti saumyāyām somam āpnuyāt aiśānyām īśam āpnoti kartā vai devaveśmanaḥ yaḥ evam kārayet bhaktyā dhvajasya āropaṇam raveḥ tejasā ambuja saṃkāśaḥ kāntyā ca ambuja saṃnibhaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne dhvajāropaṇavidhivarṇanam nāma aṣṭatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tvad prasādāt mayā prāptam rūpam etat purātanam pratyakṣa darśanam ca api bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ devasya paricaryāyāḥ pālanam kaḥ kariṣyati na dvijāḥ parigṛhṇanti devasya svīkṛtam dhanam avajñayā ca kurvanti ye kriyām lobha mohitāḥ a pāṅkteyāḥ bhavanti iha te vai devalakāḥ dvijāḥ deva svam brāhmaṇa tvam ca yaḥ lobhāt upajīvati sa pāpa ātmā naraḥ loke gṛdhra ucchiṣṭena jīvati tatas na brāhmaṇaḥ kaścid deva caryām kariṣyati vidhi jñam jñānavantam ca paricaryā kṣamam tathā devaḥ eva tam ākhyātum tasmāt tam śaraṇam vraja kṛta pūrvāhṇikam vīra vipram gauramukham nṛpa mayā bhānoḥ prasādena kāritam vipulam gṛham sa patnīkam sa sainyam ca pṛthivyām sāravat sthitam sarvam tasmin mayā dattam kṛtam mūrteḥ ca maṇḍalam tasmāt iṣṭvā viśiṣṭebhyaḥ deyam dānam manogatam tat sarvam mama samprītyā gṛhāṇa tvam mahā mune sāmba vākyam idam śrutvā pratyuvāca mahā muniḥ bravīmi aham aśeṣeṇa yathāvat anupūrvaśas brahma vidyā praṇītāni sva karmāṇi dvijātayaḥ kurvāṇāḥ na prahīyante anyathā bhinna vṛttayaḥ kṣāntiḥ adhyāpanam jāpaḥ satyam ca yadu nandana yadi deva artha dānam syāt tatas devalakāḥ dvijāḥ deva dravya abhilāṣaḥ ca brāhmaṇyam tu vimuñcati yat dānam brāhmaṇāya prayacchati dvau etau pāpa kartārau ātma doṣeṇa mānavau deva artha dānam vārṣṇeya yat gṛhītvā ca yaḥ dvijaḥ śrāddhe vā yadi vā satre tat juhoti dadāti vā bhinna vṛttaḥ dvijaḥ pāpaḥ rākṣasaḥ saḥ abhijāyate annāni upaspṛśet nīcā sā paṅktiḥ pāpam ācaret uddhariṣyati ca ātmānam iti eṣā kalpanā adhamā tasmāt rājā na deva artham vipre dadyāt kathaṃcana brahmasūtram aham chittvā gamiṣyāmi iti gamyatām uvāca śrutam vā dṛṣṭa pūrvam vā tat me vyākhyātum arhasi tasya adhikāraḥ deva anne devatānām ca pūjane uvāca kasya putraḥ dvijaśreṣṭha kimācāraḥ kimākṛtiḥ sutaḥ vīraḥ āditya ātmajaḥ ucyate uvāca katham sa nikṣubhā putraḥ katham vīrasutaḥ tathā mānuṣa tvam gatā devī nikṣubhā kila yādavaiḥ mā gatā śāpam avāpya iha bhāskarāt loka pūjitā sujihvāḥ nāma dharma ātmā ṛṣi putraḥ purā anagha tasya ātmajā samutpannā nikṣubhā sā vara aṅganā rūpeṇa apratimā loke hāra līlā matā tu sā viharantī yathānyāyam samiddhe pāvake tathā atha tām devadeveśaḥ hi aṃśumālī dadarśa ha rūpa yauvana sampannām tatas kāma vaśam gataḥ cintayāmāsa deveśaḥ katham tām vai bhajāmi aham anayā avahṛtaḥ yaḥ ayam pāvakaḥ deva pūjitaḥ vanam āviśya tanvaṅgīm bhajeyam loka pūjitām iti sañcintya deveśaḥ sahasrāṃśuḥ divaspati māviveśa pāvakam vīraiḥ tad putraḥ ca bhavat tadā tatas vilāsa lāvaṇya rūpa yauvana śālinī samiddham laṅghayitvā agnim jagāma āyata locanā kruddhaḥ sva rūpam āsthāya dṛṣṭvā kanyām sa pīḍitaḥ karam kareṇa saṅgṛhya tatas tām havyavāhanaḥ uvāca yadu śārdūlaiḥ na uditaḥ bhāskareṇa tu iti agni jātyāḥ magāḥ proktāḥ soma jātyāḥ dvijātayaḥ bhojaka āditya jātyāḥ hi divyāḥ te parikīrtitāḥ atha utpannām prajām jñātvā dhyāna yogena vai ṛṣiḥ patitaḥ syāt mahā tejāḥ ṛgjihvaḥ su mahāmatiḥ śāpam udyamya tejasvī ṛgjihvaḥ vākyam abravīt bhātma aparādhāt kāminyāḥ yathā garbhaḥ nala āvṛtaḥ sambhūtaḥ te mahābhāge apūjyaḥ ayam bhaviṣyati putra śoka abhisantaptā bālā paryākula īkṣaṇā cintayāmāsa duḥkha ārtā tam ekam jvalana ākṛtim ayam dattaḥ mahā śāpaḥ pūjyatām kartum arhasi āgneyam rūpam āśritya ca idam vacanam abravīt tena utsṛṣṭam mahā śāpam na anyathā kartum utsahe te putram vidhāsyāmi ca apūjyam vedapāragam vaṃśaḥ ca su mahān tasya nivasiṣyati bhū tale mama aṅgāni mahātmānaḥ vāśiṣṭhāḥ brahma vādinaḥ mad gāyanāḥ mad yajanāḥ mad bhaktāḥ mad parāyaṇāḥ mama śuśrūṣakāḥ ca eva mama ca vrata cāriṇaḥ tvām ca mām ca yathānyāyam vedam tattva artha darśiṇaḥ pūjayiṣyanti niratāḥ sadā mad bhāva bhāvitāḥ mad karmaṇām mad aṅgānām mad bhāva viniveśanāt mad prasādena mām eva eṣyanti asaṃśayam parāyaṇāḥ pañca kāla vidhāna jñāḥ vīra kālasya yajvinaḥ pūrṇa ika dakṣiṇe pāṇau varma vāmena dhārayan pati dānena vadanam pracchādya niyataḥ śuciḥ prāṇam hi mahatām kṛtvā tatas bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ ha yamāt ca aprasādāt ca vyākula indriya cetasā maga vaṃśe mahātmānaḥ veda vedāṅga pāragāḥ evam āśvāsya tām devīm bhāskaraḥ vāritaskaraḥ mahā tejāḥ sā ca harṣam avāpa ha evam ete samutpannāḥ bhojakāḥ kṛṣṇa nandana te tathā ādityāḥ utpannāḥ loka pūjitāḥ tvadīyasya asya mama vīra tathā bhāskara pūjane tasya gauramukhasya idam vākyam śrutvā sa yādavaḥ sāmbaḥ jāmbavatī putraḥ praṇamya śirasā uktavan bhojakāḥ dvijaśārdūlaiḥ yena tān ānayāmi aham na aham jāne mahā bāho vasante yatra vai magāḥ jānīte tān raviḥ vīra tasmāt tam śaraṇam vraja jagāda bhāskaram sa ambaḥ kaḥ te pūjām kariṣyati na yogyāḥ paricaryāyām jambūdvīpe mama anaghaiḥ mama pūjākaram gatvā śākadvīpāt iha ānaya lavaṇodāt pare pāre kṣīrodena samāvṛtaḥ jambūdvīpāt paraḥ yasmāt śākadvīpaḥ iti smṛtaḥ tatra puṇyāḥ janapadāḥ catur varṇa samanvitāḥ magāḥ ca magagāḥ ca eva gānagāḥ mandagāḥ tathā magāḥ brāhmaṇa bhūyiṣṭhāḥ magagāḥ kṣatriyāḥ smṛtāḥ vaiśyāḥ tu gānagāḥ jñeyāḥ śūdrāḥ teṣām tu mandagāḥ na teṣām saṅkaraḥ kaścid dharma āśraya kṛte kvacid dharmasya asya vicāraḥ vā hi ekatas sukhinaḥ prajāḥ tebhyaḥ vedāḥ tu catvāraḥ sa rahasyāḥ mayā uditāḥ te ca dhyāyanti mām eva yajante mām ca nityaśas mad mānasāḥ mad yajanāḥ mad bhaktāḥ mad parāyaṇāḥ mama śuśrūṣakāḥ ca eva mama ca vrata cāriṇaḥ avyaṅga dhāriṇaḥ ca eva vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā kurvanti te sadā bhadrām mama pūjām mama anugāḥ tathā devāḥ sa gandharvāḥ siddhāḥ ca saha cāraṇaiḥ viharante ramante ca dṛśyamānāḥ ca taiḥ saha mama viṣṇuḥ veda vedāṅga pūjitaḥ mama śālmalīdvīpe krauñcadvīpe hi aham bhagaḥ plakṣadvīpe tu aham bhānuḥ śākadvīpe divākaraḥ puṣkare ca smṛtaḥ brahmā tatas ca aham maheśvaraḥ tān magān mama pūjā artham śākadvīpāt iha ānaya bali sa ambaiḥ śīghram gatvā a vicārayan tathā iti gṛhya tām ājñām raveḥ jāmbavatī sutaḥ punar dvāravatīm gatvā kāntyā atīva samanvitaḥ pituḥ sarvam svakīyam devadarśanam śākadvīpam anuprāpya samprahṛṣṭa tanūruhaḥ tatra apaśyat yathā uddiṣṭān sāmbaḥ tejasvinaḥ magān vivasvantam pūjayantaḥ dhūpa dīpa ādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ ca tān pūrvam kṛtvā api eṣām pradakṣiṇām pṛṣṭvā ca anāmayam teṣām praśaṃsā sāma pūrvakam yūyam hi puṇya karmāṇaḥ draṣṭavya arthe śubha arthinaḥ ratāḥ ye arkasya pūjāyām yeṣām ca eva vara pradaḥ tanayam vitta mām viṣṇoḥ sāmbam nāmnā ca viśrutam candrabhāgā taṭe ca api mayā sūryaḥ niveśitaḥ tena aham preṣitaḥ ca atra uttiṣṭhadhvam vrajāmahe te tam ūcuḥ tatas sāmbam evam etat na saṃśayaḥ naḥ api devena vyākhyātām pūrvam eva hi aṣṭādaśa kulāni iha magānām veda vādinām yāsyanti ye tvayā sārdham yathā devena bhāṣitam tatas tāni daśa aṣṭau ca kulāni iha samantataḥ kṛtvā ājñām tu raveḥ sa ambaḥ kṛtsnam tu evam nyavedayat mama pūjā karāḥ hi ete prajānām śānti kārakāḥ mama pūjām kariṣyanti vidhāna uktām yadu uttama iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne bhojaka ānayanam mahā nāma ekonacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catvāriṃśat adhika śatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ evam saḥ ānayitvā tu magān sāmbaḥ mahīpate sa mahātmā purā sāmbaḥ candrabhāgā sarit taṭe puram niveśayāmāsa sthāpayitvā divākaram kṛtvā dhana samṛddham tu bhojakānām samarpayat tat puram savituḥ puṇyam triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam sāmbena kāritam yasmāt tasmāt sāmbapuram smṛtam satkṛtya sthāpitāḥ sarve ātma nāma aṅkite pure magānām tu sat ācāraḥ dṛṣṭa ācāra kula ucitaḥ deva śuśrūṣaṇam gītam veda proktena karmaṇā kṛtakṛtyaḥ tadā sāmbaḥ varam labdhvā punar yuvā mādidevam sura jyeṣṭham ādityam praṇipatya saḥ anantaram magān sarvān praṇipatya abhivādya ca prasthitaḥ nirmalaḥ sa ambaḥ purīm dvāravatīm tadā magānām kāraṇa arthena prārthitāḥ bhoja vaṃśa jāḥ kanyā dānam kṛtam teṣām magānām bhojaka uttamaiḥ sarvāḥ tāḥ sahitāḥ kanyāḥ pravāla maṇi bhūṣitāḥ arcayitvā tu tāḥ sarvāḥ preṣitāḥ savituḥ gṛham punar gatvā tu sa ambena pṛṣṭaḥ devaḥ divākaraḥ jñānam ākhyāhi vedān avyaṅgam eva ca sāmbasya vacanam śrutvā bhāskaraḥ vākyam abravīt pṛccha tvam nāradam gatvā sa te sarvam vadiṣyati sa ca api āha tatas sāmbam na jāne jñānam uttamam bhojakānām yaduśreṣṭha jñānam vyāsaḥ mahā muniḥ tam gatvā paripṛccha tvam praṇamya śirasā munim vakṣyati na saṃśayaḥ vyāsa āśramam sa gatvā tu praṇamya śirasā munim kṛta añjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā idam vacanam abravīt śākadvīpam mayā gatvā ānītāḥ maga puṃgavāḥ bālāḥ yauvana sampannāḥ sanniviṣṭāḥ maga uttamāḥ satkṛtya pūjayitvā tu puram teṣām samarpitam bhoja vaṃśa samutpannāḥ kanyakāḥ samalaṅkṛtāḥ varayitvā kṛtam teṣām vipra praṇayanam śubham aho sabhāgyāḥ ślāghyāḥ ca kṛta puṇyāḥ ca te sadā pūjāyām ye ratāḥ bhānoḥ yeṣām ca eva vara pradaḥ paryāptam sarvam eteṣām iha ca āmuṣmikam phalam anitye sati mānuṣye deva pūjā ratāḥ hi ye prati tathā ca eṣām hadaye saṃśayaḥ mama katham pūjā karāḥ hi ete ke magāḥ ke ca bhojakāḥ jñānam kim paramam teṣām jñeyaḥ teṣām kaḥ eva tu divyā iti te katham proktāḥ kimartham kūrca dhāraṇam sauravratam kim artham tu vācakāḥ te katham smṛtāḥ atha ahi kañcukasya aṅgam kim pramāṇam ca kasya vai kasya vai kā samākhyātā yat utpannam katham smṛtam katham devān ca gāyanti yajñam kurvanti te katham agnihotram ca kim teṣām pañca dolāḥ ca kāḥ smṛtāḥ etat sarvam samākhyāhi bhojakānām viceṣṭitam sāmbasya vacanam śrutvā kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ muniḥ kālī sutaḥ mahā tejāḥ uvāca paramam vacaḥ sādhu sādhu yaduśreṣṭha sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi suvrata durjñeya ceṣṭitam kiñcid bhojakānām na saṃśayaḥ yathā ākhyātam vasiṣṭhena tathā te vacmi kṛtsnaśas magānām caritam śreṣṭham śṛṇu tvam kṛṣṇa nandana mahā jñāna vedinaḥ eva ete karmayogam samāśritāḥ śrūyante ṛṣayaḥ sarve maunena niyama sthitāḥ muni caryā kṛtaḥ te api śākadvīpa nivāsinaḥ ca arcāyām te ca te nityam arcayantaḥ ca te smṛtāḥ bhoja kanyāsu jāta tvāt bhojakāḥ tena te smṛtāḥ brāhmaṇānām yathā proktaḥ vedāḥ catvāraḥ eva tu brahmaṇā uktāḥ tathā vedāḥ magānām api suvrata te eva viparītāḥ tu teṣām vedāḥ prakīrtitāḥ yedāḥ hi ete magānām tu purā uvāca prajāpatiḥ magāḥ vedam adhīyante vedāṅgāḥ tena te smṛtāḥ śeṣaḥ na hi mahābhāgaḥ sarva sattva sukha āvahaḥ vanditavyaḥ magānām tu astramantreṇa nityaśas yathā srajaḥ dvijānām tu pūjā kāle pramīyate sarva saṃskāra yajñeṣu yathā darbhāḥ dvijātiṣu pavitrāḥ kīrtitāḥ teṣām tathā dharmaḥ magasya tu ebhiḥ jayanti bhūyiṣṭham tasmin dvīpe maga adhipāḥ yajña avasaktāḥ bhaktāḥ ca japantaḥ mantram āditas sarveṣām brāhmaṇānām tu sāvitrī parikalpyate naḥ tu yaduśreṣṭha mahā vyāhati pūrtikā na ca api kiṃcid smṛtikam spṛśet ca tat ca api na atra eva ca saṃspṛśet hi śvasanti an icchan tu parikṣipet tu sva abhīṣṭa sūryam tu namet sadā eva yathā yajñam hi mantreṇa veda proktena karmaṇā yathā agnihotram prathitam dvijānām tathā adhvahotram vihitam magānām pañcadhūpāḥ pradātavyāḥ siddhiḥ asya iha sarvadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakotpattivarṇanam nāma catvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca vrata bandhaḥ tu asau proktaḥ teṣām jātiḥ ca kā smṛtā uvāca te pṛṣṭāḥ bhavatā sarve bhojakānām kumārakāḥ kim ākhyātam tatas taiḥ tu tat eva ācakṣva kṛtsnaśas uvāca mayā proktāḥ bhojakānām samantataḥ tatas tu bhagavān prāha vākyam vākya viśāradaḥ ye tvayā uktā śrutāḥ sāmba bhojakānām kumārakāḥ mama eva ete magāḥ jñeyāḥ aṣṭau śūdrāḥ mad aṅga jāḥ dattāḥ bhoja kula utpannāḥ daśabhyaḥ daśa kanyakāḥ tatas tu mandakebhyaḥ api dattāḥ ca aṣṭau hi kanyakāḥ tatas niveśitam teṣām mayā sa ambaiḥ puram smara dāsa kanyāḥ tu yāḥ ca aṣṭau bhoja kanyāḥ ca yāḥ daśa etāḥ teṣām kumārāṇām jñeyāḥ tāḥ daśa ca aṣṭa ca tatra te bhoja kanyāsu dvijaiḥ utpāditāḥ sutāḥ bhojakāḥ tān gaṇān prāhuḥ brāhmaṇān divya saṃjñitān dāsa kanyāsu ye jātāḥ mandagaiḥ antya saṃjñitaiḥ madaṅgāḥ nāma te jñeyāḥ savituḥ paricārakāḥ svadharmaiḥ yaṣṭum ārabdhaiḥ śākadvīpe arcitaḥ raviḥ avyaṅga dhāriṇaḥ martyāḥ pūjayante divaspatim dṛṣṭvā vyaṅgam tu vai teṣām kautūhala samanvitaḥ sa ambaḥ prāha namaskṛtya bhūyas satyavatī sutam kutas eṣa samutpannaḥ kasmāt ca sa śuciḥ smṛtaḥ bandhanīyaḥ kadā ca ayam kimartham ca eva dhāryate kim pramāṇam ca bhagavan vyaṅgaḥ ca ayam kim ucyate śrutvā evam vacanam vyāsaḥ jāmbavatyāḥ sutasya ca uvāca kuru śārdūlaiḥ sa ambam kālī sutaḥ sa tu uvāca etat ca mama yathā uktaḥ tvam jātiḥ eṣām na saṃśayaḥ avyaṅgasya api te vacmi lakṣaṇam gadataḥ śṛṇu iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakajātivarṇanam nāma ekacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvicatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca devatāḥ ṛṣayaḥ nāgāḥ gandharva apsarasām gaṇāḥ yakṣa rakṣāṃsi vai bhānau nivasanti ṛtu kramāt sva sthānam ājagāma āśu namaskṛtya divākaram gāṅgeya bhūṣitam divyam na ati rakta sitam śubham nāga rāja aṅga sambhūtaḥ dhṛtaḥ yasmāt ca bhānunā nityam ca dhāraṇāt tasya bhavet prītaḥ divākaraḥ na dhārayanti ye tu evam bhojakāḥ pūjakāḥ raveḥ saura hīnāḥ na te yājyāḥ ucchiṣṭāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ smṛti ācāre te hi bhagnāḥ ravim na arhanti pūjitum ittham jñātvā na saṃdehaḥ hi avyaṅgena vinā raviḥ nāga rājasya saṃspṛṣṭaḥ hi ārasuḥ tena saṃsmṛtaḥ pramāṇena aṅgulānām tu śatāt hi śatam uttaram utkṛṣṭaḥ ayam pramāṇena madhyamaḥ viṃśat uttaraḥ tad ākṛtiḥ kṛtaḥ ca eṣa nirmitaḥ viśvakarmaṇā madhyame bhojakānām tu paraḥ śataḥ udāhṛtaḥ tena asya dhāraṇāt vīra śuciḥ eva tadā bhavet haviḥ homa ādikāḥ sarvāḥ bhavanti asya kriyāḥ śubhāḥ avyaṅgaḥ patitāṅgaḥ ca avyaṅgaḥ atha mahīpate eṣa sāraḥ ca sā ramyā vai jñeyā jaya nāmbhiḥ arha iti pūjāyām dhātoḥ pratyayaḥ smṛtaḥ pūjitaḥ ca pavitraḥ ca yasmāt tena arhakaḥ smṛtaḥ sāra sārtaḥ smṛtam rūpam pradhānam sāraḥ ucyate bhaktau smṛtau dhātuḥ tasmāt sārasanaḥ smṛtaḥ sa jñeyaḥ patita aṅgaḥ tu nitya yajñaiḥ upāhṛtaḥ iti ete kathitāḥ vīraiḥ avyaṅgāḥ vyaṅga bhojakāḥ haśāṅka mauliḥ antye tu saṃsthitaḥ yadu nandana pṛthvī mūlam āśritya sthitā ca yadu sattamaiḥ mūla aśanāḥ tu apaḥ sa amba madhye devaḥ vibhāvasuḥ tāsām anantaram vātaḥ ākāśaḥ agre samāsthitaḥ svarlokaḥ ca agram āśritya sthitaḥ vyaṅgasya yāvatā evam deva mayaḥ sa ambaḥ evam loka mayaḥ tathā dhāraṇīyaḥ mahān bhaktyā pūjakaḥ prītaye raveḥ pūjā phalam na teṣām syāt narakam ca vrajanti hi tathā teṣām bhavet nityam avyaṅgaḥ bhojakaḥ sadā bandhane kāraṇam vīra bhūṣaṇāni ca suvrata ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne vyaṅgotpattiḥ nāma dvicatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tricatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrutvā evam eva sāmbena vyāsāt satyavatī sutāt avyaṅgasya ca utpattim punar āgāt mahāmatiḥ atha āgatya mahā tejāḥ sāmbaḥ gatvā āśramam punar nāradasya mahā bāhoḥ nāradam vākyam abravīt snānam ācamanam ca evam arghya dānam mahātmane sāmbasya vacanam śrutvā nāradaḥ muni sattamaḥ uvāca kuru śārdūlaiḥ sāmbam jāmbavatī sutam snānam ācamanam ca eva svarṇa dānam tathā eva ca ācāntaḥ tris tatas snātvā vāsasī nirmale śubhe udak mukhaḥ prāc mukhaḥ vā api ācāmet ca prayatnāt apsu sūryaḥ tathā agniḥ ca mātā devī sarasvatī tasmāt uttīrya ca ācāmet na ācāmet tu jalāśaye upaviśya śucau deśe prayataḥ prāc udak mukhaḥ prasannāḥ tris pibet tvā apaḥ prayataḥ su samāhitaḥ sammārjanam tu dvis kuryāt tribhiḥ abhyukṣaṇam punar mūrdhānam khāni ca ātmānam upaspṛśya anu pūrvaśas mad arkam namaskṛtya śauceṣu śuci tām iyāt yaḥ kurute mohāt an ācamya iha nāstikaḥ bhavanti iha kriyāḥ sarvāḥ vṛthak tasya na saṃśayaḥ śuci kāmāḥ hi vai devāḥ vedaiḥ evam udāhṛtāḥ ina upāsā kṛtaḥ ca eva sarve devāḥ prayatnāt śaucam eva praśaṃsanti śauca aṅgaiḥ hi vidhīyate maunam āsthāya devāgāram tatas vrajet śvāsa rodha nimittam tu prāṇam ācchādya vāsasā śiraḥ prāvṛtya yatnena keśa udaka nivṛttaye tatas pūjām raveḥ kuryāt puṣpaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ gāyatrīm sa śiraskām ca yajamānaḥ prayatnāt puṣpa añjalim tatas gṛhya tad śikhāyām prayatnāt dhūpavelāḥ smṛtāḥ pañca dhūpeṣu eva tu pañcasu havana ādyāḥ kriyāḥ pañca rakṣiṣye mama tathā punar daṇḍanāyaka velā tu pratyūṣe ṛkṣa darśanāt na ājñā velā pradoṣaḥ tu tattva kāryam vijānatā tri kālam tu raveḥ pūjā kartavyā sūrya darśanāt tathā eva maṇḍale deyam nīcāhne jvalanāya ca padmāni karavīrāṇi tathā raktotpalāni ca harita udaka miśrāṇi kuruṇṭa kusumam tathā gandha ādīni ca divyāni kṛtvā vai tāmra bhājane arghya pātram tadā gṛhya kuryāt āvāhanam raveḥ ehi sūrya sahasrāṃśo tejorāśe jagatpate anukampya mām deva gṛhāṇa arghyam divākaraiḥ anena āvāhanam kṛtvā jānubhyām avanīm gataḥ namaḥ bhagavante ādityāya viśvāya kha īśāya brahmane loka kartṛṇe īśānāya purāṇāya sahasrākṣāya te namaḥ om bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar om mahas om janaḥ om tapaḥ om satyam brahman muṇḍa madhya puratas namas uvāca sāvitryāḥ ca pare tantre trailokya trāṇa kāriṇe paritas parigṛhya atha dhūpa bhājanam utkṣipet tvam ekaḥ eva rudrāṇām vasūnām ca purātanaḥ devānām gīrbhiḥ abhitas saṃstutaḥ śāśvataḥ divi pūrvāhṇe ca tvayā tena madhyāhne ca apareṇa tu om namaḥ bhagavante jñāna ātmane tvā ca paśyanti divākaraḥ tu sāyāhne mantreṇa arghyam nivedayet namaḥ varuṇāya śambhave ākṛṣṇena rajasā vartamānaḥ niveśayan amṛtam martyam ca anena vidhinā dattvā dhūpam sūryāya bhojakaḥ mantreṇa mihirāya iti nikṣubhāya iti nityaśas tatas rājñai namaḥ ca iti nikṣubhāyai tatas namaḥ daṇḍanāyaka saṃjñāya piṅgalāya ca vai namaḥ tathā rājñāya srauṣāya tathā īśāya garutmate maheśvarāya dadyāt tu tathā vyomāya yādavaiḥ brahmaṇe muṇḍapataye ādityāya puruṣeśvarāya sūryāya namaḥ namaḥ om aneka kāntaye natvā śeṣāya vāsuki takṣaka karkoṭakāya padma śaṅkha kulikebhyaḥ nāga rājebhyaḥ namaḥ tatas pradakṣiṇam kuryāt mātṛkābhyaḥ namaḥ namaḥ om grahebhyaḥ namaḥ om daṇḍanāyakāya namaḥ om mārtaṃḍāya namaḥ om vināyakāya namaḥ evam uddiśya nāmāni dhūpam dattvā varānanaiḥ sūryaguptaiḥ abhiṣṭūya evam vijñāya te tatas arcitaḥ tvam yathā śaktyā mayā bhaktyā vibhāvaso aihika āmuṣmikām nātha kārya siddhim vadasva me evam triṣavaṇam snātvā yaḥ arcayet praṇataḥ ravim sa putravān arogī ca mṛtaḥ saṃlīyate ravau puṣpam śreṣṭham yadā na syāt pattrāṇi samupāharet sarvam na syāt yadā ca eva praṇipātena pūjayet aśaktaḥ praṇipātasya manasā pūjayet ravim tu dravyāṇām vidhiḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ uccāraṇāt ca vai teṣām dhūpa prītaḥ bhavet raviḥ śiraḥ nāsā mukham ca eva bhṛśam āvṛtya yatnatas pūjayet bhāskaram vīra śithilam tu na kārayet tasmāt yuktam sadā kāryam pūjyate ca divākaraḥ dhūpena pūjyamānam tu narāḥ paśyanti yādavaiḥ yānti te paramam sthānam yat na paśyanti sūrayaḥ kriyamāṇam tathā arkam ca bhaktyā paśyanti ye narāḥ sarvān kāmān iha prāpya te yānti paramam padam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne dhūpādivividhavarṇanam nāma tricatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuścatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ājagāma bhagavān vyāsaḥ dvāravatīm purīm draṣṭum nārāyaṇam devam śaṅkha cakra gadā dharam tam āgatam ṛṣim dṛṣṭvā vāsudevaḥ viśām pate abhyutthāya mahā tejāḥ pūjayāmāsa bhārataiḥ śākadvīpam itas gatvā jñāninaḥ mokṣa gāminaḥ tān dṛṣṭvā rūpāt vipra praveśāt karmaṇaḥ tathā katham ete kṣaṇam api tiṣṭhante pṛthivī tale yeṣām raviḥ sadā pūjyaḥ teṣām muktiḥ sadā vaset na agatvā bhojaka tvam hi mokṣam āpnoti kaścana uvāca dhanyāḥ ete mahātmānaḥ bhojakāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ jñāninaḥ karma niṣṭhāḥ ca sadā mokṣa gatim gatāḥ annena oṣadhibhiḥ ca eva ājya homaiḥ ca kṛtsnaśas homam ca śāśvatam kṛtvā param homam tatas śritāḥ para homasya karaṇāt pūta ātmānaḥ hi akalmaṣāḥ mad anu viśanti paramām divyām bhāskarām taijasām kalām karmaṇaḥ sādhane ca ekā tatra ca agnau pratiṣṭhitā vāyu mārga sthitā vyomni dvitīya antar prakāśakā tatas param tṛtīyā tu tat smṛtam sūrya maṇḍale kṣara akṣaraḥ tu vijñeyaḥ mahā sūryaḥ tathā eva ca sa tattvaḥ sakalaḥ proktaḥ tattva hīnaḥ tu niṣkalaḥ tṛṇa gulma latā vṛkṣa vṛka siṃha dvija adhipān sura siddha manuṣyān ca sthala jān jalajān haret yadā kalpa ātmakaḥ ca eva dvitīyām tanum āśritaḥ niṣkalaḥ tu sadā jñeyaḥ saṃsthitaḥ taijasām kalām dvitīyā yā tanuḥ tasya akṣaram tad param padam deva yānam tu pathinam karma yogena saṃsthitā māditya siddha antaritāḥ sāṅkhya yoga vidaḥ ca ye akāram tattvāt ca api dhyāyante puruṣottamaiḥ tri akṣaram ca tam oṃkāram sārdha mātrā traye sthitam vadanti ca ardha mātra stham makāram vyañjana ātmakam dhyāyanti ye makārīyam jñānam te hi sat ātmakam makāraḥ bhagavān devaḥ bhāskaraḥ parikīrtitaḥ makāra dhyāna yogāt ca magāḥ hi ete prakīrtitāḥ bhojayanti sahasrāṃśum tena te bhojakāḥ smṛtāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakasyotpattivarṇanam nāma catuścatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhojaka jñāna varṇanam uvāca yad upalabdhim vipra indra bhojakānām mahā mune brūhi tattvam dvijaśreṣṭha kautukam paramam mama uvāca asthi sthūlam snāyu yutam māṃsa śoṇita lepanam carma avanaddham durgandhi pūrṇam mūtra purīṣayoḥ kapālam vṛkṣa mūlāni kucailam asahāya tā sama tā sarva bhūteṣu evam muktasya lakṣaṇam tile tailam gavi kṣīram kāṣṭhe pāvaka santatiḥ upāyam cintayet asya dhiyā dhīraḥ samāhitaḥ buddhīndriyāṇi saṃyamya śakunān iva pañjare prāṇāyāmaiḥ dahet doṣān dhāraṇābhiḥ ca kilbiṣam pratyāhāreṇa saṃsargān dhyānena anīśvarān guṇān hyāyamānasya dahyante ca ante doṣāḥ yathā agninā tathā indriya kṛtāḥ doṣāḥ dahyante prāṇanigrahāt cittam cittena saṃśodhya bhāvam bhāvena śodhayet cittasya ati prasādena bhāti karma śubha aśubham parvāhṇe lohitam rūpam prathamam ṛc mamayam smṛtam yajuḥ mayam dvitīyam tu śvetam mādhyāhnikam smṛtam kṛṣṇam tṛtīyam sāyāhne sāmnaḥ rūpam tu tat kṛtam prathamam rājasam devaiḥ dvitīyam sāttvikam smṛtam tṛtīyam tāmasam rūpam traiguṇyam tasya kalpitam trayāṇām vyatirekeṇa caturtham sūrya maṇḍalam mahat jyotiḥ prakāśakam sūkṣmam proktam deva nirañjanam oṃkāra praṇavaiḥ yuktāḥ dhyāna nirbhūta kalmaṣāḥ sthitāḥ padmāsane vīrāḥ na abhisaṃnyasta pāṇayaḥ suṣumnā nāḍikā mārgam kumbha recaka pūrakaiḥ padāṅguṣṭha anvitaḥ svinnam ūrdhvam utkṣepayet kramāt nābhi deśe tu tam dṛṣṭvā devam agnim anāmayam somam ca hadaye dṛṣṭvā mūrdhani vā agni śikhām tatas bhittvā deva arcanam mahā bāho kīrtitaḥ keśisūdana bhadayam hadayam sthānam dvitīyam ca agnim āśritam tṛtīyam nābhi saṃstham ca caturtham sūrya maṇḍalam sthānam param vai paramātma saṃstham bhānoḥ sureśasya vadanti tad jñāḥ jñeyaḥ saḥ mokṣaḥ ca nṛṇām saḥ eva saṃsāra vicchitti karam padam tatas idam magānām caritam mayā te prakhyāpitam yāna vareṇa yuktam jñātvā tu imam mokṣa vidaḥ vadanti siddhāḥ ca tat sthānam avāpnuvanti yat mayā uktam idam jñānam deyam śraddhāvatām nṛṇām nāstikānām abuddhīnām na deyam bhūtim icchatā nārāyaṇam mahā bāho jagāma āyatanam hareḥ khyātaḥ yaḥ triṣu lokeṣu gaṃgayā paritoṣitaḥ badaryā maṇḍitaḥ vīraiḥ nara nārāyaṇa āśramaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe bhojaka jñāna varṇanam nāma pañcacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ye ete bhojakāḥ proktāḥ devadevasya pūjakāḥ na anyam bhojyam atha eteṣām brāhmaṇaiḥ ca kadācana bhāskarasya priyāḥ hi ete pūjya tvam ca tathā gatāḥ divyāḥ ca ete smṛtāḥ viprāḥ āditya ambhaḥ samudbhavāḥ kim kurvāṇāḥ tathā karma bhojya tām yānti mama vada imam artham purā pṛṣṭaḥ vāsudevaḥ mahīpate ha ambaḥ purā rājñ tathā sāmbaḥ mahā balaḥ gatau sāmba purīm vīra tathā nārada parvatau mad anna khyātim āgatāḥ āgatāḥ te purīm vīra puṇyām dvāravatīm vibhoḥ tau ṛṣī divam āruḍhau rājñ nārada parvatau mahā tejāḥ hārdikyaḥ vākyam abravīt tau ṛṣī divyam ākhyātau yau tau nārada parvatau abhojyāḥ kila ete vai brāhmaṇānām janārdana uvāca na te bhojyāḥ mahā bāho bhojyāḥ bhojāḥ ca sarvadā tat śrūyatām yaduśreṣṭhaiḥ yat kāryam ca api taiḥ vibho yatamānaiḥ mahā bāho tat iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu yasya vai bhāryā yaḥ ca a vyaṅgam na dhārayet abhojyaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ bhojakaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ mādityam yadu śārdūlaiḥ tathā ca vidhinā vibho jātakarma ādayaḥ yasya na saṃskārāḥ kṛtāḥ vibho āruṇeyaiḥ ca mantraiḥ ca sāvitrīm na ca vai paṭhet pitṛ deva manuṣyāṇām bhūtānām bhāskarasya tu a kṛtvā vidhivat pūjām yaḥ tu bhuṅkte sa dharma hā abhyaṅgena vihīnaḥ yaḥ śaṅkha hīnaḥ tathā eva ca śirasā dhārayet keśān saḥ jñeyaḥ bhojaka adhamaḥ deva arcanam tathā homam snānam tarpaṇam eva ca dānam brāhmaṇa pūjām ca kurvataḥ bhojakasya tu abhyaṅgaḥ yadu śārdūlaiḥ pavitraḥ paramaḥ smṛtaḥ bhojakānām yaduśreṣṭhaiḥ tasya mūle sthitaḥ hariḥ madhye brahmā mahā tejāḥ agre go śruti bhūṣaṇaḥ ṛgvedaḥ yasya mūla sthaḥ madhye sāmāni kṛtsnaśas yajurvedaḥ tathā śreṣṭhaḥ ca atharva sahitaḥ sthitaḥ trayaḥ agnayaḥ tathā rājan trayaḥ lokāḥ sthitāḥ kramāt abhojyaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ saḥ aśuciḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ ye prayacchanti śūdrāṇām vikrīṇanti ca bhojakāḥ te adhamāḥ bhojakāḥ jñeyāḥ ye ca deva sva hāriṇaḥ na te deva priyāḥ tāta vijñeyāḥ bhojaka adhamāḥ brāhmaṇānām puroḍāśaḥ yathā kāya viśodhanaḥ bhojakānām tathā vīra naivedyam kāya śodhanam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne bhojaka varṇanam nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca atra pṛṣṭaḥ yathā devaḥ bhāskaraḥ deva pūjitaḥ aruṇena mahā bāho ke priyāḥ bhojakāḥ tathā pūjāyām te ke yogyāḥ ke na yogyāḥ bhavanti ca iti pṛṣṭaḥ sa bhagavān aruṇena divākaraḥ yat uvāca mahā bāho tat iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu uvāca para dārān para dravyam ye na hiṃsanti bhojakāḥ vāṇijyam kṛṣi sevām tu vedānām nindanam ca ye kurvanti bhojakāḥ jñeyāḥ sarve te mama vairiṇaḥ yeṣām bhāryā saṅgrahaṇam karṣaṇam ye prakurvate nṛpa sevām khaga śreṣṭha vijñeyāḥ patitāḥ tu te bhuñjate ye ca śūdra annam jñeyāḥ te śatravaḥ mama pūjā kṛtā tu yā taiḥ tu tathā arghyam ca khaga uttama pūjām tām atha ca api arghyam na aham gṛhṇāmi khecara ye ete kathitāḥ vīra ye ca śaṅkha vivarjitāḥ nirmālyam ye madīyam tu naivedyam kuṅkumam tathā yajante ye ca sāvitrīm mahāśvetām ca gopateḥ ye na jānanti mama mudrām kiṃkarāṇām ca nāmnaḥ na ete pūjayitum śaktāḥ ye priyāḥ mama bhojakāḥ tān śṛṇuṣva khaga śreṣṭhaiḥ bhūtvā ca ekāgra mānasaḥ deva dvija manuṣyāṇām pitṝṇām ca api pūjakāḥ te priyāḥ mama vai nityam śaktāḥ pūjayitum ravim yeṣām muṇḍam śiraḥ nityam ye ca abhyaṅga samanvitāḥ vādayanti ca ye śaṅkham divyāḥ te bhojakāḥ matāḥ tri kālam ye ca mām nityam su snātāḥ krodha varjitāḥ pūjayanti khaga śreṣṭha te priyāḥ mama bhojakāḥ madīye naktam tu ṣaṣṭhyām ye ca prakurvate saptamyām upavāsam tu tathā saṅkramaṇe mama divyāḥ te brāhmaṇāḥ jñeyāḥ bhojakāḥ mama pūjakāḥ pūjayanti ca ye viprān mad bhaktāḥ mad parāyaṇāḥ te priyāḥ satatam mahyam bhojakāḥ garuḍāgraja na te pūjyāḥ na vandyāḥ ca ye dviṣanti ca mām sadā ye kurvanti mahā yajñān bhojakāḥ garuḍāgrajaiḥ pitṛ deva manuṣyāṇām pūjā artham saṃtatam khaga priyāḥ te satatam vīra bhojakānām tathā uttamāḥ mama vāre ca ye vīra tathā ṣaṣṭhyām ca keśava na rātrau bhuñjate prājñāḥ mad priyāḥ te magāḥ khagaiḥ ittham bhūtāḥ bhojakāḥ yā māgha māse ca saptamī puṣpāṇām karavīrāṇi tathā raktam ca candanam vācakaḥ brāhmaṇānām tu naivedyam modakāḥ tathā ghṛta āhutyaḥ guggulaḥ ca kṣīreṇa snapanam tathā mama vādyānām śaṅkha śabdaḥ ca nṛtyam nāṭyam matam mama pañca varṇā patākā astu śvetam chatram ca me priyam na anya varṇaiḥ kṛtā pūjā tathā prīṇāti mām khaga yathā kṛtā bhojakena pūjā prīṇāti mām sadā uvāca iti uktvā bhagavān devaḥ cāruṇāya purā anagha lakṣaṇam bhojakānām tu tatas merum atha akramat evam bhojyāḥ bhojakāḥ tu na ca abhojyāḥ kadācana anuṣṭhāna vihīnāḥ ye na te bhojyāḥ tu bhojakāḥ bhaumāḥ tu brāhmaṇāḥ ye tu anuṣṭhāna vivarjitāḥ na asti pūjyatamam kiñcid māṅgalyam pāvanam tathā caturṇām iha varṇānām muktvā bhojakam uttamam tasya bhuṅkte svayam bhānuḥ brahmā viṣṇuḥ tathā śivaḥ tathā iha sarva bhūtānām bhojakaḥ pūjyaḥ ucyate tīrthānām tu kurukṣetram sarasām sāgaraḥ yathā tathā pūjyatamaḥ jñeyaḥ pūjyānām bhojakaḥ vibho ca bhartā pūjyaḥ yayā strīṇām śiṣyāṇām ca yathā guruḥ bhojakaḥ tu tathā pūjyaḥ saurāṇām hṛdika ātmaja evam pūjyāḥ tathā bhojyāḥ bhojakāḥ hṛdika ātmajaiḥ atha kim bahunā uktena śrūyatām vacanam mama na asti vedāt param śāstram na asti gaṅgā samā sarit na asti bhānu samaḥ devaḥ na asti mātṛ samā gatiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma saptacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adha sāmbaḥ mahā tejāḥ dṛṣṭvā cakram pituḥ kare tu mahatā tejasā anvitam etat ākhyāhi me sarvam śrotu kāmasya kautukāt uvāca sādhu sādhu mahā bāho sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi aham tvayā śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ putra cakrasya vidhi nirṇayam divyam varṣa sahasram tu bhānum ārādhya śraddhayā prāptam cakram mayā tasmāt bhāskarāt loka pūjitāt tad bhogaḥ pañcaka ārūḍhaḥ sthitaḥ sākṣāt divākaraḥ grahāḥ soma ādayaḥ yasya saṃsthitāḥ nābhi maṇḍale mādityāḥ dvādaśa samāḥ areṣu kramaśas tathā proktam pathiṣu tattvāni pṛthivī ādīni yāni vai etaiḥ tattvaiḥ parivyāptam cakram kāla ātmakam param saṃkṣepāt te mayā ākhyātam dattam cakram iva aparam uvāca idam tāvat mama ācakṣva jñātum icchāmi tattvāt uvāca puruṣa dhiṣṭhitam tat hi tatra sa aṅgaḥ raviḥ sthitaḥ māsāḥ arāḥ mahā bāho pakṣāḥ ca pradhayaḥ smṛtāḥ pathi nābhiṣu yoge ca yoga ākhyāḥ tapana ādibhiḥ nakṣatrāṇi grahāḥ ca eva sadā ca atra sthitāḥ smṛtāḥ etaiḥ vyāptam idam cakram sthūla sūkṣma prabhedāt atra uddiṣṭeṣu kāleṣu ye na uddiṣṭāḥ mayā tava yat te kāla ātmakam cakram idam saṃkṣepāt mayā kathitam tat viniṣkrāntam pradīptāt sūrya maṇḍalāt asurāṇām vadhāya idam mayā labdham divākarāt ārādhya tapasā sūryam purā kalpe jagadgurum atas sampūjyayāmi enam grahaiḥ tattvaiḥ vṛtam sadā tejasā ravi saṃkāśaḥ puṣpottara puram vrajet tasmāt tam mad kula ānandam mitram sampūjayāmi aham piṣṭa gandha ādibhiḥ vā api rakta varṇaka miśrakaiḥ phalaiḥ pakvaiḥ oṣadhibhiḥ tathā dūrvā aṅkuraiḥ kuśaiḥ dhūpaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ gandhaiḥ tathā vastraiḥ ca bhūṣaṇaiḥ vitāna śobhā sikataiḥ palāśaiḥ upaśobhitaiḥ chattra cāmara ghaṇṭābhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ darpaṇa ādibhiḥ nṛtya vāditra gītaiḥ ca vedaiḥ puṇya kathā svanaiḥ sarvatra jaya ghoṣaiḥ ca sampūrṇe pūjayanti ye sampūrṇān vividhān kāmān nirvighnān prāpnuvanti te bhavanti niyatāḥ sāmba tasya sa anugrahāḥ grahāḥ arkasya sarva yajñānām śreṣṭham siddhi pradaḥ bhṛśam puṇyaḥ dharmaḥ tathā puṣṭyaḥ śatrughnaḥ ca viśeṣataḥ śvetaḥ pītaḥ ca kṛṣṇaḥ ca api vibhāgaśaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne kālacakra varṇanam nāma aṣṭacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonapañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya dīkṣā varṇanam uvāca kim pramāṇam likhet cakram tatra padmam ca kim bhavet nemi pradhi āra nābhīnām vibhāgaḥ kriyate katham uvāca catuḥṣaṣṭi aṅgulam cakram kṛtvā vṛttam pramāṇāt aṣṭa aṅgulā bhavet nemiḥ sā iyam vibhavāt sadā ara kṣetram ca padmasya kaṇikā kesarāṇi ca pattra sandhiḥ ca pāda aṅgam kramāt tatra api bhidyate unnatam kamalam tat tu kuryāt nābhau na saṃśayaḥ ākīrṇāḥ saṃvibhaktāḥ ca kartavyāḥ pradhayaḥ kramāt aṅgula sthūla mūlam syāt ara agram triguṇam tatas bhūmiḥ pītā bahis jñeyā karṇikā kesarāṇi ca śeṣam raktam samuddiṣṭam saṃhatāḥ pattra sandhayaḥ nābhi nemi antare lekhāḥ sitāḥ ca aṅgula mānāt aparāhṇe atha pūrvāhṇe varuṇam āvāhayet sadā cakram evam samuddiṣṭam yajana artham mayā te yajñena anena sambaddhaḥ dīkṣitaḥ ca arka maṇḍale ittham mama bhānunā pūrvam idam uktam varānanaiḥ uvāca ke mantrāḥ cakrayajñe asmin devatānām prakīrtitāḥ yajña kramaḥ ca kaḥ proktaḥ rūpam kim ca pṛthak pṛthak uvāca karṇikāyām daleṣu evam aṅgāni hṛdaya ādi ca nāma mantrāḥ caturthī antāḥ teṣām pūrva ukta koṭayaḥ namaskāraḥ ca sarvatra eṣaḥ eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ svāhā antāḥ homa kāle ca karmasu anyeṣu te punar yathā karma avasānāḥ ca prayoktavyāḥ samāsatas om khasolkāya vidmahe divākarāya dhīmahi tat naḥ sūryaḥ pracodayāt sāvitrī ca mahā bāho caturviṃśa akṣarā matā evam mantrāḥ prayoktavyāḥ sarva karmasu atandritaiḥ tasmāt sarva prayatnena mantrān jñātvā vidhim tathā uvāca maṇḍale dīkṣā kasya kāryā katham ca sā uvāca brāhmaṇam kṣatriyam vaiśyam kulīnam śūdram eva ca puruṣam vā striyam vā api dīkṣayet sūrya maṇḍale guruḥ tam dīkṣayet vipraḥ kalpa jñaḥ satya vāc śuciḥ ṣaṣṭhyām agnim samādhāya pūrva ukta vidhinā kramāt sampūjya arkam tathā vahnau hutvā vai haviṣā ravim śiṣyam snātam atha ācāntam khasa ulkā ākṛti vigraham sva aṅgaiḥ ālabhya ca aṅgeṣu darbhavadbhiḥ tathā akṣataiḥ puṣpaiḥ sampūjya ca aṅgāni deyaḥ kāryaḥ baliḥ tathā bhavet ghṛta guḍa kṣīraiḥ taṇḍulaiḥ ca pramāṇāt dattvā śiṣṭāya muktvā evam dattvā ante dantadhāvanam kṣīram vṛkṣa udbhavam tasmai dvādaśa aṅgula saṃnibham tad danta śliṣṭe apanīte ca tena prācyām kṣipet tatas maitrāvāruṇam īśānam vakram saumya samāśritam yām diśam dantakāṣṭhasya mukham paśyati tad patim arcayet tena śāntiḥ syāt iti uktam bhānunā svayam sthāpayeta svayam ca api varam śrutvā samāhitaḥ ācamya kṛta rakṣaḥ tu kṛta dravya adhivāsanaḥ hadayena namet prātar snātvā hutvā hutāśanam svapnam pṛcchet yathā dṛṣṭam śubham saṃvādayet ca tam hadayena aśubhe dṛṣṭe śata homam samācaret svapne paśyati harmyāṇi devatānām hutāśanam nadī yānāni ramyāṇi udyāna upavanāni ca pattra puṣpa phala āḍhyāni kamalāni ca rājatam rājānam śaurya sampannam dhana āḍhyam kṣatriya uttamam śuśrūṣaṇa param śūdram yadi tattva artham ādiśet praśastam bhāṣaṇam ca eva yathā sambhavāt matam etaiḥ sparśanam eteṣām śreṣṭham ārohaṇam tatas parvatam ca samāruhya vipulām bhārgavīm bhajet pītvā surām samudram ca dadhi ājyam kṣīram eva ca somam māṃsam haviḥ bhuktvā kāśyapīm labhate naraḥ labdhvā vastrāṇi ratnāni vividha ābharaṇāni ca mahīm gāḥ ca dhānya upakaraṇāni ca samṛddhim āpnuyāt kiṃcid svapnānām darśanam śubham tasmāt anyat aniṣṭam syāt tasmāt yuktā pratikriyā tarpayitvā dvijān śiṣṭān ānamya pūrvavat gurum sṛṣṭi krameṇa bhṛti artham mukti artham na anyathā bhavet viśuddheṣu viśuddham tam dhyātvā ca āditya vat kramāt niyojayet pṛthivyāḥ ca tatas prabhṛti sarvaśas maṇḍalam śuddham sarva muktam niyojayet evam tu manasā dhyātvā juhuyāt ca eva tam śatam sarvaiḥ mantraiḥ kramāt evam dīkṣā proktā vara aparā kṛtvā eva puṣpapātam tu tasmin āditya maṇḍale baddhvā āsyam añjalau puṣpam kṛtvā dattvā ca mantritam kṣipet vai kula śuddhi artham nāma artham ca viśeṣataḥ sampūjya śrāvayet tatra samayān arka bhāṣitān prātar sāyam madhyāhne raveḥ abhimukhaḥ sthitaḥ upasthānam sadā kuryāt arcanam ca sadā naraḥ a dṛṣṭvā arkam na bhoktavyam divā rātrau hutāśanam dṛṣṭvā bhoktavyam arka ākhyam na bhoktavyam kadācana na laṅghyā pratimā chāyā na laṅghyāḥ tithayaḥ kvacid nakṣatrāṇi grahāḥ yogāḥ māsāḥ māsa adhipāḥ ca ye kālaḥ saṃvatsaraḥ ca api yaḥ kaścid kālaḥ ucyate tasmāt kāla adhipaḥ sūryaḥ svayam kālaḥ ca paṭhyate cetana acetanasya api sarva ātmā yaḥ prakīrtitaḥ stutyaḥ vandyaḥ sadā pūjyaḥ tvayā ayam sarvathā nṛpa manasā karmaṇā vācā deva nindām parityajet iti eṣā paramā dīkṣā te saṃkṣepāt mayā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmba upākhyāne sūrya dīkṣā varṇanam nāma ekonapañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhū uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi yathā pūjyaḥ divākaraḥ sthaṇḍile yadu śārdūlaiḥ nibodha ekāgra mānasaḥ maṇḍalaiḥ aṣṭabhiḥ kāryam cakram kāla ātmakam śubham sarvātmā sakalaḥ devaḥ khasolkaḥ kiraṇa ujjvalaḥ pūjanīyaḥ sadā madhye sahasrakiraṇa āyudhaḥ aruṇam pūjayet prājñaḥ sadā deva agrajam śubham dakṣiṇe pūjayet devīm nikṣubhām bhāskarasya tu revatam dakṣiṇe pārśve uttare piṅgalam sadā saṃjñām ca yadu śārdūlaiḥ śreyase satatam budhaḥ bhāgneyyām lekhakam vīraiḥ nairṛtyām aśvinaḥ tathā pūjayet manum vaivasvatam vibhum aiśānyām pūjayet devīm yamunām loka pāvanām dvitīya āvaraṇe vīraiḥ pūrvatas pūjayet viyant dakṣiṇe ca tatas devīm paścime garuḍam tathā uttare nāga rājānam putram airāvatam śubham pūjayet helim prahelim nairṛte tathā vāyavyām urvaśīm devīm īśāne vinatām tathā tṛtīya āvaraṇe pūrve pūjayet gurum ādarāt paścime tu arkaputram tu uttare dhiṣaṇam tathā aiśāne śaśiputram tu somam āgneya maṇḍale pūjayet dakṣiṇe koṇe nairṛte rāhum ādarāt pūjayet caturtha āvaraṇe devam pūjayet lekham ādarāt āgneye śāṇḍilīputram dakṣiṇe dakṣiṇa adhipam virūpākṣam nairṛte devam jaleśam paścime tathā vāyuputram ca vāyavyām satatam pūjayet naraḥ īśāne devam īśānam pūjayet satatam budhaḥ uttare yakṣarājānām kuberam pūjayet budhaḥ pañcame pūjayet vīraiḥ sadā sva āvaraṇe dvijāḥ pūrvatas paramām devīm mahāśvetām mahāmatiḥ śriyam ṛddhim vibhūtim ca dhṛtim ca eva unnatim tathā pṛthivīm yadu śārdūlaiḥ mahā kīrtim tathā eva ca indram viṣṇum ca aryamaṇam bhagam parjanyam eva ca pūjayet varuṇam ṣaṣṭhe ca evam etān divākarān aruṇam sa ratham vīraiḥ saptame pūjayet budhaḥ tathā aśva anya duśārdūlaiḥ sadā ca āvaraṇe budhaḥ yakṣa rakṣāṃsi gandharvān māsān pakṣān ahāni tu saṃvatsaram tathā putra hi etān saṃpūjayet purā yaḥ evam pūjayet devam bhāskaram satatam naraḥ om khasa ulkāya namaḥ mūlamantra akṣarāṇi iha ca aṅgāni paricakṣate iti uktvā bhagavān devaḥ jagāma āśu gṛham raviḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanam nāma pañcāśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekapañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca atha rājā mahā tejāḥ śatānīkaḥ dvijottamam praṇamya śirasā bhaktyā sumantum vākyam abravīt aho devasya māhātmyam bhāskarasya amita ojasaḥ bhavatā mahyam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam tasmāt na arka samam devam loke paśyāmi suvrata śrutvā evam deva māhātmyam bhāskarasya amita ojasaḥ bhavatā mahyam aśvamedha śatāt varam divākara prasādāt vai su prasannāt vṛṣadhvajāt śrutāḥ mama bahavaḥ dharmāḥ śruti smṛti uditāḥ tathā vaiṣṇavāḥ śaiva dharmāḥ ca tathā paurāṇikāḥ śrutāḥ śṛṇvataḥ na asti mama tṛptiḥ amṛtasya evam eva ca aśvamedha ādayaḥ yajñāḥ bahu sambhāra vistarāḥ hitāya sarva martyānām sarva pāpa bhaya apaham saura dharma param puṇyam pavitram pāpa nāśanam śrutvā tu vacanam rājñaḥ vyāsa śiṣyaḥ mahā muniḥ praṇamya śirasā vyāsam idam vacanam abravīt śrūyatām abhidhāsyāmi sukha upāyam mahā phalam raviṇā kathitam pūrvam aruṇasya viśām pate kṛṣṇasya brahmaṇaḥ vīra śaṃkarasya na vidyate saṃsāra arṇava magnānām sarveṣām prāṇinām ayam saura dharmatamaḥ śrīmān hitāya jagatā uditaḥ yaiḥ ayam śānta hṛdayaiḥ sūrya bhaktaiḥ bhaga arthibhiḥ eka kālam dvi kālam vā tri kālam nityam eva ca stuvanti ye sadā bhānum na te prakṛti mānuṣāḥ svarga lokāt paribhraṣṭāḥ te jñeyāḥ bhāskarāḥ bhuvi na anarkaḥ kīrtayet arkam na anarkaḥ arkam avāpnuyāt tad ṣoḍaśa aṅgā ca sā proktā raviṇā iha divaukasām prātar snānam japaḥ homaḥ tathā deva arcanam nṛpa dvijānām pūjanam bhaktyā pūjā go śvatthayoḥ tathā itihāsa purāṇebhyaḥ bhakti śraddhā puraskṛtam śravaṇam rāja śārdūla veda abhyāsaḥ tathā eva ca mad bhaktyā jana vātsalyam pūjāyām ca anumodanam pustakasya sadā śreṣṭha mama atīva priyam surāḥ mad kathā śravaṇam nityam svara netra aṅga vikriyā mama anusmaraṇam nityam bhaktyā śraddhā puraskṛtam bhaktiḥ iyam yasmin mlecche api vartate vipra indraḥ sa muniḥ śrīmān sajātyaḥ sa ca paṇḍitaḥ tasya aham na praṇaśyāmi sa ca me na praṇaśyati aṣṭādaśa ardha kakṣāyāḥ param ca aṣṭabhiḥ udbhavaiḥ rodhayitvā mahā bāho tathā jñānatareṇa tu durga pālam vijitya āśu bhāskara ardham tu durjayam jitvā ca pura rājānām mahā tejam anaupamam manasā acalayā bhaktyā yaḥ mām dhyāyati mānavaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharma varṇanam atha dvipañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūra dharmeṣu praśna varṇanam sūrāya durlabham dānam sūra homaḥ ca durlabhaḥ tau karau ślāghya tām prāptau yau pūjām cakratuḥ raveḥ sā eva ekā rasanā dhanyā stotram yā kurute raveḥ tat manaḥ puṇya tām prāptam yat hitvā viṣayam nṛpa niścalā ca raveḥ līlā nirbhīkā krodha varjitā uvāca tvad prasādāt dvijaśreṣṭhaiḥ kautūhalam atīva mama yat puṇyam sthāpite sūrye kṛte sūrya ālaye ca yat sthāne kṛte ca yat puṇyam tathā nīrājane kṛte nīlauṣadhī pravāpeṇa nṛtya maṅgala vāditaiḥ sumānām maṇḍape yat ca puṣpa mālā avalambanāt pūjā bhakti viśeṣaiḥ ca gṛha mālā avalambane puṣpa dāna viśeṣeṇa dhūpa dīpaiḥ ca yat phalam tu puṇya śravaṇa kīrtane mad prasādena abhivādana pūjane iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi sūradharmeṣu praśnavarṇanam nāma dvipañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tripañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumatiḥ ca raveḥ bhaktaḥ pāṇḍaveya mahāmate atas te nikhilam vacmi śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ nṛpa kalpa ādau sṛjataḥ vīraiḥ brahmaṇaḥ vividhāḥ prajāḥ ahaṃkāraḥ mahān āsīt na asti loke mad uttamaḥ cintayantaḥ atha te devāḥ keśavaḥ ca narādhipa vivādaḥ tu mahān āsīt kañja ambu nagaukasām aham kartā vikartā aham pālakaḥ aham jagat prabhuḥ iti āha bhagavān brahmā kṛṣṇa bhīmau samarcitau tathā etya śaṃkaraḥ kruddhaḥ kaḥ śaktaḥ mad ṛte bhuvi saṃhartum jagant etat hi sraṣṭum pālayitum tathā na vā śaktaḥ jagant sraṣṭum saṃhartum rakṣitum tathā evam teṣām pravadatām kruddhānām ca parasparam samāviśat tadā ajñānam tamaḥ moha ātmakam vibho atyartham moham āpannāḥ na jānanti iha kiṃcana a paśyantaḥ mithas te tu niṣaṇṇāḥ kṣmā tale vibho āramanti hi ye ca anye te divākaram āsthitāḥ tamasā mohitāḥ sarve nidrā vat krānta cetasaḥ manāk jñānena ca ākrāntāḥ kim kuryāma iti mohitāḥ atha bhūtādhipaḥ devaḥ go śruta ābharaṇa ujjvalaḥ candra ardha kṛta śobhaḥ tu śītala aṃśu viśodhitaḥ apaśyān abravīt devam mādhavam bhūdharam harim uvāca tvat kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahā bāho kva gataḥ tvam mahāmate brahmā ca kva gataḥ vīra na aham paśyāmi vām kvacid kṣmādharam pṛthivīm vṛkṣān deva gandharva dānavān vipulam sāgaram sindhūn nahi paśyāmi kiñcana brūhi mama deva śārdūla vrīḍā mama atīva jāyate śaṃkarasya vacaḥ śrutvā hariḥ vacanam abravīt śoka gadgadayā vācā tamasā mohitaḥ nṛpa uvāca mama api mohitam cetaḥ tamasā atīva śaṃkara pṛcchāvaḥ tam mahātmānam yadi te rocate haraiḥ hitvā darpam ahaṃkāram samam āsthāya kevalam iti evam gadataḥ vākyam viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahā bāho bhīma bhīma mahāmate mama atīva manas buddhī tamasā vaśam āgate na śṛṇomi na paśyāmi nidrā moha vaśam gataḥ tamasā vyāṣṭatam devau na jāne kva gatam mahaḥ atha teṣām pravadatām brahma ādīnām divaukasām darpa krodha bhaya ārtānām tamasā ākrānta cetasām teṣām darpa apahārāya prabodha artham ca gopateḥ tejaḥ rūpam samudbhūtam aṣṭa śṛṅgam anaupamam jvālā mālā vṛtam vīra bahu rūpam ca bhāsate śata yojana vistīrṇam gatam ūrdhvam bhramat tathā prakāśam tejasā tasya jagant sarvam idam nṛpa pureṣu antar yathā vīra ambujasya arcibhiḥ sadā dṛṣṭvā parasparam sarve huṃkāra ādi vikāriṇaḥ tatas vismayam āsīnaḥ dṛṣṭa gopatayaḥ nṛpa aho tejaḥ samuddhūtam naḥ śreyase nṛpa prakāśāya ca lokānām sarve paśyāma kim nu idam jñānāya ūrdhvam gataḥ brahmā ca adhastāt tripurāntaka tiryañcam jagāma deveśaḥ cakra ambu ja gadā adharaḥ a labdhvā tasya te sarve pramāṇam gairika adhipāḥ kaḥ ayam kimātmakaḥ ca ayam kim idam tejasām nidhiḥ aho asya darśanāt sarve sañjātāḥ jñāninaḥ vayam kṛta añjali puṭāḥ sarve ca astuvan tridivaukasaḥ stuvatām api atha eteṣām sahasrakiraṇaḥ raviḥ ātmānam darśayāmāsa kṛpayā parayā vṛtaḥ jñātvā bhaktim mahā bāho brahma ādīnām mahā upamām atha te vyomni deveśam dadṛśuḥ parameśvaram yat vā tat kārttikā sthitam tathā hasta vihīnam ca saptarṣi rahitam tathā sakalam niṣkalam ca eva sadā eka ākāra rūpiṇam tat dṛṣṭvā aneka śirasam aneka caraṇam tathā aneka ānanam akṣībam sahasrākṣam anaupamam dṛṣṭvā evam devadevasya rūpam bhānoḥ mahātmanaḥ kṛta añjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā brahmā stotum pracakrame praṇamya śirasā bhānum idam vacanam abravīt bhāskarāya namaḥ nityam khasa ulkāya namaḥ namaḥ viṣṇave kālacakrāya somāya amita tejase tamaḥ ghnāya surūpāya tejasām nidhaye namaḥ arthāya kāmarūpāya dharmāya amita tejase mokṣāya mokṣa rūpāya sūryāya ca namaḥ namaḥ śubhāya śubha rūpāya śubha dāya śubha ātmane śāntāya śānta rūpāya śāntaye asmāsu vai namaḥ namaḥ te brahma rūpāya brāhmaṇāya namaḥ namaḥ evam stutvā ravim brahmā śraddhayā parayā vibho tūṣṇīm āsīt mahābhāga prahṛṣṭena antarātmanā tripurāriḥ mahā tejāḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim uvāca maheśaiḥ jaya kāntīśaiḥ jaya kāla īśaiḥ śaṃkaraiḥ artha kāma īśa dharma īśa jaya mokṣa īśa śarma da jaya vedāṅga rūpāya graha rūpāya vai namaḥ satyāya satya rūpāya surūpāya śubhāya ca krodha lobha vināśāya kāma nāśāya vai jaya bhave viśvāya viśvarūpāya viśvakarmāya vai jaya jaya ūṅkāra vaṣaṭkāra svāhākāra svadhā maya jaya aśvamedha rūpāya ca agni rūpa aryamāya ca saṃsāra arṇava pītāya mokṣa dvāra pradāya ca stutvā bhānum prayatnāt virarāma mahā rāja praṇamya śirasā ravim atha viṣṇuḥ mahā tejāḥ kṛta añjali puṭaḥ ravim uvāca rāja śārdūlaiḥ bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ uvāca divākaram ravim bhānum mārtaṇḍam bhāskaram bhagam indram viṣṇum harim haṃsam arkam lokagurum vibhum trinetram tri akṣaram tri aṅgam trimūrtim trigatim śubham ṣaṇmukhāya namaḥ nityam trinetrāya namaḥ namaḥ caturviṃśati pādāya namaḥ dvādaśa pāṇaye devānām pataye nityam varṇānām pataye namaḥ tvam brahmā tvam jagannāthaḥ rudraḥ tvam ca prajāpatiḥ bṛhaspatiḥ budhaḥ tvam hi tvam śukraḥ tvam vibhāvasuḥ namaḥ te jñāna rūpāya yajñāya ca namaḥ namaḥ prasīda asme deveśaiḥ bhūteśaiḥ kiraṇa ujjvala saṃsāra arṇava magnānām prasādam kuru gopate pradadhyau nṛpa śārdūlaiḥ ravim tad gata mānasaḥ evam te nara śārdūla devāḥ brahma ādayaḥ anagha stuvanti tam mahātmānam sahasrakiraṇam ravim iti evam stuvatām teṣām ravim bhaktyā mahātmanām atha tuṣṭaḥ raviḥ teṣām brahma dīnām jagatpatiḥ vijñāya bhaktim paramām śraddhām ca paramām vibhuḥ uvāca saḥ mahā tejāḥ prahṛṣṭena antarātmanā ca brahmānam viṣṇum īśānam āmantrya etān viśām pate dṛṣṭvā tān praṇatān sarvān śirobhiḥ avanim gatān kṛtvā tu vacanam bhānoḥ brahmā lokaguruḥ nṛpa jagāma śirasā bhūmau uvāca saḥ kṛtāñjaliḥ kṛtakṛtyaḥ asmi deveśa pūtaḥ ca asmi khagādhipa apaśyataḥ ca deveśaiḥ mūḍham āsīt manaḥ mama gatvā śirobhiḥ avanim aṣṭa aṅgaiḥ patitasya ca brahmanaḥ vacanam śrutvā pūṣā devaḥ jagatpatiḥ tathā iti āha mahā rājaiḥ virāṭaiḥ praśraya anvitam brahmaṇe ca varam dattvā rājñ devaḥ divākaraḥ uvāca tryambakam devam śaśāṅka kṛta śekharam bhūteśaiḥ bhūbhṛt jā dayita anaghaiḥ bhāskarasya vacaḥ śrutvā īśvaraḥ tripurāntakaiḥ gatvā tu śirasā bhūmau praṇamya uvāca bhāskaram uvāca gataḥ aham paramām siddhim gataḥ ca paramām gatim na a prāpyam asti deveśaiḥ na a sādhyam mama kiṃcana acalām dehi mama bhaktim ātmanaḥ caraṇam naya śrutvā nārāyaṇaiḥ mahā bāho varam varaya go dharaiḥ śrutvā tu bhāskara vacaḥ kīlāla janakaḥ hariḥ uvāca parayā bhaktyā natvā ca śirasā ravim uvāca yena aham sarva devānām uttamaḥ syām jagatpate prajānām pālanam deva devānām ca grahādhipa varṇānām āśramāṇām ca varṇa dharmasya vā vibho duṣṭa daitya vināśāya lokānām pālanāya ca sṛṣṭaḥ aham bhavatā pūrvam kalpa ādau ca kṛtaḥ anagha vyādhiḥ duḥkham manas rogam dāridryam saṃtati kṣayaḥ evam tvā gopate deva bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme sūrya tejas varṇanam nāma tripañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuḥpañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ trayī upākhyāna varṇanam śrutvā tu vacanam bhānuḥ viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ uvāca kuru śārdūlaḥ ādityaḥ kṛpayā anvitaḥ uvāca tat tvad paramam vacaḥ yad artham prārthitaḥ kṛṣṇa tat sarvam te bhaviṣyati deva dānava yakṣāṇām gandharva uraga rakṣasām ajeyaḥ tvam mahā bāho bhaviṣyasi na saṃśayaḥ brahmā api satatam śaktaḥ jagant sraṣṭum bhaviṣyati saṃhartum śaṃkaraḥ ca api mad prasādāt bhaviṣyati tvām ārādhya bhaviṣyāmaḥ vayam sarve sura uttamāḥ katham ārādhayāmaḥ hi bhavantam śraddhayā anvitāḥ bhavataḥ hi na paśyāmaḥ mūrtim parama pūjitām sarvam aneka ākṛti ca adbhutam bhaktim vinā pūjayitum na śakyante divaukasaḥ tasmāt darśaya tām mūrtim ātmanaḥ yā parā matā yena tvām pūjayitvā tu vayam siddhāḥ bhavāmahe uvāca sādhu sādhu mahādeva sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi suvrata śṛṇu ca ekamanāḥ kṛtsnam gadataḥ mama mānada śreyase sarva lokānām ādi madhya anta kṛt sadā ekā mama rājasā mūrtiḥ brahma iti parikīrtitā sṛṣṭim karoti sā nityam kalpa ādau jagantām vibho dvitīyā sāttvikā proktā yā parā parikīrtitā jagant sā pālayet nityam duṣṭa daitya vināśinī tṛtīyā tāmasā jñeyā īśā iti ṣa rikīrtitā trailokyam saṃharet sā tu kalpa ante śūlapāṇinī caturthā tu guṇaiḥ hīnā satya ādibhiḥ anuttamā sā ca aśakyā kvacid draṣṭum sthitā sā ca abhavat sadā tayā tatam idam sarvam yat ca udgītham tu mama gatiḥ niṣkalā sakalā sā tu surūpā rūpa varjitā antargatā ca lokānām na ca karma phalam gatā tiṣṭhamānā api aliptā sā padma pattram iva ambhasā anaṣṭā ca sadā ṣaḍbhiḥ sapta atītya vyavasthitā catustanā ca sā ṣaḍbhyaḥ turīya ākhyā su pūjitā na sā spraṣṭum tvayā śakyā hariṇā brahmaṇā na ca mām an ārādhya bhūteśa vyoma rūpam kadācana ahaṃkāra vimūḍhānām tamasā ca trilocana prakāśāya ca lokānām jvālā mālā samākulam yasya saṃdarśanāt eva yūyam sarve prabodhitāḥ tasmāt ārādhayasva enam a spṛṣṭam gamana upamam mad mūrtim yena tām divyām drakṣyasi tvam trilocana dakṣiṇe līyate brahmā vāme tasya janārdanaḥ gāyatrī līyate tasya hṛdaye loka mātaraḥ līyante mūrdhani vai vedaḥ sa ṣaḍaṅga padakramaḥ ākāśam vyom iti āhuḥ pṛthivī nikṣubhā matā nikṣubhā dayitā mama tasmāt ārādhaya vyoma tvam brahmā keśavaḥ tathā tatas yāsyasi saṃsiddhim ṣaṣ aṅgām paramām śubhām para āśritya śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ mām bhaktyā vyoma rūpam janārdanaḥ antarikṣa gatam tīrtham puṣkaram loka pāvanam evam mām satatam yūyam samārādhya jagatpatim samānām ca su divyānām sahasra trayam ādarāt tatas drakṣyatha me mūrtim paramām yām viduḥ budhāḥ kadamba golaka ākārām raśmi mālā ākulām parām atha nārāyaṇaḥ devaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim kṛta añjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā idam vacanam abravīt uvāca tam ārādhya vayam sarve yāsyāmaḥ siddhim uttamām kīdṛś vyom tu aham brahmā haraḥ ca tripurāntakaḥ ārādhayāmahe deva bhaktyā śreyaḥ artham ātmanaḥ yena siddhim gamiṣyāmaḥ tam ārādhya divākaram tasmāt naḥ lakṣaṇam brūhi vyomnaḥ parama pūjita catuṣpañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañja pañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sādhu sādhu suraśreṣṭha sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi bhūdhara śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ kṛṣṇa gadataḥ nikhilam mama tvā ārādhya ca cakrāṅkam śaṃkaraḥ vṛttam ādarāt yatheṣṭam ṛbhavaḥ sarve bhaktyā mām pūjayantu vai tatas brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ śrutvā vākyam vibhāvasoḥ asmābhiḥ bhagavān pṛṣṭaḥ stejasā prajvalanti ca saṃbhūtāḥ jñāninaḥ sarve bhavataḥ darśanāt vayam vayam tvad mūrtayaḥ sarve tejasā te saṃvṛtāḥ utpatti sthiti nāśāya lokānām te śāsanāt sthitāḥ sarve surajyeṣṭhaiḥ lokapālāḥ ca kṛtsnaśas adhunā sādha yāma iha vyomnaḥ pūjām vrajāmahe ittham teṣām vacaḥ śrutvā bhāskaraḥ vāritaskaraḥ uvāca brahma viṣṇu īśān sāma pūrvam idam vacaḥ uvāca yūyam mad mūrtayaḥ sarve vaḥ aham eva hi yat etat darśanam devāḥ ca yat uttamam jvālā mālā ākulam śubhram śāṇḍileyam iva ujjhitam tvad deva śārdūlāḥ tat nibodhata kāraṇam ahaṃkāra vimūḍhānām mithas kalahinām tathā prabodha artham hi vaḥ tamasaḥ nāśanāya ca pravartanāya sarveṣām karmaṇām ca pradarśitam tasmāt evam viditvā tu na ahaṃkāraḥ kadācana mānam darpam ahaṃkāram pūrvam tyaktvā su dūratas mām bhaktyā satatam śraddhayā anvitāḥ magāma adarśanam teṣām paśyatām eva bhārataiḥ atha te vismitāḥ sarve brahma viṣṇu pinākinaḥ bṛhadbhānuḥ mahātejāḥ lokadīpaḥ vibhāvasuḥ yena sarve vayam trātā nighnatā vipulam tamaḥ ārādhayāmaḥ tam sarve gatvā sthānāni kṛtsnaśas tat vyom pūjayitvā tu parayā śraddhayā vibhoḥ ha āmantrya te mithas sarve gatāḥ pūjā artham ādarāt jagāma puṣkaram brahmā śālagrāmam janārdanaḥ mārādhayanti tam devam bhāskaram vāritaskaram kṛtvā nityam apūjayat apūjayat sadā vṛttam vyomam bhaktyā samanvitaḥ divya varṣa sahasra ante pūjayantaḥ divākaram gandha mālya upahāraiḥ tu nṛtya gīta pravāditaiḥ toṣayat mahātmānam kurvāṇāḥ tapaḥ uttamam atha teṣām mahā rāja prasannaḥ bhuvanādhipaḥ darśayāmāsa loka ātmā yugapad vai vibhāvasuḥ ca mahā tejāḥ caturdhā yogāt naghaiḥ gatvā ekena suraśreṣṭham saḥ bravīt paramam vacaḥ sa tatāpa tathā anyena ratha ārūḍhaḥ divam sadā evam yoga balāt bhānuḥ kṛtavan mahat adbhutam ugre tapasi vartantam dṛṣṭvā ca enam caturmukham uvāca tam mahā rājaiḥ bhāskaraḥ caturānanam paśya paśya suraśreṣṭhaiḥ vara dam mām upāgatam dṛṣṭvā jagāma praṇataḥ hi avanim mukha paṅkajaiḥ uvāca paramam vākyam kṛta añjali puṭaḥ sthitaḥ namaḥ te bhūtaiḥ bhavya īśaiḥ bhūtāde bhūtabhāvanaiḥ uvāca evam eva yathā āttha tvam na asti tatra vicāraṇā tvam mama prathama jaḥ putraḥ saṃbhūtaḥ kāraṇāt purā yam icchasi sura jyeṣṭhaiḥ mā tvam śaṅkām kuru prabho tum śaknomi sṛṣṭim ca prasādāt te gopate hi mama deva sṛṣṭiḥ na iha prasidhyati uvāca tatas yāsyati te siddhim kṛtsnā sṛṣṭiḥ caturmukha tam vai vyoḍham lokanātham jagatpatim punar āha surajyeṣṭhaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim uvāca yat mama rūpam mahat vyoma pṛṣṭha śṛṅgam anuttamam indraḥ pūrvadiśaḥ bhāge āgneyyām śāṃḍilīsutaḥ dakṣiṇasyām yamaḥ nityam nairṛtyām atha nirṛtiḥ paścimāyām tu varuṇaḥ vāyavyām tu sadāgatiḥ aiśānyām śaṃkaraḥ devaḥ madhye tvam viṣṇunā saha tathā ātmānam manyate ca narādhipaiḥ cakāra ca tathā sarvam bhāskara uktam aśeṣatas dadarśa tatra bhūteśam tapaḥ tīvram samāśritam yapardinam śūla dharam candra arka kṛta śekharam pūjayantam param vyoma suvratam teja sa anvitam gandha mālya upahāraiḥ ca nṛtya gīta pravāditaiḥ saṃpūjya eva mahat vyom jagāma śirasā mahīm dṛṣṭvā evam pūjayantam ca bhāskaraḥ tripurāntakam tuṣṭā uvocat mahā tejāḥ go śruta ābharaṇam haram bhīma tuṣṭaḥ asmi te vatsa varam mattaḥ vṛṇuṣva vai te antikam aham prāptaḥ vara daḥ bhūbhṛt ālayaiḥ śrutvā evam vacanam bhānoḥ mahādevaḥ mahīpate uvāca praṇataḥ bhūtvā aṣṭāṅgaiḥ bhū talam gataḥ śubha ālaya śubha ādhāra vikartana śubha ānana uvāca lalāṭāt tvam samutpannaḥ putraḥ putravatām varaiḥ uvāca prayaccha me varam bhāno dehi bhaktim mama acalām deva dānava gandharva yakṣa rakṣas gaṇān tathā nirjitya aham yathā devaiḥ yuga ante saṃhare prajām uvāca etat triśūlam paramam te śastram bhaviṣyati īśāne ca tathā bhāge vyomnaḥ vāsaḥ bhaviṣyati uvāca evam bhavatu mama deva yaḥ prasādaḥ tvayā kṛtaḥ nāma pañcapañcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ittham dattvā varam bhānuḥ īśvarāya viśām pate śālagrāmam jagāma āśu varam dātum hareḥ nṛpaiḥ prajvalantam sva tejasā gandha mālya upahāraiḥ ca nṛtya gīta pravāditaiḥ evam saṃpūjya tat vyom bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ jagāma śirasā bhūmim hṛdi dhyāyan divākaram uvāca viṣṇum āmantrya paśya mām āgatam hare tat vākyam keśavaḥ śrutvā śirasā ca mahīm gataḥ mad mad arka rave bhāno bhaga pūrṇa divākara saṃsāra arṇava magnānām trāhi deva vṛṣadhvajaiḥ mahā bhāgavataḥ vacanam ākarṇya harṣam prāpya divākaraḥ sādhu kṛṣṇa mahā bāho tuṣṭaḥ ham te keśava niśamya te parām bhaktim śraddhām ca puruṣottamaiḥ niśamya vacanam bhānoḥ viṣṇuḥ bhaktyā samanvitaḥ tad añjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā idam vacanam abravīt prayaccha tu acalām bhaktim yathā śatrum parājaye tathā mama varam dehi sarva arāte vināśanam lokānām pālane yuktim balam vīryam yaśaḥ sukham sādhu sādhu mahā bāho brahmanaḥ tvam jaghanya jaḥ bhaktaḥ ca api mama atyantam brahmaṇyaḥ ca sadā anaghaiḥ sarva āyudha varam vīra sarva arāti vināśanam mahā prasādam iti uktvā jagāma śirasā mahīm api varam dattvā keśavāya amita ojase gam lokānām pālane śaktim balam vīryam yaśaḥ sukham tattvā kṛṣṇāya deveśaḥ tathā anyat api kāṃkṣitam evam brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ pūjayitvā divākaram mantaḥ babhūvuḥ te sarga ādīnām pravartane iti te kathitam puṇyam ākhyānam pāpa nāśanam yaḥ idam śṛṇuyāt nityam paṭhet stotra trayam ca yaḥ mad agneyam yānam ārūḍhaḥ yāti bhānoḥ padam vidyā arthī labhate vidyām prasādāt bhāskarasya tu tejasā ravi saṃkāśaḥ prabhayā pṛśni sannibhaḥ modate suciram kālam jñāninām uttamaḥ bhavet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme traisuropākhyānavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭpaṃcāśaduttaraśata tamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya avatāra kathā prastāva varṇanam uvāca yāsyāmi dvija śārdūla prapanna timira apahaḥ etat mama mahat āścaryam śaṃsa bhūmim katham vrajet deva ādīnām praṇetā yaḥ yaḥ bhuvi prasavaḥ vibhuḥ sa janmani katham puṇyām buddhim cakre vidām vara gobhiḥ pālayate kṛtsnam ātmanaḥ yaḥ svayam raviḥ mahābhūtāni bhūtātmā yaḥ cakāra dadhāra ca yena gobhiḥ samākrāntāḥ vipraiḥ lokāḥ caturdaśa yaḥ antakāle jagant pītvā kṛtvā vajra mayam vapuḥ lokam ekārṇavam cakre dṛśyate svena karmaṇā yaḥ purāṇe purāṇa ātmā tejasām rūpam āsthitaḥ api sṛṣṭvā dvijaśreṣṭhaiḥ yaḥ sasarja vasuṃdharām dadau kṛtvā vasumatīm surāṇām sura sattamaḥ yaḥ sthitaḥ hi analam pītvā saṃvatsara mayaḥ ca yaḥ pātāla stha ūrṇava rasam madhya toya mayam haviḥ sahasra śirasam devam sahasra akṣam sahasraśas hariḥ ca vakṣasaḥ yasya lalāṭāt yasya śaṃkaraḥ yena te nihatāḥ daityāḥ maṃdehāḥ nāma nāmnaḥ brahma ādīnām durādharṣaḥ yaḥ sadā vighna nāśanaḥ sarva deva mayam kṛtvā sarva āyudha dharam vapuḥ eka cakra ratha ārūḍhaḥ garuḍāgraja sārathiḥ yaḥ jagant sarvam saha dānava rākṣasam prakāśatamam a spṛṣṭam vapuḥ yasya sadā dvijaiḥ nāśayet yaḥ tu satatam tamaḥ lokasya śāntaye nāśayitvā tamaḥ yaḥ tu kriyāḥ sarvāḥ pravartayet agnim āhavanīm ca eva vedim ca eva kuśam srucam sarvān imān ca yaḥ cakre havya bhāga pradān mukhe havya ādān ca surān yajñe kavya ādān ca pitṝn na api bhāga arthe madhudhānāya cakre yaḥ yajña karmaṇi pūṣaṇam ca sutam somam pavitrāmaraṇīm api yajñāni ca dravyāṇi yajñān ca api sa ṛtvijaḥ sadasyān yajamānān ca medhāvinaḥ tathā uttamān mad bhāja purā sarvam pārameṣṭhayena karmaṇā yuga anurūpaḥ yaḥ kṛtvā lokān anuvaram kramāt kṣaṇān kalāḥ ca kāṣṭhāḥ ca kāla vaikalyam eva ca muhūrtāḥ tithayaḥ māsāḥ pakṣāḥ saṃvatsarāḥ tathā bhāga yogāḥ ca pramāṇam vividham nṛṣu āyuḥ kṣetrāṇi apacaya upacayān ca eva yaḥ akarot sṛṣṭāḥ lokāḥ trayaḥ nantāḥ yena jñānena vartmanā bhūta gaṇāḥ sṛṣṭāḥ sarva bhūta ātmanā sadā yaḥ gatāgati potena trātā asti jagat īśvaraḥ yaḥ gatiḥ vṛṣa yuktānām gatiḥ yaḥ a pāpa karmaṇām dhātu vaidyasya yaḥ vettā catur āśrama saṃśrayaḥ diś ambara anubhūtaḥ ca vāyuḥ vāyu vibhāvanaḥ pañca agnīṣoma ātmakam jyotiḥ yogi īśaḥ kṣaṇadā antakaḥ yaḥ param śrūyate jyotiḥ yaḥ param śrūyate tapaḥ yam param paramam prāhuḥ paramātmānam acyutam brahma ādibhiḥ stutaḥ devaḥ yaḥ ca daitya anta kṛt vibhuḥ yuga aṃteṣu ataṃkaḥ yaḥ tu yaḥ ca loka antaka uttamaḥ vettā yaḥ veda viduṣām prabhuḥ yaḥ prabhaviṣṇunām mānuṣāṇām manaḥ bhūtaḥ tapaḥ bhūtaḥ tapasvinām mākāśa prasavaḥ vāyuḥ vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ hutāśanaḥ deva āhuti pradāna udyat prāṇa agni stama nāśanaḥ rasāt hi śoṇitam bhavati śoṇitāt māṃsam ucyate śukrāt garbhaḥ samabhavat rasa mūlena karmaṇā tatas kṣmāsaṃbhavaḥ jñeyaḥ dvitīyaḥ rāśiḥ ucyate śukram soma ātmakam vidyāt ātma rūpam yad ātmakam bhavaḥ rasa ātmakaḥ teṣām vīryam ca śaśi pāvakam kaphasya pṛthivī sthānam pittam nābhau pratiṣṭhitam nābhi koṣṭha antara stham tu tatra devaḥ divākaraḥ pittam agniḥ smṛtaḥ yasmāt agnīṣoma ātmakam jagant saṃcakre prāṇaḥ apānaḥ samānaḥ ca udānaḥ vyānaḥ eva ca apānam paścime kāyaḥ udāna ūrdhvam śarīra gaḥ bhūta avāptiḥ tatas tasya jāyati indriya gocarā pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśaḥ apaḥ jyotiḥ ca pañcamaḥ tasya indriyāṇi piṣṭāni svam svam yogam pracakramuḥ nidrā hi ākāśa yoniḥ ca jala āśraye pravartate hiraṇya cakṣuṣi tad janma tad aṃśaḥ tāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ grāmāḥ ca viṣayāḥ ca eva yasya vīryam pravartitam evam yaḥ sṛjate lokān sa deva asura mānavān sa katham devadeveśaḥ garbham eṣyati ca aṃśumant yathā udaram adityāḥ tu yaḥ svayam ca aviśat purā āścaryam paramam pṛcche tvām aham bhāskarasya vai etat āścaryam ākhyānam kathayasva mahā mune samākhyāhi balam vīryaiḥ bhānoḥ amita tejasaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme sūryāvatārakathāprastāvavarṇanam nāma saptapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca praśna bhāraḥ mahān tātaiḥ tvayā uktaḥ raśmimālini yathāśakti tu vakṣyāmi śrūyatām bhānavam yaśaḥ bhānoḥ prabhāva śravaṇe yasya te matiḥ utthitā hanta bhānoḥ pravṛttim ca śṛṇu divyām mayā īritām sahasra āsyam sahasra akṣam sahasra kiraṇam ca yam pātrāṇi samatītāni veda dīkṣī carum śubham śrotriyam śūrpa musalam prokṣaṇam dakṣiṇāyanam adhvaryum sāmagam vipram sadasyam sadanam tathā yūpam samidh sruvam darvīm musala ulūkhalāni ca prāgvaṃśam jayabhūtim ca hotāram cayanam ca yat rahasyāni pramāṇāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca pratiṣṭhitāni dārḍhyam ca sthaṇḍilāni kuśān tathā agrebhujī somabhujām yaḥ ca triṣu udāhṛtaḥ āyurveda vidaḥ viprāḥ yajante śāśvatam vibhum tasya bhānoḥ sureśasya vīra candana mālinaḥ prāhuḥ bhāva sahasrāṇi samatītāni anekaśas bhūyas ca eva bhaviṣyanti vinaśyanti dine dine yat pṛcchasi mahā rāja puṇyām divyām kathām śubhām tām aham tvam pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu sarvam aśeṣatas ca bahuśas sarva bhūta ātmā svayam samabhijāyate tathā samabhavat devaḥ kaśyapasya adityāḥ sutaḥ tuṣṭaḥ dattvā varam vīra viriñcasya mahātmanaḥ yam yam janayate putram aditiḥ kaśyapāt vibhoḥ sa saḥ yāti vināśam vai tad kṣaṇāt eva bhārata dṛṣṭvā sutān naśyamānān putra śoka anvitā aditiḥ magāma kaśyapa abhyāśe śoka vyākulita īkṣaṇā sā apaśyat tam ca mārīcam munim dīptam tapaḥ nidhim mad tejasā vahni saṃkāśam sauram vṛka sama prabham nyasta daṇḍa śriyā yuktam baddha kṛṣṇa ajina ambaram atha aditiḥ ca dṛṣṭvā evam bhartāram amita ojasam śoka gadgadayā vācā idam vacanam abravīt śrutvā tu vacanam tasyāḥ kaśyapaḥ muni sattamaḥ tad vākyaiḥ muktam tam sarvam yat uktam tasya jāyayā kaśyapasya vacaḥ śrutvā kañjajaḥ vākyam abravīt iti uktvā yānam āruhya āgneyam padma locanaḥ aditiḥ kaśyapaḥ brahmā jagmuḥ vipulam āśritāḥ te muhūrtena saṃprāptāḥ sūrya lokam su varcasam maṃtum icchanti tejasām rāśim uttamam gacchantaḥ te ca vistīrṇām ādityasya parām sabhām ṣaṭpada udgīta ninadām sa abhagaiḥ tu samīritām bahu ṛca mukhāḥ proktāḥ puṇyavat akṣarāḥ tuṣṭuvuḥ puruṣa vyāghram vitateṣu ca karmasu yajña sandhau veda vidām padakrama vidām tathā ghoṣeṇa parama ṛṣīṇām sarvam tatra nināditam yajña saṃstava vidbhiḥ ca śikṣā vidbhiḥ tathā dvijaiḥ aṣṭādaśa purāṇa jñaiḥ sarva vidyā viśāradaiḥ mīmāṃsā hetuvāda jñaiḥ sarva vāda viśāradaiḥ lokāyatika mukhyaiḥ ca tuṣṭuvuḥ sūryam īritam homa parān yogyān dadṛśuḥ kaśyapa ādayaḥ tasyām sabhāyām āste saḥ raśmi mālī divākaraḥ sura asura guruḥ śrīmān śuśubhe vīra māyayā upāsate ca tatra eva prajānām patim īśvaram dakṣaḥ pracetāḥ pulahaḥ marīciḥ ca dvijottamaḥ bhṛguḥ atriḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca gautamaḥ nāradaḥ tathā mahī prakṛtiḥ ca vikārāḥ ca yat ca anyat kāraṇam mahat sa aṅga upāgāḥ ca catvāraḥ vedāḥ lokapate tathā lavāḥ ca ṛtavaḥ ca eva saṃkalpa praṇavāḥ tathā arthaḥ dharmaḥ ca kāmaḥ ca mokṣaḥ ca sa viśeṣataḥ mārutaḥ viśvakarmā ca aśvi nau anya vāhanau evam uktaḥ su vacanaiḥ bhānunā prabhaviṣṇunā jagāma kaśyapaḥ vīra saha adityā svam āśramam bhūtātmānam mahātmānam divyam varṣa sahasrakam surāṇām śaraṇam devaḥ ca asurāṇām vināśanaḥ prahatya daitya saṃghān ca surāṇām nāda vardhane tat bhavat parama ānandaḥ sarveṣām tatra tasthivasām na iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharmeṣu sūryotpattiḥ nāma aṣṭapañcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya avatāra varṇanam uvāca dakṣaḥ prajāpatiḥ ca eva namaskāram cakāra ha vidyotamānaḥ vapuṣā sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ upātiṣṭhata deveśam bhānum ca ṛṣi gaṇaiḥ saha evam te deva gandharvāḥ upāgāyanta bhaktyāḥ utpannam dvādaśa ātmānam bhāskaram vāritaskaram indraḥ vivasvant pūṣā ca tvaṣṭā ca savitā tathā bhargaḥ om aśumant aryama arkaḥ pṛśniḥ mārtaṃḍaḥ eva ca iti ekādaśe eva ete dvādaśaḥ viṣṇuḥ ucyate evam dvādaśadhā jātam aṃśumantam mahā adbhutam stuvanti devatāḥ sarve gatāḥ ca tarasā mahīm mṛgavyādhaḥ ca śarvaḥ ca mṛgāṅka aṅkaḥ mahā yaśāḥ ajaikapād ahirbudhnyaḥ patiḥ kācaḥ paraṃtapaḥ damanaḥ ca īśvaraḥ ca eva kapālī ca viśām pate aśvinaḥ vasavaḥ ca aṣṭa garuḍaḥ ca mahā balaḥ viśvedevāḥ ca sādhyāḥ ca tasthuḥ prāñjalayaḥ nṛpa nāga rājaḥ mahā rāja vāsukiḥ prāñjaliḥ sthitaḥ anye ca bahavaḥ nāgāḥ rākṣasāḥ ca mahā balāḥ tārkṣyaḥ ca ariṣṭanemiḥ ca garuḍaḥ ca mahā balaḥ aruṇaḥ ca aruṇiḥ ca eva tatra prāñjalayaḥ sthitāḥ prāha devaguruḥ śrīmān suraiḥ sarvaiḥ mahā ṛṣibhiḥ yasmāt prekṣayate sarvam prabhaviṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ tasmāt loka īśvaraḥ śrīmān vivasvant ca bhavatu iti deva dānava yakṣāṇām gandharva uraga rakṣasām evam uktvā tu bhagavān sārdham devarṣibhiḥ prabhuḥ yā gatiḥ yajña śīlānām yā gatiḥ puṇya karmaṇām yā gatiḥ siddha yogānām yā gatiḥ ca mahātmanām yasya aṣṭaguṇam aiśvaryam samabhūt deva sattamam yam prāpya śāśvatam viprāḥ na āvartante bhava arṇave sevaṃte yam yata ātmānaḥ duścaram vratam āsthitāḥ sahasramūrdhā rakta akṣaḥ śeṣa ādibhiḥ anuttamaiḥ sarve ca yam yata prāṇāḥ dhyāyanti brahma rūpiṇam yam veda vidaḥ gāyanti vettāram yajña dāyi nam tam putram dvādaśa ātmānam kaśyapaḥ prāpya sattamam madhu piṅgalaḥ mahā bāhuḥ kambu grīvaḥ hasan iva saḥ uvāca mahā tejāḥ kaśyapam ca ṛṣi satta mama dattvā varam purā vipraiḥ viriñcasya mahātmanaḥ tasmāt tvam ṛṣi śārdūlaiḥ kuru sṛṣṭim anaupamām evam ārādhya deveśam brahmā sṛṣṭim avāptavan ārādhya kaśyapaḥ ca api bhāskaram sutam āptavan iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ubhayasaptamīmahātmye sūryāvatāravarṇanam nāma ekonaṣaṣṭi uttara śatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya avatāra varṇanam uvāca brahma ādayaḥ api yam nityam pūjayanti vidhānāt brahmā viṣṇuḥ surāḥ brahman tam ārādhya divākaram dadṛśuḥ tasya kimbhūtam rūpam yat tat mahā adbhutam uvāca mārādhya devam īśānam bhāskaram sūti vācakam ka viṣṇū kuru śārdūlaiḥ jagmatuḥ tau himācalam gopateḥ antikam vīra prahṛṣṭau vibhu darśane kunda indu saṃnibham draṣṭum kañja jaḥ ca acyutaḥ ca tau dadṛśatuḥ mahātmānam candra ardha kṛta śekharam pūjayantam vivasvantam bhāskaram vīra vat nṛpa mahātmānam kavi ṣṇū tam trilocanam bho bho bhīmaiḥ suraśreṣṭhaiḥ paśyāvām iha ca āgatau praṇamya śirasā bhūmau kṛtvā pūjām vidhānāt uvāca madhuram vākyam śikṣā akṣara samanvitam harṣaiḥ gadgadayā vācā diśaḥ san nādayan iva dṛṣṭavantau param kiṃcid rūpam devasya śaṃkaram niśamya vacanam vīra śaṃkarasya mahātmanaḥ ūcatuḥ tau mahātmanau kaviṣṇū deva sattamau ārādhayitum eva api hi āgatau tentikam ca tam tasmāt ārādhayāmaḥ hi ekībhūya vibhāvasum śrutvā tu vacanam vīra kañja ja acyutayoḥ haraḥ tathā iti āha mahā bāho harṣāt utphulla locanaḥ atha te rāja śārdūla vivigo gatayaḥ nṛpa jagmuḥ tam parvata śreṣṭham udayācalam āśu vai tam āsādya nagam puṇyam śṛṅgaiḥ tribhiḥ alaṃkṛtam nānā dhātu pinaddha aṅgam nānā dhātu vibhūṣitam hi tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat divya varṣa sahasra ante tapantaḥ saṃsthitāḥ nage sthāṇu vat saṃsthitaḥ bhūmau ūrdhvabāhuḥ trilocanaḥ pañca agnim bhajamānaḥ tu sthitaḥ viṣṇuḥ avāk śirāḥ evam varṣa sahasra ante tapaḥ cakruḥ su dāruṇam atha brahma īśa viṣṇūnām kurvatām tapaḥ uttamam tuṣṭaḥ aham bhavatām dātu miha āyātaḥ varam svayam uvāca niśamya vacanam bhānoḥ śāntam hṛdyam manoramam praṇamya śirasā keśāḥ idam vacam abruvan takṛtyāḥ vayam sarve prasādāt te gopate tvām ārādhya purā devaiḥ tvattaḥ prāpya varam śubham utpatti sthiti nāśānām vayam sarve divākara saṃbhūya iha samarthāḥ vai tvad prasādāt na saṃśayaḥ yat te paramakam rūpam durlabham durdṛśam tathā teṣām tat vacanam śrutvā brahma viṣṇu īśa bhāṣitam darśayāmāsa tat rūpam adbhutam loka pūjitam bhūḥ pādau dyauḥ śiraḥ ca api tatra agnī locane mate pāda aṅgulayaḥ piśācāḥ ca hasta aṅgulayaḥ ca guhyakāḥ yakṣāḥ kukṣiṣu saṃlīnāḥ keśāḥ ca apsarasām gaṇāḥ dṛṣṭi dhṛṣṭayaḥ ca vipulāḥ keśāḥ vīra aṃśavaḥ smṛtāḥ tārakāḥ roma rūpāṇi romāṇi ca mahā ṛṣayaḥ bāhavaḥ vidiśaḥ tasya diśaḥ śrotre narādhipa aśvinaḥ śravaṇe ca asya nāsā vāyuḥ mahā balaḥ satyam asya abhavat vāṇī jihvā devī sarasvatī grīvā aditiḥ mahā devī tāluḥ rudraḥ ca vīryavān dvāram svargasya nābhiḥ vai mitraḥ tvaṣṭā picaṇḍakaḥ mukham vaiśvānaraḥ ca asya vṛṣaṇau ca bhagaḥ tadā hṛdayam bhagavān brahmā hi udaram kaśyapaḥ muniḥ tasya vasavaḥ devāḥ marutaḥ sarva saṃdhiṣu sarva chandāṃsi daśanāḥ jyotīṃṣi vimalā prabhā prāṇaḥ rudraḥ mahādevaḥ kukṣau ca asya mahā arṇavāḥ udare ca asya gandharvāḥ bhujagāḥ ca mahā balāḥ lakṣmī medhā dhṛtiḥ kāntiḥ sarvāḥ vidyāḥ ca vai kaṭau lalāṭam asya paramam vayaḥsthānam parātmanaḥ sarva jyotīṃṣi jānīhi tapaḥ cakraḥ ca deva rāj stanau kukṣau ca vedāḥ ca teṣṭau ca asya makhāḥ smṛtāḥ yaṣṭavya paśubandhāḥ ca dvijānām tāni ca sarva deva mayam dṛṣṭvā rūpam arkasya te nṛpa brahmā haraḥ hariḥ devāḥ param vismayam āgatāḥ praṇamya śirasā devam vepamānāḥ dharām gatāḥ samīkṣya rūpam te deva bhīmam jvālā samākulam diś jñānam hṛtam naḥ tat prasīda jagatpate upasaṃhara viśvātman draṣṭum śaktāḥ na te vayam iti teṣām vacaḥ śrutvā devadevaḥ divākaraḥ uvāca etat mayā prasannena yuṣmākam śreyase anaghāḥ darśitam pūjitena iha yoginām yat mahā ālayam brahma īśa acyutāḥ ucuḥ tvām ārādhya jagannātham na a prāpyam iha vidyate evam uktvā aditeḥ putraḥ jagāma adarśanam raviḥ evam brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ pūjayitvā divākaram gatāḥ te paramām siddhim gandharvāḥ ṛṣayaḥ tathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharmeṣu brahma ādīnām sūryarūpadarśanavarṇanam nāma ṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya pūjā phala praśna varṇanam uvāca na asti āditya samaḥ devaḥ na asti āditya samā gatiḥ mūlam akhilam trailokyam na atra saṃśayaḥ rudra indra upendraka indrāṇām vipra indraiḥ tridivaukasām prajāpatiḥ bhāva abhāvau hi loka nāma ādityāt niḥsṛtau purā kṣaṇāḥ muhūrtāḥ divasāḥ rātri pakṣāḥ ca kṛtsnaśas māsāḥ saṃvatsarāḥ ca eva ṛtavaḥ ca yugāni ca saḥ eṣa kālaḥ ca agniḥ ca dvādaśa ātmā prajāpatiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe saptamīkalpe brāhme parvaṇi saura dharme sūryapūjāphalapraśnavarṇanam nāma ekaṣaṣṭyutaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhānum pratiṣṭhāpya naraḥ sarva deva mayam vibhum prāpnoti amara tām vīraiḥ tejasā ravi saṃnibhaḥ yaḥ bhānum dveṣṭi sammohāt sarva deva namaskṛtam naraḥ naraka gāmī syāt tasya sambhāṣaṇāt api bhānum iṣṭam pratiṣṭhāpya sarva yatnaiḥ vidhānāt yat puṇya phalam āpnoti tat ekāgra manāḥ śṛṇu tad phalam koṭi guṇitam sthāpya bhānum labhet naraḥ yaḥ bhānum sthāpayet bhaktyā vidhi pūrvam narādhipaiḥ sarva aṅgam uditam puṇyam labhet koṭi guṇam naraḥ mātṛ jān pitṛ jān ca eva yatra ca udvahate striyam atha vā rājyam ākāṅkṣet jāyate sambhava antare iha eva dhanavān śrīmān soṃte arka tvam avāpnuyāt trisaṃdhyam kīrtayet vyom kṛtvā bimbena pārthivam madhya ekādaśakam yāvat tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu anena saha dehena bhānuḥ saṃtiṣṭhate kṣitau pāpa hā sarva martyānām darśanāt sparśanāt api uddhārayet ca saṃsthāpya kulānām ekaviṃśatim bhakṣya lehya rasaiḥ ca eva kṛta dīpaiḥ alaṃkṛtaiḥ nānā rasa māyuktam nānā gandha samanvitam tasya dakṣiṇa pārśve tu vinyaset agurum budhaḥ hastam dadyāt vai paścime bhāge śrīkhaṇḍam candanam śubham uttare candanam dadyāt raktam dadyāt ca pūrvatas evam vitta anusāreṇa kṛtvā vibhava vistaram tu saptamyām bhāskarasya nivedayet tejasā ravi saṃkāśaḥ prabhayā arka sama prabhaḥ pāṃsunā krīḍamānaḥ yaḥ kuryāt vyom hi akāryāt sa rājñ bhavate rājā parvateṣu samaṃtataḥ sarveṣām eva pātrāṇām param pātram vibhāvasuḥ etat saṃtārayet yasmāt atīva naraka arṇavāt tasya pātrasya māhātmyam dhruvam akṣayam ādiśet ravau dattam hutam japtam balim pūjām nivedayet ananta phalam ādiṣṭam brahma ādi sura sattamaiḥ bhaktyā vitta anusāreṇa yaḥ kuryāt ālayam raveḥ api na saḥ phalam avāpnoti pralobha ākrānta mānasaḥ bhāga dvayam ca dharma arthe anityam jīvanam yatas yat mayā koṭi guṇitam kṛtam syāt iṣṭa kāmyayā dvi parārdha guṇam puṇyam śailaje api viduḥ budhāḥ mṛd śailena samam jñeyam puṇyam āḍhya daridrayoḥ śaila uttham iṣṭakābhiḥ vā dṛḍham dāru mayam śubham kuryāt krīḍamānaḥ api yaḥ kuryāt bāla bhāve arka mandiram puṣpa mālā ākulam divyam dhūpa gandha ādi vāsitam apsaras gaṇa saṃkīrṇam sarva kāma mukha pradam tatra rūḍhaḥ mahā rāja vatsaram vṛndam uttamam uṣitvā bhāskara pure pūjyamānaḥ tu daivataiḥ dharma artha kāma saṃpannaḥ yaśasā ca narādhipaiḥ paśyan pariharan jantūn mārjanyā mṛdu sūkṣmayā śanais sammārjanam kuryāt cāndrāyaṇa phalam bhavet putra artham deha jīrṇāyāḥ vandhyāyāḥ ca viśeṣataḥ roga ārtānām ca bhūtānām ārogya artham prapūjayet gṛhītvā gomayam svaccham sthāne ca patitam śubhe paśyet tu sukhitān jantūn cāndrāyaṇa śatam labhet yaḥ kuryāt sarva kāryāṇi vastra pūtena vāriṇā sa muniḥ sa mahā sādhuḥ saḥ gacchet paramām gatim kṣaranti sarva dānāni yajña homa bali kriyāḥ akṣaram tu mahā dānam sukha dam sarva dehinām nairantaryeṇa yaḥ kuryāt pakṣam sammārjana arcanam varṣam ekam śatam divyam sura loke mahīyate tasya ante ca catur veda surūpaḥ priya darśanaḥ nādyaḥ sarva guṇa upetaḥ rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ samparkeṇa api yaḥ kuryāt naraḥ karma bhaga ālaye saḥ api saumanasam gatvā puram krīḍati nityaśas tāvat bhramanti saṃsāre duḥkha śoka pariplutāḥ yaḥ kuryāt kuṭṭimām bhūmim darpaṇa udara saṃnibhām nānā varṇa vicitrām ca vicitra kusuma ujjvalām ramyām manoramām saumyām arka āyatana saṃsadi yāvat daṇḍā bhavet bhūmiḥ samantāt ca su śobhanā kārayet citra śāstra jñaiḥ citra karma arka mandire yāvat sa deva rūpāṇi graha rūpāṇi lekhayet bhavet bhūmiḥ samantāt ca yaḥ kuryāt arka mandiram mad ārāma āvasatha ādīnām labhet āmūlyakam phalam ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sauradharmavarṇanam nāma dviṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ saura dharmeṣu puṣpa pūjā varṇanam snāna kāle prakurvīta jaya śabda ādi maṅgalam hema rūpa ādi pātreṣu kalpitam gomaya ādibhiḥ nānā varṇaka saṃyuktaiḥ akṣataiḥ tila taṇḍulaiḥ svacchaiḥ ca dadhi sammiśraiḥ yathāśobham prapūritaiḥ dravya pīṭha pradīpāḥ ca bhūta aśvattha ādi pallavaiḥ auṣadhībhiḥ ca medhyābhiḥ sarva bījaiḥ yava ādibhiḥ saptamī ādiṣu sarveṣu ṣaṣṭhī ādiṣu viśeṣataḥ śaṅkha bherī ādibhiḥ kuryāt vādya ghoṣam su śobhanam tat kuryāt nīrājanam ca eva śaṅkha vāditra
