maṅgalaiḥ yāvat nīrājanam kuryāt parvāṇi vidhivat ravau snānam daśaguṇam jñeyam mahat puṇyam narādhipaiḥ bhavaḥ vīram uddiśya deha śuddhim ca śāśvatām ghṛta abhyaṅgena sūryasya dahet sarvam na saṃśayaḥ saptamyām ca kṛta snānaḥ yajet sūryam sakṛt naraḥ sakṛt āḍhakena payasā yaḥ bhānum snāpa yet naraḥ snāpya dadhnā sakṛt bhānum sa triloke mahīyate uddhṛtya śāli piṣṭena vāyu lokeṣu pūjyate snānam ikṣu raseṇa iha yaḥ sūrye sakṛt ācaret śrīkhaṇḍa vāriṇā snāpya sakṛt bhānum narāḥ dhipaiḥ candra aṃśu nirmalaḥ śrīmān caret ātreya mandire saḥ sarva kāma tṛpta ātmā rākā adhipa puram vrajet āpaḥ hiṣṭhā iti japyena gaṅgā toyena bhārataiḥ snāpya bhānum sakṛt mantraiḥ saptamyām samupoṣitaḥ pitṝn uddiśya yaḥ bhānum snāpayet śīta vāriṇā tṛptāḥ svargaiḥ vrajanti āśu pitaraḥ narakāt api bhānum śīta ambunā snāpya dhāroṣṇa payasā saha etat snāna trayam kṛtvā pūjayitvā tu bhārataiḥ mṛd kumbhāt tāmra kumbhaiḥ tu snānam śataguṇam matam raupyaiḥ pāda uttaram puṇyam darśanāt sparśanam param sparśanāt arcanam śreṣṭham ghṛta snānam atas param iha amutra kṛtam pāpam ghṛta snānena naśyati sapta janma kṛtam pāpam purāṇa śravaṇena tu daśa aparādhān toyena kṣīreṇa tu śatam kṣamet sahasram kṣamate dadhinā ghṛtena api ayutam kṣamet nairantaryeṇa yaḥ māsam ghṛta snānam samācaret daśa ekādaśa kulāni iha nayet sūryasya mandiram snānam pala śatam jñeyam abhyaṅgaḥ pañcaviṃśatiḥ palānām dvi sahasreṇa mahāsnānam ati śrutiḥ ghṛta abhyaṅgam ghṛta snānaiḥ bhānoḥ kuryāt dvijottama yaḥ ca godhūma cūrṇaiḥ tu kaṣāyaiḥ darbha saṃmitaiḥ gandha toyena sammiśram udakāt dvādaśa uttaram pañcagavya samāyuktam arghyam śataguṇam nṛpaiḥ bhānoḥ mūrdhni nivedayet daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi ramate ca arka mandire apaḥ kṣīram kuśa agrāṇi ghṛtam dadhi tathā madhu raktāni karavīrāṇi tathā raktam ca candanam aṣṭa aṅgaḥ eṣa arghaḥ vai brahmanā parikīrtitaḥ tasmāt śataguṇam puṇyam mṛd pātreṇa narādhipaiḥ tāmra arghya pātra dānena puṇyam śataguṇam matam pālāśa padma pattrābhyām tāmra pātre phalam labhet raupya pātreṇa vijñeyam lakṣa arghyam na atra saṃśayaḥ evam snāna arghya naivedya bali dhūpa ādiṣu kramāt pātra antara viśeṣeṇa tad phalam tu uttarottaram tāmra pātra pradānena tasmāt śataguṇam ravau suvarṇa pātram yaḥ dadyāt bhāskarāya mahīpate na śakyam tasya tat vaktum puṇyam pātra viśeṣāt tat ananta phalam jñeyam bhaktiḥ eva atra kāraṇam mahīyate gandhāt caturguṇam jñeyam puṣpam aṣṭaguṇam nṛpa tat aguru viśeṣeṇa dviguṇam phalam ādiśeta tasmāt śataguṇam puṇyam kuṅkumasya vidhīyate candana aguru karpūraiḥ ślakṣṇa piṣṭaiḥ sa kuṅkumaiḥ bhānum paryāptam ālipya kalpa koṭim vaset divi bhaktyā nivedya arkāya tālavṛntam narādhipa ha varṣa sahasrāṇi vīra lokam mahīyate māyūram vyajanam dattvā sūryāya atīva śobhanam varṣa koṭi śatam pūrṇam prabhañjana pure vaset puṣpaiḥ araṇya saṃbhūtaiḥ pattraiḥ vā giri sambhavaiḥ mad ārāma bhavaiḥ ca eva puṣpaiḥ saṃpūjayet ravim puṣpa jāti viśeṣeṇa bhavet puṇyam tatas adhikam tapas śīla guṇa upetaḥ iti hāsa vidi dvije evam puṣpa viśeṣeṇa phalam tad adhikam bhavet jñeyam puṇyam rasa jñena yathā syāt tat nibodha mama sadā puṣpa sahasrebhyaḥ karavīram viśiṣyate yad puṣpa sahasrebhyaḥ śamī pattram viśiṣyate śamī puṣpa sahasrebhyaḥ nṛpa nīlotpalam param sarvāsām puṣpa jātīnām pravaram nīlam utpalam yalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca śeṣāṇām puṣpa jātīnām yat phalam parikīrtitam śamī puṣpam bṛhatyāḥ ca kusumam tulyam ucyate karavīra samāḥ jñeyāḥ jātī vijaya pāṭalāḥ mandāra kusumam sita puṣpam ca tad samam nala campaka puṃnāga mudgarāṇām samāḥ smṛtāḥ grāhyam mudgarāṇi kadambāni rātrau deyāni sūraye divā aśeṣāṇi puṣpāṇi tyajet upahatāni ca alābhe bata puṣpāṇām pattrāṇi api nivedayet phalānām api alābhena tṛṇa gulma oṣadhīḥ api oṣadhīnām abhāve tu bhaktyā bhavati pūjitaḥ māgha asite api sumanāḥ saḥ ananta phalam aśnute tathā saḥ tat phalam avāpnoti tat ekāgra manāḥ śṛṇu sūrya koṭi pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sarva kāmibhiḥ puṣpa mālā parikṣiptaiḥ gīta vāditra nāditaiḥ sūrya kanyā samākīrṇaiḥ devānām ca su durlabhaiḥ dodhūyamānaḥ camaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ sura asuraiḥ saṃpūjya śraddhayā bhānum arka loke mahīyate sūryasya upari yaḥ kuryāt śobhanam puṣpa maṇḍalam mahā sarveṣām upariṣṭāt ca vaset arkapure sukhī bhūmi itara puram divyam śrayate na atra saṃśayaḥ akṣayam modate kālam atiraskṛta śāsanaḥ saura ādi sarva lokeṣu yatra iṣṭam tatra yāti saḥ ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu puṣpapūjāvarṇanam nāma triṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūryaṣaṣṭhī vrata varṇanam uvāca uvāca śṛṇu tvam hi mahā rāja sarva dam loka pūjitam brahma īśa upendra devānām trayāṇām api bhārataiḥ sukha āsīnam surajyeṣṭham manovatyām caturmukham praṇamya śirasā bhūmau viṣṇu īśau vākyam ūcatuḥ sādhu sādhu jagannātha sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi vām iha svayam utpādya puṣṇāṇi yaḥ sūryam pūjayet svayam tāni sākṣāt pragṛhṇāti tad bhaktyā satatam raviḥ yaḥ tu ārāmam raveḥ kuryāt āmra bilva ādi śobhitam jātī vijaya rāja arka karavīraiḥ sa kuṅkumaiḥ tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu yāvat hi pattram kusumam bījam sūta phalāni ca tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūra loke mahīyate sa ghṛtam guggulam dadyāt rājñ vā kandurum tathā bhagavant ca karpūra dhūpam dadyāt divākare nairantaryeṇa yaḥ tasya rājñ puṇya phalam śṛṇu yalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca bhuktvā sūryapure bhogān tasya ante kṣmādhipaḥ bhavet yakṣaḥ gṛhṇāti śabda kṛt kṛṣṇāṃśau kṛṣṇaiḥ saptamyām yaḥ sa ājyam guggulum dahet sa ca asau sauram āsādya varṣāṇām ca daśa arbudam devadārum namerum ca śrīvāsam kundurum tathā śrīphalam ca ājya saṃyuktam dagdhvā āśrayam avāpnuyāt evam saugadhikam rūpam ṣaṣ sahasra guṇa uttaram agurum daśa sāhasram sa ghṛtam dviguṇam bhavet ananta phala dam devam sadā kunduru kāmukam dvi sahasra palānām tu mahiṣākṣasya gugguloḥ hayet pāpa saṃyuktam puruṣam na atra saṃśayaḥ bhavam dhūpam tuṣa agniḥ iva kāñcanam kapāṭa dvāra kuḍya ādi tiryañc ūrdhvam sa vedikam vāsayet puṣpa mālābhiḥ dhūpaiḥ ca api sugandhibhiḥ māpūrayan diśaḥ sarvāḥ nānā gandha samanvitaiḥ yalpa koṭi śatam divyam tejasā vahni saṃnibhaḥ śata āvṛtam tu yaḥ kuryāt evam gandhaiḥ bhaga ālayam sūrya loke vaset devaḥ yuvābhyām jitaḥ tadvat śuklaiḥ ca saṃvītam paṭṭasūtraiḥ vinirmitam dattvā upavītam sūryāya bhavet vedāṅga pāragaḥ su vicitrāṇi sūra loke mahīyate truṭi mātram tu yaḥ dadyāt ūrṇā vastram sa paṅkajam bhāskarasya uttamāṅgeṣu tasya puṇyam bravīmi aham indrasya ardhāsane tiṣṭhet yāvat rindrāḥ caturdaśa evam vitta anusāreṇa sarvam jñeyam samāsatas sarveṣām hema pātrāṇām mukuṭānām ca sarvaśas arka pattra puṭam cūrṇam madhuparṇa samanvitam madhu taṇḍula prasthasya kuryāt annam su saṃskatam sūryāya ca carum dattvā saptamyām tu viśeṣataḥ saṃyāvam kṛsaram pūpam pāyasam yāvakam tathā dadhi odana rasa āla anna modakān guḍa pūpakān yāvantaḥ taṇḍulāḥ tasmin naivedye parisaṃkhyayā tāvat varṣaiḥ sahasrāṇi sūra loke mahīyate guḍa khaṇḍa kṛtānām ca bhakṣyāṇām vinivedane ghṛtena plāvitānām ca phalam śataguṇam labhet bhakṣyāṇām phalam iṣyate yathā kāla upalabdhāni bhakṣyāṇi vividhāni ca nivedya arkāya paramam sthānam prāpnoti pūjanāt prajvālya ghṛta dīpam tu bhāskarasya ālaye śubham yaḥ kuryāt kārttike māsi śobhanām dīpa mālikām saptamyām atha ṣaṣṭhyām vā amāvāsyāyām atha api vā bhāskara ayuta saṃkāśaḥ tejasā bhāsayan diśaḥ divya ābharaṇa saṃpannaḥ kulam uddhṛtya sarvaśas yāvat pradīpa saṃkhyānam ghṛtena āpūrya bodhitam tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate pūrvāt dviguṇam puṇyam labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ dīpa vṛkṣam samudbodhya bhāskara āyataneṣu bhoḥ śirasā dhārayet dīpam bhāskarasya agratas niśi bhāskara ayuta saṃkāśaḥ vimānaiḥ arka saṃnibhaiḥ anna dātā tu yaḥ vīra vīra loke mahī yate bhāskarasya agratas dattvā darpaṇam nirmalam śubham paryaṅke śobhitam kṛtvā śveta mālyaiḥ sa candanaiḥ bṛka arka nirmalaḥ śrīmān divya ābharaṇa rūpadhṛk kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam bhaktyā śraddadhānaḥ raveḥ naraḥ kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam yaḥ tu namaskāram prayojayet rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām sakalam vindate phalam namaskāraḥ smṛtaḥ yajñaḥ sarva yajña uttama uttamaḥ namaskṛtvā sahasrāṃśum aśvamedha phalam labhet sa yām gatim avāpnoti na tām kratu śataiḥ api abhijñāpya upahāreṇa pūjayā phalam aśnute śvetam mahā dhvajam kṛtvā kṛtvā cāpam ca raṅgakam kiṅkiṇī jāla nirghoṣam mayūra chattra bhūṣitam sa śatena vimānānām sarva deva namaskṛtaḥ dhvaja mālā ākulam kuryāt yaḥ prāñteṣu bhaga ālayam mahā dhvaja aṣṭakam ca api diś vidikṣu nivedayet muktā dāma upaśobhitam maṇi daṇḍa mayam chattram dadyāt vā kāñcana ādikam sa dhāryamāṇa chatreṇa hema daṇḍa upaśobhinā yaḥ śṛṅkhalā samāyuktām mahā ghaṇṭām mahā svanām tad kāṃsya loha mayām vā api nibadhnīyāt bhagālaye śobhanaḥ syāt naraḥ śrīmān bhagasya atīva vallabhaḥ bherī mṛdaṅga paṭaha jharjharī mardala ādikam daśa kāṃsyādi vāditram yaḥ bhagāya nivedayet sa vimānaiḥ mahābhāgeḥ vaṃśa vīṇā ayuta svanaiḥ su saṃgītaka dānena sa vādyena viśeṣataḥ yatheṣṭam bhāskare loke modate kālam akṣayam mahā mahā svanam dattvā śaṅkha yugmam bhaga ālaye tat kiṃkiṇī jāla saṃpannam varṇakaiḥ ca upaśobhitam puṣpa mālā prabham vā api ghaṇṭā cāmara bhūṣitam dukūla paṭṭa deva aṅgaiḥ vastraiḥ vā varṇaka anvitaiḥ paṭṭa ādi vastra tantūnām parisaṃkhyā tu yā bhavet bhaga āhutyā jagant sarvam sṛṣṭi dvāreṇa dhāryate bhagam uddiśya rāja indraiḥ saḥ yāti paramām gatim puṣpa dhūpa jala upetam kāle kāle viśeṣataḥ mahāśveta ādi mātṝṇām tri kalpānām ca sarvaśas yaḥ kṛtvā sakṛt api evam sarva dikṣu balim haret sa naraḥ ca sahasrāṇi śāṃḍileya pure vaset saura saṃdhyā balim kṛtvā dina ante satatam raveḥ varṣa ayuta śatam sāgram bhaga loke mahīyate dadhi odana payobhiḥ yaḥ pūritam pātram āvṛtam puṣpa dhūpa arcitam ca eva vitāna upari śobhitam śirasā dhārayet pātram śanais gacchet pradakṣiṇam ravi āyatana paryante śaṅkha vīṇā ādi nisvanaiḥ darpaṇaiḥ dhūpa mālābhiḥ geya nṛtya ādi śobhitam bhānoḥ hi smṛti śīlaḥ ca tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu divyam varṣa sahasram tu divyam varṣa śatam tathā kṛṣṇām tu ṣaṣṭhīm naktena yaḥ ca kṛṣṇām ca saptamīm devaiḥ tu bhuktam madhyāhne pūrvāhṇe ṛṣibhiḥ tathā aparāhṇe tu pitṛbhiḥ saṃdhyāyām guhyaka ādibhiḥ sarvāḥ velāḥ hi atikramya saurāṇām bhojanam param bhuṃjānaḥ nakta kāle tu sūrya bhakti parāyaṇaḥ haviṣya bhojanam snānam āhārasya ca lāghavam agnikāryam adhaḥśayyām nakta bhojī samācaret prayatnena kṛtvā naktam vidhānāt naraḥ mārgaśire māsi aṃśumant iti pūjayeta vidhivat prāśya go mūtram anāhāraḥ niśi svapet tathā puṣye pi evam sahasrāṃśum bhānumantam uśanti ca vājapeya phalam prāpya ghṛtam prāśya labhet naraḥ māghe divākaram nāma kṛṣṇa ṣaṣṭhyām narottamaiḥ niśi pītvā tu go kṣīram gomedha phalam āpnuyāt mārtaṇḍam phālgune māsi pūjayitvā gavām payaḥ haviṣya āśī sūrya loke apsarobhiḥ saha modate ca jyeṣṭhe divaspatim pūjya gavām śṛṅgodakam pibet gavām koṭi pradānasya nikhilam phalam ā pnuyāt āṣāḍhe tu arka nāmānam iṣṭvā prāśya ca gomayam prayāti arka sa lokam tu varṣāṇām ca śatam śatam māsi aryaman nāmānam pūjayitvā payaḥ pibet mudate māsi bhādrapade ṣaṣṭhyām bhāskaram nāma pūjayet māsi ca āśvayuje ṣaṣṭhyām bhaga ākhyam nāma pūjayet māse tu kārttike ṣaṣṭhyām śakra ākhyam nāma pūjayet dūrvā aṅkuram sakṛt prāśya rājasūya phalam labhet varṣa ante bhojayet viprān sūrya bhakti parāyaṇān śaktyā hiraṇya vāsāṃsi bhaktyā tebhyaḥ nivedayet nivedayet ca sūryāya kṛṣṇām gām ca payasvinīm śṛṇu modate sūrya loke tu sa naraḥ śāśvatāḥ samāḥ puṇyeṣu ahaḥsu sarveṣu viṣuvat grahaṇa ādiṣu dāna upavāsa homa ādyaiḥ akṣayam khagaiḥ jāyate uvāca iti uktavan purā bhānuḥ aruṇāya viśām pate tat yat yat yat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat kṛtvā idam puruṣaḥ bhaktyā bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ prayāti paramam sthānam bhānoḥ amita tejasaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryaṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanam nāma catuḥṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca dharma kāma artha mokṣāṇām pratipādanam uttamam hita indriyaḥ satya vādī śāli godhūma gorasaiḥ pakṣayoḥ saptamīm yatnāt upavāsena yāpayet trisaṃdhyam arcayet bhānum śāṇḍileyam ca suvrataiḥ māsi pūrṇe tu saptamyām ghṛta ādibhiḥ ariṃdamaiḥ kṛtvā snānam mahā pūjām sūryadevasya bhāsta bhojayet ca dvijān aṣṭau bhaga arcā śubha lakṣaṇām mahā rāja kapilām bhāskarāya tu sūrya koṭi pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ tad apsaras gaṇa saṃkīrṇaiḥ mahā vibhava saṃyutaiḥ saṃgīta nṛtya vādya ādyaiḥ gandharva gaṇa śobhitaiḥ dodhūyamānaḥ camaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ sura asuraiḥ sahasra kiraṇa ābhāsaḥ sauraiḥ sūrya samanvitaiḥ sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra āste raviḥ aṃśumant romasaṃkhyā tu yā tasyāḥ tad prasūtiḥ kuleṣu ca yogāt duḥkhāntam āpnoti jñāna yogam pravartate iti evam te samākhyātam bhava arṇava vyapohanam saura mokṣa krama upāyam sūra āśraya niṣevaṇam piṇyākam ghṛta saṃyuktam bhuṃjānaḥ saḥ jita indriyaḥ sa upavāsaḥ ca saptamyām bhavet ubhaya pakṣayoḥ ghṛta abhiṣekam aṣṭamyām kuryāt bhānoḥ narādhipaiḥ gām ca dayāt dineśāya taruṇām nīla saṃnibhām indranīla pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ śikhi saṃyutaiḥ māka kṣīra nīvāraiḥ jita krodhaḥ jita indriyaḥ ṣaṣṭhyām vā api atha saptamyām upavāsa paraḥ naraḥ aṣṭamyām tu mahāsnānam pañcagavya ghṛta ādibhiḥ valmīka ja ādi mṛdbhiḥ ca go mūtra śakṛt ādibhiḥ tvagbhiḥ ca kṣīravṛkṣāṇām snāpayitvā pramārjayet saurabheyīm tatas dadyāt rakta ābhām rakta māline padmarāga pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ hasti saṃyutaiḥ mudate śāli annam pāyasaiḥ yuktam bhuñjānaḥ ca jita indriyaḥ bhānave pāṭalām dadyāt vaiṣṇavām taruṇām nṛpaiḥ puṣparāga prabhebhiḥ yānaiḥ nānā haṃsa ādi yāyibhiḥ modate kuryāt tasmin sūrye khaṇḍa ājya sammiśram sakṛt dadyāt nivedanam mahā rājaiḥ bhāskarāya śubha ānanaiḥ sāmānyam ca vidhim kuryāt prayuktaḥ yaḥ mayā te śuddha sphaṭika saṃkāśaiḥ yānaiḥ barhiṇa vāhanaiḥ saṃprāpte śrāvaṇe māsi yaḥ kuryāt naktabhojanam kṣīra ṣaṣṭika bhaktena sarva sattva hite rataḥ pīta varṇām ca gām dadyāt bhāskarāya mahātmane sāmānyam akhilam kuryāt vidhānam yat prakīrtitam sa vicitraiḥ mahā yānaiḥ haṃsa sārasa gāmibhiḥ mān ādityapuram śrīmān pūrva uktam labhate phalam huta śeṣa haviṣya āśī vṛkṣa mūlam upāśritaḥ svapyāt āyatane rātrau sarva bhūta anukampakaḥ dadyāt gām rohiṇīm śreṣṭhām bhāskarāya mahātmane cakravāka samāyuktaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ modate saḥ mahābhāgaḥ yāvadā bhūta samplavam mān āśvayuje māsi yaḥ kuryāt naktabhojanam dadyāt gām padma varṇa ābhām bhānave amita tejase divya ābharaṇa saṃpannām taruṇām ca payasvinīm svasti mauktika saṃkāśaiḥ indranīla upaśobhitaiḥ jīvaḥ jīvaka saṃyukta vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ divākarāya gām dadyāt jvalana arka sama prabhām mahāsiṃha kṛta āropaiḥ sūrya vat modate sukhī mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi yaḥ kuryāt naktabhojanam yat ca annam payasā yuktam bhuñjānaḥ sa jita indriyaḥ prayacchet gām tathā raktām nānā alaṃkāra bhūṣitām sūryāya kuru śārdūlaiḥ vidhim ca api samācaret sita padma nibhaiḥ yānaiḥ śveta aśva ratha saṃyutaiḥ ahiṃsā asatya vacanam asteyam kṣāntiḥ ārjavam triṣavaṇa agni havanam bhū śayyā naktabhojanam etān guṇān samāśritya kurvāṇaḥ vratam uttamam iti evamādīn niyamān caret sūryavratī sadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ubhayasaptamīvarṇanam nāma paṃcaṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sūrya bhaktā tu yā nārī dhruvam sā puruṣaḥ bhavet strī putram uttamam sā ced kāṃkṣate śṛṇu tat vratam nikṣubha arka ākhyam ākhyātam sadā prīti vivardhanam saptamyām atha ṣaṣṭhyām vā saṃkrāntau ca raveḥ dine haviṣā haviḥ homam tu sa upavāsaḥ samācaret nikṣubhām kāṃsya niṣpannām kṛtvā svarṇa mayīm śubhām rājatām vā atha vā varṣam snāpayet ca ghṛta ādibhiḥ gandha mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtya vastra yugmaiḥ ca śobhanaiḥ bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ aśeṣaiḥ ca vitāna dhvaja cāmaraiḥ bhojayet sūrya bhaktān ca śukla vastra avaguṇṭhitān kṛtvā śirasi tat pātram vitāna chattra śobhitam tad piṇḍyām sthāpayet pātram upaśobhā samanvitam pradakṣiṇīkṛtya ravim praṇipatya kṣamāpayet samāpya tat vratam puṇyam śṛṇuyāt phalam aśnute dvādaśa āditya saṃkāśaiḥ mahā yānaiḥ naga upamaiḥ yatheṣṭam bhānave loke sauraiḥ sārdham pramodate varṣa koṭi sahasrāṇi varṣa koṭi śatāni ca nandate asau mahābhāga viṣṇu loke mahīyate brahma lokam samāsādya param sukham avāpnuyāt brahma lokāt paribhraṣṭaḥ śrīmān sura su pūjitaḥ yāvat na āpnoti maraṇam tāvat bhramati karmaṇā su nirvedāt sa vairāgyam vairāgyāt jñāna sambhavaḥ jñānāt pravartate yogaḥ yogāt duḥkhāntam āpnuyāt iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme nikṣubhāvratavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tasyām ca api atha saptamyām niyatā brahmacāriṇī varṣam ekam na bhuṃkte yā mahābhāga jigīṣayā mahā anti pratimām kṛtvā nikṣubhāṅka iti viśrutām snāna ādyam ca vidhim kṛtvā pūrva uktam labhate guṇam jāmbūnada mayaiḥ yānaiḥ catur dvāraiḥ alaṃkṛte kramāt āgatya loke asmin rājānam patim āpnuyāt yā nārī upavaset evam kṛṣṇām ekām tu saptamīm kṛtvā pīta anulepanaiḥ mālyaiḥ pīta vastraiḥ ca pūjayet pūrva uktam akhilam kṛtvā bhāskarāya nivedayet sapta bhīmaiḥ mahā yānaiḥ danti cāmīkara prabhebhiḥ varṣa koṭi śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate tu saptamyām yā nārī tu dṛḍha vratā varṣa ante sarva gandha āḍhyam nikṣubha arkam nivedayet suvarṇa maṇi muktābhyām bhojayitvā maga aṅganām su vicitraiḥ mahā yānaiḥ divya gandharva śobhitaiḥ yatheṣṭam bhānave loke bhogān bhuktvā tu kṛtsnaśas evam yā kurute rājñ vratam pāpa bhaya apaham nikṣubha arkam idam puṇyam sā yāti paramam padam mahā bāho śraddhayā parayā anvitaḥ varṣa ante vai bhojayet vīraiḥ dāmpatyam bhojakeṣu vai bhojayitvā tu dāmpatyam bhogakānām mahā balaiḥ tāmra maye pātre vajra pūrṇaiḥ alaṃkṛtam tu sauvarṇam dattvā tābhyām tu śaktitas nikṣubhā bhojikā jñeyā prakīrtitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharmeṣu nikṣubhārkavratam nāma saptaṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca eka bhaktena yā nārī kārttikam kṣapayet nṛpaiḥ kṣamā hiṃsā ādi niyamaiḥ saṃyatā brahmacāriṇī guḍa ājya miśram śālyannam bhāskarāya nivedayet pakṣayoḥ ubhayayoḥ tātaiḥ śradayā parayā anvitā puṣpāṇām karavīrāṇām guggulam sa ājyam ādiśet saptamyām tātaiḥ ṣaṣṭhyām vai upavāsa ratiḥ bhavet indranīla pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ mahīyate kṣamā satyam dayā dānam śaucam indriya nigrahaḥ sūrya pūjā agni havanam saṃtoṣaḥ steya varjanam sarva vrateṣu ayam dharmaḥ sāmānyaḥ daśadhā smṛtaḥ niḥśeṣam aham vakṣyāmi māsāt māsavratam prati mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi vyoma pṛṣṭhe vinirmitam tāmra pātra ādikaiḥ ca eva api apsaraḥ gaṇa sevitaiḥ sarva deva kadambeṣu saṃprāpya vimalām śriyam kramāt āgatya loke asmin rājānam patim āpnuyāt tāmra pātra ādi kāṃsyam vā kṛtvā tatra nivedayet mahā puṣpaka yānena divya gandha pravāhinā saṃprāpya etam kramāt lokam yatheṣṭam vidate patim māghe ratham aśvayujam dīpa mālya vibhūṣitam piṣṭa sānu samāḥ yuktam kṛtvā āyatanam ānayet mahā ratha upamaiḥ yānaiḥ śveta aśva vara saṃyutaiḥ mahīyate sarva amarāṇām lokeṣu prāpya bhogān yathā īpsitān kramāt āgatya loke asmin yatheṣṭam patim āpnuyāt pratimām phālgune māsi kṛtvā piṣṭa mayā raveḥ gandha mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtya sthāpayet bhāskarāḥ laye punar etya imam lokam yathā iṣṭam vidate patim kṛtvā aruṇam tathā caitre gandha mālya upaśobhitam śarad indu pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ varṣa ayuta śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate abhīṣṭam patim āsādya labhet bhogān su durlabhān taṇḍula āḍhaka piṣṭena kṛtvā vai meru parvatam nikṣubha arka samāyuktam sarva dhātu vibhūṣitam nānā alaṃkāra saṃpannam nānā mālya vibhūṣitam nānāvidhaiḥ ca yānaiḥ tu sūrya loke mahīyate saura ādi sarva lokeṣu bhuktvā bhogān aśeṣatas kramāt āgatya loke asmin rājānam patim āpnuyāt dvitīyam ca tathā padmam āṣāḍhe piṣṭam uttamam sarva bīja rasaiḥ pūrṇam kṛtvā tu śubhra lakṣaṇam nānā kesara gandha āḍhayam sarva ratna vibhūṣitam varṣa koṭi śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate prāptā tu sarva bhoga āḍhayam taruṇam vidate patim svacchanda gāmibhiḥ yānaiḥ nānā varṇa vibhūṣitaiḥ varṣa koṭi śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate saṃprāpya vividhān bhogān bahu āścarya samanvitān bhavati kramāt lokam imam prāpya rājānam vidate patim kṛtvā bhādrapade māsi vyoma śāli mayam nṛpa vibhūṣitam varṣa koṭi sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate saṃprāpya vividhān bhogān sarvān nimiṣa sambhavān kramāt āgatya loke asmin rājānam vidate patim kṛtvā ca āśvayuje māsi vipulam dhānya parvatam suvarṇa vastra gandha āḍhyam bhāskarāya nivedayet varṣa koṭi sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate ismin loke ca ā saṃprāptā rājānam vidate patim candra agni bhāskarāṇām tu kānti tejas prabhā anvitam yaṃ yam kāmam samuddiśya nara nārī napuṃsakāḥ pūjayanti ravim bhaktyā tat sarvam prāpnuvanti hi iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharmeṣu kāmapradastrīvratavarṇanam nāma aṣṭa ṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca mṛd mayam dāru jam śailam pakva iṣṭakam atha api vā sambhavāt sūryāya ittham gṛham dadyāt sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt hemante māgha māsa matam śvetaiḥ caturbhiḥ saṃyuktam turagaiḥ samalaṃkṛtam śveta dhvaja patākābhiḥ chattra cāmara darpaṇaiḥ taṇḍula āḍhaka piṣṭena kṛtvā bhānum narādhipaiḥ tam rātrau rājamārgeṇa śaṅkha bherī ādi nisvanaiḥ bhramayitvā śanais paścāt sūryāyatanam āviśet tatra jāgara pūjābhiḥ pradīpa āvali śobhitaiḥ prekṣaṇīyaiḥ pradānaiḥ ca kṣapayitvā śanais kṣapām prabhāte snapanam kṛtvā madhu kṣīra ghṛtena ca dīna andha kṛpaṇebhyaḥ annam yathāśaktyā ca dakṣiṇām ratham saṃvāhana upetam bhāskarāya nivedayet bhuktvā ca bāndhavaiḥ sārdham praṇamya arka gṛham vrajet sarva vratānām pravaram mantra dharma anvitaḥ sadā sūrya ayuta pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ bhavet pañca bali samāyuktam mṛdu ṣaṣ vāstu kalpitam sarva upakaraṇa upetam sūryam saṃjñām prakalpayet saṃjñādevī samāyuktam paiṣṭa āśā āḍhyam nivedayet saura jñāna artha tattva jñam ācāryam udaya anvitam saṃpūjya gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ vastra alaṃkāra cāmaraiḥ bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ aśeṣaiḥ ca tatas śayyām nivedayet tad ūrṇā tūla vastrāṇām parisaṃkhyā tu yāvatī tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate sura ādi sarva lokeṣu bhuktvā bhogān aśeṣatas kāmāt āgatya loke asmin rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ daśa gobhiḥ saha vṛṣam tāḥ vṛṣa ekādaśāḥ smṛtāḥ sūryāya vinivedya iha yat phalam labhate śṛṇu dvādaśa āditya tulya ātmā aṇima ādi guṇaiḥ yutaḥ sa vṛṣam go śatam dattvā bhāskarāya narādhipaiḥ triḥsapta kula jaiḥ sārdham śṛṇu yat phalam āpnuyāt mahāyānaiḥ asaṃkhyeyaiḥ amara asura pūjitaiḥ dvādaśa āditya saṃkāśaḥ divākaraḥ iva aparaḥ krīḍate moha kañcukam utsṛjya viśati āditya maṇḍale sarvajñaḥ sūra paramaḥ śuddhaḥ sva ātmani avasthitaḥ sarvagaḥ paripūrṇa tvāt sūrya vat dīptimān bhavet yaḥ dadyāt ubhaya mukhām saurabheyīm divākare sapta dvīpām mahīm dattvā yat phalam tat avāpnuyāt pāda dvayam śiraḥ ardham ca sa śaila vana kānanā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe godānavarṇanam nāma saptatyuttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhojaka bhojana anuṣṭhāna varṇanam uvāca magānām brūhi me dharmam samāsa vyāsa yogāt uvāca yaḥ eṣa dharmaḥ sūrya iti te ākhyātaḥ mayā anagha sarveṣām eva varṇānām maga dharma niṣevaṇam brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyāḥ vaiśyāḥ strī śūdraḥ vā magāśramī yaḥ pūjayati mārtaṃḍam saḥ yāti paramām gatim yatnatas kuryāt magaḥ mahā bāho mukham āvṛtya yatnatas a saṃpūjya ravim mohāt na bhuṃjīta kadācana eṣa dharmaḥ paraḥ jñeyaḥ śeṣaḥ bhavati mānavaḥ a pūjayitvā bhuṃjānaḥ viṣṭhām bhuṅkte ca vai magaḥ devam samāśritaiḥ pūjā kartavyā iyam tribhiḥ sadā manasā pūjayet yogī puṣpaiḥ ca araṇya sambhavaiḥ deva artha puṣpa hiṃsāyām na bhavet tasya hiṃsakaḥ magī maithuna varjyaḥ syāt śrīmān gṛhamaga āśramī deva arthe pacanam yeṣām saṃtāna artham tu maithunam arthaḥ dāna artham uddiṣṭaḥ narakam hi viparyayāt yad jīva tṛtīya bhāge api na prakurvīta vā arcanam brahmacārī yaḥ sūrya pūjā agni tatparaḥ bhavet jita indriyaḥ śāntaḥ naiṣṭhikaḥ vā sarva gandha vinirmuktaḥ kanda mūla phala aśanaḥ mama vaikhānasaḥ jñeyaḥ sūrya pūjā agni tatparaḥ nivṛttaḥ saṃgamebhyaḥ tu sūrya dhyāna rataḥ sadā maurayati indrāya pūjā niṣṭhaḥ jita iṃdriyaḥ muṇḍa upanayanaḥ vyaṅgī śukla vāsaḥ samanvitaḥ atha avyaṅgaḥ mahā rājaiḥ dhārayet yaḥ tu bhojakaḥ dhvaṃsanam sarva duṣṭānām sarva pāpa bhaya apaham dṛṣṭi pūtam nyaset pādam satya pūtam vacaḥ vadet saura dhyāna ratāḥ śāntāḥ saura dharma parāyaṇāḥ sarve eva āśramāḥ jñeyāḥ bhāskara aṅga samudbhavāḥ bhojaka aṣṭavratam dhāryam raviṇā uktam anaupamam saura bhakte sadā kṣāntiḥ ahiṃsā sarvadā śamaḥ saṃtoṣaḥ satyam asteyam brahmacaryam tathā aṣṭamam yathā sambhava pūjābhiḥ karmaṇā manasā girā saura bhaktiḥ sadā kāryā bhojakeṣu viśeṣataḥ sva dehāt nirviśeṣam hi bhojakān pālayet budhaḥ bhaya dāridrya rogebhyaḥ teṣām kuryāt priyāṇi vai sūryasya paripūrṇasya kim nāma kriyate naraiḥ yat kṛtam bhojakānām vai tat kṛtam syāt raveḥ nṛpaiḥ su dūram api gantavyam magānām yatra vai gaṇaḥ mahā ājñām kṛtvā yathānyāyam aśvamedha phalam labhet deva āśrama gataḥ bhaktyā deva arcām pūjayet nṛpaiḥ bhojayitvā yathānyāyam sūrya loke mahīyate dattvā sthānam tathā śaucam vāruṇam lokam āpnuyāt śveta bindu parīta aṅgam dhyāna śrama vikarśitam saṃvījya tālavṛntena vāyu loke mahīyate kṣudh pipāsā āturam śrāntam malinam rogiṇam tathā tathā śaktyā sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt pālayitvā yathā śaktyā sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt patita aśasta saṃkīrṇa caṇḍāla ādīnām pakṣiṇām pāruṇyāt sarva bhūtānām deyam annam sva śaktitas ati alpam api kāruṇyāt dattam bhavati ca akṣayam tasmāt sarveṣu bhūteṣu deva kāruṇyam ucyate tṛṇa bhūmi annam pattram dhana phalāni ca praṇataḥ svargam yāti priya vā na hi īdṛś svarga yānāya yathā loke priyam vacaḥ iha amutra sukham teṣām vāc yeṣām madhurā bhavet amṛta syandinī vācam candana sparśa śītalām alam dānena rāja indra pūjayā adhyāpanena vā pūjā abhibhāṣaṇam dṛṣṭiḥ pratyekam svarga hetavaḥ saṃpṛcchet idam āgatam bhaktyā kuśalam praśnam ādarāt tasya vaktavyam pathinaḥ saṃtu te śivāḥ mahā vākyam sarva kāleṣu sarvadā namaskāra ādi vākyeṣu svasti maṅgala vādane tad evamādi ca vā ācāram anuṣṭhāya sat āśramī pāpa nirmuktaḥ sūrya loke mahīyate mā ākruṣṭe tāḍite vā api yaḥ na ākrośet na tāḍayet vākyāt adhikṛtaḥ svasthaḥ saḥ duḥkhāt parimucyate sarveṣām eva tīrthānām kṣāntiḥ parama pūjitā tasmāt pūrvam prayatnena kṣāntiḥ kāryā kriyāsu vai jñāna yoga tapaḥ yasya yajña dānāni satkriyā marma asthi prāṇa hṛdayam nirdahet apriyaṃvacaḥ na vacaḥ hi apriyam tasmāt bhojakeṣu viśeṣataḥ hiṃsā arka saṃbhavāḥ uvāca punar śṛṇu mahā rājaiḥ dharmam āditya saṃmatam saura priyam sadā sauram pavitram pāpa nāśanam kvacid gacchan yadā paśyet sūrya arcā saṃprapūjanam yatra pūjā tatas gacchan saḥ sūryaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ snāna naivedya vastraiḥ ca nānā alaṃkāra bhūṣaṇaiḥ yathāvibhavam āśritya namaskāra ādi saṃstavaiḥ dṛṣṭvā āyatanam ākramya namaskṛtya ravim vrajet upaśrutya avanim gatvā bhojakam pūjayet budhaḥ ratha aśva gaja yānebhyaḥ hi avatīrya magāt nṛpa bhojanam bhaktyā śaktyā dānam prakalpayet daśa pūrvān daśa parān ātmanā saha bhārata pitaraḥ sarva devānām sūryam āśritya saṃsthitāḥ prīte sūrye tu te sarve prītāḥ syuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ yaḥ paśyati prasanna ātmā yaḥ na dveṣṭi na kāṃkṣati śabda ādīnām tu sambhogam saḥ vijñeyaḥ jita indriyaḥ jñāna vijñāna sampannaḥ sūrya bhaktyā samanvitaḥ sūrya dharmāt bhavet jñānam jñānāt vairāgya sambhavaḥ sūrya yogāt ca sarvajñaḥ paripūrṇaḥ su nirvṛtaḥ sarveṣām eva bhūtānām uttamaḥ puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ puruṣebhyaḥ dvijaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ dvijebhyaḥ grantha pāragaḥ jñāna artha koṭi koṭibhyaḥ variṣṭhāḥ yoginaḥ matāḥ yoga jñāḥ yoga niṣṭhāḥ ca pitaraḥ yoga sambhavāḥ yaḥ ca dravya kalāpa ātmā dakṣiṇā haviḥ ṛtvijaḥ ṛc yajuḥ sāma yogaiḥ ca deva yajñaḥ prakīrtitaḥ brahmacaryam tapaḥ maunam kṣāntiḥ āhāra lāghavam iti etat tapasām rūpam su dhīram pañca lakṣaṇam yat ca diṣṭam viśiṣṭam ca nyāya prāptam ca yat bhaveta vivardhanīm sahasrāṇām sarva sasya prarohiṇīm dadyāt bhūmim jala upetām bhūmidānam tat ucyate eka chattrām mahīm kṛtvā dvijebhyaḥ pratipādayet saṃpūrṇām parvata araṇyaiḥ bhūmi dānam tat ucyate kanyām alaṃkṛtām dadyāt adhanāya narādhipā sarva doṣa vinirmuktām kula yogyām alaṃkṛtām madhyama uttama vastrāṇām yaḥ dadyāt ahatāni ca etat samāsatas jñeyam vastra dānasya lakṣaṇam brahma viṣṇu sama ādhikya kānti śīla parāyaṇaḥ ahorātram na bhuñjīta hi upavāsasya lakṣaṇam catvāriṃśat samāyuktam piṇḍānām hi śata dvayam māse hi adya ayathākāmam idam cādrāyaṇam smṛtam bhiḥ sarva śāstra jñaiḥ tapas niṣṭhaiḥ jita indriyaiḥ sūrya avāntara sthānāni puṇya kṣetrāṇi nirdiśet mṛtānām teṣu sūrya tvam saura kṣetreṣu dehinām dānāni āvasatham kuryāt udyānam tīrtheṣu etāni yaḥ kuryāt saḥ akṣayam labhate phalam kṣāntiḥ spṛhā tathā satyam dānam śīlam tapaḥ śrutam etat aṣṭāṅgam uddiṣṭam param pātrasya lakṣaṇam yajña upavāsa dānāni ca saṃpūrṇam labhate bhaktyā bhojayitvā tu bhojakān sūre bhaktiḥ kṣamā satyam daśa indriya vinigrahaḥ sūryabhaktam dvijam bhaktyā yaḥ śrāddheṣu ca bhojayet sūryabhaktena yat bhuktam bhānu nāma āśrayam nṛpaiḥ tasmāt śrāddhe viśeṣeṇa puṇyeṣu divaseṣu ca asaṃyataḥ saṃyataḥ vā sarva avasthām gataḥ api vā yām gatim āpnoti na tām yajña śataiḥ api tasmāt mānyaḥ ca pūjyaḥ ca rakṣaṇīyaḥ ca sarvadā bhojakaḥ kuru śārdūlaiḥ saureṇa gatim icchatā sūrya vat sa hi draṣṭavyaḥ pūjanīyaḥ ca bhārataiḥ saura āśrameṣu vijñeyam tat puṇyam ayuta adhikam dhātu danta mayam ca api rājā bhavati bhū tale uddhṛtya śata sāhasram sūrya loke mahīyate dattvā tu lomaśām rājñ bhojakāya śubhām bṛhat śaṅkham dadāti yaḥ bhaktyā tathā divye ca pāduke yuga koṭi śatam divyam sūrya loke mahīyate bhavet iha āgataḥ śrīmān sukha āḍhyaḥ vedapāragaḥ yaḥ karoti gṛham bhānoḥ tat sthānam ca uttamam bhavet śobhitam puṣpa pattra ādyaiḥ nyaset tatra āsane surāḥ purastāt tasya saṃsthāpya ācāryam pūjayet sadā yaḥ evam nyāyāt vakti saura dharmam śṛṇoti ca mahat vidyām yaśaḥ kīrtim upalabhya ravim japet uvāca sādhu sādhu mahā bāho sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi bhārata nāśanam sukha āsīnam purā rājñ aruṇam sūrya sārathim dharmāṇām uttamam dharmam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam saura dharmam khaga śreṣṭha brūhi me kṛtsnaśas anaghaiḥ uvāca śṛṇu tvam kīrtayāmi eṣa sukha upāyam mahat phalam ajñāna arṇava magnānām sarveṣām prāṇinām ayam tṛṣṇā velā ākula apare mānuṣyam durlabham prāpya ye arcayanti divākaram teṣām hi saphalam janma kṛtārthāḥ te nara uttamāḥ ye smaranti sadā sūryam na te duḥkhasya bhāginaḥ vividhāni manojñāni vividha ābharaṇāḥ striyaḥ dhanam vā dṛṣṭa paryantam sūrya pūjā vidheḥ phalam ye vāñchanti mahā bhogān rājyam vā tridaśāḥ laye saubhāgyam kāntim atulām bhogam tyāgam yaśaḥ śriyam saundaryam jagantaḥ khyātiḥ kīrtiḥ dharma ādayaḥ smṛtāḥ tasmāt saṃpūjayet sūryam sarva deva gaṇa arcitam lobhaḥ teṣām manuṣyāṇām ye ravim śaraṇam gatāḥ yeṣām iha īśvare bhānau nityam sūrye gatam manaḥ yaḥ evam pūjayet bhānum śraddhayā parayā anvitaḥ mucyate sarva pāpebhyaḥ saḥ naraḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ ḍākinyaḥ vividha ākārāḥ rākṣasāḥ sa piśācakāḥ na tasya pīḍām kurvanti tathā anyāḥ ca vibhīṣaṇāḥ hatravaḥ nāśam āyānti saṃgrāme jayam āpnuyāt na rogaiḥ pīḍyate vīraḥ āpadaḥ na spṛśanti tam dhanam āyuḥ yaśaḥ vidyā prabhāvaḥ hi atulam tathā hi śubhena upacayam yānti nityam pūrṇa manorathāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe garuḍa aruṇa saṃvāde sauradharmavarṇanam nāma trisaptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca pūjayitvā ravim bhaktyā brahmā bahma tvam āgataḥ viṣṇu tvam ca api deveśaḥ viṣṣuḥ āpa tad arcanāt mad api jagannāthaḥ pūjayitvā divākaram mātaraḥ deva gandharvāḥ piśāca uraga rākṣasāḥ pūjayanti sadā bhānum īśānam sura nāyakam yaḥ na pūjayate sūryam bhāskaram tama sūdanam dharma artha kāma mokṣāṇām na naraḥ bhājanam bhavet tasmāt kāryam hi tat dhyānam yāvajjīvam pratijñayā yaḥ tu saṃtiṣṭhate nityam vinā sūryasya pūjanāt varam prāṇa parityāgaḥ śirasaḥ vā atha chedanam sūryam saṃpūjya bhuñjīta tridaśa īśam divākaram manuṣya carmaṇā naddhaḥ saḥ raviḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ sūrya bhakta āgamāḥ ca eva sūrya arcana parāyaṇāḥ saṃyatāḥ dharma saṃpannāḥ dharma ādīn sādhayanti te para upakāra niratāḥ guru śuśrūṣaṇe ratāḥ tā sva anta gatā bhadrā nityam svāgata vādinaḥ su alpa vācaḥ sumanasaḥ śūrāḥ śāstra viśāradāḥ hi śauca ācāra su saṃpannāḥ dayā dākṣiṇya gocarāḥ dambha matsara nirmuktāḥ tṛṣṇā lobha vivarjitāḥ saṃvibhāga parāḥ proktāḥ na śaṭhāḥ ca api akutsitāḥ iva na dīnāḥ māninaḥ ca eva na ca roga vaśa anugāḥ bhavanti bhāvitātmānaḥ su snigdhāḥ sādhu sevitāḥ na pāṇi pāda vāc cakṣus śrotra śiśna udare ratāḥ capalāni na kurvanti sarva vyāsaṅga varjitāḥ sūrya āsana ratāḥ śāntāḥ ṣaḍakṣara manogatāḥ iti ācāra samāyuktāḥ bhavanti bhuvi mānavāḥ pūjanīyaḥ raviḥ nityam guṇeṣu eteṣu vartate sarveṣām eva pātrāṇām atipātram divākaraḥ patantam trāyate yasmāt atīva naraka arṇavāt tasya pātra atipātrasya māhātmyam dānam aṇu api dravyeṇa api hi yaḥ kuryāt naraḥ karma tad ālaye api deha kṣaye jñānam prāpya śāntim avāpnuyāt sarva dvija kadambeṣu kaścid jñānam avāpnuyāt kaścid etat tu mama divyam labdhvā jñānam vimuñcati tāvat bhramanti saṃsāre duḥkha śoka pariplutāḥ sūryasya ālepanam puṇyam dviguṇam candanasya tu candanāt agurau jñeyam puṇyam aṣṭaguṇa uttaram iṣyate tasmāt śataguṇaiḥ puṇyam kuṅkumasya vidhīyate sūrya yajña upakaraṇam kṛtvā alpam yadi vā bahu bhāvāt vitta anusāreṇa sūrya loke mahīyate yat api iṣṭam aniṣṭam ca nyāyena ubhayam āgatam yaḥ kuryāt duḥkhena api tad arcanam taḥ api dvijaḥ divam yāti karmaṇā pāpa varjitaḥ sūrya pūjā vidhim kuryāt yaḥ icchet śreyaḥ ātmanaḥ tvaritam jīvitam yāti tvaritam yauvanam tathā yāvat na abhyeti maraṇam yāvat na ākramate jarā ittham vijñāya deveśam pūjayasva divākaram ye bhaktyā devadeveśam sūryam śāntam ajam prabhum pūjayitvā tu prahṛṣṭena antarātmanā kṛta añjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā purā brahmā abravīt idam deva mārga praṇetāram praṇataḥ asmi ravim sadā śāśvatam śobhanam śuddham citrabhānum divaspatim devadeveśam īśa īśam praṇataḥ asmi divākaram ca arkam aryamaṇam ca indram viṣṇum īśam divākaram yaḥ idam śṛṇuyāt nityam brahmanā uktam stavam param sa hi kīrtim parām prāpya punar sūryapuram vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe garuḍa aruṇa saṃvāde sūryastutiḥ nāma catuḥsaptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca pīḍitāḥ ye ca vināyaka hatāḥ ca ye kartavyam kim bhavet teṣām ātmanaḥ śreyase anagha uvāca nānā roga hatānām tu arditānām tathā aribhiḥ muktvā na anyat śreyaskaram param tasmāt ārādhayet nityam sarva roga vināśanam graha upaghāta hantāram rāja upadrava nāśanam uvāca mad aṃgam dvijasattamaiḥ evam mattasya mama tāta kim kāryam avaśiṣyate yena aham karmaṇā kalpaḥ bhaveyam patravān punar yat kṛtvā kalpa tām prāpya pūjayāmi divākaram uvāca pūjayasva jagannātham bhāskaram timira apaham sūrya agni kāryam satatam śuddha cittaḥ samācara mahā śānti karam khyātam sarva upadrava nāśanam uvāca na aham śaktaḥ asmi vai kartum pūjām dinakarasya ca na ca agni kāryam śaknomi kartum vikala tām gataḥ tasmāt mama kuru śānti artham agni kāryam khagādhipaiḥ mahāśāntiḥ iti khyātam śāntaye mama suvrataiḥ uvāca akalpaḥ tvam na śaknoṣi mahā vyādhi prapīḍitaḥ aham karomi te putra śāntaye pāvaka arcanam yat kṛtam mama ca arkeṇa purā śānti dama ādarāt sarva pāpa haram puṇyam mahā vipra vināśanam mahodayam śātikaram lakṣa homa vidhi smṛtam tṛpti dam sarva devānām bhāskara priyam uttam bhāgneyyām diśi lipya atha sthaḍilam gomayena tu mahāvyāhṛtibhiḥ vīraiḥ lakṣa homam samācaret bhārakta deha rūpāya raktākṣāya mahātmane dharādharāya śāntāya sahasra akṣiśirāya ca adhomukhāya śvetāya svāhā pūrva āhutim sṛjet caturmukhāya śāntāya padmāsana gatāya ca padma varṇāya vedhāya kamaṇḍalu dharāya ca dvitīya ūrdhva mukhāya iha svāhākāra āhutim sṛjet hema varṇāya dehāya airāvata gatāya ca sahasrākṣa śarīrāya pūrva diśi unmukhāya ca deva adhipāya ca indrāya vihastāya śubhāya ca svāhākāram ca utsṛjet eva tṛtīya vadanāya ca dīptāya vyakta dehāya jvālā mālā ākulāya ca yamāya dharmarājāya dakṣiṇa āśā mukhāya ca nīla jīmūta varṇāya rakta ambara dharāya ca muktāphala śarīrāya piṅga akṣāya mahātmane śukla vastrāya pītāya divya pāśa dharāya ca svāhākārāya ca tathā paścima abhimukhāya ca tad kṛṣṇa piṅgala netrāya vāyavya abhimukhāya ca nīladhvajāya vīrāya tathā ca indrāya vedhase svāhā iti pavanāya iha āhutim ca utsṛjet budhaḥ gadā hastāya sūryāya citra sraj bhūṣaṇāya ca mahodarāya śāntāya svāhā adhipataye tathā śvetāya śveta varṇāya citrākṣāya mahātmane hantāya śānta rūpāya pināka vara dhāriṇe mukhāya iha dadyāt īśāya ca āhutim evam devam mahātmānam pāvakam vidhivat khagaiḥ lakṣa homam ca vidhivat kṛtvā śāntikam ācaret bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar iti svā hā lakṣa homa vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ śānti artham sarva lokānām tatas śāntikam ācaret sindūra āsana rakta ābhaḥ raktapadma ābha locanaḥ sahasrakiraṇaḥ devaḥ sapta aśva ratha vāhanaḥ karotu te mahā śāntim graha pīḍā nivāriṇīm tri cakra ratham ārūḍhaḥ apām sāra mayam tu yaḥ daśa aśva vāhanaḥ devaḥ ātreyaḥ ca amṛta sravaḥ somaḥ saumyena bhāvena grahapīḍām vyapohatu aṅgārakaḥ agni sadṛśaḥ graha pīḍām vyapohatu pīta mālya ambara dharaḥ budhaḥ pīḍām vyapohatu tapta gairika saṃkāśaḥ sarva śāstra viśāradaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ iti khyāta arthaśāstra paraḥ ca yaḥ śāntena cetasā saḥ api pareṇa su samāhitaḥ vinirjitya karotu te śāntikam hima kunda indu varṇa ābhaḥ daitya dānava pūjitaḥ maheśvaraḥ tatas dhīmān mahāsauraḥ mahāmatiḥ sūrya arcana paraḥ nityam śukraḥ śukla nibhaḥ tadā nīti śāstra paraḥ nityam grahapīḍām vyapohatu nānā rūpa dharaḥ vyaktaḥ avijñāta gatiḥ ca yaḥ ekacūlaḥ dvicūlaḥ ca triśikhaḥ pañcacūlakaḥ aneka śikharaḥ ketuḥ saḥ te pīḍām vyapohatu ete grahāḥ mahātmānaḥ sūrya arcana pare sadā hṛṣṭāḥ sadā kālam hita īkṣaṇāḥ uvāca padma āsanaḥ padma varṇaḥ padma pattra nibha īkṣaṇaḥ bhairava kamaṇḍalu dharaḥ śrīmān deva gandharva pūjitaḥ mahā tejāḥ sarva loka prajāpatiḥ brahma śabdena divyena brahmā śāntim karotu te pīta ambara dharaḥ devaḥ ātreyī dayitaḥ sadā śaṅkha cakra gadā pāṇiḥ śyāma varṇaḥ catur bhujaḥ yajña dehaḥ kramaḥ devaḥ ātreyī dayitaḥ sadā śaṅkha cakra gadā pāṇiḥ mādhavaḥ madhusūdanaḥ sūrya dhyāna paraḥ nityam viṣṇuḥ śāntim karotu te viśruta ābharaṇaiḥ iha catur bhujaḥ mahā tejāḥ puṣpa ardha kṛta śekharaḥ saḥ te śāntim karotu vai iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharmeṣu ṣaṭsaptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca akṣamālā arpita karā kamaṇḍalu dharā śubhā brahmāṇī saumya vadanā āditya ārādhane ratā hasti kṛ su prītā āśīrvāda parā khagaiḥ mahāśvetā iti vikhyātā ādi tya dayitā sadā hima kunda indu sadṛśā mahā vṛṣabha vāhinī triśūla hasta āvaraṇā viśruta ābharaṇā satī catur bhujā catur vaktrā tri netrā pāpa nāśinī vṛṣadhvaja arcana ratā rudrāṇī śānti dā bhavet mayūra vāhanā devī sindūra aruṇa vigrahā mahā kāyā sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitā mahā vīryā sūrya arcana ratā sadā te kaumārī vara dā devī śāntim āśu karotu te catur bhujā hi sā devī vaiṣṇavā sura pūjitā sūrya arcana parā nityam sūrya eka gata mānasā mantim karotu te nityam sarva asura vimardinī airāvata gaja ārūḍhā vajra hastā mahā balā sarvatra locanā devī varṇāt karbura aruṇā siddha gandharva namitā sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitā iṃdrāṇī te sadā devī śāntim āśu karotu vai mahā avadātā yā devī śaṅkha cakra gadā dharā tejayantī iti nimiṣān pūjayatī sadā ravim vārāhī vara dā devī te śāntim karotu vai ardha kośā kaṭi kṣāmā nirmāṃsā snāyu bandhanāt karāla vanā ghorā khaḍga ghaṇṭā udgatā satī bhaga mālinī krūrā khaṭvāṅga vara dhāriṇī māraktā piṅga nayanā gaja carma avaguṇṭhitā mā śruta ābharaṇā devī preta sthāna nivāsinī mahā rūpeṇa ghoreṇa śiva rūpa bhayaṃkarā cāmuṃḍā caṇḍa rūpeṇa sadā śāntim karotu te caṇḍa muṇḍa karā devī muṇḍa deha gatā satī hasta mālinī krūrā kha dvār aṅga vara dhā riṇī mātaraḥ devyaḥ tathā anyāḥ loka mātaraḥ bhūtānām mātaraḥ sarvāḥ tathā anyāḥ pitṛ mātaraḥ vṛddhiśrāddheṣu pūjyante yāḥ tu devyaḥ manīṣibhiḥ mātre pramātre tanmātre iti mātṛ mukhāḥ tathā pitāmahī tu tad mātā vṛddhā yā ca pitāmahī iti etāḥ tu pitāmahyaḥ śāntim te pitṛ mātaraḥ sarvāḥ mātṛ mahā devyaḥ sva āyudha avyagra pāṇayaḥ jagant vyāpya pratiṣṭhatyaḥ bali kāmāḥ mahā udayāḥ hantu tāḥ nityam āditya ārādhane ratāḥ hi śāṃtena cetasā śāṃtyaḥ śāntaye te śāṃti dā pīta śyāmā ati saumyena snigdha varṇena śobhanā lalāṭa tilaka upetā candra rekhā ardha dhāriṇī citra ambara dharā devī sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitā mayā strī maya rūpāṇām śobhā guṇa su sampadā bhāvanā mātra saṃtuṣṭā umā devī vara pradā sākṣāt āgatya rūpeṇa śāntena amita tejasā mantim karotu te prītā ādityā rādhane ratā uvāca bāla rūpeṇa khaṭvāṅga śikhi vāhanaḥ pūrveṇa vadanaḥ śrīmān tri śikhaḥ śakti saṃyutaḥ kṛttikāyāḥ ca rudrasya ca aṅga udbhūtaḥ sura arcitaḥ mantim karotu te nityam balam saukhyam ca tejasā ha ātreyī balavān devaḥ ārogyam ca khaga adhipaiḥ śūla hastaḥ mahā prājñaḥ nadīśaḥ ravi bhāvitaḥ matim karotu te śāntaḥ dharme ca matim uttamām mahodaraḥ mahā kāyaḥ snigdha añjana sama prabhaḥ eka daṃṣṭra utkaṭaḥ devaḥ gajavaktraḥ mahā balaḥ nāga yajñopavītena nānā ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ para artha saṃpadā uddhāraḥ gaṇādhyakṣaḥ vara pradaḥ te mahā śāntim bhāskara arcana tatparaḥ indranīla nibhaḥ tri akṣaḥ dīpta śūla āyudha udyataḥ rakta ambara dharaḥ śrīmān kṛṣṇa aṅgaḥ nāgabhūṣaṇaḥ pāpa apanodam atulam alakṣyaḥ mala nāśanaḥ karotu te mahā śāntim prītaḥ prītena cetasā tridaśānām ca jananī puṇyā loka namaskṛtā mātā bhuvanasya khaga adhipaiḥ śāntim karotu te mātā bhuvanasya khaga adhipaiḥ snigdha śyāmena varṇena mahā mahiṣa mardanā dhanuḥ cakra praharaṇā khaṅga paṭṭiśa dhāriṇī mad a tarjanī āyata karā sarva upadrava nāśinī mantim karotu te durgā bhavānī ca śivā tathā ati sūkṣmaḥ hi ati krodhaḥ tri akṣaḥ bhṛṃgiriṭiḥ mahān sūrya ātmakaḥ mahā vīraḥ sūrya eka gata mānasaḥ mahā ghaṇṭā akṣa dhārakaḥ akṣa mālā arpita karaḥ ca akṣacandreśvaraḥ varaḥ caṇḍa pāpa haraḥ nityam brahmahatyā vināśanaḥ hantim karotu te nityam āditya ārādhane rataḥ tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat mātaraḥ divyāḥ tathā anyāḥ deva mātaraḥ sūryāyaṇa parāḥ devyaḥ jagant vyāpya vyavasthitāḥ hantu mama nityam mātaraḥ sura pūjitāḥ mātaraḥ rudra rūpāḥ ca gaṇānām adhipāḥ ca ye vighna bhūtāḥ tathā ca anye diś vidikṣu samāśritāḥ siddhim kurvantu te nityam bhayebhyaḥ pāntu sarvatas aindra ādayaḥ gaṇāḥ ye tu vajra hastāḥ mahā balāḥ hima kunda indu sadṛśāḥ nīla kṛṣṇa aṅga lohitāḥ divya āṃtarikṣāḥ bhaumāḥ ca pātāla tala vāsinaḥ te aindrāḥ śāntim prakurvaṃtu bhadrāṇi ca punar punar prāgneyyām ye bhṛtāḥ sarve dhruva hatyā anuṣaṅgiṇaḥ sūrya anuraktāḥ rakta ābhāḥ japā suma nibhāḥ tathā virakta lohitāḥ divyāḥ āgneyyām bhāskara ādayaḥ mānasa āditya ārādhana pare āditya gata mānasāḥ mama śāntim kurvantu te nityam prayacchantu balim mama ye tu satatam daṇḍa pāṇayaḥ hantu te sadā aiśānyām saṃsthitāḥ ye tu praśāntāḥ śūla pāṇayaḥ bhasma uddhūlita dehāḥ ca nīla kaṇṭhāḥ vilohitāḥ divya āṃtarikṣāḥ bhaumāḥ ca pātāla tala vāsinaḥ sūrya pūjā karāḥ nityam pūjayitvā aṃśumālinam tatas su prīta manasaḥ lokapālaiḥ nvitāḥ hantu mama nityam kam prayacchantu pūjitāḥ amarāvatī purī nāma pūrva bhāge vyavasthitā vidyādhara gaṇa ākīrṇā siddha gandharva sevitā ratna prākāra rucirā mahā ratna upaśobhitā tatra devapatiḥ śrīmān vajrapāṇiḥ mahā balaḥ airāvata gaja ārūḍhaḥ gairika ābhaḥ mahā dyutiḥ deva indraḥ satatam hṛṣṭaḥ āditya ārādhane rataḥ sūryapraṇāmaḥ paramām śāntim te adya prayacchatu bhāge tu purī tejasvatī śubhā nānā deva gaṇa ākīrṇā nānā ratna upaśobhitā tatra jvālā samākīrṇaḥ dīpta aṅgāra sama dyutiḥ āditya ārādhana rataḥ āditya gata mānasaḥ mantim karotu te devaḥ tathā pāpa parikṣayam vaivasvatī purī ramyā dakṣiṇena mahātmanaḥ sura asura śata ākīrṇā nānā ratna upaśobhitā tatra kunda indu saṃkāśaḥ hari piṅgala locanaḥ mahā mahiṣam ārūḍhaḥ kṛṣṇa sraj vastra bhūṣaṇaḥ antakaḥ atha mahā tejāḥ sūrya dharma parāyaṇaḥ mad āditya ārādhana paraḥ kṣema ārogye dadātu te nairṛte diś vibhāge tu purī kṛṣṇā iti viśrutā moha rakṣas gaṇa āśauca piśāca preta saṃkulā khaḍga pāṇiḥ mahā tejāḥ karāla vadana ujjvalaḥ rakṣa indraḥ vasate nityam āditya ārādhane rataḥ karotu me sadā śāntim dhanam dhānyam prayacchatu paścime tu diśaḥ bhāge purī śuddhavatī sadā nānā bhogi samākīrṇā nānā kiṃnara sevitā śāntim karotu mama prītaḥ śāṃtaḥ śāṃtena cetasā yaśovatī purī ramyā aiśānīm diśam āśritā nānā gaṇa samākīrṇā śubha ālayā tejas prākāra paryantā anaupamyā sadas jvalā tatra kunda indu saṃkāśaḥ ca ambuja akṣaḥ vibhūṣitaḥ trinetraḥ śānta rūpa ātmā akṣamālā dharādharaḥ mad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad deva adevāḥ śubha ayuktāḥ śāntim kurvantu te sadā te sarve muditāḥ devāḥ śāntim kurvantu te sadā sarasvatī sūrya bhaktā śānti dā vidadhātu me cāru cāmīkara sthā yā saroja karapallavā sūrya bhakti āśritā devī vibhūtim te prayacchatu nāma aṣṭasaptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ca hi mad mṛgaśiraḥ bhadrā ārdrā ca api aparā ujjvalā punarvasuḥ tathā puṣyaḥ āśleṣā ca tathā adhipa sūrya arcana ratāḥ nityam sūrya bhāva anubhāvitāḥ nakṣatra mātaraḥ hi etāḥ prabhā mālā vibhūṣitāḥ maghā sarva guṇa upetā pūrvā ca eva tu phālgunī svātiḥ viśākhā varadāḥ dakṣiṇām diśam āśritāḥ te api śāntikam dyotam kurvantu gagana uditāḥ anurādhā tathā jyeṣṭhā mūlam sūrya puraḥsarā pūrvāṣāḍhāḥ mahā vīryāḥ āṣāḍhā ca uttarā tathā abhijit nāma nakṣatram śravaṇam ca bahu śrutam etāḥ paścimatas dīptāḥ rājante ca anu mūrtayaḥ bhāskaram pūjayanti etāḥ sarvakālam su bhāvitāḥ mahā śāntim kurvantu te nityam vibhūtim ca maharddhikām dhaniṣṭhā śatabhiṣā tu pūrvabhādrapadā tathā uttarā bhādra revatyau ca aśvinī ca mahāmate bharaṇī ca mahādevī nityam uttaratas sthitāḥ sūrya arcana ratāḥ nityam āditya gatamāḥ nasāḥ maharddhikām śāntim kurvatu te nityam vibhūtim ca maharddhikām meṣaḥ mṛga adhipaḥ siṃhaḥ dhanuḥ dīptimatām varaḥ pūrveṇa bhāsayanti ete sūrya yoga pare śubhāḥ hasta anta anta anta anta antar antar antar ca ete dakṣiṇa bhāge tu pūjayanti ravim sadā bhaktyā paramayā nityam śāntim kurvantu te sadā mithunam ca tulā kumbhaḥ paścime ca vyavasthitāḥ japanti ete sadākālam ādityam grahanāya kam manaḥ kurvantu te nityam khakholka jñāna tatparāḥ sa tapas datta puṣpābhyām ye smṛtā satatam budhaiḥ ṛṣayaḥ sapta vikhyātāḥ dhruva antāḥ prarama ujjvalāḥ bhānu prasādāt saṃpannāḥ śāntim kurvantu te sadā kaśyapaḥ gālavaḥ gārgyaḥ viśvāmitraḥ mahā muniḥ muniḥ dakṣaḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca mārkaṇḍaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ nāradaḥ bhṛguḥ ātreyaḥ bhāradvājaḥ ca vai muniḥ vālmīkiḥ kauśikaḥ vātsyaḥ śākalyaḥ atha punarvasuḥ mahātapāḥ sūrya dhyāna eka paramāḥ śāntim kurvantu te sadā muni kanyāḥ mahābhāgāḥ ṛṣi kanyāḥ kumārikāḥ sūrya arcana ratāḥ nityam śāntim kurvantu te sadā siddhāḥ samṛddha tapasaḥ ye ca anye vai mahā tapāḥ saha āditya paramāḥ hi ete āditya ārādhane ratāḥ siddhim te saṃprayacchantu āśīrvāda parāyaṇāḥ balaḥ graha adhipasya devasya nityam pūjā parāyaṇāḥ balam vīryam ca te ṛddhim ārogyam ca bruvantu te mahā āḍhyaḥ yaḥ hayagrīvaḥ prahlādaḥ prabhayā anvitaḥ tāna eka agni mukhaḥ daityaḥ kālanemiḥ mahā balaḥ ete daityāḥ mahātmānaḥ sūrya bhāvena bhāvitāḥ tuṣṭim balam prayacchantu surārayaḥ satatam ca śubha ātmānaḥ puṣṭim kurvantu te sadā daitya patayaḥ mahābhāgāḥ daityānām kanyakāḥ śubhāḥ bhaktāḥ ye ca daityānām śāntim kurvantu te sadā āraktena rakta anta āyata locanāḥ mahābhāgāḥ kṛta āṭopāḥ śaṅkha ādyāḥ kṛta lakṣaṇāḥ anantaḥ nāga rāja indraḥ āditya ārādhane rataḥ mahā pāpa viṣam hatvā śāntim āśu karotu te tejasā ca ati dīptena kṛta svastika lāñchanaḥ nāga rāj takṣakaḥ śrīmān nāma koṭyā samanvitaḥ karotu te mahā śāntim sarva doṣa viṣa apahām ati kṛṣṇena varṇena sphuṭa adhikaṭa mastakaḥ kaṇṭha rekhā traya upetaḥ ghora daṃṣṭra āyudha udyataḥ anvitaḥ hatvā śāntim karotu te padma varṇaḥ padma kāntiḥ phulla padma āyata īkṣaṇaḥ padmaḥ mahā nāgaḥ nityam bhāskara pūjakaḥ sa te śāṃti śubham śīghram acalam saṃprayacchatu hariṇā deha bhāreṇa śrīmat kamala locanaḥ maṅkhapāla śriyā dīptaḥ sūrya pāda abja pūjakaḥ mahāviṣam garaśreṣṭham hatvā śāntim karotu te ati gaureṇa dehena candra ardha kṛta śekharaḥ dīpa bhāge kṛta āṭopa śubha lakṣaṇa lakṣitaḥ kulikaḥ nāma nāga indraḥ nityam sūrya parāyaṇaḥ apahṛtya viṣam ghoram karotu te śāntikam antarikṣe ca ye nāgāḥ ye nāgāḥ svarga saṃsthitāḥ pātāle ye sthitāḥ nāgāḥ sarve yatra samāhitāḥ sūrya pādāḥ arcana āsaktāḥ śāntim kurvantu te sadā nāginyaḥ nāga kanyāḥ ca tathā nāga kumārakāḥ sūryabhaktāḥ sumanasaḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā yaḥ idam nāma saṃsthānam kīrtayet śṛṇuyāt tathā na tam sarpāḥ vihiṃsati na viṣam kramate sadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saura dharmavarṇanam nāma ekonāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam gaṃgā puṇyā mahādevī yamunā narmadā nadī gautamī ca api kāverī varuṇā devikā tathā pūjayanti sadā nadyaḥ sūrya sadbhāva bhāvitāḥ mānasāḥ kurvantu niraṃjanā nāma nadī śoṇaḥ ca api mahā nadaḥ mandākinī ca paramā tathā sannihitā śubhā etāḥ ca anyāḥ ca bahavaḥ bhuvi divi antarikṣake sūrya arcana ratāḥ nadyaḥ kurvantu te śāntikam mahāvaiśravaṇaḥ devaḥ yakṣarājaḥ mahā ṛṣikaḥ yakṣa koṭi parīvāraḥ yakṣa saṃkhyeya saṃyutaḥ mahā vibhava saṃpannaḥ sūrya pāda arcane rataḥ sūrya dhyāna eka paramaḥ sūrya bhāvena bhāvitaḥ mantim karotu te prītaḥ padma pattra āyata īkṣaṇaḥ māṇibhadraḥ mahāyakṣaḥ maṇi ratna vibhūṣitaḥ manohareṇa hāreṇa kaṇṭha lagnena rājate yakṣiṇī yakṣa kanyābhiḥ parivārita vigrahaḥ sūrya arcana samāsaktaḥ karotu te śāntikam suciraḥ nāma yakṣa indraḥ maṇi kuḍala bhūṣitaḥ bahu yakṣa samākīrṇaḥ yakṣaiḥ namita vigrahaḥ sūrya pūjā paraḥ yuktaḥ karotu te śāntikam pāṃcikaḥ nāma yakṣa indraḥ kaṇṭha ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ yakṣa vṛnda samākīrṇaḥ yakṣa koṭi samanvitaḥ sūrya arcana karaḥ śrīmān karotu te śāntikam dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ mahā tejāḥ nānā yakṣa adhipaḥ khaga divya paṭṭaḥ śukla chattraḥ maṇi kāñcana bhūṣitaḥ sūrya bhaktaḥ sūrya rataḥ sūrya pūjā parāyaṇaḥ sūrya prasāda saṃpannaḥ karotu te śāntikam ca nānā kāñcana mālābhiḥ upaśobhita kaṃdharaḥ sūrya pūjā paraḥ bhaktaḥ kañja akṣaḥ kañja saṃnibhaḥ tejasā āditya saṃkāśaḥ karotu te śāntikam antīrakṣa gatāḥ yakṣāḥ ye yakṣāḥ svarga gāminaḥ nānā rūpa dharāḥ yakṣāḥ sūrya bhaktāḥ dṛḍha vratāḥ tad bhaktāḥ tad gamanasaḥ sūrya pūjā samutsukāḥ hṛṣṭāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te hṛṣṭāḥ śāṃtāḥ śāṃti parāyaṇāḥ yakṣiṇyaḥ vividha ākārāḥ tathā yakṣa kumārakāḥ mantim svastyayanam kṣemam balam kalyāṇam uttamam siddhim ca āśu prayacchantu nityam ca su samāhitāḥ parvatāḥ sarvatas sarve vṛkṣāḥ ca eva maharddhikāḥ sūrya bhaktāḥ sadā sarve śāṃtim kurvantu te sadā sāgarāḥ sarvatas sarve gṛha araṇyāni kṛtsnaśas te ārādhana pare kurvantu te śāntikam rākṣasāḥ sarvatas sarve ghora rūpāḥ mahā balāḥ sthala jāḥ rākṣasāḥ ye tu antarikṣa gatāḥ ca ye pātāle rākṣasāḥ ye tu nityam sūrya arcane ratāḥ hasti kurvantu te sarve tejasā nitya dīpitāḥ pretāḥ preta gaṇāḥ sarve ye pretāḥ sarvatomukhāḥ ati dīptāḥ ca ye pretāḥ ye pretāḥ rudhira aśanāḥ antarikṣe ca ye pretāḥ tathā ye svarga vāsinaḥ bhū tale vā api ye pretāḥ kāmarūpiṇaḥ tejasā tasya devasya śāntim kurvantu te sadā ye piśācāḥ mahā vīryāḥ vṛddhimantaḥ mahā balāḥ nānā rūpa dharāḥ sarve sarve ca guṇavattarāḥ antarikṣe piśācāḥ ye svarge ye ca mahā balāḥ pātāle bhū tale ye ca bahu rūpāḥ manojavāḥ yasya aham sārathiḥ vīra yasya tvam turagaḥ sadā tejasā tasya devasya śāntim kurvantu te añjasā apasmāra grahāḥ sarve sarve ca api jvara grahāḥ pātāle tu grahāḥ ye ca ye grahāḥ sarvatas gatāḥ haraḥ yasya sadā vāme lalāṭe kañja jaḥ sthitaḥ tejasā tasya devasya śāntim kurvantu te sadā iti deva ādayaḥ sarve sūrya yajña vidhāyinaḥ bhavataḥ śāntim sūrya bhakteṣu sarvadā graha uttamāya devāya jayaḥ kalyāṇa kāriṇe padma vikāśāya budha rūpāya te namaḥ jayaḥ dīpti vidhānāya jayaḥ śānti vidhāyine gāyatrī deha rūpāya sāvitrī dayitāya ca dharādharāya sūryāya mārtaṃḍāya namaḥ namaḥ uvāca evam hi kurvataḥ śāntim aruṇasya mahīpate tejasā budha saṃkāśaḥ valena hariṇā samaḥ saṃpūrṇa avayavaḥ rājan yathāpūrvam tathā bhavat evam anye api rāja indra mānavāḥ ye ca rogiṇaḥ karaṇīyam ca rāja indra mānavaiḥ ca prarogibhiḥ praha upaghāte durbhikṣe utpāteṣu ca kṛtsnaśas pūjayitvā prasūktam tu dhyātvā vīram prayatnāt yathā tathā sūktaiḥ homam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ idam ca śāntikam kuryāt balim dayāt prayatnāt evam kṛte śriyam devāḥ varṣante kāmanāḥ nṛṇām iti evam śāntika adhyāyam yaḥ paṭhet śṛṇuyāt api sa vijitya raṇe śatrum mānam ca paramam labhet akṣayam modate kālam atiraskṛta śāsanaḥ bhavet āditya sadṛśaḥ tejasā prabhayā tathā yān uddiśya paṭhet vīra vācakaḥ mānavaḥ bhuvi na akāle maraṇam tasya na sarpaiḥ ca api daśyate na viṣam kramate dehe na jaḍa āndhyam na mūka tā ye rogāḥ ye mahā utpātāḥ ye ahayaḥ ca mahā viṣāḥ te sarve praśamam yānti śravaṇāt asya bhārata yat puṇyam tīrthānām gaṅgā ādīnām viśeṣataḥ tat puṇyam koṭi guṇitam prāpnoti śravaṇa ādibhiḥ daśānām rājasūyānām anyeṣām ca viśeṣataḥ jīvet varṣa śatam sāgram sarva vyādhi vivarjitaḥ śaraṇa āgata dīna ārta mitra viśrabha ghātakaḥ duṣṭaḥ pāpa samācāraḥ pitṛ hā mātṛ hā tathā hi śravaṇāt asya pāpebhyaḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ sūryabhakte sadā deyam sūryeṇa kathitam purā aruṇasya mahā bāho garuḍasya aruṇena ca garuḍena purā proktam bhojakānām mahātmanām sūrya śarma sukha ādīnām śākadvīpe mahīpate taiḥ ca api kathitam puṇyam muneḥ vyāsasya dhīmataḥ tena api kathitam puṇyam sarva pāpa bhaya apaham iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe garuḍa aruṇa saṃvāde śāṃtikam varṇanam nāma aśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca pañca prakāram dharmam mama vada smārtam yathākramam pañcadhā varṇitam dharmam śṛṇu rājñ samāsatas yathā uktam bhāskareṇa iha aruṇasya mahātmanaḥ praṇamya śirasā devam uvāca garuḍāgrajaḥ evam pṛṣṭaḥ tu bhagavān aruṇena khaga adhipaḥ uvāca parayā prītyā pūjayitvā mahīpate uvāca mṛti dharmam veda mūlam śṛṇu tvam garuḍāgraja pūrva anubhūtam yat dhyānam atha tat smaraṇam smṛtiḥ dharmaḥ kriyā ātmā nirdiṣṭaḥ śreyaḥ abhyudaya lakṣaṇaḥ saḥ ca pañcavidhaḥ proktaḥ veda mūlaḥ sanātanaḥ asya śabdasya anuṣṭhānāt svargaḥ mokṣaḥ ca jāyate uvāca uvāca veda dharmaḥ smṛtaḥ tu ekaḥ āśramāṇām sa tad paraḥ varṇa āśramaḥ tṛtīyaḥ tu guṇa naimittikaḥ yathā savarṇa āśrama daṇḍaḥ tu bhikṣā daṇḍa ādikaḥ yathā varṇa āśrama āśrama tvam ca yodhi kṛtya pravartate sa varṇa āśrama dharmaḥ tu daṇḍa ādyāḥ mekhalāḥ yathā yathā mūrdhābhiṣiktasya prajānām pālanam param naimittikaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ jāti dravya guṇa āśrayaḥ eṣa tu dvividhaḥ proktaḥ samāsāt aviśeṣāt śrutyā saha virodhe tu bādhyate viṣayam vinā smṛti śāstra vikalpaḥ tu ākāṅkṣā pūraṇe sati na etat anuṣṭhānam kriyā satī evam śakya vidhānam tu nyāyaḥ hi evam vyavasthitaḥ niṣedha vidhi rūpam tu dvidhā śāstram khaga adhipa pañca prakārāḥ smṛtayaḥ evam śiṣya vyavasthitāḥ tridhā caturdhā dvedhā vai ekadhā bahudhā khaga dṛṣṭa arthā tu smṛtiḥ kācid adṛṣṭa arthā tathā aparā anuvāda smṛtiḥ tu anyā dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭā tu pañcamā sarvāḥ etāḥ veda mūlāḥ smṛtāḥ vai ṛṣibhiḥ svayam uvāca yāḥ etāḥ bhavatā proktāḥ smṛtayaḥ parva gopane etāsām lakṣaṇam brūhi samāsāt eva sattamaiḥ dṛṣṭa arthā kā matā deva adṛṣṭa arthā ca kā bhavet dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭa svarūpā kā nyāya mūlā ca kā bhavet anuvāda smṛtiḥ kā syāt adṛṣṭā adṛṣṭā tu kā bhavet uvāca tam khagam vīram praṇatam vinaya anvitam uvāca ṣaḍguṇasya svarūpam tu prayogāt kārya gauravāt samayānām upāyānām yogaḥ vyāsa samāsāt adhyakṣāṇām ca nikṣepaḥ karaṇānām nirūpaṇam dṛṣṭārthā iyam smṛtiḥ proktā ṛṣibhiḥ garuḍāgrajaiḥ saṃdhyā upāstiḥ tathā kāryā śvanaḥ māṃsam na bhakṣayet adṛṣṭa arthā smṛtiḥ proktā manunā vinatā ātmajaiḥ viduḥ śrutau dṛṣṭam yathā kāryam tat tādṛśam yadi ukta anuvādinī sā tu pārivrājyam tathā gṛhāt uktaḥ dharmaḥ ca saṃkṣepāt paribhāṣā ca tadgatā tad sādhanam ca deśa ādi ittham iti abravīt raviḥ brahmāvartaḥ paraḥ deśaḥ ṛṣi śastaḥ tu anantaraḥ kṛṣṇa sāraḥ tu vicaret mṛgaḥ yatra svabhāvāt yajñiyaḥ saḥ tu deśaḥ syāt mleccha deśaḥ tatas paraḥ brahma ādīnām ca devānām brāhmaṇa ādeḥ tathā eva ca manuḥ prāha veda mūlam sanātanam upalabhya yathātattvam sa ca darśitavan ṛṣiḥ samyak saṃsādhanam dharmaḥ kartavyaḥ tu adhikāriṇā niṣkāmeṇa sadā vīra kāmyam rūpa anvitena ca mad ācāra yuktaḥ śraddhāluḥ veda jñaḥ adhyātma cintakaḥ ca yaḥ karmaṇām phalam āpnoti nyāya arjita dhanaḥ ca yaḥ uvāca brahmāvarta ādi deśānām samastānām vibhāvaso vibhāgam brūhi deva indraiḥ saṃmānaya graha adhipaiḥ uvāca tam deva nirmitam deśam brahmāvartam pracakṣate ā samudrāt tu vai pūrvāt ā samudrāt tu paścimāt tayoḥ eva antaram giriyoḥ āryāvartam viduḥ budhāḥ etān vijñāya sat deśān saṃśrayeta prayatnāt śūdraḥ tu yasmin tasmin vā nivaset vṛtti karśitaḥ eṣā dharmasya vai jyotiḥ samāsāt kathitā te iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saura dharmeṣu aruṇa āditya saṃvāde smṛtibhedavarṇanam nāma ekāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ro uvāca uktam dharmasya rūpam tu sādhikāram sanātanam atas param pravakṣyāmi dharmam āśramiṇām khagaiḥ catvāraḥ āśramāḥ proktāḥ ekaḥ eva caturvidhaḥ gāyatraḥ brahmacārī tu prājāpatyaḥ dvitīyakaḥ catvāraḥ āśramāḥ proktāḥ sa vedāḥ sama dharmakāḥ atas param pravakṣyāmi saṃskāram dharma siddhaye tu kāryam puṃsavanam mātuḥ tṛtīye māsi saṃyutaiḥ sīmantaḥ saptame garbhe ṣaṣṭhe vā saptame api vā pātra saṃskārakāḥ iṣṭāḥ garbhādhāna ādayaḥ trayaḥ jātakarma ādayaḥ sarve saṃskārāḥ puruṣasya tu mantrakam prakāśaḥ nāma kartavyam dine tu ekādaśa īrtha vat dharma śāstra ādi saṃyuktam ṣaṣṭhe annaprāśanam khaga tṛtīye vā cūḍākarma vidhīyate aṣṭame daśame vā api brāhmaṇasya upanāyanam puruṣasya tathā ca anya jātīyānām viśeṣataḥ ekādaśe dvādaśe vā kārya kṣatriya vaiśyayoḥ sāvitram vaidikam ca eva mahānāmnī mahāvratam tathā aupaniṣadam ca abdam go dānam ca suvarṇakam veda eka deśa pāṭhasya uktam gṛhye prapañcakam uktā guroḥ tu śuśrūṣā dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭa artha sādhanam ubhayayoḥ vā tathā ca anyā yathānyāyam yathāśrutam toṣaḥ parasparasya iti etāvān dharma saṃgrahaḥ naiṣṭhikaḥ ca vidhānam tu yāvat klībam vidhīyate mad ante abhīṣṭa dānam ca anujñātaḥ gṛhī bhavet niṣkāsanam guru gṛhāt gṛhasthasya yathā bhavet naiṣṭhikaḥ ca tathā snānam kuryāt samyak yathāvidhi udvahet vai tatas bhāryām savarṇām lakṣaṇa anvitām saptamām pañcamām ca eva kanyakām pitṛ mātṛtaḥ udvaheta dvijaḥ bhāryām asamāna ārṣa gotra jām eva aṣṭau vivāhāḥ varṇānām saṃskāra ākhyāḥ iti śrutiḥ yaḥ tu doṣavatīm kanyām an ākhyāya prayacchati tasya kuryāt nṛpaḥ daṇḍam svayam ṣaṇṇavatim paṇān pituḥ gṛhe tu yā kanyā rajaḥ paśyati asaṃskṛtā yaḥ tu tām varayet kanyām brāhmaṇaḥ jñāna durbalaḥ tam vidyāt vṛṣalī patim sarva doṣān hi vikhyāpya striyāḥ vā puruṣasya vā gaurī kanyā pradhānā vai madhyamā kanyakā smṛtā tad samā jñeyā adhamā tu rajasvalā uvāca gaurī tu kā matā kanyā rohiṇī ca jagatpate uvāca asaṃprāpta rajāḥ gaurī prāpte rajasi rohiṇī avyañjana yutā kanyā kuca hīnā ca nagnikā sapta varṣā bhavet gaurī daśa varṣā tu nagnikā dvādaśe tu bhavet kanyā atas ūrdhvam rajasvalā tathā gatim iṣṭām tathā lokān hanyāt tu rajasā pituḥ tasmāt avyañjana upetām arajaska payodharām na anya upabhuktām soma ādyaiḥ dadyāt duhitrīm pitā annam tasya na bhoktavyam vṛthak pākaḥ hi sa smṛtaḥ samācaret prāṇāyāmam tris abhyasya ghṛtam prāśya viśuddhi ati vivāhayet eka gotrām samāna pravarām khaga udvāhayet sagotrām ca tanayām mātulasya ca ṛṣibhiḥ ca eva tulyaḥ yaḥ dvijaḥ cāndrāyaṇam caret asapiṇḍā tu yā mātuḥ asagotrā ca yā pituḥ sā praśastā dvijātīnām dārakarmaṇi maithune uvāca sā praśastā dvijātīnām dārakarmaṇi maithune uvāca na udvahet kapilām kanyām na adhika aṅgām na rogiṇīm na alomakām na atilomām na ca akūṭām na piṅgalām bhṛkṣa vṛkṣa nadī nāmnīm na anya parvata nāmakām na yakṣa ahi preṣya nāmnīm ca ati bhīṣaṇa nāmakām yasya astu na bhavet bhrātā na vijñāyeta vai pitā na upagacchet hi tām prājñaḥ putrikā dharma śaṅkayā haṃsa svarām eka varṇām madhu piṅgala locanām tādṛśām varayet kanyām gṛha arthī khaga sattamaiḥ sarve te narakam yānti dātṛ yājaka pañcamāḥ klībe deśa antara sthe vā patite vrajite tathā khañja vāmana kubjeṣu gadgadeṣu jaḍeṣu ca na śrāddham tu kaniṣṭhasya vikulāya ca kanyakā varaḥ ca kula śīlābhyām na śuddhyeta kadācana na mantrāḥ kāraṇam tatra na ca kanyā vṛtā bhavet udvāhitā tu yā kanyā na ca prāptā tu maithunam samākṣipya matām kanyām pitā tu akṣatayonikām kula śīlavate dadyāt na syāt doṣaḥ khagādhipaiḥ uvāca ete aṣṭau prabhavāḥ proktāḥ vivāhāḥ ye jagatpate lakṣaṇam brūhi ca eteṣām samāsāt timira apahaiḥ uvāca śubhām lakṣaṇa saṃpannām kula śīla guṇa anvitām alaṃkṛtya arhate dānam vivāhaḥ brāhmaḥ ucyate alaṃkṛtya eva kanyāyāḥ prājāpatyaḥ saḥ ucyate savarṇāyāḥ sagotrāyāḥ tam ārṣam ṛṣayaḥ viduḥ antarvedyām samānīya kanyām kanaka maṇḍitām ṛtvije ca eva yat dānam vivāhaḥ daiva saṃjñakaḥ ete vivāhāḥ catvāraḥ dharma kāma artha dāyakāḥ tārayanti caturṣu eteṣu dattāyām utpannaḥ yaḥ sutaḥ striyām dātuḥ pratigrahītuḥ ca punāti āsaptamān pitṝn prīti hetuḥ saḥ gāndharvaḥ vivāhaḥ pañcamaḥ mataḥ hatvā chittvā ca bhittvā ca krośatīm rudatīm gṛhāt prasahya kanyā haraṇam rākṣasa udvāhaḥ ucyate śulkam pradāya kanyāyāḥ haraṇam vyasanāt api suptām mattām pramattām vā rahaḥ yatra upagacchati sa pāpiṣṭhaḥ vivāhānām paiśācaḥ ca aṣṭamaḥ adhamaḥ etān sa śulkān sāmānyān vivāhān caturaḥ viduḥ kevalam kṣatriyasya eva vīryam chittvā hi rākṣasaḥ prāpte pūrva vivāhe tu vidhiḥ vaivāhikaḥ śivaḥ doṣavatyāḥ pradāne tu dātuḥ ṣaṇṇavatiḥ damaḥ syāt tu śulka pradāne ca kanyāyāḥ ca apavarjane mākāṅkṣā tīrtha saṃrodhaḥ tyāga hetuḥ ca vakṣyate parasparasya sambandhāt mokṣaḥ strīpuṃsayoḥ smṛtaḥ na syāt anyataraḥ prītaḥ roṣāt sāmpratikāt api bādhate ced patiḥ bhāryām saḥ tu dveṣaḥ iti smṛtaḥ bhavet bhartā api prasavam striyāḥ etām śulkasya tām bhuktvā anyām labdhum yadi icchati samastāḥ toṣayitvā arthaiḥ sūrya ūḍhām paramām varet catasraḥ brāhmaṇasya syuḥ bhāryā rājñaḥ yatheṣṭāt a tīrtha gamanāt puṃsaḥ tīrthe saṃgāhanāt striyāḥ yaugapadye tu tīrthānām vivāha kramaśas vrajet tad sāmyam jīvaputrāḥ vā grahaṇa kramaśas pi vā aṣṭau vivāhāḥ varṇānām vainateyaḥ vaśanti vai brāhmaḥ daivaḥ tathā ārṣaḥ ca prājāpatyaḥ khagāḥ dhipa ca praśastāḥ kṣatriya ādīnām vipra ādīnām tu mānāt pratigraha ādayaḥ baddhāḥ vivāhāḥ brāhmaṇasya tu pāvanam puruṣāṇām tu vivāham paricakṣate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe saptamīkalpe brāhme parvaṇi sūryāruṇasaṃvāde vivāhavidhivarṇanam nāma dvyaśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca kuryāt pañca mahāyajñān adhikāraḥ dvijasya saḥ bhūta pitṛ amara brahma manuṣyāṇām yathāvidhi sadā kṛtyānām phala artham apare sthitāḥ nitya anityam iti prāhuḥ anuṣaṅgāt phalam pare adṛṣṭa niyama adṛṣṭam ārogya antam ca varjanam tisraḥ uṣṭakāḥ tu kartavyāḥ madhyāvartī caturthikā śāka pāyasa pūpaiḥ tu māṃsena tu caturthikā nityam naimittikam kāmyam vṛddhiśrāddham sapiṇḍanam pārvaṇam ca iti vijñeyam goṣṭha śuddhi artham uttamam karmāṅgam navamam proktam vaidikam daśamam smṛtam uvāca yat etat bhavatā proktam śrāddham dvādaśadhā vibho tasya sarvasya mā brūhi lakṣaṇam vai pṛthak pṛthak nityam kim ucyate śrāddham kim vā naimittikam bhavet kāmi ādi devadeveśaḥ eteṣām lakṣaṇam vada uvāca kriyate sarvam pradakṣiṇam kāryam pūrvāhṇe tu upavītinā argha artham pitṛpātreṣu pretapātram pramocayet ye samānāḥ iti dvābhyām etat jñeyam sapiṇḍanam nityena tulyam śeṣam syāt ekoddiṣṭam striyāḥ api ca kriyate śrāddham tat goṣṭhaśrāddham ucyate bahūnām vidvasām sampad sukha artham pitṛ tṛptaye ca gacchet deśa antare yaḥ tu śrāddham kuryāt tu sarpiṣā sarveṣām eva śrāddhānām śreṣṭham sāṃvatsaram matam mātuḥ ca khaga śārdūlaiḥ vatsara ante mṛte ahani na aham tasya khaga śreṣṭha pūjām gṛhṇāmi no hariḥ na brahmā na ca vai rudraḥ na ca anye devatā gaṇāḥ nareṇa khaga śārdūlaiḥ bhojakena viśeṣataḥ mātā pitṛbhyām satatam varṣe varṣe mṛte ahani sa yāti narakam ghoram tāmisram nāma nāmnaḥ tatas bhavati duṣṭa ātmā nagare sūkaraḥ khagaiḥ uvāca na jānāti dinam yaḥ tu na māsam vibudha adhipaiḥ mṛtau yatra mahā prājña pitarau sa katham naraḥ śrāddham karotu vai tābhyām vidhivat vatsara ātmakam uvāca na jānāti naraḥ yaḥ tu mṛtānām vinatā ātmaja māsam dinam mṛtānām tu pitṝṇām khaga sattamaiḥ yathā kuryāt khaga śreṣṭhaiḥ śṛṇu kṛtsnam samāsatas mṛtā aham yaḥ na jānāti mānavaḥ vinatā ātmajaiḥ tena kāryam amāyām ca śrāddham sāṃvatsaram khagaiḥ māse mārgaśire vīraiḥ māghe vā vidhivat khagaiḥ viśeṣataḥ bhojanena yaḥ mām pūjyate sadā prītaye mama vai tena saṃpūjyāḥ pitaraḥ sadā mama iṣṭāḥ pitaraḥ nityam gāvaḥ viprāḥ ca suvrata tasmāt ca te sadā pūjyāḥ mad bhaktena viśeṣataḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme śrāddhavidhikathanam nāma tryaśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ saḥ pūrvam narakam yāti brāhmaṇāḥ tad anantaram yāvanti niyujyante ṛtha kāraṇāt tāvatyaḥ bhrūṇahatyāḥ vai veda vikrayam āpnuyāt sarve te vṛṣalāḥ jñeyāḥ prāpta vedāḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ yeṣām sarve te śūdra dharmiṇaḥ vṛthak tena anna pākena yama yonim vrajet tu saḥ priyaḥ vā yadi vā dveṣyaḥ mūrkhaḥ paṇḍitaḥ eva ca na eka grāmīṇam atithim vipra sāṃgatikam tathā aciṃtyaḥ saḥ tu vai nāmnā vaiśvadevaḥ upāgataḥ atithim tam vijānīyāt na punar pūrvam āgataḥ yāvat ca prāpnuyāt annam kṛta āśīḥ snātakaḥ dvijaḥ tasya annasya catur bhāgam hantakāram viduḥ khaga bhavet puṣkalāni ca catvāri haṃtakāraḥ vidhīyate mahā anaiṣṭhikam dharmam yaḥ tu pracyavate punar cāndrāyaṇam caret māsam iti viddhi khagādhipaiḥ ārūḍha patita apatyāḥ brāhmaṇaḥ vṛṣaleṇa ca dvau etau viddhi cāṇḍālau veditra ādyaḥ ca jāyate brāhmaṇī kulaṭā nityam svakam tyaktvā patim khagaiḥ sa cāṇḍālaḥ mahān proktaḥ mahācāṇḍālaḥ iti uta ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyām jāyate krimiḥ pañcagavyena śuddhiḥ syāt iti āha mama dehakṛt abhojyam brāhmaṇasya annam vṛṣaleṇa nimantritam tathā eva vṛṣalasya annam brāhmaṇena nimantritam brāhmaṇa annam dadat śūdraḥ śūdra annam brāhmaṇaḥ dadat ubhau etau abhojya annau bhuktvā cāndrāyaṇam caret upanikṣepa dharmeṇa śūdra annam ca pacet dvijaḥ śūdra annam śūdra samparkam śūdreṇa saha vāsanam mahāt jñāna āgamaḥ kaścid jvalantam api pātayet śūdra anna upahatāḥ viprāḥ vihvalāḥ rati lālasāḥ kupitāḥ kim kariṣyanti nirviṣāḥ iva pannagāḥ hasta dattāḥ tu ye snehāt lavaṇa vyañjana ādayaḥ dātāram na adhitiṣṭhanti bhoktā bhuṃkte tu kilbiṣam bhoktā viṣṭhā aśanam bhuṃkte dātā tu narakam vrajet aṅgulyā dantakāṣṭham yat pratyakṣa lavaṇam ca yat mṛttikā bhakṣaṇam ca eva tulyam go māṃsa bhakṣaṇaiḥ tasmāt śuṣkam atha ārdram vā bhakṣayet dantadhāvanam puṣpa alaṃkāra vastrāṇi gandha mālya anulepanam upavāse na duṣyanti danta dhāvanam añjanam ca sat nikṛṣṭam adhīyānam brāhmaṇam yaḥ vyatikramet uvāca kim tu yat te purā devaiḥ śrutam vākyam mahātmanaḥ gadataḥ nāradasya eva śṛṇu tvam vibudha adhipa satya niṣṭham dvijam yaḥ tu śukla jātim priyaṃvadam mūrkham pāṣaṇḍinam vā api vṛtti hīnam atha api vā sapta parān sapta pūrvān puruṣān ātmanā saha tasmāt na atikramet rājā brāhmaṇam prātiveśikam bhāgineyam viśeṣeṇa tathā bandhum grahādhipaiḥ uvāca mama api avagatam vīraiḥ brāhmaṇam na parīkṣayet tasmāt saṃpūjayet enam na guṇān tasya ciṃtayet kevalam cintayet jātim na guṇān vinatā ātmajaiḥ tasmāt āmantrayet pūrvam āsannam brāhmaṇam budhaḥ yaḥ tu āsannam atikramya brāhmaṇam patitāt ṛte dūra sthān pūjayet mūḍhaḥ guṇa āḍhyān narakam vrajet deva dravyam dvija annam ca brahma svam brāhmaṇa arjitam mā dadasva iti yaḥ brūyāt gavā agni brāhmaṇeṣu vai tiryagyoni śatam gatvā cāṇḍā leṣu abhijāyate yat tu vācā pratijñātam karmaṇā na upapāditam krīḍanti oṣadhayaḥ sarvāḥ yāsyāmaḥ paramām gatim madhu māṃsam surām somam lākṣā ādyam lavaṇam tathā caret guḍam tilam tathā nīlam keśān godhūmakān yavān caret auṣṭram āvika dugdham ca annam mṛtaka sūtake caurasya annam mṛtaśrāddhe bhuktvā cāndrāyaṇam caret gavām śṛṅgodake snātaḥ mahānadyāḥ ca saṃgame samudra darśanāt vā api śvanā daṣṭaḥ śuciḥ bhavet veda vidyā vrata snātaḥ śvanā daṣṭaḥ dvijaḥ khaga hiraṇya udaka miśram tu ghṛtam prāśya viśuddhi ati tiṣṭhan vā api atha vā gacchan śvanā daṣṭaḥ dvijaḥ khagaiḥ vajram prāśya śuciḥ syāt vai yathā āha bhagavān manuḥ api sa ghṛtam ca tatas bhuktvā vrata śeṣam samācaret brāhmaṇī tu śvanā daṣṭā some dṛṣṭam samācaret yadā na dṛśyate somaḥ prāyaścittam katham bhavet diśam vrajate somaḥ tām diśam ca avalokayet soma mārgeṇa sā pūrvā pañca pūtena śudhyati brāhmaṇasya brahmadvāre śoṇita sambhave gavām tatra purīṣeṇa tri kālam snānam ācaret dadhi kṣīram ghṛtam pītvā kṛmi daṣṭaḥ viśudhyati atha nābhyāḥ pradaṣṭasya āpādāt vinatā ātmaja etat vinirdiśet prājñaḥ prāyaścittam khagādhipaiḥ nābhi kaṇṭha antare vīraiḥ yadā ca utpadyate kṛmiḥ ṣaṣ rātram tu tadā proktam prāyaścittam manīṣibhiḥ yadā daśanti śirasi kṛmayaḥ vinatā ātmaja tadā caret prājñaḥ śuddhaye kaśyapa ātmajaiḥ mṛta annam madhu māṃsam ca yaḥ tu bhuñjīta brāhmaṇaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe anūrva āditya saṃvāde brāhmaṇadharmavarṇanam nāma caturaśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ mātṛśrāddha vidhi varṇanam ro uvāca rātrau śrāddham na kurvīta rākṣasā kīrtitā hi sā a kṛtvā mātṛ yajñam tu yaḥ śrāddham pariveṣayet tātasya krodha saṃyuktām hiṃsām icchanti dāruṇām uvāca mātṛ śrāddham katham kāryam kāḥ ca tāḥ mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ nāndīmukhāḥ ca pitaraḥ katham pūjām avāpnuyuḥ uvāca hanta te sampravakṣyāmi mātṛśrāddha vidhim khagaiḥ śṛṇu tvam khaga śārdūla gadataḥ mama kṛtsnaśas pūrvāhṇe bhojayet viprān aṣṭau sarvān pradakṣiṇān kṛtvā yavaiḥ tila artham tu dadhi miśram krameṇa ca gandha puṣpa ādikam sarvam kuryāt vipra pradakṣiṇam guḍa miśram khaga śreṣṭha sa vastram odanam param rasāṇām modakān ca eva na ca tān kaṭukān tathā evam bhukteṣu vipreṣu dadyāt piṇḍān samāhitaḥ kṛtvā tu maṇḍapam vīraiḥ catur asram pradakṣiṇam pūrva agrān ca kuśān dattvā puṣpāṇām prakaram tathā evam uddiśya vai mātṝḥ ṣaṭ piṇḍān nirvapet khagaiḥ aṣṭa āśayet dvijān vīraiḥ mātṛśrāddhe khagāḥ dhipaiḥ nāndīmukhān tān uddiśya pitṝn pañca dvijottamān ittham śrāddha dvayam kuyāt vṛddhau kaśyapa nandanaiḥ anyathā tatra luṃpaṃti sa deva asura mānuṣāḥ pitrye trīn udañc āsyān ca vṛddhau ca adhvaryu saṃgamān trīṇi śrāddhe pavitrāṇi dauhitraḥ kutupāḥ tilāḥ trīṇi ca atra praśaṃsanti śaucam akrodham atva raṃ dauhitram khaṇḍam iti uktam lalāṭāya prajāpate savya ādaṃsāt paribhraṣṭam nābhi deśe vyava sthitam pitṛ deva manuṣyāṇām pūjanam bhojanam tathā na uttarīyam vinā kāryam kṛtam syāt niṣphalam yatas na saḥ tat phalam āpnoti yathā yoga paṭa āvṛtaḥ vanasthānām khaga śreṣṭha yatīnām ca mahāmate siddhaye karmaṇām vīraiḥ yogapaṭṭakam ucyate hastau prakṣālya gaṇḍūṣam yaḥ pibet avicakṣaṇaḥ sa tu daivam ca pitryam ca ātmānam ca upaghā tayet bhojaneṣu eva tiṣṭhanti svasti kurvanti ye dvijāḥ māsuram tat bhavet śrāddham pitṝṇām na upatiṣṭhate dātāraḥ vedāḥ saṃtatiḥ eva ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme aruṇa āditya saṃvāde mātṛśrāddhavidhivarṇanam nāma paṃcāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca pūrvakaḥ hayana ārohaṇe ca eva kārye sukham abhīpsatā pratyavarohaḥ tu mārgaśīrṣyām na saṃśayaḥ phalam vinā tu anuṣṭhānam nityānām iṣyate sphuṭam tu doṣa prāpti artham eva ca naimittikānām karaṇam trividham karmaṇām phalam nitya kriyam tathā ca anye anuṣaṅgāt phalam śrutiḥ agnyādheyam tathā darśam paurṇamāsam dvitīyakam cāturmāsyam agnihotram paśubandhaḥ nirūḍhakāḥ sautrāmaṇī saṃsthāḥ syuḥ haviṣaḥ śrutinā vaditāḥ tathā ca dayā syāt sarva bhūteṣu anasūyā atha maṅgalam tu kṣāntiḥ dayā tu anāyāsaḥ śaucam aspṛha tā vratam samyak uktāḥ tu saṃskārāḥ brahma prāpti nimittakāḥ anantaram pravakṣyāmi viprāṇām vṛttīḥ śubhāḥ ṛta amṛte ca viprāṇa amṛtam pramṛtam eva ca mahā ājīvika vṛttayaḥ tu ityādyāḥ saṃpravartitāḥ tāsām kayā api jīvet tu anutiṣṭhet yathāvidhi nityam śuciḥ su gandhaḥ ca snāna śīlaḥ priyaṃvadaḥ pūjyaḥ ca pūjayet devān kāryāṇi svayam ācaret na īkṣeta arkam na nagnām strīm na ca maithunam na apsu mūtram purīṣam vā na aśucīḥ rātri tārakāḥ śāstra uktā yantraṇā yā tu na anuktāni vratāni ca svarga artham sādhayet taiḥ ca śaktimān manasā tathā kāmyā pravṛttau saṅge ca prāyaścittam vidhīyate manasā tu iṣṭa saṃkalpaḥ iti mānasaḥ antara anuphalam yat tat ṛṣivādāḥ prakīrtitāḥ mā ātmā śuddhaḥ tathā deśaḥ hi asuhāraḥ prajāpadaḥ aśubhāni nimittāni utpātaḥ vikṛtam tathā parvāṇi manasaḥ aśuddhiḥ anadhyāyaḥ iti smṛtaḥ anadhyāyāḥ ca dṛṣṭa arthāḥ adṛṣṭa arthāḥ tathā apare abhakṣyam sarva varṇānām śāva āśaucam khagādhipaiḥ jāti duṣṭam kriyā duṣṭam kāla duṣṭam vibhūṣitam saṃsarga āśraya duṣṭam ca sa hṛllekham svabhāvāt laśunam gṛñjanam ca eva palāṇḍum kavakāni ca tu no bhuñjīta kriyā duṣṭam duṣṭam ca patitaiḥ pṛthak tu vijñeyam hāni dam cira saṃsthitam surā laśuna saṃspṛṣṭam peyūṣa ādi samanvitam saṃsarga duṣṭam etat hi śvanā ucchiṣṭam khageśvara śūdra saktam khaṇḍa saktam jñeyam āśraya dūṣitam sa hṛllekham tu tat jñeyam purīṣam tu svabhāvāt pāyasam kṣīra pāka ādi tasmin eva dine tathā yathāśāstram khaga śreṣṭha bhakṣya abhakṣye nirūpayet prāṇa atyaye prokṣitam ca śrāddhe ca dvija kāmyayā pitṝn devān ca arpayitvā bhuṃjat māṃsam na doṣa bhāj preta aśuddhiḥ sapiṇḍānām tasmin eva mṛte sati daśa aham dvādaśa aham vā pakṣam māsam tu aśuddha tā daśa aha ādi trike bhāge varṇaśas na bhavanti hi daśa ahena tu bhojyāḥ syuḥ sūtaka āśaucayoḥ tathā ūrdhvam daśa ahāt eka aha śravaṇe sati jāyate sapiṇḍāḥ sapta puruṣāḥ śrutau etat nidarśanam ā danta janmanaḥ sadyas ācūḍāt naiṣṭhikā smṛtā tri rātram ā vrata ādeśāt sapiṇḍeṣu mṛteṣu ca teṣām api tat ekam syāt vayaḥ vasthā api apekṣyate tad samāna udakāt tri rātreṇa śudhyet vai mṛtyu janmanoḥ tri rātreṇa udakyā śudhyate tathā dvijānām tu evam eva syāt pitṛ artham mātuḥ eva vā agnihotra artham vijñeyam sadyas śaucam iti sthitiḥ asapiṇḍe tu nirhārāt tri rātram api mānavaḥ tasya eva anugatau jñeyam sadyas śaucam khagādhipaiḥ ṣaṅbhiḥ tribhiḥ ahai kena kṣatra viś śūdra yoniṣu ukta śaucam yathānyāyam śārīram tattva darśibhiḥ taijasā mārttikā vīraiḥ vāriśuddhiḥ smṛtā tathā snānam śaucam ca kartavyam dravya śaucāt anantaram prātaḥsnānam tu nityam syāt grahaṇe kāmyam eva ca naimittikam kṣura āśaucam tena pāpāt viśudhyati uktam tu śaucam vijñeyam doṣa kṣaya karam khagaiḥ iti evam ācamanam vidyāt viśiṣṭam tu dvijanmanām tadā mṛtānām tadvat syāt anyeṣām tu yathāsukham putraiḥ tu yathānyāyam samācaret kalā śilpāni sarvāṇi gṛhrīyāt parituṣṭaye śuśrūṣeta patim bhāryā paritoṣam yathā vrajet gurūṇām paritoṣaḥ ca dharmaḥ strīṇām sanātanaḥ tu mṛta apatyā api agarbhā ca vṛddha apatyā pativratā etām dharma samām niṣṭhām bhartṛ lokam avāpnuyāt strī dharma cāriṇī sādhvī mṛtā dāhyā tathā agnibhiḥ punar strīṇām niyogaḥ vihitaḥ maraṇāt brahmacārakam prāptavyaḥ ca yathā dharmaḥ dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭa phala pradaḥ tasmāt dharmam sadā kuryāt kurvatī svargam āpnuyāt iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu śuddhiprakaraṇavarṇanam nāma ṣaḍaśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca kāni puṇyāni kṛtvā iha svargam gacchanti mānavāḥ manuṣya loke saṃbhūtāḥ svar loke gāminaḥ param karma yajñaḥ tapaḥ yajñaḥ svādhyāyaḥ dhyāna nirmitaḥ eteṣām eva yajñānām uttamaḥ katamaḥ smṛtaḥ etat yajña phalānām ca kim phalam kā gatiḥ bhavet dharma adharma prabhedāḥ ca kiyantaḥ parikīrtitāḥ nārakiṇām puṃsām āgatānām punar kṣitau tāni cihnāni jāyante mukta śeṣeṇa karmaṇā mahā bhava arṇavāt ghorāt dharma adharma abhisaṃkulāt iti uktaḥ bhagavān bhānuḥ sarva praśna artham ādarāt pratyuvāca mahā tejāḥ samāsa vyāsa yogāt uvāca svarga apavarga phala dam naraka arṇava tāraṇam harmam pāpa haram puṇyam śṛṇu śūraiḥ prabhāṣataḥ śraddhā pūrvaḥ sadā dharmaḥ śraddhā madhya anta saṃsthitaḥ śraddhā niṣṭha pratiṣṭhaḥ ca dharmaḥ śraddhā prakīrtitā matra rasāḥ sūkṣmāḥ pradhāna puruṣa īśvaraḥ śraddhā mātreṇa gṛhyante na pareṇa ca cakṣuṣā dharmaḥ saṃprāpyate sūkṣmaḥ śraddhā hīnaiḥ suraiḥ api śraddhā dharmaḥ paraḥ sūkṣmaḥ śraddhā yajña āhutam tapaḥ śraddhā mokṣaḥ ca svargaḥ ca śraddhā sarvam idam jagant sarva svam jīvitam vā api dadyāt aśraddhayā ca yaḥ evam śraddhā mayāḥ sarve mama dharmāḥ prakīrtitāḥ pūjyaḥ tu śraddhayā puṃsā dhyeyaḥ pūjyaḥ ca śraddhayā ajñāt uktam sa saṃdigdham vākyam etat mama adbhutam nānā siddhi karam divyam loka citta anurañjanam su niścita artha gambhīram vākyam mama manoramam sa khasolkā iti vikhyātaḥ sa śivam maṇḍalam khagaiḥ deva traya guṇa atītaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarva vid prabhuḥ yathā anādi pravṛttaḥ yam ghoraḥ saṃsāra sāgaraḥ tathā anādiḥ saṃsāra arṇava śodhanaḥ vyādhīnām bheṣajam yadvat pra tipakṣa svabhāvāt mokṣiṇām mukti hetuḥ ca siddhaḥ sarva artha sādhakaḥ atra yat vā loke pañca akṣaraḥ smṛtaḥ yasya om namaḥ khasa ulkā iti mantraḥ ayam hṛdi saṃsthitaḥ tena adhītam śrutam tena tena sarvam anuṣṭhitam yena ūm namaḥ khasa ulkā iti mama vākyam ṣaṣ akṣaram bidhi vākyam idam sarvam na artha vādam vacaḥ mama pṛcchasva imam praṇamya āśu vainateyaiḥ mahāmate śrutvā tu vacanam bhānoḥ vainateyaḥ mahā balaḥ sapta aśva tilakam bhaktyā praṇamya uvāca bhārataiḥ uvāca brūhi mām deva śārdūlaiḥ yat pṛcchāmi mahāmate brūhi ca prabho uvāca vimukta aśeṣa doṣeṇa sarvajñena bhagena yat praṇītam amalam vākyam tat pramāṇam na saṃśayaḥ yasmāt mārtaṇḍaiḥ nāma asau kathyate ca manīṣibhiḥ yathārtham puṇyam āpnoti patati aśraddhayā tu adhas ajñāna vahni saṃtaptam nirvāpayati yaḥ śanais jñāna amṛtena vai bhaktā kaḥ tam na pratipūjayet na eva rājyena mahatā na ca eva arthasya rāśibhiḥ prāptam ajñāna śamanam para loke sukha āvaham saṃskṛtena api kim tena mṛdu lālāpa saṃginā avidyā ārāma vākyena saṃsāra kleśa hetunā yat śrutvā jāyate puṇyam rāga ādīnām ca saṃkṣayaḥ smṛtayaḥ bhāratam vedāḥ śāstrāṇi su mahanti ca sva āyuṣaḥ kṣapaṇāya eva putra dāra ādi saṃsāre narāṇām mūḍha cetasām saṃsāra vidvasām śāstram anādi mukha nirgatam idam śreṣṭham idam jñeyam sarvam tvam jñātum icchasi api varṣa sahasra āyuḥ śāstra antam na adhigacchati ca a vihāya sarva śāstrāṇi para lokam samācaret yaḥ puṇya bhāram udvoḍhum aśaktaḥ pāralaukikam paṇḍitaḥ api sa mūrkhaḥ syāt śakti yuktaḥ api aśaktikaḥ yaḥ saura jñāna māhātmyam uccārayitum akṣamaḥ tasmāt sa paṇḍitaḥ śaktaḥ sa tapasvī jita indriyaḥ yaḥ saura jñāna sadbhāvam ālocayitum udyataḥ yaḥ pradadyāt nṛpaḥ kṛtsnām kṣmām dhanam kāñcanam tathā yaḥ śṛṇoti raveḥ dharmam nyāyāt sa ca vakti ca datta godoha saṃbhūtaḥ ṣaḍakṣara vidhānāt raviḥ saṃpūjitaḥ śīghram narāṇām tulya tā bhṛśam sura asuraiḥ mathyamānāt kṣīrodāt sāgarāt purā pañca gāvaḥ samutpannāḥ sarva lokasya mātaraḥ nandā subhadrā surabhī sumanā śobhanāvatī sūrya samāḥ bhāsāḥ utpannāḥ kṛtim āgatāḥ sarva loka upakāra artham devānām tarpaṇāya ca mām āśritya sthitāḥ gāvaḥ snāna artham bhāskarasya tu tāsām aṅgāni puṇyāni ṣaṣ rasāḥ khaga sattamaiḥ khaga ādiṣu ca sarveṣu sthirāṇi iti upadhāraya gomayam rocanam mūtram kṣīram dadhi ghṛtam gavām ṣaṣ aṅgāni pavitrāṇi sarva siddhi karāṇi ca tatra āste padma hastā śrīḥ vṛkṣaḥ tena ca saḥ smṛtaḥ paṅkāni utpala padmāni punar jātāni gomayāt māhāraḥ sarva devānām bhāskarasya viśeṣataḥ yat bījam jagantaḥ kiṃcid tat jñeyam kṣīra sambhavam dadhinaḥ sarvāṇi jātāni māṃgalyāni artha siddhaye ghṛtāt amṛtam utpannam amarāṇām ati priyam tad ante ca uṣṇa toyena kaṣāyaiḥ ca nirūpayet snāpya śīta ambunā paścāt bhānum rocanayā ālabhet arghyam dadyāt tatas paścāt sa vajram guggulam khagaiḥ kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam paścāt praṇipatya kṣamāpayet anena vidhinā bhānum ṣaṣ aṅgena divaspatim tam ca āpūjya evam su manāḥ ravim svargam nayet sadhīmān tu kulānām ekaviṃśatim aṃśena bhojakāḥ vīra deva kārye niyojitāḥ prayānti svāminā sārdham śrīmat bhānum param mahaḥ punar iha āyātaḥ pṛthivyām ekarāj bhavet puṣpam pattram phalam toyam yat gatam bhāskara arcane saurāḥ gāvaḥ ca gacchanti sūrya lokam na saṃśayaḥ eka kālam pibet kṣīram dhenūnām bhāskarasya tu pratyūṣe yat bhavet kṣīram dhenūnām bhāskarasya tu snāpayet tena vai bhānum kṛtsnena garuḍāgrajaiḥ yāvantaḥ romakūpāḥ ca gavām dehe khaga adhipa pūjitam pūjyamānam vā yaḥ kaścid śṛṇuyāt ravim bhāskaram pṛjitam dṛṣṭvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate harṣāt praṇamya vai bhānum tasya loke mahīyate pūjyamānam ravim bhaktyā yaḥ paśyet mānavaḥ khagaiḥ yajña phalam kṛtsnam prāpnuyāt na atra saṃśayaḥ śrutvā anumodate yaḥ tu pūjyamānam divākaram pradānam japa jīvinām na dānam alpam bahudhā kiṃcid asti vijānatām deśa kāla vidhi śraddhā pātra yuktam tat akṣayam pātre deśe ca kāle ca vidhinā śraddhayā ca yat yat snātam jñāna salilaiḥ śīla bhasma pramārjitam japaḥ damaḥ yamaḥ puṃsām trātā saṃsāk sāgarāt ajñānām pāpa netrāṇām tat pātram paramam smṛtam jñāna plavena ca upetam śāstram pāpa mahā arṇavāt ajñān saṃtārayet nūnam kim śilā tārayet śilām dvijānām veda vidvasām kaṭi saṃbhogi yat phalam bhojine śānta cittāya paridhyāna ratāya ca hraddhayā annam sakṛt dattvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate bhojayitvā sakṛt bhaktyā sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt dhyāyamānaḥ raveḥ sūktam bhojayet satatam ca yaḥ yaḥ śrāddhe bhojayet bhojakam naraḥ saḥ sthānam samavāpnoti bhānavīyam asaṃśayaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme dhenumāhātmyavarṇanam nāma saptāśīti adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sūryāya sarva pāka annam nivedya agnau ca homayet hutvā agnau prakṣipet vīraiḥ balim dikṣu samantataḥ sūrya agni guru viprāṇām sarva pāka annam anvaham yaḥ a nivedya ātmanā bhuṃkte saḥ bhuṃkte kilbiṣam naraḥ kṛṣi pālye ca vāṇijye krodha satya kṣaya ādibhiḥ puṃsām pāpāni vardhante sūnā doṣaiḥ ca pañcabhiḥ peṣaṇī cullī uda kumbhaḥ pramārjanī sūrya agni guru pūjābhiḥ pāpaiḥ etaiḥ na lipyate sūrya agni guru naivedyam yāvat syāt anna saṃkhyayā tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi dātā sūryapure vaset ghṛta pūpa yutaiḥ siktaiḥ puṇyam daśaguṇa uttaram avadaṃśa guṇaiḥ yuktam puṇyam śataguṇam khagaiḥ bhakṣya anna pāna dānāni tad phalāni tathā tathā yat vā tat vā sadā deyam sūrya agni guru sādhuṣu prāpnuyāt sarva tīrtha abhiṣekam ca praṇāmāt vindate khagaiḥ mahīyate ca saṃdhyāyām sūrya loke mahīyate yugapad pūjitāḥ tena brahma viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ bhaveyuḥ pūjitāḥ ravau tuṣyaṃti pitaraḥ tasya su kṛṣṭena iva karṣukāḥ yaḥ śrāddhe bhojayet bhaktyā brāhmaṇam japa jīvinam yaḥ saṃpūjya ravim śrāddhe bhojayet japa jīvinam tṛpyaṃti pitaraḥ tasya gāyaṃti ca pitāmahāḥ adya naḥ sa kule prājñaḥ vācakam bhojayiṣyati purāṇa vidam āyān tam dṛṣṭvā eva saha saṃsthitāḥ krīḍanti oṣadhayaḥ sarvāḥ yāsyāmaḥ svargam akṣayam anugrahāya lokānām śraddhāyāḥ ca parīkṣaṇe tasmāt atithim āyāntam agre gacchet kṛtāñjaliḥ svāgata āsana pādya arghya snāna anna śayana ādibhiḥ rūpa anvitam virūpam vā malinam malina ambaram belāyām atithim prāptam paṇḍitaḥ na vicārayet bhojakānām śarīreṣu nityam sannihitaḥ raviḥ kṛmibhiḥ bhinna vadanāḥ tapyamānāḥ ca vahninā ca āyudhaiḥ ghoṃraiḥ yāvat
