ruṣṭaḥ pañcavidha uditaḥ duṣṭaiḥ saha sat ālāpaḥ saḥ duṣṭaḥ saptadhā smṛtaḥ ekākī miṣṭam aśnāti vañcakaḥ sādhu nindakaḥ yathā sūkaraḥ puṣṭaḥ syāt tathā puṣṭaḥ prakīrtitaḥ nigama āgama tantrāṇi na adhyāpayati yaḥ dvijaḥ na śṛṇoti ca pāpa ātmā saḥ duṣṭaḥ iti ca ucyate śrutiḥ smṛtiḥ ca viprāṇām nayane dve vinirmite ekena vikalaḥ kāṇaḥ dvābhyām andhaḥ prakīrtitaḥ dvija adhamaḥ saḥ vijñeyaḥ saḥ caṇḍaḥ śāstra niṃditaḥ piśunaḥ rāja gāmī ca śūdra sevakaḥ eva ca śūdra aṅganā āgamaḥ vipraḥ saḥ caṇḍaḥ ca dvija adhamaḥ pakva annam śūdra gehe ca yaḥ bhuṅkte sakṛt eva vā pañca rātram śūdra gehe nivāsī caṇḍaḥ ucyate aṣṭa kuṣṭha anvitaḥ kuṣṭhī trikuṣṭhī śāstra ninditaḥ ca kīṭa vat bhramaṇam yasya ku vyāpārī ku paṇḍitaḥ sa dvidhā śūkara paśuḥ ninditaḥ siddha saṃmataḥ kapolena hi saṃyuktaḥ bhrukuṭi kuṭila ānanaḥ nṛpa vat daṃḍayet yaḥ tu saḥ daṇḍaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ dhanena tena itaram devam vā brāhmaṇān api sa kharaḥ ca paśu śreṣṭhaḥ sarva vedeṣu niṃditaḥ saḥ nīcaḥ iti vijñeyaḥ hi anācāraḥ tathā aparaḥ ṣaḍguṇa alaṃkṛteḥ sādhoḥ doṣāt mṛgayate khalaḥ iva daivena ca vihīnaḥ yaḥ kusaṃbhāṣām vadet tu yaḥ cāṇḍālaiḥ saha ālāpaḥ pakṣiṇām poṣaṇe rataḥ mārjāraiḥ ca api saṃbhuṃkte yat kṛtyam makarṭa uditam tṛṇa chedī loṣṭa madī vṛthak māṃsa aśanaḥ ca yaḥ capalaḥ saḥ tu vijñeyaḥ para bhāryā rataḥ tathā nityakriyāḥ akurvāṇaḥ nityam saḥ ca malīmasaḥ anyāyena gṛham videt anyāyena gṛha andhanam mantram saḥ steyī brahma ghātakaḥ devaḥ api bhāvayet paścāt mānuṣaḥ api na saṃśayaḥ anyonya bhāvanā kāryā saḥ steyī yaḥ na bhāvayet guroḥ prasādāt jayati pitroḥ ca api prasādāt na poṣayati duṣṭa ātmā saḥ steyī ca aparaḥ smṛtaḥ sarveṣām ca savarṇānām dharmatas brāhmaṇaḥ prabhuḥ pṛthivīpālakaḥ rājā dharmacakṣūḥ udāhṛtaḥ tad vidaḥ gaṇanā abhijñāḥ anya viprāḥ pracakṣate gaṅgā hīnaḥ hataḥ deśaḥ viprahīnā yathā kriyā apradīpā yathā rātriḥ anādityam yathā nabhaḥ tathā asāṃvatsaraḥ rājā bhramati andhaḥ iva adhvani maśru yuktaḥ dvijaḥ pūjyaḥ vipraḥ tu śmaśrulaḥ pratyañc pradarśanāt puṇyam tri dinam kalmaṣa apaham darśane vrātya viprasya sūryam dṛṣṭvā viśudhyati mahā liṅga arcana rataḥ śiva vipraḥ tu ninditaḥ pravāsayet akṣatena sa putra paśu bāndhavaḥ avadhyaḥ sarva lokeṣu rājā rājyena pālayet deśa cakra vidaḥ pūjyāḥ horā cakra vidaḥ pare sūryacakra vidaḥ pūjyāḥ na avamanyet kathaṃcana saṃsthānam sūrya vipraḥ yaḥ sūrya viprasya sattamāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge pañcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca caturṇām api varṇānām na anyaḥ bandhuḥ pracakṣate mad as iti iyam naigamā smṛtiḥ trayaḥ api guravaḥ śreṣṭhāḥ tābhyām mātā paraḥ guruḥ ye sodarāḥ jyeṣṭha śreṣṭhāḥ uttarottarāt guruḥ dvādaśyām tu āmavāsyām atha vā ravi saṃkrame prāpte ca aparapakṣe tu bhojayet ca api śaktitas paścāt pravandayet pādau mantreṇa anena sattamāḥ yā kukṣi vivare kṛtvā svayam rakṣati sarvatas namāmi jananīm devīm parām prakṛti rūpiṇīm kṛcchreṇa mahatā devyā dhāritaḥ aham yathā udare tvad prasādāt jagant dṛṣṭam mātar nityam namaḥ astu te pṛthivyām yāni tīrthāni sāgara ādīni sarvaśas yatra tām naumi mātaram bhūti hetave śiva rūpaiḥ namaḥ tasmai saṃsāra arṇava setave veda vedāṅga śāstrāṇām tattvam yatra pratiṣṭhitam hāraḥ sarva bhūtānām agrajanman namaḥ astu te brāhmaṇaḥ jagantām tīrtham pāvanam paramam yatas bhūdevaiḥ hara mama pāpam viṣṇu rūpin namaḥ astu te pitāmaham ca praṇamet sarva ādau mātaram gurum mātāmaham ca tadanu ācāryam atha ṛtvijam mātṛ mantraiḥ ca prathamam praṇamet bhakti bhāvāt yathā agrajaḥ tathā jyeṣṭhaḥ pitṛvyaḥ api dvijottamāḥ dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭe ca sa guruḥ guruḥ mātā tathā guruḥ dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭaḥ tṛtīyaḥ syāt sūryaḥ agniḥ candraḥ eva ca mantra dātā guruḥ khyātaḥ saptamaḥ parikīrtitaḥ tad bhojana guruḥ śreṣṭhaḥ svarga apavarga hetukaḥ dṛṣṭadevam ca yaḥ hitvā adṛṣṭam ca niṣevate yathā pitā jyeṣṭha pitā kanīyāḥ ca tathā dvijāḥ jyeṣṭhaḥ bhrātā pitṛ tulyaḥ mānyaḥ satkāra bhāgyāt mūrtiḥ pitā mūrtiḥ prajāpateḥ mātā syāt pṛthivī mūrtiḥ bhrātaraḥ mūrtiḥ ātmanaḥ pitā syāt dharma mūrtiḥ sanātanaḥ saḥ ca api dṛṣṭa devaḥ syāt tad ājñām paripālayet sa yāti brahmaṇaḥ sthānam yasmāt na āvartate punar tasya pāda udaka snānāt gaṅgā na arhati kevalam dvātrim śat kuṇḍaka śilā sparśane yādṛśam phalam tādṛśam koṭi guṇitam pitāmaha pradakṣiṇe śata mātṛ variṣṭhāḥ ca pitāmahyāḥ ca poṣaṇe na punar viśet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge guruguṇavarṇanam nāma ṣaṣṭha udhyāyaḥ uvāca samākhyāmi iha vipra indrāḥ itihāsam purātanam mad as ca dharma ātman śrūyatām yat mayā purā pṛṣṭaḥ uvocat mahā tejāḥ viriñcaḥ bhagavān prabhuḥ hanta te kathayāmi eṣa purāṇa śravaṇe vidhim itihāsa purāṇāni śrutvā bhaktyā dvijottamāḥ sāyam prātar tathā rātrau śuciḥ bhūtvā śṛṇoti yaḥ tasya viṣṇuḥ tathā brahmā tuṣyate śaṃkaraḥ tathā pratyūṣe bhagavant brahmā dina ante tuṣyate hariḥ mahādevaḥ tathā rātrau śṛṇvatām paṭhatām nṛṇām na ati ucchritam na ati nīcam sva āsanam bhajate tatas dikpatibhyaḥ namaskṛtya ūṃmkāra adhiṣṭhitān api pustakam dharmaśāstrasya dharma adhiṣṭhāna śāśvatam mad āgamānām śivaḥ devaḥ tantra ādīnām ca śāradā jāmalānām gaṇapatiḥ ḍāmarāṇām śatakratuḥ nārāyaṇaḥ bhāratasya tathā rāmāyaṇasya ca vāsudevaḥ bhavet devaḥ saptānām śṛṇu sattamaiḥ mādhavaḥ rāma keśavau vanamālī mahādevaḥ saptānām sapta parvasu viṣṇu dharma ādikānām ca śivaḥ jñeyaḥ sanātanaḥ atha ca ādipurāṇasya viriñciḥ parikīrtitaḥ madhu bali annam ca vā dadyāt kramāt bali gaṇam viduḥ śāli bhaktam sa godhūmam tila akṣata vimiśritam paṭhet ca api vidhānena saḥ yāgaḥ ṣaṣ mayaḥ paraḥ madhu kṣīram sita ikṣvoḥ ca rasaḥ guḍaḥ sagarbhaḥ ca paraḥ jñeyaḥ ṣaṇmayaḥ ca aparaḥ baliḥ madhu taṇḍula prastham tu tad ardham vā tad ardhakam prīreṇa api ca saṃbhaktam yavakṣīram idam smṛtam kṣīram bhāga aṣṭakam grāhyam sapta bhāgena saṃsthitam haimantikam sitā ākhyam ca tāṇḍulam prapacet carum tatas bhāga ardhena dadet paścāt mākṣikam vā sitām api dadyāt jāyate kvacid saṃpṛktam mākṣikeṇa api dadyāt ikṣu rasam budhaḥ gṛhītvā yācakaḥ śuddhaḥ śṛṇuta dvijasattamāḥ śṛṇute vā adhīyānaḥ yaḥ dadyāt haste ca pustakam samutthāya ca gṛhṇīyāt praṇamya vinivedayet pūrvasthaḥ śrāvakaḥ vipraḥ vikhyātaḥ tasya dakṣiṇe paścima āśā mukhena eva tarjanyā aṅguṣṭhayā saha prastareṇa api hastena vinyāsaḥ paṇḍitaiḥ sadā itas nyathā na kartavyaḥ kṛtvā nyāsam atha āpnuyāt asakṛt vinyaset viprāḥ pāvamānīm jale japet yama diś sammukhe śrotā vācakaḥ ca uttarā mukhaḥ purāṇa bhārata ākhyāne eṣa vai kathitaḥ vidhiḥ rāmāyaṇe dharma śāstre harivaṃśe ca sattamāḥ itas anyathā yātudhānāḥ praluṃpaṃti phalam yatas tasmāt vidhi vidhānena śṛṇuyāt atha vā paṭhet śrutvā prati puṇya vidyām yaḥ aśnīyāt māṃsam eva tu yadi devālaye tīrthe vācayet śṛṇuyāt atha māhātmya śravaṇāt eva go dānasya phalam labhet pituḥ māhātmyam yat putraiḥ vācyam saṃsadi parvaṇi varṇanam durga agre śiva sūryasya vaiṣṇava ākhyānam eva ca yaḥ karoti vimūḍha ātmā gārdabhīm yonim āviśet tathā pitroḥ hareḥ kuryāt pradakṣiṇam na viṣṇuḥ na ca brahmā ca na ca rudraḥ śacīpatiḥ jīvan na tarpayet mukhyam gaṅgāyām maraṇe api ca purāṇa śravaṇam puṇyam śūnyam bhāgavatam yadi vyartham bhāgavatam viprāḥ nārasiṃha vihīnakam mārata ākhyam na dhārayet vinā āśvamedhikam viprāḥ vinā yajñānanam vinā bhāratam ca divā āroha dhāraṇa ādau varam vrajet vāyupurāṇam a śrutvā śāstram ca yaugikam vinā tathā vāyupurāṇam yad vihīnam śravyam anyakam yathā sundarakāṇḍena āraṇyam ca na dhārayeta laṅkām vinā ca ādikāṇḍam tat likhitvā na dhārayet pārāśaram vinā vyāsam yājñavaktyam vinā makham dakṣam vinā na śaṅkham ca śaṅkha hīnam bṛhaspatim mahnīyam śravaṇa ādyena na ca yuktim athāpayet saṃsthāpanāt eva vinā na ca kim api rākṣasaiḥ na haret pustakam ca api na haret akṣarāṇi ṣaḍ iha mukha vṛttasya haraṇāt yāvat ācandratārakam sva akṣarasya haraṇe sva mātṛ haraṇe api yat yat bhāratam yat purāṇam stotra rūpāṇi tāni ca tāni veda āgama ādīni pustakeṣu api vācayet yatra likhitvā tat na vācayet pustakam nigamānām ca mantra vyākhyāna saṃgraham sphuṭam kṛtvā puras sthāpya yāvatkālam pravartate na vācayet ca vyākhyātā pravācayet pauṣkare ca pādam āśvamedham pade pade yasmāt tau ubhau patitau jñeyau pāvamānī śatam japet mantre ca praṇavam diśet bhagavant brahmā ūrdhva dīrghāni yāni ca janārdanaḥ ca akṣarāṇi mātrā prakṛtiḥ avyayā lipī bhaṅgī maheśaḥ asyāḥ tasyāḥ mātrā sarasvatī eka rekhā ca eka ātmā pādāt ca pāda vicyutiḥ catuṣpāda antare yugmam yugam yugam bhārate ca itihāse ca purāṇe dvijasattamāḥ vaktṛ nāma akṣaraiḥ yuktam paṅkti bhedena sattamāḥ mad saṃśuddhi saṃśuddhyā dhārayet dharma saṃhitām ripuḥ sūryaḥ tayārāmaḥ yakṣaḥ anantaḥ sarasvatī brāhmī ca yakṣiṇī ca eva gāyatrī navamā smṛtā bhavet anante vipulā kīrtiḥ sarasvatyām dhana āgamaḥ brāhmayā brahmatvam āpnoti yakṣiṇyā yakṣamandiram brahma indra vaiṣṇavam śaivam śāktikam ca maheśvarī brahma rūpam ca itihāsam aindram rāmāyaṇa ātmakam baiṣṇavam paramam daivam yat śaivam tat lalāṭakam tathā mūle madhye bhāge śatakratuḥ agre sthitāḥ grahāḥ sarve diśām īśāḥ tathā dvijāḥ meruḥ sumeruḥ uddiṣṭaḥ saṃgavant kāmaḥ ucyate dvau āpṛthivyau pātālam tasya antar samudāhṛtam na śasyaḥ pūjanīyaḥ ca gṛhe sthāpyeta mānavaḥ yaḥ yasmai śūdraḥ viprāya vṛttim dadyāt ca mānavaḥ sa yāti brahmasadanam maṇivartma ādi kuṭṭimam na śasyaḥ pūjanīyaḥ ca gṛhe sthāpyeta mānavaḥ madhyam tasya haret āyuḥ pārśvavedhaḥ śivam haret aśaktaḥ bilva kāṣṭhasya tathā śrīparṇikasya ca na kāṣṭhasya navam śasyam na lauham yojayet kvacid prāk ārambha śloka śatam dharmaśāstrasya vai likhet saṃhitāyām purāṇāyām yugma kalpam tad ardhakam tathā api ca akhila vyāsaiḥ lekhanāt saṃtati kṣayaḥ anāmātve hema yutām balākam cittam eva ca lekhane pārijātasya matsya māṃsa āśinam likhet yālmīki saṃhitāyāḥ ca lekhane ca tathā kvacid abrāhmaṇena likhitam niṣphalam parikīrtitam durvicāraḥ duṣṭa bhāryaḥ durmatiḥ ca api lekhakaḥ na likhet dharma śāstram ca purāṇam stotra saṃhitam api kṛṣṇe vāyu pradam vidyāt pīte vāyu kṣayaḥ bhavet rakte puṣṭim avāpnoti kṛṣṇe ca saṃpad āgamaḥ itihāsa purāṇānām vilikhet yat mukhāt śṛṇu vāyavya ādi mukhena eva kāṣṭha vedam ca saṃlikhet pūrvā mukhe ca artha hāniḥ uttare ca mukhe śriyaḥ maraṇam dakṣiṇa āsye tu paścima āsye dhana kṣayaḥ aśauce mṛtake sūtau amāyām ravi saṃkrame daridraḥ syāt janma ahe ca āyuṣaḥ kṣayaḥ lipi chandaḥ pada jñaḥ ca yuvā dhīmān jita āsanaḥ nāndī nāgarakaiḥ varṇaiḥ śuddha nāgarakaiḥ api kāmarūpa akṣaraiḥ vā api yāvat ca saṃhitā gaṇaḥ yāvat akṣara saṃsthānam tāvat svarge mahīyate likhitvā yaḥ tu pāpa ātmā yāvat akṣara saṃkhyayā tāvatkālam tu narake pacyate na atra saṃśayaḥ tu gṛhṇīyāt vā api vetanam na jīvati saḥ duṣṭa ātmā dhana vastra phala anvitaḥ patitaiḥ antyajaiḥ mlecchaiḥ rogī kuṣṭhī kṣayī tathā rogī śilīpadaiḥ ca eva mūkaḥ api dharma saṃhataḥ etaiḥ vilikhitam yat ca dhārayet na gṛhāśramī hīna aṅgā pratimā ca eva pustakam māna hīnakam sa vai nārāyaṇaḥ khyātaḥ dhāraṇāt ca kutas api alam mahā bhāga pradaḥ tu aṣṭa aṅgulam bhavet yat ca tat kaniṣṭham iha ucyate etyāḥ pattra kṛte mānam bhūrje mānam na vidyate dvādaśa aṅgulakam yat ca bhūrja taiḍa ādi nirmitam aṅgulānām pramāṇam yat tena api jñāna pustakam harivaṃśe svarṇa māne kṛte mūlya sahasrake yuge yuge pāda hīnam dharmam kuryāt yathāruci praṇamya śirasā sarvān vyāsa ādīn saṃhitā śrutān jaiminim ca tatas vyāsam śaṃkaram ca tathā harim namaskāram atha eṣām tu ādi madhya avasānake asaṃyukta akṣara padam spaṣṭa bhāga samanvitam sāma gāthāḥ samāśritya rāga yukta antaram paṭhet maṇivāraḥ dhanam yat syāt gaura andhām saṃtikaḥ tathā hillolarāgaḥ vājāvikaḥ tathā evam prakramamāṇena śṛṇuyāt dharma saṃhitāḥ brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyaḥ vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ ca api viśeṣataḥ aśvamedham avāpnoti sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt śūdrāṇām puratas vaiśyaḥ vaiśyānām kṣatriyaḥ paraḥ tathā viprāḥ śṛṇuyuḥ ca agratas sadā na śūdraḥ kathayet dharmān tapāḥ adhyāpane tathā śūdreṇa adhigatam na asti viśeṣāt śabda lakṣaṇam śva śṛgāla kharī kṣīram apeyam hi yathā bhavet evam śūdra mukhāt dharmāḥ na grāhyāḥ śabda saṃskṛtāḥ amedhyam śudhyate toyaiḥ śūdraḥ śrotā hi śudhyati evam śūdraḥ api aśuciḥ syāt yadi vyākaraṇa artha vid yaḥ śūdraḥ uddiśet dharmam tathā ca āgama vaidikam budhyamānaḥ sadā hi artham grantha artham kṛtsnam eva ca te dhanyāḥ te kṛtātmānaḥ te kṛtārthāḥ na saṃśayaḥ yathā arka hīnam divasaḥ candra hīnā yathā niśā na rarāja sabhā tadvat vyāsena rahitāḥ dvijāḥ yad gṛhe na eva śiśavaḥ na rarāja gṛham kvacid tathā eva sodara gehe dṛṣṭvā puṣkara darśanam aṅka māhātmya varṇanam uvāca śṛṇudhvam vipra saṃghātāḥ purāṇam deva saṃmatam tṛtīyam śaivam ākhyātam tatas bhāgavatam param pañcamam ca tathā mātsyam bhaviṣyam ṣaṣṭham ucyate a sāmarthye ca mātsya uktam vaiṣṇavam ca bhaviṣyakam bhārate ca api parvam ca śāṃtibhaiṣmīyakam tathā parāśara matam gṛhyam gobhila uktāni yāni ca antareṇa āgate martye śāstram na adhyāpayet kvacid maṇḍūke pañca rātram tu sarpe rātri catuṣṭayam māsam ekam khare kāke sthāna tyāgāt na kutracid haṃse dinam anadhyāyam kṣudra jantau na dūṣaṇam adhyāpayet guroḥ putram jñāninam dhārmikam śucim bhaktam śāntam vaiṣṇavam ca jita krodham jita indriyam adhyātmā adhyāpayet ebhyaḥ śaṭham pāpa haram dviṣam nirarthakam mantharam ca viśuśrūṣum ayājakam tam ca eva anṛjum kruddham kṛpaṇam vyasana arthinam nindakam ca avidhi jñam ca dūratas parivarjayet atas vidyā vadati evam pāṭhayantam dvijottamam mā dadyāt bhakti hīnāya durjanāya durātmane apramādāya viprāya śucaye brahmacāriṇe anyāyena graham vidyām anyam pāṭhayate sukhāt ādhyātmikam vaidikam ca alaukikam vā atha yaḥ vadet mānam ādau praṇamya atha tatas adhīyīta suvrataḥ cūta bhoga samabhyāsāt daridraḥ ca abhijāyate bhāga samabhyāsāt dhana nāśāya jāyate yāni anuktāni śāstrāṇi mānanīyāni yāni ca lokānām jñāna vṛddhi artham yaḥ kuryāt dharma saṃgraham jñāna dātā ca lokānām teṣu dharmaḥ pravartate nigamānām jyotiṣāṇām vedānām nāṭakasya ca vyākhyāna saṃgraham kṛtvā kalau nāśam avāpnuyāt vedānām dharbha śāstrāṇām purāṇānām tathā eva ca mīmāṃsā jyotiṣām ca eva nāṭakānām virañcinī bhāga avasāne kathitaḥ purāṇa adhyāyaḥ eva ca puṣpakaḥ ca paricchedaḥ khaṇḍaḥ ca pratikhaṇḍakaḥ vyavahāraḥ ca arthaśāstram aśva śāstrasya ca eva hi mohāt kṛtvā homadhenum dattvā śuddhiḥ bhaviṣyati kṛtvā ca vrajet prātaḥkāle na kurvīt tathā madhyaṃdine dvijāḥ pakṣa aṃte bhūbhidāhe ca bhuvaḥ kampe dinakṣaye pūtam syāt tad kṣaṇāt viprāḥ catuḥ pañca akṣareṇa vā nārasiṃhasya vinyāse pūtaḥ bhavati tad kṣaṇāt muhūrta ardhena pūta tvam prabhoḥ yānti parām gatim striyaḥ vā ninditaḥ vā api mlecchaḥ yāti parām gatim yaḥ mūḍhaḥ manyate doṣam tasya śaucam samācaret sa gardabhīm kharīm yonim praviśet na atra saṃśayaḥ mahā ātmakaḥ bhairavaḥ ca daśamaḥ ca janārdanaḥ rudraḥ ekādaśaḥ ca eva arkārkaḥ ca api dvādaśaḥ trayoviṃśe ca bhūtātmā ṣaḍviṃśe manuḥ īritaḥ tithi ātmakam pañcadaśe ṣoḍaśa ākhyā kalā aparā aṣṭādaśa akṣaraḥ mantraḥ purāṇa ātmakaḥ eva ca ūnaviṃśaḥ candramāḥ syāt viṃśaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ vapuḥ jyotiḥ mayaḥ ca ekaviṃśaḥ dvāviṃśe keśava arcanam trayoviṃśe caturviṃśe ca tānakam pañcaviṃśe ca tīrthāni ṣaḍviṃśe ca tryambakaḥ triṃśe dhaneśaḥ ca ūnatriṃśe sarasvatī triṃśat yoge śivaḥ proktaḥ pātālam ekatriṃśake ahorātraḥ ca dvātriṃśe catustriṃśe ca jāhnavī paṃcatriṃśe tad antaḥ syāt śate pūrṇe divākaraḥ lakṣe brahmā tathā koṭau devaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ paraḥ puṃs prakṛti ātmakam ca anyat śāradā lipi mātṛkā śuddha brahma mayam nityam jñāna rūpam param mahat brahma mayam yāti iti āha bhagavān manuḥ nāma aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ pūrta nirṇaya varṇanam uvāca antarvedim pravakṣyāmi brahmanā uktam yuga aṃtare devatā sthāpanam pūjā bahivendiḥ udāhṛtā prapā pūrta ādikam ca eva brāhmaṇānām ca toṣaṇam dharmasya kāraṇam rājā dharmam etat bhavet nṛpaḥ tasmāt nṛpam samāśritya bahirvedī tatas bhavet saptāśītiḥ bahirvedī sāram eṣām tṛtīyakam devatā sthāpanam ca eva prāsāda karaṇam tathā taḍāga karaṇam ca eva tṛtīyam na caturthakam pañcamam pitṛ pūjā ca guru pūjā puraḥsarā adhivāsaḥ pratiṣṭhā ca devatānām avikriyā pratimā karaṇam ca eva vṛkṣāṇām atha ropaṇam trividhā sā vinirdiṣṭā uttamā ca atha madhyamā yaniṣṭhā śeṣa kalpaḥ ca sarva kāryeṣu ayam vidhiḥ pūjā homa ādibhiḥ dānaiḥ mānāt ca tri bhāgāt tri aha sādhya vidhānena aṣṭāviṃśati devatāḥ pratyaham pūjayet tatra jāpakāḥ tatra ṣoḍaśa catvāraḥ yājakāḥ tatra trayoviṃśati devatāḥ tathā braha dikpālaiḥ vāruṇyam pṛthivī ca śivaḥ tathā gaṇeśa graha dikpālān varuṇam ca śivam tathā saṃpūjya pūjyate yatra kaniṣṭhaḥ asau vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ eka vṛkṣaḥ ca eka rūpaiḥ pratimā kṣudra devatāḥ nalinī dīrghikā garta vāpī mala prapādikam eṣām saṃskāra kāryeṣu pratimānām pariṣkriyā pūjayet vāpī ādeḥ puṣkariṇyāḥ ca kṣipet gaṅgā jalam tatas ulūkhala dvayena api jīrṇānām tu kadācana setu prāsāda vāpīnām pratiṣṭhām na eva kārayet prāsādaḥ setavaḥ ca eva taḍāga ādyāḥ tathā eva ca tribhiḥ varṇaiḥ pratiṣṭhā arhāḥ jīrṇānām tu samudgatāḥ munayaḥ mānam icchanti amānam na hi dṛśyate tasmāt mānam pravakṣyāmi yat mānam yādṛśam phalam ṣaṣṭi hasta pramāṇena tat uktam vāraṇa uditam ekaṣaṣṭi hasta mitam prāsādam ca uttamam viduḥ madhyam tad ardham vijñeyam kaniṣṭham tat param smṛtam yaḥ taḍāgam navam kṛtvā jīrṇam vā nava tām nayet ca guṇānām ca pramāṇena pratimānam vibhāgāt dviśatena śatena api prāsādasya eṣa niścayaḥ sahasra hasta vistāram dairghyena aṣṭa adhikam bhavet taḍāgam tam vijānīyāt prathamam mānam īritam madhyam catur śatena api prastāve daśa hīnakam yaniṣṭham tri śatam ca eva prasthe syāt viṃśa hīnakam taḍāga mānam vijñeyam trivarga phala dāyakam atha puṣkariṇī pakṣe dve śate mānam uttamam taḍāge dviguṇā nemī māna ardhe gartam īritam tat kṣetram vāruṇam sthānam tri uditam tat bahis smṛtam caturtham ca eva gāndharvam paiśācam pañcamam viduḥ yakṣa sthāna mitāḥ bhāge evam sarva kramāṇi hi pañca hīnam ca prastāve evam māna vidaḥ viduḥ ṣaṣṭi hastena nalinī prastāve turya hīnakam catuḥṣaṣṭi hasta mitā dīrghikā ca prakīrtitā agnau rogaḥ bandhu nāśaḥ ca yāmyām mṛtyuḥ ca ugraḥ prāpyate rākṣase ca bhītiḥ ca ugrā prāpyate vāyavīye tasmāt etāḥ varjanīyāḥ prayatnāt nadyāḥ tīre varjayet vā smaśāne taḍāgāt vai āśrama ādīn janānām yadā pratiṣṭhām na karoti mūḍhaḥ prāsāda vāpī ādiṣu pāpa cetāḥ yadā tu dīrghā sarasī taḍāga prāsāda kūpa ādiṣu nirmitāni yat apratiṣṭheṣu nipānakeṣu prāsāda kūpeṣu vana ādikeṣu tasmāt pratiṣṭhām vidhinā jala ādeḥ kuryāt yatheṣṭam prayataḥ manuṣyaḥ prasāde mṛd mayam puṇyam mayā etat kathitam dvijāḥ tasmāt caturguṇam proktam tṛṇa kāṣṭha maye tathā tasmāt daśaguṇam proktam kṛte dāru maye bhavet tatas daśaguṇam proktam iṣṭikā racite śubhe tatas ca śata sāhasram sauvarṇe dvijasattamāḥ yat atītam bhaviṣyat ca kulānām ayutam naraḥ viṣṇu lokam nayati āśu kārayitvā hareḥ gṛham kaniṣṭham madhyamam śreṣṭham kārayitvā hareḥ gṛham ardham ca vaiṣṇavam lokam mokṣam ca labhate kramāt hastānām poḍaśaiḥ yāvat prasthe syāt karahīnakam tṛṇavaṃśa maye mānam madhyam ca arka karam bhavet kaniṣṭham tāra hastam syāt uttamam pañcaviṃśatiḥ sarva uttamam ca dvātriṃśat catuṣkoṇe mahā phalam aṣṭa koṇam na kartavyam tripuram ca kalau yuge sura veśmani yāvantaḥ dvijendrāḥ paramāṇavaḥ kartuḥ daśaguṇam proktam āpāna paripālakaḥ patitam patamānam ca tathā ardha sphuṭitam tathā yaḥ kuryāt viṣṇu prāsādam jyotirliṅgasya vā kvacid sūryasya api viriñceḥ ca durgāyāḥ śrīdharasya ca svargāt bhraṣṭaḥ bhavet rājā dhanī pūjyatamaḥ api vā devī liṅgeṣu yonau vā kṛtvā devakulam naraḥ prāvṛṣ kāle sthitam toyam agniṣṭoma phalam labhet śarad kāla sthitam toyam yajña toyāt viśiṣyate nidāgha kāle pānīyam yasya tiṣṭhati vāpinaḥ eka aham tu sthitam toyam pṛthivyām dvijasattamāḥ pūrvam pitṛ kule sapta tadvat mātṛ kule dvijāḥ caturdaśam idam jñeyam śatalekham tatas śṛṇu pituḥ ūrdhvam kulam viṃśam mātuḥ ūrdhvam kulam tathā tadvat param vijānīyāt bhāryāyāḥ pañca eva ca pañca vai mātṛtas ca asya pituḥ mātāmahe kule pañca pañca vijānīyāt mātuḥ mātāmahasya ca guroḥ pitṛ kule pañca tasya mātṛ kule tathā mad ācāryasya kule dvaṃdvam daśa rāja kulasya ca rājñaḥ mātāmaha kule pañca ca eva prakīrtitāḥ bhavat saha vipra indrāḥ uddhāraḥ saṃmataḥ smṛtaḥ kuryāt deva arcanam tīrthe sva vimukte daśārṇave samuddharet kula śatam śṛṇu viṃśa kulam dvijaiḥ mātuḥ mātāmahasya eva jātim dvaṃdvam udāhṛtam parapakṣasya ca ekam syāt ekaviṃśam kulam kramāt pānīyena vinā vṛttiḥ loke na asti iti karhicit patati candra raśmi vihīnam yat na amṛta tvāya kalpate tasmāt daśaguṇam kuṇḍe tasmāt daśaguṇam hrade devānām sthāpanam kuryāt avimukta phalam śubham susthitam duḥsthitam vā api śiva liṅgam na cālayet punar saṃsāra dharmeṇa sthāpayet avicārayān bāhu danta ādi pratimāḥ viṣṇoḥ ca anyasya sattamāḥ na cālayet sthāpite ca vipra vṛkṣam na cālayet keśavam harivṛkṣam ca madhūkam kiṃśukam tathā na akāle sthāpayet jātu cālanāt brahma hā bhaveta devālayasya puratas kuryāt puṣkariṇī dvijāḥ brāhmaṇānām samāje ca rājadvāre catuṣpathe brāhmaṇa arthe ca mukham kuryāt ca sarvatas paścime puṣṭi kāmam tu uttare sarva kāma dam tu arka hasta pramāṇāt taḍāge tu phalā hastam hastikam hrāsayet kramāt tṛpye hastam nalinī ādau atas hīnam na kārayet hīne hīnataram kuryāt hasta mānena hrāsayet yūpaḥ tathā khādiraḥ eva kāryaḥ śraiparṇikaḥ dhātrī samudbhavaḥ ca mānaḥ tathā ṣoḍaśa hasta sammitaḥ ratnāt sa gaṇḍī yuga kāma yojitaiḥ hīnaḥ kāryaḥ śubha daḥ sarvadā syāt evaṃvidhaḥ ca eva taḍāga yūpaḥ madhye tathā ṣoḍaśa hasta saṃmitaḥ saṃpūrṇa māne kathitam pramāṇam hīne tu hīnam pravadanti tad jñāḥ hasta dvayam prāpitavyam taḍāge hastaḥ sa ardhaḥ puṣkariṇyām praropaḥ prādeśam vai hasta mānam kūpa yūpasya ropataḥ taḍāge ca api ārāme sthāpayet ca jala upari prakuryāt tāvat sureśaḥ sura loka vāsī prāsāda kṛt jātu na jāyate hi kim vā vācyaḥ puṣkariṇyā prabhāvaḥ kartā yaḥ syāt vāruṇaḥ brahma lokāt yāvat kālaḥ bāhu mātra uddhatā syāt dṛṣṭiḥ proktā na nivartet kadācid lakṣa ekam ārāma maya uttamaḥ syāt madhyam tad ardham ca kaniṣṭha mānam vinā arjunaiḥ badaraiḥ śailukaiḥ ca hīnam kuryāt śānalaiḥ pātilaiḥ ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge pūrtanirṇayaḥ nāma navamaḥ a dhyāyaḥ pūrta nirṇaya varṇanam uvāca śodhayet prathamam bhūmim mitām kṛtvā tatas dvijāḥ daśa hastena daṇḍena pañca hastena vā punar devāgārasya yā bhūmiḥ śvetaiḥ ca vṛṣabhaiḥ api yā bhūmiḥ graha yāga arthe tat na vāhaiḥ api spṛśet mārāma arthe kṛṣṇa vṛṣaiḥ kṛṣā artha khananaiḥ api vāhayet tri dinam viprāḥ pañca vrīhīn ca vāpayet deva pakṣe saptaguṇaḥ ārāma karaṇe guṇaḥ mudga māṣau dhānya tilāḥ śyāmākaḥ ca iti pañcamaḥ masūrīḥ ca kalāyaḥ ca sapta vrīhi gaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ sarṣapaḥ ca kalāyaḥ ca mudgaḥ māṣaḥ caturthakaḥ vrīhi trayam māṣa mudgau śyāmākaḥ mahiṣaḥ gaṇaḥ suvarṇamṛttikā grāhyā varṇānām anupūrvaśas bilva vṛkṣaiḥ iyam kuryāt yūpa śūna dhvaje dine aratni mātram vijñeyam praśastam yaṣṭi hastakam harṇā sūtra mayām mūrtim kṛtvā kuryāt catuṣṭayam bhūri dāru garta yutam dvādaśa aṅgulam eva ca pūrva diś praṇave siddhiḥ paścima āśā gatiḥ śubhā maraṇe dakṣiṇāyām ca hāniḥ syāt uttare sthite nārasiṃhena manunā ca agnim prajvālya dāpayet māse ghaṭe tathā māsam kuryāt bhūmi parigraham sūtrayet kīlayet paścāt mahāmāne dvijottamāḥ īśāna abhimukhena eva kūpa pakṣe viduḥ budhāḥ a kṛtvā vāstuyāgam ca yaḥ taḍāgam samutsṛjet prāsāde ca tathā ārāme mahā kūpe tathā eva ca ca śālaiḥ ca khādiraiḥ ca eva palāśaiḥ kesarasya ca sarpa ākāraḥ taḍāge ca kūpe kumbha ākṛtiḥ bhavet maṇḍale kuryāt śuna ākṛtim setau viṣṇu gehe gadā ākṛtim aśva ākāram ca aśvamedhe naramedhe nara ākṛtim śmaśāna go pracāra artham caitya vṛkṣa ālaya uttamāḥ cakra ākāraḥ lakṣa home koṭi home hala ākṛtiḥ nakṣatrāṇi tathā mūlam śasyate druma ropaṇe evam śasya uditām bhūmim śuddhām pūrva plava anvitām somam ca nāga rājānam tatas bījam su śodhayet bhārayet dhārayet paścāt raudra tāpena tāpayet dehi mā iti ca mantreṇa saṃprokṣya daśa vāriṇā iti agṛhīta manunā pañcadhā parimantritam tryambakeṇa iti mantreṇa bījam āropayet tatas bhāryām ṛtumatīm snātvā pañcame ahani sattamāḥ tena putra tvam āpnoti na atra kāryā vicāraṇā tulasyāḥ bījam ādāya vaiṣṇava ṛkṣe dvijaḥ ahani kurvanti sahakāra ādi ropaṇam ye nara adhamāḥ nadī tīre śmaśāne ca sva gṛhasya ca dakṣiṇe tulasī ropaṇam kṛtvā yāti kartā yama ālayam pattra puṣpa phalānām ca rajaḥ reṇu samāgamāḥ yaḥ tu vṛkṣam prakurute chāyā puṣpa phala upagam pathi devālaye ca api pāpāt tārayate pitṝn atīta anāgatāḥ ca atas sa svargāt dvijāḥ tārayet vṛkṣa ropī ca tasmāt vṛkṣam praropayeta yatnena api ca vipra indrāḥ aśvattha āropaṇam kuru śataiḥ putra sahasrāṇām ekaḥ eva viśiṣyate mukti hetuḥ sahasrāṇām lakṣa koṭīni yāni ca dhanī ca aśvattha vṛkṣe ca aśokaḥ śoka nāśanaḥ plakṣaḥ bhāryā pradaḥ ca eva bilvaḥ āyuṣya daḥ smṛtaḥ dhanapradaḥ jambu vṛkṣaḥ brahmadaḥ plakṣavṛkṣakaḥ tindukāt kulavṛddhiḥ syāt dāḍimā kāminīpradaḥ svargapradā dhātakī syāt vaṭaḥ mokṣapradāyakaḥ sahakāraḥ kāmapradaḥ guvākaḥ siddhim ādiśet bhañj kadambe vipulā kīrtiḥ tintiḍī dharma dūṣikaḥ jīvantyāḥ roga śāntiḥ syāt kesaraḥ śatrumardanaḥ dhanapradaḥ ca eva vaṭaḥ vaṭaḥ śvetavaṭaḥ tathā manda buddhiḥ syāt kali vṛkṣaḥ śriyam haret tathā tathā ca markaṭī nīpa ropaṇāt saṃtati kṣayaḥ śiṃśapām ca arjunam ca eva jayantī haya mārakān śrīvṛkṣam kiṃśukam ca eva ropaṇāt svargam ādiśet na pūrvām ropayet jātu samidham kaṇṭakī drumam bhūmi padmam jalajānām ropaṇāt durgatim vrajet mandāre kula hāniḥ syāt śālmale śuka buddhimān nimbe paśu vināśaḥ syāt chattrāke kula pāṃsalaḥ śatru vṛddhiḥ kākanāde bala pūge hata śriyaḥ sahakāra sahasrāt tu variṣṭham dhātakī dvayam tasmāt ca eva sahasrāt hi pāṭalā ekā viśiṣyate pāṭalānām śatāt paścāt eka raktavaṭaḥ bhavet tasmāt variṣṭhaḥ śrī vṛkṣaḥ jambu vṛkṣaḥ praśasyate tasmāt himavantaḥ jñeyaḥ śrīparṇī vṛkṣaḥ uttamaḥ tindukasya trayaḥ ca eva jambu vṛkṣasya pañcakam evam uktvā saḥ dharma ātmā kārayet kīdṛśam balam yalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca janma traya ādikam pāpam vināśya svargam ādiśet śata ropī ca brahma tvam viṣṇu tvam ca sahasrake vaiśākhe kīrtim āpnoti jyeṣṭhe tu maraṇam vrajet māsāḍhe kīrtim āpnoti śrāvaṇe paramām gatim bhādre dhana āgamaḥ ca eva āśvine kārttike kṣayaḥ tulasī trividhā loke kṛte śvetā praśasyate śrīvṛkṣasya ca vipra indrāḥ saḥ bhavet brahma ghātakaḥ bhavet mūkaḥ ādhi vyādhi śatam bhajet sāyam prātar ca gharma ante śīta kāle dina antare phalam āma kulatthaḥ ca māṣaḥ mudgāḥ tilāḥ yavāḥ yava cūrṇāni yāni ca go māṃsam udakam ca eva sapta rātram nidhāpayet tam ekam sarva vṛkṣāṇām phala puṣpa ādi vṛddhi dam tena udaka ādi sekaḥ ca kṛtaḥ vai vṛddhim ādiśet tittiḍī bījam ādāya ikṣu daṇḍena mardayet tena aśoke prasekaḥ syāt sahakārasya vṛddhimān dohadam sarva vṛkṣāṇām pūga ādīnām viśeṣataḥ daśaśirā bīja yutāt abhiṣekāt ca jīvati prāk prasūtiḥ go ādīnām chāga ādi mahiṣasya ca jarāsu toyam vṛkṣa agre sthāpayet avicārayān parasya sahakārasya phalam syāt na atra saṃśayaḥ meṣasya ca vitālasya yavāgūm ca samāharet mṛtaḥ api jīvayet śīghram mriyamāṇaḥ api jīvati nimba pattram yoga pattram śatāvarī punarnavām pattraiḥ dhūmam dadyāt dina trayam tatas prādhānyāt vakṣye drumāṇām matsya udakena siktena āmrāṇām vṛddhiḥ iṣyate pakva āmram rudhiram ca eva dāḍimānām praśasyate yava udakam sa go māṃsam ketakīnām praśasyate kṣīrake bala vṛddhiḥ syāt tindukaḥ karamardakaḥ māṃsa pūti rasā majjā śoka tāle guvākake sa pūti māṃsam sa ghṛtam nālikerasya rohitam madhuyaṣṭī udakaiḥ sekāt sāmānyam nihitam bhavet jātīnām mallikānām ca kundānām rantikasya ca bhūrma māṃsam anna rasam viḍaṅgasya ca puṣpakam rathyā vṛkṣe pratiṣṭhāpya phalavān jāyate tatas dadyāt dhūpam dhānya madhye dhānya vṛddhiḥ ca jāyate mayūra pattram ādāya chāga romāṇi sapta vai heraṇḍa taila yogena dadyāt dhūpam niśā āgame hiṅgu kusuma saṃyogāt mūṣikāṇām parinyaset kariviṣṭhām ṛcchaviṣṭhām kṛttikāyām samāharet niśā toye prasekaḥ syāt tat kṣātramūlakam haret aśvattha mūle daśa hasta mātram kṣetram pavitram puruṣottamasya bāhu viṃśa antare ropet sahakāram sa dharma vid śraiparṇikam ca puṃnāgam śrīvṛkṣam dviguṇam tarau vāpī ādīnām tu kūpānām eka vṛkṣa ādikasya ca śrī viṣṇoḥ vṛkṣa pakṣe ca varuṇeṣṭam ca kūpake gaṇeśam pūjayet kumbham dikpālān ca viśeṣataḥ agni kāryam vinā kuryāt prakuryāt ca satām gatim śrutvā kṛtim vidhānena anyeṣām vā tathā udbhavam anyeṣām ca eva vṛkṣe ca tathā ca tulasī vane vṛkṣān vā anena saṃskṛtya vāsobhiḥ abhiveṣṭayet mānam idam jñeyam anyeṣām vā tathā udbhavam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tantra ātmaka pratiṣṭhā varṇanam uvāca atha tantra vidhim vakṣye purāṇeṣu api gīyate daśa dvādaśa vṛkṣake dṛṣṭi mātra antare setau kūpa yāge samutsṛjet na kūpam utsṛjet jātu vṛkṣa yāge kathaṃcana tulasī vana yāge tu na ca anyam yāgam ācaret taḍāga yāge setu ādīn na ca ārāme kadācana na setum deva yāge tu taḍāgam na samutsṛjet tantre śrāddham pṛthak na asti kartuḥ bhede pṛthak bhavet mahā liṅga sthāpanāyām na ca anyat deva sthāpanam viparīte kṛte ca api āyus kṣayaḥ iti smṛtiḥ taḍāge puṣkariṇyāḥ vā ārāme api dvijottamāḥ māna hīne māna pūrṇe daśa haste na dūṣaṇam dvi sahasra adhikam yatra tat pratiṣṭhām samācaret daśa dvādaśa vṛkṣe ca ārāme pūrvavat dvijāḥ pratiṣṭhām bilva vṛkṣe ca anyathā karṇa vedhanam anantaram pradātavyā lājāḥ mūrdhani akṣata ādikam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi pūrva bhāge ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ pratimā lakṣaṇa varṇanam uvāca pratimā lakṣaṇam vakṣye yathāśāstram atas dvijāḥ pratimām lakṣaṇaiḥ hīnām gṛhītām na eva pūjayet śailajā dārujā tāmrī mṛdbhavā sarvakāmadā eka hastā dvi hastā vā sārdha hastā tathā api vā prāsāda mānam athavā athavā sarva lakṣaṇam tri aṅgula utsedhakam ca na gehe arcayet kṛtī devāgārasya yat dvāram tasmāt aṣṭa aṅgulena tu tri bhāga piṇḍikā kāryā dvau bhāgau pratimā bhavet aṅgulam vai bhavet vṛddhiḥ aśītiḥ catur uttarā vistāra mānāt kāryam vadanam dvādaśa aṅgulam mukha tri bhāge cibukam lalāṭam nāsikām tathā karṇau nāsikayā grīvā tulyau vā niyatau tu yau nayane dvi aṅgule syātām tri bhāgā tārakā bhavet tṛtīya tārakā bhāge śubha dṛṣṭim vicakṣaṇaḥ pariṇāhaḥ tu śirasaḥ bhavet dvātriṃśat aṅgulaḥ tulyau nāsikayā grīvā mukhena hṛdaya antaram bāhū ca bāhu tulyau ca ūrū jaṅghe ca jāghanam pādaḥ syāt hāṭitaḥ catur aṅgulaḥ ṣaṣ aṅgulaḥ tu vistāraḥ tulya aṅguṣṭha oṃ agula trayam pradeśinī ca tad tulyā hīnā śeṣān nakhānakham caturdaśa aṅgulaḥ pādasya āyāmaḥ parikīrtitaḥ evam lakṣaṇa saṃyuktā sā pūjyā pratimā śubhā adharoṣṭhaḥ tathā eva ūru bhrū lalāṭa manīṣikam ca niyatam mūrtau kuryāt aṅga samunnatyāḥ vatsa proktaḥ atimukuṭaḥ kaṭaka aṅgada hāravān cāru vicitra maṇi kuṇḍalā karābhyām kāñcanīm mālām prodvahatīm śiroruhān evam lakṣaṇa saṃpannām kārayet vihita pradām su snigdhām vara dām saumyām dvitīya āśramiṇām imām nava tālaḥ bhavet viṣṇuḥ vāsudevaḥ tri tālakaḥ nṛsiṃhaḥ pañcatālaḥ syāt hayagrīvaḥ tu pañcamaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ ca aṣṭa tālaḥ maheśaḥ pañca tālakaḥ nava tālā bhavet durgā lakṣmī ca eva tri tālikā vāṇīm tri tālikām vidyāt savitā sapta tālakaḥ dakṣiṇe vāsudevasya kare cakram pratiṣṭhitam pārśve nalina siṃhau dvau subhadrām dakṣiṇe nyaset rukmiṇī vāma bhāge ca tad adhastāt divi indrakam kṛta añjali puṭa sthaḥ ca nāradaḥ kapilaḥ tathā yat ugram vāsudevasya tathā nārāyaṇasya ca vijānīyāt tathā eva ca tīrthe girau taḍāge ca samīpe sthāpayet sudhīḥ nagara grāma madhye vā brāhmaṇānām ca saṃsadi avimukte viśeṣaṇa siddha kṣetre daśa arṇake trīṇi uttara sahasrāṇi pañca pañca uttarāṇi ṣaḍ yat kulāni pūrvam vipra indrāḥ samuddharati na anyathā bhau dāru mayaḥ kāryaḥ hi aśaktaḥ mṛd mayaḥ utha vā candana aguruṣu kuryāt bilva śrīparṇikasya ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ kuṇḍa nirmāṇa vidhi varṇanam uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi kuṇḍānām atha nirṇayam tasya uddhāram ca saṃskāram śṛṇudhvam dvijasattamāḥ caturasram ca vṛttam ca pāda ardham ca ardhacandrakam yoni ākāram candrakam ca aṣṭa ardham atha pañcamam sapta ardham ca nava ardham ca kuṇḍam daśakam īritam bhūmim saṃśodhya vidhivat tuṣa keśa ādi varjitām bhrāmayet ca ūrdhvatas tasyāḥ bhasma aṅgārāṇi yatnatas paṅkurārpaṇakam kuryāt sapta ahāt eva buddhimān tatra aṣṭādaśa aṅgake kṣetre nyaset ekam bahis tatas māpayet tena mānena tri vṛttam kuṇḍam ujjvalam vivarjayet saṃparipātayet sūtram pāṭayet tad pramāṇāt pañcadhā bhedite kṣetre kāmam vā vibhajet sudhīḥ nyaset purastāt eva aṅgam koṇa ardha ardha pramāṇāt yoni sthānam pratiṣṭhāpya aśvatthasya dala ākṛtiḥ sūtra dvayam tatas dadyāt kuṇḍam parimitam bhavet diśam prati yathānyāyam pātayet ca dvijottamāḥ śṛṅgāṭakam yugmapuṭam ṣaṣ asram kuṇḍa trayam budhāḥ jalāśaya ārāma kūpe nitye gṛha maye yathā bhavet kuṇḍam dvija saṃskāra karmaṇi deva pratiṣṭhā yāge ca gṛha vāstau caturthakam tat paṃkajam proktam naramedha aśvamedhayoḥ aṅkura arpaṇa yāge ca vaiṣṇave yāga karmaṇi hi śiva devyoḥ ca janma ādau aṣṭamyām ca ardhacandrakam mārjāra pauṣṭike vairam ramye ca śāntike tathā tu puraścaraṇa kāmyeṣu jvara ādīnām vimokṣaṇe evaṃvidheṣu kāryeṣu yonikuṇḍam praśasyate devatā tīrtha yātrā ādau mahā yuddha praveśane saure śānte pauṣṭike ca ṣaṣ puram kuṇḍam uttamam māraṇa uccāṭane ca eva tathā roga upaśāntaye vaiṣṇavānām koṭi home nṛpāṇām atiśocane aṣṭa asram abja kuṇḍam ca sapta asram nidhi sādhane rājñā sādhye ca pañcāsram kanyā prāptau tris asrakam yajña anurūpatas kāryā mekhalā sarvatas budhaiḥ ayuta ādiṣu homeṣu mekhalām yojayet sudhīḥ ca atra api mūle sārdha aṅgulam tyajet muṣṭi haste samutsedhaḥ sārdha aṅgula pariṣkṛtaḥ aratni mātre kuṇḍe tu tris ca eka aṅgulāt kramāt eka hasta mite kuṇḍe veda agni nayana aṅgulāḥ pañcamekhalakam vā atha lakṣa koṭau ca yojayet eka aṅgula ādi mānena nemim saṃvardhayet sudhīḥ catur hasta mite kuṇḍe tāvat eva guṇa aṅgulāḥ sārdha aṅgula ādi mānena nemim saṃvardhayet sudhīḥ yaṇḍasya rūpam jānīyāt paramam prakṛtyāḥ vapuḥ eka aṅgulam tu yoni agram kuryāt īṣat adhomukham yonim kuṇḍa śūnyeṣu vardhayet sama madhye mekhalāyāḥ saparyā yā su lakṣaṇā sthāpayet kuṇḍa koṇeṣu yonim tām dvijasattamāḥ puṇḍānām kalpayet nābhim sphuṭam ambuja saṃnibhām tat tu kuṇḍa anurūpam vā su vyaktam su manoharam yonikuṇḍe yonim abjam kuṇḍe nābhim ca varjayet yāvat dvaya pramāṇena ardha aṅgula kramāt bahis nābhim pravardhayet ekam kuṇḍānām rūpāt yathā tatra tatra bhavet kuṇḍam bimba śūnyam na homayet hi śiva śakti samāyogāt kāmaḥ utpadyate yatas umā devī bimbaḥ khyātaḥ sadāśivaḥ na kuryāt ekayā hīnam maraṇam ca samuddiśet trayodaśa aṅgulam hitvā vahni hastam atha api vā tasya dakṣiṇa digbhāge agratas maṇḍalam likhet tatra pūjā prakartavyā pūrva mānena ca āśrayet arka hasta antare kuryāt śata ūrdhva ante śatena vā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ yajña māna vidhāna varṇanam uvāca amānena hataḥ yajñaḥ tasmāt mānam na hāpayet śatārdham prathamam mānam śata sāhasram eva ca ayutam ca tathā lakṣam koṭi homam atas param atas param tu vibhave rājā vā anyaḥ dhijottamāḥ sarvadā tatas nityam prāpnoti manujaḥ kila yuktāḥ ca api grahāḥ tatra nityam śāntika pauṣṭike adbhute ca tathā śāntim kuryāt bhakti samanvitaḥ tasmāt graha abhijanitam śubha aśubha phalam khalu homam yathā abhirucitam pauṣṭike kāmya karmaṇi lakṣa homam koṭi homam rājā kuryāt yathāvidhi anyaḥ śata ādikam kuryāt ayutam vibhave sati grahānām lakṣa homaḥ tu koṭi homaḥ tathā kalau nidhi homam ca abhicāram tat na kuryāt gṛhāśramī mānam na eva ca kartavyam māna ādau ca aṣṭakam nyaset lakṣe sapta tāla saṃkhyā koṭi home ca viṃśatiḥ mārambhaḥ tri sahasraḥ syāt dvitīye aṣṭa sahasrakaḥ tṛtīye tu sahasram syāt graha sādhyaḥ smṛtaḥ vidhiḥ pañca ahe ca samārambhe sahasram juhuyāt budhaḥ pañcame ca tathā ṣaṣṭhe kule bhāga dvaya adhikam na nyūnam na adhikam kāryam etat mānam udāhṛtam sa samāje japet nityam pañca tāreṇa sviṣṭakṛt tri aha sādhye tri rātre ca pūrṇam kṛtvā visarjayet pañca ahe tu tṛtīye ahani bali dānam praśasyate sapta ahe ca aṣṭa divase nava ahe pañcame ahani pañca ahe dvādaśa ahe tu dvātriṃśat ṣoḍaśe ahani iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ kuṇḍa saṃskāra varṇanam uvāca kuṇḍānām atha saṃskāre vakṣye śāstra matam yathā a saṃskṛte ca artha hāniḥ tasmāt saṃskṛtya homayet aṣṭādaśa syuḥ saṃskārāḥ kuṇḍānām tatra darśitāḥ tāreṇa avekṣayet sthānam kuśa toyaiḥ prasecayet tri sūtrīkaraṇam paścāt vṛtta sūtram nipātayet vāreṇa kīlakam dadyāt nārasiṃhena kuḍmalam jihvām prakalpayet paścāt tasmāt agnim samāharet nadī parvata śālābhyaḥ strī hastāt parivarjayet saṃskṛtya parigṛhṇīyāt tridhā kṛtvā samuddharet tam agnim pratigṛhṇīyāt ātmanaḥ abhimukham yathā dhyātvā samīraṇam dadyāt kāmam utpadyate tatas bījena ca aiśānyām yonau agnim vinikṣipet paścāt devasya devyāḥ ca dadyāt ācamanīyakam sarvajñaiḥ ājñāpaya svāhā mantraḥ yaḥ vahni pūjane vahnibarhiṣi saṃyuktāḥ sa ādi yāntāḥ sa bindavaḥ bahni mantrāḥ samuddiṣṭāḥ dvijānām mantraḥ īritaḥ jihvāḥ tāḥ trividhāḥ proktāḥ yajñadattena sattamāḥ hiraṇyā mā ājya homeṣu homayet saṃyata ātmakaḥ tu kanaka āsyāt tu kṛṣṇa āsyāt hirṇyā śubhra tā tathā bahurūpā atirūpā ca sāttvikā yoga karmasu manojavā etāḥ sapta niyuṅjīta vijñeyāḥ krūra karmasu mṛddha kṣīreṇa raktāyām naityikeṣu prabhā smṛtā bahu rūpā puṣpa home kṛṣṇā ca annena pāyasaiḥ dhūminī tila home ca kāṣṭha home karālikā lohita āsyā pitṛ home tatas jñeyā manojavā vaiśvānaram sthitam home samidh homeṣu sattamāḥ samānam ājya home ca niṣaṇṇam śeṣa vastubhiḥ nāsikāyām manas pīḍā mastake adhvā na saṃśayaḥ sādhāraṇam atho vakṣye vahneḥ jihvāḥ ca kīrtitāḥ pravakṣyāmi vidhim kṛtsnam yad viśeṣam punar śṛṇu hiraṇya āhutau hiraṇya ākhyā gaganā pāṇi homāt vakrā khyātā mahā home kṛṣṇa ābhā sā kratau matā modaka vidhau bahu rūpa atirūpakāḥ na vā saṃkalpayet kuṇḍe śūdra ākāra vibhedāt indra koṣṭham mastakam syāt īśa āgneye ca mastake hutvā vrīhi gaṇam tatra karṇe puṣpa āhutim hunet madhye ca eva netre ca dakṣiṇe ca ikṣu khaṇḍakam vāma pāde vāma kare abhicāreṣu śasyate māraṇe puṣpa deśe tu na ca anyam homayet kvacid kara vijānīyāt sarva vināśa kṛt pāvakasya sutaḥ gandhaḥ samantāt su mahā udayaḥ pradakṣiṇaḥ tyakta kalpā chatrākā śithilā śikhā mahā dā yajamānasya rājyasya api viśeṣataḥ chinna vṛttāḥ śikhāḥ kuryāt mṛtyuḥ dhana parikṣayaḥ nirvāpyam maraṇam vidyāt mahā dhūma ākule api ca evaṃvidheṣu doṣeṣu prāyaścittam samācaret tyaktvā brāhmaṇān bhojayet tatas mūlena ājyena juhuyāt juhuyāt pañcaviṃśatim mahāsnānam prakartavyam tri kālam hari pūjanam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge pañcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ yajña anta pūjā vidhi varṇanam uvāca homa avasāne prajapet upacārān ca ṣoḍaśa dadyāt samīraṇam paścāt pīṭha pūjām samācarat gṛhītvā rakta puṣpam ca dhyāyet vahnim yathāvidhi yaṣṭam śakti svastika abhītim uccais dīrghaiḥ dorbhiḥ dhārayantam vara antam hema ākalpam padma saṃstham trinetram dhyāyet vahnim baddha maulim jaṭābhiḥ pūrva ādi dvāra deśeṣu kāmadevam śatakratum ca eva pūjayet pradarśayet dattvā āsanam svāgatam ca dadyāt pādya ādika trayam atas pūrva ādi pātreṣu yāvatā ca hutāśanam mahodaram mahājihvam ākāśa tvena pūjayet tāraka ādīn samāpte ca gandhaiḥ puṣpaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ tatra eva jihvāḥ trividhāḥ dhyāyet mantra puraḥsarāḥ vakṣyamāṇena mantreṇa upacāraiḥ anantaram tvam ādiḥ sarva bhūtānām saṃsāra arṇava tārakaḥ puṭa añjalim tatas baddhvā pṛcchet kuśala pūrvakam svāgatam tu suraśreṣṭhaiḥ śāntim kuru namaḥ astu te sarvaloka hita arthāya pādyam ca pratigṛhyatām nārāyaṇa param dhāma jyotīrūpa sanātana gṛhāṇa arghyam mayā dattam viśvarūpa namaḥ astu te sadā snānīyam te mayā dattam sarva kāma artha siddhaye hutāśana mahā bāho devadeva sanātana jyotiṣām jyotīrūpaḥ tvam anādinidhana acyuta devī devāḥ mudam yānti yasya samyak samāgamāt sarva doṣa upaśānti artha gandhaḥ ayam pratigṛhyatām tvam viṣṇuḥ tvam hi brahmā ca jyotiṣām gatiḥ īśvara puṣpam deveśaiḥ sa anulepam jagant bhavet devatānām pitṝṇām ca sukham ekam sanātanam dhūpaḥ ayam devadeveśa gṛhyatām mama dhanaṃjaya tvam ekaḥ sarva bhūteṣu sthāvareṣu careṣu ca parama ātmā para ākāraḥ pradīpaḥ pratigṛhyatām sarvasvam yajñasūtram ca paramānnam sa mākṣikam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca yajña bhedam tri bhedam ca vakṣye śāstra matam yathā yathā veda anusāreṇa yathā grahaṇa yojanam lakṣa home tu vahniḥ syāt koṭi home hutāśanaḥ varuṇaḥ śāntike jñeyaḥ māraṇe hi aruṇaḥ smṛtaḥ nitya home analaḥ nāma prāyaścitte hutāśanaḥ lohitaḥ ca anna yajñe yaḥ grahānām pratyanukramāt deva pratiṣṭhā yāge tu lohitaḥ parikīrtitaḥ prajāpatiḥ vāstuyāge maṇḍape ca api padmake prapāyām ca eva nāga ākhyaḥ mahādāne tulāpuruṣa dāne ca dhātā agniḥ parikīrtitaḥ vṛṣotsarge bhavet sūyaḥ avasāna aṃte raviḥ smṛtaḥ bhāvakaḥ vaiśvadeve ca dīkṣā pakṣe janārdanaḥ ca bhavet kālaḥ kravya ādaḥ śara dāhane parṇa dāhe yamaḥ nāma hi asthi dāhe śikhaṇḍikaḥ ca tu indraḥ ākhyātaḥ praśastaḥ yāga karmaṇi niṣkame hāṭakaḥ ca eva prāśane ca śuciḥ tathā bhavaḥ udare jaṭhara agniḥ ca samudre vaḍavānalaḥ hikhāyām ca vibhuḥ jñeyaḥ svarasya agniḥ sarīsṛpaḥ aśva agniḥ mantharaḥ nāma ratha agniḥ jātavedasaḥ toya agniḥ varuṇaḥ nāma brāhmaṇa agniḥ bhujaḥ dāva agniḥ sūryaḥ ucyate dīpa agniḥ pāvakaḥ nāma gṛhya agniḥ dharaṇī patiḥ ghṛta agniḥ ca nalaḥ vāyuḥ sūtikā agniḥ ca rākṣasaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge agnināmavarṇanam nāma saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca atha atas homa dravyāṇām pramāṇam abhidhīyate pramāṇe ca apramāṇe ca niṣphalam bhavati dhuvam karṣa mātram ghṛtam home śukti mātram payaḥ smṛtam muṣṭi mānena pṛthukāḥ lājāḥ syuḥ muṣṭi saṃmitāḥ muṣṭi mātrā ca śarkarātolakam viduḥ ekaikam pattra puṣpāṇi śālūkasya tri muṣṭikam sa vṛntakam japā puṣpam kesaram tat sa vṛntakam ekaikaśas ca padmānām jalajānām tathā eva ca yāḥ phala mānena piṣṭakānām prasaṃkhyayā mātuluṅga tri kheḍakam aṣṭadhā nālikerasya panasam daśadhā bhavet padma bīja pramāṇena kūṣmāṇḍam ca aṣṭadhā bhavet urvārukam ca aṣṭadhā ca guḍūcī catur aṅgulam pūga mānam ca māṃsasya sa guḍam tatra dṛśyate anyatra badarī mānam tindukam ca tridhā kṛtam mātram prādeśa mātram syāt dūrvāḥ yāḥ ca tri pattrakam bhūrja pattram ca gṛhṇīyāt śamīm prādeśa mātrikām vrīhayaḥ muṣṭi mātrāḥ syuḥ śukti mānena sarṣapāḥ maricāḥ syuḥ vimāḥ nena mṛṇālam ca atha mūlakam sapta khaṇḍam ca vārtākam tripuṣṭam ca tridhā uditam candana aguru karpūra kastūrī kuṅkumāni ca tittiḍī bīja mānena deśikaiḥ daśakam plāvanena eva sahasrāṇām śatam vinā evam vrīhi plāvane ca kāṣṭha vadi kṣudaṇḍakam mṛdu puṣpāṇām latā ādīnām tathā eva ca vṛnta saṃplāvanāt eva phalam harati rākṣasaḥ na dvi tri plavanam kuryāt kṛtvā yāti rasātalam pūrva āśā abhimukhaḥ bhūtvā pāvayet ca yathākramāt na nyūnam na adhikam kuryāt śānti pakṣe udak mukhaḥ kaniṣṭhā aṅgulim āsādya prakuryāt parva bhūṣaṇam yat śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāga iṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca mālinī śiṃśapā kṣīrī bilvaḥ khadiraḥ eva ca praśastāḥ taravaḥ siddhi dāḥ yāga karmaṇi pratiṣṭhāyām praśastāḥ tu dhātrī khadira kesarāḥ saṃskāre śaśi bhinnau ca dhātrī dhātrā vinirmitā saṃprāśe yaḥ sruvaḥ proktaḥ saṃskāre yajña sādhane pratiṣṭhāyām tu kathitāḥ te danye śāstra vedibhiḥ pāṣṭham gṛhītvā bilvasya rikta ādi tithi varjite gṛhītvā vibhajet bhāgān triṃśat tathā punar tu ca sruvam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ dhātrī phala sama ākāram svadhā nimnam su śobhanam bedīm śūrpa ākṛtim kuryāt kuṇḍāni parikalpayet dvitriṃśam syāt kuṇḍa mānam adaive tasya kīrtitam caturbhiḥ aṅgaiḥ ānāham karṣa ādi agram tatas sruvam daṇḍa mūla āśraye daṇḍī bhavet kaṅkaṇa bhūṣitaḥ sauvarṇasya ca tāmrasya kāryā darvī pramāṇāt pṛthivī samudbhūtam dvādaśa aṅgula saṃmitam dvayaṃgulam maṇḍalam tasya darvī sā yajña sādhane pañca aṅgulam maṇḍalam ca aṣṭa hastam ca daṇḍakam daśa tolaka mānena sā ca darvī udāhṛtā ājya saṃśodhana artham tu sā tu tāmra mayasya ca ṣoḍaśa aṅgula mānena sarva abhāve ca paippalīm sthālīm ghṛta mayām mṛd mayām ca samāśrayet atha tāmra mayī kāryā na ca tām tatra yojayet yat śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge sruvadarvīnirṇayaḥ nāma ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣṭa vidhi varṇanam uvāca atha pūrṇa vidhim vakṣye yathā candra artha vedinām yasya samyak anuṣṭhānāt saṃpūrṇam syāt iti sthitiḥ homa pūrtau mokṣa kalpaḥ pūjā ante arghyam vidhīyate atha tasyām apūrṇāyām hata śrīḥ yajña bhraṃśa tā pūrṇam dattvā savitre arghyam brāhmaṇān bhojayet tatas gṛham praviśya ca tatas kula pūjām samācaret dehi me pūrṇām punātu iti ṛcā kramāt niyojayet pratiṣṭhāyām nitya naimittike śṛṇu punātu iti ṛcā pūrṇā prathamā parikīrtitā saptatā iti dvitīyā syāt dehimā iti tṛtīyikā pūrṇā darvī caturthā syāt kula iva sthāpya deśikaḥ utthāya dadyāt pūrṇām tu na upaviśya kadācana ca jihvāyām raktāyām graha yāgake vidhīyate tad ante yugam dadyāt ayuta ante yuga dvayam tad ante dadet ekam puṣpa home ca sattamāḥ pūrṇā tu eka sahasram tu dadyāt yajña phala īpsayā mṛdupuṣpa ākṛtau tu ekā kevale ca ikṣuhomake śatam dve ca śate ca eva garbhādhāna annaprāśane sīmantonnayane ca eva prāyaścitta ākṛtīṣu ca vaiśvadeve ca nitye ca pūrṇā tu ekā vidhīyate ṛṣi chanda ādikam śrutvā prati mantrasya sattamāḥ brāhmaṇasya ṛṣiḥ kauṇḍinyaḥ īritaḥ dehi mām iti ca mantrasya prajāpatiḥ ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ anuṣṭubh ca bhavet chandaḥ devatā asya prajāpatiḥ pūrṇā darvī iti mantrasya śatakratuḥ ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ chandas nuṣṭubh samākhyātam vahniḥ ca eva atra devatā punātu iti ca mantrasya ṛṣiḥ syāt pavanaḥ smṛtaḥ tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat agniḥ ca kīrtitaḥ turya pūrṇāḥ yajña madhye nakule dvijasattamāḥ na ca āśiṣam yajña madhye abhiṣekam ca tarpaṇam ṛtvij chandaḥ spṛśan samyak dakṣiṇa aṅgam atha api vā ayutam tatra homam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ nāgaraṅgam dhātakīm ca pūrṇāyām ca vivarjayet jāyate tasmāt prāk eva sa tilān gaṇitvā sthāpayet pṛthak dhātakyāḥ ca phalaiḥ saṃkhyā kartavyā phalam icchatā siddhaye gaṅgā mṛttikayā yuktaḥ śunikām atha vā dvijāḥ rakta guñjā phalaiḥ saṃkhyām puṣṭi kāmeṣu yojayet hotā syāt ayutena api eka ahe veda saṃkhyayā ṛṇa sādhye bhavet hotā trayaḥ eva dvijottamāḥ lakṣa home tu hotāraḥ ṣaṭ eva parikīrtitāḥ nava pañca daśa daśakam pañcaviṃśam atha api vā tathā kāma krodha vihīnāḥ syuḥ ṛtvijaḥ śānta cetasaḥ athavā ṛtvijā śāntau dvau eva parikīrtitau tadvat sa daśadhā ca aṣṭau nava home tu ṛtvijaḥ yatas sarvam avāpnoti kuryāt kāma vidhānāt yāvat kalpa śatāni aṣṭa ante mokṣam avāpnuyāt akāmaḥ yaḥ tu imam kuryāt lakṣa homam yathāvidhi hata kāmam avāpnoti padam ca ānantyam aśnute bhāryāthīm labhate bhāryām kumārī ca śubham patim bhraṣṭa rājyaḥ tathā rājyam śrī kāmaḥ śriyam āpnuyāt yam yam kāmayate kāmam sarvam prāpnoti puṣkalam tasmāt śataguṇaḥ proktaḥ koṭi homaḥ svayambhunā mad brāhmaṇānām asaṃbhave bhāṣāṇe mṛttikāyām ca na ca vastra āsane kvacid tatra dāru mayam kuryāt āgamam bhajate dvijaḥ dānam dadyāt ca homa ante pūrṇa ādau ca yathā bhavet dvija saṃskāra kāryeṣu pūrṇa ādau ca api dakṣiṇā mantra upāsana kāryeṣu soma yāga aśvamedhake iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ maṇḍala vidhi varṇanam uvāca atha atas maṇḍalam vakṣye purāṇeṣu yathā uditam devāḥ padmāsana sthāḥ ca bhaviṣyanti vasaṃti ca na arcayet arcite haret atas maṇḍala vicchedam yasmāt daśaguṇam bhavet rajas sādhye śataguṇam kevale dviguṇam phalam tri śatam vandane sādhye sahasram ca rajas aṣṭakam rajobhiḥ ṣoḍaśaiḥ bimbam śatam śatam anantakam yantre maṇau śālagrāme pratimāyām viśeṣataḥ catur asram navam vyūham krauñcaprāṇam caturvidham kāmabījam vajranābham vighnarājam gajāhvayam pārijātam candra bimbam sūryakāntam ca śekharam muṣṭikam pañcābjam ca eva mainākam kāmarājam ca puṣkaram aṣṭa asram ca eva śrī bimbam ṣaṣ asram tri asram eva tu catvāriṃśat tathā pañcasu adhikam parisaṃkhyayā catur asram nava vyūḍham vaiṣṇave yāga karmaṇi praśastam ca api gomedhe krauñcam ghrāṇam caturvidham tathā tri asram aṣṭa asram ca ṣaṣ asrakam mahat śaktānām kāma pakṣe ca pañca siṃhāsanam mahat dhyāna acale meru pṛṣṭham maṇi muktā acaleṣu api harivallabham rājasūye soma yāgeṣu śasyate mahāśaya pratiṣṭhāyām vighnarājam praśasyate catur aṅgula ucchrāya mitā ṣaṣ aṅgulā hi atha api vā ṣaṣ aṅgulāḥ nava vyūhe vardhayet yajña kovidaḥ turya hastam muṣṭi hastam samucchritam madhya dvaye hīna karam kaniṣṭham tri aṅgula adhikam pārijātam candra bimbam sūryakāntam ca śekharam grahāṇām pauṣṭike pakṣe bāhya grāma ādi sādhane prathame muṣṭi hastaḥ syāt saṃpūrṇe śeṣa mānakaiḥ nava lābhe ca pañcābjam kara trayam udāhṛtam śeṣā ca eva variṣṭhā ca lavalī bhitti vedikā vijñeyāḥ dvijaśārdūlāḥ yathākāmyeṣu yojayet daśa haste ca aṣṭa haste aṣṭa haste ca ṣoḍaśam muṣṭi bāhum ca prādeśam vardhayet ṣoḍaśa aṃśake darpaṇa ākārakam kuryāt yāgake śānti karmaṇi hīnam kuryāt prayatnena vapra ākāram paristave niśāraṇaiḥ gomayaiḥ ca vedikām ca pralepayet hīna vīrya gavānām ca purīṣam dhenukam tathā kapilāyāḥ ca yatnena kuṇḍa maṇḍala lepane vinā sūtraiḥ kīlake na maṇḍale na eva sūtrayet tasmāt prayatnāt kāryam yat sūtram yat ca kīlakam arka hasta mitam sūtram mṛdu lākṣā mayam tathā raupya tāmra mayam kuryāt vaiṣṇave yāga karmaṇi gaṇanāyake su praśastam śaiṣepāmārgam eva ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge ekaviṃśatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ viṣayānukramaṇikā maṅgalācaraṇam bhaviṣya purāṇa praśaṃsā dharma svarūpa varṇana ślo virāj brahmāṇḍa itpatti vistāra varṇana ślo-27 traivarṇika praśaṃsā śahmaṇa lakṣaṇa brāhmaṇa kartavya varṇanam ślo ślo. purāṇa itihāsa arcana śravaṇa māhātmya varṇana antarvedi bahirvedi pramāṇa ādi varṇana pūrvakam pūrta karma nirūpaṇam ślo ro ārāma karma vividha vṛkṣa āropaṇa vidhi varṇanam ślo pratidevatā pratimā lakṣaṇa varṇanam ślo kuṇḍa saṃskāra śāstra mata varṇanam aṣṭādaśan kuṇḍa saṃskāra varṇana ca ślo nitya naimittika homa avasāne ṣoḍaśa upacāra varṇanam ślo. pūrṇāhuti homa nirṇaya varṇanam karma para tvena brāhmaṇa saṃkhyā varṇanam yathāvidhi kṛta yāga phala varṇanam ślo. atha dvitīya bhāgaḥ maṇḍala nirmāṇa prakāra varṇanam ślo. pūrṇapātra parimāṇa varṇana puraḥsara dravya viśeṣa karma viśeṣa paratvena dakṣiṇā ādi mūlya parimāṇa varṇana ślo māsa āśraya karma aupayika tayā caturvidha māsa svarūpa lakṣaṇa nirṇaya varṇanam ślo maṇḍaladeva racanā varṇanam uvāca catur asram samam kuyāt iṣṭyāḥ aṣṭādaśa aṅgulam evam poḍaśa hasta antam vardhayet kramatas svayam haste vinirṇayam viprāḥ racayet maṇḍalaiḥ sudhīḥ dvādaśa aṅgula kalpābhyām madhu haste ca maṇḍale padma mānam caturddhā tu vṛttam kuryāt samantataḥ tathame karṇikā kāryā kesarāṇi dvitīyake tṛtīye dala saṃdhīn ca dala agrāṇi caturthake karṇikām pīta varṇena śuddhena pañkajam likhet kesarāḥ trividhāḥ proktāḥ mūla madhya agra deśāt mūle śukla aruṇāḥ madhye pītāḥ ca agre pratiṣṭhitāḥ aṣṭa aṅgula pramāṇam yat yathāvarṇam vināditaḥ mabhuḥ gaurī tathā brahmā rāmakṛṣṇā iti anukramāt śiva viṣṇuvoḥ mahā yāge śambhum ārabhya dāpayet pratiṣṭhāyām ca rāma antam kṛṣṇa antam ca jalāśaye durgā yāge ca śrīpakṣe brahma ādīn parikalpayet ca pīta ādīn kuryāt ca na tat anyathā sarvam ca pūrvavat kāryam paṅkajam su likhet sudhīḥ tāvat saṃkhyā haraṇayoḥ veṣṭayet prakramāt api śukla aruṇaiḥ tathā pītaiḥ pīta aruṇa sitaiḥ api pīta aruṇa sitaiḥ evam svabhāve pratibhāgake tad ante ca guhya pattrāḥ tu ṣoḍaśaiḥ viṃśa māne tu sa liṅgam ca aṣṭa pattrake evam maṇḍala mantrāṇām varjayet paramārthāt tadvat mūleṣu koṇeṣu kesarāṇi prakalpayet daśa daṇḍa sama ākāram tri varṇam pratiraṃjitam haram dadyāt daśa agre tu sarva aṅgula pramāṇāt ca sarvatra tad madhye śoṇa tuṇḍakam na śūdraḥ maṇḍalam kuryāt na kuryāt brāhmaṇabruvaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhū māna varṇanam uvāca pravakṣyāmi yathā veda artha vādinām saṃmatam sarva tantreṣu gopanīyam prayatnāt catuṣṭayam nyaset vṛttam madhyama adhama bhāvāt tṛtīye padma pattrāṇi caturthe ṣoḍaśa chadāḥ tad dakṣiṇa agram su likhet pārśvayoḥ pakṣaka dvayam śuklam pītam tathā raktam kṛṣṇam lohita saṃnibham saṃkhyātam tāmraparṇam ca śyāmalam ca aṣṭakam rajaḥ śuklam taṇḍula cūrṇa uttham pītam tu niśayā smṛtam tu pulaka ādi dagdham raktam pīta āsya yogāt yat kuṅkuma ābham pāṇḍuram ca rakta śvetaiḥ vinirmitam tāmra varṇam kusumbhena śyāmalam bilva pattra jam yava godhūma cūrṇa ādi yogena tu rajaḥ smṛtam karṇikāyām kesareṣu śubhram eva nipātayet tatas ṣoḍaśa pattreṣu pūrva ādi kramāt bhavet śuklam pītam tathā tāmram tatas saṃkhyātam eva ca śyāmalam kuṅkuma ābham ca raktam śuklam ca kṛṣṇakam pītam tāmram ca saṃkhyātam śyāmam kuṅkuma raktakam evam dadyāt vijaḥ pūrve īśāna antam vibhāvayet tuṇḍa bhāge bhavet pītam grīvāyām śuklam eva ca pucche viṃśati pattrāṇi ādau pañca rajas kramāt ṣaṣ aṅguleṣu anḍa bhāge pītena parikalpayet tatra pīta ādikam lekhyam pūrva uktam ca yathā bhavet śukla ādikam pradadyāt anu pātreṣu ekaikaśas pṛthak pade śuddham ca aṅgulīṣu raktam śyāmena bhāvayet pūrva paścima digbhāge śuklam syāt vāra deśāt mahākrauñcam idam jñeyam madhyakraucam idam śṛṇu kaniṣṭham sarva yajñeṣu vidyānām saptam uttamam atha aparam pravakṣyāmi sarva tantra matam kramāt rakta pītam rakta pītaiḥ kuryāt puccha catuṣṭayam pūrva ādi krama yoge tu pattra ante dharaṇī tale su likhet mūla saṃlagnam bahiṣkoṇa catuṣṭayam kaniṣṭhe aṣṭa kulam kuryāt puccham kuryāt caturvidham trivṛt tam veṣṭayet paścāt sita rakta asitaiḥ kramāt dṛṣṭam janma śata udbhūtam pāpam nāśayate dhuvam pītam vā vilikhet viprāḥ naśyanti sakala āpadaḥ tasya kalpa śata udbhūtam pāpam nāśayate dhuvam mayūram vṛṣabham ca eva siṃham krauñcam ca vai kapim pramādāt vā gṛhe kṣetre vṛkṣa agre ca api bho dvijāḥ utthāya vandanam kuryāt brahma hatyā śatam dahet poṣaṇāt kīrtim āpnoti darśanāt pāpa vicyutiḥ darśanāt vardhate lakṣmī āyuḥ vṛddhiḥ ca jāyate mayūraḥ brahmanaḥ mṛrtiḥ vṛṣabhaḥ ca sadāśivaḥ bhālikā kṛṣṇavyāghraḥ ca lakṣmī citrakapotakaḥ atas param pravakṣyāmi maṇḍale maṇḍaleṣu api taṇḍula uttham yava uttham vā varjyam makara ropaṇam yat bālya śrāvaṇe jātam hiṅgulam gandhakam tathā haimantika udbhavam yat ca sitapāṣāṇam eva ca kāñcanyāḥ ca prabhedam yat śastam śukla guṇam dvijāḥ śephāli vṛttam niśayā atasī kusumāni ca puṣpāṇi śastam pītam guṇam bhavet pañcaraṃgakam eva nāgapāṣāṇakam ca eva puṃnāgam dagdhapañcakam śaṅkha cūrṇam loha viṣṭhām nāga viṣṭhām ca varjayet ca eva śrayet yava śālīyakaiḥ bhinnam śuklam ca kārayet sudhīḥ lākṣām ca yadi gṛhṇīyāt tat bharjitvā pradāpayet mākāśam pṛthivīm ca eva bhaumam rāmam tathā śanī dharaṇīm sadana sthāne pañcadhā vibhajet bahis tarjanī aṅguṣṭha yogaiḥ vā tṛṇam ārabhya yat bhavet tṛṇam ārabhya sāmānye śaktaḥ vā madhyama ādeḥ rākṣasa ādi pratiṣṭhāyām graha pakṣe agnim āditas pratiṣṭhāyām graha makhe kāmyeṣu parivarjayet subhadram maṇḍalam vakṣye śubha dam śubham ādiśet caturviśa aṅgulaiḥ pūrṇam sarvatra hastam ādiśet madhyamā dīrgha mānena māna aṅgulam iti smṛtam rekhā dvaya antaram yat ca mūlarekhām na ca āśrayet māna aṅgulam atha api vā madhye nibadhya śaṅkum ca muṣṭi bāhu pramāṇāt prakalpya karṇikā ādīni madhye ca aṣṭadalam likhet bahis ca arka dalam kuryāt varṇānām kramakeṇa tu pañcamam śveta varṇena bahis kuryāt triveṣṭanam sita pīta aruṇam kuryāt paścāt veda aṅgula antare subhadram maṇḍalāt pūrvam sarvatobhadrakam śṛṇu sarva kāryeṣu yajñeṣu sarva kalyāṇam āpnuyāt maṇḍalam sarvatobhadram sarva yajñeṣu puṣṭi dam sādhakānām hita arthāya īśvareṇa eva bhāṣitam tad koṇe sūtra dvayam dadyāt madhye sūtra dvayam punar tatas matsyān viracayet karṇe sūtrāṇi sādhakaḥ catuḥ sūtram pātayet ca pūrva apara vibhāgāt punar dadyāt catur sūtram karṇa sūtram punar dadet mad śata dvaya padam yāvat ṣaṭpañcāśā adhikam tathā pātayet ca tathā sūtram evam saptadaśam bhavet ūrdhva paṅktyā pada yugam ca ādye pada catuṣṭayam dvāra pārśve bhavet yāvat danta paṅktyā pada trayam paṅkajam śukla varṇena vaiṣṇavaḥ yāga karmaṇi pratiṣṭhāsu ca sarvāsu śuklam eva praśasyate pītena karṇikā kāryā catur bhāgena mānāt mad śubham cakora avasthāne tāpayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ karṇikā mūlam ārabhya rekhāḥ ṣoḍaśa kalpayet agre pītam bhavet evam kṛtvā pañkaja veṣṭanam bhūṣu raktam dadyāt ca padmam kṣetreṣu nirdiśet śuklena pīṭha gātrāṇi pīṭha koṇe pada traye śuddhena racayet pādau punar pīta ādi varṇakaiḥ citram su śobhanam kāryam tatra kalpalatām nyaset mānam kalpalatāyāḥ tu dvi aṅgulam parikīrtitam dve dve śastam ca bhramaṇam śaṅkha āvarta kramāt trayam puṣpa phale nānā varṇena bhāvayet nānā paśu gaṇaiḥ yuktam nānā pakṣi gaṇaiḥ yutam vaiṣṇave gāruḍam śastam śaive kīśa vṛṣam likhet śākte vyāghram tathā aiśe ca śarabham harim ālikhet śobhām pītena racayet upaśobhām ca pītakaiḥ bahis syāt veṣṭana trayam śukla pīta aruṇaiḥ kāryam maṇḍalam syāt manoramam sarva jñāna mayam śuddham dharma kāma artha dāyakam catur asram samam kṛtvā digbhyaḥ dvādaśadhā dvijāḥ pātayet tatra sūtrāṇi koṣṭhānām dṛśyate śatam catuścatvāriṃśat ādyam paścāt ṣaṭtriṃśat ambujam prakalpayet pīṭham paṅktyā ca eva atra vīthikām dvāra śobhe yathāpūrvam upaśobham ca dṛśyate avaśiṣṭaiḥ padaiḥ kuryāt sadbhiḥ tantrāṇi mantra vid bhavet pūrva ukta maṇḍale vidvas dharaṇī sadanam bahis madhye kalpalatā kāryā bahiṣkoṇeṣu sattamāḥ bhavet mahā pattram vajranābham bimbanābham sahasrakam gajāhvam ca gaja ākāram madhye tu samalaṅkṛtam bahis dvādaśabhiḥ sūryaiḥ sūryākrāntam prakīrtitam mahā śekharī tripuṭam ca eva śatapattram ca prakramāt cintāmaṇim kuṅkuma aṃśam khātam ca harivallabham pañca siṃhāsana stham ca pañca siṃhāsanam viduḥ tadvat vṛṣāsanam jñeyam śikhi rūpam śikhidhvajam nārasiṃham padmagarbham kapotāsyam tathā bhavet meru garbham ca nīlakaṇṭham nara ākṛtim tatra tu gajārūḍham śrī bimba nava sūtrakam aṣṭa asram aṣṭa koṇa ādyam bahis padma vanam kṛtam puṭitam sahasram padma veṣṭitam aṣṭa pattrāṇi vai merum sumerum tad viparyaye mahā mahā meru pṛṣṭham śata traya chadaiḥ vṛtam chidra vyaktim pravakṣyāmi yathā mānena bho dvijāḥ śata ardhakam mākāśam vasu saṃmitam śata viṃśa adhikam ca eva dalāni tad anantaram madhu śukla raktam ca aṣṭa vaṇaiḥ bimba uṣṭham paripūrayet śuklena paṅkajam tatra paścāt kuryāt triveṣṭanam sthaṇḍile kuśa haste ca pūrvavat veṣṭayet kramāt vasu pañca kalā pañcaviṃśakam tad na pattrakāt catvāriṃśat tatas paścā bhavet huklam śoṇam tathā pītam śyāma śuklaiḥ anantaram vilome dala saṃdhīni śākte śaive tu ṣaṭpuram veṣṭayet pañca varṇena śukla ādīni samantataḥ rakta pītaiḥ samāstīrya koṇān śuklena pūrayet maṇḍalam bimbarājasya aṣṭa uttara dalaiḥ vṛtam tri ṛtu pattram su vṛttam syāt vṛtta yuktam sa bilvakam catvāriṃśat dvayam ca eva gaganena samāvṛtam mahā śatam viṃśa adhika śatam dviśatam viṃśam uttamam veṣṭana aṃse ca tri śatam prakramāt atha vardhayet navaviṃśam kalpayet tu catur sūtrāṇi pātayet pītena reta puṭitā madhye śuklam vibhāvyate sarvāḥ rekhāḥ ca śuklena pauṣṭike pītam ādiśet sa śāntike na yoktavyam kāme raktam vinirdiśet aiśānyām ca uttare bhāge guroḥ pītam tu paṅkajam pūrvasyām diśi śukrasya paṅkajam śubhra varṇakam vāruṇe tu śanais kṛṣṇam nairṛtyām dhūmra varṇakam vāyavyām diśi saṃyojya paṅkajam vilikhet tatas bahis pañca rajaiḥ kāryam yuva durga vibhūṣitam pūrva paścima digbhāge śuklam syāt dvāra deśāt pañca abja maṇḍalam jñeyam catur svastika bhūṣitam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca na kuryāt dakṣiṇā hīnam māna hīnam na kārayet amānena hataḥ yajñaḥ tasmāt mānam praśasyate ācārya hotṛ brahmānaḥ vidhi jñaḥ sahakartṛkaḥ yasya yajñe pāpakaḥ ca jāti hīnaḥ praveśayet aśītibhiḥ varāṭaiḥ ca paṇaḥ iti abhidhīyate taiḥ tu ṣoḍaśabhiḥ jñeyam purāṇam saptabhiḥ tu taiḥ rājataiḥ ca aṣṭabhiḥ svarṇam yajña ādau dakṣiṇā smṛtā mahārāme dvi sauvarṇam kūpe svarṇa ardham eva ca tulasī āmalaka yāge suvarṇa ekam pracakṣate ca sauvarṇam lakṣe svarṇam catuṣṭayam prāsādasya samutsarge aṣṭādaśa suvarṇakāḥ taḍāge puṣkariṇyām ca ardha ardham kīrtitam mahādāne ca dīkṣāyām vṛṣotsarge ca sattamāḥ jīvataḥ ca vṛṣotsarge gayā śrāddhe tathā eva ca dampatiyoḥ ca vṛṣotsarge mānam ekam udāhṛtam rājñaḥ kara grahe ca eva dīkṣāyām dāna karmaṇi aśīti rattikam svarṇam śravaṇe bhāratasya ca graha yāge pratiṣṭhāyām suvarṇa śata rattikaḥ devānām brāhmaṇānām ca dānam yasya prakalpitam tasya eva deyam tat dānam sa aṅga upāṅgam sa dakṣiṇam nānā asya kiñcid dātavyam saṅga bhaṅgaḥ bhavet yatas tu kṛtvā tadā bhavet yajñeṣu home yat dravyam kāṣṭham ājya ādikam ca yat tad nāyakasya pūjāyām dravyam āhuḥ vinirmitam anādi devatā arcāyām pūjā snāna ādi karmaṇi pratyakṣam dakṣiṇām dadyāt yajña dāna vrata ādike adakṣiṇam na eva kāryam prakuryāt bhūri dakṣiṇam atas dattam purā dattam dātavyam ca eva samprati para sva udāra buddhīnām sā sā hi dakṣiṇā bhavet dattāni vidhivat puṃsām deva dānāni yāni hi dāsī dāsa go ādīni manasā yāni karhi cit ekasya aneka dānam ca dadet kaścid pṛthak pṛthak varaṇam ca kadā kuryāt tantre kuryāt ca dakṣiṇām ratnasya dakṣiṇā deyā kāñcanam samudāhṛtam bhūmeḥ bhūmiḥ dakṣiṇā syāt vastrasya vastra dakṣiṇā pānīyasya tu pānīyam vrīhīṇām vrīhi dakṣiṇā gajasya dakṣiṇā chāgaḥ hi aśvasya meṣaḥ īritaḥ paśūnām ca catuṣpādā devasya deva dakṣiṇā ācāryasya eva bhāga ekam yajamānaḥ pradāsyati bhāga ekam tad anantaram pātrāṇām ṛtvij ādīnām bhāga trayam udāhṛtam bhavet amūlyam varga mūlyam yat bhavet vai dakṣiṇa uttamā māna aśaktau tu yajñānām yat deyam yajña siddhaye devatā pustakam ratnam gāvaḥ dhānyam tilāḥ tathā nameru phala puṣpāṇi deyāni etāni sarvatas catur cakra aṃkitaḥ yaḥ tu sāṃdraḥ vṛttaḥ janārdanaḥ śveta liṅgam ratna liṅgam indranīla ādikam ca yat dakṣiṇa āvarta śaṅkham ca harivaṃśaḥ tathā khilaḥ bhaḥ nīla vṛṣabhaḥ somadhānyam tathā eva ca amūlyāni āhuḥ etāni dattvā ananta phalāni ca svarṇa pādaḥ bhavet mūlyam śālagrāmasya dakṣiṇā kṣudra liṅge svarṇa mūlyam pāda ardham śrīdhare pi ca tat tat tat iti uktam pāda ardham bāṇa liṅgake yathā pustaka mātreṇa svarṇa pāda ardham iṣyate yotiṣā īrdham suvarṇasya rajata ardham vṛṣe tathā harivaṃśe śloka śate svarṇam ekam prakīrtitam kapilāyām suvarṇa ardham dhenu mātre purāṇakam prāyaścitta vidhau jñeyam dhenu mātram purāṇakam purāṇa tritayam ca anye vīrya hīne dvayam bhavet kṛṣṇe vṛṣe ṣaṣ purāṇam śvete nava purāṇakam dvātriṃśat ca purāṇam syāt vṛṣe nīle tathā eva ca meroḥ praticakre ca dvādaśa svarṇa rattikāḥ mūlyam śrīphala mātre api purāṇatritayam bhavet etāni āhuḥ praśastāni mūla yoge param viduḥ iti śrī bhaviṣpe mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge mūlya kathane tṛtīyaḥ a dhyāyaḥ mūlya dāna varṇanam uvāca pūrṇapātram atho vakṣye yajñe sādhāraṇe api ca bhavet muṣṭiḥ muṣṭayoḥ oṣṭau tu kuñcikā yathā ekaika kuñci mānena kuryāt pātrāṇi vai sadā pātrāṇi ca pṛthakkṛtvā sthāpayet dvāra deśāt siddhānām khaḍgadhārāṇām pratyekasya dina kramāt kuṇḍānām kuḍmalānām ca vedanam yādṛśam śṛṇu mahā siṃhāsane pañca daśa pātre tad ardhakam sahasrāre meru pṛṣṭhe turya raupya vṛṣa adhikam mṛṣe gale ca vṛṣabham śeṣe raupya sahasrakam mahākuṇḍe tu dviguṇam vṛtte raupyam nivedayet yonikuṇḍe dadet dhenum aṣṭārdha svarṇa māṣakam tu tad ardham syāt yāge māṣa dvayam bhavet hasta mātram syāt svarṇa kṛṣṇa kalam bhavet iṣṭikā karaṇe ca eva pratyahnā syāt paṇa dvayam khaṇḍe daśavarāṭam syāt bṛ hanmāne tu kākiṇī taḍāge puṣkariṇyām ca khanane prathama aṅgake sapta hasta mite kuṇḍe niṣṭhe ābaddha mātrakam purāṇasya ca eka aṃśam vetanam parikīrtitam bṛhat kūpasya nirmāṇe pratyaham ca paṇa dvayam śaile jñeyam kāñcanasya rattikā gṛhakarmaṇi koṣṭhe jñeyam sārdha paṇam raṅga ādi racite paṇam vṛkṣāṇām ropaṇe dadyāt pratyahnā sārdha māṣakam setubandhe ca paṅkile ca paṇa dvayam ca kākiṇī tu tāmrasya dadyāt paṇa catuṣṭayam ghaṭane kāṃsya sīsānām paṇa trayam udāhṛtam atha vā dina saṃkhyānam paṇa ekam ca sa kākiṇi suvarṇasya paṇa eke tu purāṇam ratna kuṭṭime dina saṃkhyā paṇa dvaṃdvam ratnānām atha kuḍmalam maṇivedhe maṇau jñeyam kākiṇī parikīrtitā catur varāṭam adhikam sphāṭike maṇi vedhane kāṃsya tālasya nirmāṇe dhamane tu paṇa trayam lākṣā nirmāṇake kārye tad ardham api kīrtitam nirmāṇe syandanam daśa kākiṇī pidhāna vastra nirmāṇe tri paṇam parikīrtitam daśa kākiṇī ūrdhva adhas tad vyaye paṇya vetanam vaṃśājīvasya pratyahnā paṇasya ardhe sa kākiṇi śirasā tasya vapane vijñeyāḥ daśa kākiṇī sa śmaśru nakha māne tu pradadyāt kākiṇī dvayam nārīṇām atha saṃskāre nakha citra ādi rañjane turyakam dadyāt sīmantasya alake tathā pada citre tu sārdham syāt grīvāṇām guhya dhāraṇe dhānyānām ropaṇe ca eva dina ekasmin paṇa vetanam lavaṇe tu tathā deyā guvākānām ca ropaṇe daṇḍapattrasya saṃskāre maricānām tathā eva ca paṇa dvayam varāṭānām adhikam daśam eva tu paṇa trayam cakrapaṇe mahiṣāṇām paṇa adhikam narāṇām vāhane ca eva paṇa ekam daśa kākiṇī dāsīnām gardabhānām ca adhikam kākiṇī dvayāt sadyas prakṣālane api ardham dina ādau adhikam bhavet mṛttikānām samuddhāram kuddāle ca ikṣu pīḍane vetanam puṣpa saṃskāre sahasram daśa kākiṇī pākiṇī sraj nibaddhe ca dviguṇam kaṇṭhamālikā abaddhe dvi aṅgulam yāvat muṇḍamālā prakīrtitā hasta traye kaṇṭha mālāḥ ānābhi kamala avadhi pākiṇīka trayam ca eva nirmāṇe dvijasattamāḥ mālatyāḥ ca tulasyāḥ ca jāti yūthyoḥ ca sattamāḥ raupya māṣam snehe ca eva tu kākiṇī tad ardha aṅgula pramāṇena vastravartim viduḥ budhāḥ madhya aṅgulena dairghyam ca na nyūnam na adhikam bhavet pañcaviṃśatibhiḥ saṃkhyā tantubhiḥ dvijasattamāḥ pañca aṅgulena mānena kartavyaḥ su samāhitaḥ svarṇadhāre hataḥ rājā rajate sarva kāma daḥ tāmre ca āyus kṣaya karam āyase durgati pradaḥ dīpa ādhāram kāṃsya mayam tathā arīti mayasya ca daśa aṅga dhūpake mūlyam viṃśake tu paṇa trayam dvādaśaka aṅgule api ardha vartīm dhūpāya vartayet haste pañca pramāṇam ca vastraiḥ kuryāt ca vartikām pañcaviṃśatibhiḥ vā yaḥ saḥ mahāvartiḥ ucyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi kalaśānām vinirṇayam yasya arpite ca māṅgalye yātrā siddhiḥ ca jāyate sapta aṅgam kalaśe jñeyam pañca aṅgam atha vā punar mātreṇa saṃpūrṇe na sā siddhiḥ prajāyate atha vā akṣata puṣpeṣu devam āvāhya pūjayet ca sauvarṇāḥ rājatāḥ vā api tāmra ādyāḥ mṛd mayāḥ tathā bhaktāḥ kramaśas proktāḥ yathā vitta anusāratas abhedyāḥ suṣamāḥ plakṣāḥ sarve ādyāḥ su pūritāḥ niśchidrāḥ ṛjavaḥ ca eva secanāni eka karṣakaḥ triṃśa aṅgulam kuryāt kālāhe dviguṇam śatam mukham ca aṣṭa aṅgulam tasya dvi aṅgule ca vara arthite taijasaiḥ kārayet mānam mṛd maye mānam ucyate tad sthāpanam vakṣye yatra sannihitāḥ surāḥ yajñe sādhāraṇam vakṣye yat vidhānam yathāmatam svastika upari vinyāse saṃpūrṇasya ardha mānake turya sūtrāṇi matimān pañca pūrvāyatanāni ca mārjayet svastika ākāram turya mātram yathā bhavet svastikam jāyate tatra kalaśānām tathā āsanam syonā pṛthivī iti mantreṇa kuryāt bhūbhiḥ parigraham madhyama ānānikābhyām ca nyasyet pātāla sammukham bhagavant asya syāt gāyatrī devatā raviḥ hi ghram kalaśam mahyām sthāpayet kalaśam tatas tyaktvā kumbha agre udare api ca ca mantrasya ṛṣiḥ bhargaḥ udāhṛtaḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ ca uddiṣṭaḥ devatā viṣṇuḥ avyayaḥ pañcanadyā iti mantreṇa kṣipet gaṅgā jalam tatas devatā paramā triṣṭubh devatā soma bhāvitaḥ yāḥ phalinī iti mantreṇa pradadyāt sa phala akṣatam mantrasya ṛṣiḥ kamala saṃjñakaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ gaṇapatiḥ devatā parikīrtitā ca eva phalāni etāni varjayet hiraṇya garbha iti ṛcā pañcaratnāni nikṣipet bhavat ṛṣiḥ hiraṇyagarbhaḥ usya chandaḥ triṣṭubh udāhṛtam amṛtīkaraṇam kuryāt daiva śulbanam eva ca yojayet varuṇasya tvā iti ṛṣiḥ varuṇa antare yojayet śrīḥ ca te iti mantreṇa dadyāt puṣpam sa candanam pāṇḍāt iti ca mantreṇa dadyāt dūrvā akṣatam punar vrīhayaḥ ca iti mantreṇa pañca vrīhīn ca nikṣipet tilāḥ ca māṣāḥ mudgāḥ ca śyāmākāḥ śālayaḥ smṛtāḥ pañca dhānya gaṇaḥ proktaḥ sarva ariṣṭa niṣūdanaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge pañcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam uvāca atha māsa āśrayam karma kartum māsa nirūpaṇam cāndraḥ sauraḥ sāvanaḥ ca nākṣatraḥ ca tathā aparaḥ triṃśatā divasaiḥ māsaḥ sāvanaḥ parikīrtitaḥ nākṣatra māsaḥ aśvinī ādi revatī antaḥ hi viśrutaḥ rāśeḥ triṃśat bhāga kālaḥ kālaḥ tu ekasya bhāsvantaḥ ahorātram tu tat na evam saure api bhāga mānāt saure cāndre tu upagaṇau triṃśat bhāge tu adarśanāt sāvanāḥ divasāḥ grāhyāḥ ṛṣīṇām samaye gṛhe atibhāga vyavasthāyām prāyaścitta kriyāsu ca mantra upāsana kārye ca annasya prāśane śiśoḥ ca yajñeṣu yajñeṣu grāhyaḥ māsaḥ tu sāvanaḥ saura māsaḥ vivāha ādau yadā ādyaiḥ su pragṛhyate cāndraḥ tu pārvaṇe grāhyaḥ vārṣikeṣu aṣṭakāsu ca śrāddheṣu tithi kāryeṣu tithi ukteṣu vrateṣu ca nākṣatraḥ somapādīnām ārya bhāga vicāraṇe tad eva karagraha vidhau rājñām na ayam sarva jana ākṛtiḥ citrā nakṣatra yogena caitrī sā pūrṇimā smṛtā sa ca tithi ātmakaḥ māsaḥ cāndraḥ śravaṇa bhāskaraḥ cāndraḥ caitrī antikaḥ māsaḥ mukhyaḥ caitra ādi saṃjñakaḥ mukhyaḥ śukla ādi darśa antaḥ māsaḥ lākṣaṇikaḥ mataḥ caitra ādyāḥ cāndramāsāḥ ye dvādaśa api tu yogāt yatra na pūrṇimā yogaḥ māsaḥ saḥ syāt vināśakaḥ tathā ca māsa sāmānye yogena ayam bhavet kvacid yadi varṣa sahasra ante tad akṣeṇa eva pūrṇimā daṇḍa dvaye bhukta śeṣe na bhuñjīta kadācana atikramya aparām bhoktum tithim yatra ubhau api sa ca adhikaḥ yatas māsaḥ tatas syāt adhimāsakaḥ sama rātrim divam kṛtvā vaivasvata purī gatim rāśi antare sūryaḥ yāvat gacchati bhānumant ṣardhate tithayaḥ yāvat tulām yāti divā karaḥ tulā ādi rāśi ṣaṭke tu na vardhate kadācana svabhāvāt sama gatyā tu yatas saṃkramate raviḥ saṃcaya mānā tu ekaikā pratimāsam vivardhate sa cāndraḥ malinaḥ māsaḥ koṇa pādyaiḥ samīhitaḥ bhukta ucchiṣṭā tu tad māsāt a saṃspṛṣṭa divākaraḥ yadā saṃkramate laṃghya tadā jñeyaḥ malimlucaḥ sārdha varṣa dvaye pūrṇe patati evam niśākaraḥ parityaktāḥ ca yāvatyaḥ vyutkraminyaḥ ca yāḥ punar nirmamam malinam māsam pretānām ca hitāya ca atas preta kriyāḥ sarvāḥ kāryāḥ malimluce api ca tat idānīm pravakṣyāmi kathitam ca prasaṅgāt yat śrāddham preta sambandhi sarpiḍīkaraṇa avadhi tat kāryam viśi sapiṇḍanam tadā trayodaśe māsi kartavyam tat sapiṇḍanam māsikayā śrāddham ekam tasmin trayodaśe triṃśatā ghaṭikaiḥ śrāddham vardhate adya api saṃmitam upavāsa ādikam karma sīmantonnayanam tathā ārta varjam puṃsavanam putra ādi mukha darśanam malamāse api kurvīta nṛpāṇām abhiṣecanam ca mantra upāsām rahasyam ca mahā dānam su maṅgalam ca upagraham go ādīnām āśrama antara saṃkramam dīrgha mātrāsu na ijyam vai tīrtha yātrā avasecanam yajñam ca kāmikam vidvāḥ malamāse vivarjayet pādāstam ca mahāstam ca dvividham ca astamasya tu pṛthivyām eva pādāḥ tam bhavet dvādaśa vatsarān ūnapañcāśat adhikam divasānām śata dvayam pratīcyām uditaḥ kāvyaḥ dṛśyaḥ bhavati sarvadā tri ṛkṣe guruṇā yuktaḥ yāvat tiṣṭhati bhārgavaḥ mala māsa vat karmāṇi prāhuḥ tyājyāni sarvaśas ṛkṣa bhede tu eka rāśau samparke yadi vā anayoḥ guroḥ rāhoḥ api tathā tyajet vidvāḥ na saṃśayaḥ siṃhe rāśau sthite sūrye jīve ca astam upāgate heyāni yāni karmāṇi niṣiddhāni malimluce dvirāṣāḍhaḥ iti khyātaḥ gauṇe śabda vivartanāt māṣāḍhakīrtanam kāryam evam varṣa antare api ca māsāḍha dvaya saṃyukta pūrṇamāsī dvayam tathā yugma karkaṭayoḥ rāśyaḥ dvirāṣāḍhaḥ tadā bhavet bhavet gauṇaḥ dvirāṣāḍhaḥ rāśiḥ tatra eva saṃyute karkaṭe śayanam kuryāt āgamiṣyam paratrake durga utthānam tulāyām tu viṣṇuḥ nidrām jahāti asau iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca daivam vā paitṛkam karma kālam āśritya vartate tāni eva karmāṇi phalam yacchanti kurvatām kālaḥ tu guṇa bhāvena sarva kāla āśritā kriyā na kālena vinā kiñcid triṣu lokeṣu jāyate atas kālam pravakṣyāmi nimittam karmaṇām iha te api kālāḥ pakṣa māsa rāśi varṣa antare api ca tithi ādi kāla bhāveṣu niṣiddham nihitam hi tat kālabhāgaḥ niḥsahāyaḥ ye api syuḥ karma sādhanāḥ tithau pūrvāhṇa vyāpinyām kurvīta karma vaidikam ekoddiṣṭam tu madhyāhna vyāpinyām hi samācaret parāhṇa vyāpinīm prāpya tithim kuryāt tu pārvaṇam na tu pūrvāhṇa madhyāhna parāhṇeṣu yathocitam ekaḥ hi kālaḥ prātar tu vṛddhiśrāddha ādi sādhane na apekṣate sāhāyyam tad tithi ādi viṣuva ādiṣu devebhyaḥ brahmaṇā dattaḥ pūrvāhṇaḥ tithibhiḥ saha pitṛbhyaḥ hi aparāhṇaḥ tu pārvaṇam tu param vinā pūrvāhṇa mātra samprāptau tatas devān prapūjayet pūrvāhṇa sparśa mātre api tithi khaṇḍena ca arpayet kharvā darpā tathā hiṃsrā tithiḥ ca trividhā bhavet hiṃsrā tu kṣaya jā jñeyā kāla bhedena gṛhyate kharvā darpā pare grāhyā hiṃsrā grāhyā tu pūrvatas śuklapakṣe parā grāhyā kṛṣṇe pūrvā praśasyate yathā vā āste raviḥ bhāti ghaṭikāḥ daśa vā api vā sā tithiḥ tat ahorātram vyapadeśyā na ca itarā śukle vā yadi vā kṛṣṇe kharvā darpā tithiḥ ca yā yayā astam savitā yāti pitṛ kārye ca sā tithiḥ śrāddha kāla ādikam yatra tatra śrāddham vidhīyate amāvasyā amṛtasya eva pārvaṇam yatra kutracid śukla pakṣe ca kṛṣṇe ca yaḥ yogaḥ para pūrvayoḥ pūrvedyus vā paredyus vā trisaṃdhya vyāpinī tithiḥ sā pūjyā ca sva kṛtyeṣu pakṣayoḥ ubhayayoḥ api pūjyāḥ hi vyastam saṃtyajya pūrvam ca ekādaśī yugam dvitīyā vahninā yuktā caturthī pañcamī yutā etāḥ upoṣyāḥ tithayaḥ puṇyāḥ syuḥ dharma vedibhiḥ etad vyastāḥ tu puṇyāni hananti pūrva kṛtāni api bāṇena viddhā yā ṣaṣṭhā muni viddhā tathā aṣṭamā daśamī ekādaśī viddhā trayodaśyā caturdaśī amāvāsyā bhūta viddhā na upoṣyā muninā api ca hanti putra kalatrāṇi dhanāni samupoṣitā bhiddhāḥ ye na abhinindyāḥ syuḥ yuktāḥ tena abhinanditāḥ tām astām tu tithim prāpya yugmāni apūjyatām iyuḥ yugmāni ca divāyoge grāhyāni vyasta nindanam rātri yogam vinā api syāt ekādaśī ādikam vratam naktam jāgaraṇam ca eva śasyate ekādaśī upavāsam tu dvādaśī yogāt caret divāyoge tu saṃpūrṇām tyajet ubhaya pūrvāt rātri yoge tu saṃpūrṇā sa upāsyā ekādaśī sadā saptamī śukla pakṣe api pūjyā ṣaṣṭhyā samanvitā niśi tu syāt yadā ṣaṣṭhī saptamī navamī divā upoṣya kevalām ṣaṣṭhīm toṣayet bhāskaram naraḥ evam trayodaśīm kṛṣṇām vidhi prāptām vinā dvijāḥ upoṣya pārvatīnātham toṣayet yaḥ ca kevalam divā trayodaśī yuktā kṛṣṇa upoṣyā caturdaśī pareṇa api caturdaśyāḥ na tu kuryāt amātithau trisaṃdhya vyāpinī prāpya yadi kuryāt upauṣaṇam pāraṇam tu sinīvālyām caturdaśyām upoṣayet caturdaśīm atikramya sinīvālyām tu pāraṇāt bratāni tasya naśyanti prākṛtāni caturdaśīm saptamī lalitā bhādre śakta utthānam ca vāruṇī pūjyāḥ ca etāḥ parāḥ kuryāt trisaṃdhya vyāpinīṣu api sa ṛkṣā ṛkṣa yoge tu ṛkṣa abhāve parā yutā ṛkṣa abhāve parā grāhyā trisaṃdhya vyāpinīṣu api mās ca ādya pāde tu praśastā śakra pūjane abhāve ca uttarāṣāḍhā dhaniṣṭhā ca viśiṣyate daṇḍa ardham daṇḍam ekam vā tad ardham palam eva vā udaye saṃyutā grāhyā sā tithiḥ ca uttamā bhavet trisaṃdhya vyāpinīm hitvā pūjyā śukla aṣṭamī parā śukla ekādaśī amāvāsyā saṃkrāntau śrāddha vāsare nara aśva go gaja ādīnām vāhanāt pātakī bhavet kartuḥ go mahiṣa ādīnām gardabha uṣṭra kharasya ca na vāhayet dāsaiḥ dāsī vāhanena asti dūṣaṇam grāma antare na doṣaḥ syāt divi nadī antare api ca tatra go mahiṣa ādīnām vāhane na asti dūṣaṇam kuryāt ambu ghaṭa śrāddham na kāla niyamam kvacid na ca anna niyamam kuryāt aśma pātram ca varjayet na yojayet mṛd mayam ca śūdrāṇām mṛd maye vidhiḥ nivedayet ca māsa ante mṛd mayam vṛkṣa mūlake parvaśrāddhe daivalakam tathā raṇḍāśramam tyajet mātā pitṛ parityāgī taila havya ādi vikrayī catvāriṃśat utsavānām sa aṣṭānām ca caret yadi striyāḥ vimucyate kaścid sa tu raṇḍāśramī mataḥ aṣṭacatvāriṃśat abdam vayaḥ yāvat na pūryate putra bhāryā viyuktasya na asti yajña adhikāri tā yām tithim samanuprāpya samudeti divākaraḥ snāna adhyayana dāneṣu sā tithiḥ sakalā smṛtā yayā astam savitā yāti kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu sā tithiḥ pitṝṇām sakalā jñeyā snāna dāna ādi karmasu saptamī śuklapakṣe yā yāvat icchet ca khaṇḍitā ādya bhāge raveḥ ṣaṣṭhyām para ādau yā aṣṭamī yutā yadi akhaṇḍā bhavet sā eva tadā jñeyā bhava ātmakā māgha māsena sā api evam pūrveṇa ravi toṣiṇī manvantarā pareṇa eva snāna pāna ādi karmasu iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tithīnām pravarā yasmāt brahmanā samudāhṛtā yadi kārttika āśvayujoḥ caitre māghe ca api viśeṣataḥ snānam dānam daśaguṇam śiva viṣṇuvoḥ ca pūjanam agnim iṣṭvā ca kṛtvā ca pratipadyām iti smṛtam haviṣā sarva dhānyāni prāpnuyāt īpsitam dhanam bṛhaspatau dvitīyāyām śuklāyām vidhi pūjanam kṛtvā naktam samaśnīyāt labhate bhūtim īpsitām dvitīyā yā tu vipra indau tām upoṣya harim yajet yām upoṣya na vaidhavyam prayāti strī na saṃśayaḥ amūlya śayanam māsam dampatī pratipūjayet ca vaiśākhe śukla pakṣe tu tṛtīyāyām tathā eva ca svāti yukta tṛtīyāyām vaiśākhe tu viśeṣataḥ māghe tu rohiṇī yuktāḥ vṛṣe ca āśvayuje tathā tasyām yat dīyate kiṃcid tat akṣayam udāhṛtam viśeṣataḥ haviṣya annam modaka ādi samāyutam toya dānam viśeṣeṇa praśaṃsanti manīṣiṇaḥ budha śravaṇa saṃyuktā tṛtīyā yadi labhyate tasyām snāna upavāsa ādyam akṣayam parikīrtitam śivā śāntā sukhā ca eva caturthā trividhā smṛtā sā api bhādrapade śuklā śiva loke su pūjitā tasyām snānam tapaḥ dānam upavāsaḥ japaḥ tathā bhavet sahasra guṇitam śrāddham bhavati ca akṣayam pūjām māsi pañcamyām śukla pakṣe viśeṣataḥ snāpayet nava nāgān ca gandha toyaiḥ sugandhibhiḥ teṣām kule prayacchanti abhayam prāṇa rakṣaṇam supte janārdane kṛṣṇa pañcamyām bhavana aṅgaṇe pūjayet manasā devīm vāmām snuhī iti saṃśrayām pūjayitvā naraḥ devīm na sarpa bhayam āpnu yāt yā iyam bhādrapade ṣaṣṭhī ṣaṣṭhī ca dvijasattama snāna dāna ādikam tasyām sarvam akṣayam ucyate tasyām phala aśanaḥ viprāḥ viśeṣāt māgha kārttike śuddhe pakṣe ca saptamyām yadā saṃkramate raviḥ mahājayā tadā syāt vai saptamā bhāskarapriyā aparājitā tu bhādrasya mahāpātaka nāśinī śuklā vā yadi vā kṛṣṇā ṣaṣṭhī vā saptamī tu vā ravi vāreṇa saṃyuktā tithiḥ puṇyatamā smṛtā āśvinasya sita aṣṭamyām aṣṭādaśa bhujām yajet ha tat tat tat tat tat tatra āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi śukla aṣṭamyām ca caṇḍikām prātar snātvā arcayet bhaktyā rātrau saṃsnāpayet dvijāḥ caitra māsi sita aṣṭamyām aśoka kusumaiḥ dvijāḥ arcayet mṛd mayām devīm aśoka artham ca sarvadā hiṇī sahitā aṣṭama muhūrte vā rohiṇī sahitā aṣṭamī śrāvaṇe māsi siṃhārke kvacid sā api ca śasyate phalam atas daśaguṇam proktam kṛtvā etat phalam āpnuyāta bhavati na api nakṣatra doṣaḥ asti vāra doṣaḥ na gaṇyate tri kālam pūjayet devam divā rātrau viśeṣataḥ ardharātre viśeṣeṇa puṣpaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ api rātri sparśe yadi param rajanyām api ca aṣṭamī saptamī sārdha yāmam ca rohiṇī vā na saṃspṛśet prāk ārambham prakurvīta adhimātra adhike vratī yatra tatra upavāsī syāt yāma aṣṭaka vratam caret yāma ardham tad param yāme pāraṇam vicaret vratī tad pare ca anna janyam vā na kuryāt pāraṇam gṛhī divā aṣṭamyām muhūrte vā prājāpatyena saṃyutam tathā api ca divākṛtyam samāpya ca vratam caret muhūrta aṃte ca māsa aṃte aṣṭamyām api rohiṇī upavāse ca yaḥ doṣaḥ pūjā homaḥ praśasyate navamyām ca sadā pūjyāḥ pratimāse ayutam dvijāḥ kārtikasya tu māsasya daśamī śuklapakṣikā tasyām yukta aśanāḥ viprāḥ brahma lokam avāpnuyuḥ daśamī jyeṣṭha māsasya sā ced daśa harā smṛtā mahā puṇyā kārttike vijayā smṛtā ekādaśī vrata parā sarva pāpa praṇāśinī sarva pāpa vinirmuktāḥ yathā kurvanti mānavāḥ ekādaśyām upoṣya atha dvādaśyām pāraṇam caret dvādaśa dvādaśīḥ hanti tasmāt tathā ācaret budhaḥ pūrvedyus ekādaśī pūrṇā parehani ca vardhate kuryāt ekādaśī dvādaśī tu tadā upoṣyā parā tithiḥ yadā tu pāraṇā yogyā dvādaśī na upatiṣṭhate tadā pūrvā eva saṃgrāhyā tyājyā vṛddhā pare ahani ekādaśī kalā yuktā sakalā dvādaśī yadi tatra kratu samam puṇyam trayodaśyām tu pāraṇam ekādaśī dvādaśī ca pare ahani na labhyate na upoṣyā sā mahā doṣā putra pautra dhana kṣayāt ekādaśī daśa āviddhā dvādaśyām liptikā yadā dvādaśī pāraṇā yogyā vardhate ca apare ahani tadā dina dvaye tyājyā pāraṇam ca niyogāt ṣoḍaśī grahaṇam dṛṣṭvā dvādaśī lupta pāraṇā caṇḍa atithau vratam ca eva hanti puṇyam purā kṛtam trayodaśyām yat vihitam pāraṇam na tu puṇya dam gṛhāśramī na kuryāt vā daśamī dvādaśī kṣayāt tathā api saṃparityajya dvādaśyām samupāvaset vajra ālokana mātram tu daśamī saṃviśet yadi ekādaśī na bhoktavyā parā hi ekādaśī tadā tadā ced daśamī viddhā samupoṣyā na dūṣaṇam dvādaśyām upavāsam tu yaḥ karoti nara uttamaḥ saḥ yāti paramam sthānam yatra viṣṇuḥ anāmayaḥ upoṣya daśamī mitrām mohāt ekādaśīm naraḥ ravi vāre śukra vāre saṃkrāntau tu dinakṣaye upavāsam prakurvīta pāraṇam tu vivarjayet śuklām vā yadi vā kṛṣṇām pūrva saṃkalpitām api ekādaśīm sadā kuryāt na vai kṛṣṇa ittarām kvacid naktena vartayet kṛṣṇām iti śāstra viniścayaḥ māse ca ekādaśī yatra labhyate śukla pakṣake tatra kuryāt kṛṣṇa pakṣe parā tithiḥ na gṛhyate mās dvādaśī śuklā cāndrabhadre yadā harau tatra upoṣya hṛṣīkeśam pūjayet vidhivat naraḥ śrāvaṇe ca āśvine ca eva labhyate dvādaśī dine puṣyeṇa drādaśī yuktā phālgune vijayā smṛtā ced parityājyā tu bhavet yā bhādre vijayā proktā śravaṇena samāyutā ekādaśyām uttaratas dvādaśī ca divā anvitā niśipūrṇā dvādaśī ca śravaṇena api saṃyutā saphalā dvādaśī jñeyā upoṣya eṣā mahā phalā dvādaśyām viṣṇu viddhāyām vāsudevam prapūjayet tu vratam kuryāt bahu duḥkham samācareta dvādaśī kāma viddhā ced manyate na api upoṣaṇam hanyāt purā kṛtam puṇyam trayodaśyām upoṣaṇam prahare prahare snānam śarvaryām ca vidhīyate pūjanam ca agni kāryam ca ṣaṭsu kāryam vratī caret ekādaśīm dvādaśīm ca prāpnoti śravaṇe yadi ekādaśyām upoṣya atha dvādaśyām api upāvaset pāraṇam tu trayodaśyām dvādaśī ced na labhyate pāraṇam yadā tu pāraṇā yogyā labhyate dvādaśī tadā tasyām na atikramaḥ yuktaḥ tad abhāve trayodaśī ekādaśī dvādaśī ca śravaṇa ṛkṣeṇa saṃyutā daśamyām saṃyataḥ bhūtvā prātar ekādaśī dine ha kṛtvā tu saṃgame snānam prahare prahare dvijāḥ anena vidhinā kṛtvā vijayāyām vrata uttamam sarva pāpam kṣayam nītvā viṣṇu loke vaset naraḥ catur yugānām divyānām yāvat syāt viṣṇu rūpadhṛka tretāyām daśa janmāni madhyadeśeṣu bho dvijāḥ tatas ca bhārate varṣe veda vedāṃta sāra vid jāyate daśa janmāni tretāyām brāhmaṇa uttamaḥ bhādre māsi site pakṣe dvādaśyām pṛthivīpatim śatrum utthāpayet prāhṇe śubha lagne śubha kṣaṇe śalyaśālmalikasya api saptaparṇīyakasya ca eṣām anyatamam vṛkṣam campakasya arjunasya vā bṛhat kadamba vṛkṣasya dvicatvāriṃśat aṅgulaiḥ dvātriṃśat aṅgulaiḥ vā api māna dvayam atha api vā tri vyāyāmam ca prathamam dvāviṃśa hastam eva vā hastaḥ ṣoḍaśa vārasya gṛhasthasya viśiṣyate aṣṭa hastam tu vaiśyasya śūdrasya pañca hastakam rakta vastra paricchannām puṣpa mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtām mañca sthām kārayet pūjām bhaktyā ca su dṛḍhaḥ naraḥ kāka ādīn na spṛśet jātu vaira pakṣe viśeṣataḥ patākāyāḥ nipāte tu rāṣṭra
