hānim samādiśet patāke nissṛte bhagne mahiṣāṇām vināśanam sthūṇā pāte ca bhagne vā ca aśva hānim samādiśet ca ca juhuyāt ha ādityasya adbhutam idam dvija pāte tu bho dvijāḥ yapota pāte śukrasya kāka ādau bhaumam ādiśet bhūkampe jāyate viṣṭam guroḥ adbhutam ādiśet tasmin kīṭa viddhe kṛte viprāḥ candrasya adbhutam ādiśet mad śivāḥ ruvanti cāndrasya vānaraḥ vā spṛśet kvacid tu te dvijāḥ trayodaśīm sitām prāpya puṣpaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ api caitre māsi sita aṣṭamyām śanau śatabhiṣā yadi sā iyam mahāvāruṇī iti khyātā kṛṣṇa trayodaśī asyām snānam ca dānam ca śrāddham vā akṣayam ucyate madhu māse site pakṣe dambhabhañjī caturdaśī tasyām madana mūle ca akṣaram kāmam arcayet sa yāti paramam sthānam madanasya prabhāvāt anantasya vratam vakṣye sarva pāpa praṇāśanam dvādaśyām pūjite śakre dhvajake vāstu yaṣṭiṣu maya anantam vāri dhānya anvitam tathā yava godhūma śālīnām cūrṇaiḥ na ekatamasya ca kṛtvā pūpa āhvayam tasmai dadyāt ekam śruta īkṣitam caturdaśa sūtra mayam sūtram kārpāsam eva ca atas preta caturdaśyām bhojayitvā tapodhanān tatas preta kathām śrutvā śākaiḥ naktam samācaret caturdaśam dvādaśam vā saptamam vā api pañcamam māna mātra ādikam kṛtvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate māghe māsi vaṭāpāyaḥ kasya pāpam punīmahe snātvā tatra caturdaśyām samaye tārakāmaye saṃbhavet phālgune māsi yā ca kṛṣṇā caturdaśī mahārātriḥ iti khyātā sā jagat sarva kāma dā tithi yoge ca śarvaryām saṃpūrṇe vratam ācaret mad viddhā sā ca pūjyā rātri yoge caret vratī atha vakṣyāmi caitra ādi māse tu pūrṇimā yathā mahācaitrī iti sā jñeyā pūrṇimā kṣaya puṇya dā caret mahāvaiśākhika ādyāḥ tu pūrṇimāḥ dvādaśa smṛtāḥ mahājyaiṣṭhī viśeṣaḥ ayam prājāpatye yathā raviḥ iti vinā api guruṇā candraḥ kṛttikā pūrṇimā tathā tathā mahākārttikī sā tithiḥ puṇyatamā bhavet rohiṇyām tu sthitaḥ candraḥ paurṇamāsyām tu kārttike citrā vā yadi vā pūrṇā yadā syāt pūrṇimā atithiḥ mahācaitrī tathā api syāt aśvamedha phala pradā raviṇā kṛttikā yogāt ravi vāre ca pūrṇimā mahācaitrī tathā api syāt dattasya akṣaya kārakā sarvam akṣaya tām yāti phalam ca eva āśvamedhikam pitaraḥ tarpitāḥ yānti vaiṣṇavam lokam akṣayam bharaṇyām kārttike māsi yadi syāt pūrṇimā tithiḥ tu śālagrāme mahācaitrī kṛta puṇyā mahātithiḥ tu śṛṃkhale mahāśrāvaṇī kedāre mahā puṇyatamā matā mahābhādrī badaryām ca syāt naraḥ tathā mahatī mārgaśīrṣe syāt ayodhyāyām tathā uttare mahāpauṣī puṇyatamā mahāmāghī prayāgāt mahāphālgunī naimiṣe ca nirdiṣṭāḥ syuḥ mahā phalāḥ atra sma vihitam karma śubham vā yadi vā aśubham māsvine paurṇamāsī tu kaumudī iti prakīrtitā asyām candra udaye lakṣmīm pūjayet vidhivat naraḥ yaḥ śrāddham prabhāte paitṛkam dvijaḥ indu kṣaye māsi māsi prāyaścittīyate tu saḥ candra āśvine tu kṛṣṇāyām pañcadaśyām yathāvidhi kṛtvā snāna ādikam karma sa upavāsaḥ dinam nayet pradoṣa samaye lakṣmīm pūjayitvā yathāvidhi dīpavṛkṣān yathā vṛkṣān lakṣmī prītaye samutsṛjet nadī tīre girau goṣṭhe śmaśāne vṛkṣa mūlāt dvis bhojanam amāvāsyām na kartavyam kadācana śarvaryām ca viśeṣeṇa māgha phālgunayoḥ naraiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca vakṣye pravara saṃtānam yathākramam iti dvijāḥ yat vinā vyatyayaḥ yasmāt tasmāt śāstra anusārāt pravara trayam kāśyapasya kāśyapa āśā vanaiḥ dhruvam mokunī āṅgirasa bhāsyāt jāmadagnya āplavāyanam māṇḍilya asita daivalāḥ pravara trayam eva ca parāśarasya ca tathā svayam śāmbavaśiṣṭhakam hi artha kṣīra mitrāvaruṇam pañcamam parikīrtitam autathyasya ca vāśiṣṭham aindre cakram ca krauñcāyanam tathā autathya iti samākhyātam māhiṣyam cyavanam tathā urukaṇṭa trayam vidyāt kauśikasya trayam tathā yadgālaḥ devarāj khyātaḥ kuśika ādyāḥ ca bho dvijāḥ ghṛtakauśikasya kuśikāḥ viśvāmitra aghamarṣaṇam caṇḍakauśikasya ca tathā devarāj devarātakam taruṃka śākaṭāyanaḥ svayam eva pravara trayam bhrama dvayam jaimineḥ ca svayam vāśiṣṭham eva ca śaṅkha māṃgirasa cyavanam śaṅkha bhasya trayam matam pāṭhīne eke eva tu sattamāḥ kṛṣṇājinasya kṛṣṇājinam viśvāmitrasya jaiminam ha kātyāyanasya kātyāyana gārgyāyaṇa trayam tathā vātsyāyana iti vikhyātam kuśikasya ca pañcamam amum ca viśvāmitram ca jāmadagnya āplavāyanam gārgyasya tathā aṅgirasaḥ eva ca vaśiṣṭhasya ca vāsiṣṭham ca tathā aṅgirasaḥ eva ca ye na uktāḥ ye api avijñātāḥ te proktāḥ kāśyapāt jagant adhyāyaḥ cha varṇanam uvāca vāstuyāgam atho vakṣye bali maṇḍala pūrvakam paṅkura arpaṇakam kṛtvā madhye kuryāt ca maṇḍalam tri hastā piṇḍikā kāryā catur asrā udañc plavā madhye saṃmārjayet vidvāḥ pādān nava yathākramāt yad koṇe catuṣpadam jñeyam dikṣu tri padakam kramāt catuṣpadam sthāpyam catuṣkoṇe vibhāvayet catuṣkoṇam bahis kuryāt koṇe ca api catuṣṭayam dvātriṃśat ca bhavet bāhye ca atas ca api trayodaśa catvāriṃśat pañca yutāḥ militvā vāstu devatāḥ śikhī ca eva atha parjanyaḥ jayantaḥ kuliśa āyudhaḥ sūryaḥ satyaḥ vṛṣaḥ ca eva ākāśam vāyuḥ eva ca pūṣā ca vitathaḥ ca eva guhānyaḥ ca yamaḥ tathā gandharvaḥ mṛgarājaḥ tu mṛgāḥ pitṛ gaṇāḥ tathā asuraḥ paśu pāśau ca rogaḥ hi mokṣaḥ eva ca bahis dvādaśa iti etāni īśāna ādīni yathākramam īśāna ādi catuṣkoṇam saṃsthitān pūjayet budhaḥ mitraḥ atha rājayakṣmā ca saptamaḥ pṛthivīdharaḥ tu āpavatsaḥ tu paridhau brahmaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ pūrva ādiṣu tathā pūjyā gandha puṣpaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ militvā ūnapañcāśat uttamāḥ vāstudevatāḥ na anyatra yojayet viprāḥ prāsāde ca viśeṣataḥ bahis koṇe carakī ādi carakam ca vidārikām pūtanām ca tatas paścāt vāyavye pāpa rākṣasīm svaiḥ svaiḥ mantraiḥ ca gandha ādyaiḥ pūjayet kusuma ādinā yathā uktena balim dadyāt pāyasa annena vā punar deva varṇān atho vakṣye yathāvat anuvarṇitāḥ pītaḥ śuklaḥ ca dharmaḥ ca pūṣā raktaḥ prakīrtitaḥ śyāmaḥ śukraḥ ca kṛṣṇaḥ ca pītaḥ śuklaḥ yathākramam pītaḥ bhṛṅgaḥ punar śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śuklaḥ tathā eva ca raktaḥ śuklaḥ ca śoṇaḥ ca kṛṣṇa raktaḥ tathā eva ca dhūmra pītaḥ rakta pītaḥ śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ ca śyāmakaḥ rakta varṇena dvātriṃśat daśa varṇāḥ prakīrtitāḥ śukla śoṇam punar śvetam sindūra ābham prakīrtitam pāṇḍura kuṅkuma ābham ca raktam jñeyam ca pītakam śukla pītam ca śvetam ca gauram ca iti aṣṭa varṇakam pītam raktam ca śyāmam ca gauram ca iti catuṣṭayam dharaṇīmadanam vādye śambhu varṇa ādi prakramāt ūnapañcāśatī sarvam ca vāstukarmaṇi catvāriṃśat dvāra yutam gṛha devakule api ca mahākūpe tathā śvetaḥ anyatra api praśasyate su lipte ca śucau deśe sārdha hasta pramāṇāt daśa pūrva āyatāḥ rekhāḥ daśa ca eva uttara āyatāḥ ekādaśī padam kuryāt rekhābhiḥ padakena tu pada sthān pūjayet devān triṃśat pañcādaśa eva tu dvātriṃśat bāhyatas pūjyāḥ pūjya āgāre trayodaśa madhye nava pade brahmā tasya api aṣṭau samīpa gāḥ catur dikṣu ṣaṣ padam tu tri padam tu catuṣpadam pada ekam tu catuṣkoṇe eṣa vāstu vinirṇayaḥ carakya ādi tatas hitvā catvāriṃśat ca pañcakam aparam maṇḍalam vakṣye yathāvat anupūrvaśas dvi catur koṣṭhakaiḥ dikṣu yajeta aryamaṇam tatas sāvitram savitāram ca śakram indram jayam punar rudram rudra jayam ca eva vāyum jṛmbhakam eva ca ca medhāvī vidārī pūtanā tathā tad kramāt īśāna paryantām jayantaḥ śakra bhāskarau ca diśi prāñci avasthitāḥ agniḥ pūṣā ca vitadhaḥ yamaḥ ca gṛharakṣakaḥ dharvaḥ bhṛṅgarājaḥ ca mṛgaḥ dakṣiṇam āśritāḥ nirṛtiḥ dauvārikaḥ ca sugrīva varuṇau tatas bhuja danta svarau śoṣa rogau pratyañc diśi sthitāḥ prāṇa vāyuḥ ca nāgaḥ ca somaḥ bhallāṭaḥ eva ca militvā ca tripañcāśatī tebhyaḥ pūrve balim haret piṇyākaiḥ paramānnaiḥ vā pūrva uktaiḥ vā yathā kramāt śveta aśva vāhanam divyam kirīṭaiḥ svaiḥ vibhūṣitam ākṛṣṇena iti mantrasya svarṇe ṛṣi jagatī chandaḥ savitṛ aryama prītaye viniyogaḥ mantrasya kardamaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ kamalā devatā vivasvat prītaye viniyogaḥ trinetram tribhujam ca eva śveta ambara dharam śubham mantrasya jayantaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ śaṃkaraḥ devatā mitra prītaye viniyogaḥ prītam mahīdharam dhyāyet vṛṣabha upari saṃsthim sāvitrīm śveta varṇām ca sarva lakṣaṇa saṃyutām dvi bhujām pīta vastrām ca śveta siṃhāsane sthitām rakta ambara dharām raktām rakta mālā upaśobhitām tat varṣam iti mantrasya gautamaḥ ṛṣiḥ virāj chandaḥ sūryaḥ devatā savitṛ prītaye viniyogaḥ bhakram dhyāyet pīta varṇam śukla kairāvata sthitam sarva devaiḥ stūyamānam dvi bhujam pīta vāsasam rudram dhyāyet śveta varṇam vṛṣabha ārūḍha vigraham nāga yajñopavītam ca sarva lakṣaṇa saṃyutam rakta śyāma ambara dharam dvi bhujam rakta vāsasam marīciḥ iti mantrasya marīciḥ ṛṣiḥ paṅkti chandaḥ vāyuḥ devatā apām prītaye viniyogaḥ āpa vatsam pīta varṇam meṣa ārūḍham catur bhujam padma śaṅkha dharam vāme vara abhaya karam param koṇa sūtrasya ubhayatas śveta koṣṭha dvaye punar śarvam dhyāyet rakta varṇam vṛṣabha upari saṃsthitam mālā svāhā iti mantrasya bhārgavaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ mahādevaḥ devatā śarva prītaye viniyogaḥ dhyāyet nānā ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyam kuṇḍala ādyaiḥ alaṃkṛtam vātaḥ vāra iti mantrasya kāśyapaḥ ṛṣiḥ anuṣṭubh chandaḥ vāyuḥ devatā aryama prītaye viniyogaḥ dhyāyet ca jambhakam śvetam dvi bhujam kuṭila ānanam devasya ha iti mantrasya paṅktiḥ chandaḥ śacī devatā pilapiccha prītaye viniyogaḥ tu cāru vadanām bhavyām guñjā hāra upaśobhitām śyāmām vidārikām dhyāyet tri netrām ca catur bhujām nānā gaṇa yutām devīm paṅkaja dvaya dhāriṇīm mantrasya varuṇaḥ ṛṣiḥ nṛsiṃhaḥ devatā vidārikā prītaye viniyogaḥ raktām ca pūtanām dhyāyet paṅkaja sthām su śobhanām sarva ābharaṇa saṃpannām sarva alaṃkāra śobhitām mayi gṛhṇāmi iti mantrasya vivasvant ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ devatā pūtanā prītaye viniyogaḥ pūrva ādi dikṣu sarvāsu sārdha ādi anta padeṣu ca īśānam jaṭilam śvetam śūla hastam mahā bhujam trinetram vṛṣabha ārūḍham upaśobhitam mantrasya vāmadevaḥ ṛṣiḥ bṛhatī chandaḥ dharaṇīdharaḥ devatā īśāna prītaye viniyogaḥ dakṣiṇe paraśum dhyāyet oṃkāram ca tathā apare jayantam śvetam śveta vṛṣabha ārūḍham dhyātvā māna stoka iti mantrasya śakti ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ śaṃkaraḥ devatā jayanta prītaye viniyogaḥ śuklam pītam dvi bhujam airāvata stham vajradharam dhyātvā mūlabījena sthāpayet bhāskaram rakta dvi bhujam rakta aśva stham dhyātvā māyābījena pūjayet satyam ca dvi bhujam śvetam trinetram pīta vāsasam manda kunda bījena pūjayet vṛṣam pītam vṛṣabha ārūḍham ākāśa bījena pūjayet ṛkṣam nīlam catur bhujam mahiṣa ārūḍham mantrasya hotā yakṣaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ śaṃkaraḥ devatā ṛkṣa prītaye viniyogaḥ agnim raktam saptajihvam rakta vāsasam piṅga akṣam dhyātvā agni dūtam iti mantrasya bharadvājaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ śaṃkaraḥ devatā agni prītaye vini yogaḥ vitatham raktam aja vāhanam dvi bhujam dhyātvā gāyatryā pūjayet gāyatryāḥ viśvāmitraḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ savitā devatā vitatha prītaye viniyogaḥ yamam kṛṣṇa mahiṣa ārūḍham daṇḍa hastam dhyāyet pūjayet bhṛṅgarājam rakta siṃhāsana ārūḍham divya yajña upavītinam dhyāyet hotā yaskā iti mantrasya bhārgavaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ yaśaḥ devatā bhṛṅgarāja prītaye viniyogaḥ mṛgam pītam mṛga ārūḍham pīta vāsasam dhyātvā nairṛta ardha padeṣu ca nirṛtim pītam śvetam padmāsana stham dhyātvā paṃktiḥ chandaḥ savitā devatā nirṛti prītaye viniyogaḥ nairṛta ardha padeṣu ca dauvārikam śveta śarabha ārūḍham trinetram sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitam dhyātvā śyāmam sugrīvam kṛṣṇa meṣa ārūḍham pīta vāsasam dhyātvā puṣpadantam pītam meṣa ārūḍham pītavāsasam dhyātvā asuram kṛṣṇam kṛṣṇa mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtam kṛtvā mantrasya hiraṇya varṇaḥ ṛṣiḥ jagatī chandaḥ savitā devatā asura prītaye viniyogaḥ asuram kṛṣṇam nāga hāra anvitam padmāsana stham dhyātvā rogam kṛṣṇam nīla indīvara dharam śveta vṛṣabha ārūḍham dhyātvā namaḥ te rudraḥ iti mantrasya nāradaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ śrīḥ devatā roga prītaye viniyogaḥ pūjayet vāyum dhūmra varṇam dhvaja hastam mṛga ārūḍham dhyātvā śvetam somam śveta varṇa āsana stham dhyātvā bhadrabījena pūjayet raktam bhallāṭam pīta vāsasam dhyātvā vahnibījena pūjayet pīta vāsasam aja vāhanam hāra keyūra anvitam vāyubījena mandara ādyaiḥ pūjayet raktām ditim nāga hāra anvitām rakta padmāsana sthām dhyātvā tvā iti mantrasya bhārgavaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ pṛthivī devatā diti prītaye viniyogaḥ aditim pīta varṇām siṃha ārūḍhām pīta ambara dharām dhyātvā evam yathā vidhāya atha homam kuryāt yathāvidhi homa ante dakṣiṇām dadyāt kāñcanam hema saṃyutam taḍāga yāga pakṣe tu suvarṇam ca ardham eva vā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ pūjā krama varṇanam uvāca atha pūjā kramam vakṣye purāṇa smṛti coditam nadī tīre nemi prānte daśa dvādaśa saṃkhyayā maṇḍalam racayet viprāḥ caruka dvaya saṃyutam uttara āśe dakṣiṇe ca aratni hasta antare api ca tri mekhalām hasta mātrām guṇa vedi samanvitām mūle sārdham ca śuklām ca mekhalām tu tathā eva ca upari caret śrāddha artham na eva saṃkalpet tathā vai devadarśane gayā śrāddha arthakam ca aṣṭa tīrtha śrāddha artham eva ca yadā aiśānyām kalaśe devam pūjayet gaṇanāyakam madhye kuṇḍe mahān ca eva viṣṇu devam digīśvarān brahmānam ca agnikuṇḍe tu svaiḥ svaiḥ mantraiḥ prapūjayet prāṇāyāmam vidhāya atha bhūtaśuddhim samācaret dhyāyet vā aṭavī īśa puruṣam sarva lakṣaṇa saṃyutam mahā bhujam śāntam kuṇḍala ādyaiḥ alaṃkṛtam pustakam ca akṣamālām ca vara abhaya karam param pitṛ vaiśvānara upetam kuṭila bhrūpa śobhitam mūrdhani agnim samāviśya mukhe vāyuḥ samāhitaḥ aṣṭavaneṣṭitau pṛthvīdharoḥ yamā ca eva tathā aṣṭavaneṣṭitau aparām saṃdhyām yajet ca eva yathāvidhi tu dakṣiṇe tadvat virathaḥ ca maharkṣakaḥ jaṅghayoḥ bhṛṅga sugrīvau sphicoḥ dauvārikaḥ gaṇaḥ evam dhyātvā nyaset puṣpam some na evam viciṃtayet mandaram dīrgha yuktena ṣaṣ aṅgāni samācaret tāvat vīryam tatas kṛtvā praṇavam brahmaṇā iti ca vāstu īśāya vidmaha iti tat naḥ viṣṇuḥ pracodayāt anena snapanam kuryāt pūjā dravyāṇi prokṣayet mahā āsanam pūjayet pūrvam dharmeṇa api sva śaktitas madhye tu bhāskaram sūryam śacī nātham gaṇādhipam mahā pūjayet tatra paṅkajam bandīśāsanam iti uktam pūjayet āsanam tatas hareḥ dhyānam tatas kuryāt sthāpayet madhya maṇḍale māvāhya ca āsanam dadyāt tatas pādya ādika trayam mandaram vijayam somam mahādevam ca mādhavam rudram haram jayam bham ca pūrva ādi dala mūlake hariḥ ca vijayā ca eva satyā māyā śivā ambikā hāsinī kāminī ca etāḥ dala mūleṣu bhāvayet puṣpa añjali trayam dadyāt vāstoṣpataye iti api arghya mantreṇa gandha ādyaiḥ pūjayet bhūtim icchatā bhava mate iti dhyātvā ṛtam ca iti mantreṇa pūjayet ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ chandaḥ gāyatrī parikīrtitam sūryaḥ ca devatā khyātaḥ prīṇitaḥ kuliśa āyudhaḥ sūryam rakta āsana ārūḍham dvi bhujam rakta vāsasam evam dhyātvā tu matimān haṃsam sa mantram īśvaram haṃsasya iti mantrasya ṛṣiḥ autathyaḥ īritaḥ pūjayet parayā bhaktyā vastra alaṃkāra bhūṣaṇaiḥ uddharṣaṇaḥ iti mantreṇa kṛṣṇa puṣpaiḥ atha arcayet triṣṭubh chandaḥ asya devatā savitā ca eva vijñeyaḥ prītaye ca vṛṣasya ca śulka varṇam tathā ākāśam ṛṣṭi saṃghaiḥ ca saṃstutam dhyāyet ṛṣiḥ syāt kardamaḥ viprāḥ chandaḥ jāgatikā tathā devatā ca bhavet ca agniḥ ākāśa prītaye nyaset dvi bhujam dhūmra varṇam ca vāyum dhyātvā prapūjayet rājānaḥ iti mantreṇa pūjayet sita taṇḍulaiḥ rājānaḥ iti ca ṛcā pūjayet gandha candanaiḥ ṛṣiḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ atha jagatī smṛtam vitatham śyāma varṇam ca caturbhiḥ bāhubhiḥ vṛtam mṛga akṣa pāśa khaṭvāṅga śūlam ca dadhantam karaiḥ meṣa ārūḍham viśāla akṣam rājānaḥ me īrayan gṛhakṣatam tathā śuklam caturbhiḥ gardabhaiḥ vṛtam hastam daṇḍam ca khaḍvāṅgam dadhantam vṛṣavāhanam pīta vastra dharam devam jaṭā mukuṭa saṃyutam mantreṇa pūjayet gandha candanaiḥ puṣpadantaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ ca parikīrtitam yamam dhyāyet kṛṣṇa varṇam mahiṣa stham dvi bāhukam daṇḍa pāśa dharam ca eva keyūra ādyaiḥ vibhūṣitam ca mantreṇa pūjayet kusuma ādinā vāmadevaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ kālaḥ asya devatā ṣaḍānanam ca gandharvam pītam dhyāyet caturbhujam pīta ambara dharam ca eva nānā ābharaṇa bhūṣitam ṛṣiḥ proktaḥ jagatī chandaḥ īritam bhṛṅgarājam jaṭā ārūḍham svaccham pīta ambaram śubham cakṣuḥ pīta iti mantreṇa pūjayet gandha candanaiḥ viśvedevāḥ devatā ca bhṛṅgarājasya prītaye pītam mṛgam mṛga ārūḍham jaṭā mukuṭa maṇḍitam paraḥ devāḥ iti mantreṇa pūjayet bali pāyasaiḥ yapilaḥ ca ṛṣiḥ proktaḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ īritam dhyāyet pitṛ gaṇam śukram caturbhiḥ bāhubhiḥ vṛtam śunaḥśepaḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya triṣṭubh chandaḥ ca devatā mahā devāḥ samākhyātāḥ pitṛ medhena pūjayet dauvārikam ca aṣṭa bhujam kṛṣṇa varṇam vicintayet rakta vastra piṅgala akṣam kṛṣṇa vyāghra upari sthitam ca śaṅkha ābham ca eva sugrīvam dvi bhujam cakra dhāriṇam haṃsa ārūḍham mahā kāyam bali vijñāna kāraṇam mantreṇa pūjayet rakta bhūṣaṇaiḥ maṃkhaḥ tathā chandaḥ paṅktiḥ somaḥ atha devatā hvetam jalādhipam dhyāyet gandharva ādyaiḥ ca veṣṭitam bhaktyāḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ devaḥ jalādhipaḥ dhyāyet ca asuram raktam karālam naravāhanam daśabhiḥ bāhubhiḥ yuktam kṛṣṇa vastra anulepanam mantreṇa kṛṣṇa puṣpaiḥ prapūjayet ṛṣiḥ vaiśvānaraḥ chandaḥ virāj iti abhidhīyate śeṣam ṣaḍānanam dhyāyet kṛṣṇam ca madhu piṅgalam meṣa stham kuṇḍala upetam nāga yajña upavītinam siddhaḥ vīra iti mantreṇa kṛṣṇa puṣpaiḥ atha arcayet yamam ca kṛkara akṣam ca ākuñcan mūrdhaje dvijāḥ devatā ca yaśaḥ khyātam prītaye viniyojayet yamam ca kṛkara akṣam ca kṣamā ākuñcita mūrdhajam syāt ca ca ardha pītam ca dvi bhujam rakta akṣam dhūmram eva vā devatābhiḥ ca saṃpannam vātaḥ vāretiḥ eva ca tat ṛṣiḥ vāyuḥ ca gāyatrī chandaḥ vāyuḥ ca devatā pīta vastram pannaga stham hāra keyūra maṇḍitam avasṛṣṭā parāpate iti mantreṇa pūjayet agniḥ ca asya ṛṣiḥ prokta chandaḥ somaḥ ca devatā pītam bhallāṭakam dhyāyet padma stham rakta bhūṣaṇam yat mātuḥ iti mantreṇa pūjayet sita taṇḍulaiḥ ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ gāyatrī samudāhṛtā somam dhyāyet śyāma rūpam padmāsana gatam param nānā ābharaṇa sampannam kirīṭa vara dhāriṇam ṛṣiḥ svārthaḥ vedaḥ chandaḥ jagatī iti abhidhīyate darpam dhyāyet kṛṣṇa varṇam kṛṣṇa ambara dharam tathā nāga yajña upavītim ca śikhi stambham dvijottamāḥ paścadīśa iti mantreṇa gandha ādyaiḥ paripūjayet mantraḥ ca asya ṛṣiḥ ca asya pañcāyata namīritam paṅktiḥ chandaḥ tathā proktam devaḥ pañcānanaḥ smṛtaḥ śyāma varṇām ditim dhyāyet dvi bhujām pīta vigrahām sarva lakṣaṇa saṃpannām sarva alaṃkāra śobhitām suparṇaḥ asi iti mantreṇa pūjayet pītacandanaiḥ ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ chandaḥ jagatī parikīrtyate bhavet devaḥ bhārgavaḥ ca iṣṭa arthe paripūjayet rakta ābhām aditim dhyāyet sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitām mantreṇa gandha ādyaiḥ abhipūjayet vāmadevaḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya gandha ādyaiḥ abhipūjayet devaḥ śukraḥ samākhyātaḥ stutau ca viniyojayet īśāna ādi koṇa gatān pūjayet su samāhitaḥ mad dhyāyet śukla varṇam kuṇḍala ādyaiḥ vibhūṣitam ṛṣiḥ syāt kardamaḥ chandaḥ virāj iti abhidhīyate devaḥ somaḥ samākhyātaḥ prītaye viniyojayet saritam dvi bhujam raktam rakta śveta ambara anvitam payasā śuklaḥ iti mantreṇa pūjayet kamala ādinā nārāyaṇaḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya paṅktiḥ chandaḥ prakīrtyate nārāyaṇaḥ svayam devaḥ prītaye viniyojayet devam kirīṭa sampannam sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitam dṛṣṭvā pariśrutaḥ iti mantreṇa anena pūjayet bhṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ chandaḥ paṅktiḥ somaḥ atha devatā rudram dhyāyet rakta varṇam śītāṃśu kṛta śekharam dvi bhujam śūla hastam ca ḍamarum ca parābhavet divaḥ mūrdhan iti mantreṇa ṛṣayaḥ samudāhṛtāḥ ṛṣiḥ syāt kāśyapaḥ chandaḥ virāj iti abhidhīyate pūjayet parayā bhaktyā ṛṣiḥ nīlaḥ udāhṛtaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ devatā syāt hradaḥ api parikīrtitaḥ nānā ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyam sapta aśva ratha maṇḍitam ṛṣiḥ autathyaḥ ākhyātaḥ prītaye viniyojayet bhās bhās ca īritam dhyāyet pītam vṛṣabhavāhanam meṣa stham ca trinetram ca kirīṭa vara maṇḍitam pīta āsyam rājayakṣyāṇam karālam ca viciṃtayet dadhyaṅ ātharvaṇaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ īritam śukla ambara dharam dhyāyet dvi bhujam śikhivāhanam ṛṣiḥ syāt nāradaḥ proktaḥ chandaḥ nuṣṭubh prakīrtitam evam dhyātvā vivasvantam mahā kāyam mahodaram kāśyapaḥ usya ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ triṣṭubh devaḥ śacīpatiḥ bahis īśāna koṇeṣu deva ādīn paripūjayet taiḥ kūṣmāṇḍaiḥ varaṇā puṣpaiḥ śaurakaiḥ vā samarcayet pītām karālikām dhyāyet carakīm varavarṇinīm su abja sthām dvi bhujām ca eva guñjā hāra upaśobhitām mantreṇa pūjayet bhūtim icchukaḥ baladevaḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya chandaḥ gaurī ca devatā dhyāyet vidārikām raktām nava yauvana saṃyutām pavitreṇa punīhi iti mantreṇa anena pūjayet bhū ṛṣiḥ gargaḥ samākhyātaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ asya devatā pāpa ādi rākṣasīm dhyāyet saurabheya upari sthitām ṛṣiḥ suvarṇaḥ ākhyātaḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ prakīrtitam parvata agra mṛdam ca eva gaja danta mṛdam tathā valmīke saṃgame ca eva rāja dvāra catuṣpathāt kuśa mūla mṛdam ca eva yajñiyasya vanaspateḥ amṛtī trapuṣasya ca mālatī campakam ca eva tathā urvārukasya ca māṃsam bījapūram ca nālikeram ca dāḍimam dhātrīm jambu phalam ca eva anyayā doṣam ādiśet pañca raktam suvarṇam ca nikṣipet varuṇam yajet yadi asya mantrasya ca ṛṣiḥ viṣṇuḥ chandaḥ udāhṛtam gāyatrī devatā pāśī prītaye viniyojayet pañcagandhān vinikṣipya hastam dattvā paṭhet tatas sarve samudrāḥ saritaḥ sarāṃsi ca mahā hradāḥ sarva pāpa ghnāḥ sarva loka sukha āvahāḥ yajamānasya durita kṣaya kārakāḥ aghora aji aṣṭaka kṛtāḥ vāstoṣpatayaḥ iti api śatam vā ca aṣṭa saṃyuktam sahasram vā viśeṣataḥ śata ardham vā hunet vipraḥ tilaiḥ vā taṇḍulaiḥ saha ca carakya ādīn ca āsanaiḥ ca piṣṭakaiḥ vaṭakena vā pañca upacāraiḥ vidhivat sa aṅga upāṅgaiḥ anantaram balim āsādayet paścāt dadyāt ekaikaśas kramāt brāhmaṇaiḥ ca eva dadyāt ca sadā ājyam sa mākṣikam hāli annam śikhine dadyāt tathā nīlotpalāni ca odanam sa utpalam dadyāt parjanyāya vicakṣaṇaḥ mad sūryāya piṣṭaka annam ca satyāya yava pūlikām matsya māṃsa annam śaṣkulīm atha piṣṭakam hi ca tathā pūṣṇe ca apūpam eva hi tathā kṛsara annam ca śālyannam ca nivedayet gandharvāya kastūrikā annam kṛsaram bhṛṅgarājake mṛgāya yāvaka annam ca pitṛbhyaḥ mudga pāyasam dauvārikāya ca pūpakam pāyasam puṣpadantāya varuṇāya ca piṣṭakam asurāya modakān ca eva dadyāt āpi kṣaye surām ghṛtodanam ca somāya kaṇā annam yakṣmaṇe dadet rogāya ghṛta laḍḍūkam sa pāyasa guḍa odanam hakṣāya vividha annam ca bhallāṭāya tathā eva ca somāya madhuśāli annam nāgāya guḍa piṣṭakam ditaye dadyāt tathā kṣīram sitaśarkarayā saha kṣīra annam ca eva pūṣṇe ca āpa vatsāya vai dadhi ca ghṛtaudanam ca citrāya rudrāya ghṛta pāyasam māṃsa odanam yakṣmaṇe ca kṛsaram varuṇāya ca aryamṇe śarkarā apūpam bahis dadyāt catuṣṭayam citra odanam sa māṃsam ca matsya annam guḍapiṣṭakam pratideva upari kṣīram ghṛta kṣīra samanvitam patākāḥ deva varṇena dadyāt brahma ādiṣu kramāt mantram japet sva sāmarthyāt sva sāmarthyāt stutim paṭhet puruṣa stavasya sūryaḥ ṛṣiḥ jagatī chandaḥ uvāca nārāyaṇaḥ naraḥ haṃsaḥ viṣvaksenaḥ hutāśanaḥ yajñeśaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sūryaḥ sura arcitaḥ mahīdharaḥ padmanābhaḥ hṛṣīkeśaḥ dātā dāmodaraḥ hariḥ saṃnyāsī śāstra tattva jñaḥ tripañcāśat guṇa ātmakaḥ yajñaḥ tvam hi vaṣaṭkāraḥ tvam oṃkāraḥ tvam agnayaḥ tvam svadhā tvam hi svāhā tvam sudhā ca puruṣottamaḥ namaḥ deva ādidevāya viṣṇave śāsvatāya ca upāsakānām prabhum ekam īśvaram te yānti siddhim paramām tu vaiṣṇavām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tatas bherī ādi ghoṣeṇa yajamānaḥ udak mukhaḥ aiśānyām madhyabhāge vā yajet vā su samāhitaḥ ṛṣiḥ kaṇṭhaḥ atha gāyatrī chandaḥ iti abhidhīyate agratas aṣṭa dalam lekhyam sthāpayet kalaśam tatas madhu śaṅkha samam vā api viśvāmitra samudbhavam pūjayet tīrtha toyena gandha puṣpa akṣata ādinā viṣṇukrāntā vacā kuṣṭha candanena viloḍitam prīram ca mātuluṅgam ca sāvitram ca sa dūrvayā avraṇam kalaśam kṛtvā pañca varṇa samanvitam mantreṇa anena bhaktyāḥ hṛd varṇa arghyam mayā dattam paritoṣāya te namaḥ gṛhebhyaḥ ca eva somāya tvaṣṭre ca eva ca śūline tatas ṛghya dānam vidhivat kṣīreṇa haviṣā madhu yajamānaḥ sa patnīkaḥ kumbham kukṣau nidhāya ca hiraṇyagarbha iti mantrasya bharadvāja ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ chandaḥ ca jagatī khyātam devatā ca jalādhipaḥ asya mantrasya ca ṛṣiḥ nāradaḥ parikīrtitaḥ chandaḥ ca īśānaḥ devatā samudāhṛtā sambhave pakṣi yugmam ca āḍīm vā cakravākakam dikṣu jīvantikām dadyāt rākṣasebhyaḥ balim haret kṣātrakaḥ lakṣmaṇaḥ ca eva maṇibhadraḥ gaṇeśvaraḥ ye bhavāḥ bhāvinaḥ bhūtāḥ ye ca teṣu mayā asinaḥ haram tu balim tuṣṭyā prayacchantu śubham mama dadyāt payasvinīm gām ca ācāryāya viśeṣataḥ anyeṣām hi hiraṇyam ca gām ca dadyāt dvijanmane ca eva tatas prājāpatyam sviṣṭakṛt ca juhuyāt tad anantaram ghṛtaiḥ sviṣṭakṛtam na asti tathā rasa visārakaiḥ madhūkaiḥ viśvapuṣpaiḥ ca tathā āmrātaka kāśakaiḥ dadyāt pūrṇām ca vidhivat sūryāya arghyam nivedayet pañca doṣam puraskṛtya brāhmaṇa anumatena ca praviśya ca tatas brāhmaṇān atha bhojayet dīna andha kṛpaṇe ca eva dadyāt vitta anusārāt mad bhujyate dadhi kṣīra āmiṣam vinā na kṣīram ca kaṣāyam ca bharjitam śākam eva ca na kāṇḍam ca na puṣpam ca karīram ca kadācana śāli annam mūlakam ca eva panasa āmra phalāni ca mastam madhu ghṛta guḍam mātuluṅgam sa saindhavam etat praśastam jānīyāt marīcāni viśeṣataḥ pañca aṅgakam tatas kuryāt sthāpa yet na iti yugmakam prathamā ca arka hastena dvitīyā daśa hastikā śata ardham tatas paścāt ṣaṣṭi hastam anantaram iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge arghyadānavidhau dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sva gṛhya agni vidhim vakṣye yoga bhedeṣu sattamāḥ putrāḥ eva ca kanyāḥ ca janiṣyāḥ ca apare sutāḥ gṛhyāḥ iti samākhyātāḥ yajamānasya dāyadāḥ teṣām saṃskāra yāgeṣu śānti karma kriyāsu ca mad adhika vihitaḥ kalpaḥ tasmāt cakṣaḥ iti smṛtaḥ tri kuśam parigṛhṇāti tatas ca kurute dṛḍham ṛṣiḥ dakṣaḥ ca jagatī chandaḥ viṣṇuḥ ca devatā kaśyapaḥ tṛpyatām iti bhūḥ asi iti ca śodhanam bhū ṛṣiḥ suvarṇa gāyatrī jagatī chandaḥ iṣyate devatā ca bhavet sūryaḥ pṛthivī śodhane nyaset aiśānī ādi krameṇa eva prādakṣiṇyena yatnatas bhrāmayet valaya ākṛti parisamūhanam iti uktam snapanam śṛṇu sattamaiḥ īśāna ādeḥ ca saṃskāram kuryāt parisamūhanam pratiṣṭhāyām cara ityādi nairṛtyādi graham makhe paṅkti chandaḥ samuddiṣṭam indrāṇī ca asya devatā yat yat yat yat tat tat tat tat tat ca pañcamūrtikayā api ca māna stokena iti ṛcā viśvedevaḥ ca pūjyatām ṛṣiḥ syāt kāśyapa chandaḥ viśvadevaḥ prakīrtitaḥ yojayet lepayet vidvāḥ ghaṭam ābaddhya sattamāḥ madhyamā tarjanībhyām ca kuśam ārabhya dakṣiṇam catur astrī kṛte kṣetram hasta mānam tathā ānanam yajvabhiḥ iti mantreṇa sūryaḥ prīṇāti sattamāḥ dakṣe sārdha aṅgulam tyaktvā paścimena parityajet uttara agrām likhet rekhām anyathā amaṅgalam bhavet mantrasya dhanvatari ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ samākhyātam savitā ca atra devatā tat lagnam dakṣiṇe ca ekam pūrva ardha dvādaśa aṅgulam anya aṅgula antaram ca ekam tatas sapta aṅgulam bhavet kuśa mūlena svarṇena pratiṣṭhāyām ca rājate aṅguṣṭha anāmikābhyām ca saṃjyoti iti ca saṃjapan saṃsmaret mitrāḥ varuṇau ṛṣiḥ autathya saṃjñakaḥ bhāsvarāya kṣipet agnau tatas ūrdhvam raṇam smṛtam sadasaṃpad ṛṣiḥ karṇaḥ virāj iti udāhṛtaḥ kuśa puṣpa udakena api devatīrthena sattamāḥ tha devī gāyatrī devatā gaṇanāyakaḥ me gṛhṇāmi iti saṃpaṭhan mama gṛhṇāmi iti mantrasya ṛṣiḥ gautamaḥ īritaḥ chandaḥ nuṣṭubh samākhyātam vāmadevaḥ atha devatā mantreṇa anena matimān dakṣiṇāyām vinikṣipet asya mantrasya hārītaḥ ṛṣiḥ syāt chandaḥ iṣyate māvāhanam tatas kuryāt saṃsarakṣa iti saṃjapan mantrasya ṛṣiḥ nīlaḥ udāhṛtaḥ chandaḥ atha vijñeyaḥ devatā ca śatakratuḥ vaiśvānaraḥ iti ṛcā agni sthāpanam īritam mantram ācāti prīṇāti ṛṣiḥ syāt kāśyapaḥ smṛtaḥ badhnāsi iti ca mantreṇa agnim kuryāt pradakṣiṇam ṛṣiḥ svayambhuḥ ākhyātaḥ virāj chandaḥ udāhṛtam brahmayajñān ṛcā dogdhrī dhenuḥ iti tu ṛcā trāyatām eti śṛṇu ṛgbhyām ṛṣī dvijāḥ prajāpatiḥ ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ triṣṭubh devaḥ atha śaṃkaraḥ nāradaḥ ca ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ triṣṭubh devaḥ śacīpatiḥ praṇītā sthāpanam kuryāt dine ehi iti saṃjapan mantrasya ca ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ vāmadevaḥ prakīrtitaḥ māṣa parṇī sahakāra uttham varuṇasya viśeṣataḥ ṣaṣ aṅgulena vistāram viṃśati aṅgulakena ca dairghyena ca catur khyātaka aṅgulam ca pramāṇāt dvi aṅgule carakākāyām āsa āsan deva karmaṇi tāmram syāt śānti karmaṇi pratiṣṭhāyām mṛd mayam ca aṣṭa aṅgulam atha api vā dvādaśa aṅgula prastāram taijasam māna varjitam imam me varuṇena ṛcā praṇītām atha pūrayet atha prīyantām ittham ādhyānam ācaret kayā naḥ citraḥ iti ṛcā nāgaḥ prīṇāti sattamāḥ tasya mantrasya ca ṛṣiḥ bharadvājaḥ udāhṛtaḥ chandaḥ anuṣṭubh devatā ca īśānaḥ parikīrtitaḥ prayojana ādikam dravyam tatas āsādayet kramāt dakṣiṇa ādi uttara antam dhuvāsaḥ iti ṛcā api ca ṛṣiḥ syāt nāradaḥ chandaḥ nuṣṭubh ca eva atha devatā śatakratuḥ ca prīṇāti yojayet atha sādarāt ca paścime kuryāt prayacchan paścimena tu tilāḥ ca saha sarṣapān bhṛṅgarājam tathā eva ca panasam nārikelam ca modakam laḍḍukam tathā praṇītām ca diś vidikṣu sthāpayet avicārayān praṇītām na spṛśet jātu homa kāle kathaṃcana snāna kumbham ca bho viprāḥ yāvat yāgaḥ pravartate uccīrakam mātuluṅgam dūrvām dhātrī phalāni ca tulasī mālatī jātī jala jāni viśeṣataḥ aiśānyām sthāpayet sarvam yat ca vai kaṅkatī mayam nairṛtya iti viśeṣaḥ yat ca vaikaṅkatā śamī tu kṣīra pāke tu kṣīra ante caru sthālīm atha ānayet pavi vat chedana kuśaiḥ chindyāt prādeśikam punar chittvā pavitram prokṣaṇyām sthāpayet balabhid āmrakam viṣṇoḥ rarāṭa mantreṇa chedayet agra bhāgāt pāyasena kāṭhinena pramathnīyāt kadācana na rasena na kārṣṇena na dṛḍhena kadācana tāmreṇa bhasmanā ca atha śukti śaṅkhena vāgyataḥ chedayet piñjulīm ca api pavitram atha deśikaḥ mahā viṣṇoḥ rarāṭa mantrasya hārītaḥ ca ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ praṇītā bhājanam gṛhya prokṣaṇīm pūrayet tribhiḥ vāma hasta tale paścāt sthāpayet prokṣaṇīyakam madhyamā amadhyamā aṅguṣṭha apāmārgeṇa mantribhiḥ ṛṣiḥ syāt gautamaḥ chandaḥ dharmarājaḥ atha devatā sakṛt dravye tribhiḥ kāṣṭhaiḥ tri vāram mantra puṣpakaiḥ sthira sthāne tu saṃprāpta praṇītāyāḥ ca dakṣiṇe prādeśa antarāt ca eva ājya sthālīm atha arpayet agratas maṇḍalam kṛtvā vahnim vipre tu sthāpayet dyūtam niḥsārayet tat tu nirūpya āśu krameṇa tu mantreṇa adhiśrapaṇam īritam ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ chandaḥ paṅktiḥ īśaḥ atha devatā avekṣya īśam ārabhya dakṣiṇa āvartakena tu mantreṇa ṛṣi chanda ādikam smaran pariveṣya ājya sthālīm ca tris sakṛt vā samāhitaḥ pitaraḥ tṛpyatām iti saṃskāre mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ mad ṛṣiḥ syāt jamadagniḥ ca gāyatrī chandaḥ īritam devatā ca pinākī syāt agniṣṭome ca yojayet ṣaṣ aṅgulam sruvam paścāt gṛhītvā agnau pratapya ca tri rātram tu mahā yoge sakṛt anyatra sattamāḥ saṃmārjayet kuśena api mūlāt agram tu secayet agrāt mūlam punar kuryāt saṃpūjya ca punar punar mājya pātram puraskṛtya pavitram ca samāharet aṅguṣṭhe dve anāme tu gṛhṇīyāt tat pavitrakam aṣṭa aṅgulam madhya kṛtvas ghṛtam tris pavanam caret pātāle tris tathā ākāśe avekṣya ājyam tatas tribhiḥ tathā kuryāt adhas saṃprokṣya deśikaḥ tūṣṇīm dadyāt tathā ca agnau saṃniveśena tattvāt sa pavitram dakṣa kare gṛhītvā prokṣaṇīyakam agnim paryukṣayet paścāt dakṣiṇa āvartakena ca pavitram ca praṇītāyām nidhāya prokṣaṇīyakam saṃyāva artham ca bho viprāḥ agni vat tatra deśikaḥ sruvam gṛhītvā juhuyāt tūṣṇīm eva samāhitaḥ ca devatā uddeśam prājāpatyam samīrayan praṇava antena juhuyāt sarvatra dvijasattamāḥ vāyukoṇam samārabhya vahnikoṇa antakena tu agnīṣoma ātmakam ca eva juhuyāt rākṣasādeḥ tatas naimittikam caret paścāt su iṣṭam tatas dadyāt dadyāt ca matibhiḥ tathā vāruṇam pañcakam ca eva kṛtvā pūrṇām tatas labhet udvāha iti mantra sya atharvaṇa ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ chandaḥ devī ca gāyatrī devatam ca api vāruṇam tvat na ugne iti mantrasya ṛṣiḥ vāśiṣṭha saṃjñakaḥ chandaḥ ca bṛhatī khyātam tat eva agniḥ prakīrtitaḥ iḍaḥ gatam iti mantrasya ṛṣiḥ kaḥ guhya saṃjñakaḥ chandaḥ ca jagatī khyātam devaḥ viṣṇuḥ prakīrtitaḥ udvartane iti mantrasya ṛṣiḥ kaḥ nu prakīrtitaḥ chandaḥ devī ca gāyatrī varuṇaḥ ca adhidevatā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca yajña kaṇḍīm sva gṛhyena kṛtvā agnim ca arcayet tatas tu mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ trayaḥ sarvam prāyaścitta saṃjñakam prājāpatyam ca sviṣṭakṛt prājāpatye ca indrāya etau āghāra saṃjñakau bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar trayaḥ ca eva mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ smṛtāḥ sarvaprāyaścitta saṃjñāḥ ete vai pañca maṃtrakāḥ prājāpatya āhutiḥ ca ekā sviṣṭakṛt ca aparā smṛtā caturdaśā etāḥ kṛtayaḥ hotavyāḥ nitya saṃjñakāḥ kṛtvā sakṛt devatā uddeśam homam paścāt samācaret naimittikam vinā nityam viphalam yāti na anyathā ha sādhya ādi yāgeṣu yad nideśam śṛṇu dvijāḥ eka ahe vā āghāra ārajyau kṛtvā naimittikīm kṛtīḥ samāḥ sviṣṭakṛtam vidyāt ākṛtyā ādyāḥ tatas param tu aghārau ājya pūrvakam pūrveṇa tatas naimittikam caret sviṣṭakṛt vyāhṛtiḥ ca eva vāruṇa ādyāḥ tathā hi ṣaṭ dvijātīnām vivāhe tu naityikam prathamam bhavet dadyāt ekam ca nityam ca pṛthak nityam na ca ācaret paryagnikaraṇe ca eva udvāhe mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ candra ādityau ca utpavane vīkṣaṇe ca diśaḥ tathā prokṣaṇyām sthāpane durgāḥ ime lakṣmī pratiṣṭhitā homam kuryāt dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ vidhim kuryāt samāhitaḥ eteṣu devatāḥ proktāḥ dvijātīnām hitāya ca devatāḥ sarvāḥ jñātavyāḥ etāḥ yajñe samāhitaiḥ adhidaivena jānīyāt karavalyām pañcaphalam yatas iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca atha vakṣyāmi sat ca eṣām devānām dhyānam uttamam asya yajñe parijñānāt jihvā samyak phala pradā hiraṇya varṇām prathamām vahni jihvām mahā dyutim pañca āḍhya karām devīm hiraṇya ākhya iṣṭa siddhaye kanakām dvi bhujām śuklām hastābhyām darbha saṃyutām ca bibhrāṇām numaḥ sādhaka siddhi dām mad mad abhaya varān dadhatīm praṇamāmi aham bhinna añjana caya prakhyām svarṇa kumbham tu vāmatas dakṣiṇena vara āraktām dhārayatīm namāmi aham suprabhā maṇḍala ābhā ca karābhyām tad kṛtāñjaliḥ japā kusuma saṃkāśā bahu rūpā sakhe mama yā śubha dā syāt bhujaiḥ śubhrā sahasram dadhatī parān mūlena vīkṣayet sthānam mantreṇa khananam matam trisūtrīkaraṇam kuryāt catur sūtram nipātayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge pañcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca pratiṣṭhāyāḥ pūrva dine kuryāt deva adhivāsanam dhānya pratiṣṭhām tasya eva yūpam ca api yathāvidhi rātrau mūla agre ca ghaṭe sthāpayet gaṇanāyakam saṃpūjya ca vidhānena digīśān ca tathā grahān brahmānam ca taḍāgeṣu varuṇam śānti yāgake somam ca maṇḍale sūryam pāde viṣṇum tathā eva ca śaive śaivam tathā proktam prapāyām atha vāruṇam pādya ādyaiḥ api ca arcayet sunābha iti ca mantreṇa dvābhyām eva viśiṣyate tatas kāṃḍāt iti ca mantreṇa dadyāt dūrvā śatam tatas sindoḥ iva iti sindūram viśvām iti ca mārjanam samiccha iti añjanam dadyāt duḥstham sura asurāḥ japan adya eva tena mantreṇa sthāpayet atha vāriṇā yogam yoga dṛḍham japtvā pavitram vinyaset tatas taila gandha yutam śrīsūktena api puṣpakam dadyāt dūrvā akṣatam tatas ca nimnī anta kāṇḍāt iti tathā akṣatam tatas yama gṛhāt bāhye maṇḍapa antaram āśritaḥ sunāti iti vacaḥ dadyāt tatas ca āvāhayet prabhum tatra adhivāsanam kuryāt rakṣayet ca su rakṣibhiḥ ācaret a kṣāra lavaṇa anya āsī dadhi viśvam tilān tyajet hāraṇam ca adhivāsam vakṣye tatra anusārāt pañcabhiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ sārdham gandharvāḥ iti vismaran dadyāt gandham taila yutam gandha dvāra iti ṛcā punar yāḥ phalinī iti ca phalam pūga tā nāma avarjanam yāt khaḍgam su tīkṣṇakam śrīḥ ca te iti kusumam viśvāni iti ca saṃpaṭhan nirmathanam tatas kāryam iti sādhāraṇaḥ vidhiḥ na tad phalam avāpnoti vivāhe śaraṇam diśet tatas prayatnataḥ kāryam pūrvāhṇe rātri yogāt nitye naimittike kāmye kārayet kuṇḍa maṇḍapam sthaṇḍile hasta mātreṇa vālukā nirmite api ca ekaika aṅgulakaḥ viprāḥ pīṭhe na asti vicāraṇā pañcaka kuṇḍe ca lakṣa ādau api śaṅkayā tatas daśa aṅgule pakṣe daśa aṅgam śṛṇuta dvijāḥ ca etat vai gṛha pakṣe ca viṣṇu pakṣe tila ādeḥ śaive yava ādeḥ kāryā śākte puṣpa ādeḥ bhavet sūrye pakṣe piṣṭaka ādi gopāle kṛsara ādeḥ ca sārasvate ca śrīvṛkṣe mokṣakāme nigadyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca aṣṭau hotāraḥ dvārapāla atha aṣṭau aṣṭau kāryāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ yājakāḥ ca sarve śuddhāḥ lakṣitāḥ lakṣaṇa ādyaiḥ ekaḥ kāryaḥ jāpakaḥ asmin mahātmā divyaiḥ gadhaiḥ gandha mālyaiḥ suvarṇaiḥ tailam kāryam brāhmaṇāḥ pañcaviṃśāḥ āvāpyaiḥ tu dviguṇaiḥ vai balīyaḥ divyaiḥ vastraiḥ arhaṇā dakṣiṇābhiḥ pratiṣṭhā ādiṣu sarveṣu samyak viprān atha arhayet pradadyāt arhaṇam samyak paścāt pātram nivedayet pratyekam brāhmaṇāḥ yajñe veda mantreṣu pāragāḥ mad ācāryaḥ yadi kāryeṣu varayet daśa govrajān viśiṣṭānām abhāve api kuryāt kuśa mayān dvijān tad pratikṛtau ca api sva gotram svam dvijam vinā na kuryāt caraṇa uddeśam tathā prahara saṃhatim tulāpuruṣa dāne ca tathā ca hāṭaka acale na pātram pratikṛti artham na ca alam sa udakam tathā śūdra saṃskārakaḥ ca eva kṛpaṇaḥ gaṇa yājakaḥ prāyaścitta gṛhītaḥ ca rāja yājaka paiśunau śūdra geha nivāsī ca śūdra prerakaḥ eva ca su alpa kaṇṭhaḥ vāmanaḥ ca vṛṣalī patiḥ eva ca bandhu dveṣī guru dveṣī bhāryā dveṣī tathā eva ca hīna aṅgaḥ ca eva vṛddha aṅgaḥ bhagna dantaḥ ca dāmbhikaḥ śvitrī kuṣṭhī kula udbhūtaḥ nidrāluḥ vyasana arthakaḥ adīkṣitaḥ kadaryaḥ ca caṇḍarogī galadvraṇaḥ mahāvraṇī ca udarī yajña pātram na kārayet tu pātrāṇām pūjā mantrān śṛṇu dvijaiḥ brahma mūrtiḥ tvam ācāryaḥ saṃsārāt pāhi mām vibho ciram mama śāśvatā kīrtiḥ yāvat lokāḥ cara acarāḥ prasīda tvam maheśānaiḥ pratiṣṭhā karma siddhaye tvam ādiḥ sarva bhūtānām saṃsāra arṇava tārakaḥ jñāna amṛta prada ācāryaḥ yajurveda namaḥ astu te bhāsvara asura bhūṣita ṣaṣ aṅga veda veda jñaḥ ṛtu iṅga mokṣa pradaḥ bhava praviśya maṇḍalam viprāḥ sva sthāne sthāpayet kramāt sthāpayet tu brahmānam maṇḍalasya eva paścime dvāri dvāri prayatnena dvārapālān anukramāt nārāyaṇa sva rūpeṇa yajñam mama saphalam kuru yajñeṣu sākṣī sarveṣu yajurveda artha tattva vid makha śreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu yena mantrāḥ su vistṛtāḥ makha śreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu eṣaḥ eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ māṃgalyam karmaṇām nityam sarvajñam jñāna rūpi pālaya tvam diśaḥ sarvāḥ vidiśaḥ ca tathā imam dikpāla rūpiṇam vipram yajña siddhau mā aham na saṃkalpam caret yāgam vratam deva arcanam tathā saṃkalpa mūlaḥ kāmaḥ vai yajñāḥ saṃkalpa saṃbhavāḥ kāmāt paraḥ na eva bhavet niṣkā na śobhanaḥ tasmāt kāma mayam dharmam vinā mokṣam na ca ācaret na kuryāt sthāpane ca eva kuryāt vai maṇḍala antare gṛhītvā audumbaram pātram vāri pūrṇam guṇa anvitam na sādhāraṇe ca uttara āsyaḥ graha yajñe tu sammukhaḥ mahāvrate pratiṣṭhāyām pātram tāmram hiraṇmayam rājata aśma mayam sa aṅgam yat yajñeṣu praśasyate yajñīya pātra puṭakam hasta sthāne prakīrtitam nikṣipet toyam pratiṣṭhāyām ca pūrvatas nikṣipet yāge vrate nityake śukti kāṃsya ādi hastaiḥ ca tāmra raupya ādibhiḥ tathā praṇavam pūrvam uccārya yajet yajñeśvaram smaret gaṅgā ca āditya candrau ca dyauḥ bhūmiḥ rātri vāsarau sūryaḥ somaḥ yamaḥ kālaḥ mahābhūtāni pañca ca ete śubha aśubha asya iha karmaṇaḥ nava sākṣiṇaḥ iti uccārya nyaset dharmam dhyātvā puṣpa añjalim sṛjet amṛtam kṛtya pātre ca om tat sat iti nirdiśet dharmaḥ śubhra vapūḥ sita ambara dharaḥ kārya ūrdhva deśe vṛṣaḥ hastābhyām abhayam varam ca satatam rūpam param yaḥ dadhat sarva prāṇi sukha āvahaḥ kṛta dhyām mokṣa eka hetuḥ sadā saḥ yam pātu jaganti ca eva satatam bhūyāt satām bhūtaye yajña sambandhi viprān ca eka ahena eva yojayet havis dravyāṇi yāni syuḥ aṣṭa yāga antare api ca punar punar niyojyāni brāhmaṇāḥ haviḥ agnayaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca māgha ādi māseṣu api ṣaṭsu kāryā yoga pratiṣṭhā ṛṣibhiḥ praṇītā tad lagne śubha sthe śubha vīkṣite vā kāryā pratiṣṭhā ca jalāśayānām śuddhā dvitīyā ca tathā tṛtīyā trayodaśī ca api tathā eva viprāḥ prāṇa pratiṣṭhā ca jalāśaya ādeḥ etāḥ praśastāḥ tithayaḥ bhavanti a prāpya ca etāni śubhāni yāni kāryā pratiṣṭhā viṣuva dvaye ca bhā ādike puṇya adine śubhe ca taḍāga ādi jalāśayasya prācyām pratiṣṭhā atha ca uttare vā su cāru īṣat pravaṇe ca deśe su vartulaḥ ṣoḍaśa hasta maṇḍapaḥ pūrva ādi dvāreṣu catuṣṭayeṣu plakṣa ādibhiḥ toraṇakaiḥ sureśaḥ ūrdhve ca hasta ānamitāni yāni vicitra mālya ambara bhūṣitāni bhūmau yathā ca hastakāni bhavanti ca etāni api toraṇāni sarvatra yāge api hi maṇḍapasya kāryāḥ dhvajāḥ dikṣu vidikṣu śubhrāḥ dikpāla varṇa ābha patāka yuktāḥ madhye ca vai nīla patāka yuktāḥ dhvajāḥ ca yasmin daśa hasta sammitāḥ tasmin patākāḥ api pañca hastāḥ aratni mātrāḥ yadi mūlabhāge pañcāṅgu la agre vinibaddha gūḍhāḥ dvāre ca tasmin ca nirūpitāḥ vā rambhā supuṣpā sukha śādvalāḥ ca vacā abhivṛkṣa uttara pañca hastāḥ sa pañca śākhāḥ api toraṇāni puṣṭa dvaye sūtritam veṣṭayet ca tathā ikṣu kāṇḍaiḥ atha yāga maṇḍapam vediḥ tathā maṇḍapa madhya bhāge kāryā ca koṇesthi tuṣa ādi hīnā madhyamāyām parityajya daśa aṅgulāni aiśāni atas trīṇi tathā parāṇi prāsāde ca taḍāge ca mahā ārāme tathā eva ca kuṇḍāni kuryāt nava kuṇḍa pakṣe vedyāḥ tathā uccais avidikṣu ca eva sarvāṇi sarvatra ca mekhalāni ṣaṣ asra pañca asra sa mekhalāni aṣṭa asra jāni abja trikoṇakāni tathā arddhacandram caturasrakam ca kuṇḍasya pūrvottara diś vibhāge sthāpyaḥ ghaṭaḥ candana cāru liptaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca gataḥ yāga gṛhāt anyat maṇḍala antaram āśritaḥ yajamānaḥ tathā nityam karma kṛtvā yathāvidhi pañca devān namaskṛtya tathā yajñeśvaram harim saṃkalpam ca tatas kṛtvā brāhmaṇāḥ vedavyāsa ādi praṇītam yathāśāstra nidarśanam yathā yathā svatantra uktam puṇyā raṇya abhidhāyakam jalāśaya pratiṣṭhāyām vidhivat dvijāḥ yathā yathā ca kalpa uktam yathākuṇḍam vidhānāt sa adhivāsam yathā eva ekaḥ puṇyā raṇya vidhāyakaḥ bhāśaya pratiṣṭhām ca kariṣye vidhivat dvijāḥ saṃkalpam evam kṛtvā tu vṛddhiśrāddham samācaret mātṛ yāgam puraskṛtya vṛddhiśrāddham samāpayet bherī ādi ghoṣeṇa su maṅgalena padyam likhet atra sa ṣoḍaśa akṣaram brahma īśān varayet sarvān ācāryam tu viśeṣataḥ svarṇa kuṇḍala yugmena tathā tāmra ādi bhājanaiḥ nānā ratnaiḥ ca vastraiḥ ca ācāryam varayet budhaḥ yathāmānam yathāśakti yathā abhivṛṇuyāt budhaḥ tatas sarva oṣadhībhiḥ ca yajamānaḥ sapatnikaḥ āpohiṣṭhā iti mantreṇa snāpayāmāsuḥ aprajāḥ yava godhūma nīvāra tila śyāmāka śālayaḥ priyaṅgu vrīhayaḥ ca aṣṭa sarva oṣadhi gaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ tatas śukla ambara dharaḥ śukla mālya anulepanaḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ abhyanujñātaḥ purohita puraḥsaraḥ nānā maṅgala ghoṣeṇa bherī paṭaha nisvanaiḥ paścimam dvāram āsādya praviśet yāga maṇḍapam carake pūjayet vighnam gaṅgām ca yamunām tathā pārśvayoḥ ca ardhāt lakṣmīm pratihāram anukramāt vedim pradakṣiṇīkṛtya namaskuryāt yathāvidhi svasti vācyam tatas kṛtvā pañca devān prapūjayet bhūta utsādam tatas kṛtvā vikirān vikiret bhuvi apakrāmantu ye bhūtāḥ ye ca asmin viprakārakāḥ yasmāt naḥ nāmni vartante yajña mātram pravartatām pūjayet āsanam paścāt svakīyam puṣpa candanaiḥ namaḥ nanta āsanāya iti tathā padmāsanāya ca ca tatas bhūmi tale vāma hastam dattvā paṭhet naraḥ pṛthvi tvayā dhṛtāḥ lokāḥ devi tvam viṣṇunā dhṛtā tvam ca dhāraya mām nityam pavitram āsanam kuru sūryāya arghyam tatas dattvā gurum natvā kṛtāñjaliḥ devam hṛd padmake nītvā prāṇāyāma trayam caret gaṇānām tvā iti mantreṇa vrahmānam tad anantaram ābrahman iti ṛcā tat viṣṇoḥ iti saṃsmaran vāsudevam tatas paścāt balibhiḥ gandha candanaiḥ tatas deva śarīram tu navam āsādya triṃśat tatas rāja adhirājena bhūtaśuddhim samācaret mahā sphaṭika saṃkāśam śaṅkha kunda indu saprabham dhāriṇam śukla mālya ambaram śuklam śukla gaṅghā anulepanam ahi tuṇḍa āsana stham ca pāśa hastam mahā balam rājīva locanam nityam nāga loka upaśobhitam makara grāha kūrma ādyaiḥ nānā jalacaraiḥ vṛtam yad yad yad cintayet jalaśāyinam tatas nyāsam prakurvīta paca aṅga tva avaśobhitam arghya pātram tatas kṛtvā tri bhāga jala pūritam aṣṭadhā mūlamantram ca japtvā tena udakena ca āsanam yāga vastūni prokṣayet tena vāriṇā tat naḥ aruṇaḥ pracodayāt iti snānam samācaret tatas gaṇeśam aiśānyām āgneyyām guru pādukām dharma adharma ādikān sarvān sattva ādīn atha ca arcayet sūrya soma jala ādīnām maṇḍalāni yathākramam madhye śaktim ca kṣīrodam anantam pṛthivīm tathā ca ādhāra śaktim ca sumerum mandaram tathā tatas śvetam ca kusumam sa akṣatam yoga māyayā pūrvavat deśe sthāpayet kalaśa upari hanam tatas kṛtvā mantreṇa anena mantra vid yajña bhāgam gṛhāṇa idam tvām eva āvāhayāmi aham evam āvāhya lokeśam aṣṭau mudrāḥ pradarśayet snāpayitvā tu dadyāt pādya ādika trayam puṣpa añjalim tatas dattvā mūlamantreṇa deśikaḥ pūrva ādi pattra mūleṣu dharma ādīn pūjayet budhaḥ sattva ādyāḥ pūjayet tatra teṣām eva vara aṃganāḥ jñānam dharmam ca somam ca rajaḥ sattvam tamaḥ tathā pattra agre lokapālānām agnya adīna āyudhān tathā karṇikā dakṣiṇe pūrvam vāme ca api śacīpatim pūrva pattre tu brahmānam pūjayet sita paṅkajaiḥ pīṭha mantreṣu pūrva ādi brahmānam ca śivam tathā ca api ca yat mantram sa aṣṭaśatam sahasram vijapet budhaḥ paṭhet īśāna ādi pīṭha koṇeṣu kamalām ambikām tathā nairṛtyām viśva karmāṇam vāyavye tu sarasvatīm pūrva ādi dvāra deśe tu marutam ca āvaha ādikam māgneya ādiṣu koṇeṣu bahiṣpīṭham tatas jayet piśācān rākṣasān bhūtān vetāḥ lān ca tathā kramāt hastikarṇaḥ viśāla ākhyaḥ sapta rakṣas gaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ ca aṅgadaḥ nīlakarṇaḥ asau vasantaḥ yāvakaḥ tathā gandha puṣpa akṣataiḥ bhaktam sarve devāḥ graha ādayaḥ dhyāna varṇa anurūpeṇa pūjanīyāḥ prayatnāt yava vidruma saṃkāśam sindūra aruṇa saprabham mantreṇa sthāpayet kalaśa upari iha āgaccha iti ca āvāhya pādya arghyaiḥ ca pṛthagvidhaiḥ gandha puṣpa ādibhiḥ bhaktyā pūjayet tam yathāvidhi balim ca lohitam dadyāt pāyasam dadhi khaṇḍakam ghṛta liptam ca śālyannam patākām rakta varṇakām śveta ambara dharam śvetam śukla gandha anu lepanam dvi bhujam vara dam devam gadā hastam mahā balam śukla padmāsana stham ca aśvam dadyāt śveta bhūṣitam imam devāḥ iti mantreṇa sthāpayet pūrva diś dale sita vastraiḥ ca puṣpaiḥ ca śukla mālya anulepanaiḥ rakta mālya ambaram devam rakta ābharaṇa bhūṣitam meṣa kaṇṭham caturbhujam vara dam yajña nāśam ca śūla śakti gadā dharam ciṃtayet parayā bhaktyā mangalam dharaṇī sutam atasī puṣpa saṃkāśam karṇikāra sama prabham rauhiṇeyam mahā kāyam nīla nīraja locanam praśānta vadanam devam pīta vastram catur bhujam nānā ābharaṇa saṃpūrṇam mṛgendra vara vāhanam pūjayet gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ pīta gandha anulepanaiḥ vastraiḥ pīta patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ kṛsara anvitaiḥ pīta varṇam gurum dhyāyet pīta padmāsana sthitam pīta ābharaṇa saṃpannam pīta vastram catur bhujam sa bṛhaspataye iti mantreṇa nairṛtyām diśi saṃsthitam pīta candana gandhaiḥ ca pīta vastra ādi bhūṣaṇaiḥ dhūpaiḥ pīta patākābhiḥ pīta udaka nivedanaiḥ catur bhujam mahā kāyam vara dam daṇḍa dhāriṇam mahā bāhum viśāla akṣam sa akṣasūtra kamaṇḍalum stūyamānam muni śreṣṭhaiḥ sevitam daitya puṃgavaiḥ siṃhāsana gatam devam nīla indīvara locanam vilasat puṇḍarīkasya mālābhiḥ upaśobhitam nānā daitya indra putrān ca pāṭhayantam muhur muhur nānā śastra astra caturam nānā śāstra viśāradam evam dhyātvā bhṛgu śreṣṭham japan annāt parisrutam dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhiḥ saktubhiḥ kṣīra saṃyutaiḥ pūjayet parayā bhaktyā puṃḍarīkākṣataiḥ api dhyāyet saurim catur bāhum śūla hastam vara pradam indranīla nibham śyāmam bāṇa dhanus dharam nīla ambara dharam nīla padma mālā upaśobhitam ghora rūpam mahā kāyam chāyā hṛdaya nandanam mantreṇa vāyavyām diśi vinyaset bhairava candana vastraiḥ ca kṛṣṇa mālya anulepanaiḥ dhūpaiḥ nīlapatākābhiḥ balibhiḥ māṣa miśritaiḥ dhūmra varṇam sadā ketum gadā hastam vara pradam dvi bhujam bhīma kāyam ca dhūmra akṣam dhūmra vāsasam ketum kṛṇvan iti mantreṇa aiśāḥ sthāpayet diśi dhūmra varṇaiḥ ca mālyaiḥ ca dhūmra gandha anulepanaiḥ dhūmra dhūmra patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ māṣa miśritaiḥ lokapālān aham vakṣye sarva siddhi pradāyakān yeṣu pūjita mātreṣu na a labhyam vidyate kvacid hari bāṇa caya prabham dvi bhujam pīta saṃkāśam nīla indīvara locanam indrāṇīm cintayet vāme utpala dvaya dhāriṇīm pūjayet parayā bhaktyā dhṛpa gandha anulepanaiḥ nānāvidha upahāraiḥ ca patākābhiḥ dhvajaiḥ api balim kṣīra anvitam dadyāt modakam sita śarkarām uttapta svarṇa saṃkāśam vītihotram catur bhujam trinetram rakta nayanam jaṭā mukuṭa maṇḍitam nīlāñjana caya prakhyam nīla siṃhāsana sthitam mahā mahiṣam ārūḍham daṇḍa pāśa dharaiḥ vibhum karāla vadanam bhīmam jvālā ghūrṇita locanam ghora daṃṣṭra karālaiḥ ca kiṃkarāṇām gaṇaiḥ vṛtam mahiṣam cintayet vāme citraguptam ca dakṣiṇe rākṣasa indram mahā kāyam kṛṣṇa varṇam dvi bāhukam nānā ābharaṇa saṃpannam khaṅga hastam mahā balam vara muktā vimāna stham ghora rūpam jaleśvaram eṣa te iti mantreṇa nairṛtyām sthāpayet diśi bhās candana vastraiḥ ca kṛṣṇa mālya anulepanaiḥ dhūpaiḥ kṛṣṇa patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ māṣa miśritaiḥ hasta sphaṭika saṃkāśam śaṅkha kunda indu saprabham dvi bhujam pāśa hastam ca sundara aṅgam vara pradam samīraṇam kuñjara varṇa saṃnibham mṛga adhirūḍham dvi bhujam dvi netram dhvaja ambaram ca api dadhānam ekam nīla ambaram megha gaṇaiḥ vṛtam ca nīlacandana vastraiḥ ca nīla mālya anulepanaiḥ dhūpaiḥ nīlapatākābhiḥ balibhiḥ pāyasaiḥ api dhyāyet dvinetram dvi bhujam dhaneśam pīta ambaram vai naravāhanam ca dhūpaiḥ pīta patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ pāyasaiḥ api snigdha karpūra saṃkāśam tuṣārakiraṇa prabham uttaṅga vṛṣabha ārūḍham trinetram bhasma bhūṣitam tadvat khaṇḍa indu kṛta śekharam evam dhyātvā maheśānam sthāpayet īśa diś dale sita dhvaja patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ pāyasa ādibhiḥ tvam īśānaḥ iti mantreṇa ṛṣim chandaḥ samīrayan brahmānam rakta gaura agam śoṇaiḥ padma sama prabham rājahaṃsa samāyuktam vimāna vara saṃsthitam sruc sruvau dakṣiṇe haste vāme daṇḍam kamaṇḍalum mājya sthālīm tathā eva agre kuśān ca samidham tathā vāma pārśve tu sāvitrīm dakṣiṇe tu sarasvatīm nānā bhakṣya upacāraiḥ ca pūjayet gandha candanaiḥ dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhiḥ balibhiḥ ca ājya pāyasaiḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā padma dhāriṇam jagat īśvaram mādhāra bhūtam jagatām svarṇa yajña upavītinam nānā ābharaṇa sampannam phaṇā śata samanvitam om namaḥ astu iti mantreṇa sthāpayet varuṇa antare dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhiḥ balibhiḥ ca eva nirmitaiḥ tatas maṇḍala pūrve tu brahmānam pīta vāsasam bibhrantam ca śrutam tadvat tathā daṇḍa kamaṇḍalū dakṣiṇe tryambakam dhyāyet śūla khaṭvāṃdhāriṇam pāla mālinam devam bhujaṃga ābharaṇa anvitam trinetram kunda saṃkāśam bhūta preta gaṇaiḥ vṛtam atasī puṣpa saṃkāśam hāra keyūra bhūṣitam nānā ābharaṇa saṃpannam pīta vastram catur bhujam dakṣiṇe ca gadām cakram vāme śaṅkham sa padmakam śriyā dakṣiṇatas vāme sarasvatyā samanvitam tat viṣṇoḥ iti mantreṇa sthāpayet paścime tatas pūjayet gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ pāyasena ghṛtena ca gaṇeśam tu catur bāhum vyāla yajña upavītinam paraśum laguḍam vāme dakṣiṇe daṇḍam utpalam mūṣaka stham mahā kāyam śaṅkha kunda indu saprabham nānā ābharaṇa saṃpannam sarva āpatti vināśanam uttapta jāmbūnada hema saṃnibhām lakṣmīm saroja āsana saṃsthitām śubhām vāme sarojam dadhatīm tathā eva haste ca dakṣe dhṛta cāmarām ca mantreṇa aiśānyām maṇḍalāt bahis modakam paramānnam ca yavakṣīram nivedayet tatas devīm ambikām divya rūpām brahma indra ādyaiḥ stūyamānām trinetrām siṃha īśa sthām tapta jāmbūnada ābhām candra ardhena ābaddha maulim jaṭābhiḥ brahma indra ādyaiḥ durjayām māhiṣa āsyam tīkṣṇaiḥ astraiḥ dānavam mardayatīm śūlam tīkṣṇam bāṇa śaktī ca tīkṣṇe khaḍgam tīkṣṇam bibhratīm dakṣiṇena cāpam pāśam kheṭakam ca aṅkuśam ca ghaṇṭām vāme bibhratīm vai kuṭhāram śiras chedāt ardha jātam kabandham khaḍgam tīkṣṇam bibhratīm daitya rājam nāgaiḥ pāśaiḥ veṣṭayitvā samam tācchūlena enam nighnatīm deha madhye sa indraiḥ devaiḥ stūyamānām suveṇīm gandharva ādyaiḥ siddha saṃghaiḥ ca sevyām nānā vastraiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ dīpyamānām dhyāyet devīm ambikām ujvalatīm vastraiḥ mālyaiḥ yakṣadhūpaiḥ vitānaiḥ bhakṣyaiḥ bhojyaiḥ modakaiḥ pāyasaiḥ ca māṃsaiḥ piṣṭaiḥ chāgala āḍhyaiḥ aśeṣaiḥ pūjyā devī caṇḍikā abhīṣṭa dā ca śyāmām ca pṛthivīm dhyāyet paṅkaja dvaya dhāriṇīm maṇḍūka sthām dvi bhujām syonā pṛthivī iti ca arcayet nairṛtyām viśvakarmāṇam dvi bhujam ṭaṅka dhāriṇam utpalam dakṣiṇe haste padma stham pīta vāsasam svasthām sarasvatīm dhyāyet vara da abhaya dāyinīm pīta vastrām su mukuṭām deva gandharva sevitām iti mantreṇa pūjayet sita candanaiḥ balim śvetaiḥ carum dadyāt kṛsaram yāvakam tathā sthāpayet vāma digbhāge kunda puṣpaiḥ prapūjayet pūrva ādi dvāra deśe tu pūjayet ca marut gaṇaiḥ agni ādiṣu ca koṇeṣu bahis bhūtān samācaret piśācāḥ rākṣasāḥ bhūtāḥ vetāla kapi jātayaḥ nirṇāsāḥ ca eva te sarve raudrāḥ vikṛta rūpiṇaḥ tatas maṇḍala madhye tu vāruṇam pūrva vartmanā kūrmam kūrma ākṛtim kuryāt śuddha svarṇena sattamāḥ pādam pādena mānena aṅgulam parimaṇḍalam tathā kuryāt kulīram tāmra nirmitam tena ekasya vinirmāṇam dvi aṅgula āyāma vistṛtam tathā mānena maṇḍūkam tām bhūmim muni sattamāḥ sita candana vastraiḥ ca pūjanīyāḥ samaṃtataḥ yāvakaiḥ ca viśeṣeṇa bahu mantra viśāradān pañcāṅgam śivasūktam ca yathā viṣṇoḥ harasya ca mad agratas puruṣasūktam adbhyaḥ saṃbhūtam eva ca moṣa aṅga rudrake yat jāgrataḥ ca agneḥ ca viṣṇoḥ arāṭam eva ca samasta adhyāya rudreṇa śata rudra ākhyam īritam sapta aṅga rudrasya puṣpadanta ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chandaḥ tryambakam iti aṅguṣṭhābhyām namaḥ tripād ūrdhvam iti tarjanībhyām svāhā yat veda aham iti madhyamābhyām vaṣaṭ amīṣām citram iti anāmikābhyām hum yavāgūm somaḥ iti kaniṣṭhikābhyām vauṣaṭ yat jāgrataḥ iti hṛdayāya namaḥ sahasra śīrṣā iti śirase svāhā adbhyaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ iti śikhāyai vaṣaṭ māśuḥ śiśānaḥ iti kavacābhyām huṃ namaḥ te rudraḥ iti netratrayāya vauṣaṭ rūḍham brahman iti astrāya phaṭ catur dikṣu choṭikāṃdānam iti sarva aṅgeṣu home pravartamāne tu sūktān anyān ca vai japet prajapet vāruṇam sūktam tathā ca pālasūktakam rātrisūktam ca raudram ca pāvamānam samujjvalam śāktam raudram ca saumyam ca kūṣmāṇḍam jātavedasam vairājam pauruṣam sūktam sauvarṇam rudra saṃhitām ca bṛhatsāma tathā ca eva rathaṃtaram govratam ca vikarṇam ca rakṣoghnam pāvanam smṛtam gāyantam brāhmaṇāḥ ye ca pūrva ādi dvāra deśāt rudrādhyāyam ca pañcāṅgam raudraḥ iti abhidhīyate pyāyasva iti ca catuḥ saumyam sūktam pracakṣate paras paras paras paras paras paras paras paras paras paras paras paras paras paras mad saura sūktam iṣavaḥ maṅgalam smṛtam rātrisūktam hi yajva agne rakṣaḥ ghnam śaiva sūktakam pañca āpohiṣṭhā iti ca trayam pavamānam tu tat viddhi pāvamānam tu ṣoḍaśa tad ardha ardham ca ārāme kūpe tu ekaṛcam japet saṃskuryāt īkṣaṇa ādyaiḥ ca saṃpūjya ca parasparam vāgīśvaram samabhyarcya vāgīśvaryā samanvitam prāk eva tasya juhuyāt sahasram ca śatam tathā tila ājyaiḥ pāyasaiḥ vā atha pattra puṣpa akṣatena ca ūrjena samidhā kuryāt aṣṭa aṣṭau sva gṛheṣu api indra īśvara mārutānām tila ājyena ghṛtena vā ekaikām āhutim dadyāt svaiḥ mantraiḥ yathākramāt ca pratyekam aṣṭa aṣṭau ca viśeṣataḥ ekaikām āhutim dadyāt ājyena ca viśeṣataḥ śivam prajā patim viṣṇum durgām ca kamalām api sarasvatīm ca vidhivat pṛthivyai iti pāvakaiḥ bhūtebhyaḥ api āhutim dadyāt evam māsa dvayam kramāt anyeṣām madhura aktena tila lājaiḥ yayā akramam viṣṇum ca eva tu vāyavye durgāyāḥ ca tathā uttare kamalāyāḥ ca īśāne īśānasya sa bhūtakam pakṣe vai pañca kuṇḍe tu pūrva ādīnām krameṇa tu eka kuṇḍe grahān kṛtvā kṛtvā balabhidā saha paścime yasya yāgasya durgāyāḥ ca uttare diśi madhya īśāne bhūtayakṣmā ca juhuyāt deśika uttamaḥ vidhīyate dvitīye pūjanam kuryāt homam kuryāt yathāvidhi bali dānam tṛtīye tu caturthīkam caturthake nīrājanam pañcame tu pañca aha sādhyakaḥ vidhiḥ udak mukhaḥ prāc mukhaḥ vā api aiśānī ādi krameṇa tu prādakṣiṇyena yajñam tu mantraiḥ parisamūhanam mantra pūrvam sa agnikānām niragneḥ tuṣṭikena tu diś vidikṣu paristīrya mahā yāgeṣu sarvadā prāyaścitte vaiśvadeve sāyam prātar pratīṣu ca māraṇa uccāṭa homeṣu tathā saṃkalpita ākṛtī pratyavāya kule kvāpi tatra nitya ākṛtim vinā tūrya homam tatas kṛtvā tūṣṇīm eva jita indriyaḥ ante sviṣṭakṛtam dadyāt vidhānam tasya bhoḥ śṛṇu ghṛta āhutim sviṣṭakṛt ca dvija saṃskāra karmasu parivarjayet sarva oṣadhi udaka snānam kari danta uttham uṣṇayā tri gandham ca tri śītam ca kuśa mūlasya mṛttikāḥ nikṣipet snāna kumbheṣu ācārya ādīn tu sthāpayet yajamānaḥ puras kṛtvā danta kāṣṭha puraḥsaram rātrau ca bhakṣya bhojya ādyaiḥ paritoṣya yavākṣatam tathā ukta kālena pūjayet taila dhārayā vāruṇena ca sūktena surāḥ tu ādi yathākramam surāḥ tvām abhiṣiṃcantu brahman na viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ vāsudevaḥ jagannāthaḥ tathā saṃkarṣaṇaḥ prabhuḥ maṇḍala ugniḥ bhagavān yamaḥ vai nirṛtiḥ tathā varuṇaḥ pavanaḥ ca eva dhanāyakṣaḥ tathā śivaḥ brahmanā sahitaḥ śeṣaḥ dikpālāḥ pātu te sadā kīrtiḥ lakṣmī dhṛtiḥ medhā puṣṭiḥ śraddhā kriyā matiḥ buddhiḥ lajjā vapuḥ śāntiḥ tuṣṭiḥ kāntiḥ ca mātaraḥ etāḥ tvām abhiṣicantu deva pantyaḥ samāhitāḥ mad abhiṣicantu rāhuḥ ketuḥ ca tarpitāḥ deva dānava gandharvāḥ yakṣa rākṣasa pannagāḥ deva patnyaḥ drumāḥ nāgāḥ daityāḥ ca apsarasām gaṇāḥ astrāṇi sarva śastrāṇi rājānaḥ vāhanāni ca auṣadhāni ca ratnāni kālasya avayavāḥ ca ye saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailāḥ tīrthāni jaladāḥ nadāḥ ete tvām abhiṣiṃcantu sarva kāma artha siddhaye atha mācāryāya abhirūpāya pradadiyāt abhipūjayan śuddhām ca kapilām dogdhrīm ghaṭa ācāmara varjitām sāmagāya tatas dadyāt suvarṇa dakṣiṇā anvitām yūpam ādāya saṃsthāpya snāpayet vāruṇam japan parvata agra mṛdā toya nāga valmīka jātayā ca eva ca eva dāpayet kāṃsya mūlam ca dadyāt loha mayam ca vā iti mantreṇa dadyāt puṣpa añjali trayam mantreṇa punar tvāt iti mantreṇa punar puṣpam samutsṛjet prādeśa mātra vistāram madhye vṛttam ṣaṣ aṅgulam tu ūrdhvam yat dvādaśa aṅgulam aṅguṣṭha hīne lohasya tatra śūlam na kārayet tatas maṅgala pūrve tu dvijātīnām matena ca samutsṛjet ca prāsādam taḍāgam ca viśeṣataḥ catur darbham gṛhītvā tu īśāna abhimukhena tu samutsṛjet tatas paścāt vākyam etat urīyet om ityādi śrī kṛṣṇadvaipāyana abhidhāna vedavyāsa praṇīta bhaviṣya purāṇa ukta phala prapti kāmaḥ catuṣkoṇa ādi avacchinna mad kārita puṣkariṇī jalam etat ūrjitam gandha puṣpa ādi arcitam varuṇa daivatam sarva sattvebhyaḥ snāna avagāhana artham aham utsṛje tatas varuṇasūktena varuṇam nāga saṃyutam pūjayet varuṇam devam arghyam dadyāt viśeṣataḥ mahā aśva sura saṃbhūtam śrīḥ ca tā iti ca saṃjapan mantreṇa mṛdam catuṣpatha udbhavām tat viṣṇoḥ iti mantreṇa kuśa mūlena sthāpayet tīrtha toyena gandhena tathā pañcāmṛtena ca gāyatryā snāpayet devam ratna toyena sādhakaḥ mantreṇa kṣīreṇa tad anantaram sarasvatyām tā iti jātī puṣpa toyena snāpayet iti maṃtrasya kardamaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chandaḥ sarit devatā aśva khura mṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ mantrasya parvataḥ ṛṣiḥ uṣṇih chandaḥ sarasvatī devatā varuṇa prītaye catuṣpatha mṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ tat viṣṇoḥ iti mantrasya mainākaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ sarasvatī devatā varuṇa prītaye kuśa mṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ kayā naḥ iti mantrasya vasiṣṭhaḥ ṛṣiḥ anuṣṭubh chandaḥ somaḥ devatā varuṇa prītaye nāga gandha snāne viniyogaḥ maṃtrasya gargaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ vāsavaḥ devatā varuṇa prītaye viniyogaḥ sarasvatyai bhaiṣajyena iti mantrasya vāmadevaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chandaḥ viṣṇuḥ devatā varuṇa prītaye viniyogaḥ agne āyāhi iti mantrasya janārdanaḥ ṛṣiḥ jagatī chandaḥ aindrī devatā varuṇa prītaye viniyogaḥ prakṣipet pañca vrīhīn ca iyat ca iti ca saṃpaṭhan paścāt nīrājanam kuryāt pañcaghoṣa puraḥsaram mahā puṣpa saṃbhūtam darpaṇam kāsya sambhavam atha utpanna svarga saṃbhūtam kalaśam māṣa sambhavam madhu rasam puṣpa saṃbhūtam darpaṇam kāṃsya sambhavam pūrva akṣatam māṣa bhakta balim dadyāt vidhānāt tatas nārāyaṇasūktena devam nārāyaṇam vrajet anyeṣām ca eva devānām pradadyāt triṃśatam balim pṛthak pṛthak tatas dadyāt tāvantyena api bho dvijāḥ śarīram te na jānāmi ceṣṭām na eva ca na eva ca tathā aṣṭottaraśatān dīpān paritas sthāpayet kramāt tad ardham vā pañcaviṃśam mantreṇa prayajet sudhīḥ tvam sūrya candra jyotīṃṣi viṣādaḥ tvam tathā eva ca tvam eva sarva jyotīṃṣi dīpaḥ ayam pratigṛhyatām pradakṣiṇam tatas kuryāt pañcadhā saptadhā atha vā daśa banaspati rasaḥ divyaḥ gandha āḍhyaḥ surabhiḥ śuciḥ dūrvā akṣatena mālyena yuktam puṣpeṇa pūjayet dadyāt pañca añjalim paścāt viṣṇusūktam punar japet tatas su śobhane sthāne vedīm nirmāya deśikaḥ varuṇam vinyaset tatra tathā puṣkariṇīm api ca dadyāt sa dakṣiṇām cāmaram vyajanam chattram kāṃsyam loham tathā eva ca kuryāt puṣkariṇīm ramyām rājatām ca tripādikām catuṣkoṇām ca suṣamām dvi aṅguṣṭha parimaṇḍalām suvarṇa pratimām kuryāt bhālena ekena bho drijāḥ bāṇa śakti pramāṇena svarṇa pattram tu dvi aṅgulam nīrājana aṃte vipra iṃdrāḥ saṃsmaret amṛtam taret prāṇa pratiṣṭhām kuryāt tu varuṇāya nivedayet aśokaḥ khadiraḥ śālaḥ hi aśvatthaḥ bilvakaḥ tathā dhātrī kurubakaḥ ca eva bakulaḥ nāgakeśaraḥ eṣām eva kāṣṭha yūpam yajamāna pramāṇakam samādāya ca saṃsthāpya vastra ādyaiḥ pratigṛhya ca yūpa rakṣa iti mantreṇa khanitvā ca pradāpayet taḍāgasya tathā aiśānyām tathā prāsādakasya ca prāpayet dakṣiṇe bhāge āvāsasya ca madhyake naukāḥ gatvā tatas paścāt yūpam ādāya vāgyataḥ catur asram samākīrṇam catur dikṣu adhṛtaiḥ janaiḥ cakram sa darpaṇam dadyāt nāgadaṇḍa śiraḥ gataḥ evam cakram pūjayitvā śūlam nāgān ca pūjayet uccais dhvajam tatas kṛtvā na nāga iti ca saṃpaṭhet mantreṇa paṭhet dvāra dvayam tatas dikpālebhyaḥ balim dadyāt māṣa bhaktam guḍa odanam rakta puṣpa anvitam kṛtvā praṇipatya prasādayet sahasram vā dhanam dadyāt brāhmaṇāya kuṭumbine dadyāt jale mātṝḥ ca pūjayet mantharām vasutām kāntām rākṣasīm ca piśācikām nāginīḥ nāgaputrān ca madhye saṃpūjayet tatas pūrṇa ante ca pṛthak dadyāt lāja ādyaiḥ guḍa miśritaiḥ madhyame ca kanīyake svāhā iti juhuyāt paścāt praṇītām cālayet tatas prāsāde tathā ca eva jalāśaye bhārāme ca tathā setau viśeṣaḥ pañcamaḥ dvijāḥ iti paṭhitvā puṣkariṇī jalam haste gṛhītvā jale kṣipet trailokye yāni sthānāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca teṣām āpyāyanāya etat jalam utsṛjyate mayā mahā śivāya sarva bhūtānām sadā pāhi jalāśayam pibantaḥ hi avagāhantaḥ sukhinaḥ sarva jantavaḥ sadā kīrtiḥ tiṣṭhatu mama devāḥ cirāya dharaṇī tale tvad prasādāt mahābhāga nāga rāja namaḥ astu te teṣām doṣaiḥ na lipye aham svam svam gamam avāpnuyāt nārāyaṇaḥ jagatprāṇaḥ sarva kāma pradāyakaḥ mātaraḥ santu jagatām vṛkṣa yonayaḥ apāmpate rasāya atra yādasām īśvara prabho varuṇa asya āsane kīrtim sanātana namaḥ astu te suvarṇam rajatam dadyāt anaḍvāham payasvinīm dadyāt dhenu dvayam paścāt kuryāt brāhmaṇa tarpaṇam vahni pūjām puraskṛtya mantreṇa prāśayet tatas pitṝṇām dāpayet arghyam tatas devam prasādayet bimba mudrām padma mudrām nāga mudrām pradarśayet baiśvānarāḥ iti ṛcā pūjām kṛtvā vivarjayet yaḥ te prāṇān japan paścāt prakuryāt atha candanam pradakṣiṇam tatas paścāt taḍāgasya śṛṇu dvijāḥ brāhmaṇān puratas kṛtvā veda ghoṣam samuccaran mahāmaṅgala pūrveṇa praviśet bhavanam sudhīḥ tatas gṛha arcanam kuryāt brāhmaṇānām ca bhojanam dīnānām kṛpaṇānām ca savitre arghyam nivedayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge ūnaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca adhunā madhyamam vakṣye vidhim śāstra anusārataḥ muhūrte kalaśam sthāpya saṃgṛhya gaṇanāyakam sthāpayet prathamam yūpam ā pohiṣṭhā iti mantrakaiḥ devyāḥ tatas paścāt gandha dvāra iti gandhakam mahā sūktena tatas dadyāt puṣpam dūrvā akṣatam tatas kāṇḍāt iti ca mantreṇa tatas dhūpam nivedayet ye gṛhṇāmi iti ca ṛcā pūjāyām sthāpayet tatas mad adhi vidhinā sarvam kāryam ca eva adhivāsanam sarvam eva prayuṃjīta taḍāga ādiṣu paṇḍitaḥ taḍāga ādīn ācārya ādīn ca sarvaśas saṃgṛhya gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ dhūpaiḥ dīpaiḥ su śobhanaiḥ kuryāt alaṃkṛtya yathāśakti ācārya ādīn caret budhaḥ śṛṇuyāt paścime bhāge maṇḍapasya samīpatas madhyadeśe samudbhūtam yajña pātram praśasyate atha vā tatra deśīyam gurum vā śrotriya udbhavam yajñe pradhāna dvitīyam ṛtvij ācāryam eva hi mahā kalpe saṃpannam śakti kalpa parāyaṇam nigama jñāna saṃpannam yajñe pātram praśasyate patnī hīnam aputram ca śyāva dantam adaṃtakam gaṇānām yājakam ṣaṇḍham sva gotram parivarjayet apradhāneṣu yajñeṣu dāna yajñeṣu sattamāḥ dhanam ādau ca saṃśodhya tatas yajñam samācaret a yājya yājana udbhūtam pallavam vyavahārake pallave sthāpya hārakam eva ca haviḥ vikrayaṇam kṛtvā putra bhāryā divikrayī ninditāni purāṇeṣu yat kṛtam tatra tad phalam yajña sadmani viprān ca na śrāddhān bhojayet kvacid brahman ācārya mukhyaḥ asi saṃsārāt trāhi mām vibho tvad prasādāt guroḥ yajñe prāpnuyām mānasa īpsitam ciram mama śāśvatā kīrtiḥ yāvat lokāḥ cara acarāḥ prasīda tvam maheśānaiḥ pratiṣṭhā karma siddhaye tvam ādiḥ sarva bhūtānām saṃsāra arṇava tāraka jñāna amṛta prada ācārya viṣṇu rūpa namaḥ astu te brahmāsana samudbhūtam prakāśita digantaram prakīrṇa śāstra sambhāra vidhi jña praṇataḥ asmi te ha jvalat vaiśvānara prakhya dhūma śyāmā ālita ānana ṣaṣ aṅga veda tattva jñaḥ ṛtvijaḥ mokṣam samācara tatas tūrya ādi ghoṣeṇa puraskṛtya dvijottamān praviśet pūjayet gandha mālya ādyaiḥ gandha ādyaiḥ su manoharaiḥ yajñam mama saphalam kuru makha śreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu yena mantrāḥ su vistṛtāḥ yajñeṣu sākṣī sarveṣu veda veda artha tattva vid ṛgveda jñaiḥ mahā prājñaiḥ viśvarūpaiḥ namaḥ astu te māṃgalyam karmaṇām nityam śāśvatam brahma rūpiṇam pālayanti diśaḥ sarvāḥ vidiśaḥ ca tathā imāḥ dikpāla rūpiṇam vipram yajña siddhaye namāmi aham pātayet dakṣiṇam jānu vikirān vikiret tatas trailokye yāni bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca brahma viṣṇu śivāḥ sarve rakṣām kurvantu tāni vai mantreṇa paṭhet vedim praṇamya ca saṃpūjya gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ imam mantra mudā haret yājanam yajamānaḥ ca śreyasā tatra yājakaḥ idam arghyam idam pādyam dhūpaḥ yam pratigṛhyatām aiśānyām kalaśe devam saṃpūjya gaṇa nāyakam brahmānam vāsudevam ca dvitīya kalaśe yajet maṇḍalam ca eva viṣṇuḥ vai dvārakā rūpam āsthitaḥ tena tvām pūjayāmi adya svarga prāptim kuruṣva mama pūrva ādi dikṣu kalaśān saṃsthāpya ca trayam trayam ardha pāda savarṇena nirmitam tāraṇam budhaḥ mandaram kalpayitvā tu gopīnām ca kulena vā bhū kalaśa upari saṃsthāpya mandaram saṃprapūjayet syonā pṛthivī iti mantreṇa gandha puṣpaiḥ pṛthigvidhaiḥ prādeśa mātra loham tu raupyeṇa gandhamādanam mṛdā saṃghaṭanaiḥ paścāt kadācana ṛcā yajet mantrasya sūryaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ sūryaḥ devatā gandhamādana prītaye viniyogaḥ tolaka dvaya mānena yavānām piṣṭaka upari mantrasya kardamaḥ ṛṣiḥ jagatī chandaḥ śacī devatā supārśva prītaye viniyogaḥ pūjayet pārśva kalaśe dhātṛ ādīn pūrva diś kramāt yat pūjayet parayā bhaktyā gandha puṣpa akṣata ādinā mambā ambikā iti mantrasya nalinaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ śambhuḥ devatā jaya prītaye viniyogaḥ gāyatryā pūjayet dakṣe paścimam kalaśa dvayam gāyatryāḥ viśvāmitraḥ ṛṣiḥ savitā devatā vijaya prītaye viniyogaḥ uttare yugma kalaśe manonnāḥ iti mantrasya antakaḥ ṛṣiḥ bṛhatī chandaḥ nirṛtiḥ devatā bhūta prītaye viniyogaḥ bhūtaśuddhim tatas kṛtvā nyāsam kṛtvā vidhānāt vidhāya arghya ādikam ca eva dharma ādi maṇḍale yajet madhye ādhāra śakti ādīn varuṇam madhyatas yajet pūrva ādi kramāt ca eva indra ādīn kuladevatāḥ pārśva dvaye karṇikāyāḥ brahmānam ca api anantakam indra abhiṣeka mantrasya vādyam gāndhāra rāgakam vādyam rāgam ca eva varāṭakam rakṣas adhipasya saṃgrāmam vaitālam vādyam ucyate nāṭaka ākhyam tathā rāgam varuṇasya api mama śṛṇu vādyam rājya abhiṣeka ākhyam rāgaḥ vasanta saṃjñakaḥ īśasya nandighoṣa ākhyam vādyam kāmadaḥ suvarṇam dundubhiḥ vādyam brahmaṇaḥ kathitaḥ budhaiḥ vādyam gāndhāra tāra ākhyam rāgaḥ ca aṅgāravātakaḥ some ghoṣe bhavet vādyam jaleśasya mahātmanaḥ mālava ākhyaḥ bhavet rāgaḥ pattra agreṣu mahān api svaiḥ svaiḥ dharmaiḥ ca saṃgṛhya dakṣiṇe pṛthivīm yajet syonā pṛthivī iti mantreṇa upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ maṇḍapasya uttare bhāge mahādevam prapūjayet mahādevam dvi bhujam ḍamaru śūla dharam umāsahitam dhyātvā vetālāḥ ca piśācāḥ ca rākṣasāḥ ca sarī sṛpāḥ asmāt prayāntu mama sthānāt ye ca anye vighna kārakāḥ madhu yuktam pāyasa annam varuṇāya nivedayet pītam ca ālohitam kṛṣṇam śuddham kṛṣṇam ca dhūmrakam pītam śuklam tathā citram śvetam annam yathākramam balayaḥ tu digīśānām grahānām api tān śṛṇu prīraudanam graheśāya śukla annam śaśine smṛtam lohitānnam ca bhaumāya budhāya kṣīraṣāṣṭikam māṃsaudanam śaneḥ jñeyam rāhoḥ ca kṛṣṇaiḥ bhaktakam dhūmra varṇam tu tāmram tu bhaumasya kṣīraṣāṣṭikam piṣṭaka annam śivasya uktam bhūtānām māṣa bhaktakam evam balim vidhāya atha agre kumbham niveśayet pradeśadvyaṅgulam nāma aṣṭottarasahasrakam maśā vāñchti sūtraiḥ ca saṃveṣṭya pihitam tathā śarāvam ca punar dadyāt vardhanīm pratipūjayet phaṭ iti mantreṇa dhyātvā devam jaleśvaram sūktam yajet yathāśakti śatam aṣṭa uttaram japet bhuvi vinyaset nāgān aṣṭau pūrva ādiṣu kramāt anantam pūjayet pūrvam mānena aṅgula mātrakam nirmitam kāñcanena eva sapta vartikayā sudhīḥ rājatam vāsukim nāgam yajet pattra antare punar pāda mātre api ca aṅguṣṭha mātram tāmrasya bhakṣyakam pañca aṅgulam tolikayā loham karkoṭakam punar vartikābhiḥ ṣoḍaśabhiḥ bṛhat parva pramāṇakam śaṅkhapālam kuśa mayam ardha pādena nirmitam aṅguṣṭha mātram raktena nāgam tālaka mātrakam aṅguṣṭhe tolakam paścāt padma nāgam punar yajet tolaka ardha pramāṇena aṅgulam parimāṇāt dhyātvā anantam catur bāhum śukla sapta phaṇa anvitam dakṣiṇa ūrdhva kare śaṅkham adhi cakram pratiṣṭhitam sarva alaṃkāra saṃyuktam evam dhyātvā yathāvidhi sahasra śīrṣa iti mantreṇa pūjayitvā balim haret lājaiḥ ca tila sammiśraiḥ kṣīra yuktaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ caturvidham tathā śvetam sarva alaṃkāra saṃyutam svakīyam prajapet tatra āpyāyasva iti vai ṛcā piṇyākam nāgajihvām ca tathā sarjarasam dadhi padmam ṭaṃkam dadhānam ca bhujābhyām nāga sattamam manonnāḥ iti mantreṇa ājyam somaḥ balim haret pañca nadyaḥ iti ṛcā viṣṇukrāntā baliḥ bhavet śarkarā kuṣṭhakam ca eva baliḥ tasya prakīrtitaḥ dvi bhujam śaṅkhapālam ca śaṅkha ābham śaṅkha dhāriṇam padmāsana stham padmābhyām hastābhyām ca varam vibhum mantrābhyām pūjayet pṛthak ghaṭaudanam bhṛṅgarājam padmam ca valayaḥ tayoḥ sva gṛhya uktena vidhinā saṃsthāpya agnim kuśaṇḍikām kṛtvā ājyasya saṃskāram vāruṇam śrapayet carum mad ekaikām āhutim dadyāt grahānām ca trayam trayam palāśa samidham paścāt pratiṣṭhām āhuti trayam śivasya paramānnena juhuyāt aṣṭa saṃkhyayā madhu ājya guḍa miśrābhiḥ lājābhiḥ juhuyāt pṛthak lājāni yathoktam vitaret ekaikām āhutim kramāt sthālīpākasya juhuyāt ekaikām āhutim punar varuṇam ca samuddiśya rudram sarvam pṛthak pṛthak syonā pṛthivī iti mantreṇa vrīhimṛttikayā punar yaḥ naḥ iti mantreṇa kayā naḥ iti vai punar ca eva catuṣpatha mṛdā tathā imāḥ rudra iti mantreṇa śrīḥ ca iti ṛcā punar padma khaṇḍasya ca mṛdā snāpayet su samāhitaḥ tat viṣṇoḥ iti mantreṇa tathā puṣpa udakena ca tīrtha udakena kṛṣṇena tri raktena tri śītakaiḥ pañca raktena raktānām mṛdā kaiḥ ca kuśa udakaiḥ svarṇa toyaiḥ ca kalaśaiḥ aṣṭottaraśatena tu taijasaiḥ mārttikaiḥ ca api aṣṭāviṃśatibhiḥ tathā dhūḥ asi iti tatas dhūpam hotre ca āhuti dīpakam ca sindūram svabhāve raktakam tathā mālatī kusumaiḥ kṛtyaiḥ nāgān saṃsthāpayet tatas dhārābhiḥ śatapuṣpābhiḥ gandha toya ādibhiḥ tathā athavā aśvattha pattreṣu vaṭa pattreṣu vā sudhīḥ maṇḍapasya uttare deśe śayyām nirmāya śobhanām rājatam vāruṇam tasyām pāda mātreṇa nirmitām aṅguṣṭha mātram saṃsthāpya tatas puṣkariṇīm api svarṇa pādena ghaṭitām catur asrām su śobhanām aṅguṣṭha mātram sampūjya varuṇāya nivedayet yathāśakti tatas gām ca sambhave pañcaviṃśatiḥ suvarṇam rājatam ca eva dhānyam vāsaḥ varāṭakam tathā tatas ukṣatāya bhaumāya kṛtvā ca ājya āhuti trayam lājān dadhi samāyuktam ghṛtam madhu guḍam tathā piṣṭakam ca eva śaṣkulī gandhapuṣpakam pañcāmṛtam pañcaratnam garbhe dadyāt samāhitaḥ gaṅgā jaleśayoḥ madhye pañcaghoṣa puraḥsaram dhruvam dhruva iti mantreṇa yaṣṭimān mantrayet tatas yajña priyā asi devi tvam sarva vighna vināśinī pāhi mām sarva pāpebhyaḥ ātmanā tvam sthirībhava iti āmantrya yajet ca eva gāyatrīm ca paṭhet tatas tathā puṣkariṇīm ca eva vardhanīm kalaśa udaraiḥ aniṣṭam mārjayet nāgān uddhṛtya kalaśam tathā pāṣāṇa abhyantaram kṛtvā gomayaiḥ parilipya ca varuṇam puṣkariṇyām ca jala madhye vinikṣipet atra svāmī bhavān nāga rakṣaṇīyaḥ tvayā janaḥ gāyatreṇa tvā chandasā amīmantram saṃśrāvayet punar saṃpūjya gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ puratas nikṣipet diśi pidhāya nāga rājānam ṛcābhyām parisūtrakaiḥ san niruddhya āśu saṃsthāpya balim dadyāḥ dvidhā nataḥ pūrva bhāge puṣkariṇyām harita ābham sa vajrakam mantreṇa nyasya lāja āhutim kule manaḥśilām pravālam ca agnim īḍa iti saṃpaṭhet vaiśvānareṇa mantreṇa paṭhat lāṃja āhutim punar dadyāt ye te śata mantreṇa paścime kāṭikam nyaset mantrakam dadyāt samāyuktam kuvidaṇḍam ṛcā paṭhan mantreṇa pradadyāt āhutim punar aiśānyām mandrakam raṃgamī śāvāḥ iti saṃpaṭhan saṃsthāpya ājya āhutim dadyāt tam īśānaḥ ṛcā punar mantra saṃyuktaiḥ devam nārāyaṇam yajet baruṇa ātmakam tatas dhyātvā tatas nīrājanam paṭhet paṭhet dharmaḥ vaṃśam tatas kuryāt utsarga ante vidhīyate tatas devīm punar kṛtvā dattvā puṣpa añjali trayam utsṛṣṭam sarva sattvebhyaḥ dṛśyate jalam ūrjitam ramatīm sarva bhūtāni snāna pāna avagāhanaiḥ varuṇam ca tatas devam puṣkariṇyām ca nikṣipet pakṣiṇaḥ ca śubhān tatra bhekam kūrmam ca kardamam haivālam prakṣipet ca eva dakṣiṇām tad anantaram suvarṇam dhānya ratnam ca ācāryāya pṛthak dadet mad ṛtvigbhyaḥ ca pṛthak dadyāt yathā vitta anusāratas nityam samāpya vidhivat dadyāt pūrṇāhutim punar dadyāt arghyam ca sūryāya hastāsaḥ iti saṃjapan tatas pradakṣiṇa āvartam saṃveṣṭya kṣīra dhārayā prāsāda pakṣe prāsādam ārāme atha maṇḍapam śata adhidhārayā śaktyā tri vāram brāhmaṇaiḥ saha eva yajamānaḥ sa patnīkaḥ praviśet sva gṛham punar tatas gṛha arcanam kṛtvā brāhmaṇān atha bhojayet kumārīḥ ca kumārān ca dīna andha kṛpaṇān api nārāyaṇam tatas dadyāt vipram uddiśya bhaktyāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāga viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ cha iti madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāgaḥ samāptaḥ viṣayānukramaṇikā atha dvitīya bhāgaḥ maṇḍala nirmāṇa prakāra varṇanam ślo. pūrṇapātra parimāṇa varṇana puraḥsara dravya viśeṣa karma viśeṣa paratvena dakṣiṇā ādi mūlya parimāṇa varṇana ślo māsa āśraya karma aupayika tayā caturvidha māsa svarūpa lakṣaṇa nirṇaya varṇanam ślo agnikarman kuśa kaṇḍikā sthālīpāka vidhāna varṇanam ślo agni jihvā dhyāna varṇanam ślo. madhyama prakāreṇa gṛha vāstu pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo iti dvitīya bhāgaḥ upavana ādi pratiṣṭhā varṇanam uvāca hi maṇḍalam kārayitvā tu catur asram samam śubham aiśānyām kalaśe devam tatra nātham prapūjayet madhyame kalaśe pūjā grahānām ca tatas param sva dikṣu dvāra deśe tu paścima dvāra deśayoḥ brahmāṇam ca api anantam ca madhyatas varuṇam yajet varuṇam ca uda kumbha stham bhūta śākhāsu śobhanam tena ca āvāhayāmi tvām vibho svargāya vai bhava pūrva gam mandaram sthāpya toraṇa upari sattamāḥ karṇikāyām vāsudevam śuddha sphaṭika saṃnibham mukuṭa ādyaiḥ alaṃkṛtam dakṣiṇe kamalā tasya vāme puṣṭi vyavasthitiḥ siddha kiṃnara yakṣa ādyaiḥ stūyamānam sura asuraiḥ saṃpūjya vidhivat bhaktyā viṣṇoḥ arāṭaḥ iti ṛcā dale saṃkarṣaṇa ādīn ca vimalā ādyāḥ ca nāyikāḥ saṃpūjya dhūpa dīpa ādyaiḥ upahāraiḥ anuttamaiḥ dhūpaḥ deva baliḥ kṣīram paramānnam ghṛta plutam dhyāyet somam karṇikāyām dakṣiṇe padma saṃsthitam śukla ābham dvi bhujam śāntam keyūra ādi upaśobhitam praśasyam deva yakṣāṇām vara da abhaya hastakam imam devāḥ iti ṛcā upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ pūjayet ca niśānātham ghṛta bhaktam nivedayet indram jayantam ākāśam varuṇam ca agnim eva ca īśānam tatpuruṣam ca eva vāyum pūrva ādi dikṣu api karṇikāyāḥ vāma bhāge varada abhaya hastakam dvi bhujam śukla varṇam ca mahādevam prapūjayet tryambakeṇa ca mantreṇa dadyāt ca ghṛta piṣṭakam mad bhagavante devāya juhuyāt aṣṭau āhutīḥ paramānnena saumyasya juhuyāt aṣṭaviṃśatim dadet brahmaṇaḥ varuṇasya atha ekaikām āhutim tathā grahānām sva ukta samidhā digīśānām pṛthak pṛthak ekaikām āhutim dadyāt ājyena ca yathākram bhūmalī dhūmalī śvetā lohitā kanakaprabhā atiraktā padmarāgā vahnijihvā prakīrtitāḥ tāsām mantrāḥ krameṇa eva bindavaḥ yakāra sthāḥ ca vijñeyāḥ aṣṭa svara vibhūṣitāḥ ekaikām āhutim dadyāt dattvā ca eva samāhitaḥ agnīṣomam tathā indram ca pṛthivīm antarikṣakam sthālīpākena juhuyāt madhu kṣīra yava anvitam ekaikām āhutim teṣām samuddiśya pṛthak pṛthak eva maṅgalam paramānnam ca saura sūktam tathā japet tatas saṃmṛjya vidhinā snāpayitvā yathāvidhi yūpam garbhe vinikṣipya tatra kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ dhvajān āropya prāñcam dadyāt somam vanaspatim bhās adāt iti paṭhitvā ca vṛkṣāṇām karṇa vedhanam sūcyā su tīkṣṇayā kāryam dvi pātre vāma dakṣiṇe tṛpti artham yāvakam laḍḍukam tathā piṣṭakam ca pṛthak dadyāt kumārī bālakeṣu ca niśā rañjita sūtreṇa saṃveṣṭya ca sa cūrṇakam pradadyāt dohakam ca eva vṛkṣāṇām vidhi pūrvakam prāśayet ca eva tān vṛkṣān imam mantram udāharet vṛkṣa agrāt patitasya api ārohāt patitasya ca maraṇe vā asthibhaṅge vā kartā pāpaiḥ na lipyate dhenum suvarṇam dhānyam ca ācāryāya pradakṣiṇam dattvā ca ṛtvije dadyāt suvarṇam rajatam tathā dhānyam ca brahmaṇe dadyāt ghṛta bhojyam sa śarkaram yajña iṣṭām ca dakṣiṇām dadyāt sadasyāya tathā eva ca adhi kalaśam samānīya snānam kuryāt vidhānāt kṛtvā ca eva aniśam kuryāt dadyāt pūrṇāhutim tathā sarva oṣadhi udakam prokṣya tri vāram kṣīra dhārayā saṃveṣṭya tris catur vāram brahmaghoṣa puraḥsaram taṃtau viśeṣam vakṣyāmi varāḥ eva idam iti ṛcā balam kāmam hayagrīvam mādhavam puruṣottamam vāsudevam dhanādhyakṣam tatas nārāyaṇam yajet evam saṃpūjya vidhinā dakṣiṇe pṛthivīm yajet śuddha kāñcana varṇa ābhām vara abhaya karām śubhām maṇḍūka sthām ca dvi bhujām sarva alaṃkāra sundarām syonā pṛthivī iti mantreṇa pūjayitvā yathāvidhi pāyasam madhu saṃyuktam balim dadyāt sa śarkaram vāmatas viśvakarmāṇam śuddha sphaṭika saṃnibham saṃyajet viśvan iti ṛcā tam ca balim ca madhu piṣṭakam dadyāt japet ca kauṣmāṇḍam sūktam pauruṣam eva ca yat yat yat yat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat picchile patitānām ca ucchritena aṅga saṅgāt ye ca atra prāṇinaḥ santi rakṣām kurvati setavaḥ gartam kṛtvā pañcaratnam saṃsthāpyam tad anantaram saṃsthāpya ca tatas yūpam saṃpūjya ca yathāvidhi matsya tatas dadyāt iṣṭām ca vara dakṣiṇām pūjayet dvija dāmpatyam lājābhiḥ paripūjitam poṭikām ca tatas śayyām dadyāt iṣṭa artha siddhaye setau vṛkṣa sthitāḥ ye syuḥ ropayet kadalām śubhām teṣām pārśva dvaye api evam ārāme ca pṛthak pṛthak iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhya ma parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ go pracāra vaiśiṣṭya varṇanam uvāca go pracāram punar vakṣye viśeṣam tatra mama śṛṇu yajet viṣṇum sa lakṣmīkam upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ upacāraiḥ ca brahmānam rudram ca eva karālikām varāham soma sūrye ca mahādevam yathākramam ca eva yathā miśritaiḥ ekaikām āhutim dadyāt lāja ādiṣu pṛthak pṛthak samutsṛjya vidhānena yūpam saṃsthāpya pūjayet tri hasta mātram racitam kuryāt nāga phaṇa anvitam lāja saṃyukta vidhinā viśveṣām iti san japan mayi gṛbhṇāmi iti sampūjya yūpam ca rudra daivatam saṃpūjya rudram pañcāṅgam dhānyam vastram ca dakṣiṇām hotre tathā hotre anyeṣām iṣṭa dakṣiṇām go pracāre ca śaileyam yūpam hasta dvaya anvitam pañca śīrṣa anvitam kuryāt hasta mātram praropayet yūpam ca caitravṛkṣam ca kuṇḍalī maṭha pīṭhikām saṃspṛśya ācamya vai viprāḥ prāṇāyāmena śudhyati catur hasta pramāṇena śata kuṇḍena saṃmitam tad ardham ca kaniṣṭhena aṣṭaka aṣṭa adhikam bhavet mahā lokaḥ tathā gāvaḥ sarva deva su pūjitāḥ gobhyaḥ eṣā mayā bhūmiḥ sampradattā śubha arthinā yāvanti tṛṇa gulmāni santi bhūmau śubhāni ca pūrve sīmām nibadhnīyāt kṛtvā vṛkṣasya ropaṇam setum kṛtvā dakṣiṇatas paścima iṅgāra ropaṇam uttare khānayet kūpam tasya sīmām na laṅghayeta tatas sahasradhārām ca śasyena paripūritām na kuryāt agni digbhāge dakṣiṇām vā tatas śubhām pātayati āśu brahmahatyāḥ ca vindati yāvat tṛṇāni tad bhūmau sapta saṃkhyāni saṃkhyayā tāvatkālam vaset svarge viṣṇu lokāt na tad cyutiḥ vṛṣotsargāḥ vasāne tu pradadyāt yaḥ mahīm dvijāḥ na yāti viprāḥ preta tvam tasmāt viprāt amatsarāḥ tatra mānam pṛthak ca eva śṛṇuta atra samāgatāḥ yāvat kāla avadhe sīmā atīte na asti pātakam maṇḍapam pūjayet sūryam vāsudeva samanvitam ca aṣṭa aṣṭa pṛthak pṛthak yatna siddham tatas kṛtvā śulka ghaṭa catuṣṭayam samutsṛjet japet paścāt sauram sūktam ca vaiṣṇavam vaṭa pattre tu saṃlikhya citram nirmāya vā punar dikpālān saṃnyaset svāsu svāsu dikṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhet mantrān indra ādīnām yathākramam dharma saṃsthāpana arthāya ātmanaḥ vibhavāya ca bho vahne meṣa vāhaḥ tvam catur śṛṅga virājita tvam hi dharmāt trātum arhasi tvam dakṣiṇa āśā īśa mahā mahiṣa vāhana tvam hi dharmāt trātum arhasi mañca sthaḥ rākṣasa indraḥ tvam khaḍga pāṇiḥ mahā balaḥ tvam hi dharmāt trātum arhasi vāri rāj dhvaja hastaḥ asi pavanaḥ mṛga vāhanaḥ tvam hi dharmāt trātum arhasi dhanādhyakṣaḥ gadā hastaḥ piṅga akṣaḥ naravāhanaḥ tvam hi dharmāt trātum arhasi maheśvaraḥ tvam hi dharmāt trātum arhasi anantaḥ nāga rājaḥ yaḥ dharām uddhṛtya sthāti anātham maṇḍapam tvam hi dharmatas srātum arhasi caturṇām eva varṇānām sthiti artham mṛga pakṣiṇām prītaye vāsudevasya evam maṇḍapam utsṛjet bhagne stambhe tṛṇe jīrṇe punar tṛṇa pradāpane sthāpane ca tathā eva asya pratiṣṭhā syāt yathā akṣayā pratiṣṭhāyām kṛtāyām tu dharmaḥ mama syāt na pātakam mānuṣāḥ paśavaḥ ye ca nivasanti iha maṇḍape svasti ca astu sadā teṣām tvad prasādāt kila prabho tatas triguṇa sūtreṇa su trāmāṇā iti vai ṛcā saptadhā veṣṭayitvā tu dakṣiṇām saṃprakāśya ca maṇḍape bhojayet viprān teṣām dadyāt yathā īpsitān dīnebhyaḥ ca pṛthak dadyāt gṛham vipra puraḥsaram praviśet tūrya ghoṣeṇa prakuryāt ca gṛha arcanam evam prapāyām vijñeyaḥ viśeṣaḥ varuṇam vrajet vāsudevena sahitam sa aṅga upāṅgam sa dakṣiṇam sthālīpāka vidhānena prakuryāt deśika uttamaḥ haiḥ ācāryāya gṛham dadyāt pariccheda samanvitam ṛtvije tāmra pātram ca jala pūrṇam ca dhānyakam dikpālān dvāra deśe tu kūpa yāge viśeṣataḥ brahmānam nāga rājānam dvārapālau ca paścime bali dānam vidhānena kṛtvā dadyāt yathāvidhi patākānām atas tattvam pravakṣyāmi yathākramam vajrī ca dhūmalī kṛṣṇā pītā ca eva atha vāruṇī mā ca eva kumbheṣu pūjayet devān maheśam prathamam budhaḥ ca madhya kalaśe brahmānam ca tatas param dakṣiṇe kalaśe viṣṇum karṇikāyām jaleśvaram saṃpūjya vaṭa pattre ca nāgān saṃlikhya nāga jaiḥ tān pravakṣyāmi anaṃtaḥ vāsukiḥ tathā puṇḍarīka dala ābhāsa śubha karṇa anta locana sarva nāgasya śūrasya kṛta svastika lāñchana maṃkhapālaḥ iti khyāta jalādhāra pratīkṣaka ti pītaiḥ suvarṇa ābhaiḥ candra ardha aṃkita mastaka dīpta dīpta bhoga kṛta āṭopa śubha lakṣaṇa lakṣita yaḥ suvarṇena varṇena padma pattra āyata īkṣaṇaḥ pañcabindu kṛta ābhogaḥ grīvāyām eka śekharaḥ nāginyaḥ nāga kanyāḥ ca tathā nāga kumārakāḥ sarve te prīta manasaḥ pūjām gṛhṇantu mama sadā sva gṛhya uktena vidhinā kṛtvā agni sthāpanam budhaḥ ājyam saṃskṛtya juhuyāt digīśānām yathākramam mahā āditya ādi grahān ca eva brahmānam kṛṣṇam eva ca madhu piṣṭena ca śivam varuṇam juhuyāt tatas prādeśa mātram saṃprokṣya yūpam ca asya pramāṇakam catur asram śūla yuktam gaṇān ānīya pūjayet tān nāgān pañcaratnam kṣipet tatas
