su trāmāṇā iti mantreṇa tridhā saṃveṣṭya sūtrakaiḥ rañjitaḥ kadala vṛkṣam varuṇāya samutsṛjet trātāram iti mantreṇa vastra mālyena bhūṣayet bharṇa vedham tatas kṛtvā utsṛjet vākyam uccaran adya ityādi sarva bhūtebhyaḥ phala puṣpa pattra chāyā āvṛta mukhya nānā taru viracitam ārāmam vanaspati devatam su pūjitam vedavyāsa ādi ukta phala avāptaye amuka ṛṣi sagotraḥ amuka deva śarma aham utsṛje mahā utsavam tatas kuryāt kṛtvā baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhet vṛkṣa agrāt patitasya api ārohāt patitasya vā maraṇe ca asthibhaṅge vā kartā pāpaiḥ na lipyate tad dos mana arthāya tasya api etat pratiṣṭhitam madhye yūpam samāropya yatnatas madhu lāja akṣatam dadyāt añjanam mālyam eva ca niśā sūtreṇa saṃveṣṭya kadala viṭapam nyaset beṣṭayet kṣīra dhārām ca pātayet ghṛta dhārayā toya anvitam guccha yuktam veṣṭayet sva gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhā varṇanam uvāca tad kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhām ca vakṣye vai dvijasattamāḥ sthāpayet kalaśam tatra viṣṇum somam samarcayet praveṣṭayet vṛkṣān mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtya bhūṣayet bhūṣaṇa ādinā bharṇa vedham tatas kṛtvā utsṛjet vākya pūrvakam dadyāt yūpam madhya deśe ropayet kadalām tatas rambhāḥ ca ropayet dikṣu sthālīpāka vidhānāt aṣṭau aṣṭau ca juhuyāt anyeṣām ca ghṛtena tu anantaram ekaikām āhutim dadyāt sviṣṭakṛt tad anantaram dakṣiṇām ca tatas dadyāt pūrṇām dattvā āhutim vrajet eka ādi vṛkṣam vṛkṣāṇām vidhim vakṣye dvijottamāḥ yajet ca tathā digīśān ca tathā yakṣān ācāryam toṣayet tatas dhenum ca dakṣiṇām dadyāt dohadam vṛkṣa pūjanam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge tṛtīyaḥ a dhyāyaḥ kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhā varṇanam uvāca atha aśvattha pratiṣṭhāyām mūle bāhu pramāṇake sthaṇḍilam kārayet tatra candanena ukṣitam tathā pūrvedyu rātri samaye tat viṣṇoḥ iti vai ṛcā sthāpayet vāriṇā pūrṇam kayā na iti ca gandhakam dadyāt dūrvā akṣatam kalpe brāhmaṇa traya bhojanam kārayet sita sūtraiḥ ca veṣṭayet candana ukṣitaiḥ pūjya brahmānam ca pare ghaṭam sva dikṣu dikpatīn ca eva vṛkṣa mūle nava grahān maṇḍale śivam abhyarcya pīṭha pūjā puraḥsaram atha dhyānam pravakṣyāmi śvetam vṛṣabham eva ca dvi bhujam śūla hastam ca sarva ābharaṇa saṃyutam het sva sāmarthyāt bhūtaśuddhim samācaret tatas arghya pātram kṛtvā tu pīṭha pūjām samācaret gaṇeśam guru pādam ca jayam bhadram samāhitaḥ madhye ādhāra śaktim ca kūrma anantau sa padmakau candra sūrya agnika ādīnām maṇḍalāni kramāt yajet punar pātra antara stham ca gṛhītvā kusumam budhaḥ pāṇikacchapikām kṛtvā dhyāyet vai varuṇam tathā madhuparkam ca āsanam ca pṛcchet ca svāgatam punar mudrām pradarśya vidhivat aṅga pūjām samācaret pūrva ādi pattre indra ādīn brahmānam madhyatas yajet tad anantam puratas ca eva teṣām astrāṇi tad bahis madhye toya adhipam rudram śāntam ca eva praśāntakam kāmam dharmam adharmam ca dikṣu nārāyaṇam śivam nairṛte ca yajet durgām pārśvayoḥ ca śatakratum vināyakam ca viṣṇum ca gaṅgām pṛthivī ṣaṣṭikam ṣoḍaśena upacāreṇa pūjayet ca viśeṣataḥ maṇḍalasya uttare bhāge nāga rūpam anantakam pañca kṛṣṇālakaiḥ kuryāt bṛhat parva pramāṇakam māropayet ca akṣata ādyaiḥ śveta candana puṣpakaiḥ varuṇam juhuyāt pūrvam madhunā pāyasena vā tila akṣataiḥ vā ājyaiḥ vā trimadhu aktaiḥ atha api vā kuryāt ekaikām āhutim dadyāt puṣpaiḥ tila ghṛtena ca nārāyaṇam śivam durgām gaṇeśam ca grahān niśi aṣṭau aṣṭau ca juhuyāt ghṛtaiḥ eka āhutiḥ bhaveta brahmā ayudhvānam iti mantreṇa brahmānam pāyasena tu eka āhutim tatas dadyāt āpohiṣṭhā iti vā tribhiḥ imam varuṇaḥ iti vā ṛcā punar mātasya yam iti punar pañca varṇam yathākramāt tatas sviṣṭakṛte dadyāt balim dadyāt anukramāt madhu ājya pāyasam dadyāt varuṇāya viśeṣataḥ yava kṣīram digīśebhyaḥ hi anyebhyaḥ pāyasena tu nāgāya piṣṭakam dadyāt lājā homa aṣṭakam punar tu bāṇa ratti suvarṇakaiḥ tatra pūrva ardhe caturasrake varuṇam vinyaset tatra tathā puṣkariṇīm api om adya ityādi viṣṇu rūpāya karuṇāya śruti rati ādi ukta vedavyāsa sapraṇīta agniṣṭoma phala prāptaye puṣkariṇī pratiṣṭhā karmaṇi imām puṣkariṇīm suvarṇa rājatām sva gṛhya uditām sa alaṃkārām su pūjitām amuka gotraḥ te aham saṃpradade iti utsarga vākyam om adya ityādi brāhmaṇa mukhyebhyaḥ mama agniṣṭoma ādi aneka phala prāptaye imam jalāśayam varuṇa daivatam su pūjitam caturmukha sahitam catur sattva avacchinna apara api c pūrva avasthāyinīm yaṣṭim samāropya vidhānāt tena nāga yaṣṭi antare kṣipet tatra eva ananta nāgam ca mantram etat udīrayet puṇḍarīka dala ābhāsa śubha rakta anta locana dakṣiṇām ca tatas dadyāt tatas pūrṇām vidhāya ca mocayet makarān grāhān mīna kūrmān jalecarān puṣkariṇyām ca tris kuryāt khātam sarva pradakṣiṇām māditya adhyāyakam japtvā kṣipet lāja kapardakān pātayet kṣīra dhārām ca sahasreṇa śatena ca sūtreṇa veṣṭayet prājñaḥ raktena ca catuṣkramāt pathini saṃtoṣayet dīnān saṃtoṣya ca gṛham vrajet tat śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ sarovara ādi pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca nalinyāḥ ca tathā vāpyāḥ hradasya dvijasattamāḥ vidhim vakṣye saha aṅgena vidhānam śṛṇuta dvijāḥ mantreṇa tathā astraiḥ śataiḥ api sva maṇḍale śubhe sthāne viśet pūrva mukhena tu gaṇeśam varuṇam ca eva ghaṭe saṃpūjayet śivam vāgīśam ca tathā viṣṇum sūrye kumbhe samarcayet pāyasena āhutim dadyāt varuṇāya ghṛtena ca ekaikām āhutim dadyāt anyeṣām ca sruveṇa ca yūpam niveśayet paścāt dadyāt dhenum ca dakṣiṇām pūrṇam dadyāt savitre arghyam dattvā tu sva gṛham vrajet bhū hīna ārāmasya ca tathā eka vṛkṣasya ca dvijāḥ araṇya madhye pāścātye uttare vā viśeṣataḥ maṇḍapam vartulam kuryāt arghya hasta pramāṇakam tad dakṣiṇe bhavet kuṇḍam catur asram samam śubham mandara ādikam āvāhya tatas saṃpūjayet kramāt bhṛgum karṇa samārūḍham sarva bhūṣaṇa bhūṣitam ca eva sarvatas dvārapālam ca saṃpūrṇam gaurī ādīn kalaśeṣu ca svāsu dikṣu digīśānām bali puṣpa akṣata ādi nā vedi pārśve tatas gatvā vedim āvāhya pūjayet āsanam kalpayitvā tu sāmānya arghyam vidhāya ca aiśāne kalaśe vidyut brahmānam ca tathā grahān maḍala īśam vāsudevam sa āsanam ca bṛhaspatim pūjayet parayā bhaktyā pāyasa annam balim haret dhyātvā āropayet evam bāla ādīn atha nāyakān vimalā ādyāḥ nāyikāḥ ca digīśān ca yathāvidhi ṣoḍaśa uccaiḥ pṛthak rūpaiḥ prati puṣpa añjali kramāt paritas pūjayet viṣṇum śivam durgām sarasvatīm śuddha sphaṭika saṃkāśam dhyāyet somam caturmukham aśva ārūḍham divya rūpam padma akṣam dhṛta puṣpakam mahā vanaspatim dhyāyet dvi bhujam pīta vāsasam sva ratha stham mahā bāhum śaṅkha aṅkuśa sa kheṭakam daśa svara anvitam toyam svabhāvam tamasā anvitam mantraḥ ayam devadevasya pūjāyām viniyojayet nīlam jayam bhṛṅgiṇam ca paritas ca yathākramāt tatas kuśa kaṇḍikām kṛtvā sthālīpākam vidhānāt aṣṭottaraśatam ca eva somāya dvādaśa āhutīḥ vānaspateḥ tathā aṣṭau ca ājye anyeṣām vidhīyatām ekaikām āhutim dadyāt sapta jihvām anantaram vāstoṣpataye iti mantreṇa sthālīpāka dvayam nayet pūrve abjaiḥ agram kāṃsya vastram ratnam dikṣu yathākramam brīhayaḥ ca iti mantreṇa tathā ca saritaḥ ca mama mitra trayaḥ ca iti tathā pūṣā ca me ṛcā tathā saṃsthāpya vrīhīn saṃvāpya tatra eva vidhi pūrvakam saṃsthāpya yajamānam ca surāḥ tvām iti mantrakaiḥ mad ācāryam ātmane tatra saṃsthitam dvija puṃgavaiḥ samāpya nitya vidhinā ācāryāya atha ca dakṣiṇām dhenum ca loha pātram ca dattvā iṣṭām ca dakṣiṇām brāhmaṇebhyaḥ yathāśakti dadyāt pūrṇām gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge paṃcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhā varṇanam uvāca kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhām ca vakṣye ca dvijasattamaiḥ maṇḍale śubhe sthāne dvi dvi hastam yad sthaṇḍile sthāpayet kalaśam tatra somam viṣṇum samarcayet mātram varayet niśā sūtraiḥ praveṣṭayet alaṃkṛtya bhūṣayet bhūṣaṇa ādinā bhojayet pañca viprān ca viśeṣataḥ tatas karṇavedham tatas kṛtvā utsṛjet vā āsya pūrvakam dadyāt yūpam madhya deśe ropayet kadalām tatas rambhām ca ropayet dikṣu sthālīpāka vidhānāt aṣṭau aṣṭau ca juhuyāt anyeṣām ca ghṛtena tu anantaram ekaikām āhutim dadyāt sviṣṭakṛt tad anantaram dakṣiṇām ca tatas dadyāt pūrṇām dadyāt gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ mahā vṛkṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca eka ādi varavṛkṣāṇām vidhim vakṣye dvijottamāḥ vṛkṣasya paścime bhāge sthāpayet kalaśam tatas vṛkṣam saṃsthāpayet pūrvam sūtreṇa pariveṣṭayet brahmāṇam kalaśebhyaḥ ca somam viṣṇum vanaspatim ca digīśān ca tathā yakṣān na ācāryam toṣayet tatas dhenum ca dakṣiṇām dadyāt dohadam vṛkṣa pūjanam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aśvattha pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca atha aśvattha pratiṣṭhāyām mūle bāhu pramāṇakam sthaṇḍilam kārayet tatra candanena aṅkitam yathā pūrvedyu rātri samaye tat viṣṇoḥ iti vai ṛcā sthāpayet vāriṇā pūrṇam kayā na iti ca gandhakam gandha dvāra iti tailena śrīḥ ca tā iti ca candanam dadyāt dūrvā akṣatam kalye brāhmaṇa traya bhojanam taiḥ sūtraiḥ ca veṣṭayet candanasya ca pūjya brahmānam ca parasmin ghaṭe sva dikṣu dikpatīn ca api vṛkṣa mūle nava grahān maṇḍale śivam abhyarcyam pīṭha pūjā puraḥsaram pūrve caṇḍam pracaṇḍam ca dakṣiṇe nandi bhṛṃgiṇaḥ anantam paścime kāmam uttare gaṇanāyakam kārttikeyam madhyadeśe ādhāra śakti pūrvakam anantam pṛthivīm ca eva trivṛt tam ca tri maṇḍalam atha dhyānam pravakṣyāmi śvetam vṛṣabham eva ca dvi bhujam śūla hastam ca sarva ābharaṇa saṃyutam āropayet svatantreṇa mūle viṣṇum samarcayet śaṃkaram ca tathā madhye agre brahmāṇakam yajet balim ca piṣṭaka annam ca dattvā ca śrapayet carum anyeṣām ca sruveṇa eva homam dadyāt prayatnāt bhāropayet kadala vṛkṣam ācāryam paritoṣayet pūrṇām pañcadhārām kṛtvā ca api pradakṣiṇām bhū ca saṃpādya arghyam dattvā gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca vaṭa sthānam atho vakṣye tasya mūle tu dakṣiṇe gaṇeśam ca śivam viṣṇum pūjayitvā hunet carum yava kṣīra balim dadyāt utsṛjet vākyam uccaran yūpam āropayet paścāt vaṭa mūlaiḥ samarpayet yakṣān nāgān ca gandharvān siddhān ca eva marut gaṇān iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge navamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bilva pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca vakṣye bilva pratiṣṭhām ca pūrvedyus adhivāsayet tryambakam ca iti mantreṇa sthāpayet gandha vāriṇā sunābha iti ca mantreṇa me gṛhṇāmi iti ca akṣatam tatas dhūpam vastram mālyam nivedayet niśā raktena vā kuryāt aṣṭa pattram su śobhanam niveṣṭanam tatas kuryāt vṛkṣasya dvijasattamāḥ vrīhīn ca vāpayet tatra uttara abhimukhaḥ tathā maham viṣṇum ca brahmānam pūjayet bhūtim icchatā śivam ca nāyakam kuryāt ādityān pattra mūlake śeṣam ca taru mūle tu madhye anantam śatakratum vanapālam ca somam ca sūryam pṛdhvīm anukramāt homaḥ tila akṣataiḥ kāryaḥ balim dadyāt ghṛta odanaiḥ yakṣebhyaḥ māṣa bhaktam ca vāyanāni ca dvādaśa grahānām prītaye dadyāt kṣīreṇa āveṣṭya dakṣiṇām ca atha rātri pratiṣṭhām ca vakṣye śāstra anusārataḥ yakṣa eka vṛkṣa saṃskāre na punar jāyate bhuvi pūrvedyus upavāhe tu vṛkṣa mūle ghaṭam nyaset viṣṇum śivam gaṇeśam ca pūjayitvā tu sthāpayet mahā kalaśān pañca vā sapta gandha tailaiḥ alaṃkṛtān sūtraiḥ saṃveṣṭanam kṛtvā vastra mālyaiḥ anantaram pāṇḍāt iti ca mantreṇa dadyāt dūrvā kṣatam tatas punar hunet pañca āhutīḥ tatra yūpam dadyāt samutsṛjet veṣṭayet kṣīra toyena dhānyam dhenum ca dakṣiṇām dadyāt arghyam hunet pūrṇam bhojayet dvija dampatī iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sat vṛkṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca śata hasta mitām muṣṭim nānā taru vibhūṣitām pūga āmra ādi phalaiḥ yuktam vāstum kṛtvā yajet tu yaḥ ciram tad vidhānam pravakṣyāmi yathā śāstra anusāratas agni kāryam tatas kṛtvā dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ maṇḍapa pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca pratiṣṭhām maṇḍapasya eva śailadāru mayasya ca tṛṇa kāṣṭhasya ca vibho tṛṇa vat tasya ca dvijāḥ sūryam somam tathā viṣṇum kalaśe tu samarcayet prokṣayet kuśa toyena āpohiṣṭhā iti vai ṛcā haritena iti tailena śrīḥ ca te iti candanam sindūra alaktakam dadyāt añjanam pūrvayā saha tatas prabhāte vimale śrāddham vṛddhi ātmakam caret dikpālān ca eva vinyasya maṇḍape śubha lakṣaṇe sūryam āvāhayet tatra somam viṣṇum ca pārśvayoḥ gaṇeśam ca grahān ca eva dikpālān ca ghaṭe arcayet pāyasam juhuyāt agnau aṣṭottaraśatam tathā ādityasya tathā viṣṇoḥ somasya dvādaśa āhutīḥ balim ca pāyasam dadyāt tailam kṣīram atha api vā mānubhyām avanim gatvā śanais oṣṭham na cālayet om adya ityādi brāhmaṇa ādi sarva sattvebhyaḥ viṣṇu prīṇana artham imam maṇḍapam su pūjitam sūrya daivatam śaileya iṣṭakā ādibhiḥ sarva sattvebhyaḥ racitam śruti smṛti ukta phala prāpti kāmaiḥ nayā amuka ṛṣi sagotraḥ amuka deva śarmā aham utsṛje tatas śveta ghaṭam dadyāt maṇḍapa upari sattamāḥ triguṇena niśā aktaiḥ vā veṣṭayet vāri dhārayā dakṣiṇām vidhivat dadyāt sūryāya arghyam nivedayet tṛṇa veśmani vai sūryam vāsudeva samanvitam samutsṛjet aiśānyām dāpayet yūpam dhvajān dikṣu prakalpayet prapāyām varuṇaḥ pūjyaḥ viśvakarmā prayatnāt pṛthivīm ca gaṇeśam ca pūjayitvā hunet ghṛtam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ mahāyūpa nirmāṇa pratiṣṭhā varṇanam uvāca catur hastam mahā yūpam hasta ṣoḍaśa nirmitam vakṣye tam ca pratiṣṭhām ca rātrau trairātrikam yajet varuṇam sita kumbhe ca prapā kūpasya paścime snāpayet pūrvam vai kramāt iti ca ca iti madhye śrāddham na kartavyam pratiṣṭhā ante vidhīyate dampatī bhojanam kuryāt varayet eka brāhmaṇam maṇḍape ca aṣṭa haste ca kalaśam tatra vinyaset pūjayet varuṇam devam nārāyaṇa samanvitam ca pṛthivīm ca eva svaiḥ svaiḥ mantraiḥ yathākramāt tatas kuśa kaṇḍikām kṛtvā sthālīpāka vidhānāt varuṇam ca samabhyarcya juhuyāt āhutīḥ daśa anyeṣām ca sruveṇa eva dadyāt eka āhutim kramāt baruṇasya ukta varuṇam tat tvā yāmi tatas param yat varuṇasya uttambhanam asi iti ca ābhyām devān tathā eva ca yena apāvaka cakṣasā pañcamam samudāhṛtam tatas sviṣṭakṛtam kṛtvā saptajihvam carum nayet iha vā ityādikam pañca tatas pañcāhutim hunet śambhave ca pṛthivyai ca mahārājāya ca kramāt śaṃkarāya ca rudrāya śarvāya paśupataye iti ca mahādevāya ca punar īśānāya iti ca kramāt sṛjet tatra śṛṇu dakṣiṇām vidhivat dadyāt gām ca dadyāt payasvinīm maṇḍape kṣudra kūpe ca pratiṣṭhām śṛṇuta dvijāḥ beṣṭayet rakta sūtraiḥ ca dadyāt yūpam samutsṛjet dakṣiṇām vidhivat dadyāt viprān saṃpūjayet tatas iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ puṣpa vāṭikā pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca tu vakṣye śṛṇvantu vai dvijāḥ madhye vedim tri hastām ca kṛtvā saṃsthāpayet ghaṭam kṛtvā ghaṭe gaṇeśam ca sūryam somam hutāśanam nārāyaṇam sthaṇḍile ca juhuyāt madhu pāyasam maṇḍayet rakta sūtraiḥ ca pradadyāt ca iti dakṣiṇām etat dhārājalena eva yava annam sa guḍam payaḥ aiśānyām yūpam āropya vidhivat dvijasattamāḥ yarṇavedham samāropya snāpayet kuśa vāriṇā dhānyam yavam ca godhūmam dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām hatadhāra jalena eva veṣṭayet paritas dvijāḥ yat śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ tulasī pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca jyeṣṭha āṣāḍhe tulasyāḥ ca pratiṣṭhām vidhivat caret yajamānaḥ śuddha dine ekādaśyām atha api vā nārāyaṇam śivam somam brahmānam ca indram eva ca tvām gandharva iti ca punar puṣpam maṇḍeśana iti ca māna stoka iti kusumam śrīḥ catā iti ca candanam vaiśvadevī iti ca punar mantreṇa anena candanam dūrvā mantreṇa dūrvāḥ ca rūpeṇa iti ca darpaṇam sa kuśaiḥ pītasūtra ādyaiḥ veṣṭayet kṣīra dhārayā madhu dhārā jalena eva veṣṭayet sva gṛham vrajet nyaset sapta pañca tribhiḥ vā atha tat viṣṇoḥ iti vai ṛcā snāpayet atha sādhvībhiḥ kṛta maṅgala pūrvakam tatas śrāddham samāpya eva mātṛ pūjā puraḥsaram mad ācāryam varayet pūrvam gandha ādyaiḥ kusumaiḥ api mad ācāryaḥ eva hotā syāt brahmānam ca sadasyakam maṇḍape daśa haste api vartule sthaṃḍileṣu ca sahasram maṇḍalam kuryāt tatra nārāyaṇam yajet grahān loka īśvarān madhye ādityān ca marut gaṇān rudrān vasūn ca kalaśe paritas ca samarcayet tatas kuśa kaṇḍikām kṛtvā homam tila yavena tu aṣṭottaraśatam kuryāt anyeṣām śaktitas hunet nārāyaṇam samuddiśya dadyāt utsṛjya sattamāḥ madhye yūpam samuddiśya caru pākam balim dadet dakṣiṇām kāñcanam dadyāt tilam dhānyam sa puṣpakam dhenum payasvinīm dadyāt veṣṭayet kṣīra dhārayā jayantyāḥ soma vṛkṣasya tathā somavaṭasya ca pāṭalā kanakasya eva śālmalī nimbakasya ca bimba aśoka vaṭasya eva pratiṣṭhām na eva kārayet bhadrakasya śamīkoṇa caṇḍātaka bakasya ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge paṃcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ pratiṣṭhā viśeṣa niyama varṇanam uvāca vṛkṣa ādīnām pratiṣṭhām ca uttameṣu uttamam caret madhye madhye kaniṣṭhā tu kaniṣṭham parikīrtitam kṛ tu śīrṣe tathā madhye vā vedikām kuryāt tad madhye kuṇḍa maṇḍalam pūrvedyus rātri samaye ghaṭam saṃsthāpya pūjayet śeṣam saṃpūjya vidhivat pṛthivīm ca śivam tathā gandha toyena gāyatryā setum saṃpūjya mokṣayet ca mantreṇa āpyāyasva iti vai ṛcā dadyāt gandha ādikam śrīḥ ca te lakṣmīḥ iti candanam dūrvā mantreṇa dūrvāḥ ca phala mantreṇa vai phalam añjana alaktakam kuryāt manonnāḥ iti saṃpaṭhan varayet atha ācāryam hotāram nṛvaraḥ caret pātra dvayam vidhātavyam sadasya ācāryam eva ca setuyāge vidhātavyam tathā dhānyācale pi ca yajet enam kṛte mauli yāga artham yāga maṇḍapam vedim āvāhayet pūrvam maṇḍapam pratipūjayet sthaṇḍile sarvatobhadre śeṣam viṣṇum pradarśayet sthālīpākena juhuyāt aṣṭāviṃśatika trayam balim dadyāt pṛthagrūpam śeṣayet vidhi pūrvakam piṣṭaka annam ghṛta annam ca vistare vā guḍa odanam māṣa bhaktam tu lokāya pṛthivyai paramānnakam śṛṇu om adya ityādi ekaviṃśati kulasya viśiṣṭa svarga prāptaye imam setum saṃkrama sametam viṣṇu daivatam sura pūjitam vidhivat vāsudevasya prītaye aham utsṛje baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhet mantram kuryāt ca vidhivat tatas picchile patitānām ca udgatena aṅga bhaṅgāt ye ca atra prāṇinaḥ santi sarveṣām prāṇa dhārakāḥ yūpam dadyāt iti mantreṇa ante ca api tathā dhvajān dadyāt pūrṇām dattvā savitre arghyam dattvā ca sva gṛham vrajet anātape kṣudrasetoḥ pratiṣṭhām vidhivat caret viṣṇum śivam hutāśam ca eka kuṇḍe samarcayet kuryāt ekaikaśas viprāḥ aṣṭa viṃśati saṃkhyayā utsṛjya dāpayet dhūpam dhvaja varjyam hi sattamāḥ jñātibhiḥ saha bhuñjīta kṛtakṛtyaḥ abhidhīyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahā purāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhūmim tasya pūrṇām manoramām pracāra artham gavām ca eva yaḥ dadyāt su samāhitaḥ ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi rudra loke mahīyate yaḥ dadyāt kevalām bhūmim kanyām dāsīm tathā vṛṣam alaṃkāram vinā dhenum phalasya ardham prakīrtitam amaṇḍape śubhe sthāne śarkarā ādi vivarjite tatra saṃpūjayet bhadram brahmānam ca śacīpatim gaṇeśam kṣetrapālam ca śeṣam ca eva digīśvarān pañca upacāraiḥ vidhivat pūjayet pāyasa ādinā tryambakeṇa eva mantreṇa bhūmim saṃsthāpya pūjayet pañcagavyena ca punar ca puṣpakam evam yūpasya ca tathā adhigṛhṇāti mantrakam sura asura iti kusumam dūrvāmantreṇa dūrvikām sthālīpākena vidhinā anyeṣām pūrvavat caret utsṛjya āropayet dīpam sthiraḥ bhava iti vai ṛcā pṛthivīm ca varāham ca kūrma mādhava śaktikān vāstoṣpatim ca viṣṇum ca yūpe saṃpūjayet kramāt om adya ityādi go brāhmaṇa sarva sattvebhyaḥ paryaṭana arthāya imām bhūmim su pūjitām viṣṇu daivatām go pracāra rūpiṇīm śruti smṛti ādi ukta phala prāptaye aham utsṛje yāvanti tṛṇa gulmāni santi bhūmau śubhāni ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe tṛtīya bhāge go pracāra vidhau saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ dina eka sādhya pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam uvāca nārāyaṇa ādi mūrtīnām dvātriṃśat bhedaḥ eva tu pratiṣṭhām pratimānām ca gajāsya ādīn ca sattamāḥ gaṇeśa graha dikpālān prati kumbheṣu pūjayet sthaṇḍile pūjayet viṣṇum parivāra gaṇam yajet pañcāmṛtaiḥ pañcagavyaiḥ pañcamṛd piṇḍakaiḥ api tulasī kusumā puṣpa pattrāṇi āhuḥ tripattrakam pañcaka āmra śamī padma karavīram ca pañcakam mṛttikā karidantasya tathā aśvakhura mṛttikā go mūtram gomayam kṣīram dadhi sarpiḥ tu pañcamam kuryāt prāṇa pratiṣṭhām ca homam kuryāt yathāvidhi dakṣiṇām vidhivat dadyāt pūrṇām tu tad anantaram yat śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ deva ādi pratiṣṭhā varṇanam uvāca atas param tu vipra indrāḥ kālī ādīnām tathā eva ca pañcāmṛtaiḥ pañcagavyaiḥ karīṣa śata dhārayā śrī bilve pūjayet devīm dadyāt prāṇam anantaram bilva pattraiḥ phalaiḥ vā api dadyāt ca api śata āhutīḥ ekaikaśas tu sarveṣām dadyāt kāñcana dakṣiṇām pratimām kālikāyāḥ ca tārāyāḥ ca pṛthak pṛthak grāhyam vinā arcayet viprāḥ pañca pañcaśataiḥ api samīraṇam tatas dadyāt peṭikāyām niveśayet tatas vai ca aṣṭama dine rātrau api prapūjayet paśu dānam prakartavyam agni kāryam ca pāyasaiḥ ca vakṣye yathā tri vipram bhojayet viprāḥ adhivāsyam viśeṣataḥ bhāṣya varayet prātar snāpayet pūrva vartmanā hanyāt samīraṇam paścāt agni kāryam samācaret tila hema mayīm gām ca dadyāt gām ca vidhānāt pūrṇimāyām viśeṣeṇa na anyeṣām ca kathaṃcana homa ante vasudhārām ca kumbhe dattvā vidhānāt mālaśamaśilāyāḥ ca pratiṣṭhām vidhivat caret sadyas adhivāsayet devam dvādaśyām snāpayet atha prajāpatim sthāpya śveta abjam nava nābhake cakra svarūpāt jñeyam pradadyāt ca samīraṇam mānīya tāmra bhāṇḍe ca tri kālam pratipūjayet sa kāñcanam vastra yugmam pradadyāt bhūri dakṣiṇam śrī sūryasya gaṇeśasya viriñceḥ ca api sattamāḥ vaṭa vṛkṣa antikam gatvā sthāpayet varuṇam tatas tad aṣṭāviṃśatibhiḥ dattvā dadyāt prāṇam anantaram eka aham athavā ākāśe guptam kṛtvā dina trayam tri ahāt eva punar pūjām punar homam samācaret punar ca bhojayet viprān dadyāt kāñcana dakṣiṇām api dadyāt samīraṇam paścāt punar pūjām ca homayet paśu jñānam ca kartavyam ṣaṣ māsaiḥ pañcama udakaiḥ kumārīm bhojayet rātrau dadyāt kāñcana dakṣiṇām pratimām bhuvaneśīm ca mahāmāyā ambikām api ca tatas devīm indrākṣīm ca aparājitām pūrvedyu rātri samaye piṣṭa kāṣṭau nivedayet aṣṭau nirmāṇayet paścāt balim ca aṣṭau vidhāna vid parivāra gaṇaiḥ sārdham pūjayet prayataḥ sudhīḥ samīraṇam tatas dadyāt śivam sūryam yajet punar pāyasa annaiḥ ca juhuyāt tri dinam lipi pūjanam tad pūjanam kuryāt agnikāryam dina trayam paśu dānam ca kartavyam vibhave sati sattamāḥ rātrau jāgaraṇam kuryāt maṭha utsava puraḥsaram iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca durnimittāni atho vakṣye śṛṇvantu muni sattamāḥ yasya ye graha doṣāḥ syuḥ teṣām śāntim yathākramāt graha ṛkṣa ādyaiḥ kṛtam divyam āntarikṣam nibodha mama jalāśayānām vai kṛtyam bhaumam tat api kīrtitam bhaumam ca alpa phalam jñeyam divya āntarikṣam eva ca sapta aham aphalam dadyāt daivam ca api ca tad kṣaṇāt devānām hasanam ca eva kalkanam rudhira sravaḥ sarpa ādi ārohaṇam ca eva daivam tat api kīrtitam tatas meghāt samutpannā yadi vṛṣṭiḥ śilā tale sapta aha abhyantare jīvam utpannam niṣphalam bhavet eka rāśi sthitāḥ pāpāḥ śani bhauma divākarāḥ pṛthvī dhūma ākulā tatra rudanti bahavaḥ janāḥ tatra paśyati rāja indraḥ kaḥ dharām dhārayiṣyati darśanam dhūmaketoḥ ca nakṣatre dhūma darśanam rājñaḥ janma dine vā atha śakracāpam dina antare api atha bhūmau ca tatra maṇḍūkam eva ca haridrā vṛṣṭiḥ pāṣāṇe siṃha bilva ākṛtiḥ yadi darśane rāṣṭra durbhikṣa makaram nṛpati kṣayaḥ mantreṇa atha vā arkeṇa yatnatas prāsāda toraṇam tatra dvāram prākāra veśma ca dhānya sāram gavām sāram kūpe kumbha pradarśanam mahā ādityasya adbhutam vidyāt kamalam juhuyāt tatas sahasram juhuyāt vā atha tatas śāntiḥ bhavet dhruvam vikṛtāḥ pakṣiṇaḥ ca eva pāṇḍu kapotakāḥ tatas śvetolūkaḥ bṛhan ca eva droṇakākaḥ ca kokilaḥ gṛhe tasya mahā utpātaḥ bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ sthūla bhaṅga pragrahaṇam prarohaṇam atha api vā hārāḥ kaṭakaṭāyante jātasya danta sambhavaḥ hasatā devatānām ca gātre svedaḥ ca jāyate nimittāni evamādīni jāyaṃte yasya veśmani ṣaḍbhiḥ māsaiḥ ca mriyate gṛhiṇī ca śubhā ca yā mās mās vā ayutam tila pāyasam tatas śāntiḥ bhavet āśu dhenum dadyāt ca dakṣiṇām pāyasam tila mudgau ca puṣpam vā tālavṛntakam ikṣu modaka piṇyākān juhuyāt ravim uddiśan siṃhāsanam ratha chatram dhvajaḥ cāmara bhūṣite akasmāt dṛśyate yatra rājñaḥ vā anyatra kutracid mahā āgamasya ca dṛṣṭvā eva bhaṅgaḥ kaṭakaṭāyanam calatvam ca adharasya api tathā kaṭakaṭāyanam rāja amātya vināśāya mahīm ca tad sutaḥ api vā hastinaḥ mada yuktāḥ ca mriyaṃte na atra saṃśayaḥ tāḍī pūga ādayaḥ yatra yamau syātām pramādāt gehī tatra vinaśyeta sa dāraḥ putra saṃyutaḥ baddha puṣpe yadā puṣpam phalam vā yadi dṛśyate akṣata adarśanāt tatra somasya adbhuta darśanam dadhi madhu ghṛtam ca eva juhuyāt ayutam dvijāḥ imam devāḥ iti mantreṇa somāya śrapayet carum utpatanti gṛhe yasya yavāḥ māṣāḥ ca puṣkalāḥ dadhi kṣīra ājya pākeṣu rudhiram dṛśyate yadi vyādhi līnāḥ vinaśyanti nikhilāḥ paśu mānuṣāḥ evam sarvāṇi bhūtāni bhavanti akārake dhruvam rāja amātya vināśāya gehe gehī vinaśyati prāṇa nāśāya viprāya āhutyā ca prabhavanti hi dṛṣṭvā vābhadram ati ugram juhuyāt ayutam kramāt mantreṇa śrapitam lohitam carum tri viprān bhojayet dadyāt dakṣiṇām lohitam tatas svarṇam aṅgāram uddiśya tatas śāntiḥ prajāyate puṣpam vā pātayet yatra phalam vā api tathā eva ca hasti aśva mahiṣāḥ gāvaḥ dāra apatya dhanāni ca tuṣṭena aṅgārakeṇa eva sarvam etat pradīyatām mantreṇa khādiram ca akṣataiḥ yutam dakṣiṇām ca yathāśakti dadyāt viprāya vā punar dhāvanti ca ūrdhva pucchāḥ ca gṛhe gāvaḥ svayam yadi ārohanti gṛham viprāḥ sārameyāḥ ca sūkarāḥ sarveṣām vā bhavet mṛtyuḥ vandhyā gauḥ vā prajāyate mithyā vādena gehī ca rājñā vādaiḥ ca tiṣṭhati dharaṇī hananam yatra dvayoḥ āskadanam tathā nimittāni evamādīni go śva jātāni sattamāḥ maṇḍūka sarpa kūṣmāṇḍāḥ prasuvanti yathā striyaḥ hi śāntim tatra pravakṣyāmi yathā saṃpadyate sukham dadhi madhu ghṛta aktam ca apāmārgam tathā punar suvarṇam budham uddiśya gām ca dadyāt payasvinīm suvarṇam puṣpa vṛṣṭim ca suphalam ca akṣatam tathā prāṅgaṇake yasya nipatanti kadācana alaṃkāra yutām vā api sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitām tu paśyet antarhitām akasmāt mālatī puṣpam jātam syāt tasya vā gṛhe somāya na ca saṃtuṣṭaḥ sarvam etat pradṛśyate dhanam dhānyam tathā putraḥ aiśvaryam ca vara striyaḥ sa bhṛtyāḥ ca mahiṣyaḥ ca mariṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ ca mantreṇa apāmārgam tathā budhaḥ payasvinīm tathā gām ca vāsas yuga samanvitam dvijāya śraddhayā dadyāt tatas saṃpadyate śubham siṃha vyāghra go ādīnām dhana hāni vipad karaḥ ekaḥ vṛṣaḥ trayaḥ gāvaḥ sapta aṣṭa nava dantinaḥ saṃvatsareṇa tasya ekā prasūtiḥ vihatā punar punar punar vratam ca āśu akāle maithunam tathā bhuñjīkṛtāni dhānyāni vrīhayaḥ yava taṇḍulāḥ prāṅgaṇe prajan tasyāḥ mṛtyuḥ na saṃśayaḥ ṣaṣ māsa abhyantare yatra śmaśānam yāsyati dhruvam kalaham jñāti vairam ca vyādhi pīḍā bhaviṣyati vipralāpaḥ mitra nāśaḥ iṣṭeṣu aniṣṭa darśanam bhāryā putra vināśaḥ ca bhavet eṣu viniścitam tadā rājñām vibhramaḥ ca tathā gṛha vināśanam amātya vargāḥ ca pure rājñām rājya parāṅmukhāḥ bṛhaspatim samuddiśya gām ca dadyāt payasvinīm ca pṛthak pṛthak pṛthak pṛthak pṛthak pṛthak pṛthak akasmāt tatra vṛkṣaḥ ca phalena saha saṃyutaḥ gauram bṛhaspateḥ ca eva prakuryāt prāya dakṣiṇām aśubham hi śubhena eva śāntim homam ca kārayet tatra eva rākṣasam yatra ghaṭakam pariśoṣaṇam kesarī śarkarā tailam rājatam tāṇḍavam sthitam māṣa bhaktam tathā dhānyam suvarṇam rajatāni ca tāmram kāṃsyam tathā loham sīsakam pittalam tathā sthāpitāni iva dṛśyante gṛhe ca etāni yasya vai vyādhi pīḍe tathā ghore rāja upadrava bandhane gaja aśva paśu bhṛtyānām vināśaḥ jāyate dhruvam yasya etāni pradṛśyante parvataḥ kanakāni ca saṃpad tasya prajāyeta niścalā sukha dā sadā danta uttareṣu dantāḥ ca paṅktim ākramya saṃsthitāḥ te api doṣa karāḥ sarve kākṛtinaḥ tathā sarve te na te doṣa karāḥ kvacid bhāṇḍe kumbhe yadā ca eva śrūyate ghana garjitam ca eva prākāraḥ śrūyate yadi mūṣikāṇām mukhe ca eva jvalatī yasya paśyati mantim tatra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham śamī pattram nirmitam ca yavaiḥ yuktam gṛhiṇī api śukla vāsaḥ yugam ca eva gām ca śuklām payasvinīm suvarṇam śraddhayā ca eva dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām devāgāre yadā bhūmiḥ lohitā yasya dṛśyate rājā vā rāja putraḥ vā rājyam vā api vinaśyati mantriṇaḥ mantri putrāḥ ca mriyaṃte na atra saṃśayaḥ yatra vā dṛśyate loke gṛhe yasya su pūjitāḥ puṣpitāḥ ca gṛha stambhāḥ śarīram ca ghaṭaḥ tathā hasti aśva mahiṣāḥ ca eva ajāḥ gāvaḥ tathā eva ca nityam svāmi vadha arthāya puṣpitām pravahanti ca gṛhe haṃsaḥ gṛhe samyak maṇḍūkāḥ jalacāriṇaḥ sravanti pramadāḥ yatra bhinnāḥ te syuḥ nava aṅgikāḥ tatra vinaśyeta sa putra paśu bāndhavaḥ dhanus khaḍga dharāḥ rātrau madhyāhne cāndrake tathā manuṣya aṅganānām maraṇam tathā syāt rāṣṭra viplavaḥ rasa siddhāni vastūni surā ādyāḥ ca api vā punar hastinaḥ mada yuktāḥ ca aśvāḥ dhīrita hiṃsakāḥ nagare vā tathā grāme jāyante tasya vairiṇaḥ divā vā yadi vā rātrau śaneḥ adbhuta darśanam mṛga vyāghra ādi rakṣāṃsi tathā go mahiṣāḥ api mad mantreṇa śubha artham śanivāsare dadyāt vāsas yugam ca viprāya suvarṇam rajatam tathā dattvā tu śraddhayā samyak dakṣiṇām śirasi sthitām vidhim homa avasāne tu tatas saṃpadyate śubham yadā dvāre godhikā ca śaṅkhinī praviśet gṛham tadā aśubham vijānīyāt rāja pīḍā dhana kṣayaḥ vinā garjita meghena śilā vṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate rakta miśrā hi pāṇḍuḥ ca patatī yatra dṛśyate tatra saṃdṛśyate ca abhram vṛkṣāḥ vāta vivarjitāḥ divā śivā purā rauti ulūkaḥ vā niśācaraḥ niśi nipatya kākutsthe pradeśe rauti vā vṛṣaḥ adharma prabalāḥ deśāḥ rājā dharma parāṅmukhaḥ anyonyam ca jighāṃsanti go brāhmaṇam atha api vā gṛhe gṛhī vinaśyet ca sa putra paśu bāndhavaḥ utsānam dvāra deśe asya maraṇam rāṣṭra vibhramaḥ rājya nāśaḥ bhavet rājñaḥ maraṇam vāhanasya ca viparītāni deśāni kramatas saṃbhavanti hi rāhunā grasta sūryaḥ api niśi ca atha yadā divā tārakā gaṇa vat ca eva rājñām nidhana kārakaḥ saha amātyāḥ vinaśyanti svarge ye ca su durjayāḥ para cakreṇa pātyante rājānaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ chāyā dhvajaḥ ca gagane dṛśyate ced kadācana darśanāt eva rājñaḥ tu vināśaḥ saha rāṣṭrakaiḥ tathā stambhe dhūmaḥ eva vā aśani ghātaḥ ca śakti hastena vā punar abdasya abhyantare tasya maraṇam na atra saṃśayaḥ śikhā valaya madhye tu sa dhūmaḥ pāvaka udgamaḥ śavasya nīyamānasya utthānam vā pramādataḥ nirghātaḥ ca api bhūkampaḥ nivāta ulkā pradarśanam akāle puṣpitāḥ vṛkṣāḥ phalam ca akāla sambhavam narāṇām āsanam ca eva gavām vā mānuṣī girā pakṣa mātra antare tasya putrasya maraṇam diśet mantim atra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham dadhi madhu ghṛta aktam ca kuryāt dūrvā akṣatam tathā carum ca śrapayet tatra rāhum udiśya saṃśrayāt homam kuryāt tatas gām ca kapilām ca payasvinīm atasī tila śaṅkhau vā vāsas yugam atha api vā mad bhayā rāhum uddiśya dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām dadhi madhu ghṛta kṣīreṇa vāruṇena ca vāruṇe dṛśyate ca adbhutam teṣu viśiṣṭaiḥ doṣa darśibhiḥ tatra vinaṣṭaḥ ca bhavet sa paśu bāndhavaḥ dṛśyante tatra krauñcāḥ ca jambukāḥ gṛdhra vāyasāḥ dāruṇam bhīṣaṇam ghoram nṛtyaṃti ca hasaṃti ca mṛtyuḥ tasya bhavet āśu īśvarasya ca śāsanāt sthānāt sthāna antaram yāti bhūmau vā patate bhṛśam sa bandhuḥ asyate rājā para cakraiḥ saḥ pīḍitaḥ durbhikṣam maraṇam ca eva ciram rāṣṭre bhaviṣyati gāvaḥ markaṭa kumbhāḥ viśante gṛha veśmani ca tasya naśyanti dāra apatya dhanāni ca anyasya doṣaḥ bhavati gṛhe yānti pramādāt śāntim atra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham dadyāt atha api aindreṇa eva tu mantreṇa homaḥ kāryaḥ dvijātibhiḥ akasmāt śāla tāla akṣa khadira utpala serakāḥ haṃsaḥ vā droṇakākaḥ vā mayūraḥ vā gṛha upari śāntim atra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham dadhi madhu ghṛta aktam ca juhuyāt ayutam kuśam nīlām dhenum sa vatsām ca bahu kṣīra pradām tathā mṛttikām hema vāsaḥ ca nānā alaṃkāram eva ca dakṣiṇām ca pravakṣyāmi yasya na asti pratikriyā dakṣiṇasyām diśi chāyām yaḥ paśyet ātmanaḥ svayam svacchāyām pādukasya eva paśyet pañcaśiraḥ dvayam śīghram nāśam avāpnoti sapta ahāt na atra saṃśayaḥ uccāvacān pravakṣyāmi yathā śāstreṇa coditam kāka mārjāra śūkānām kapotānām viśeṣataḥ manum uddiśya juhuyāt ayutam śanivāsare aṣṭāviṃśam carum kṛtvā tatas śāntiḥ bhavet dhruvam bhuja padoḥ tathā cakṣus spandane maraṇam diśet tat tu somādbhutam vidyāt vāma dakṣiṇāt kramāt bhavet vāme diśet aniṣṭa sūcakam yasmāt tasmāt śāntim prakalpayet śatārddham ravim uddiśya śānti arthe homam ācaret devāgāre tathā godhā śaṅkhinī praviśet kvacid rakta kaṇṭhaḥ kapotaḥ ca vyāghraḥ eṇaḥ ca vā viśet na ca atra gṛha vaikṛtyam hasanam yadi dṛśyate sampatti sūcakam gehe maraṇam duḥkha darśanam pramādāt kampane hāniḥ svede jāte vipad bhavet śva jambukau atha vyāghraḥ yathāśakti ca dhāvati mahiṣaḥ tadvat tadā deśe ca viplavaḥ vṛkṣa adbhutam yadā paśyet tatra tasyām parityajet yat gṛheṣu hutam yāti deśa viplavam ādiśet deśe vā nagare grāme āraṇya paśubandhanam sarpe vā viparītam ca māṃsa piṇḍam atha api vā tad gṛhe maraṇam ca eva deśa viplavam ādiśet dviguṇam ca api saṃdhyāyām ardharātre caturguṇam akāle tatra maraṇam akāle gṛhiṇī mṛtiḥ saura adbhutam vijānīyāt aśubhe vā viśodhanam sa aṅga upāṅgena sahitaiḥ maṣṭau aṣṭau hutam ca vā tad mānena hutam viprāḥ kuryāt tatra eva bhūṣaṇam ekaikasya ahutam viprāḥ aṣṭau aṣṭau hutam ca vā adhi pratyadhidevānām yāḥ ca anyāḥ ca aṅga devatāḥ ca dadet pūrṇām dattvā pūrṇām na homayet amāna karaṇe doṣaḥ tasmāt mānam na hāpayet paṅkti catvāriṃśat ādyaiḥ caturdhā vibhajet naraḥ an yajet tatas dadyāt caru homam vibhāgaśaḥ adhi pratyadhidevānām aṣṭa aṣṭa hi udāhṛtam tryambaka ādiṣu mantreṣu homa trayam udāhṛtam dhanaṃjaye tathā dadyāt caru homam vibhāgāt mad aṣṭau aṣṭau adhika kalpayet sudhīḥ madhya home tu sarvatra daśa aṅgam kalpayet naraḥ aniṣṭāya yuga aṅgam tu grahebhyaḥ hi aṅganāya ca sahasre ca eva viṃśa aṅge aniṣṭāya daśa aṃśakam pañca aṃśena grahānām ca pañca aṃśena yavān api tatra aniṣṭe pañcaśatam tasya ardham graha vāgyataḥ ekatriṃśat bhavet mānam anyeṣām tu caturdaśa ca tithi aṅgam pañca aṅgam yasya ca adbhutam ca eva tatra parān api bhavet mānam ṣaṭśatam ṣaṣṭiḥ eva ca adhikam ca bhavet ṣaṣṭiḥ daśame bhāga śeṣāt tri sahasram tri śatam triṃśat tathā catuḥśatam grahānām ca tathā saptaśata adhikam upagrahebhyaḥ dadyāt ca pañcāśīti adhikam śatam tithi aṅga bhāgaḥ śeṣeṇa grahe saptaśata adhikam graha aṅge yaḥ sthitaḥ bhāgaḥ yugalam bhāga śeṣāt mantike pauṣṭike kāmye yadi icchet sukham ātmanaḥ grahānām ca ayutam homam tri aha sādhyena homayet tri aha sādhye vidhānam yat purā eva udīritam dvijāḥ idānīm prakrameṇa eva yaḥ bhāgaḥ saḥ nigadyate itareṣām grahānām ca pratyekam tu śatam śatam adhi pratyadhidevānām pañcāśat homaḥ ucyate prati grahebhyaḥ tri śatam dadyāt aṣṭa śata adhikam ekāśītim dadau yatnāt aśītim ca antyayoḥ dvayoḥ aniṣṭāya tri śatam tu tṛtīya divase matam tat pratyekam grahānām ca dvācatvāriṃśat ucyate pañcatriṃśakam mad yugam dadyāt ekam tu tryambakāya ca pañcānām ca sahasrakam tryambakāya tathā dadyāt tathā dhanaṃjayāya ca mahā pāda adhika ṣaṣ ṣaṭka sahasra parisaṃkhyayā madhya śloka śata udbhūtam saṃpūrṇam syāt bhaviṣyakam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti tṛtīya bhāgaḥ samāptaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparva samāptam śrī veṅkaṭeśvara arpaṇam astu viṣayānukramaṇikā atha tṛtīya bhāgaḥ go pracāra utsarga pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. nalinī vāpī hrada pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. eka ādi vṛṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇana ślo ślo. bilva vṛkṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. pūga āmra ādi phala yuj vāstu pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo śaila dāru tṛṇa maya maṇḍapa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. mahāyūpa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. puṣpa ārāma pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. tulasī ādi vṛkṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. prakāra antareṇa go pracāra pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. eka aha sādhya pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇana ślo. durnimitta janita ariṣṭa śānti prakāra varṇanam ślo. iti tṛtīya bhāgaḥ ākhyānam śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ nārāyaṇam namaskṛtya naram ca eva narottamam devīm sarasvatīm vyāsam tatas jayam udīrayet uvāca aṣṭāviṃśe satya yuge ke rājānaḥ abhavan mune teṣām rājyasya varṣāṇi tat mama vada vicakṣaṇaiḥ uvāca sa taptvā sarayū tīre tapaḥ divyam śatam samāḥ brahmaṇaḥ vara dānena divyam yānam saḥ āptavan nārāyaṇam pūjayitvā harau rājyam nivedya ca triṃśat ca sahasrāṇām abdam rājyam tadā akarot tasmāt jātaḥ vikukṣiḥ ca śata hīnam tat abdakam rājyam kṛtvā divam yātaḥ tasmāt jātaḥ ripuṃjayaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tat kakutstha sutaḥ smṛtaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam ātmajaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ nṛpaḥ pṛthuḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam viṣvagaśvaḥ ca tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ārdraḥ nṛpaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam bhadrāśvaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam yuvanāśvaḥ tu tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam śravasthaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat udayāt asta paryantam taiḥ nṛpaiḥ bhūmi maṇḍalam śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam bṛhadaśvaḥ tatas abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt kuvalayāśvakaḥ śata hīnam kṛta rājyam dṛḍhāśvaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat sahasra hīnam rājyam tat tasmāt putraḥ nikumbhakaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tat saṃkaṭāśvaḥ tu tad sutaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tat tasmāt jātaḥ prasenajit sahasra hīnam rājyam tat ravaṇāśvaḥ tu tad sutaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tat māṃdhātā tad sutaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam purukutsaḥ tu tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam triṃśadaśvaḥ tu tad sutaḥ rathe yasya smṛtāḥ vāhāḥ vājinaḥ triṃśataḥ varāḥ anaraṇyaḥ tatas jātaḥ hi aṣṭāviṃśat sahasrakam rājyam dvitīya caraṇe smṛtam satya yugasya vai pṛṣadaśvaḥ tatas jātaḥ rājyam ṣaṣṭha sahasrakam tad abdam bhū tale kṛtvā pitṛ lokam upāyayau haryaśvaḥ tu tatas jātaḥ viṣṇu bhakta kule nṛpaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tad tad sutaḥ vasumant smṛtaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tat tena rājñā ca satkṛtam sahasra hīnam rājyam tat kṛtvā svargam upāyayau tasmāt jātaḥ triśaṅkuḥ ca rājyam varṣa sahasrakam chadmanā hīna tām jātaḥ hariścandraḥ tu tad sutaḥ rājyam viṃśat sahasram ca rohitaḥ nāma tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam hārītaḥ tanayaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam cañcu bhūpaḥ ca tad sutaḥ bhūpāḥ ca bāhu senā antāḥ vaiṣṇavāḥ parikīrtitāḥ rājyamānam kṛtam samyak bhūpaiḥ vaivasvata ādibhiḥ tṛtīya caraṇe madhye sagaraḥ nāma bhūpatiḥ śiva bhaktaḥ sat ācāraḥ tad putrāḥ sāgarāḥ smṛtāḥ triṃśat sahasra varṣam tat rājyam vai munibhiḥ smṛtam naṣṭeṣu sāgareṣu evam asamañjasaḥ ātmajaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam aṃśumant tad sutaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam dilīpaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ bhagīrathaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam śrutasenaḥ tatas abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam nābhāgaḥ tanayaḥ tatas śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam ambarīṣaḥ tatas abhavat mad satyapādaḥ samāptaḥ ayam tṛtīyaḥ bhārateṃtare bhūpena śata hīnam kṛtam padam caturthe caraṇe tasya ca aṣṭādaśa sahasrakam abdam rājyam śubham jñātam karma bhūmau ca bhārate ekonatriṃśat varṣāṇi rājyam tad triṃśatāni ca mad śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam sindhudvīpaḥ ambarīṣa jaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam ayutāśvaḥ tatas abhavat mad śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam ṛtuparṇaḥ tu tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam sarva kāmaḥ nṛpaḥ tatas mad adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam sudāsaḥ tanayaḥ abhavat tasmāt aśamakaḥ ca eva madayantyāḥ vasiṣṭha jaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam harivarmā tatas abhavat sapta bhūpāḥ sudāsa antāḥ vaiṣṇavāḥ parikīrtitāḥ tu harivarmā śamakajaḥ vaiśya vat sādhu pūjakaḥ ūnatriṃśat sahasrāṇi tathā sapta śatāni vai pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt dillī vayas sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bhṛpaḥ viśvāsa hastāt rājyam daśa sahasram tad niyajñaḥ prākṛtaḥ nṛpaḥ manāḥ vṛṣṭiḥ sarva rājyam vyanāśayat yajñam kṛtvā vasiṣṭhaḥ tu rājñī vacana tatparaḥ yajñāt khaṭvāṅgaḥ utpannaḥ khaṭvāṅgam śastram udvahan kṛtvā varam labdhvā devebhyaḥ mukti tām gataḥ haṭṭāṅgāt dīrghabāhuḥ ca rājyam viṃśat sa hasrakam tasmāt sudarśanaḥ jātaḥ devī pūjana tatparaḥ vaiṣṇavāḥ dāśarathyam tāḥ trayaḥ vikhyāta sat balāḥ khaṭvāṅgaḥ dīrghabāhuḥ ca vaiṣṇavau parikīrtitau sudarśanaḥ mahā prājñaḥ kāśi rāja sutām nṛpaḥ udūhya bhūpatīn jitvā devī sevā prasādāt rājyam bharatakhaṇḍa antam adadhat dharmāt nṛpaḥ varṣa pañca sahasrāṇi rājyam cakre saḥ bhūpatiḥ svapna madhye vacaḥ proktam mahākālyāḥ nṛpāya vai vatsa tvam priyayā sārdham vasiṣṭha ādibhiḥ anvitaḥ himālayam girim prāpya vāsam kuru mahāmate mahā vāyu prabhāvena kṣayaḥ bharatakhaṇḍake ratnākaraḥ paścimaḥ abdhiḥ tasya dvīpāḥ kṣayam gatāḥ mahā udadhiḥ pūrvatas abdhiḥ tasya dvīpāḥ kṣayam gatāḥ mahā abdhiḥ dakṣiṇe ca tasya dvīpāḥ kṣayam gatāḥ ye dvīpāḥ tu su vikhyātāḥ te api sarve layam gatāḥ sa jīvaḥ pralayam yāyāt tasmāt tvam jīvitaḥ bhava bāyuḥ tejas kramāt jalam śarkarā ca mahīm prāptāḥ tatas jīvāḥ kṣayam gatāḥ pañca varṣa mite kāle jalam jātā vasuṃdharā hāntaḥ bhūtvā punar vāyuḥ jalam sarvam aśoṣayat daśa varṣa antare bhūmiḥ sthalī bhūtvā pradṛśyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāpara paryāye kṛtayugabhūpākhyānam nāma prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tretā yuga bhūpākhyāna varṇanam uvāca haima śukla pakṣe tu tṛtīya guru vāsare māyādevī prabhāvena puram sarvam manoharam tat tat sahasrāṇi rājyam kṛtvā sudarśanaḥ prāptavan śāśvatam lokam dilīpaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi dilīpaḥ rājya satkṛtaḥ rājyam kṛtam ca raghuṇā dilīpa ante pituḥ samam raghuvaṃśaḥ tatas khyātaḥ tretāyām bhṛgu nandanaiḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt daśarathaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt rāmaḥ hariḥ svayam ekādaśa sahasrāṇi rāma rājyam prakīrtitam tasya putraḥ kuśaḥ nāma rājyam daśa sahasrakam atithiḥ nāma tad putraḥ kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam tasmāt jātaḥ nalaḥ nāma tretāyām śakti pūjakaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt nābhaḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam puṃḍarīkaḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam kṣemadhanvā tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dvārakaḥ nāma tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ hi ahīna jaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam kuruḥ nāma sutaḥ tatas kurukṣetram kṛtam tena tretāyām śatayaḥ janam pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam pāriyātraḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dalapālaḥ sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam chadma kārī tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ukthaḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śaṃkhanābhiḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam viśvapālaḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam svarṇanābhiḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam puṣpasenaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dhruvasaṃdhiḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam apavarmā tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śīghra gantā tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam marupālaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam rājyam prasūvaśrutaḥ ucyate tretā pādaḥ samāptaḥ idam prathamaḥ bhāratentare udayāt udayam yāvat rājñā tatra su saṃdhinā pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam māmarbaḥ tanayaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam mahā aśvaḥ tanayaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bṛhat bālaḥ sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bṛhadaiśāne eva tat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam vatsapālaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam prativyomā tatas nṛpaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam sutaḥ devakaraḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bṛhadaśvaḥ tatas nṛpaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam sutaḥ keśīnaraḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam antarikṣaḥ tatas nṛpaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam suvarṇāṅgaḥ nṛpaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bṛhadrājaḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dharmarājaḥ tatas nṛpaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ kṛtaṃjayaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ raṇan jayaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam saṃjayaḥ tad sutaḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ śākyavardhanaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam krodhadānaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt atula vikramaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ prasenajit pituḥ talyam kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ śūdrakaḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ ardham kṛtam rājyam sarve tu raghu vaṃśa jāḥ bhūpāḥ devī pūjana tatparāḥ hiṃsā yajña pare sarve svarga lokam itas gatāḥ buddhāḥ jātāḥ ca ye putrāḥ te sarvaiḥ varṇa saṃkarāḥ tretā tṛtīya caraṇa prārambhena nava tām gatāḥ indreṇa preṣitaḥ bhūmau candramāḥ rohiṇīpatiḥ bhaktaḥ candramāḥ ca śiva pūjana tatparaḥ māyādevī prasanna arthe śatam yajñam acīkarat aṣṭādaśa sahasrāṇi rājyam kṛtvā divam gataḥ ilām udvāhya dharmeṇa tasmāt jātaḥ purūravāḥ caturdaśa sahasrāṇi bhūmi rājyam acīkarat urvaśīm saḥ api svarveśyām samayena eva bhogyavān nāma sutaḥ jātaḥ dharma ātmā viṣṇu tatparaḥ ṣaṭtriṃśat ca sahasrāṇi rājyam kṛtvā purūravāḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam āyuṣaḥ nahuṣaḥ sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tatas śakra tvam āgataḥ muneḥ duvāsasaḥ śāpāt nṛpaḥ ajagara tām gataḥ pañca putrāḥ yayāteḥ ca trayaḥ mleccha tvam āgatāḥ tapas bala prabhāvena rājyam lakṣa abda saṃmitam kṛtvā viṣṇu prasādena tatas vaikuṇṭham āgataḥ yadoḥ putraḥ smṛtaḥ kroṣṭā rājyam ṣaṣṭi sahasrakam tasmāt svāhā arcanaḥ putraḥ kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam tasmāt citrarathaḥ putraḥ kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam aravindaḥ sutaḥ tasmāt kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam atha śravāḥ tatas jātaḥ tejasvī viṣṇu tatparaḥ pituḥ artham kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ tāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt uśanas sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śītāṃśuka nṛpaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam kamalāṃśuḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam pārāvata sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam krāthaḥ nāma sutaḥ tatas tatra pātāle vṛṣaparvaṇaḥ prayāgasya pratiṣṭhāne pure rājyam atha akarot daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi rājyam kṛtvā divam gataḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam pracinvān tad sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bhavadaḥ tad sutaḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam putraḥ bāhugaraḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam saṃyātiḥ tanayaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ranti naraḥ sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ sutapāḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tusyam kṛtam rājyam saṃvaraṇaḥ tanayaḥ tatas śata varṣam tatas sūryaḥ tapatīm nāma kanyakām saṃvaraṇāya dadau tuṣṭaḥ ravi lokam nṛpaḥ gataḥ catvāraḥ sāgarāḥ vṛddhāḥ bhāratam kṣaya tām gatam dvi varṣe sāgare bhūmiḥ uṣitvā bhūdharaiḥ saha mahā vāyu prabhāvena sāgarāḥ śuṣka tām gatāḥ agastya tejasā bhūmiḥ sthalī bhūtvā pradṛśyate pañca varṣa antare bhūmiḥ vṛkṣa dūrvā ādi saṃyutā sūrya ājñayā ca saṃvarṇaḥ tapatyā muninā saha vasiṣṭhena tri varṇaiḥ ca mukhyaiḥ sārdham samāgataḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye tretāyugabhūpākhyānam nāma dvitīya udhyāyaḥ dvāpara nṛpa upākhyāna varṇanam uvāca saṃvarṇaḥ ca mahīpālaḥ kasmin kāle samāgataḥ lomaharṣaṇa mama brūhi dvāparasya nṛpān tathā uvāca bhādrasya kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu trayodaśyām bhṛgau dine saṃvarṇaḥ munibhiḥ sārdham pratiṣṭhāne samāgataḥ pratiṣṭhānam kṛtam ramyam pañca yojanam āyatam ardha krośa unnatam harmyam racitam viśvakarmaṇā buddhi vaṃśe prasenasya saktāyāḥ bhūpatiḥ kṛtaḥ yadu vaṃśe sātvataḥ ca madhurā bhūpatiḥ kṛtaḥ mleccha vaṃśe śmaśrupālaḥ maru deśasya bhūpatiḥ krameṇa varddhitāḥ bhūpāḥ prajābhiḥ sahitāḥ bhuvi daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi saṃvarṇaḥ bhūpatiḥ smṛtaḥ tasya ātmajaḥ ayam arcā jñaḥ kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam tasya putraḥ sūri jāpī pituḥ ardham ca rājya kṛt sūrya yajñaḥ tasya putraḥ saura yajña parāyaṇaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ātithya vardhanaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam dvādaśātmā tu tad sutaḥ śata hīnam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ divākaraḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ prabhākaraḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam bhāsvat ātmā ca tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam vivasvat jñaḥ tad ātmajaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam haridaśva arcanaḥ tatas mad śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt vaikartanaḥ sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt arkeṣṭimant sutaḥ vatsalaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt mārtaṃḍa vatsalaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam mihira arthaḥ tu tad sutaḥ mad śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt aruṇa poṣaṇaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt dyumaṇi vatsalaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt taraṇiyajñakaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt maitreṣṭi vardhanaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam citrabhānu ūrjakaḥ tatas śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt vairocanaḥ smṛtaḥ mad śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam haṃsa nyāyī tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt veda pravardhanaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt sāvitraḥ ucyate śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam dhanapālaḥ tatas abhavat śata hīnam rājyam mleccha hantā sutaḥ smṛtaḥ mad śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ānanda vardhanaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam dharmapāla sutaḥ tatas śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam brahma bhakta sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt brahma iṣṭi vardhanaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ātma prapūjakaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam parameṣṭhī sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt hairaṇyavardhanaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam dhātṛ yājī tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tad vidhātṛ prapūjakaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt vai druhiṇaḥ kratuḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt vairañcyaḥ ucyate mad śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ kamalāsanaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śamavartī tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājya śrāddhadevaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt vai pitṛ vardhanaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam saumadattiḥ tad ātmajaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt vai soma vardhanaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam avataṃsaḥ sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam prataṃsaḥ tanayaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam parātaṃsaḥ tad ātmajaḥ pituḥ tulyam rājyam samātaṃsaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam anutaṃsaḥ tad ātmajaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam abhitaṃsaḥ tad ātmajaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam taṃsaḥ nāma sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam duṣyantaḥ tanayaḥ tatas makuntalāyām tasmāt ca bharataḥ nāma bhūpatiḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam duṣyantaḥ svargatim gataḥ mahāmāyā prabhāvena ṣaṭtriṃśat varṣa jīvanam ṣaṭtriṃśa abda sahasrāṇi nṛpa āyuḥ vardhitam tathā tasya nāmnā smṛtaḥ khaṇḍaḥ bhārataḥ nāma viśrutaḥ tena bhūmyāḥ vibhāgaḥ ca kṛtam rājyam pṛthak ciram divyam varṣa śatam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ mahā balaḥ divyam varṣa śatam rājyam bharadvājaḥ tatas abhavat divyam varṣa śatam rājyam tasmāt bhavana manyumān aṣṭādaśa sahasrāṇi samāḥ rājyam prakīrtitam bṛhatkṣetraḥ tatas hi āsīt pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam prasannaḥ bhagavān indraḥ tam nṛpam svargam āptavan tadā ayodhyā patiḥ śrīmān pratāpa indraḥ mahā balaḥ maṇḍalīkaḥ tasya sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam indra ājñayā śakrahotraḥ ghṛtācyā saha bhū tale prāptāvān sa dhanuḥ dīptam jitvā rājyam acīkarat āruhya paścime deśe hastinā nagarī kṛtā daśa yojana vistīrṇā svargaṅgāyāḥ taṭe śubhā rājyam daśa sahasram ca tatra vāsam cakāra saḥ tad putraḥ tu ajamīḍha ākhyaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt jātaḥ rakṣa pālaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tadā sāttvata vaṃśe asmin vṛṣṇiḥ nāma mahā balaḥ mathurāyām sthitaḥ rājyam sarvam sva vaśam āptavan pañca varṣa sahasram ca sarvam rājyam vaśīkṛtam tasya tanayaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam jīmūtaḥ tasya tanayaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt jātaḥ bhīmarathaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt jātaḥ daśarathaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt jātaḥ ca śakuniḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt jātaḥ kuśumbhaḥ ca pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt sātvatavān putraḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt ca sumanāḥ putraḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam svāyambhuvaḥ tasya sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛntam padam surapālaḥ tadā jātaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam śakra ājñayā kuruḥ ca eva dvāpara tritaye pade vyatīte ca sukeśyāḥ saḥ svarveśyāyāḥ patiḥ prabhuḥ āgataḥ bhārate khaṇḍe kurukṣetram tadā kṛtam puṇya kṣetram smṛtam budhaiḥ dvādaśa abda sahasram ca kuruṇā rājyasātkṛtam tasmāt arṇavaḥ eva asau pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam catur sāgara gāmī ca pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt ṛkṣaḥ sutaḥ jātaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam pāṇḍuḥ ca tanayaḥ yasmin rājyam pañcaśatam kṛtam yudhiṣṭhiraḥ tasya sutaḥ rājyam pañcāśat abdakam suyodhanena ṣaṣṭi abdam kṛtam rājyam tatas param pūrvam devāsure yuddhe ye daityāḥ ca suraiḥ hatāḥ lakṣam akṣauhiṇī teṣām tad bhāreṇa vasuṃdharā śakrasya śaraṇam prāpta avatāram ca tatas hareḥ evam kṛṣṇaḥ mahā vīryaḥ rohiṇī nilayam gataḥ pañcatriṃśat uttaram ca śatam varṣam ca bhū tale uṣitvā kṛṣṇa candraḥ ca tatas golokam āgataḥ tri sahasram kṛtam rājyam śatānīkaḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam yajñadattaḥ tatas sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt citrarathaḥ sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dhṛtimān tanayaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam suṣeṇaḥ tanayaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam makhapālaḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam na cakṣuḥ tanayaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt pāriplavaḥ sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam medhāvī tad sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ nṛpaṃjayaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ bṛhadrathaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śatānīkaḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt udyānaḥ ucyate pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ hi ahīnaraḥ tyaktvā mleccha yajñaḥ kṛtaḥ tena mlecchāḥ hananam āgatāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyuga khaṇḍa apara paryāye dvāpara nṛpa upākhyāne tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvāpara yuga bhūpa ākhyāna varṇanam uvāca katham yajñaḥ kṛtaḥ tena pradyotena vicakṣaṇa uvāca tam dṛṣṭvā harṣitaḥ rājā pūjayāmāsa dharma vid sukha upaviṣṭaḥ saḥ muniḥ pradyotam nṛpam abravīt tat śrutvā krodha tāmra akṣaḥ brāhmaṇān veda vittamān mleccha yajñam samārabhat yajña kuṇḍam catuṣkoṇam yojanāni eva ṣoḍaśa racitvā devatāḥ dhyātvā mlecchān ca juhuyāt nṛpaḥ hāra hūṇān barbarān ca guruṃḍān ca śakān khasān eva dvīpa sthitān kāmarūḥ ca cīnān sāgara madhya gān brāhmaṇān dakṣiṇām dattvā abhiṣekam akārayat kṣemakaḥ nāma nṛpatiḥ svarga lokam tatas gataḥ rājyam daśa sahasra abdam kṛtam tena mahātmanā svarga lokam gataḥ rājā tad putraḥ vedavān smṛtaḥ dvi sahasram kṛtam rājyam tadā mlecchaḥ kaliḥ svayam nārāyaṇam pūjayitvā divyām stutim atha akarot catur yuga kṛte tubhyam vāsudevāya sākṣiṇe daśa avatārāya hare namaḥ te namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ śakti avatārāya rāmakṛṣṇāya te namaḥ rājñā vedavatā nātha mama sthānam vināśitam uvāca prāptavan sa hariḥ sākṣāt bhagavant bhakta vatsalaḥ bahu rūpam aham kṛtvā te icchām pūrayāmi aham madhyamaḥ nāma puruṣaḥ patnī havyavatī tathā avāsayat putraḥ vedavataḥ jātaḥ sunandaḥ nāma bhūpatiḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam anapatyaḥ mṛtim gataḥ mleccha vaṃśāḥ bala anvitāḥ bhaviṣyanti bhṛgu śreṣṭha tasmāt ca tuhinācalam gatvā viṣṇum samārādhya gamiṣyāmaḥ hareḥ padam iti śrutvā dvijāḥ sarve naimiṣa araṇya vāsinaḥ aṣṭāśīti sahasrāṇi gatāḥ te tuhinācalam viśālāyām samāsādya viṣṇugāthām pracakṣire iti vyāsena kathitam vākyam kali viśāradam manaḥ kṛtvā bhaviṣyam samudīrayat uvāca manaḥ śṛṇu tatas gāthām bhāvī sūtena varṇitām kaleḥ yugasya pūrṇām tām tat śrutvā tṛptim āvaha uvāca ṣoḍaśa abda sahasre ca śeṣe tat dvāpare yuge bahu kīrtimatī bhūmiḥ ārya deśasya kīrtitā kvacid viprāḥ smṛtāḥ bhūpāḥ kvacid rājanya vaṃśa jāḥ kvacid vaiśyāḥ kvacid śūdrāḥ kutracid varṇa saṃkarāḥ dvi śata aṣṭa sahasre dve śeṣe tu dvāpare yuge mleccha deśasya yā bhūmiḥ bhavitā kīrtimālinī indriyāṇi damitvā yaḥ hi ātma dhyāna parāyaṇaḥ tasmāt ādama nāmā asau patnī havyavatī smṛtā bhūtam pāpa vṛkṣa tale gatvā patnī darśana tatparaḥ kaliḥ tatra āgataḥ tūrṇam sarpa rūpam hi tat kṛtam tena dhūrtena viṣṇu ājñā bhaṅga tām gatā khāditvā tad phalam ramyam loka mārga pradam patiḥ udumbarasya pattraiḥ ca tābhyām vāyu aśanam kṛtam sutāḥ putrāḥ tatas jātāḥ sarve mlecchāḥ babhūvire triṃśa uttaram nava śatam tasya āyuḥ parikīrtitam phalānām havanam kurvan patnyā saha divam gataḥ tasmāt jātaḥ sutaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ śveta nāmā iti viśrutaḥ dvādaśa uttara varṣam ca tasya āyuḥ parikīrtitam anuhastasya tanayaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam padam tasya tanayaḥ pitāmaha samam padam mahallalaḥ tasya sutaḥ pañca hīnam śatam nava tena rājyam kṛtam tatra tasmāt mānagaram smṛtam tasmāt ca viradaḥ jātaḥ rājyam ṣaṣṭi uttaram samāḥ jñeyam nava śatam tasya sva nāmnā nagaram kṛtam hanūkaḥ tasya tanayaḥ viṣṇu bhakti parāyaṇaḥ phalānām havanam kurvan tattvam hi asi jayan sadā triśatam pañcaṣaṣṭiḥ ca rājyam varṣāṇi tat smṛtam ācāraḥ ca vivekaḥ ca dvija tā deva pūjanam tena eva tasmāt mlecchaḥ smṛtaḥ budhaiḥ viṣṇu bhakti agni pūjā ca hi ahiṃsā ca tapaḥ damaḥ dharmāṇi etāni munibhiḥ mlecchānām hi smṛtāni vai rājyam nava śatam tasya saptatiḥ ca smṛtāḥ samāḥ lomakaḥ tasya tanayaḥ rājyam saptaśatam samāḥ tasmāt jātaḥ sutaḥ nyūhaḥ nirgataḥ tu ūhaḥ eva saḥ tasmāt nyūhaḥ smṛtaḥ prājñaiḥ rājyam pañcaśatam kṛtam sīmaḥ śamaḥ ca bhāvaḥ ca trayaḥ putrāḥ babhūvire nyūhaḥ smṛtaḥ viṣṇu bhaktaḥ saḥ aham dhyāna parāyaṇaḥ ekadā bhagavant viṣṇuḥ tad svapne tu samāgataḥ vatsa nyūha śṛṇuṣva idam pralayaḥ saptame ahani jīvanam kuru bhakteṣu sarva śreṣṭhaḥ bhaviṣyasi tathā iti matvā saḥ muniḥ naum kṛtvā su puṣṭitām hasta triśata lambām ca pañcāśat hasta vistṛtām triṃśat hasta ucchritām ramyām sarva jīva samanvitām sāṃvartakaḥ megha gaṇaḥ mahā indreṇa samanvitaḥ catvāriṃśat dināni eva mahā vṛṣṭim akārayat sarvam tu bhāratam varṣam jalaiḥ plāvya tu sindhavaḥ catvāraḥ militāḥ sarve viśālāyām na ca āgatāḥ aṣṭāśīti sahasrāṇi munayaḥ brahma vādinaḥ nyūhaḥ ca sva kulaiḥ sārdham śeṣāḥ sarve vināśitāḥ tadā ca munayaḥ sarve viṣṇu māyām pratuṣṭuvuḥ ūcuḥ mahā lakṣmyai viṣṇu mātre rādhā devyai namaḥ namaḥ ca māyāyai namaḥ mātre namaḥ namaḥ jala dhārābhiḥ ugrābhiḥ bhayam jātam hi dāruṇam tasmāt bhayāt bhairavi tvam asmān saṃrakṣa kiṃkarān tadā prasannā sā devī jalam śānta tayā kṛtam abda antare mahī sarvā sthalī bhūtvā pradṛśyate mārāt ca śiṣiṇāḥ nāma himādreḥ taṭa bhūmayaḥ jala ante bhūmim āgatya tatra vāsam karoti saḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāpara paryāye dvāparanṛpopākhyānam nāma caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sāṃpratam vartate yaḥ vai pralaya ante muni īśvara divya dṛṣṭi prabhāvena jñātam brūhi tatas param uvāca nyūhaḥ nāma smṛtaḥ mlecchaḥ viṣṇu moham tadā akarot tadā prasannaḥ bhagavān tasya vaṃśaḥ pravardhitaḥ mleccha bhāṣā kṛtā tena veda vākya parāṅmukhā kaleḥ ca vṛddhaye brāhmīm bhāṣām kṛtvā apaśabda gām dhāmaḥ ca tathā yākūtaḥ nāma viśrutaḥ yākūtaḥ sapta putraḥ ca jumraḥ mājūjaḥ eva saḥ tathā ca yūnānastūpa lomasakaḥ tathā tīrāsaḥ ca tathā teṣām nāmbhiḥ deśaḥ ucyate daśa kanābjaḥ ca riphataḥ ca tajarrumaḥ tad nāmnā ca smṛtāḥ deśāḥ yūna ādyāḥ ye sutāḥ smṛtāḥ bhilīśaḥ taralīśaḥ ca kittīhūdāniḥ ucyate caturbhiḥ nāmabhiḥ deśāḥ teṣām teṣām pracakrire dvitīya tanayāt dhāmāt sutāḥ catvāraḥ eva te kuśaḥ miśraḥ ca kūjaḥ ca tatra nāmbhiḥ deśāḥ prasiddhāḥ mlecchānām kuśāt ṣaṭ tanayāḥ smṛtāḥ tathā savatikāḥ nāma nimarūhaḥ mahā balaḥ teṣām putrāḥ ca kalanaḥ siṃnārorakaḥ ucyate ca eva rasanādeśakāḥ ca te munīn sūtaḥ yoganidrā vaśam gataḥ sima vaṃśam pravakṣyāmi simaḥ jyeṣṭhaḥ saḥ bhūpatiḥ rājyam pañcaśatam varṣam tena mlecchena satkṛtam rājyam tasya smṛtam tatra ṣaṣṭi uttara catuḥ śatam rājyam kṛtam tu tasmāt ca raū nāma sutaḥ smṛtaḥ saptatriṃśat ca dviśatam tasya rājyam prakīrtitam nahūraḥ tasya tanayaḥ vayaḥ ṣaṣṭi uttaram śatam cakāra bahu śatrūn vihiṃsayan tasmāt putraḥ avirāmaḥ ca nahūraḥ hāranaḥ trayaḥ evam teṣām smṛtāḥ vaṃśāḥ nāma mātreṇa kīrtitāḥ sarasvatyāḥ ca śāpena mleccha bhāṣāḥ mahā adhamāḥ teṣām vṛddhiḥ kalau ca āsīt saṃkṣepeṇa prakīrtitā saṃskṛtasya eva vāṇī tu bhāratam varṣam ūhyatām uvāca tat śrutvā munayaḥ sarve viśālāyām nivāsinaḥ naram nārāyaṇam devam saṃpūjya vinaya anvitāḥ dhyānam cakruḥ mudā yuktāḥ dvi śatam parivatsarān tad paścāt bodhitāḥ sarve śaunaka ādyāḥ muni īśvarāḥ saṃdhyā tarpaṇa deva arcāḥ kṛtvā dhyātvā janārddanam lomaharṣaṇam āsīnam papracchuḥ vinaya anvitāḥ hi uvāca mās ante śaṃkhanāmā asau sāṃpratam vartate nṛpaḥ śṛṇu tad kāraṇam sarve yathā yasya vivardhanam mleccha ācāryaḥ ca mūśākhyaḥ tad mataiḥ pūritam jagant deva arcanam veda bhāṣā naṣṭā prāpte kalau yuge mune mleccha bhāṣāḥ caturvidhāḥ mahārāṣṭrī yāvanī ca guruṃḍikā tāsām catur lakṣavidhāḥ bhāṣāḥ ca anyāḥ tathā eva ca pānīyam ca smṛtam pānī bubhukṣā bhūkhaḥ ucyate pānīyam pāpaḍī bhāṣā bhojanam kakkanam smṛtam iṣṭi śuddha ravaḥ proktaḥ istinī masapāvanī sā iti sā yāvanī bhāṣā hi aśvaḥ ca āspaḥ tathā punar sapta hinduḥ yāvanī ca punar jñeyā guruṇḍikā ṣaṣṭiḥ ca siksaṭī jñeyā tad udāhāram īdṛśam yā pavitrā sapta purī tāsu hiṃsā pravartate dasyavaḥ śabarāḥ bhillāḥ mūrkhāḥ ārye sthitāḥ narāḥ mleccha adhīnāḥ guṇāḥ sarve avaguṇāḥ ārya deśake mleccha rājyam bhārate ca tat dvīpeṣu smṛtam tathā evam jñātvā muni śreṣṭhaiḥ harim bhaja mahāmate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargam parvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍa apara paryāye kaliyugabhūpavarṇanam nāma pañcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca brahmāvarte katham mlecchāḥ na prāptāḥ kāraṇam vada sūtaḥ prāha śṛṇuṣva idam sarasvatyāḥ prabhāvāt mlecchāḥ prāptāḥ na tad sthāne kāśyapaḥ nāma vai dvijaḥ prāpte sahasra abde svargāt prāptaḥ su rājñayā māryāvatī ca tad patnī daśa putrān akalmaṣān kāśyapāt sā labdhavatī teṣām nāmāni mama śṛṇu upādhyāyaḥ dīkṣitaḥ ca pāṭhakaḥ śukla miśrakau agnihotrī dvi vedī ca tri vedī pāṇḍyaḥ eva ca caturvedī iti kathitāḥ nāma tulya guṇāḥ smṛtāḥ teṣām madhye kāśyapaḥ ca sarva jñānam asamanvitaḥ prāptavan saḥ api jagat ambām sarasvatīm tuṣṭāva pūjanam kṛtvā rakta puṣpaiḥ tu atha akṣataiḥ dhūpaiḥ dīpaiḥ ca naivedyaiḥ puṣpa añjali samanvitaḥ uvāca mātar śaṃkara dayite mayi te karuṇā kutas na asti bho asi tvam jagadambā jagantaḥ kim mām bahis na yasi devi tvam sura hetoḥ dharma drohinam āśu haṃsi mātar uttama saṃskṛta bhāṣām tvam kuru mlecchān ca mohayeḥ śīghram ambe tvam bahu rūpā huṃkārāt dhūmra locanam hasi bhīmam durgā daityam hatvā jagantām sukham nayasi dambham moham ghoram garvam hatvā sadā sukham śeṣe bodhaya mātar jagataḥ duṣṭān naṣṭān kuru tvam vai dadau sarvān mlecchān mohayitvā kṛtvā atha tān dvijanmanaḥ saṃkhyā daśa sahasram ca nara vṛndam dvijanmanām dvi sahasram smṛtāḥ vaiśyāḥ śeṣāḥ śūdra sutāḥ smṛtāḥ taiḥ sārdham ārya deśe sa sarasvatyāḥ prasādāt avasat vai muni śreṣṭhaḥ muni kārya rataḥ sadā teṣām ārya samūhānām devyāḥ ca vara dānāt yad bhavati bahulā catuṣkoṭi narāḥ striyaḥ teṣām putrāḥ ca pautrāḥ ca tad bhūpaḥ kāśyapaḥ muniḥ viṃśottaraśatam varṣam tasya rājyam prakīrtitam rājyaputra ākhya deśe ca śūdrāḥ ca aṣṭa sahasrakāḥ teṣām bhūpaḥ ca āryapṛthuḥ tasmāt jātaḥ sa māgadhaḥ iti śrutvā bhṛgu śreṣṭhaḥ śaunakaḥ harṣam āgataḥ sūtam paurāṇikam natvā viṣṇu dhyāna paraḥ abhavat punar ca śruti varṣa ante bodhitāḥ munayaḥ tathā lomaharṣaṇa me brūhi ke rājānaḥ ca māgadhāt kalau rājyam kṛtam yaiḥ tu vyāsa śiṣya vadasva naḥ uvāca māgadhaḥ māgadhe deśe prāptavan kāśyapa ātmajaḥ pitṛrājyam smṛtam tena tu ārya deśaḥ pṛthakkṛtaḥ pāñcālāt pūrvatas deśaḥ māgadhaḥ parikīrtitaḥ āgneyyām ca kaliṅgaḥ ca tathāvantaḥ tu dakṣiṇe paścime ānarta deśāḥ nairṛtyām sindhu deśaḥ tu paścime bhāskare ca eva koṇindaḥ ca ārya deśaḥ ca tad kṛtaḥ deśa nāmnā tasya sutāḥ magadhasya mahātmanaḥ balabhadraḥ tadā tuṣṭaḥ yajña bhāvena bhāvitaḥ mahān nāgaḥ kratoḥ jātaḥ balabhadra aṃśa sambhavaḥ śata varṣam kṛtam rājyam kākavarmā sutaḥ abhavat aśīti varṣam rājyam tad kṣetraujāḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat daśa hīnam kṛtam rājyam vedamiśraḥ tatas abhavat daśa hīnam kṛtam rājyam tatas ajātaripuḥ sutaḥ daśa hīnam kṛtam rājyam darbhakaḥ tanayaḥ abhavat daśa hīnam kṛtam rājyam udayāśvaḥ tatas abhavat daśa hīnam kṛtam rājyam nandavardhane eva tat daśa hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt nanda sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śūdrī garbha samudbhavaḥ nandāt jātaḥ pranandaḥ ca daśa varṣam kṛtam padam tasmāt jātaḥ parānandaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam tasmāt jātaḥ samānandaḥ viṃśat varṣam kṛtam padam tasmāt jātaḥ priya ānandaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam yajñabhaṅgaḥ sutaḥ tasmāt pituḥ ardham kṛtam padam mahānandaḥ tatas jātaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam padam bhavaḥ devaḥ gautamaḥ nāma viśrutaḥ bauddha dharmam ca saṃskatya paṭṭaṇe prāptavan hariḥ daśa varṣam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt śākyamuniḥ smṛtaḥ viṃśat varṣam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt śuddhodanaḥ abhavat triṃśat varṣam kṛtam rājyam śākya siṃhaḥ tatas abhavat tasya prathama caraṇe veda mārgaḥ vināśitaḥ tat rājyam sarva bauddhāḥ narāḥ smṛtāḥ nareṣu viṣṇuḥ nṛpatiḥ yathā rājā tathā prajāḥ pravṛt tasmin harau ye śaraṇam prāptāḥ māyāpatau narāḥ api pāpa samācārāḥ mokṣavantaḥ prakīrtitāḥ mahā siṃhāt buddha siṃhaḥ pituḥ artham kṛtam padam ṣaṣṭi varṣam kṛtam rājyam bindusāraḥ tatas abhavat veda mantra prabhāvāt ca jātāḥ catvāri kṣatriyāḥ trivedī ca tathā śukla utharvā sa parihārakaḥ te airāvata kule jātān gajān āruhya te pṛthak aśokam sva vaśam cakuḥ sarve bauddhāḥ vināśitāḥ catur lakṣāḥ smṛtāḥ bauddhāḥ divya śastraiḥ prahāritāḥ ambāvatīm nāma purīm adhyāsya sukhitaḥ abhavat iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyuga khaṇḍa apara paryāye kali yuga bhūpa varṇana upākhyāne ṣaṣṭhaḥ udhyāyaḥ uvāca citrakūṭa gireḥ deśe parihāraḥ mahīpatiḥ mañjara puram ramyam akrośa āyatanam smṛtam ca śuklaḥ nāma mahīpālaḥ gataḥ ānarta amaṇḍale uvāca teṣām agni udbhavānām ca ye bhūpāḥ rājya satkṛtāḥ tān mama brūhi mahābhāgaiḥ sūtaḥ vākyam atha abravīt gacchadhvam brāhmaṇāḥ sarve yoga nidrā vaśaḥ hi aham saptatriṃśa śate varṣe daśa abde ca adhike kalau pramaraḥ nāma bhūpālaḥ kṛtam rājyam ca ṣaṣ samāḥ mahā madaḥ tatas jātaḥ pituḥ ardham kṛtam padam tasmāt gandharvasenaḥ ca pañcāśat abda bhū padam kṛtvā ca sva sutam śaṅkham abhiṣicya vanam gataḥ haṃkhena tat padam prāptam rājyam triṃśat samāḥ kṛtam deva aṅganā vīramatī śakreṇa preṣitā tadā sutasya janma kāle tu nabhasaḥ puṣpa vṛṣṭayaḥ petuḥ dundubhayaḥ neduḥ vānti vātāḥ sukha pradāḥ mahā dṛṣṭiḥ dvijaḥ nāma śiṣyaiḥ sārdham vanam gataḥ karmayogam ca samārādhya śivaḥ abhavat pūrṇe triṃśat śate varṣe kalau prāpte bhayaṃkare śakānām ca vināśa artham ārya dharma vivṛddhaye mad api kailāsāt guhyaka ālayāt ha sa bālaḥ api mahā prājñaḥ pitṛ mātṛ priyaṃkaraḥ dvādaśa abdam prayatnena vikrameṇa kṛtam tapaḥ paścāt ambāvatīm divyām purīm yātaḥ śriyā anvitaḥ divyam siṃhāsanam ramyam dvātriṃśat mūrti saṃyutam vaitālaḥ tasya rakṣā artham nirmitaḥ gataḥ ekadā saḥ nṛpaḥ vīraḥ mahākāleśaśvara sthalam gatvā sampūjayāmāsa devadevam pinākinam nānā dhātu kṛta stambhā nānā maṇi vibhūṣitā nānā druma latā ākīrṇā puṣpa vallībhiḥ anvitā tatra siṃhāsanam divyam tena śaunaka mukhyān veda vedāṅga pāragān pūjayitvā vidhānena dharma gāthām atha aśṛṇot sa kṛtvā brāhmaṇam jaya āśīrbhiḥ praśaṃsya tam yadi te śravaṇe śraddhā vikramāditya bhūpate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍa apara paryāye kaliyugasaṃbhūtaraviśaśivaṃśabhūpavarṇanam nāma saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti prathama khaṇḍaḥ saṃpūrṇaḥ viṣayānukramaṇikā eka ādi vṛkṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇana ślo ślo. bilva vṛkṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo pūga āmra ādi phala yuj vāstu pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇana ślo śaila dāru tṛṇa maya maṇḍapa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. mahāyūpa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. tulasī ādi vṛkṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo. pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇana ñjo- prakāra antara go pracāra pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇana ślo. eka aha sādhya pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇana ślo-10 kālī ādi devatā pratiṣṭhā vidhi varṇanam ślo ślo. iti tṛtīya bhāgaḥ khaṇḍaḥ maṅgala ācaraṇa pūrvaka muni sūta kṛta yugīya bhūpa vṛttānta varṇana vaivasvata manu ārabh sudarśana anta narapati rājya kāla vṛttānta varṇana ślo- tretā yugīya bhūpa vṛttānta varṇane sudarśana nṛpam ārabhya saṃvaraṇa narapāla anta bhūpati rājya kāla vṛttānta varṇanam ślo. mleccha yajña vṛttānta varṇana kali kṛ viṣṇu stuti viṣṇu kali vara pradāna sūta śaunaka ādi ārya deśa kṣi tā avekṣ himavant prati gamana vyāsa mahat ṛṣi sva manas pratiśrotṛ vidhā bhaviṣya kathā kathana ārambha mleccha bhūmi utkarṣa varṇana ādama śveta anuha kīnāśa mahallalla virada hanūka matācchila homaka nyūha sīman śama bhāva vṛttānta varṇana nyūha muni saha naukā ārohaṇa bhārata varṣa vṛṣṭi jala antara antara antara antara antar nyūha vaṃśa varṇanam mleccha bhāṣā vidhānam sima hāma yākūta jumra mājūja mādī yūnāna ilīśa taralīśa kittīṃhūda ādi prabhṛti rājyakara mleccha vaṃśa varṇanam sūtasya yoga nidrā uttaram utthānāt paścāt sima mleccha vaṃśa varṇanam saṃskṛta bhāṣā apabhraṣṭa bhāṣā svarūpa varṇanam vraja bhāṣā mahārāṣṭrī yāvanī guruṇḍa bhāṣāṇām bheda varṇanam yāvanī ādi bhāṣā stha katipaya śabda apabhraṃśa vivaraṇam śloka mleccha anāgamana kāraṇa varṇana kāśyapa brāhmaṇa vṛttānta varṇana kāśyapa brāhmaṇa kṛ kāśmīra maṇḍala antargam sarasvatī stuti varṇana sarasvatī labh vara kāśyapa brahmāvarta mlecchān śiṣyīkṛ avasthiti karaṇam māgadha rājan vaṃśa varṇana gautama utpatti pūrvaka paṭṭaṇa bauddha dharma saṃskāra varṇana arbuda acala kubja dvija brahman homa karaṇa yajus vid iti eṣām catur kṣatriya varṇana kāśyapa brāhmaṇa vṛttānta varṇana kā yad yad yad yad tad tad tad vid agni vaṃśa vistāra varṇane pramara vaṃśa vṛttānta varṇanam pramara vaṃśe vikramāditya avatāraḥ vikramāditya sabhāyām vetālasya vipra rūpeṇa āgamanam vetāla vikrama saṃvāda ślo iti prathamaḥ khaṇḍaḥ śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ uvāca manasi saṃsthāpya rājñānam idam abravīt śru sthā cāturvarṇya prajāḥ yatra pratāpamukuṭaḥ nṛpaḥ mahādevī ca mahiṣī dharma jñasya mahīpateḥ yadā saṃprāpte haya ārūḍhaḥ vanam gataḥ haya ārūḍhaḥ gataḥ sārdham samāna vayasā vane sa dṛṣṭvā vipinam ramyam mṛga pakṣi samanvitam mumoda vaja mukuṭaḥ kāma āśaya vaśam gataḥ tatra divyam saraḥ ramyam nānā pakṣi nināditam tasya kūle śiva sthānam muni vṛndaiḥ prapūjitam dṛṣṭvā tatra gatau vīrau parama ānanda mā patuḥ etasmin antare bhūpaiḥ karaṇāṭaka bhūpateḥ tanayā nāmnā padmāvatī matā kāmadevam namaskṛtya kāminī kāmarūpiṇī cikrīḍa sakhibhiḥ krīḍām saras madhye manoharā dṛṣṭvā padmāvatīm bālām tulya rūpa guṇa anvitām mūrchitaḥ patitaḥ bhūmau sā dṛṣṭvā tu mumoha vai prabuddhaḥ vajra mukuṭaḥ mām pāhi śiva śaṃkaraiḥ iti uktvā bhūpa tanayaḥ punar bālām dadarśa ha śirasaḥ padma kusumam sā gṛhītvā tu karṇayoḥ pādayoḥ dadhatī punar punar gṛhītvā tat puṣpam hṛdaye saṃpraveśitam iti bhāvam ca sā kṛtvā a alibhiḥ sārdham yayau gṛham tīrtha artham ca samam pitrā saṃprāptā girijā vane tasyām gatāyām saḥ nṛpaḥ māra bāṇena pīḍitaḥ mahatīm mānasām pīḍām prāptavan moham āgataḥ unmādī iva tatas bhūtvā khādya pāna vivarjitaḥ dhyātvā padmāvatīm bālām mauna vratam acīkarat tadā kolāhalaḥ jātaḥ pratāpamukuṭa antike kumāraḥ kām daśām prāptaḥ iti hāhā iti sarvatas tri dina aṃte mantri sutaḥ buddhi dakṣaḥ viśāradaḥ saḥ āha kāraṇam sarvam yathā jātam sarovare mahā kaṣṭena sā devī mitra tvam hi gamiṣyati karaṇāṭaka bhūpasya dantavaktrasya sā sutā padmāvatī iti vikhyātā dadhatī tvām sva mānase puṣpa bhāvena jñātvā aham tvām nayāmi tad antike mā āha ājñām dehi bhūpālaiḥ yāsya iham kāraṇāṭake tathā iti matvā saḥ nṛpaḥ prādāt putram ca mantriṇe haya ārūḍhau gatau śīghram dantavaktrasya pattane haṃdire tasmin rātrim ghoratamas vṛtām prātaḥkāle tu sā vṛddhā gacchatī rāja mandiram tām āha mantri tanayaḥ śṛṇu mātar vacaḥ mama padmāvatīm ca saṃprāpya ekānte mad vacanam vada xc jyeṣṭha śuklasya pañcamyām induvāre sarovare yaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ puruṣaḥ ramyaḥ tvad arthe samupāgataḥ ruṣṭā padmāvatī prāha candana ārdra aṅgulīyikā aṅgulibhiḥ kapolau ca tasyāḥ spṛṣṭvā yayau gṛham sā tu vṛddhā buddhi dakṣam sarvam bhāvam nyavedayat sa mitram duḥkhitam prāha śṛṇu mitra śucam tyaja tvām āha bhūpateḥ kanyā prāṇa priyaiḥ vacaḥ śṛṇu tvad arthe tāḍitam vakṣaḥ kadā mitram bhaviṣyasi madhuram vākyam rajaḥ dehe samāgatam iti śrutvā bhūpa sutaḥ paramā nandam āyayau tvām utsukaḥ sa bhūpālaḥ te darśana lālasaḥ tam bhajasva adya suśroṇi saphalam jīvanam kuru iti śrutvā mahā hṛṣṭā sā masya ārdra aṅgulīyakam niṣkāsya tale pṛṣṭhe ca tāḍitā tathā eva vṛddhā tam prāpya mantriṇam ca abravīt vacaḥ prasannaḥ buddhi dakṣaḥ ca mitram prāha śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ paścime diśi bhoḥ svāmin gavākṣam te nirmitam tu saṃprāpya bhaja mām kāma vihvalām śrutvā tat vajra mukuṭaḥ priyā darśana lālasaḥ yayau śīghram mahā kāmī ramaṇīm tām arāmayat māsa aṃte kāma śithilaḥ mitra darśana lālasaḥ padmāvatīm priyām prāha śṛṇu vākyam varānane yena prāptavatī mahyam tvam subhrūḥ sura durlabhā tat mitram buddhi dakṣaḥ ca kim nu tiṣṭhati sāṃpratam mahyam dṛṣṭvā āyāsyāmi iti śrutvā vacaḥ tasya niṣṭhuram kuliśa upamam miṣṭānnam sa viṣam kṛtvā mantriṇe sā nyavedayat matvā tad kāraṇam sarvam na tu svayam vivekavantam mitram tam dṛṣṭvā prāha ruṣā anvitaḥ bhuktvā sa maraṇam prāptaḥ saḥ dṛṣṭvā vismitaḥ nṛpaḥ strī caritram ca vijñāya sneham tyaktvā abravīt tu tam mitra gaccha gṛham śīghram mayā tyaktā ca pāpinī saḥ āha śṛṇu bhūpālaiḥ gaccha śīghram priya antikam tad alaṃkāram āhṛtya triśūlam kuru jānuni prasuptām tyaja bho mitraiḥ yā hi tvam mā vicāraya iti śrutvā yayau bhūpaḥ tathā kṛtvā samāgataḥ sva mitreṇa yayau sārdham smaśāne rudra maṇḍape śiṣyam kṛtvā nṛpam tam sa yogi rūpaḥ hi bhūṣaṇam sa vajramukuṭaḥ matvā tad ājñām nagaram gataḥ tam matvā baddhvā rājñaḥ hi rakṣiṇaḥ kva prāptam bhūṣaṇam ramyam sarvam kathaya pūruṣaiḥ maṭilaḥ prāha bho rājñ śmaśāne mad guruḥ sthitaḥ tena dattam vikraya artham bhūṣaṇam svarṇa guṇṭhitam iti śrutvā saḥ nṛpatiḥ tūrṇam āhūya tad gurum bhūṣaṇam pṛṣṭavan rājā yogī prāha śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ maśāne saṃdhitam mantram mayā yogi svarūpiṇā piśācī prāpitā kācid tasyāḥ cihnam mayā kṛtam vāma jānuni śūlena tayā dattam hi bhūṣaṇam jñātvā tad kāraṇam rājā sutā niṣkāsitā gṛhāt sa vajra mukuṭaḥ tām tu gṛhītvā gṛham āyayau śru kasmai pāpam mahat prāptam caturṇām mama vada adhunā uvāca vihasya bhārgavam prāha prāptam pāpam hi bhūpateḥ mitra kāryam amātyena svāmi kāryam ca rakṣibhiḥ bhūpa putreṇa artha siddham kṛtam tasmāt ca bhūpateḥ mahat pāpam ca saṃprāptam tena asau narakam gataḥ rajovatīm sutām dṛṣṭvā na vivāheta yaḥ naraḥ saḥ pāpī narakam yāti ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrakam gāṃdharvam ca vivāham vai kāminyā ca kṛtam yayā tasyāḥ vighna karaḥ yaḥ vai saḥ pāpī yama pīḍitaḥ adṛṣṭa doṣām yaḥ kanyām vivekena vinā tyajet saḥ pāpī narakam yāti lakṣa varṣa pramāṇakam iti śrutvā sa vaitālaḥ dharma gāthām nṛpa īritām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye nāma prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ekadā yamunā tīre dharmasthala purī śubhā vai hariśarmā purodhāḥ tu snāna pūjana tatparaḥ tasya patnī suśīlā ca pati vrata parāyaṇā satya śīlaḥ sutaḥ jātaḥ vidyā adhyayana tatparaḥ tasya anujā madhumatī śīla rūpa guṇa anvitā dvādaśa abda vayaḥ prāpte vivāha artham pitā yadā paṭhana arthe tu kāśyām vai sattva śīlaḥ svayam gataḥ etasmin antare rājñ dvijaḥ kaścid samāgataḥ vāmanaḥ nāma vikhyātaḥ rūpa śīla vayaḥ vṛtaḥ sutā madhumatī tam ca dṛṣṭvā kāma āturā bhavat bhojanam chādanam pānam svapnam tyaktvā ca vihvalā cakorī iva vinā candram kāma bāṇa prapīḍitā dṛṣṭvā suśīlā tam bālā vāmanam brāhmaṇam tathā hastaiḥ svarṇa dravya samanvitaiḥ hariśarmā prayoge ca dvijam dṛṣṭvā trivikramam tattva jñam suta arthe avarayat tadā satya śīlaḥ tu kāśyām vai guru putram ca keśavam māgha kṛṣṇa trayodaśyām bhṛgau lagnam śubham smṛtam trayaḥ viprāḥ tadā prāptāḥ kanyā arthe rūpa mohitāḥ tasmin kāle tu sā kanyā bhujagena eva daṃśitā mṛtā preta tvam āpannā pūrva karma prabhāvāt tadā te brāhmaṇāḥ yatnam kārayāmāsuḥ uttamam na jīvanavatī bālā garaleṇa vimohitā hariśarmā tu tat sarvam kṛtvā veda vidhānāt mandiram rājñ sutā guṇa vimohitaḥ trivikramaḥ tu bahudhā duḥkham kṛtvā smara anugaḥ kanthā dhārī yatiḥ bhūtvā deśāt deśātaram yayau keśavaḥ tu mahā duḥkhī priya asthīni gṛhītavan tīrthāt tīrtha antaram prāptaḥ kāma bāṇena pīḍitaḥ bhasma grāhī vāmanaḥ tu viraha agni prapīḍitaḥ tasthau citāyām kāma ārtaḥ patnī dhyāna parāyaṇaḥ ekadā sarayū tīre lakṣmaṇa ākhya pure śubhe tasmin dine rāmaśarmā śiva dhyāna parāyaṇaḥ yatinam varayāmāsa bhojana artham sva mandire tasya patnī viśāla akṣā racitvā bahu bhojanam āhūya yatinam rājñ pātram ālabham ākarot tasmin kāle ca tad bālaḥ mṛtaḥ pāpa vaśaṃgataḥ arodīt tasya sairaṃdhrī viśala akṣā api bhartsitā na rodanam tyaktavatī putra śoka agni tāpitā tadā prāptaḥ mantram saṃjīvanam śubham japitvā mārjanam kṛtvā jīvayāmāsa bālakam ca bhojanam kārayitvā tu mantram saṃjīvanam dadau trivikramaḥ tu tam mantram paṭhitvā yamunā taṭe prāptavan yatra sā nārī dāhitā hariśarmaṇā dāhitaḥ tanayaḥ pitrā śoka kartrā tadā amunā prabhāvāt guṇādhipasya tanayaḥ rājñaḥ dharmasthalī pateḥ trivikramam vacaḥ prāha vīra bāhuḥ mahā balaḥ mahyam varaya adya varam mama sa vipraḥ prāha bho rājñ keśavaḥ nāma yaḥ dvijaḥ gṛhītvā asthi gataḥ tīrthe tam anveṣaya mā ciram prati prāptaḥ tam kathayāmāsa yathā prāptam hi jīvanam punar saṃjīvitā bālā keśava ādīn vacaḥ abravīt yogyā dharmeṇa yasya aham tasmai prāyāmi dharmiṇe iti śrutvā vacaḥ tasyāḥ maunavantaḥ trayaḥ sthitāḥ kasmai yogyā ca sā bālā nāmnā madhumatī śubhā uvāca yogyā madhumatī nārī vāmanāya dvijanmane prāṇa dātā tu yaḥ vipraḥ pitā iva guṇa tatparaḥ uvāca vipra varya mahābhāga śṛṇu gāthām manoramām bhūpati śreṣṭham punar vikramam abravīt tatra abhavat mahīpālaḥ rūpasenaḥ mahā balaḥ ekadā kṣatriyaḥ kaścid nāmnā vīra varaḥ smṛtaḥ tat tat tat tat tat kiṃcid śrutvā dadau svarṇam sahasram pratyaham nṛpa evam varṣe gate rājñ rāja lakṣmī śiva ājñayā parīkṣā artham smaśāne ca rodanam bahu kurvatī ardharātre tadā rājā buddhvā prāha sva sevakam mahyam śīghram nivedaya iti śrutvā vīra varaḥ śastra astra kuśalaḥ balī sa tatra gatvā yatra āste rāja lakṣmī śubha ānanā ślakṣṇam vacaḥ ca tām āha kimartham rodane sthitā mahat kaṣṭam ca kim prāptam kāraṇam devi mama vada iti śrutvā rāja lakṣmīḥ vīrasenam tam abravīt rāja lakṣmīm ca mām viddhi rūpasenasya bhūpateḥ saḥ āha śṛṇu bho devi tvad alpa āyuḥ sa mīritam kena puṇyena dīrgha āyūḥ tvam bhaveḥ kāraṇam vada tvam ca candrikāyai tadā anagha dīrgha āyūḥ bhavitā ca aham svāmi kāryam prasādhaya iti śrutvā vīra varaḥ mandiram svayam āgataḥ tathā iti uktvā tu sā sādhvī tanayam prāha nirbhayā tathā matvā tu tad putraḥ bhaginyā mātṛ saṃyutaḥ caṇḍikā bhavanam prāpya abravīt sva pitaram tadā bhoḥ tāta mama kapālam ca caṇḍikāyai samarpaya dīrgha āyuḥ yena yatnena rāja lakṣmī ca tat kuru iti śrutvā vīrasenaḥ śiraḥ chittvā samārpayat tasya anujā mṛtā tatra tathā mātā tathā pitā dṛṣṭvā tad rūpaiḥ senaḥ tu kāraṇam sarvam āditas tadā prasannā sā devī nṛpam ujīvya sā bravīt varam varaya bhūpālaiḥ yathā iṣṭam śīghram āpnuyāḥ rūpasenaḥ prasanna ātmā sva sutām kāmarūpiṇīm dadau sutāya vaitālaḥ nṛpatim prāha vismitaḥ uvāca mukhya sneham kṛtam rājñā dāsa arthe sva tanum dadau mahā bandhu prītiḥ ca bhaginī pitṛ snehī tu putrakaḥ mahān snehaḥ kṛtaḥ rājñā rūpasenena dhīmatā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyuga khaṇḍa apara paryāye kali yugīya itihāsa samuccaye tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca iti śrutvā sa vaitālaḥ rājānam idam abravīt kācid bhogāvatī nāmnā nagarī parama adbhutā cūḍāmaṇiḥ iti khyātaḥ śukaḥ buddhi viśāradaḥ kadācid rūpavarmā ca triṃśat abde uru ūrjitaḥ papraccha mama yogyā vai śuka kācid vara aṅganā ced asti tarhi me brūhi śrutvā tam ca abravīt śukaḥ magadha īśvara bhūpasya kanyā candravatī śubhā te yogyā hi bho rājñ sāṃpratam tām gṛhāṇa vai iti śrutvā saḥ nṛpatiḥ gaṇeśam dvijasattamam gaṇeśaḥ api gataḥ tūrṇam deśe māgadhake śubhe mahādevam ca saṃpūjya cakāra stavanam mudā namaḥ śivāya śāntāya sarva abhīṣṭa pradāyine bhavāya śaṃkarāya eva rudrāya satatam namaḥ mṛḍāya ānanda rūpāya sarva duḥkha harāya ca pāma āturā abravīt ca enām nāmnā madanamañjarīm sā āha bho rūpavarmā ca yogyaḥ bhogāpurī patiḥ iti śrutvā tu sā devī durgām vāñchita dāyinīm tuṣṭāva manasā subhrūḥ yayā jātam idam jagant tri liṅga jananī tvam vai varṇa mūrtiḥ sanātanā tvam svāhā tvam svadhā saṃdhyā namaḥ tasyai namaḥ namaḥ nṛpatim rūpavarmāṇam mad patim kuru bhoḥ śive iti stutyā prasannā abhūt jagadambā jagat mayā kārayāmāsa rūpa varmā candravatī bubhujāte param sukham nṛpaḥ prāha vivāham tvam su śukena kuruṣva bhoḥ mrenakā prāha bho rājñ vivāhāḥ ca īdṛśaḥ matāḥ uttama adhama madhyāḥ ca puruṣāḥ trividhāḥ smṛtāḥ uttamā yaḥ bhavet nārī ca adhamāya vai śṛṇu tad kāraṇam rājan mayā dṛṣṭam yathā abhavat dyūta krīḍā paraḥ nityam surā pāne rataḥ sadā veśyā gāmī mahā dhūrtaḥ nityam māṃsa aśanaḥ khalaḥ naram nārāyaṇam dhyātvā paramam padam āpatuḥ vṛttāntam kathayāmāsa vaiśyam hema patim hi saḥ deśa antare vikraya arthe sindhu mārgeṇa prāptavan tat lajjayā na yāsye aham pitaram prati māriṣaiḥ iti śrutvā hemapatiḥ sva patnīm kāmamañjarīm prāha candrakāntim sutām dāsye tad varāya tvad ājñayā saṃmantrya dampatī rājñ dadau kanyām vidhānāt sva gṛhe vāsayāmāsa madapālam sutāpatim māsam ekam uṣitvā tam śvaśuram prāha namra dhīḥ mā ājñām dehi dhanādhyakṣa sva geham yāmi mā ciram iti śrutvā hemapatiḥ sva sutām svarṇa bhūṣitām candrakāntim sa dāsīm ca tasmai dattvā gṛham yayau narān visṛjya duṣṭa ātmā śibikā vāhakān nṛpa dāsīm hatvā tadā patnīm visṛjya dhana varjitām ekākī prāptavan geham madapālaḥ mahā adhamaḥ kṛtvā bubhukṣitaḥ punar śokam cakāra bahudhā nṛpa punar ca śvaśurasya eva gṛhe saṃprāptavan khalaḥ candrakāntiḥ tu tam dṛṣṭvā sva patim prāha namra dhīḥ atas tvam tyaja saṃtāpam ciram vasa gṛhe mama jñātvā vimohitā patnīm ardharātre tamas vṛte hatvā tām sa yayau geham gṛhītvā bahu bhūṣaṇam iti śrutvā śukaḥ prāha bhūpatim karuṇā nidhim vivāham na kariṣyāmi nāryā ca adhamayā saha adhamā menakā nārī śyāmāṅgā ca kurūpiṇī śṛṇu tad kāraṇam bhūpa mayā dṛṣṭam mahā uttamam nagare kāñcanapure vaṇij śaṅkhapatiḥ śrutaḥ prabhāvatī priyā tasya śrīdattaḥ tad sutaḥ smṛtaḥ śrīdattaḥ tu gataḥ deśam vāṇijya artham kurusthalam māyāti dvādaśa abde tu sa dhanaḥ geham āgataḥ tu pīḍitā pitṛ mandire dūtī mārgeṇa tam prāpya vyayam kṛtvā dhanam bahu ramayāmāsa sā nārī tena sārdham mahā adhamā tri māsa ante ca tad svāmī śrīdattaḥ śvaśura ālaye saṃprāptaḥ sā tu tam dṛṣṭvā mahat duḥkham upāyayau ardharātre tu tad mātrā preṣitā sva patim prati jaya lakṣmī ca saṃprāptā krodhena sphurita adharā tadā tu kulaṭā sā ca gatā dūtī gṛham prati suṣvāpa maraṇam prāpya tadā bālā samāgatā mohitam pippala sthaḥ piśācaḥ ca dṛṣṭvā tām jāriṇīm śubhām mad śava deham ca saṃprāpya ramaṇīm tām arīramat kaphallaḥ nāma cauraḥ tu dṛṣṭvā tad kāraṇam tadā kāminyāḥ anugaḥ bhūtvā mandiram tat praviṣṭavan tadā tu jayalakṣmī ca sva patim prāpya durbhagā cakre sā rodanam gāḍham sarve lokāḥ sthire nāsā hīnām sutām dṛṣṭvā somadattaḥ mahādhanaḥ baddhvā jāmātāram śīghram rāja antikam upāyayau nṛpa ājñayā rāja dūtāḥ tam udbandhanam ādadhuḥ tadā kaphallaḥ saṃprāpya sarvam rājñe nyavedayat matvā tasya vacaḥ satyam jaya lakṣmīm mahā adhamām rāsabha upari saṃsthāpya kṛtvā durgati rūpiṇīm nagarāt preṣayāmāsa vanam
