tatas ca ūrdhvam jana āspadam lakṣa yojana gam jñeyam tad ūrdhvam tapasaḥ sthalam pātālāḥ sapta ca antarāḥ lakṣa yojana gāḥ jñeyāḥ tatas ca adhas gatāḥ ca ye narakāḥ ca kramāt jeyāḥ bhūmyāḥ koṭi ardha yojanāḥ param bhūmyāḥ uttare ca khaṇḍāni aṣṭa tatas param lavaṇābdhiḥ tatas dvīpaḥ tatas kṣīrābdhiḥ eva hi karma bhūmyāḥ saḥ vai jñeyaḥ lokālokāḥ mahā acalaḥ pūrve ca karma bhūmyāḥ ca lokālokaḥ tathāvidhaḥ eteṣām samudāyānām brahmāṇḍaḥ ayam prakīrtitaḥ adya viṣṇuḥ sa vai kṛṣṇaḥ iha viṣṇuḥ sa vai virāj iti viṣṇuḥ saḥ vai jñeyaḥ purāṇa puruṣottamaḥ purāṇapuruṣaḥ jñeyaḥ ādibrahmā cira ayugaḥ tu iti uktavan antardadhe viṣṇuḥ brahmā sṛṣṭim acīkarat bhaviṣyaḥ nāma vikhyātaḥ dvi sahasra bhava āyuṣā pūrva ardhaḥ ca kūpara ardhaḥ ca purāṇapuruṣasya hiḥ aṣṭādaśa sahasrāṇi kalpāḥ pūrva arddhake gatāḥ parārddhaḥ sāṃpratam jñeyaḥ jātam tasya dina dvayam adya aham kūrmakaḥ ca eva vāhane matsyaḥ prakīrtitaḥ tṛtīyaḥ śvetavārāhaḥ divasaḥ tasya kalpavān tathā madhyāhna kālaḥ hi sāṃpratam vartate surāḥ bhaviṣya ākhye mahākalpe kathā bhāviṣyakaiḥ janaiḥ kathitāḥ brahmanaḥ ca agre śata koṭi pravistaraiḥ daśa lakṣaṇa saṃyuktam śata koṭi pravistaram mahā purāṇa kathitam purāṇam pañca lakṣaṇam kalpa nāmnā purāṇam ca mahādevena nirmitam aṣṭādaśa purāṇāni nirmitāni śiva ātmanā dvāpara ante ca bhagavān vyāsaḥ satyavatī sutaḥ uvāca iti kalki vacaḥ śrutvā te devāḥ vismaya anvitāḥ namaskṛtya gamiṣyanti svam svam dhāma praharṣitāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyuga khaṇḍa apara paryāye tat yugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanam nāma pañcaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaḍviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tadā saḥ bhagavān kalkiḥ purāṇapuruṣa udbhavaḥ divyam vājinam āruhya khaḍgī varmī ca mlecchān tān daitya bhūtān ca hatvā yogam gamiṣyati tad yoga agni pratāpi tā bhasma bhūtā karma bhūmiḥ nirjīvā bhavitā tadā kṛtvā sthala mayīm ramyām yajñaiḥ devān yajiṣyati yajña bhāgam upādāya devāḥ te bala saṃyutāḥ bāhvoḥ kṣatram viśaḥ jānuvoḥ śūdraḥ varṇaḥ tad aṅghrayoḥ gauraḥ raktaḥ tathā pītaḥ śyāmaḥ te brāhmaṇa ādayaḥ devyāḥ śaktim samādāya janiṣyanti sutān bahūn ekaviṃśat kiṣku mitāḥ manujāḥ dharma rūpiṇaḥ ayodhyāyām rāja padam kariṣyati tad ājñayā pituḥ rājyam puraskṛtya bhūmau divyam śatam samāḥ divya varṣa śata āyuḥ ca tyaktvā deham gamiṣyati yadā tu bhagavān kalkī brahmasūtram kariṣyati tadā vedāḥ ca catvāraḥ mūrtimantaḥ ca sāṅgaḥkāḥ tatra āyāsyanti harṣitāḥ stoṣyanti kalkinam devam purāṇapuruṣa aṃśakam pārttike śukla pakṣe ca navamyām guru vāsare yajña kuṇḍāt ca puruṣaḥ bhaviṣyati mahā uttamaḥ nāmnā satyayugaḥ jñeyaḥ satya mārga pradarśakaḥ dṛṣṭavā tam puruṣam ramyam tadā brahma ādayaḥ surāḥ tām tithim varṇayiṣyanti karma kṣaya karām manoḥ asyām tithau ca manujaḥ dhātṛ vṛkṣa taṭe mudā yaḥ arcayiṣyati yān devān devāḥ te tasya vaśya gāḥ akṣayā navamī nāma yuga ādi navamī hi sā loka maṅgala dātrī ca sarva kilviṣa nāśinī tale ca eva mālatīm tulasīm mudā saṃsthāpya veda vidhinā śālagrāmam yajanti ye jīvanmuktāḥ ca te jñeyā pitṝṇām tṛpti kārakāḥ dhātṛ vṛkṣa tale gatvā yaḥ vai śrāddham kariṣyati iti ukte vacane teṣām kalkī devaḥ mudā anvitaḥ iti uktvā bhagavān kalkī paśyatām deva rūpiṇām viraha agnimatī bhūtvā bījān tān saṃkṣayiṣyati tasmin kāle mahā daityāḥ pātāla tala vāsinaḥ prahlādam ca puraskṛtya gamiṣyanti surān prati khara uṣṭra gṛddhra mahiṣa kāka karka samāsthitāḥ siṃha vyāghra vṛka ārūḍhāḥ śṛgāla śyena vāhanaḥ prāsa paṭṭiśa khaḍgān ca bhuśuṇḍi parigha ādikān gṛhītvā vegavantaḥ te garjiṣyanti punar punar tadā śakra ādayaḥ devāḥ trayastriṃśat gaṇāḥ mudā sva āyudhāni gṛhītvā āśu kariṣyanti raṇam mahat divya varṣa mayam ghoram yuddham teṣām bhaviṣyati mṛtān mṛtān raṇe daityān bhārgavaḥ jīvayiṣyati śrama bhūtāḥ tathā devāḥ tyaktvā yuddham samantataḥ kṣīrābdhim ca gamiṣyanti yatra sākṣāt hariḥ svayam teṣām stutyā sa bhagavant deva maṅgala hetave sva pūrva ardha svarūpam ca kariṣyati sanātanaḥ sa ca haṃsaḥ hariḥ sākṣāt śata sūrya sama prabhaḥ śukram prahlāda pramukhān tejasā tāpayiṣyati tadā parājitāḥ daityāḥ tyaktvā gām duḥkhitāḥ bhṛśam divya varṣa śata āyuḥ ca saḥ ikṣvākuḥ bhaviṣyati varṣāṇām ca pramāṇena nṝṇām āyuḥ catur śatam iti te kathitam sarvam yat pṛṣṭaḥ aham mano tvayā caturyugāṇām caritam nṛpāṇām ca pṛthak pṛthak catuṣpādāḥ hi dharmasya jñānam dhyānam śamaḥ damaḥ ātma jñānam sa vai jñānam dhyānam adhyātma cintanam tad saṃkhyayā hi dharmasya pādaḥ ca ekaḥ prakīrtitaḥ prāhṇa madhyāhna sāyāhnam trisaṃdhyam ca bhavet sadā atas ca uttara khaṇḍam hi varṇayāmi mano śṛṇu iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyuga khaṇḍa apara paryāye tat yugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanam nāma ṣaḍviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyam pratisargaparva caturyuga khaṇḍa apara paryāyam samāptam viṣayānukramaṇikā atha caturthaḥ khaṇḍaḥ fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl fl varṇana śukla brāhmaṇa dvārā bauddha vijaya karaṇa pūrvaka dvārakāyām rājya karaṇa tad vaṃśya rājan vṛttānta varṇana sindhu deśa vṛttānta kacchabhuja deśa vṛttānta udayapura vṛttāntaḥ kānyakubja bhūpati vaṃśya nṛpati vṛttānta varṇanam ślo. brahmanaḥ madhyāhna kāla prāptau bhagavat avatāra ādi vṛttānta varṇanam ślo dehalī stha mleccha bhūpa vṛttānta varṇana ārambhaḥ sahojjīnena devatā tīrtha khaṇḍa karaṇam vyāsena manase kalpa jāti dharma sthiti varṇanam moṅgala taimura laṅga rājya varṇanam indrāṇyā saha indrasya bhūmau āgamanam tatra bṛhaspatinā indra ādibhyaḥ sūrya māhātmya varṇanam ślo co sūrya māhātmya varṇanam tatra dhātṛśarma dvija īśvara purī caritra varṇanam mitraśarma dvija caritra varṇanam rāmānanda utpatti vṛttāntaḥ nimba āditya utpatti vṛttāntaḥ ślo. madhvācārya utpatti vṛttānta varṇana śrīdhara ācārya utpatti vṛttānta varṇana viṣṇusvāmin utpatti vṛttānta vāṇībhūṣaṇa utpatti vṛttānta bhaṭṭojidīkṣita utpatti vṛttānta varāhamihira ācārya utpatti vṛttānta ślo yad cautanya utpatti vṛttānta varṇanam śaṅkara ācārya samutpatti vṛttānta varṇanam ślo bhāratīśa samutpatti vṛttānta varṇana gorakhanātha samutpatti vṛttānta varṇanam kṣetraśarman utpatti vṛttānta varṇanam ḍhuṇḍhīrāja samutpatti vṛttānta varṇanam ślo rudra māhātmya varṇanam rāmānuja utpatti varṇanam ślo. jaina naraśrī pīpā nānaka nityānanda sādhūnām samutpatti vṛttānta ślo. kṛṣṇacaitanyacaritravarṇane jagannātha māhātmya varṇanam ślo. mleccha māyā nirāsa vṛttānta varṇanam ślo. dehalyām rājya vṛttānta varṇanam akabara rājya vṛttānta varṇanam akabara vaṃśya saloma ākhuḥ dakāvaraṅga rājya vṛttānta varṇanam dākṣiṇātya deva pakṣa vardhaka sevājīya rājya vṛttāntaḥ mukula vaṃśa kṣaya varṇanam nādara ādi rājya vṛttāntaḥ rāmadatta vara vānara vaṃśya guruṇḍa anvaya saṃbhūtānām vāṇijya artham ārya deśam pratyāgamanam kalikātā nagarī vṛttāntaḥ aṣṭa kauśalya vṛttānta aṣṭan kauśalya vṛttānta vaikramīya dvāviṃśa śata abdyām kilkilāyām bhūtam nandi śiśu nandi utpāti tad vaṃśya utpatti vṛttānta varṇanam vaikramīya saptaviṃśati śata abdyām vaidika dharma pravartake tīrya kṣetra uddhāraka puṣyamitra rāja utpatti vṛttānta varṇanam tad anantaram ekatriṃśat śata abdyām bhraṣṭa ācāra vṛttānta varṇana gurjara deśa saṃvaha āvartaka somanātha rāja utpatti vṛttāntaḥ rāhu rājye mahamadīya mata pracāra vṛttāntaḥ sarva bhūmau mleccha daityānām harikhaṇḍa gamana viśvakarman kathā varṇanam aṣṭādaśa kalpa vṛttānta varṇanam kalki arcā māhātmyam satya yuga ārambha dina māhātmyam ślo. iti caturthaḥ khaṇḍaḥ maṅgala ācaraṇa chattra abhiṣic yudhiṣṭi mahat rājam prati vyāsa ādi aneka mahā ṛṣi samāgamana yudhiṣṭhira tad prati sva jñāti vadha jan pāpa nivṛtti artha nānāvidha dharma śuśrūṣayā praśna karaṇa vyāsasya śrī kṛṣṇa prati nirvarṇay praśaṃs ca sva āśrama gamana ślo ja kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāda śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira prati sakala brahmāṇḍa utpatti vṛttānta kathana varṇana ślo janma saṃsāra doṣa ākhyāpana varṇanam ślo śubha aśubha gati phala prāpti varṇane yama yātanā prakāra varṇanam ślo śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ śrī sarasvatyai namaḥ mad akṣa mālā iva vimalā sa naḥ pāyāt gaṇādhipaḥ om namaḥ vāsudevāya sa śārṅgāya sa ketave sa gadāya sa cakrāya sa śaṅkhāya namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ śivāya somāya sa gaṇāya sa sūnave sa vṛṣāya sa śūlāya sa kapālāya sa indave mahar chattra abhiṣiktam dharma jñam dharmaputram yudhiṣṭhiram draṣṭum abhyāgatāḥ hṛṣṭāḥ vyāsa ādyāḥ parama ṛṣayaḥ mārkaṇḍeyaḥ sa māṇḍavyaḥ śāṇḍilyaḥ śākaṭāyanaḥ gautamaḥ gālavaḥ gārgyaḥ śātātapa parāśarau uttaṅkaḥ śaṅkha likhitau śaunakaḥ śākaṭāyaniḥ pulastyaḥ pulahaḥ dālbhyaḥ bṛhadaśvaḥ salomaśaḥ tān ṛṣīn āgatān dṛṣṭvā veda vedāṅga pāragān bhaktimān bhrātṛbhiḥ sārdham kṛṣṇa dhaumya puraḥsaraḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ saṃprahṛṣṭaḥ samutthāya abhivādya ca arghyam ācamanam pādyam āsanāni svayam dadau upaviṣṭeṣu teṣu eva tapasviṣu yudhiṣṭhiraḥ abravīt bhagavan tvad prasādena prāptam rājyam mahat mayā hatvā jñātīn tathā rājyam na sukham pratibhāti me yat sukham pāvanam prītiḥ vana mūla phala āśinām prāpya gām ca hata arātim na tat asti pitāmahaiḥ sa mayā rājya lobhena bhīṣmaḥ pāpena ghātitaḥ te girā bahu darśita vāriṇā saṃśrutāni purāṇāni vedāḥ sāṅgāḥ mayā vibho artha śāstrāṇi yāvanti dharma śāstrāṇi yāni vai śrutāni sarva śāstrāṇi bhīṣmāt bhāgīrathī sutāt svargam gate śāṃtanave bhavān kṛṣṇaḥ atha yādavaḥ suhṛd tvāt bandhu bhāvāt ca na anyaḥ śikṣayitā mama satyam satyavatī sūnuḥ dharmarājāya vakṣyati aviśeṣāt uvāca yat ākhyeyam tat ākhyātam mayā bhīṣmeṇa te anagha mārkaṇḍeyena dhaumyena lomaśena mahā ṛṣiṇā dharma jñaḥ hi asi medhāvī guṇavān prā jña sattamaḥ pārśva sthite hṛṣīkeśe keśave keśisūdane yaḥ jagat mayaḥ samādiśya iti kartavyam bhagavān bādarāyaṇaḥ pūjitaḥ pāṇḍu tanayaiḥ jagāma sva tapaḥ vanam hasu ābhāṣya bhārata vidhātri saṃprayāte te kautuka ākula dhiyaḥ munayaḥ praśāntāḥ bhagavān yadu vaṃśa vīraḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi vyāsāgamanavarṇanam nāma prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ brahmāṇḍa utpatti varṇanam uvāca kasya pratiṣṭhā nirdiṣṭā kaḥ hetuḥ kim parāyaṇam kati dvīpāḥ samudrāḥ ca kiyantaḥ hi kula acalāḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca paurāṇaḥ ca eva viṣayaḥ yat pṛṣṭaḥ aham tvayā anagha mayā saṃsāre saratā ciram ajāya viśvarūpāya nirguṇāya guṇa ātmane atra te varṇayiṣyāmi śṛṇu pārtha purātanam pṛṣṭaḥ yat uttaram prādāt ṛṣibhyaḥ tat mayā śrutam dhanyam yaśasyam āyuṣyam sarva aśubha vināśanam eka ātmakam tri daivatyam catur pañca su lakṣaṇam brahmā viṣṇuḥ vṛṣāṅkaḥ ca trayaḥ devāḥ satām matāḥ prakriyā ca anuṣaṅgaḥ ca upoddhātaḥ tathā eva ca upasaṃhāraḥ iti etat catuṣpādam prakīrtitam tarkaḥ ca pratisargaḥ ca vaṃśaḥ manvantarāṇi ca vaṃśānucaritam ca eva purāṇam pañca lakṣaṇam mahat ādi viśeṣa antam sa vairūpyam sa lakṣaṇam pañca pramāṇam ṣaṣ kakṣam puruṣa adhiṣṭhitam jagant tasmāt jāyate buddhiḥ mahant iti ca sā smṛtā tanmātrāṇi ca pañca āhuḥ ahaṃkārāt ca sāttvikāt tebhyaḥ bhūtāni bhūtebhyaḥ sacarācaram mūrti maye viṣṇau naṣṭe sthāvara jaṅgame bhūta ātmakam abhūt aṇḍam mahat tat udakeśayam sṛṣṭau śaktyā ca nirbhinnam tat aṇḍam abhavat dvidhā ulbam tasya abhavat meruḥ jarāyuḥ parvatāḥ smṛtāḥ nadyaḥ dhamanayaḥ sañjātāḥ kledaḥ sarvatragam payaḥ yojanānām sahasrāṇi ṣoḍaśa adhas pratiṣṭhita utsedhe catura aśītiḥ dvātriṃśat ūrdhva vistṛtaḥ bhūmi paṅkaja vistīrṇā karṇikā meruḥ ucyate bhūt triguṇa ātmakaḥ prātar prajāpatiḥ asau madhyāhne viṣṇuḥ iṣyate prātar prajāpateḥ jātāḥ munayaḥ nava mānavāḥ bhṛguḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ iti aṣṭa nāradaḥ navamaḥ smṛtaḥ nava brahmānaḥ iti eṣa purāṇe niścayaḥ smṛtaḥ aṅguṣṭhāt dakṣiṇāt dakṣaḥ saṃjajñe kamalodbhavāt prasūtiḥ udagāt aṅguṣṭhāt tau ca dampatī tābhyām jātāḥ tu tanayāḥ haryaśvāḥ te vināśitāḥ sṛṣṭim prati samudyuktāḥ nāradena mahātmanā dakṣaḥ kṣīṇān sutān vīkṣya janayāmāsa kanyakāḥ pañcāśat daśa vikhyātāḥ satyāyāḥ nāmbhiḥ smṛtāḥ dve prādāt bāhuputrāya dve kṛśāśvāya ca eva hi rūpa yauvana śālinyaḥ catasraḥ ariṣṭanemine ekām bhṛgoḥ bhavāya ekām prādāt tebhyaḥ carācaraḥ vairājam atha vaikuṇṭham kelāsam iti nāmnaḥ meroḥ śṛṅga trayam mūrdhani brahma viṣṇu śiva ālayam prācī diś krama yogena teṣām pārśve puras smṛtāḥ indra ādi lokapālānām divyaiḥ svar lakṣaṇaiḥ yutāḥ nīlaḥ śvetaḥ tathā śṛṅgī jambūdvīpe kula acalāḥ jambūdvīpa pramāṇena sahasra guṇitam śatam jambu śāka kuśa krauñca śālma gomeda puṣkarāḥ dvīpāḥ sapta samākhyātāḥ samudre sapta vṛtāḥ kṣāra kṣīra ikṣu surayā dadhinā ca eva ghṛtena ca tapaḥ satyaḥ ca kathitāḥ pārthaiḥ sapta surālayāḥ rasātalaḥ ca vijñeyaḥ saptamaḥ ca talātalaḥ hiraṇyākṣa prabhṛtayaḥ dānava indrāḥ mahā uragāḥ vasaṃti eteṣu kaunteya siddhāḥ ca ṛṣayaḥ ca ye svāyambhuvaḥ manuḥ pūrvam tatas svārociṣaḥ abhavat uttamaḥ tāmasaḥ ca eva raivataḥ cākṣuṣa iti ṣaṭ mahā ādityāḥ vasavaḥ rudrāḥ ekādaśa tathā aśvinaḥ uṣaḥ trayaḥ samākhyātāḥ deva vaivasvata atare pañcāśat guṇita koṭi yojanānām mahā tayā sapta dvīpa samudrāyāḥ pramāṇam avanyāḥ smṛtam nityaḥ caturthaḥ vijñeyaḥ kālaḥ nitya apahārakaḥ rakṣati ca parasmin puṃsi bhūtānām eva niścayaḥ yathā ṛtau ṛtu liṅgāni nānā rūpāṇi paryaye tāni tāni eva tathā bhāvāḥ yuga ādiṣu pratilīneṣu bhūteṣu vibuddhaḥ sakalam jagant hiṃsra ahiṃsre mṛdu krūre dharma adharma āvṛta anṛte bhūḥ daśaguṇena payasā saṃvṛtā tat ca tejasā bhūtādinā tathā ākāśam bhūtādiḥ mahantā āvṛtaḥ mahān parivṛtaḥ tena puruṣeṇa avināśinā evam vidhānām aṇḍānām sahasrāṇi śatāni ca utpannāni vinaṣṭāni bhāvitāni mahātmanā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttare parvaṇi brahmāṇḍotpattivarṇanam nāma dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ māyā darśana varṇanam uvāca kīdṛśā kṛṣṇaiḥ sā māyā viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca yena dvīpe purā viṣṇuḥ āste cakra gadā dharaḥ vāsudevaḥ sa garuḍaḥ sa cakraḥ ca śriyā saha nīlotpala dala śyāmaḥ kuṇḍalābhyām vibhūṣitaḥ tasya draṣṭum atha abhyāgāt nāradaḥ muni sattamaḥ kā māyā kīdṛśā māyā kiṃrūpā ca kutas tathā tasyāḥ darśaya me rūpam māyāyāḥ puruṣottama paryantam sa deva asura mānuṣam arhasi prahasya uvāca deva ṛṣe na kāryam māyayā tvayā bhūyas api mohayāmāsa soma grāheṇa nāradam mahā rājaiḥ provāca idam punar punar atha asau viṣṇuḥ utthāya śvetadvīpam punar yayau taḍulī agreṇa saṃgṛhya nāradam muni puṃgavam tatas mārga gataḥ cakre ātmānam dvija rūpiṇam ṛgveda sadṛśaḥ sākṣāt viṣṇuḥ brahma vat āsthitaḥ mṛga carma upavītakaḥ yajñaśarmā iti saṃjñām ca cakre asau ātmanaḥ prabhuḥ kṛtvā api lakṣaṇam tat mahī pṛṣṭhe jambūdvīpam cacāra ha vaidiśam nāma nagaram vetravatyāḥ taṭe śubham go mahiṣī aja saṃpūrṇam pāśupālyena saṃsthitaḥ iti tasya aṃtike hariḥ sākṣāt nāradena saha āgataḥ tena api āsana sat mānaiḥ samarthena kṛta ādarau proktam kena atha kim te sādhyam annam na sādhyate na vā asmadīyam vaḥ rocatet nam tatas hariḥ unnāmya vaktram ca uvāca deva saṃstutayā girā saṃtu te bahavaḥ putrāḥ kṣetra vyāpāra buddhayaḥ paśu pāśa gṛha āsaktāḥ śata ardha bala vāhanāḥ teṣām putrāḥ ca pautrāḥ ca kṛṣi vṛddhi pravardhakāḥ tvam ca vṛtti śataiḥ nityam vardhasva sva jana āvṛtaḥ iti uktvā saḥ jagannāthaḥ vāsudevaḥ sa nāradaḥ kṣetre gosvāmi nāmānam dvijam dadṛśatuḥ ca tau bhāgīrathyāḥ taṭe ramye veṇikā grāma saṃnidhau tṛṇa gulma latā ācchanna kṣetre cintā ākulaḥ hi saḥ tābhyām saṃprārthitaḥ vipraḥ bhojyam prādāt ca kiṃcana sakāśam te saṃprāptau dūrāt atithi dharmiṇaḥ ha ājagāma gṛham tūrṇam tābhyām saha sa sambhramam pāda śaucam tathā abhyaṅgam kṛtvā atra ca susaṃskṛtam prayātau dadatuḥ śreṣṭham varam tasmai dvijātaye mā dhānyam makha saṃtāna mad prasādāt vijottama iti uktvā jagmatuḥ tūrṇam punar papraccha nāradaḥ kim idam vada deveśaiḥ śāpa rūpaḥ varaḥ tvayā iti uktaḥ prāha deveśaḥ śṛṇu nāradaiḥ mad vacaḥ saṃvatsareṇa yat pāpam matsya ghātī samācaret tat ahne kena kurute lāṅgalī na atra saṃśayaḥ tad artham kṛṣi pālyena narakam yāti lāṅgalī idānīm hala kāluṣyaiḥ sīrabhadraḥ viceṣṭitaiḥ na bhuktam na ca viśrāntam viśrāntam dvija veśmani taḥ api dvijaḥ muni śreṣṭha saṃsārāt uttariṣyati sāmīpye saraḥ śreṣṭham apaśyatām haṃsa kāraṇḍaiḥ vā ākīrṇam cakravāka upaśobhitam padminī jala kahlāra raktotpala sitotpalaiḥ taṭaiḥ ramyaiḥ ghanaiḥ vṛkṣaiḥ ketakī khaṇḍa maṇḍitam maṇḍitaiḥ dātyūha śikhi bhāruṇḍa cakora ādyaiḥ ca saṃkulam malakukkuṭa saṃgītam haṃsa sārasa śobhitam mīvaṃjīvaka hārīta cakoraiḥ upaśobhitam sthātavyam puratas teṣām tasmāt snānam samācaret iti uktvā keśavaḥ pāpam sasnau prāk eva tad jalaiḥ yat tīrtha lokam vikhyātam snātvā tīram samāśritaḥ ācamya sasnau tīrthena kṣaṇāt tīrtham avāpya ca yāvat uttiṣṭhate toyāt snātvā ṛṣiḥ udāra dhīḥ tāvat strī tvam samāpannaḥ nāradaḥ kena varṇyate daśanāḥ hīrakaiḥ tulyāḥ vidruma ābhaḥ śubha adharaḥ śaṅkha rekhā trayeṇa eva kaṇṭha deśaḥ virājate mādhavī latayā tulyau mañjū tasyāḥ bhujau śubhau yutau rakta utpala ābhāsau pāṇī rakta nakha aṅgulī pīnau atuṅga tanu dhṛt kaṭhinau kalaśa upamau madhya deśam tu muṣṭi grāhyam asaṃśayam nābhi maṇḍala gāmbhīryam lāvaṇyam kena varṇyate vali trayeṇa vikṛtā romarājiḥ virājitā nitambaḥ bimba phalakāḥ manmathāyatanam śubham rambhā yugma upamau ūrū smara bāṇa nibandhanau caraṇa aravinda yugalam sa raktam supratiṣṭhitam sā evaṃvidhā tadā nārī jitā babhūva kṣaṇa mātreṇa jagat vyāmoha kāriṇī kṣīroda mathana uttīrṇā lakṣmīm anyābhiḥ iva ucchritām dṛṣṭvā api adarśanam prāptaḥ māyayā madhusūdanaḥ saṃprāpyate ca sā kāla saṃgara āhāriṇī yathā atha ājagāma tam deśam nāmnā tāladhvajaḥ nṛpaḥ saha sainyaiḥ parivṛtaḥ puraṃdaraḥ iva amaraiḥ gaja ārūḍhaiḥ haya ārūḍhaiḥ ratha ārūḍhaiḥ nara uttamaiḥ tena sā sahasā dṛṣṭā nārī kamala locanā babhūva kṣaṇa mātreṇa kandarpa śara pīḍitaḥ kā iyam kasya kutas prāptā kim devī vā atha mānuṣī adṛṣṭa rūpa apsarasā kācid devī samāgatā ahorūpam surūpāyāḥ gocare paritas pumān uvāca nārīm mugdhām tām śṛṇu mad vacanam śubhe kā tvam kasya kutas prāptā deśam etam śuci smite iti ukte sa aśru cāru aṅgā prāha mām viddhi ayonijām pitrā mātrā vihīnām ca tathā adya api kumārikām nirāśrayām viditvā enām tatas jātaḥ smara arditaḥ bhāropya haya pṛṣṭhe tām tatas rājā āgataḥ gṛham nītvā vivāhayāmāsa śāstra ukta vidhinā tatas udyāna bhavya bhūmīṣu nadīnām pulineṣu ca parvatānām nitambeṣu nirjhareṣu guhāsu ca padma khaṇḍeṣu phulleṣu śobhiteṣu saraḥsu ca prayāga ādiṣu tīrtheṣu nadīnām āśrameṣu ca divya āvasatha ramyeṣu velā kūleṣu pārthivaḥ yāvat dvādaśa varṣāṇi eka aham api bhārataiḥ etasmin garbha saṃpūrṇe jātam dīrgham alābukam tad bheda āhata kumbheṣu bīja prārohaṇāt narāḥ babhūvuḥ dhātu śūnyāḥ vai divya deha bala utkaṭāḥ pañcāśat saṃkhyayā jātāḥ upasarga ādi varjitāḥ mārūḍha yauvanāḥ sarve sutāḥ saṃgrāma kovidāḥ teṣām putrāḥ ca pautrāḥ ca babhūvuḥ sura sattamāḥ yuyudhuḥ śara saṃghātaiḥ cakra śūla asi paṭṭiśaiḥ pāṇḍavaiḥ saha saṃgrāme yuyudhuḥ kṣayam añjasā sa padāti gaja ārohāḥ sa antaḥpura yuga icchayā vineśuḥ abdhim āsādya sindhūnām pravahāḥ iva sa asi sa bala vistārāḥ sa darpāḥ sa mahā ucchrayāḥ indra loka upamam sarvam kulam naṣṭam kṣaṇam tadā saṃdṛśya nāradīyā eṣā vinaṣṭam sva kulam raṇe hā daiva hā vidhe pāpa hā kṛtānta namaskṛta darśayitvā vidhānam mama punar netre hṛte tvayā bhūmau mūrchā āturāḥ bhūtvā punar prāptāḥ vicetanam saḥ api rājā viṣaṇṇaḥ asau nirviṇṇaḥ śoka sāgare bhūmau nipatitaḥ duḥkhāt ruroda bhṛśa duḥkhitaḥ mantribhiḥ sārdham vṛddha śokena saṃyutaḥ etasmin antare viṣṇuḥ ājagāma dvijaiḥ saha kim rodanena bahunā vām kleśa kāriṇā śrūyatām viṣṇu māyā eṣā svapna dṛṣṭa dhana upamā śobhane yādṛśaḥ śokaḥ kṛtaḥ saṃsāra sāgare sarveṣām eva bhūtānām pariṇāmaḥ yam īdṛśaḥ nirvāpitāni kālena pradīpaḥ iva vāyunā ye api śoṣayitum śaktāḥ samudram grāha saṃkulam kuryuḥ ca kara yugmena cūrṇam merum mahī tale tum dharaṇī saṃjñām grahītum candra bhāskarau praviṣṭāḥ te tu kālena kṛtānta vadanam tadā durgaḥ trikūṭaḥ parikhāḥ samudrāḥ rakṣāṃsi yodhāḥ dhanadāt ca vittam mantraḥ ca yasya auśanasā praṇītaḥ sa rāvaṇaḥ daiva vaśāt viṣaṇṇaḥ sāraḥ eṣa raṅga udara gata naṭa paṭaha akāmaḥ eva ayam iti evam dharmam uddiśya viṣṇuḥ saṃsāra ceṣṭitam tūṣṇīm babhūva anupadam tatas te dvija puṃgavāḥ uttiṣṭha snāhi putrāṇām prakuruṣva aurdhvadehikam mā śokam viṣṇu māyā eṣā viṣṇunā nirmitā svayam iti uktā cāru sarva aṅgā saḥ babhūva acalaḥ pumān saḥ eṣa sadṛśa ākāraḥ nāradaḥ tad kṣaṇe abhavat rājā dadarśa atha tam sa maṃtri purohitaḥ sa antaḥpuram idam sarvam indrajāla upamam kṣaṇāt nāradam muni śārdūlam jaṭā bhāra bhayānakam ca maṇḍalu dharam vīṇā daṇḍa karam tathā brahmasūtreṇa śubhreṇa kaupīna ācchādanena ca pādukābhyām sthitam tīre sarasaḥ brāhmaṇa āsane saṃpragṛhya kara agreṇa jagāma adarśanam hariḥ ambareṇa suraiḥ sārdham tasmāt deśāt yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ śvetadvīpam atha āsādya prāha devaḥ munim nṛpa deva ṛṣe yat tvayā pṛṣṭam pūrvam māyā kathām prati māyā yayā īdṛśā māyā yad svarūpā yad ātmakā sā te māyā mayā brahman vaiṣṇavā saṃpradarśitā ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde māyādarśanam nāma tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ saṃsāra doṣa varṇanam uvāca deva tvam mānuṣa tvam ca tiryaktvam kena karmaṇā prāpnoti puruṣaḥ kena garbha vāsam su dāruṇam datta utthāna ādikān doṣān katham tarati dustarān bāla bhāve katham puṣṭiḥ syāt yuvā kena karmaṇā katham dārān avāpnoti gṛham sarva guṇaiḥ yutam paṇḍitaḥ putravān tyāgī syāt ā maya vivarjitaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śubhaiḥ deva tvam āpnoti miśraiḥ mānuṣa tām vrajet pramāṇam śrutiḥ eva atra dharma adharma viniścaye pāpam pāpena bhavati puṇyam puṇyena karmaṇā bhuktam nirdoṣam yena saṃsthitam tadā tat vāyunā spṛṣṭam strī raktena eka tām vrajet pañca rātreṇa kalalam buhudā kāratām vrajet budbudam sapta rātreṇa māṃsa peśī bhavet tatas dvi sapta ahāt bhavet peśī rakta māṃsa dṛḍha āṃcitaḥ bījasya iva aṃkurāḥ peśyāḥ pañcaviṃśati rātrāt bhavanti māsa mātreṇa pañcadhā jāyate punar grīvā śiraḥ ca skandhaḥ ca pṛṣṭhavaṃśaḥ tathā udaram māsa dvayena sarvāṇi kramaśas saṃbhavanti ca tribhiḥ māsaiḥ prajāyante sa dravya aṅkura saṃdhayaḥ māsaiḥ caturbhiḥ aṅgulayaḥ prajāyante yathākramam mukham nāsā ca karṇau ca jāyante pañca māsakaiḥ danta paṅktiḥ tathā guhyam jāyante ca nakhāḥ punar tu pāyuḥ meḍhram upasthaḥ ca nābhiḥ ca api upa jāyate saṃdhayaḥ ye ca gātreṣu māsaiḥ jāyanti sapta aṅga pratyaṅga saṃpūrṇaḥ śiraḥ keśa samanvitaḥ puṣṭaḥ punar ca pañca ātmaka samāyuktaḥ paripakvaḥ saḥ tiṣṭhati mātuḥ āhāra vīryeṇa ṣaḍvidhena sa tiṣṭhati tat te aham saṃpravakṣyāmi yathāśrutam ariṃdama tatas smṛtim labhet jīvaḥ saṃpūrṇe asmin śarīrake sukham duḥkham vijānāti nidrā svapnam purā kṛtam mṛtaḥ ca aham punar jātaḥ jātaḥ ca aham punar mṛtaḥ nānā yoni sahasrāṇi mayā dṛṣṭāni tāni vai adhunā jāta mātraḥ aham prāpta saṃskāraḥ eva ca cintaye evam sa garbha duḥkhena mahatā paripīḍitaḥ jīvaḥ karma vaśāt āste mokṣa upāyam vicintayan yathā giri vara ākrāntaḥ kaścid duḥkhena tiṣṭhati tathā jarāyuṇā dehī duḥkhe tiṣṭhati ceṣṭitaḥ garbha vāsāt paraḥ vāsaḥ kaṣṭaḥ na eva asti kutracid dehinām duḥkha vat rājñ su ghoraḥ hi ati saṃkaṭaḥ cara sthirāṇām sarveṣām āmagarbha anurūpāt saṃmūrchitasya jāyeta jāyamānasya dehinaḥ śara vat pīḍyamānasya yantreṇa iva samantataḥ śirasi tāḍyamānasya pāpa mudgarakeṇa ca garbhāt niṣkampamāṇasya prabalaiḥ sūtimārutaiḥ tat tat tat tat tat tat aviṃdataḥ yantreṇa pīḍitāḥ yadvat niḥsārāḥ syuḥ tila ikṣavaḥ tathā śarīram niḥsāram yoni yantra prapīḍitam asthi majjā tvacā māṃsa snāyu bandhena yantritam rakta māṃsa mṛdā yuktam viṣ mūtra drava lepanam keśa loma tṛṇa ācchannam roga āyatanam āturam mahat dvāram danta uṣṭhaka vibhūṣitam oṣṭha dvaya kapāṭam ca danta jihvā argala anvitam jarā śoka samāviṣṭam kālacakra anale sthitam bhoga tṛṣṇā āturam mūḍham rāga dveṣa vaśa anugam saṃvartita aṅga pratyaṅgam jarāyu pariveṣṭitam iti dehagṛham proktam nityasya anityam ā tmanaḥ śukra śoṇita saṃyogāt dehaḥ saṃjāyate yatas nityam viṣ mūtra pūrṇaḥ ca tena ayam aśuciḥ smṛtaḥ yathā antar viṣṭhayā pūrṇaḥ śuciḥ syāt na bahis ghaṭaḥ saṃprāpya atra pavitrāṇi paṃcaga vya havīṃṣi ca aśuci tvam kṣaṇāt ca api kim anyat vastu bindavaḥ dehaḥ saṃśodhyamānaḥ api pañcagavya kuśa ambuṣu iva na gacchati kapha mūtra purīṣa ādyaiḥ saḥ dehaḥ śuddhyate katham śuciḥ ekaḥ viṣ pūrṇaḥ syandate kila saṃskṛtaḥ na jahāti svakam bhāvam śvapu cham iva nāmitam yathā jātyā eva kṛṣṇaḥ hi na śuklaḥ syāt upāyatas saṃśodhyamānā api tathā bhavet mūrtiḥ na nirmalā tvac mātra sāram niḥsāram kadala sāra saṃnibham garbha sthasya smṛtiḥ yā āsīt sā jātasya praṇaśyati saṃmūrchitasya duḥkhena yoni yantra prapīḍanāt bāhyena vāyunā ca asya moha saṃjñena dehinaḥ spṛṣṭa mātreṇa ghoreṇa jvaraḥ samupajāyate saṃmūḍhasya smṛti bhraṃśaḥ śīghram saṃjāyate punar smṛti bhraṃśāt tu tasya iha pūrva karma vaśena ca ratiḥ saṃjāyate tūrṇam jantoḥ tatra eva janmani na ca ātmānam vijānāti na param vindate ca saḥ na śrūyate param śreyaḥ sati cakṣuṣi na īkṣate saṃsāre kliśyate tena rāga lobha vaśa anugaḥ garbha smṛtyāḥ abhāvena śāstram uktam mahā ṛṣibhiḥ avyakta indriya vṛtti tvāt bālye duḥkham mahat punar danta utthāne mahat duḥkham maulena vyādhinā tathā bāla rogaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ pīḍā bālagrahaiḥ api tṛṣ bubhukṣā parīta aṅgaḥ kaścid tiṣṭhati rāraṭan viṣ mūtra bhakṣaṇam api mohāt bālaḥ samācaret kaumāre karṇa vedhena mātā pitroḥ ca tāḍanāt akṣara adhyayanāt puṃsām duḥkham syāt guru śāsanāt prasanna indriya vṛttiḥ ca kāma rāga prapīḍanāt īrṣyayā ca mahat duḥkham mohāt raktasya jāyate na rātrau vindate nidrām kopa agni paripīḍitaḥ divā vā api kutas saukhyam artha upārjana ciṃtayā strīṣu āyāsita dehasya ye pumāṃsaḥ śukra bindavaḥ na te sukhāya mantavyāḥ sveda jāḥ iva bindavaḥ yat bhavet strīṣu tat hi tat yādṛśam vindate saukhyam gaṇḍa anvaya vinirgame tādṛśam strīṣu mantavyam na adhikam tāsu vidyate viṣ mūtrasya samutsargāt sukham bhavati yādṛśam tādṛśam teṣu vijñeyam mūḍhaiḥ kalpitam anyathā nārīṣu aśuci bhūtāsu sarva doṣa āśrayāsu ca na aṇu mātrakam api evam sukham asti vicārāt balī palita khālityaiḥ śithilīkṛta vigraham sarva kriyāsu aśaktam ca jarayā jarjarīkṛtam strīpuṃsayoḥ navam rūpam tadā anyonyam priyam purā apūrva vat svam ātmānam jarayā parivartitaḥ aśakta tvāt durācāraiḥ bhṛtyaiḥ ca paribhūyate dharmam artham ca kāmam ca mokṣam ca na jarī yatas ha śaktaḥ sādhayitum tasmāt śarīram idam ātmanaḥ vāta pitta kapha ādīnām vaiṣamyam vyādhiḥ ucyate tasmāt vyādhi mayam jñeyam śarīram idam ātmanaḥ vāta ādi a vyatirikta tvāt vyādhīnām pañjarasya ca tatra ekaḥ kāla saṃyuktaḥ śeṣāḥ ca āgantavaḥ smṛtāḥ ye tu iha āgantavaḥ proktāḥ te praśāmyanti bheṣajaiḥ japa homa pradānaiḥ ca kāla mṛtyuḥ na śāmyati yadi ca api na mṛtyuḥ syāt viṣam adyāt aśaṃkitaḥ na santi puruṣe tasmāt apamṛtyu vibhītayaḥ vividhāḥ vyādhayaḥ śastram sarpa ādyāḥ prāṇinaḥ tathā mṛtyoḥ dvārāṇi dehinām na auṣadham na tapaḥ dānam na mantrāḥ na ca bāndhavāḥ tīryate na alasaiḥ naraiḥ na asti mṛtyu samam duḥkham na asti mṛtyu samam bhayam na asti mṛtyu samaḥ trāsaḥ sarveṣām eva dehinām sat bhāryā putra mitrāṇi ca abaddhāni ca vairāṇi mṛtyuḥ sarvāṇi kṛntati he janāḥ kim na paśyadhvam sahasrasya api madhyatas janāḥ śata āyuṣaḥ pañca bhavanti na bhavanti ca aśītikāḥ vipadyante kecid saptatikāḥ narāḥ parama āyuṣam sthitam ṣaṣṭiḥ tat ca eva aniścitam punar tasya ardham āyuṣaḥ rātriḥ harate mṛtyu rūpiṇī varṣāṇām viṃśatiḥ yānti dharma kāma artha varjitā mayaiḥ puṃsām vyādhi śokaiḥ anekadhā ca maraṇam mahā ghoram avāpnuyāt jāyate janma koṭīṣu mṛtaḥ karma vaśāt punar dehabhedena yaḥ puṃsām viyogaḥ karma saṃkṣayāt maraṇam tat vinirdiṣṭam na anyathā paramārthāt tāta mātar kāntā iti rudan evam hi duḥkhitaḥ maṇḍūkaḥ iva sarpeṇa grasyate mṛtyunā janaḥ bāṃdhavaiḥ saṃpariṣvaktaḥ priyaiḥ sa parivāritaḥ niḥśvasan dīrgham uṣṇam ca mukhena pariśuṣyati saṃmūḍhaḥ kṣipate atyartham hasta pādau itas tatas bhūmim bhūmeḥ khaṭvām punar mahīm mūtra viṣṭhā anulepitaḥ yācamānaḥ ca salilam śuṣka kaṇṭha uṣṭha tālukaḥ ciṃtayānaḥ ca vittāni kasya etāni mṛte mayi pañca avaṭān khanyamānaḥ kāla pāśena karṣitaḥ mriyate paśyatām eva janānām ghurghura svanaḥ jīvaḥ tṛṇa jalaukā iva dehāt deham viśet kramāt maraṇāt prārthanā duḥkham adhikam hi vivekinaḥ kṣaṇikam maraṇa aduḥkham anantam prārthanā kṛtam jagantām patiḥ arthi tvāt viṣṇuḥ vāmana tām gataḥ na param prārthayet bhūyas tṛṣṇā lāghava kāraṇam madhye duḥkham tathā madhye duḥkham ante ca dāruṇam nisargāt sarva bhūtānām iti duḥkha paramparā tu narāḥ na bhāvayanti ajñāḥ na virajyati tena te atyāhārāt mahat duḥkham anāhārāt mahattamam tulitam jīvitam kaṣṭam manye api evam kutas sukham bubhukṣā sarva rogāṇām vyādhiḥ śreṣṭhatamaḥ smṛtaḥ sa ca anna oṣadhi lepena kṣaṇa mātram praśāmyati kṣudh vyādhi vedanā tulyā niḥśeṣa bala kartanā tad kṣaṇāt vā ardha kālena kaṇṭham prāpya nivartate tatra api ca kutas saukhyam tamasā ācchādita ātmanaḥ kṛṣi gorakṣa vāṇijya sevā adhva ādi pariśramaiḥ prātar mūtra purīṣābhyām madhyāhne tu bubhukṣayā tṛptāḥ kāmena bādhyante vinidrayā bhayam arthavatām nityam mṛtyoḥ prāṇabhṛtām iva khe yātam pakṣibhiḥ māṃsam bhakṣyate śvāpadaiḥ bhuvi khedayanti arjana akāle kadā hi arthāḥ sukha āvahāḥ yatas ca arthapatiḥ duḥkhī sukhī sarva artha niḥspṛhaḥ śītena duḥkham hemante grīṣme tāpena dāruṇam tatra apatya doṣaiḥ ca duḥkham duḥkha ādi karmabhiḥ danta akṣi raugaiḥ putrasya hā kaṣṭam kim karomi aham gāvaḥ naṣṭāḥ kṛṣiḥ bhagnāḥ vṛṣāḥ kvāpi palāyitāḥ amī prāghūrṇakāḥ prāptāḥ bhakta chede ca me gṛhe bāla apatyā ca mama bhāryā kaḥ kariṣyati randhanam pradāna kāle kanyāyāḥ kīdṛśaḥ ca varaḥ bhavet iti cintā abhibhūtānām kutas saukhyam kuṭubinām puṃsaḥ śrutam ca śīlam ca guṇāḥ ca sarve apakva kumbhe nihitāḥ iva apaḥ prayānti dehena samam vināśam sajātīyāt vadhaḥ prāyas sarveṣām eva dehinām na apradhṛṣya balaḥ kaścid nṛpaḥ khyātaḥ asti bhū tale na ā janmanaḥ prabhṛti duḥkha mayam śarīram karma ātmakam te mayā kathitam narendra nāma pāpa bheda ākhyāna varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca naraka arṇava ghoreṣu yātanā pāpam ucyate sthūlāḥ sūkṣmāḥ su sūkṣmāḥ ca koṭi bhedaiḥ anekadhā tatra ye pāpa nicayāḥ sthūlāḥ naraka hetavaḥ te samāsena kathyante manas vāc kāya sādhanāḥ para strīṣu atha saṃkalpaḥ cetasā aniṣṭa cintanam akārya abhiniveśaḥ ca caturdhā karma mānasam para apavāda paiśunyam caturdhā karma vācikam abhakṣya bhakṣaṇam hiṃsā mithyā kāmasya sevanam para svānām upādānam caturddhā karma kāyikam tad bheda punar vac yad phala anantaka ye dviṣanti mahādevam saṃsāra arṇava tāraṇam mahāpātakinaḥ ca ete tad saṃsargī ca pañcamaḥ krodhāt dveṣāt bhayāt lobhāt brāhmaṇam viśasanti ye prāṇāntikaḥ mahā doṣaḥ brahma ghnāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ brāhmaṇam ca samāhūya yācamānam akiñcanam paścāt na asti iti tam brūyāt saḥ ca evam brahma hā smṛtaḥ samāsīnaḥ sabhā madhye brahma hā saḥ api kīrtitaḥ mithyā guṇaiḥ svam ātmānam nayati utkarṣaṇam balāt gurūṇām ca viruddhaḥ yaḥ sa ca eva brahma hā smṛtaḥ kṣudh tṛṣ saṃtapta dehānām dvijānām bhoktum icchatām piśunaḥ sarva lokānām chidra anveṣaṇa tatparaḥ udvega jananaḥ krūraḥ saḥ ca eva brahma hā smṛtaḥ gavām tṛṣṇā abhibhūtānām jala artham upasarpatām para doṣam abhijñāya nṛpa karṇe karoti yaḥ pāpīyāḥ piśunaḥ kṣudraḥ saḥ ca eva brahma hā smṛtaḥ deva dvija gavām bhūmim pūrva bhuktā haret tu yaḥ pranaṣṭām api kālena tam āhuḥ brahmaghātakam brahmahatyā samam jñeyam pātakam na atra saṃśayaḥ mātā pitṛ parityāgaḥ kūṭa sākṣyam suhṛd vadhaḥ gavām mārge vane ca agnim pure grāme ca dīpayet iti pāpāni ghorāṇi surā pāna samā tu hīna sva haraṇe ca api nara strī gaja vājinām go bhū rajata ratnānām auṣadhīnām rajasya ca candana agaru karpūra kastūrī khaṇḍa vāsasām kanyānām vara yogyānām adānam sadṛśe vare kumārī sāhasam ghoram antyaja strī niṣevaṇam avarṇāyāḥ ca gamanam guru talpa samam smṛtam mahāpātaka tulyāni pāpāni uktāni yāni tu tāni pātaka saṃjñāni tat vadāmi upapātakam dvija dravya apaharaṇam maryādāyāḥ vyatikramaḥ ati kopaḥ ca mānaḥ ca dāmbhika tvam kṛtaghna tā atyanta viṣaya āsaktiḥ kārpaṇyam śreṣṭha matsaraḥ para dāra apaharaṇam sādhu kanyā vidūṣaṇam putra mitra kalatrāṇām abhāve svāminaḥ tathā hi śiṣṭānām ca eva saṃnyāsaḥ sahajānām tapasvinām bhaṅgaḥ ca dharma kṛtyānām sahāyānām vināśanam pīḍām āśrama saṃsthānāt na ācaret tu alpakām api kupya dhānya paśu steyam ayācyānām ca yācanam gavām kṣatriya veśyānām strī śūdrāṇām viśeṣataḥ yajña ārāma taḍāgānām dāra apatyasya vikrayaḥ tīrtha yātrā upavāsānām vrata āyatana karmaṇām strīdhanāni upajīvanti strībhiḥ atyanta nirjitāḥ arakṣaṇam ca nārīṇām madyapa strī niṣevaṇam ṛṇānām apradānam ca dhānya vṛddhi upajīvinām ninditāt ca dhana ādānam apaṇyānām ca vikrayaḥ uccāṭana avicāraḥ ca gara vidveṣaṇa kriyā mūlyena adhyāpayet yaḥ ca mūlyena adhīyate ca ye asat dāra abhigamanam śuṣka tarka avalambanam deva agni sādhu sādhvīnām nindā go brāhmaṇasya ca pratyakṣam vā parokṣam vā rājñām maṇḍalikām api duḥśīlāḥ nāstikāḥ pāpāḥ sarva śūnyasya vādinaḥ strī putra mitra saṃprīte grāsa anna chedakāḥ ca ye priya vaktāraḥ dhūrtāḥ samaya bhedinaḥ bhettā taḍāga cakrāṇām saṃkramāṇām rathasya ca eka paṅkti sthitānām ca pāka bhedam karoti yaḥ iti etaiḥ te narāḥ pāpaiḥ upapātakinaḥ smṛtāḥ yuktāḥ tad ūnakaiḥ kṣudraiḥ pāpaiḥ pāpatarāḥ smṛtāḥ ye go brāhmaṇa kanyānām svāmi mitra tapasvinām taram yānti kāryeṣu te narāḥ nārakāḥ smṛtāḥ para śriyā ye tapyante ye para dravya sūcakāḥ para vyāpāra niratāḥ para strī nara dūṣakāḥ dvijāya duḥkham yaḥ kuryāt prakāraiḥ bahubhiḥ sadā sevate yaḥ dvijaḥ śūdrām surām jighrati kāmāt ye pāna abhiratāḥ krūrāḥ ye ca hiṃsā priyāḥ narāḥ vitta artham ye ca kurvanti dāna yajña ādikām kriyām goṣṭha agni jala rathyāsu taru chāyā maṭheṣu ca tyajanti amedhyam puruṣāḥ ārāma āyataneṣu ca madya pāna ratāḥ nityam gāna vādya ratāḥ narāḥ keli kalā bhujaṃgāḥ ca randhra anveṣaṇa tatparāḥ vaṃśeṣu kāśa kāṣṭhaiḥ ca śubhaiḥ śaṅkubhiḥ eva vā ye mārgān samupaghnanti para striyaḥ āharanti ca kūṭaśāsana hartāraḥ kūṭa karma kriyā ratāḥ kūṭa yuddhāḥ ca śastreṇa kūṭa saṃvyavahāriṇaḥ dhanuṣām śalya śastrāṇām yaḥ kartā yaḥ ca vikrayī nirdayaḥ atīva bhṛtyeṣu paśūnām damakaḥ ca yaḥ mithyā pravadataḥ vākyam ākarṇayati yaḥ śanais svāmi mitra guru drohī māyāvī capalaḥ śaṭhaḥ ye bhāryā putra mitrāṇi bāla vṛddha kṛśa āturān bhṛtyān atithi bandhūn ca prabādhante bubhukṣayā yaḥ svayam miṣṭam aśnāti viprāya anyat prayacchati niyamān svayam ādāya ye tyajanti ajita indriyāḥ pravrajyā vāsinaḥ ye ca rahasyānām ca bhedakāḥ tāḍayanti ca vegāt ye śapanti ca muhur muhur durbalān ca na puṣṇanti punar tān vāhayanti ca pīḍayanti atibhāreṇa sa kṣatān vāhayanti ca sārdha yāmāt uparitas saṃyukteṣu ca bhujate ye bhagna kṣata roga ārtān sva go rūpān bubhukṣayā na pālayanti yatnena te goptāḥ nārakāḥ narāḥ mṛṣāṇām vṛṣaṇāni eva pāpiṣṭhāḥ gālayanti ye vāhayanti ca gām vadhyām te mahā nārakāḥ smṛtāḥ āśramam samanuprāptam kṣudh tṛṣṇā śrama pīḍitam anātham vikalam dīnam bālam vṛddham kṛśa āturam na anukampanti ye mūḍhāḥ te yānti niraya arṇavam ajāvikaḥ māhiṣikaḥ sāmudraḥ vṛṣalī patiḥ nārakī syāt dvija adhamaḥ śilpinaḥ kārukāḥ vaidyāḥ hemakārāḥ naṭāḥ dvijāḥ sayuktāḥ tathā anye nārakāḥ smṛtāḥ narakeṣu ye dvijāḥ pratigṛhṇanti nṛpasya anyāya vartinaḥ prayānti te api ghorāṇi narakāṇi na saṃśayaḥ pāradārika caurāṇām yat pāpam pārthivasya tat ghṛta taila anna pānāni madhu māṃsa surā āsavam guḍa ikṣu kṣāra śākāni dadhi mūla phalāni ca tṛṇam kāṣṭham puṣpa patram auṣadham kāṃsya bhājanam upānah chattra śakaṭam āsanam śayana ambaram tāmram sīsam trapum kācam śaṅkha ādyam ca jala udbhavam ca mūrṇā kārpāsa kauśeya bhaṅgapaṭṭa udbhavāni ca sthūla sūkṣmāṇi vastrāṇi ye ca lobhāt haranti ca evamādīni ca anyāni dravyāṇi vividhāni ca marakāṇi dhruvam yānti narāḥ vā na atra saṃśayaḥ apahṛtya naraḥ yāti narakam na atra saṃśayaḥ evamādyaiḥ naraḥ pāpaiḥ utkrāntyāḥ samanantaram mad yātanā arthāya pūrva ākāram avāpnuyāt yama lokam vrajet tena śarīreṇa yama ājñayā tiryañc mānuṣa dehānām adharma nirata ātmanām dharmarājaḥ smṛtaḥ śāstā su ghoraiḥ vividhaiḥ vadhaiḥ prāyaścitteḥ guruḥ śāstā na ca taiḥ dṛśyate yamaḥ pāradārika caurāṇām anyāya vyavahāriṇām nṛpatiḥ śāsakaḥ teṣām pracchannānām ca dharmarāj tasmāt kṛtasya pāpasya prāyaścittam samācaret na abhuktasya anyathā nāśaḥ kalpa koṭi śataiḥ api yena manasā vācā tasya ca adhogatiḥ phalam iti saṃkṣepāt proktāḥ pāpa bhedāḥ sa sādhanāḥ kathyate gatayaḥ citrāḥ narāṇām pāpa karmaṇām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi pāpabhedākhyānam nāma pañcama adhyāyaḥ śubha aśubha phala nirdeśa varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca saṃtrāsa jananam ghoram vivaśāḥ sarva dehinaḥ puṃs strī napuṃsakaiḥ vṛddhaiḥ jñātavyam sarva jantubhiḥ śubha aśubha phalam tatra dehinām pravicāryate na te atra prāṇinaḥ saṃti ye na yānti yama kṣayam tatra ye śubha karmāṇaḥ saumya cittāḥ dayā anvitāḥ yaḥ pradadyāt dvijendrāṇām upānah kāṣṭha pādukām sa vara aśvena mahatā sukham yāti yama ālayam divya vastra parīdhānāḥ yānti vastra pradāyinaḥ śayyā āsana pradānena sukham yānti yama āśrayam ārāma kartā chāyāsu śītalāsu sukham vrajet yānti puṣpaka yānena puṣpa ārāma pradāyinaḥ devāyatana kartā ca yatīnām āśramasya ca anātha maṇḍapānām ca krīḍanī yāti gṛha uttamaiḥ deva agni guru viprāṇām mātā pitroḥ ca pūjakāḥ pūjyamānāḥ narāḥ yānti kāmikena pathinā sukham dyotayantaḥ diśaḥ sarvāḥ yānti dīpa pradāyinaḥ pratiśraya pradānena sukham yānti gṛham svayam ye na pāpāni kurvanti te tṛptāḥ yānti na anyathā mad auṣadha pradātāraḥ sukham yānti nirākulāḥ mad mad gacchanti guru śuśrūṣaṇe ratāḥ pāda śauca pradānena śītalena pathinā vrajet pāda abhyaṅgam ca yaḥ kuryāt aśva pṛṣṭhena sa vrajet sarva kāma samṛddha ātmā bhūmi dānena gacchati iti evamādibhiḥ dānaiḥ sukham yānti yama kṣayam sarveṣām eva dānānām anna dānam param smṛtam trayāṇām api lokānām jīvitam hi udakam smṛtam annam pānam ca go vastra bhū śayyā chatram āsanam para loke praśastāni dānāni aṣṭa viśeṣataḥ anna dānam viśeṣeṇa dharmaiḥ rāja pure narāḥ ye punar krūra karmāṇaḥ pāpāḥ dāna vivarjitāḥ te ghoreṇa pathinā yānti dakṣiṇena svam ālayam bahu aśīti sahasrāṇi yojanānām atītya yat samīpa stham iva ābhāti narāṇām śubha karmaṇām pāpānām ati dūra stham pathinā raudreṇa gacchatām pāṣāṇaiḥ nicitena ca taṭa prapāta viṣṭambhaiḥ parvataiḥ vṛkṣa saṃkulaiḥ pratapta aṅgāra yuktena yānti mārgeṇa duḥkhitāḥ pratapta vālukābhiḥ ca tathā tīkṣṇaiḥ ca śaṅkubhiḥ kvacid vālukayā vyāptam kaṣṭena eva praveśanam yāptam kvacid uṣṇa ambunā vyāptam kvacid kārīṣa vahninā kvacid siṃhaiḥ vṛkaiḥ vyāptam daṃśaiḥ kīṭaiḥ ca dāruṇaiḥ makṣikābhiḥ ca raudrābhiḥ kvacid sarpaiḥ viṣa ulbaṇaiḥ matta mātaṃga yūthaiḥ ca bala unmattaiḥ pramāthibhiḥ pathinam ullikhadbhiḥ ca tīkṣṇa śṛṅgaiḥ mahā vṛṣaiḥ mahā viṣāṇaiḥ mahiṣaiḥ uṣṭraiḥ mattaiḥ ca khādakaiḥ ḍākinībhiḥ ca raudrābhiḥ vikarālaiḥ ca rākṣasaiḥ vyādhibhiḥ ca mahā ghoraiḥ pīḍyamānāḥ vrajanti ca mahā dhūli vimiśreṇa mahā caṇḍena vāyunā mahā pāṣāṇa varṣeṇa hanyamānāḥ nirāśrayāḥ kvacid vidyut prapātena dīryamāṇāḥ vrajanti ca mahatā bāṇa varṣeṇa vidhyamānāḥ ca sarvaśas patadbhiḥ vajra saṃghātaiḥ ulkā pātaiḥ ca dāruṇaiḥ pratapta āgāra varṣeṇa dahyamānāḥ vrajanti ca taptena pāṃśu varṣeṇa pūryamāṇāḥ rudanti ca niśita āyudha varṣeṇa cūryamāṇāḥ naraiḥ vṛtāḥ mahā kṣāra ambu dhārābhiḥ sicyamānāḥ dravanti ca mahā śītena marutā tīkṣṇena paruṣeṇa ca samantāt pīḍyamānāḥ te śuṣyante saṃkucanti ca aviśrāmeṇa mahatā nirgata apāśrayeṇa ca tamaḥ rūpeṇa kaṣṭena sarva duḥkha āśrayeṇa ca nīyaṃte dehinaḥ sarve ye mūḍhāḥ pāpa karmiṇaḥ yama dūtaiḥ mahā ghoraiḥ tad ājñā kāribhiḥ balāt ekākinaḥ para adhīnāḥ mitra bandhu vivarjitāḥ ha śocantaḥ svāni karmāṇi rudantaḥ ca muhur muhur preta bhūtāḥ vivastrāḥ ca śuṣka kaṇṭha uṣṭha tālukāḥ kṛśa aṅgāḥ bhīta bhītāḥ ca dahyamānāḥ kṣudhā agninā baddhāḥ śṛṅkhalayā kecid uttānāḥ pādayoḥ narāḥ ākṛṣyante ghṛṣyamāṇāḥ yamadūtaiḥ bala utkaṭaiḥ punar ca adhomukhāḥ ca anye ghṛṣyamāṇāḥ su duḥkhitāḥ pāśa nibaddhāḥ ca kṛṣyante rajjubhiḥ narāḥ lalāṭe ca aṅkuśaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ bhinnāḥ kṛṣyanti dehinaḥ uttānāḥ raṭamānāḥ ca kvacid aṅgāra vartmanā pāścāt bāhu aṃsa baddhāḥ ca jaṭhare ca prapīḍitāḥ pūritāḥ śṛṅkhalābhiḥ ca hastayoḥ ca prakīlitāḥ grīvāyām ardhacandreṇa kṣipyamāṇāḥ itas tatas śiśne ca vṛṣaṇe baddhvā nīyante carmarajjunā vibhinnāḥ udare ca anye tapta śṛṅkhalayāḥ narāḥ te kṛṣyante karṇayoḥ ca anye bhinnāḥ ca cibuka upari chinna agra pāda hastāḥ ca chinna karṇa oṣṭha nāsikāḥ saṃchinna śiśna vṛṣaṇāḥ chinna bhinna aṅga saṃdhayaḥ pratudyamānāḥ kuntaiḥ ca sāyakaiḥ ca tatas tatas bhidyamānāḥ pradhāvanti krandamānāḥ nirāśrayāḥ bhindipālaiḥ vibhidyante sravantaḥ pūya śoṇitam māṃse kṣatāḥ ca kṛmibhiḥ nīyante vivaśāḥ narāḥ yācamānāḥ ca salilam annam ca api bubhukṣitāḥ chāyām prārthayamānāḥ ca śīta ārtāḥ bahu vāyunā dāna hīnāḥ prayānti evam yāvantaḥ vimukhāḥ narāḥ gṛhīta dāna pātheyāḥ sukham yānti yama ālayam evam pathinā ati kaṣṭena prāptāḥ yama puram tadā prajñāpitāḥ tadā dūtaiḥ niveśyaṃte yama agratas tatra ye śubha karmāṇaḥ tān ca saṃmānayet yamaḥ svāgata āsana dānena pādya arghena priyeṇa ca dhanyāḥ yūyam mahātmānaḥ ātmanaḥ hita kāriṇaḥ idam vimānam āruhya divya strī bhoga bhūṣitam tatas bhuktvā mahā bhogān ante puṇyasya saṃkṣayāt te ca api dharmarājānam narāḥ puṇya anubhāvāt paśyanti saumya vadanam pitṛ bhūtam iva ātmanaḥ ye punar pāpa karmāṇaḥ te paśyanti bhayānakam pāpa aviśuddha nayanāḥ viparīta ātma buddhayaḥ daṃṣṭra karāla vadanam bhrukuṭi kuṭila īkṣaṇam aṣṭādaśa bhujam kruddham nīlāñjana caya upamam mahā mahiṣam ārūḍham dīpta agni sama locanam pralaya ambuda nirghoṣam pibantam iva sāgaram mṛtyuḥ ca tad samīpa sthaḥ kāla anala sama prabhaḥ mārī ca ugrā mahāmārī kālarātriḥ su dāruṇā vividhāḥ vyādhayaḥ kaṣṭāḥ nānā rūpa bhaya āvahāḥ mahā śakti śūla aṅkuśa dharāḥ pāśa cakra asi dhāriṇaḥ asaṃkhyātāḥ mahā vīryāḥ krūrāḥ ca añjana saṃprabhāḥ sarva āyudha udyata karāḥ yamadūtāḥ bhayānakāḥ anena parivāreṇa mahā ghoreṇa saṃvṛtam yamam paśyanti pāpiṣṭhāḥ citraguptam ca bhīṣaṇam bho bho duṣkṛta karmāṇaḥ para dravya apahāriṇaḥ garvitāḥ rūpa vīryeṇa para dāra vimardakāḥ tat kim ātma upaghāta artham bhavadbhiḥ duṣkṛtam kṛtam idānīm kim pratapyadhvam pīḍyamānāḥ sva karmabhiḥ bhuñjadhvam svāni karmāṇi na atra doṣaḥ asti kasyacid ete ca pṛthivīpālāḥ saṃprāptāḥ mad samīpatas svakīyaiḥ karmabhiḥ ghoraiḥ duṣprajñāḥ bala garvitāḥ bho bho nṛpāḥ durācārāḥ prajā vidhvaṃsa kāriṇaḥ alpa kālasya rājyasya kṛte kim duṣkṛtam kṛtam rājya lobhena mohāt vā balāt anyāyāt prajāḥ yad pīḍitāḥ phalam tasya bhujadhvam adhunā nṛpāḥ kṛtam rājyam kalatram ca yad artham aśubham kṛtam tat sarvam saṃparityajya yūyam ekākinaḥ sthitāḥ paśyāma tat balam tubhyam yena vidhvaṃsitāḥ prajāḥ tāḍyamānāḥ adhunā kīdṛśam bhavet ha śocantaḥ svāni karmāṇi tūṣṇīm tiṣṭhaṃti pārthivaiḥ iti dharmam samādiśya nṛpāṇām dharmarāj punar bho bhoḥ caṇḍaiḥ mahā caṇḍaiḥ gṛhītvā nṛpatīn imān bhū tatas śīghram samutthāya nṛpān saṃgṛhya pādayoḥ sphālayanti tarasā vajreṇa iva mahā drumam saḥ niḥsaṃjñaḥ tadā dehī niśceṣṭaḥ saṃprajāyate tatas sa vāyunā spṛṣṭaḥ śanais ujīvate punar tatas pāpa viśuddhi artham kṣipyate naraka arṇave aṣṭāviṃśatiḥ eva adhas kṣityāḥ naraka koṭayaḥ raurava prabhṛtīnām ca narakāṇām śatam smṛtam catvāriṃśat samadhikam mahānaraka maṇḍalam yeṣu pāpāḥ prapacyaṃte narāḥ karma anurūpāt yātanābhiḥ vicitrābhiḥ ākarma prakṣayāt bhṛśam mala prakṣayāt yadvat agnau dhāsyanti dhātavaḥ tathā pāpa kṣayāt pāpāḥ śodhyante naraka agniṣu su gāḍha hastayā bāḍham tapta śṛṅkhalayā narāḥ mahā vṛkṣa agra śākhāyām lambyante yama kiṃkaraiḥ tatas te sarpa yantreṇa kṣiptāḥ kiṃkaraiḥ dolī antar ca ativegena niḥsaṃjñāḥ yānti yojanam antarikṣa sthitānām ca loha bhāra śatam tatas teṣām yamadūtaiḥ mahā balaiḥ tena bhāreṇa mahatā bhṛśa mātar ṛdditāḥ narāḥ dhyāyantaḥ svāni karmāṇi tūṣṇīm tiṣṭha iti vihvalāḥ jvālābhiḥ agni varṇābhiḥ loha daṇḍaiḥ sa kaṇṭakaiḥ hanyante kiṃkaraiḥ ghoraiḥ samantāt pāpa kāriṇaḥ tatas kṣāreṇa dīptena vahneḥ api viśeṣataḥ samantataḥ pralipyaṃte kṣata aṅgāḥ jarjarīkṛtāḥ punar vidārya ca aṅgeṣu śirasaḥ prabhṛti kramāt viṣṭhā pūrṇe tatas kūpe kṛmīṇām nicaye tatas medaḥ tvac pūya pūrṇāyām vāpyām kṣipyanti te punar bhakṣyaṃte krimibhiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ lohatuṇḍaiḥ ca vāyasaiḥ pacyaṃte māṃsa vat ca api pradīpta aṅgāra rāśiṣu protāḥ śūleṣu tīkṣṇeṣu narāḥ pāpena karmaṇā bhidyante ca api talpeṣu loha bhrāṣṭreṣu anekadhā taila pūrṇa kaṭāheṣu sutapteṣu punar punar bahuśas pīḍyate jihvā yā asatya priya vādinī saṃdaṃśena su taptena prapīḍyante ca pādayoḥ jihvā ardha krośa vistīrṇā halaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ ca bādhyate teṣām vakṣaḥ ulūkābhiḥ mukham āpūrya sevyate tatas kṣāreṇa dīptena tāmreṇa tu punar punar itas tatas punar vaktram bhṛśam āpūrya hanyate viṣṭhābhiḥ kṛmibhiḥ ca api suvarṇa haraṇaiḥ naraḥ pariṣvajati ca ati ugrām pradīptām loha śālmalīm hanyate pṛṣṭha deśe ca punar tīkṣṇaiḥ mahā ghanaiḥ dantureṇa ati kūṭena krakacena balīyasā śiraḥ prabhṛti pāda antam ghoraiḥ karmabhiḥ ātmajaiḥ khādyate svāni māṃsāni pāyate śoṇitam svakam annam pānam na dattam yaiḥ mūḍhaiḥ na api anumoditam te prapīḍyante jarjarīkṛta mastakāḥ asitāla vane ghore chidyante khaṇḍa khaṇḍaśas sūcibhiḥ bhinna sarva aṅgāḥ tapta śūla praropitāḥ saṃbādhyamānāḥ vivaśāḥ kliśyaṃte na mriyanti vai bhidyante asthīni mudgaraiḥ dṛṣṭiḥ ākṛṣyate tūrṇam yama dūtaiḥ bala utkaṭaiḥ ucchvasanti sadā śvāsaiḥ vālukā vadana āvṛtāḥ raurave rodamānāḥ ca pīḍyante vividhaiḥ śaraiḥ mahāraurava pīḍābhiḥ mahatībhiḥ tad antike nikhanyante ghanaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ su taptaiḥ loha śaṅkubhiḥ su tapta vālukāyām ca praluṭhyante punar punar bhṛśam tapte kṣiprā krandanti vistaram gāḍham āliṅgyate nārīm jvalatīm loha nirmitām pūrva ākāram ca puruṣam prajvalantam samantataḥ duścāriṇīḥ striyaḥ gāḍham āliṅganti vadanti ca laṅghitaḥ te yathā bhartā pāpam bhuṃkṣva tathā adhunā loha kumbhe tathā kṣiptāḥ sa vidhānaiḥ śanais śanais mṛdu agninā atha pacyante sva pāpaiḥ eva mānavāḥ sa asrāḥ prakṣipyaṃte śilāsu ca te ca andhakūpeṣu daśyante bhramaraiḥ bhṛśam bhinna sarva aṅgāḥ śataśas jarjarīkṛtāḥ su tīkṣṇa kṣāra kūpeṣu kṣipyaṃte tad anantaram mahājvāle ca narake pāpāḥ phūtkārayanti ca itas tatas ca dhāvanti dahyamānāḥ tad arciṣā pṛṣṭhe ca ānīya jaṅghe dve vinyaste skandhayoḥ sthite tayoḥ madhyena ca ākṛṣya bāhu pṛṣṭhena gāḍhatas baddhvā parasparam sarvam su dṛḍham gāḍha rajjubhiḥ pīḍayanti su saṃrabdhāḥ bhramarāḥ tīkṣṇaloha jāḥ māninām krodhinām ca eva purā pāpasya saṃśayāt pāpānām narake puṃsām ghṛṣyate candanam yathā harīra abhyantara gatam taruṇānām ca dāruṇam piṇḍa bandhaḥ smṛtaḥ yāmyaḥ mahā jvāleṣu yātanāḥ rajjubhiḥ veṣṭita aṅgāḥ ca praliptāḥ kardamena ca pacyante na mriyanti ca su tīkṣṇa kṣāra toyena śarkarāsu śilāsu ca pāpa saṃkṣayāt pāpāḥ ghṛṣyaṃte candanam yathā śarīra abhyantara gataiḥ prabhūtaiḥ kṛmibhiḥ narāḥ bhakṣyaṃte tīkṣṇa vadanaiḥ ādeha prakṣayāt bhṛśam kṛmīṇām nicaye kṣiptāḥ pūti māṃsasya rāśiṣu tiṣṭhanti udvigna hṛdayāḥ parvatābhyām ca pīḍitāḥ tad adhomukha ūrdhva pādāḥ ca dhṛtāḥ tapyanti vahniṣu te khādanti para adhīnāḥ hanyamānāḥ tu mudgaraiḥ te śivāyatana ārāma vāpī kūpa maṭha aṅga abhidravanti pāpiṣṭhāḥ narāḥ tatra vasaṃti ca vyāyāma udvartana abhyaṅga snānam āpāna bhojanam maithunam dyūtam āca ranti ramanti ca niraya agniṣu pacyaṃte yāvat ācandratārakam ye śṛṇvanti guroḥ nindām teṣām karṇaḥ prapūryate trapu sīsa ārakūṭa ādyaiḥ kṣāreṇa jatunā punar kramāt āpūryate karṇaḥ narakeṣu ca yātanāḥ tathā anukrameṇa sarveṣu bhavanti etāḥ samantataḥ sarva indriyāṇām api evam kramāt pāpena yātanāḥ bhavanti ghorāḥ pratyekam śarīre tad kṛtena ca sparśa lobhena ye mūḍhāḥ saṃspṛśanti para striyam teṣām tvac agni varṇābhiḥ sūcibhiḥ pūryate bhṛśam tatas kṣāra ādibhiḥ sarvaiḥ śarīram anulipyate yātanā ca mahā kaṣṭā sarveṣu narakeṣu ca guroḥ kurvanti bhrukuṭim krūram cakṣuḥ ca ye narāḥ para dārān ca paśyanti lubdhāḥ snigdhena cakṣuṣā sūcibhiḥ agni varṇābhiḥ teṣām netram prapūryate kṣāra ādyaiḥ ca kramāt sarvaiḥ dehe sarvāḥ ca yātanāḥ deva agni guru viprāṇām ye a nivedya prabhuṃjate tatas kṣāreṇa dīptena taila tāmra ādibhiḥ kramāt harīre ca mahā ghorāḥ citrāḥ naraka yātanāḥ ye śiva ārāma puṣpāṇi lobhāt saṃgṛhya pāṇinā praṇti mūḍha manasaḥ śirasā dhārayaṃti ca māpūryate śiraḥ teṣām su taptaiḥ loha śaṅkubhiḥ nāsikā ca ati bahuśas tatas kṣāra ādibhiḥ punar ye nindanti mahātmānam ācāryam dharma deśikam śiva bhaktān ca ye mūḍhāḥ śiva dharmam ca śāśvatam teṣām urasi kaṇṭhe ca jihvāyām danta saṃdhiṣu tālu koṣṭhe ca nāsāyām mūrdhani sarva aṅgasam agni varṇāḥ su taptāḥ ca tri śikhāḥ loha śaṅkavaḥ prākhanyante su bahuśas sthāneṣu eteṣu mudgaraiḥ tatas kṣāreṇa taptena tāmreṇa trapuṇā punar tapta taila ādibhiḥ sarvaiḥ āpūryaṃte samantataḥ pṛthak pṛthak pṛthak pṛthak narakeṣu ca sarveṣu vicitrāḥ tanāḥ bhavanti bahuśas kaṣṭāḥ pāṇi pāda samudbhavāḥ mahā āyatana paryante śiva ārāme ca kutracid samutsṛjanti ye pāpāḥ purīṣam mūtram eva vā teṣām liṅgam sa vṛṣaṇam cūrṇyate loha mudgaraiḥ sūcibhiḥ agni varṇābhiḥ tatas ca āpūryate punar loha daṇḍaḥ ca su mahān agni varṇaḥ sa kaṇṭakaḥ bhanyate gude teṣām yāvat mūrdhani vinirgataḥ tatas kṣāreṇa mahatā tāmreṇa trapuṇā punar drutena āpūryate gāḍham gudam śiśnam hi dehinām manaḥ sarva indriyāṇām ca yasmāt uktam pravartakam dhane sati api ye dānam na prayacchanti tṛṣṇayā tithim ca avamanyante kāla prāptam gṛhāśrame te loha toraṇe baddhāḥ hasta pāda avatāḍitāḥ bidārita aṅgāḥ śuṣyante sthanti abda śatam narāḥ hasta pāda lalāṭeṣu kīlitāḥ loha śaṅkubhiḥ nityam ca nīvṛtam vaktram kīlaka dvaya nāḍitam prāṇibhiḥ ca ugraiḥ loha daṇḍaiḥ ca vāyasaiḥ pīḍyante jihvā mūle nibadhya śṛṅkhalāḥ punar tiṣṭhanti lambamānāḥ ca loha bhāra prapīḍitāḥ tiṣṭhate lambamānam ca bahu bhāra caturguṇam tatas sva māṃsam utkṛtya tila mātra pramāṇāt bhojanam dīyate teṣām sūci agreṇa sa śoṇitam yadā nirmāṃsa tām prāptāḥ kālena mahatā punar tatas kṣāreṇa dīptena vapuḥ teṣām pralipyate sicyaṃte varṣa dhārābhiḥ śoṣyaṃte vāyunā punar paścāt te vahninā bhūyas dūra sthena śanais śanais niḥśeṣa yātanābhiḥ ca pīḍyante kramaśas punar bhṛśam bubhukṣayā pīḍā mūrchayā ati pipāsayā ati uṣṇena ati śītena pāpānām samareṇa ca evamādi mahā ghorāḥ yātanāḥ pāpa kāriṇaḥ pratyekam yātanāḥ citrāḥ sarveṣu narakeṣu ca kaṣṭam varṣa śatena api soḍhum sarvaiḥ ca nārake mriyante na eva pāpiṣṭhāḥ vividhāḥ pāpa kāriṇaḥ mahā ghora abhighora ākhyā kālāgni sadṛśa upamāḥ tatas tena atra kathitāḥ pāpāḥ gacchanti tān svayam putra mitra kalatra artham yadā puṇyam tu apākṛtam manā ca kṛtam pāpam bhoktavyam dhruvam ātmanā tat kim anya upaghāta artham mūḍha pāpam kṛtam tvayā evam dūtaiḥ upālabdhāḥ te pṛcchanti tatas punar kiyantam kena pāpena kālam atrāyate naraḥ pāpāt sarveṣu pacyaṃte narakeṣu ā mahā kṣayāt mahāpātakinaḥ ca api sarveṣu narakeṣu iha mācandratārakam yāvat pīḍyante vividhaiḥ vadhaiḥ mahāpātakinaḥ ca anye naraka arṇava koṭiṣu upapātakinaḥ ca api tad artham yānti mānavāḥ śeṣa pāpaiḥ tad ardham tu kālam ca api tathāvidham tasmāt pāpam na kurvīta cañcale jīvite sati bhāpena hi dhruvam yānti narakeṣu narāḥ svayam yaḥ karoti naraḥ pāpam tasya ātmā dhruvam apriyaḥ katham te pāpa niratāḥ narāḥ rātriṣu śerate maraṇa aṃtaritā yeṣām nārakā tīvra yātanā evam kliṣṭa viśuddhāḥ ca sa avaśeṣeṇa karmaṇā tatas kṣitim samāsādya jāyante dehinaḥ punar sthāvarāḥ vividha ākārāḥ tṛṇa gulma ādi bhedāt tatra anubhūya duḥkhāni jāyante kīṭa yoniṣu niṣkrāṃtāḥ kīṭa yonibhyaḥ jāyante pakṣiṇaḥ tatas saṃśliṣṭāḥ pakṣi bhāvena bhavanti mṛgaja ādiṣu mārgam duḥkham atikramya jāyaṃte paśu yoniṣu punar go yonim āsādya jāyante mānavāḥ punar vyutkrameṇa api mānuṣyam prāpyate puṇya gocarāt mānuṣyam yaḥ samāsādya svarga mokṣa prasādhakam deva asurāṇām sarveṣām mānuṣya mati durlabham tat saṃprāpya kathāḥ kuryāt na gacchet narakam yathā svargasya mūlam mānuṣyam tat yatnāt anupālayet dharma mūlena mānuṣyam labdhvā sarva artha sādhakam sarveṣām eva deśānām madhyadeśaḥ paraḥ smṛtaḥ atas svargaḥ ca mokṣaḥ ca yaśaḥ saṃprāpyate naraiḥ yaḥ kuryāt ātmanaḥ śreyaḥ tena ātmā rakṣitaḥ svayam yaḥ kuryāt na ātmanaḥ śreyaḥ tena ātmā vañcitaḥ svayam bhoga bhūmiḥ smṛtaḥ svargaḥ karma bhūmiḥ iyam matā yāvat svāsthyam śarīrasya tāvat dharmam samācara adhruveṇa śarīreṇa hi adhruvam yaḥ prasādhayet āyuṣaḥ khaṇḍakhaḍāni nipatanti te a gratas yadā na jñāyate mṛtyuḥ kadā kasya bhaviṣyati bhākasmike hi maraṇe dhṛtim videta kaḥ tadā na dadāsi tadā kasmāt pātheya artham idam dhanam sukham yānti mahā adhvani anyathā kliśyate jantuḥ pātheya rahitaḥ pathini yeṣām dvijendra vāhitrī pūrṇa bhāṇḍā tu gacchati svarga deśasya puras tas teṣām lābhaḥ pade pade iti jñātvā naraḥ puṇyam kuryāt pāpam vivarjayet ye manāk api deveśam prapannāḥ śaraṇam śivam te api ghoram na paśyanti yamasya vadanam narāḥ kim tu pāpaiḥ mahā ghoraiḥ kiṃcid kālam śiva ājñayā bhavanti pretaiḥ rājānaḥ tatas yānti śiva ālayam tad māhātmya vicāreṇa bhava doṣa virāgāt pāpāni pañca parama artha tayā eva pārtha duḥkha pradāni su ciram pitṛ rāja loke anyāni yāni cira kāla bhayānakāni vaktum na yānti kila tāni parisphuṭāni iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde śubhāśubhaphalanirdeśaḥ nāma ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca yat etat te samākhyātam gambhīram naraka arṇavam tathā ātmānam samādadhyāt bhraśyate na punar yathā para loke api sa tayā jñāyate jñāti vardhanaḥ māyate na iha na amutra vrata svādhyāya varjitaḥ siddhena saha brāhmaṇasya hi cacāra vikṛtam kṛtvā vapuḥ parama bhīṣaṇam nigīrṇa dantaḥ lamba uṣṭhaḥ piṅga akṣaḥ tanu mūrdhajaḥ truṭ eka karṇaḥ śīrṇa vastraḥ mahodaraḥ cipiṭa akṣaḥ sphuṭita pād jaṅghā āḍhyaḥ kṛśa kūrparaḥ diśaḥ paśyati saṃhṛṣṭaḥ babhrāma udbhrāṃta citta vat mūlajālika vipreṇa dṛṣṭaḥ pṛṣṭaḥ ca kaḥ bhavān kadā svargāt samāyātaḥ kena kāryeṇa me vada kaccit dṛṣṭā tvayā rambhā bhā bhāsita digantarā gatvā mad vacanāt vācyā nirvācyāḥ doṣa darśibhiḥ mās mās adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika adhika siddhaḥ prasiddham tam vipram prāha idam vismaya anvitaḥ katham tvayā aham vijñātaḥ svargāt abhyāgataḥ sphuṭam brāhmaṇaḥ tam atha uvāca vijñātaḥ asi mayā yathā tathā te aham pravakṣyāmi kṣīṇa agha oghaiḥ avadhāraya gātra trayam virūpam syāt dvitīyam vā svarūpāt dṛṣṭvā sarvāṅga vairūpyam vijñātaḥ asi tatas mayā durlaṅghyā prakṛtiḥ sākṣāt anubhūta karā bhavet prakṛtyāḥ anyathābhāvaḥ sarvathā lakṣyate janaiḥ śrutvā jagāma śanais punar kaiścid ahorātraiḥ ājagāma saḥ tām purīm mūlajālaka vipreṇa pṛṣṭaḥ prāha amarāvatīm śakrasya avasare vṛtte vrajatyāḥ sva gṛham mayā tvad saṃdeśaḥ samākhyātaḥ sā avadat kaḥ na vedmi tam brāhmaṇaḥ tam atha uvāca mugdhā dagdha agni sambhavā na bhakṣayāmi śakaṭam vratena etena vetti mām tasya etat vacanam śrutvā sa siddhaḥ su viśuddha dhīḥ prahasya āmantrya tam vipram jagāma adarśanam punar kadācid ca ratā tena svarga mārgam yadṛcchayā dṛṣṭvā rambhām dvija proktam sarvam eva niveditam uvāca kaḥ na jānāmi tam vipram śakaṭa vrata cāriṇam mūla jālaiḥ vartayantam mahākāla vana āśrayam darśanāt atha saṃbhāṣāt upakārāt sahāsanāt caturdhā sneha nirbandhaḥ nṛṇām saṃjāyate adhikaḥ na darśanam na saṃbhāṣā kadācid saha tena me nāma śravaṇa mātreṇa snehaḥ saṃdarśitaḥ mahān iti evam uktvā rambhā ūruḥ rambhā puratas ruddha hṛdayāḥ brāhmaṇasya ca dhīmataḥ mad provāca cāru aṅgām gīrvāṇa hṛdayaṃgamām kim ānayāmi tam vipram samīpam te suvratam vimāna varam āropya darśayāmāsa tam punar bhuvane su dṛḍha vratānām tasmāt sadā vrata pareṇa nareṇa bhāvyam ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde śakaṭavratamāhātmyakathanam nāma saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca brahma īśa keśava ādīnām gauryāḥ gaṇapateḥ tathā durgā sūrya agni somānām vratāni madhusūdanaiḥ śāstra antareṣu dṛṣṭāni te buddhi gatāni ca devasya tasyām yat kāryam tat aśeṣeṇa kīrtaya śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca vasante kiṃśuka aśoka śobhane pratipad tithiḥ tasyām prakurvīta snānam niyama tatparaḥ nārī naraḥ vā rāja indraiḥ saṃtarpya pitṛ devatāḥ nadyāḥ tīre taḍāge vā gṛhe vā niyata ātmavān piṣṭātakena vilikhet vatsaram puruṣa ākṛtim tatas candana cūrṇena puṣpa dhūpa ādinā arcayet dīpaiḥ ca api sa naivedyaiḥ pūjayet vatsaram tadā māsa ṛtu nāmbhiḥ paścāt namaskāra anta yojitaiḥ pūjayet brāhmaṇān vidvāḥ mantraiḥ veda uditaiḥ śubhaiḥ tatas tam prārthayet paścāt puras sthitvā kṛtāñjaliḥ evam uktvā yathāśakti dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām lalāṭa paṭṭe tilakam kuyat cāndana paṅkajam tatas prabhṛti anudinam tilaka alaṃkṛtam mukham evam naraḥ vā nārī vā vratam etat samācaret bhūtāḥ pretāḥ piśācāḥ ca durvārāḥ vairiṇaḥ grahāḥ nirarthakāḥ bhavanti ete tilakam vīkṣya tad kṣaṇāt pūrvam āsīt mahīpālaḥ nāmnā śatruṃjayaḥ jayī citralekhā iti tasya abhūt bhāryā cāritra bhūṣaṇā saṃvatsaram pūjayitvā dhṛtvā hṛdi janārdanam asūyuḥ kṣeptu kāmaḥ vā samāgacchati yaḥ puras prayāti priya kṛt tasyāḥ dṛṣṭvā mukham adhomukhaḥ sapatnī darpa apaharā vaśīkṛta mahī talā bhartuḥ iṣṭā prahṛṣṭā ca sukham āste nirākulā tāvat kareṇa abhibhūtaḥ bhartā putraḥ sa vedanaḥ tad artyāḥ nāśam prayātaḥ suhṛdām duḥkha dāyakaḥ dharmarāja puram prāptum sarva bhūta apahārakaḥ tasmin kṣaṇe mahā rājaḥ dharmarājasya kiṃkarāḥ tasya dvāram anuprāptāḥ praveṣṭum gṛham añjasā mad bhagavant samānetum kāla mṛtyu puraḥsarāḥ pārśva sthitām citra lekhām tilaka alaṃkṛta ānanām dṛṣṭvā pranaṣṭa saṃkalpāḥ parāvṛtya gatāḥ punar gateṣu teṣu sa nṛpaḥ putreṇa saha bhārata nīrujaḥ bubhuje bhogān pūrva karma arjitān śubhān mama pūrvam yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ etat triloka tilaka alaka bhūṣaṇam te khyātam vratam sakala duḥkha haram param ca ittham samācarati yaḥ saḥ sukham vihṛtya martyaḥ prayāti padam āpadi padmayoneḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde tilakavratakathanam nāma aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca aśokam pūjayet vṛkṣam prarūḍha śubha pallavam virūḍhaiḥ saptadhānyaiḥ ca guṇakaiḥ modakaiḥ śubhaiḥ aśokam pāṇḍava śreṣṭhaiḥ śokam na āpnoti kutracid pitṛ bhrātṛ pati śvaśrū śvaśurāṇām tathā eva ca patākābhiḥ alaṃkṛtya pracchādya śubha vāsasā damayantī yathā svāhā yathā vedavatī satī tathā aśoka vratāt asmāt jāyate pati vallabhā vane vrajatyā saddharmaḥ sītayā saṃpradarśitaḥ dṛṣṭvā aśokam vane pārthaiḥ pallava alaṃkṛta ambaram kṛtvā samīpe bhartāram devaram ca tila akṣataiḥ dīpa alaṃkṛta naivedya dhūpa sūtra phala arcanaiḥ maithilyā prāñjaliḥ bhūtvā śṛṇvataḥ rāghavasya ca ciram jīvatu mama vṛddhaḥ śvaśuraḥ kośala īśvaraḥ bhartā mama devarāḥ ca eva jīvantu bharata ādayaḥ tad api jīvatīm paśyeyam iti maithilī yayāce tam mahābhāgā drumam satya upayācanam pradakṣiṇam upāvṛtya tatas te prayayuḥ punar evam anyā api yā nārī pūjayet bhuvi tam nagam tila taṇḍula sammiśraiḥ yava godhūma sarṣapaiḥ mahā vṛkṣa mahā śākhaiḥ makaradhvaja mandira tvām mahābhāga vana upavana bhūṣaṇaiḥ evam ābhāṣya tam vṛkṣam dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām sakhībhiḥ sahitā sādhvī tatas sva bhavanam vrajet yāḥ śoka nāśanam aśoka tarum taruṇyaḥ saṃpūjayanti kusuma akṣata dhūpa dīpaiḥ tāḥ prāpya saukhyam atulam bhuvi bhartṛ jātam gaurī padam pramuditāḥ punar āpnuvanti iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde aśokavratavarṇanam nāma aśokavratavarṇanam nāma adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca virūḍhaiḥ saptadhānyaiḥ ca nāraṅgaiḥ bījapūrakaiḥ abhyukṣya akṣata toyena mantreṇa evam kṣamāpayet ākṛṣṇena rajasā vartamānaḥ niveśayan amṛtam martyam ca evam bhaktyā samabhyarcya dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām pradakṣiṇām atho kṛtvā tatas sva bhavanam vrajet etat vratam mahābhāgaiḥ sūrya ārādhana kāmyayā anasūyayā ca kṣamayā sāvitryā satyabhāmayā damayantyā sarasvatyā gāyatryā gaṅgayā tathā saṃpūjya ratna kusuma āṃcita sarva śākham nīlaiḥ dalaiḥ tata tanum karavīra vṛkṣam bhuktvā bhuktvā bhavya bhogān ante prayāti bhavanam bharata agrya bhānoḥ uvāca tat ācakṣva vratam mama sura uttamaiḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca yamunāyāḥ taṭe pūrvam mathurā āste purī śubhā tasyām śatrughna nāmnā abhūt rājā rāma pratiṣṭhitaḥ tasya bhāryā kīrtimālā nāmnā āsīt prathitā bhuvi tayā praṇamya bhagavān vasiṣṭhaḥ muni puṃgavaḥ pṛṣṭaḥ sukham muni śreṣṭha katham samupajāyate evam uktaḥ tayā jñānī vasiṣṭhaḥ kīrtimālayā śrī vaśiṣṭhaḥ uvāca upasthite saṃkalpayet māsam ekam śrāvaṇe śvas prabhṛti aham snānam kariṣye niyatā brahmacarya sthitā satī bhokṣyāmi naktam bhū śayyām kariṣye prāṇinām dayām iti saṃkalpya puruṣaḥ nārī vā brāhmaṇa antike prāpya anujñām tatas prātar sarva sāmagrī saṃyutaḥ puruṣaḥ pratipad kālāt danta dhāvana pūrvakam nadyām gatvā tathā vāpyām taḍāge giri nirjhare snānam kuryāt vratī pārthaiḥ sugandha āmalakaiḥ tilaiḥ tathā paścāt sarva oṣadhyā punar pṛthak piṣṭvā snātvā dhyātvā ravim ca eva vanditvā ca pitṝn natha tarpayitvā kokilām pakṣi rūpiṇīm tathā pūjayet tila taṇḍula dūrvā agraiḥ pūjayitvā kṣamāpayet nityam tila vratī bhaktaḥ mantreṇa anena pāṇḍavaiḥ iti uccārya tatas paścāt gṛham abhyetya saṃyataḥ kṛtvā āhāram svapet pārthaiḥ yāvat māsaḥ samāpnute māsa ante tāmra pātryām tu kokilām tila piṣṭa jām ratna netrām svarṇa pakṣām brāhmaṇāya nivedayet vastraiḥ dhanaiḥ guḍaiḥ yuktām śrāvaṇyām kuṇḍale śvaśrū śvaśura varge vā daivajñe vā purohite evam yā kurute nārī kokilāvratam ādarāt niḥsāpatnyam patim bhavyam sa sneham prāpya bhū tale mṛtā gaurīpuram yāti vimānena arka varcasā etat vratam vasiṣṭhena muninā kathitam purā tathā ca anuṣṭhitam pārthaiḥ samastam kīrtimālayā tasyāḥ ca sarvam saṃpannam vasiṣṭha vacanāt iha evam yā anyā api kaunteyaiḥ kokilāvratam ādarāt kariṣyati dhruvam tasyāḥ saubhāgyam ca bhaviṣyati ye kokilām kalaravām kalakaṇṭha pīṭhām yacchanti sa ājya tila piṣṭa mayām dvijebhyaḥ te nandana ādiṣu vaneṣu vihṛtya kāmam martye sametya madhura dhvanayaḥ bhavanti iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde kokilāvrata nāma ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca sura asura munīnām ca durlabham vidhinā śṛṇu parvaṇi āśvayujasya ante pāyasam ghṛta saṃyutam naktam bhuñjīta śuddha ātmā odanam vaikṣava anvitam bilva jam dantadhāvanam bhakṣayitvā mahādevam praṇamya idam udīrayet mama deva vratam idam kartum icchāmi śāśvatam iti evam niyamam kṛtvā yāvat varṣāṇi ṣoḍaśa tithayaḥ pratipad pūrvām bhajiṣyāmi iti anukramāt pṛṣṭvā gurum ca upavāsam mahādevam smaran muhur snātvā devam samabhyarcya rātrau prajvālya dīpakān yamunām ca mahādevam natvā paścāt nimantrayet ṣoḍaśa aṣṭau tad ardham vā ekam vā śakti apekṣayā ha āmantrya sva gṛham gatvā mahādevam smaran kṣitau tu nirāhāraḥ niśi svapeta bhāskara udayam āsādya snātvā ca ādāya dīpakān naivedyam snapanam puṣpam dhūpam gaccheḥ śiva ālaye hetubhiḥ deveśam kaṣāyaiḥ ca virūkṣayet tila ambunā tatas snāpya snāpayet uṣṇa vāriṇā lepayet su ghanam paścāt karpūra agaru candanaiḥ puṣpaiḥ saṃpūjya dātavyam haimam śirasi paṅkajam vastra yugmam patākām ca pañca varṇam vitānakam dhūpam dīpam ca ghaṇṭān ca dadyāt devasya śaktitas su samiddham tatas kṛtvā pūjayet jātavedasam hema vastra ādi dānena yathāśakti kṣamāpayet evam visṛjya tān sarvān sārdham bandhu janaiḥ svayam māśayitvā pañcagavyam hṛṣṭaḥ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ evam eva vidhim kṛtvā prārabheta adhanaḥ dhanī vitta sāmarthyāt ca eva pratimāsam ca kṛtsnaśas pārayet tam hutam pārthaiḥ prārambha vidhinā sphuṭam dvitīye dve pañcadaśyām kṛtvā naktam narādhipaḥ prārambha vidhinā ca evam dvitīyām api pārayet upavāsa dvayam kṛtvā tṛtīyām prārabhet tatas kṛtvā evam ṣoḍaśe varṣe pūrṇamāsyām samudyataḥ hema śṛṅgīm raupya khurām sa ghaṇṭām kāṃsya dohanām mahādevāya gām dadyāt dīkṣitāya dvijāya vai śiva bhakti ratān viprān viśuddhān ca eva ṣoḍaśa bastra ābharaṇa dānaiḥ ca śaktyā saṃpūjayet vratī brāhmaṇān ca yathāśaktyā bhojayet aparān api anyeṣām ca kṣudhā ārtānām dadyāt dānam yathā icchayā bhūrbhuva ādiṣu lokeṣu bhūri bhoga pradam nṛṇām caturṇām api varṇānām svarga sopāna vat sthitam na kuryāt yaḥ dhanam prāpya saḥ muṣṭaḥ naṣṭa cetanaḥ dhanyam āyus pradam puṇyam rūpa saubhāgya vardhanam strīpuṃsayoḥ ca nirdiṣṭam vratam etat purātanam upoṣya pratimāsam tu bhuṃjīta brāhmaṇaiḥ saha eka dvi tri caturbhiḥ vā sva śaktyā pāṇḍu nandanaiḥ tasmin ca ante suvarṇānām prārambha vidhinā ācaret tāvatyaḥ tithayaḥ ca anyāḥ samupoṣyāḥ samāptaye atha śīghrataram kaścid vratam kartum samudyataḥ ante ca ante ca varṣāṇām prārambha vidhinā ca ret vācakāḥ śrāvakāḥ ca eva vratasya asya yudhiṣṭhira bhavanti putra saṃśliṣṭāḥ śiva dhyāna anubhāvāt puṇyam bṛhat tapaḥ idam vratam ādarāt ye kurvanti ṣoḍaśa samāḥ niratāḥ svadharme te bhānu maṇḍalam abhedyam acintyam ādyam bhittvā prayānti śaśiśekhara pāda mūlam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde vṛhattapovratavarṇanam nāma dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tat aham jñātum icchāmi prāpyate kena karmaṇā śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca catvāri rājñ bhadrāṇi samupoṣyāṇi yatnatas tad prabhāvāt bhavet nūnam rājñ jātismaraḥ naraḥ śubha udayaḥ purā vaiśyaḥ babhūva yamunā taṭe tena vratam idam cīrṇam mṛtaḥ kāla kramāt asau saṃjayasya sutaḥ jātaḥ svarṇaṣṭhīvī iti viśrutaḥ nipātitaḥ sasmāra pūrva vṛttāntam sakalam vrata dharmāt uvāca saṃjayasya katham putraḥ svarṇaṣṭhīvī iti vā katham dasyubhiḥ ca katham nītaḥ mṛtyum vai jīvitaḥ katham śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca saṃjayaḥ nāma rājā āsīt kuśāvatyām nara adhipa ekadā saṃjaya gṛham saṃprāptau tau yadṛcchayā teṣām atha upaviṣṭānām pūrva vṛttānta bhāṣiṇaḥ saṃjayasya sutā prāptā taruṇā pituḥ antikam parvataḥ prāha rājānam kanyā iyam varavarṇinī savilāsā gaja gatiḥ su nāsā kokila svarā tila puṣpa sphuṭā nāsā rūpam saṃparilakṣyate kasya iyam bhadrikā bhadrā mama ati hṛdayaṃgamā atha uvāca nṛpam dhīmān nāradaḥ kṣubhita indriyaḥ rājan niveṣṭu kāmaḥ aham kanyā iyam mama dīyatām evam uktaḥ nāradena prīta ātmā saṃjayaḥ tathā kṛtāñjaliḥ uvāca idam praharṣa utphulla locanaḥ putraḥ mama dīyatām kṣipram akṣīṇa kanaka ākaraḥ yasya mūtram purīṣam vā śleṣmāṇam kṣipati kṣitau evam astu iti tam rājñ nāradaḥ pratyabhāṣata suvarṇaṣṭhīvinam putram dadāmi te suvrata evam uktvā sa tām kanyām sa alaṃkārām sumadhyamām bivāhayāmāsa tayā nāradaḥ hṛṣṭa mānasaḥ tat tasya ceṣṭitam dṛṣṭvā parvataḥ krodha mūrchitaḥ uvāca nāradam roṣāt dīpta akṣaḥ sphurita adharaḥ mayā iyam prārthitā pūrvam tvayā yasmāt vivāhitā tasmāt mayā samam svargam na gaṃtāsi kathaṃcana evam uktaḥ parvatena nāradaḥ prāha durmanāḥ na tvam dharmam vijānāsi kiṃcid mūḍhaḥ asi durmate sāmānyam sarva bhūtānām kanyā bhavati suvrata na tasyāḥ varaṇe duḥkham paśyanti iha bahuśrutāḥ na sevitāḥ tvayā vṛddhāḥ tena mām śapase ruṣā paṇigrahaṇa mantrāṇām niṣṭhā syāt saptame pade yasmāt etat a vijñāya śapase mām anāgasam tasmāt tvam api aho svargam na gantāsi mayā vinā saṃjayasya sutaḥ śāpāt yadi pañcatvam eṣyati mānayiṣye tathā api enam yama lokāt na saṃśayaḥ evam śaptvā tadā anyonyam devarṣī tau ubhau punar pūjitau saṃjayena atha jagmatuḥ sva āśramam prati atha asya saptame māsi jātaḥ putraḥ nṛpasya saḥ svarṇaṣṭhīvī iti nām asya yathārtham akarot pitā jātismaraḥ smara vapūḥ suvarṇa utpatti kāraṇam mūtra śleṣma purīṣa ādi yat kiṃcid kṣipati kṣitau jāyate kanakam sarvam prasādāt nāradasya ca tena asau yajate rājā vidhivat bhūri dakṣiṇaiḥ rājasūya ādibhiḥ yajñaiḥ vi vidhaiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ vṛtaḥ babhāra bhṛtyān aniśam pupoṣa sva jana atithīn cakāra devatāgāram saraḥ ca ārāma vāṭikāḥ yat jāta sneham tathā putram rarakṣa rakṣibhiḥ vṛtaḥ rāśayaḥ kanakasya asya babhūvuḥ nṛpateḥ sutāt dhana lolupayā jaghnuḥ dākṣiṇātyāḥ mada uddha tāḥ pātitam dasyubhiḥ putram dṛṣṭvā rājā su duḥkhitaḥ vilapantam tu tam dṛṣṭvā nāradaḥ prāha saṃjayam rājñ viṣādam mā kārṣīḥ śṛṇu imām bhāratīm mama viśiṣṭānām narendrāṇām yatīnām dakṣiṇāvatām śrutvā rājā narendrāṇām caritāni mahā tmanām vinaṣṭa śokaḥ sahasā prakṛti sthaḥ vabhūva saḥ api narendrasya mṛtam putram yama ālayāt hatam ānayāmāsa tarasā tathārūpam yathā hatam dṛṣṭvā spṛṣṭvā sa putram tam parituṣṭena cetasā mā mā añjaliḥ atha avravīt ṣaṣ māsa ante punar asau jīvitam sarvam eva tat sasmāra pūrvam vṛttāntam bhadrāṇām pāraṇāt kila etat te sarvam ākhyātam jāti smaraṇa kārakam kathayāmi śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca brāhmaṇāḥ ca eva śūdrāḥ ca kule mahati janma ca hātā kṣamī dhanī vāgmī rūpī svaiḥ bhadrakaiḥ bhavet catvāri rājan bhadrāṇi catuṣpādāni tāni vai tāni eva bahu vighnāni duṣprāpyāṇi akṛtātmabhiḥ mārgaśīrṣe tu prathamam dvitīyam phālgune tathā jyeṣṭhe tṛtīyam rāja indra khyātam bhādrapade param phālguna amala pakṣa ādau trīn māsān tu narādhipaiḥ jyeṣṭhasya śukla pakṣa ādau trīn vai māsān yudhiṣṭhira hi śukle bhādrapadasya ādau trīn māsān pāṇḍu nandana hi trīn māsān tu narādhipaiḥ samāsena eva ca uktāni bhadrāṇi etāni bhārataiḥ brahmanā anumatena vā uvāca bhadrāṇām niyama ādhānam pradhāna niyamān tathā śrī bhagavant uvāca śṛṇu rājñ avahitaḥ bhadrāṇām vistaram param śukle mārgaśirasi ādau catvāraḥ tithayaḥ varāḥ dvitīyā ca tṛtīyā ca caturthī pañcamī tathā eka bhukta āsanaḥ tiṣṭhet pratipadyām jita indriyaḥ prabhāte tu dvitīyāyām kṛtvā yat karaṇīyakam mṛd gomayam ca saṃgṛhya mantraiḥ ebhiḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ aham te tu pradiśyāmi mantrāṇām vidhim uttamam yeṣām deyaḥ na deyaḥ vā tān śṛṣva vadāmi te brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyāḥ vaiśyāḥ śūdrāḥ ye śucayaḥ amalāḥ teṣām mantrāḥ pradeyāḥ vai na tu saṃkīrṇa dharmiṇām yā strī bhartrā viyuktā api sva ācāraiḥ saṃyutā śubhā sā ca mantrān pragṛhṇātu sa bhartrī tad anujñayā snānam nadyām taḍāge vā vāpyām kūpe gṛhe api vā mṛdam mantreṇa saṃgṛhya sarva aṅgeṣu pralepayet mayā api vanditā bhaktyā mām atas vimalam kuru iti mṛd mantraḥ bhava avagāhanam kuryāt kuṇḍam ālikhya dharma vid siddhārthakaiḥ kṛṣṇa tilaiḥ vacā sarva oṣadhīḥ kramāt tvam ādiḥ sarva devānām jagantām ca jagat maye bhūtānām vīrudhām ca eva rasāṇām pataye namaḥ gaṅgāsāgara jam toyam pauṣkaram nārmadam tathā yāmunam sāṃnihatyam ca saṃnidhānam iha astu mama iti snāna mantraḥ śarīra ālambhanam pūrvam kṛtvā mṛd gomaya ambuṣu evam snātvā samāplutya ācamya taṭam āsthitaḥ nivasya vāsasī śubhre śuciḥ prayata mānasaḥ devān pitṝn manuṣyān ca tarpayet su samādhinā evam gṛhīta niyamaḥ gṛham gacchet śuci vrataḥ snātvā ca eva tatas nāma tṛtīya ādi catur dine namaḥ kṛṣṇa acyuta ananta hṛṣīkeśa iti ca kramāt prathamehni smṛtā pūjā pādayoḥ cakrapāṇeḥ muradviṣaḥ tatīya ihani pūjām vakṣasi vinyaset pūjayitvā vidhānena viṣṇum viśveśvaram vratī arghyam pradadyāt somāya bhaktyā tad bhāva bhāvitaḥ maśi candra śaśāṅka indu nāmāni kramaśas naraḥ tṛtīya ādiṣu candrasya saṃkīrtya arghyam nivedayet candana aguru karpūra dadhi dūrvā akṣata ādibhiḥ puṣpaiḥ phalaiḥ sva kāla utthaiḥ kharjūraiḥ nālikerakaiḥ vastra ācchādana go vāji bhūmi hema gaja anvitaiḥ itarasya yathāśakti phala puṣpa akṣata udakaiḥ lavaṇam guḍam ghṛtam tailam payaḥ kumbhāḥ tilaiḥ saha argheṣu etāni śastāni śaśi vṛddhyā vivardhayet evam arghaḥ pradātavyaḥ śṛṇu mantra vidhi kramam māsa ante jāyamānaḥ punar punar bhūmim tu bhājanam kṛtvā padma pattra samāstṛtām pālāśaiḥ madhu pattraiḥ vā surūpaiḥ vā śilā tale samālabhya dharām devīm mantreṇa anena mantra vid evam japtvā ca bhuktvā ca śākam pākam guṇa uttaram bhoktavyam tu dritīyāyām akṣāra lavaṇam haviḥ muni annam tu tṛtīyāyām caturthyām gorasa uttaram ghṛta aktāḥ sa guṇāḥ śastāḥ pañcamyām kṛsarāḥ sadā śastāḥ bhadreṣu sarveṣu sadā śyāmāka taṇḍulāḥ prasādhikā ghṛtam gavyam vanyam phalam a yācitam prātar snānam tatas kṛtvā saṃtarjya pitṛ devatāḥ bhṛtya bandhu janaiḥ sārdham paścāt bhuñjīta kāmatas evam bhadreṣu sarveṣu tri māseṣu gateṣu yaḥ etat karoti yā kanyā śubham prāpnoti sā patim durbhagā subhagā sādhvī bhavati avidhavā sadā rājya arthī labhate rājyam dhana arthī labhate dhanam yoṣit kula ākula vivāha manoramāṇi śayyā anna yāna śayana āsana śobhitāni ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde bhadropavāsavratanirūpaṇam nāma trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvitīyā vrata māhātmya varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca saṃti anyāḥ tithayaḥ pārthaiḥ dvitīya ādyāḥ pariśrutāḥ māsaiḥ caturbhiḥ catvāraḥ prāvṛṣ śuklāḥ klama apahāḥ gopitāḥ ca sadā loke na proktāḥ ca mayā kvacid prakāśayāmi tāḥ pārtha śṛṇu sarvāḥ mayā hi tāḥ ekā tu śrāvaṇe māsi anyā bhādrapade tathā śrāvaṇe kaluṣā nāma proṣṭhapāde ca gīḥ malā preta saṃcārā kārttike ca yamā smṛtā uvāca kasmāt sā kaluṣā proktā kasmāt sā gīḥ malā matā kasmāt sā preta saṃcārā kasmāt yāmyā prakīrtitā śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca purā vṛtra vadhe vṛtte prāpta rājye puraṃdare krodhāt indreṇa vajeṇa brahmahatyā niṣūditā xc ṣaṣ khaṇḍā ca kṛtā kṣiptā vṛkṣe toye mahī tale tat pāpam śrāvaṇe vyūḍham dvitīyāyām dina udaye nārī vṛkṣa nadī bhūmi vahni brahma haneṣu atha nirmalīkaraṇam kaluṣā smṛtā aṣṭa aṅgulā pavitrā sā nārīṇām tu rajaḥ malam nadyaḥ pūra malāḥ sarvāḥ vahneḥ dhūma śikhāḥ malaḥ bhavanti caranti asyām tena eṣā kaluṣā matā gīḥ girā bhāratī vāṇī vācā medhā sarasvatī vahate deva ṛṣi pitṛ dharmāṇām nindakāḥ nāstikāḥ śaṭhāḥ teṣām sā vāc mala vyūḍhā dvitīyā tena gīḥ malā anadhyāyeṣu śāstrāṇi pāṭhayaṃti paṭhaṃti ca śābdikāḥ tārkikāḥ śrautāḥ teṣām śabda apaśabda jāḥ malāḥ vyūḍhāḥ dvitīyāyām atas artham gīḥ malā ca sā pretāḥ tu pitaraḥ proktāḥ teṣām tasyām tu saṃcaraḥ dvitīyāyām ca lokeṣu tena sā preta saṃcarā tathā agniṣvāttāḥ barhiṣadaḥ ājyapāḥ somapāḥ tathā pitṛ pitāmaha preta saṃcarāt pretasaṃcarā putraiḥ pautraiḥ ca dauhitraiḥ svadhā maṃtraiḥ su pūjitāḥ makhaiḥ tṛptā yāti atas preta saṃcarāḥ kārtike śukla pakṣasya dvitīyāyām yudhiṣṭhira yamaḥ yamunayā pūrvam bhojitaḥ sva gṛhe tadā dvitīyāyām mahā utsarge nārakīyāḥ ca tarpitāḥ muktāḥ te muktāḥ sarve vibandhanāḥ bhrāmitāḥ nartitāḥ tuṣṭāḥ sthitāḥ sarve yadṛcchayā teṣām mahā utsavaḥ vṛttaḥ yama rāṣṭre sukha āvahaḥ tatas yama dvitīyā sā proktā loke yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ dānāni ca pradeyāni bhaginībhyaḥ vidhānāt svarṇa alaṃkāra vastra ādyaiḥ pūjā satkāra bhojanaiḥ sarvāḥ bhaginyaḥ saṃpūjyāḥ abhāve pratipatti gāḥ pitṛvya bhaginī hastāt prathamāyām yudhiṣṭhira mātulasya sutā hastā dvitīyāyām punar nṛpa pitṛ mātṛ svasārau ye tṛtīyāyām tayoḥ karāt dhanyam yaśasyam āyuṣyam dharma kāma artha vardhanam te ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde yamadvitīyāvratamāhātmyam nāma caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ varṇanam uvāca gārhasthyam tat ca bhavati dampatiyoḥ prīyamāṇayoḥ patnī hīnaḥ pumān patnī bhartrā virahitā tathā dharma kāma artha saṃsiddhī na syātām madhusūdana śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca nāma dvitīyām śṛṇu tām mama tām upoṣya na vaidhavyam prāpnoti strī yudhiṣṭhira iti śete jagatpatiḥ viṣṇuḥ striyā sārdham yadā kila nāma tadā grāhyā ca sā tithiḥ tad pakṣe dvitīyāyām śrāvaṇe nṛpa sattamaiḥ snānam nadyām taḍāge vā gṛhe vā niyata ātmavān kṛtvā pitṝn manuṣyān ca devān sam tarpya bhaktimān sthaṇḍilam catur asram tu mṛd mayam kārayet tatas tatrastham śrīdharam śrīśam bhaktyā abhyarcya śriyā saha naivedya puṣpa dhūpa ādyaiḥ phalaiḥ kāla udbhavaiḥ śubhaiḥ śrīvatsa dhārin śrīkānta śrīdhāmn śrīpate avyaya gārhasthyam mā praṇāśam mama yātu dharma artha kāma dam agnayaḥ mā praṇaśyantu mā praṇaśyantu devatāḥ mā praṇaśyantu mattaḥ dāmpatya bhedāt lakṣmyāḥ viyujyate kṛṣṇaiḥ na kadācid yathā bhavān lakṣmyāḥ na śūnyam vara da yathā te śayanam sadā hastā mama api a śūnyā astu tathā janmani janmani evam prasādya pūjām ca kṛtvā lakṣmyāḥ hareḥ tathā mahā viprāya dakṣiṇām dadyāt sva śaktyā phala saṃyutām anena vidhinā rājñ yāvat māsa catuṣṭayam ha kṛṣṇa pakṣe dvitīyāyām prāk ukta vidhim ācaret ca atha saṃprāpte śayyām śrī kānta saṃyutām sa upaskarām sa udakumbhām sa annām dadyāt dvijātaye evam karoti yaḥ samyak naraḥ māsa catuṣṭayam a śūnya śayanaḥ ca eva dharma kāma artha sādhakaḥ bhavati avyāhata aiśvaryaḥ puruṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ prāpnoti janma tritayam na sā pāṇḍu kula udvahaiḥ eṣā hi a śūnya śayanā nṛpate dvitīyā khyātā samasta kaluṣa apaharā advitīyā etām samācarati yaḥ yaḥ yoṣit prāpnoti asau śayanam agrya mahārha bhogyam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde aśūnyaśayanavratamāhātmyam nāma pañcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ madhūkatṛtīyā vrata varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca phālgune api asite pakṣe tṛtīyāyām upoṣitā prātar sthitvā brahmacarye jaṭā mukuṭa śobhitā godhā ratha gatām devīm rudra dhyāna parāyaṇām bhūṣikā devabhūṣā ca bhūṣikā lalitā umā daurbhāgyam mama śamayatu su prasanna manāḥ sadā aṅga iṅge ca mama upāṅge parva īpave sthita amṛtam sukha dṛṣṭi sparśa rasam gaurī saubhāgyam yacchatu evam uccārya mantrān ca nārī jñānavatī satī mīrakaiḥ kaṭuhuṇḍaiḥ ca lavaṇaiḥ guḍa sarpiṣā hṛdyaiḥ ārdraiḥ phalaiḥ svarṇaiḥ manojñaiḥ puṣpa bandhanaiḥ sindūreṇa ati raktena vastraiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ aśokaiḥ ca viguṇakaiḥ ghṛta pūrṇaiḥ tu modakaiḥ pradakṣiṇam tatas kṛtvā dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām tatas prāpsyati duṣprāpyam trailokye śrīdharam prati etat vratam mayā khyātam yāsyanti śāśvatāḥ samāḥ vyākhyātam kaśyapena ādau rukmiṇyāḥ vratam uttamam yāḥ cariṣyanti tāḥ sarvāḥ bhaviṣyanti nirāmayāḥ aṅga pratyaṅga subhagāḥ loka dṛṣṭi manoharāḥ sthitvā varṣa śatam ca ante tatas rudra puram śubham yāsyanti haṃsa yānena kiṅkiṇī śabda nādinā divya bhoga bhujaḥ hṛṣṭāḥ siddhi aṣṭaka samanvitāḥ hattvā phala akṣata yutam madhu pādapasya gaurī iva loka mahitā bhavati iha nārī nāma ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ meghapālī tṛtīyā vrata varṇanam uvāca meghapālī vrata kṛṣṇaiḥ kadācid kriyate nṛbhiḥ kim puṇyam kim anuṣṭhānam kīdṛś vallī smṛtā tu sā śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mās kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu tṛtīyāyām yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ tila taṇḍula piṇḍaiḥ vā dātavyaḥ dharma lipsubhiḥ tāmbūla sadṛśaiḥ parvaiḥ raktā vallī sa mañjarā vāṭīṣu grāma mārgeṣu protthitā parvate api ca meghapālyām dhānya taila guḍa kuṅkuma haimanān padān api ca kurvanti janāḥ vāṇijya jīvanāḥ pāpam satya anṛtam kṛtvā dravya lubdhāḥ phala anvitāḥ arghyam dattvā meghapālye nāśayanti kṣaṇāt iha sat sarvam nāśam āyāti vratena anena pāṇḍavaiḥ meghapālī śubhe sthāne śubhe deśe samutthitā pūjanīyāḥ vara strībhiḥ phalaiḥ puṣpaiḥ tathā akṣataiḥ kharjūraiḥ nālikeraiḥ ca dāḍimaiḥ karavīrakaiḥ gandha dhūpaiḥ dadhi dīpaiḥ virūḍhaiḥ dhānya saṃcayaiḥ rakta vastraiḥ samācchādya piṣṭātaka vibhūṣitām kṛtvā arghyaḥ saṃpradātavyaḥ mantreṇa anena bhārataiḥ iti evam pūjayitvā tām megha pālīm pumān tatas nārī vā puruṣa vyāghra prāpnoti paramām śriyam viṣṇu lokam avāpnoti dehānte yāna saṃsthitaḥ uddhṛtya na atra saṃdehaḥ tvayā kāryaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ unmāna kūṭaka paṭāni kṛtāni yāni pāpāni hanti savitā iva tamaḥ prarohān nāma saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca strīṇām saṃpadyate yena martya loke gṛham śubham śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca ekadā pārvatī śambhū sthitau muni sura āvṛtau nānā druma latā ākīrṇe nānā puṣpa upaśobhite mahā bhāgavata pārvatīm prāha kim tvayā sat vratam kṛtam āgaccha jānu deśam tu su prasannā tathā priye brūhi ca avitatham sarvam tvayā pārvati yat kṛtam iti uktā praṇatā bhūtvā gaurī prāha śivam śubhā tṛtīyāyām mayā cīrṇam purā rambhā vratam śubham tena mama tvam manohārī bhartā labdhaḥ asi śaṃkara hāriṇī vā api aham strīṇām te deha ardha hāriṇī uvāca brūhi pārvati yatnena yat cīrṇam pituḥ antike purā aham deva tiṣṭhāmi kumārī bhavane pituḥ tatas aham menayā proktā sva pitrā ca himādriṇā saubhāgyam strī gaṇa aiśvaryam mahādevī padam tathā adya śukla tṛtīyāyām snātvā niyama tatparā kuru pārśveṣu pañca agnīn jvālamānān hutāśanān gārhapatyam dakṣiṇāgnim anyam ca āhavanīyakam pañcamam bhāskaram tejaḥ iti ete pañca vahnayaḥ eteṣām madhyatas bhūtvā tiṣṭha pūrva mukhā ciram catur bhujām dhyāna parām pad dvaya upari saṃsthitām mṛga ajina channa kucām jaṭā valkala dhāriṇīm sarva ābharaṇa saṃyuktām devīm abhimukhām kuru mahā lakṣmīḥ mahākālī mahāmāyā mahāmatiḥ ca sarasvatī vaitariṇī sā eva proktā mahā satī tasyāḥ ca prekṣaṇa parā bhava tad bhāva bhāsitā homam kuryuḥ yata ātmānaḥ brāhmaṇāḥ sarvatodiśam devyāḥ pūjā prakartavyā puṣpa dhūpa ādinā tatas jīrakam kaḍuhuṃḍaḥ ca api apūpān kusumam tathā nipācām pāvanatarām lavaṇam śarkarām guḍam puṣpa maṇḍapikā kāryā gandha puṣpa adhivāsitā padmāsanena saṃtiṣṭhet yāvat pariṇataḥ raviḥ tatas praṇamya rudrāṇīm mantram etam udīrayet vedeṣu sarva śāstreṣu divi bhūmau dharā tale dṛṣṭaḥ śrutaḥ ca bahuśas śaṅkā virahitaḥ stavaḥ tvam śaktiḥ tvam svadhā svāhā tvam sāvitrī sarasvatī evam saṃkṣamayet devīm praṇipatya punar punar hi bhaktyā gṛham ramyam vicitram bahu bhūmikam ācchādya dvāra kedāra kapota ādi vibhūṣitam maṇi maṇḍita toraṇam padmarāga mahānīla vajra vaiḍūrya bhūṣitam gṛha dāna vidhānena brāhmaṇāya yaśasvine dāmpatyāni ca bhojyāni caturthyām madhuraiḥ rasaiḥ iti uktam umayā cīrṇam haraiḥ rambhā vratam param lopāmudrā priyā patnī tasya veśmani pūjitā api sthitā tena yāḥ cariṣyanti yoṣitaḥ kaunteyaiḥ puruṣaḥ vā api khyātam rambhāvratam bhuvi tāsām putrāḥ gṛham bhogāḥ kula vṛddhiḥ bhaviṣyati strīṇām cāturya saubhāgyam gārhasthyam sarvakāmikam bāla a vṛddha asu madhyānām rūpa lāvaṇya bṛṃhaṇam mṛtaḥ śakrapuram yāti tatas viṣṇupuram vrajet tatas śiva puram yāti vyāsasya vacanam yathā iti śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca tṛtīyāyām caturthyām ca śuddhāyām prativatsaram upavāsena gṛhṇīyāt vratam nāmnā tu gopadam snātvā naraḥ vā nārī vā puṣpa dhūpa vilepanaiḥ dadhi akṣataiḥ ca mālābhiḥ piṣṭakaiḥ vanamālayā abhyaṅjayet gavām śṛṅgam khuram puccha antam eva ca dadyāt go āhnikam bhaktyā tāsām pūrva aparāhṇayoḥ bhuñjīta taila kṣāra vivarjitam ca mantreṇa nena mantra vid arghyam pradadyāt gṛṣṭau vā gavām pādeṣu pāṇḍavaiḥ mātā rudrāṇām duhitā vasūnām svasā ādityānām amṛtasya nābhiḥ pranuvocam cikituṣe janāya mā gām anāgām aditim vadhiṣṭa iti gavām mantraḥ gāvaḥ me agratas santu gāvaḥ me santu pṛṣṭhatas gāvaḥ mama hṛdaye saṃtu gavām madhye vasāmi aham ittham saṃpūjya dattvā argham tatas gacchet gṛhāśramam śāli piṣṭam phalam śākam tilam annam ca śobhanam bhukta avasāne rāja indra saṃyataḥ tām niśām svapet prabhāte go padam dattvā brāhmaṇāya hiraṇmayam tat kṣamayet ca gavām nātham govindam garuḍadhvajam praṇamya acyutam uddiśya śṛṇu yat phalam āpnuyāt go bhaktaḥ go vratam kṛtvā bhaktyā śaktyā ca goṣpadam saubhāgyam rūpa lāvaṇyam prāpnoti pṛthivī tale gotarṇakākulam geham gokulam ca samāsatas dhana dhānya samopeta śāli ikṣu rasam ṛddhimān saṃtānam pūjitam labdhvā tatas svarge amaraḥ bhavet divya rūpa dharaḥ sragvī divya alaṃkāra bhūṣitaḥ divyam yuga śatam chittvā tatas viṣṇu puram vrajet upeti tat iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde tṛtīyāvrate goṣpadatṛtīyāvratam nāma ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śukle tṛtīyāyām samarcayet sarva dhānyaiḥ tām virūḍhām bhūtām harita śādvalām harakālīm devadevīm gaurīm śaṃkara vallabhām prīṇayitvā samācchādya padmarāgeṇa bhāsvatā ghaṇṭā vādya ādibhiḥ gītaiḥ śubhaiḥ divya kathā anugaiḥ kṛtvā jāgaraṇam rātrau prabhāte hi udgate ravau suvāsinībhiḥ sā neyā madhye
