dhija sattamāḥ tad madhye pūjaye śambhum brahmānam keśavam tathā matsyaka maṭha maṇḍūkān vedyāḥ madhye adhivāsayet mitra mitraḥ asi bhūtānām dhana daḥ dhana kāṃkṣiṇām vaidyaḥ roga abhibhūtānām śaraṇyaḥ śaraṇa arthinām madhye ca āvāhayet devam anena eva viśeṣataḥ namaḥ te viśva guptāya namaḥ viṣṇo apām pate tatas tu dakṣiṇā deyā brāhmaṇānām narādhipaiḥ gauḥ sthāpakāya dātavyā bhojanam ca anivāritam sarveṣām eva dātavyam eṣa paurāṇikaḥ vidhiḥ mad āgatam toyam sāmudram prathamam smṛtam nipāne vā taḍāge vā saṃsthitam tat bhavet śuci vāpī kūpa taḍāge vā sthitam tu prathamam jalam puśa agreṇa api rabhasā na spṛṣṭavyaḥ tu asaṃskṛtaḥ agniḥ ca tejaḥ mṛḍayā atha dehe retaḥ dhāḥ viṣṇuḥ amṛtasya nābhiḥ evam bruvan pāṇḍavaiḥ satya vākyam tatas uvagāheta patim nadīnām snātvā tu vidhivat mantraiḥ sāgare tu samāhitaḥ mucyate sarva pāpebhyaḥ snātvā tu lavaṇāmbhasi vidhim tu enam a jānānaḥ yaḥ kuryāt artha mohitaḥ yaḥ na kārayate śāntim taḍāga ādyeṣu karmasu vimānam tejasā yuktam ārohet puṇya karma kṛt brāhmaṇaḥ vā yatiḥ gauḥ vā yena kartā na sīdati utsṛṣṭe kṛtakṛtyaḥ tu suhṛd kuryāt mahā utsavam mahābhojyam mahotsargam yajamānaḥ dina aṣṭakam kārakāḥ karmaṇaḥ vā api sūtradhāra ādayaḥ narāḥ iṣṭāpūrtena dharmeṇa te api svargam prayānti hi khanyamāne mahībhāge prāṇinaḥ ye kṣayam gatāḥ citre vā devakūṭa arthe te sarve tridivam gatāḥ tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi varṣa koṭi śatāni ca koṭiḥ yuga sahasrāṇām svarge tiṣṭhet taḍāga kṛt tān tu tārayate sarvān ātmānam ca mahīpate māsphoṭayanti pitaraḥ valganti prapitāmahāḥ api naḥ sa kule jātaḥ yaḥ taḍāgam kariṣyati sarva svena api kaunteyaiḥ bhūmiṣṭham udakam kuru evam varṣa śatena api kṛttikā viharī vane māsam koṭi kṣaṇa dhvaṃsi dhanasya hi taḍāgam deva bhavanam vāpī vṛkṣaḥ ghanacchadaḥ caturthakam phalam prāptam kārite asmin catuṣṭaye yathā mātuḥ samācaṣṭe putraḥ śīlam svakaiḥ guṇaiḥ tathā svādena ca jalam kartuḥ sarvam śubha aśubham atas śubha āgatam dravyam taḍāga ādiṣu lāpayet dhanyasya pānthāḥ saṃprāpya taḍāgam vṛkṣa maṇḍitam pītvā apaḥ pādapa tale viśramanti ramanti ca māruta udbhūta vīci agraiḥ karaiḥ kamala maṇḍitam abhyāgatāya sudhyā taḍāga ādyam prakalpitam mūrtam svabhāvāt siddham iṣṭam mantra pradarśitam iṣṭāpūrte kṛte rājñ kṛtakṛtyaḥ pumān bhavet unnatā vā atha nimnā vā kīrtiḥ yena prakāśitā tritayam nighnatām neyam tritayam ca unnatim parām taḍāgam atha yaḥ bhūmau devaiḥ devālayaṃkṛtī āste eva nirātaṅkam tasya kīrti mayam vapuḥ tāvat tu ilāyām adhyāste sukṛtī vaibudham padam haṃsa āsya kṣipta nīlī agram padminī khaṇḍa maṇḍitam mahā grāmaiḥ dhanyāḥ paśyanti svam saraḥ taḍāgam dhanyasya kila janāyate yeṣām devakulam tat tu niṣpadyeta saraḥ taṭe teṣām pārthaiḥ kim ucyate na bhavanti iṣṭikāḥ yāvat droṇī vā bhūmi saṃnibhā bhogya sthāne kṛtaḥ kūpaḥ su svādu salilaḥ tathā dṛḍha rajju samāyuktaḥ punāti āsaptamam kulam yasya svādu jalam kūpe pibanti satatam janāḥ kim tena na kṛtam puṇyam sava sattva upakāriṇā yaḥ prāsādān racayati śubhān devatānām taḍāge kīrtiḥ tasya bhramati vipulā vaṃśa mārga anuyātā teṣām taḍāgāni bahu udakāni kūpāḥ ca yūpāḥ ca pratiśrayāḥ ca anna pradānam madhurā ca vāṇī yamasya te nirvacanī bhavanti nāma saptaviṃśati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca vṛkṣa āropaṇa māhātmyam vada devakī nandana śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca varam bhūmi ruhāḥ pañca naga kāṣṭha ruhāḥ daśa pattraiḥ puṣpaiḥ phalaiḥ mūlaiḥ kurvanti pitṛ tarpaṇam prāṇinaḥ prīṇayanti sma chāyā valkala pallavaiḥ ghanacchadāḥ su taravaḥ puṣpaiḥ devān phalaiḥ pitṝn puṣpa pattra phala chāyā mūla valkala dāruṣu dhanyāḥ mahīruhāḥ yeṣām viphalāḥ yānti na arthinaḥ putrāḥ saṃvatsarasya ante śrāddham kurvaṃti vā na vā pratyaham pādapāḥ puṣṭim śreyaḥ artham janayanti hi sa chāyā ca sa puṣpā ca sa phalā vṛkṣavāṭikā tilaka alaṃkṛta ānanā sarva upabhogaiḥ veśyā iva vāṭikā rasikā sadā sadā sa tīrthī bhavati sadā dānam prayacchati aśvattham ekam picumandam ekam nyagrodham ekam daśa ciñciṇīkān pañca āmra vāpī narakam na paśyet puṣpa upagandha āḍhya phala upagandham yaḥ pādapam sparśayate dvijāya sa strī samṛddham vahu ratna pūrṇam labhet vimāna pratimam gṛham vai tatra phalam bubhukṣoḥ apatyam ekam para loka hetoḥ vimṛśyatām kim taravaḥ na ropitāḥ na khānitāḥ puṣkariṇyaḥ ropitāḥ na mahīruhāḥ chāyām anyasya kurvanti sthanti svayam ātape phalanti ca para artheṣu na sva artheṣu mahā drumāḥ atas param pravakṣyāmi vṛkṣasya udyāpane vidhim aputrayā purā pārthaiḥ pārvatyā mandara acale aśokaḥ śoka śamanaḥ putra tve parikalpitaḥ yāḥ kriyāḥ kila buddhiman caraka atri purāṇa uktāḥ tāḥ śṛṇuṣva yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ hima vāta ātapa sahaḥ saṃskāryaḥ taruṇaḥ taruḥ strī nāma kaṇṭakī kubja kīṭa vṛścika koṭaraḥ na udyāpyaḥ pādapaḥ pārthaiḥ śiṣṭānām yaḥ na saṃmataḥ hodhayitvā tam uddeśam su guptam kārayet tatas sadā eva udyāpanam pārthaiḥ pādapānām praśasyate patākā alaṃkṛtam vṛkṣam pūrvedyus adhivāsayet rakta vastraiḥ samācchādya rakta sūtreṇa veṣṭayet piṣṭātakena avakiret sarva oṣadhyā ca pādapam sthāpayet pūrṇa kalaśān catur dikṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ patākā alaṃkṛtāḥ sarve kāryāḥ tad saṃnidhau drumāḥ mūla vinyasta kalaśāḥ rakta sūtra avaguṇṭhitāḥ rakta pīta sita ācchādaiḥ carcitāḥ su manoharaiḥ tāmra pātryām sa bījāni saralāni adhivāsayet tūrya maṅgala ghoṣeṇa catur dikṣu kṣipet balim tatas prabhāte vimale kuṇḍam kṛtvā sa mekhalam graha yajña vidhānena śānti karma samārabhet suvarṇa alaṃkṛtān kṛtvā brāhmaṇān vedapāragān caturaḥ aṣṭau yathāśaktyā vāsobhiḥ abhipūjayet tila ājyena ca homaḥ syāt tuṣṭi puṣṭi karaḥ sadā mātaram sthāpayitvā agre pūjayet kusuma akṣataiḥ homa ādau jātakarma ādi godānam yāvat eva tu pādapam snāpayitvā tu sa mantraiḥ tīrtha vāribhiḥ mātakam nāmakaraṇam annaprāśanam eva ca suvarṇa sūcyā kurvīta karṇavedham vidhāna vid jātarūpa kṣureṇa atra cūḍā kāryā yathākramam badhnīyāt mekhalām mauñjīm vāsaḥ ca paridhāpayet yajamānaḥ tatas snātaḥ śukla ambara dharaḥ śuciḥ ye śākhinaḥ śikhariṇām śirasā vibhūṣāḥ ye nandana ādiṣu vaneṣu kṛta pratiṣṭhāḥ tvam vṛkṣa putra parikalpanayā kāryam sadā eva bhavatā mama putra kāryam iti evam uktvā tam vṛkṣam lālayitvā punar punar udīrayet aṅgāt aṅgāt saṃbhavasi hṛdayāt abhijāyase ātmā vai putra nāmā asi sa jīva śaradaḥ śatam brāhmaṇānām tatas deyā dakṣiṇā hṛṣṭa mānasaiḥ sthāpakāya śubhām dhenum dattvā kuryāt mahā utsavam dīna anātha janānām ca bhojanam ca anivāritam itareṣām pradātavyam saṃtuṣṭena surāsavam jñāti bandhu janaiḥ sārdham svayam bhuñjīta kāmatas preṣyāḥ karmakarāḥ sarve pūjanīyāḥ sva śaktitas yaḥ evam kurute pārtha vṛkṣāṇām mahat utsavam a etat vicārya sudhiyā paripālya vṛkṣān putrāḥ purāṇa vidhinā parikalpanīyā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde vṛkṣodyāpanavidhivarṇanam nāma aṣṭāviṃśatyuttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca kurvanti teṣām mṛte atha paramārtha maye śarīre loke paribhramati kīrti mayam śarīram yaḥ kārayet dvāra sita abhra gauram uttuṅga saudha dhavala āyatanam surāṇām ye kārayanti sura sadmasu devatānām arcāḥ suvarṇa rajata āyasa śaila tāmrāḥ sāmanta mauli maṇi raśmi samam arcitāḥ te siṃhāsane aṅgada kirīṭa bhṛtaḥ avabhānti ye merumauli sura saṃgha kṛta abhiṣekāḥ pañcāmṛtaiḥ sura varān abhiṣecayanti tad aṅgām kṛtvā sureśa bhavana ambara vastra pūjām divya aṅganā parivṛtaḥ nayana abhirāmaḥ prajvālya dīpam amalam bhavane surāṇām yaḥ jāgaram suravara abhimataḥ dadāti caitra utsava ādi divaseṣu api tūrya nādaiḥ vīṇā su veṇu madhura svara bhāṣi saṃgīyate ca sa kṛśa udara kinnarībhiḥ bhaktyā prahṛṣṭa manasaḥ praṇamanti devān te bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar mahima āpta phalāḥ bhavanti iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde devapūjāvidhivarṇanam nāma ekonatriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ati tejaḥ mahat dīptam dīpta aṃśu kiraṇa ujjvalam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mathurāyām purā pārtha piṅgalaḥ nāma tāpasaḥ prapūjitaḥ praṣṭaḥ ca praśram eva etam sa ca avocat yathātatham tayā api mama samākhyātam tat sarvam te vadāmi aham yadā yadā nṛpa śreṣṭha puṇya kālaḥ prapadyate saṃkrātau sūrya grahaṇe candra parvāṇe vaidhṛtau ekādaśyām śukla pakṣe caturdaśyām dinakṣaye saptamyām atha vā aṣṭamyām snātvā vrata paraḥ naraḥ nārī vā bhūmidevebhyaḥ prayacchet prayata aṅgaṇe uvāca śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca purā kṛta yugasya ādau triśaṃkuḥ nāma pārthivaḥ tatas caṇḍāla tām nītaḥ vasiṣṭhena mahātmanā triśaṅkuḥ sarvam ācakhyau viśvāmitrāya dhīmate manyu vaśāt yajñam cakāra āhūya devatāḥ na tāḥ haviḥ pratyagṛhṇan tatas kruddhaḥ kuśātmajaḥ viśvāmitraḥ tu kopena cakāra anyān sura uttamān mṛṅgāṭakān nālikerān pacanān ān ajauḍakān medhāratha da vārtāka tāri kūṣmaṇḍa kodravān uṣṭrān manuja devān ca krodhāt muniḥ avāsṛjat cakāra anyān sapta ṛṣīn pratimāsam sura uttamān tatas śakraḥ samāgamya viśvāmitram prasādya vai sṛṣṭim nivārayāmāsa ye sṛṣṭāḥ te tathā api ca mantraiḥ nibaddhāḥ piṇḍīṣu sthitāḥ mūrtibhṛtaḥ yathā brahmā viṣṇuḥ tathā rudraḥ ye ca anye devatā gaṇāḥ lokānām upakārāya martya lokam upāgatāḥ pratimāsu sthitāḥ śaśvat bhogān bhuñjati śāśvatān tebhyaḥ purastāt dātavyaḥ dīpyamānaḥ pradīpakaḥ sūryāya rakta vastreṇa pūrṇa vartīm ghṛtaiḥ yutām catur prasthaiḥ prajvalantīm mantreṇa anena dāpayet tat vi snoḥ paramam padam sadā paś sūrayaḥ divi iva cakṣuḥ ātan pīta vastreṇa kṛṣṇāya śveta vastreṇa śūline kausumbha vastreṇa āḍhyena gaurīm uddiśya dāpayet nīla vastreṇa kāmāya gaṇanāthāya khādiraiḥ nāgebhyaḥ kṛṣṇa vastreṇa grahebhyaḥ iṣikā yudhām viśeṣam śṛṇu sūryāya pūrṇavartiḥ nigadyate netrapaṭṭena madhunā ghṛtena madhukuṇḍake mantreṇa anena rāja indraiḥ tat niśāmaya vaidikam tvām kāmyayā girā tubhyam tāḥ girasaḥ tu viśvāḥ su kṣitayaḥ pṛthak pṛthak yaḥ bhūtasya bhavyasya samrāj ekaḥ virājati tābhyām nāma svāhā evam etena vidhinā yaḥ prayacchati dīpakam te brahmasadanam vimānena arka vat rcasā tiṣṭhanti dyotamānāḥ te yāvat ābhūtasaṃplavam sa dīpe tu yathā deśe cakṣūṃṣi balavanti hi tathā dīpasya dātāraḥ bhavanti saphala īkṣaṇāḥ ghṛtena dīpaḥ dātavyaḥ rājñ tailena vā punar nirvāpaṇam ca dīpasya hiṃsanam ca vigarhitam yaḥ kuryāt karmaṇā tena syāt asau puṣpita īkṣaṇaḥ dīpa hartā bhavati andhaḥ kāṇaḥ nirvāpakaḥ bhavet padma sūtra udbhavām vartīm gandha tailena dīpitām hi deyāḥ dīpāḥ tvayā vipra surālayeṣu atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam dīpa dānāt lalitayā yat avāptam purā anaghaiḥ mahīpatiḥ tasya putra śatam rājñaḥ jajñe pañcadaśa uttaram ekā eva kanyā tasya āsīt lalitā nāma nāmnaḥ sarva lakṣaṇa sampannā rūpeṇa apratimā bhuvi tām dadau kāśi rājāya cāru aṅgām cārudharmaṇe śatāni anyāni bhāryāṇām trīṇi āsan cārudharmaṇaḥ tāsām madhye agra mahiṣī lalitā sā api atha abhavat viṣṇoḥ āyatane sā tu sahasram paridīpakān tāmisram āśvayuj pakṣam śuklapakṣam ca kārttikam tasyāḥ prajvalitaḥ dīpaḥ ucca sthāna kṛtaḥ śubhaḥ tasmin kāle tathā nityam brāhmaṇa āvasathe ca sā vyagrā bhavati sāyāhne dīpa preṣaṇa tatparā caitya vṛkṣeṣu goṣṭheṣu parvatānām ca mūrdhasu pulineṣu nadīnām ca kūpa mūleṣu pāṇḍava tām sapatnyaḥ atha saṃgamya papracchuḥ idam ādṛtāḥ bhavatyāḥ su mahā nyatnaḥ dīpa prajvālane yathā manyāmahe tvayā avaśyam dīpa dāna phalam śrutam na aham matsariṇī bhadrā na ca rāga ādi dūṣitā eka pati āśritāḥ sādhvyaḥ bhavatyaḥ mama mānadāḥ pṛthak dharma caraṇāḥ śṛṇvantu gaditam mama hiraṇya dayitā bhāryā śailarājasutā varā umādevī iti madreṣu devikā sā sarit varā narāṇām anukampā artham brahmanā hi avatāritā śrutā kim bhavatībhiḥ sā devikā pāpa nāśinī tasyām snātvā sakṛt nadyām gāṇapatyam avāpnuyāt tasyām atha nṛsiṃha ākhyam tīrtham kalmaṣa nāśanam hariṇā nṛsiṃha vapuṣā yatra snānam kṛtam purā tena ca āyatanam viṣṇoḥ kāritam devikā taṭe ahani ahani śuśrūṣām puṣpa dhūpa anulepanaiḥ mā āsīt nirvāṇa bhūyiṣṭhaḥ deva arcāsu rataḥ niśi tatra aham api mūṣikā pradīpa vartī haraṇe kṛta buddhiḥ varānanāḥ gṛhītā atha mayā vartīḥ vṛka daṃśaḥ rarāsa ca naṣṭā ca aham tatas tasya mārjārasya bhaya āturā vaktra prāṃtena paśyatyā saḥ dīpaḥ preritaḥ mayā majvāla pūrvavat dīptyā tasmin āyatane punar mṛtā aham ca punar jātā vaidarbhe rāja kanyakā hi jātismarā mahīpasya mahiṣī cārudharmaṇaḥ eṣa prabhāvaḥ dīpasya kārttike māsi śobhanaḥ dattasya āyatane viṣṇoḥ yasya iyam vyuṣṭiḥ uttamā etasmāt kāraṇāt dīpān aham etān aharniśam evam uktvā sapatnīḥ sā dīpa dāna parāyaṇā tatas kālena mahatā saha rājñā mahātmanā viṣṇu lokam anuprāptā pañcatvam mānadā tam lokam āsādya nṛpeṇa sārdham sā rāja patnī kamala ābha netrā reme mahīpāla mudā sametā dīpa pradānāt sakala ārti hīnā dīpa pradānam api puṇyataram vadanti vipra agni go sura kula eka gṛha aṅgaṇeṣu nāma triṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca kārttikyām atha vā māghyām ayam eva yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ caitryām atha tṛtīyāyām vaiśākhyām dvādaśe ahni vā khaṇḍanīlam śaṅkhapādam sa pauṇḍram dhautapuṣpakam gobhiḥ caturbhiḥ sahitam sṛjet ca eva vidhim śṛṇu mātaram sthāpayitvā agre pūjayet kusuma akṣataiḥ mātṛśrāddham tatas kuryāt sadā abhyudaya kārakam akāla mūlam kalaśam aśvattha dala śobhitam atha enam juhuyāt ṣaḍbhiḥ pṛthak āhuti saṃjñitaiḥ pauṣyā mantraiḥ tatas paścāt hutvā vahnim yathāvidhi eka varṇam dvi varṇam vā rohitam śvetam eva vā tāsām karṇe japet vipraḥ patim vaḥ balinam śubham samitāḥ tena sahitāḥ krīḍadhvam hṛṣṭa mānasāḥ tatas vāme triśūlam ca dakṣiṇe cakram ālikhet aṃkitam śaṅkha cakrābhyām varṣitam kusuma ādinā puṣpa mālā kṛta grīvam sita vastraiḥ ca chāditam vimuṃcet vatsakābhiḥ ca nīlābhiḥ balinam vṛṣam devālaye gokule vā nadīnām saṃgame atha vā iti ukte garga muninā vidhānam vṛṣa mokṣaṇe sva icchā vihāriṇam dṛptam garjantam sundaram gavām kakudminam patim yāḥ dhanye vimuñcanti go vṛṣam tathā punāti eva daśa atītān daśa aparān yat kiṃcid spṛśate toyam samuttīrya jalāt mahīm vṛṣotsṛṣṭam pitṝṇām tu tat akṣayam udāhṛtam yaiḥ ca yaiḥ ca spṛśet toyam lāṅgūla ādibhiḥ antatas sarvam tat akṣayam tasya pitṝṇām na atra saṃśayaḥ sahasra tala mātreṇa taḍāgaḥ na yathāśruti yā bhavet tṛptiḥ tām vṛṣaḥ tu atiricyate yaḥ dadāti tilaiḥ miśrān tilān vā śrāddha karmaṇi madhu vā nīla khaṇḍam vā akṣayam sarvam eva tat bahavaḥ putrāḥ yadi ekaḥ api gayām vrajet yajeta vā aśvamedhena nīlam vā vṛṣam utsṛjet na karoti vṛṣotsargam su tīrthe vā jala añjalim yat bhūmim ālikhati śṛṅga khuraiḥ prahṛṣṭaḥ yat vā karoti pratimalla vṛṣān nirīkṣya iti phālguna pūrṇimā vrata varṇanam uvāca phālgunasya ante paurṇamāsyām janārdanaiḥ kimartham śiśavaḥ tasyām gehe gehe ativādinaḥ holikā dīpyate kasmāt phālguna ante kim vacyate ca kā saṃjñā śīta uṣṇa iti kim ucyate kaḥ hi asyām pūjyate devaḥ kena iyam avatāritā śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca adhipaḥ mahā śūraḥ sarva guṇa upataḥ priya vādī bahu śrutaḥ sa sarvām pṛthivīm jitvā vaśīkṛtya narādhipān dharmāt pālayāmāsa prajāḥ putrān iva aurasān na durbhikṣam na ca vyādhiḥ na akāla maraṇam tathā tasya evam śāsataḥ rājyam kṣātra dharma ratasya vai paurāḥ sarve samāgamya pāhi pāhi iti atha abruvan ūcuḥ naḥ hi gṛhe kācid ḍhauṃḍhā nāma iti rākṣasī divā rātrau samāgamya bālān pīḍayate balāt rakṣayā kaṇḍakena api bheṣajaiḥ vā narādhipaiḥ mantra jñaiḥ parama ācāryaiḥ sā niyantum na śakyate paurāṇām vacanam śrutvā raghuḥ vismayam āgataḥ vismaya āviṣṭa hṛdayaḥ purohitam atha abravīt rākṣasī kā iyam kimprabhāvā dvijottamaiḥ katham eṣā niyantavyā mayā duṣkṛta kāriṇī rakṣaṇāt procyate rājā pṛthivī pālanāt patiḥ arakṣamāṇaḥ pṛthivīm rājā bhavati kilbiṣī uvāca śṛṇu rājñ param guhyam yat na ākhyātam mayā kvacid nāma iti vikhyātā rākṣasī mālinaḥ sutā tayā ca ārādhitaḥ śambhuḥ ugreṇa tapasā purā prāha mahādevam yadi tuṣṭaḥ svayam mama na ca vadhyām sura ādīnām manujānām ca śaṃkaraiḥ mām kuru tvam triloka īśaiḥ śastra astrāṇām tathā eva ca śīta uṣṇa varṣā samaye divā rātrau bahis gṛhe mahā bhāga uvāca evam astu iti atha uktvā tām punar provāca śūlabhṛt unmattebhyaḥ śiśubhyaḥ ca bhayam te saṃbhaviṣyati mā vyathām hṛdaye kṛthāḥ evam labdha varā sā tu rākṣasī kāmarūpiṇī nityam pīḍayate bālān saṃsmṛtya hara bhāṣitam paḍāḍayā iti gṛhṇāti siddha mantram kuṭumbinī tena sā loke hi aḍāḍā iti abhidhīyate etat te sarvam ākhyātam ḍhauṃḍhāyāḥ caritam mayā sāṃpratam kathayiṣyāmi yena upāyena hanyate adya pañcadaśī śuklā phālgunasya narādhipa mad śīta kālaḥ viniṣkrāntaḥ prātar grīṣmaḥ bhaviṣyati abhaya pradānam lokānām dīyatām puruṣottama yathā adya āśaṃkitāḥ lokāḥ ramanti ca hasanti ca dāru jāni ca khaṇḍāni gṛhītvā samara utsukāḥ yodhāḥ iva viniryāntu śiśavaḥ saṃpraharṣitāḥ saṃcayam śuṣka kāṣṭhānām upalānām ca kārayet hantu sva icchayā lokāḥ niḥśaṅkāḥ yasya yat matam tena śabdena sā pāpā homena ca nirā kṛtā adṛṣṭa ghātaiḥ ḍimbhānām rākṣasī kṣayam eṣyati śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca tasya ṛṣeḥ vacanam śrutvā sa nṛpaḥ pāṇḍu nadana gatā sā rākṣasī nāśam tena ca ugreṇa karmaṇā tatas prabhṛti loke asmin aḍāḍā khyātim āgatā sarva duṣṭa apahaḥ homaḥ sarva roga upaśānti daḥ kriyate asyām dvijaiḥ pārtha tena sā holikā matā sarva sāra ati viśvā iyam pūrvam āsīt yudhiṣṭhira sāra tvāt phalguḥ iti eṣā parama ānanda dāyinī asyām niśā āgame pārtha saṃrakṣyāḥ śiśavaḥ gṛhe gomayena upasaṃlipte sa catuṣke gṛha aṅgaṇe mākārayet śiśu prāyān khaḍga vyagraiḥ karān narān te kāṣṭha khaṇḍaiḥ saṃspṛśya gītaiḥ hāsya karaiḥ śiśūn rakṣanti teṣām dātavyam guḍam pakva annam eva ca evam ḍhauṃḍhita mātrasya saḥ doṣaḥ praśamam vrajet bālānām rakṣaṇam kāryam tasyāt tasmin niśā āgame uvāca śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca kṛtvā ca avaśya kāryāṇi saṃtarpya pitṛ devatāḥ maṃdayet holikā bhūtim sarva duṣṭa upaśāntaye catuṣkam kārayet śreṣṭham varṇakaiḥ ca akṣataiḥ śubhaiḥ kalaśasya agratas deyāḥ upānaha vara aṃśukāḥ bhārata carcayet candanam nārī avyaṅga aṅgā su lakṣaṇā padmarāga uttara paṭā śreṣṭha aṃśuka vibhūṣitā vasudhārām śira ugre ca dadhi dūrvā akṣata anvitām carcāpayitvā śrīkhaṇḍam āyus ārogya vṛddhaye paścāt ca prāśayet vidvāḥ cūta puṣpam sa candanam manobhavasya sā pūjā ṛṣibhiḥ saṃpradarśitā ye pibanti vasanta ādau cūta puṣpam sa candanam satyam hṛdistha kāmasya tad pūrtiḥ jāyate iñjasā taram dvijendrāṇām sūta māgadha bandinām dadyāt dānam yathāśaktyā kāmaḥ mama prīyatām iti tatas bhojana velāyām śṛtam yat prāktane ahani prāśnīyāt prathamam ca annam tatas bhuñjīta kāmatas hi ādhayaḥ vyādhayaḥ ca eva yānti nāśam na saṃśayaḥ putra pautra samāyuktaḥ sukham tiṣṭhati mānavaḥ puṇyā pavitrā jaya dā sarva vighra vināśinī eṣā te kathitā pārthaiḥ tithīnām uttamā tithiḥ saṃprāśya cūta kusumam saha candanena satyam hi pārtha puruṣaḥ sa sukhī samāste iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde phālgunapūrṇimotsavavarṇanam nāma dvātriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca saṃtyajya ali kula ālīḍha kusumāni mṛdūni api tamanena katham lokaiḥ pūjyaṃte nāka nāyakāḥ hasta āndolana māhātmyam ratha yātrā mahā utsavam kathayasva amalam prājña yādava ambhoja bhāskara śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca pārtha arthi jana sat vṛkṣa kṣānti dhāma dharāpate yat etat bhavatā pṛṣṭam tat śṛṇuṣva vadāmi te purā surāṇām āvāse mandare cāru kandare gandha ādhārī kula ālīḍhaḥ jātaḥ damanakaḥ taruḥ tasya gandham anāghreyam āghrāya sura yoṣitaḥ madana unmāda vaśagāḥ gāyanti ca hasanti ca mahā ṛṣayaḥ niyamān tyaktvā prādravanta gṛhān prati na veda adhyayane dhyāne ratiḥ teṣām babhūva ha mānasam māninīnām tu punar gandhena saṃdhitam gandhena ākulitam lokam dṛṣṭvā brahmā tam abravīt mad nirmitayā vācā roṣāt prasphurita adharaḥ mayā ekasya api apakāram yaḥ karoti sa nara adhamaḥ bahūnām apakārāya saṃpravṛtaḥ kim ucyate dṛṣṭa artha bādhakam karma na kartavyam kathaṃcana adṛṣṭam prati saṃdehaḥ saḥ usmābhiḥ anumīyate puruṣāt evam ārabdham na krodhāt na artha kāraṇāt svabhāvaḥ eṣa mama brahman tvayā sṛṣṭaḥ purā vibho yā yasya jantoḥ prakṛtiḥ śubhā vā yadi vā itarā puṣpita aśoka śobhā āḍhye vane puṃskokila ākule tasmin kāle sureśāṇām śirāṃsi ākramya līlayā ye tvām āropayiṣyanti dāna māna puraḥsarāḥ surāṇām te bhaviṣyanti sadā eva sukhinaḥ narāḥ sarvadā eva śivasya iṣṭā puṇyā pāpa bhaya apahā uvāsa vāsita aśeṣa bhuvanaḥ gandha saṃpadā divye girau girisu nādayita adhivāse ratna aṃśu kacchurita kāñcana bhūmi bhāge śāpam varam ca hṛdaye viniveśya śambhoḥ tatra āsthitaḥ damanakaḥ damita antarātmā pravṛtta nara nārīkam pañcama uccāra sundaram sa ānandam nandana vane ārdrayā sahitaḥ yathā unmādayan vane puṇye vidyādhara gaṇān bahūn vasaṃta ṛtau nṛtyamānān sura asura śata arcitaḥ saṃtāna pārijāta utthām baddhvā sa mādhavī latām tat kaścid āndolanam cakre samāliṅgya ghana stanām gīta māndolaka ārūḍhaḥ tat gāyanti amaraiḥ striyaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā aṣṭāpada nibhā bhavānī prāha śaṃkaram mama kautukam mama paśya imāḥ śaṃkara prabho mama kṛte kārayasva su alaṃkṛtam tat gaurī vacanam ramyam śrutvā go vṛṣabha dhvajaḥ sat dolām kārayāmāsa samāhūya mahā asurān stambha dvayam ropayitvā iṣṭāpūrta mayam dṛḍham satyam ca eva uparitatam śreṣṭham kāṣṭham akalpayat baddhvā tad phaṇām antarā pīṭham kṛtavan maṇi maṇḍitam tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tathā racayitvā vicitrām tām dolām caila ajina uttarām tatra ārūḍhaḥ tu yāvat sa saumya soma vibhūṣaṇaḥ mandaram dolayāmāsa pārśva sthaiḥ pārṣadaiḥ saha vāma pārśve tu vijayā dakṣiṇena jayā bhavet cāmara ākrāṃta bāhū te tena āśliṣṭe nyavījatām pārvatyā sahitam sa gada akṣaram yena deva asura straiṇam āsīt ānanda nirbharam jaguḥ gandharva patayaḥ nanṛtuḥ ca apsaras gaṇāḥ ucchalat tāla vādyāni vādayanti sma cāraṇāḥ celuḥ kula acalāḥ sarve cukṣubhuḥ sapta sāgarāḥ ha vavuḥ vātāḥ sa nirghātāḥ deve dolām samāsthite ālokya vyākulam lokam devāḥ śakra purogamāḥ upāramasva bhagavan bhavataḥ krīḍayā anayā gīrvāṇa gīrbhiḥ saṃhṛṣṭaḥ śaṃkaraḥ loka śaṃkaraḥ uvāca vacanam pārthaiḥ su rasa arthasya paśyataḥ sa anukampam su lalitam visphuṭa artha pada akṣaram adya prabhṛti ye dolā krīḍām puṣkariṇī taṭe maṃḍite tridaśa aṅgaṇe netra paṭṭāpaṭa channām padmarāga vibhūṣi tām ātapatreṇa saṃyuktām vinyasta kanaka aṇḍakām vicitra ābharaṇa ābhābhiḥ ābhāsita digantarām tārakā śānta citrāṅga puṣpa mālā manoramām mālām vidyādhara ākrātām prānta ropita darpaṇām chattra cāmara saṃchannām yathā śaktyā api alaṃkṛtām tasyām āropayet devam iṣṭa hṛṣṭa jana āvṛtaḥ mūlamantreṇa devānām proktam dolā adhirohaṇam pārśva sthaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ vidvāḥ paṭhet vā mantram uttamam ca stuti maṅgala śabdaiḥ ca puṣpa dhūpa aghivāsitām etasmin antare nārīm dohanāya nikuṭṭakām praveśayet kuṅkuma āḍhyām krīḍā varṇapriyaiḥ saha suvarṇaśṛṅgiṇā proktam smita danta aṃśu karburam jala saṃklinna vasanaḥ raśanā dāma maṇḍitaḥ kambu grīva ullasan sarvaḥ babhūva gaṇikā gaṇaḥ kuṅkuma kṣoda tāmbūla puṣpa mālā ākulaḥ janaḥ tām vihāya jala krīḍām na anyasyāḥ vidadhe manaḥ pīta śīta jala āghāta tāḍitaḥ api janaḥ sukham nīrujaḥ te bhaviṣyanti sukhitāḥ śaradām śatam putra pautra samāḥ yuktāḥ dhana dhānya samāyutāḥ te prāpnuvanti bhuvi janma taroḥ phalāni duḥkha arṇavāt kula śatāni api tārayanti śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca ratha yātrā vidhānam te katha yāmi yudhiṣṭhira sthiraḥ bhūtvā nibodha idam tvam hi mūrta vidām varaḥ nāradaḥ śāradā kāntāt śiva loke samāyayau dṛṣṭvā apūrvam śivam śāntam sura īśaiḥ sarvatas vṛtam praṇamya upāviśat vipraḥ puratas keśa veśayoḥ tam upāsīnam ālakṣya bhagavant bhaga netra hā papraccha ācchādita manāḥ kutas ca āgamyate punar śrī nāradaḥ uvāca vasantaḥ nāma kaḥ api eṣa kāmasya dayitaḥ sakhiḥ malaya anila yuktena tena viśvam vaśīkṛtam sahakāra karīndra stham kṛtvā kokila ḍiṇḍimam śaśāṅka śekharaḥ kaḥ ayam kaḥ ayam śaṅkha gadā dharaḥ brahmā kāmaḥ trijagantām prabhuḥ prāyas krīḍā ratiḥ lokaḥ vasanta vacanāt punar bhavasāyam na gacchanti ye saṃhṛtya vana antaram ca parīhṛṣṭāḥ ca api āyānti yānti ca mārga gopya sīmā antara gatāḥ kṣetra sthānasya rakṣiṇaḥ te api gāyaṃti nṛtyaṃti hasaṃti smaratārakāḥ maṇḍitāḥ paśyanti kulaṭāḥ prārabdha ucita paṇḍitāḥ su manāṃsi su saṃgīta nṛtya vādya su vāditam dṛṣṭvā jarā yoṣā api nṛtyati sarāṃsi adbhuta padmāni praphullā puṣpa vāṭikāḥ vṛkṣāḥ pakṣi śata ākīrṇāḥ vijighrāṇa mukhāḥ surāḥ avajalpa mukhāḥ bālāḥ vṛddhāḥ tu vikala dvijāḥ ubhau api pratapyete paśya idam kāma ceṣṭitam pakṣiṇām pakṣa nikṣepaiḥ nadyaḥ tuṅga taraṃgakaiḥ pādapāḥ pallava śataiḥ nṛtyante ca praharṣiṇaḥ kautuka ākulitaḥ śīghram āruroha ratham svakam prayayau puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ pārāvata pratīkāśam catur veda mayam ratham āsthāya prayayau hṛṣṭaḥ brahmā brāhmaṇa saṃstutaḥ kātyāyanī pracalitā pañcavaktreṇa ketunā lamba udaraḥ kara śata gṛhīta kanaka utpalaḥ prayātaḥ sva ratha ārūḍhaḥ kṛta karṇa kula ākulaḥ evam devaḥ parivṛtaḥ bhagavant govṛṣa dhvajaḥ ratha ārūḍhaiḥ amūḍha ātmā martya lokam avātarat yāvat paśyati deveśaḥ tāvat sarvam tat akṣaram devaiḥ sārdham paśupatiḥ yāvat paśyati vismitaḥ yaṃti kecid sa utkaṇṭham luṭhanti anye praharṣitāḥ gāyanti krīḍā ratibhiḥ ārabdham ālāpaiḥ ca suraiḥ api surāṇām kṣobham ālakṣya bhagavant govṛṣa dhvajaḥ unmāda āḍhya janaḥ rakṣyaḥ kāryam kārya dvayam mama saṃcintya evam samānāyya vasantam prāha śaṃkaraḥ samānītaḥ māsam ekam sthātavyam bhavatā tu iha yaḥ yathā ratham ārūḍhaḥ samāyātaḥ samīkṣitum evam ābhāṣya bhagavant vasantam ca tatas suraiḥ uvāca rathaḥ kimātmakaḥ kāryaḥ kāryā yātrā katham bhavet śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca su vicitram citra tanum śreṣṭha kāṣṭha mayam ratham su dṛḍha akṣam dṛḍha ābandham su cakra ratha kūbaram atha vā vaṃśa vihitam netra paṭṭa paṭa āvṛtam tārakā śata citra aṃśam puṣpa mālā vibhūṣitam sita go yuga saṃyuktam pañcabāṇa patākinam chattra cāmara śobhā āḍhyam sthāpayet bhavana aṅgaṇe kuryāt catur caraṇakaiḥ mantraiḥ vipraiḥ śāntika pauṣṭikaiḥ haste devam mūlamantreṇa mantra vid abhīṣūṇām mahimānam panāyata manuḥ paścāt anuyacchanti raśmayaḥ śaṅkha dundubhi nirghoṣaiḥ kāhalānām ca niḥsvanaiḥ doṣa asukhena ramitam preṣaṇīya puraḥsaram tāmbūlāni rathe dadyāt puṣpa mālā yutāni ca tasya tasya bhavet pūjyaḥ puṣpa dhūpa akṣata ādibhiḥ itaraḥ api bhavet pūjyaḥ saṃprāpte gṛhiṇām gṛhe kim punar jagantām bhartā sarva loka mahā īśvaraḥ kadācid akṣa bhaṅgaḥ syāt dhvaja bhaṅgaḥ atha vā bhavet brāhmaṇān tatra saṃpūjya homaḥ kāryaḥ vijānatā preraṇī prekṣaṇīyaiḥ ca bhrāmayitvā ratha uttamam vidyādharīṇām caritam itarābhiḥ prakāśyate sarva vyādhi vihīnaḥ ca sukhī syāt śaradām śatam yaḥ kārayitvā sauvarṇam raupyam vā ratham uttamam yarṇakaiḥ citritam divyam dāru jam vā su śobhanam tatra api jāgaram kuryāt vādya gīta sumam galaiḥ aparāyām tṛtīye ahani sthāpayet ratham uttamam prekṣaṇīya vinodena tām rātrim ativāhayet mahāyātrām prakurvīta tatra api adbhuta ceṣṭitam pūjayitvā vidhānena ṣaṣṭhe ahani bhavanam nayet pañcamyām paṅkaja karām pūjayet vā sarasvatīm madhyamāyām śakti dharam skandam saptamāyām tu divākaram aṣṭamyām ca caturdaśyām sampūjyaḥ śaśiśekharaḥ navamyām pūjayet caṇḍīm cāmuṇḍām muṇḍa mālinīm daśamyām ṛṣayaḥ śāntāḥ sarve vyāsa puraḥsarāḥ ekādaśyām cakrapāṇim dvādaśyām vā samarcayet trayodaśyām trinetra uttha vahninā śānta vigraham sādhāraṇā tu sarveṣām paurṇamāsī tithiḥ smṛtā api yātrā vāsaṃtikā ca iyam citta svāsthya karā parā samyak sudhā dhavalite bhavane surāṇām antar su vastra maṇi mauktika dāna citre tāmbūlaka kramuka vāravilāsinībhiḥ yātrām vidhāya bhavati iha saḥ bhārata īśaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde damanakāṃdolakarathayātrāmahotsavavarṇanam nāma catustriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca umāpatiḥ paśupatiḥ dhyāna āsaktaḥ babhūva ha gauryāḥ manas bhilaṣita pūraṇāya praharṣitaiḥ tatas māraḥ smaraḥ kāmaḥ upi ājagāma tam āśramam rati prīti mada unmāda vasanta śrī sahāyavān nidhāna vāruṇī darpa śṛṅgāraiḥ parivāritaḥ mālatī kṛta śekharaḥ mallarī vādya saṃghuṣṭa bhāṇḍāgārika lekhakaḥ pāna matta aṅganā ārūḍhaḥ hindola āścarya mantrimān dakṣiṇa anila gandha āḍhyaḥ kaṭākṣa īkṣita varṣavān mahā rāja adhirājaḥ vā smaraḥ prāptaḥ hara antikam sa puṣpa cāpam ākṛṣya madana unmādanam śaram buddhvā tam tasya saṃkalpam rudraḥ krodhāt jvalan ruṣā lalāṭāt vahnim asṛjat tṛtīyaiḥ nayanāt haraḥ kāmaḥ vilokitaḥ tena bhasmībhūtaḥ ca tad kṣaṇāt dagdham dṛṣṭvā smaram śokāt rati prītī sthite sadā tatas śoka ārta hṛdayā gaurī rudram uvāca ha kuru prasādam deveśaiḥ rati prītye vṛṣadhvajaiḥ saṃjīvaya smaram śambho mūrtimantam punar kuru tat śrutvā tu mahādevaḥ hṛṣṭaḥ provāca pārvatīm upaplutam jagant sarvam manmathena śarīriṇā tasyām manobhavaḥ devi bhaviṣyati śarīravān evam varam imam dattvā manmathāya yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ jagāma himavat śṛṅgam kailāsam pārvatī priyaḥ pūjā vidhānam aparam kathayāmi śṛṇuṇva tat tasyām snātvā trayodaśyām aśoka ākhyam nagam likhet kāmadevam vasantam ca vājivaktram jhaṣadhvajam sauvarṇam vā mahā rāja vārkṣam citram atha api vā līlā vilāsa gamanam garvitam sa apsa rogaṇam gandharva gīta vāditra prekṣaṇīya samākulam nandyāvarti rati krīḍāprīti vidyādharaiḥ yutam mantreṇa anena kaunteyaiḥ naraḥ nāryā samanvitaḥ namaḥ vāmāya kāmāya devadevāya mūrtaye brahma viṣṇu śiva indrāṇām manaḥ kṣobha karāya vai nānā prakārān bhakṣyān ca kāmaḥ mama prīyatām iti sva patim pūjayet nārī vastra mālā vibhūṣaṇaiḥ saṃcintya prahṛṣṭena antarātmanā manmathāyatane tasmin yajamānaḥ suhṛd vṛtaḥ rātrau jāgaraṇam kuryāt sukha rātriḥ yathā bhavet nānā prakāraiḥ bhakṣyaiḥ ca kuryāt rātrau mahā utsavam dīpa prajvālanaiḥ nṛtyaiḥ prekṣaṇaiḥ prekṣaṇa utsavaiḥ prāpte hṛṣṭaḥ tuṣṭaḥ nṛpaḥ pure subhikṣam kṣemam ārogyam yaśaḥ śrīḥ saukhyam uttamam kāma varṣī ca parjanyaḥ tasmin rāṣṭre prajāyate tuṣyate tu bhṛśam devaḥ dvādaśārdha ardha locanaḥ tathā kāmaḥ ca viṣṇuḥ ca vasantaḥ ca prajāpatiḥ sarve api tasya tuṣyanti yakṣa gandharva dānavāḥ asurāḥ yātudhānāḥ ca suparṇāḥ patagāḥ nagāḥ tuṣṭāḥ prayacchanti sukham tasya kartuḥ na saṃśayaḥ saha arcya puruṣaḥ pravarā ca yoṣit saubhāgya rūpa suta saukhya yutā sadā syāt iti śrī bhavidhye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira ra saṃvāde madanamahotsavavarṇanam nāma pañcatriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhūta mātā iti saṃhṛṣṭe grāme grāme pure pure mukha aṅga bhaṅgān kurute loke vāta gṛhīta vat kim eṣa śāstra nirdiṣṭaḥ mārgaḥ kim uta laukikaḥ muhyate mama manaḥ kṛṣṇaiḥ tvam tu vaktum iha arhasi śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śṛṇu pārthaiḥ pravakṣyāmi yat te kiñcid manogatam mama prīḍan āste mudā yuktaḥ divya krīḍanakaiḥ haraḥ siñjat sat raśanām hṛṣṭām dṛṣṭvā gaurīm jagadguruḥ niḥsṛtām kāmayāmāsa mahārha śayane śivaḥ rata sthayoḥ tayoḥ jātam divya varṣa śatam yadā tadā devī samucchrāya nirodhāt nirgatā bahis mūtra udakāt samuttasthau nārī nirdārita udarā kṛṣṇā karāla vadanā piṅga akṣā mukta mūrdhajā baddha piṇḍa ūrdhva piṇḍikā khaṭvāṅgakam kāladharā mudrā aṅkita karā śivā bhūtkāra āpūrita ambarā tasyāḥ pārśva anujāḥ ca anyāḥ gīta vādya laya anugāḥ uttāla tālam abalāḥ nṛtyanti ca hasanti ca kapāla khaṭvāṅga dharāḥ gaja carma avaguṇṭhitāḥ tathā eva śaṃkarāt jātaḥ tad rūpa ābharaṇaḥ pumān siṃha śārdūla vadanaiḥ radana ullikhita ambaraiḥ ekībhūtaiḥ kṣaṇena eva tau bhavānī bhavodbhavau dṛṣṭvā hṛṣṭa manāḥ devaḥ prāha devīm suvismitām bībhatsa adbhuta śṛṅgāra vara āyudha vidhāriṇaḥ nṛ nāryoḥ antaram kiṃcid sādṛśyāt pratibhāsayet bhrātṛbhāṇḍā bhūtamātrī tathā eva udakasevikā saṃjñā trayam tayoḥ kṛtvā tatas prādāt varam haraḥ sevayiṣyanti ye bhaktyā jala saṃpūrṇa kaṇḍukaiḥ bhojayet kṣiprayā ca eva kṛsarā apūpa pāyasaiḥ sa putra paśu vṛddhim ca śarīra ārogyam āpnuyāt na śākinyaḥ gṛhe tasya na piśācāḥ na rākṣasāḥ pīḍām kurvanti śiśavaḥ yānti vṛddhim nirāmayāḥ uvāca kadā pūjā prakartavyā bhūtamātuḥ sukha arthibhiḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca sarvatra eṣā bhagavatī bālānām hita kāriṇī nāma bhedaiḥ kriyā bhedaiḥ kāla bhedaiḥ ca pūjyate pratipad prabhṛti jyeṣṭhe yāvat pañcadaśī tithiḥ tāvat pūjā prakartavyā preraṇaiḥ prekṣaṇīyakaiḥ mad prati karma phala nirdeśaḥ pāṇḍavānām viḍambanam pradṛśyante hāsya paraiḥ naraiḥ adbhuta ceṣṭitaiḥ mārohaṇam ca śūla agre na paśyantam hi paśyati dṛṣṭaḥ bhavadbhiḥ saṃhṛṣṭaḥ para pāra avamarśakaḥ śīrṇa sūkṣmeṇa pattreṇa bālāḥ mālā anumoditāḥ muṣka bhuj rāsam ārūḍhaḥ mukham kṛtvā ca paścime caraiḥ kilāsaiḥ saṃprāptaḥ sarva udvega karaḥ param daṇḍa prahāra abhihataḥ nīyate daṇḍa pāśikaiḥ prekṣakaiḥ veṣṭitaḥ stenaḥ raṭati eṣa vimohitaḥ saṃyamya nīyate iyam tu mūrkhaḥ kraurya āvila īkṣaṇaḥ sita keśam sita śmaśru sita ambara dharam dvijam vaṭa ceṣṭā capeṭābhiḥ hanyamānam na paśyata gṛhāt niṣkramyatām raṇḍā vṛddhaḥ bhūtvā api asau striyāḥ svasyāḥ asau na kurute mūḍhaḥ bharaṇa poṣaṇam bhairava ābharaṇa uttālāḥ vyāla yajña upavītinaḥ pradattvā atāṇḍava padān paśyadhvam dhvānta dīpakān yat anena idam bālena api mahā vratam śabaram kim na paśyata taru koṭara antara gatān chitvā ca śuka śāvakān bahubhiḥ koṣṭhakīkṛtya śara oghaiḥ śakalīkṛtam vimukta ḍhakkā ahaṃkāra su prahāram nirīkṣata imām kṛṣṇa ardha vadanām gṛhītām sindura arcitām vimukta keśām nṛtyatīm paśyadhvam yoginīm iva gambhīra tūrya dhvaninā prabuddhām vṛtta tāṇḍavām evam prekṣaṇakam kṛtvā nayet vṛkṣa tale ca tām evam kṛte na dāridryam na ca duḥkham bhavet nṝṇām nāma ṣaṭatriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi bali rakṣā vidhim nṛpa tam śṛṇu ekāgra manasā samāsāt gaditam mayā purā devāsure yuddhe dānavāḥ sura nirjitāḥ śukram balim puras kṛtvā yayuḥ śukraḥ uvāca tam uvāca na viṣādaḥ tvayā kāryaḥ kāryāṇām gatiḥ īdṛśā daivāt bhavanti bhūtānām kāle jaya parājayāḥ saṃdhānam saha śakreṇa kriyatām ayana dvayam ajeyaḥ sarva śatrūṇām kṛtaḥ śacyā śacīpatiḥ rakṣā bandha prabhāvena dānava indraḥ jitaḥ mahān varṣam ekam pratīkṣasva tatas śreyaḥ bhaviṣyati bhārgaveṇa evam uktāḥ te dānavāḥ vigata jvarāḥ tasthuḥ kālam pratīkṣantaḥ yathā uktam guruṇā tathā eṣa prabhāvaḥ rakṣāyāḥ kathitaḥ te yudhiṣṭhira uvāca yathā yathā hi bhagavant vicitrāṇi prabhāṣate tathā tathā na mama tṛptiḥ bahu arthāḥ śṛṇvataḥ kathāḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca ghana āvṛte ambare pārtha śādvale dharaṇī tale saṃprāpte śrāvaṇe ca eva paurṇamāsyām dina udaye snānam kurvīta matimān śruti smṛti vidhānāt tatas devān pitṝn ca eva tarpayet parama ambhasā upākarma ādi veda uktam ṛṣīṇām ca eva tarpaṇam prakuryuḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ śrāddham devam uddiśya śaktitas mantra sahitam snānam dānam ca śasyate tatas uparāhṇa samaye rakṣā poṭalikāḥ śubhāḥ tāḥ kārayet ca akṣataiḥ śastaiḥ siddhārthaiḥ hema bhūṣitāḥ tasya kāryā gṛhasya rakṣā gomaya rahitaiḥ su vṛtta kuṇḍūkaiḥ dūrvā varṇaka sahitaiḥ sakala duṣkṛta upaśāntaye tatra upaviśet rājā sa amātyaḥ sa purohitaḥ sa suhṛd rakṣā bandhaḥ kāryaḥ śānti dhvaninā narendrasya tadanu purodhāḥ nṛpatim rakṣām badhnīta mantreṇa yena baddhaḥ baliḥ rājā dānava indraḥ mahā balaḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ vaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ ca anyaiḥ ca mānavaiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde māsa pūrṇimā ārakṣābandhanavidhivarṇanam nāma saptatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭātriṃdadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca puṇyā mahānavamī asti tithīnām pravarā tithiḥ tā anuṣṭheyā suraiḥ sarvaiḥ prajāpālaiḥ viśeṣataḥ bhūta preta piśācānām prīti artham ca utsavāya vā uvāca kasmāt kālāt pravṛttā iyam navamī maha śabda yuj uta aho pūrvam eva āsīt kṛta tretā yuga ādiṣu hatānām prāṇinām teṣām kā gatiḥ pāralaukikā svayam ghnatām ghātayatām anumodayatām tathā etat mama saṃśayam pūrvam vaktum arhasi keśavaiḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca pārthaiḥ yā paramā śaktiḥ anantā loka viśrutā manoharā bhā māyā kātyāyanī durgā cāmuṇḍā śaṃkarapriyā dhyāyanti yām yoga ratām sā devī parameśvarī rūpa bhedaiḥ nāma bhedaiḥ bhavānī pūjyate śivā aṣṭamyām tu navamyām tu deva dānava rākṣasaiḥ anyeṣu api yugeṣu ādau sṛṣṭyāḥ pūrvam pradarśitā pūjyate iyam purā devī tebhyaḥ pūrvataraiḥ śubhaiḥ ca yā aṣṭamī mūla saṃyutā kanyā gate savitari śukla pakṣe aṣṭamī tu yā mūla nakṣatra saṃyuktā sā mahānavamī smṛtā aṣṭamyām ca navamyām ca jaganmātrīm ambikām māsi viśokaḥ jayati dviṣaḥ santarjayatī huṃkāraiḥ khaḍga ādibhiḥ aharniśam navamyām pūjitā devī dadāti navamam phalam sā puṇyā sā pavitrā ca sā dharma sukha dāyinī tasmāt sadā pūjanīyā cāmuṇḍā amuṇḍa mālinī tasyām yadi upayujyante prāṇinaḥ mahiṣa ādayaḥ yathā saṃtuṣyate loke mahiṣaiḥ vindhyavāsinī bhavānī prāṅgaṇe prāṇāḥ yeṣām yātāḥ yudhiṣṭhira teṣām svarge dhruvam vāsaḥ varāḥ te apsarasām priyāḥ teṣu sarveṣu ca eva āsīt navamī iyam purā arcitā prasiddha anādinidhanāḥ varṣe varṣe yudhiṣṭhira bhūyas bhūyas avatāraiḥ ca bhavānī pūjyate suraiḥ avatīrṇā bhuvi sadā nityam daitya nibarhinī punar ca eṣā mahā devī yaśodā garbha sambhavā kaṃsa asurasya uttamāṅge pādam dattvā gata āyuṣaḥ tatas prabhṛti lokeṣu yaśodā ānanda dāyinīm vindhya acale sthāpayitvā punar pūjā pravartitā evam vindhya upavāsinyāḥ nava rātra upavāsinaḥ a eka rātreṇa naktena sva śaktyā a yācitena vā snātaiḥ pramuditaiḥ hṛṣṭaiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ nṛpaiḥ strībhiḥ ca kuru śārdūlaiḥ tad vidhānam idam śṛṇu jaya abhilāṣī nṛpatiḥ pratipad prabhṛti kramāt lohābhihārikam karma kārayet yāvat aṣṭame prāñc udañc pravaṇe deśe patākābhiḥ alaṃkṛtam maṇḍapam kārayet divyam nava sapta karam varam māgneyyām kārayet kuṇḍam hasta mātram su śobhanam rāja cihnāni sarvāṇi śastrāṇi astrāṇi yāni ca maṇḍape tāni sarvāṇi eva adhivāsayet tatas tu brāhmaṇaḥ snātaḥ śukla ambara dharaḥ śuciḥ oṃkāra ra pūrvakaiḥ mantraiḥ tad liṅgaiḥ juhuyāt ghṛtam loha nāmā bhavat pūrvam dānavaḥ tu mahā balaḥ tad aṅga sambhavam loham yat sarvam dṛśyate kṣitau śastra astra mantraiḥ hotavyam pāyasam ghṛta saṃyutam huta śeṣam turaṃgāṇām gajānām upahārayet lohābhihārikam karma tena etat ṛṣibhiḥ smṛtam baddha pratiśaravyam ca gaja aśva samalaṃkṛtam pratyaham nṛpatiḥ snātvā saṃpūjya pitṛ devatāḥ pūjayet rāja cihnāni phala mālya anulepanaiḥ tasya abhiharaṇāt rājñaḥ vijayaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ pūjā mantrān pravakṣyāmi purāṇa uktān aham te yaiḥ pūjitāḥ prayacchanti kīrtim āyuḥ yaśaḥ balam yathā ambudaḥ chādayati śivāya imām vasuṃdharām gandharva kula jātaḥ tvam mā bhūyāḥ kula dūṣakaḥ tejasā ca eva sūryasya munīnām tapasā yathā yām gatim brahma hā gacchet pitṛ hā mātṛ hā tathā bhūmi artha inṛta vādī ca kṣatriyaḥ ca parāṅmukhaḥ sūryācandramasau vāyuḥ pāvakaḥ ca na yatra vai vrajet ca tām gatim kṣipram tat ca pāpam bhavet kila nārāyaṇadhvajaḥ viṣṇuvāhanaḥ tad aprameyaḥ durādharṣaḥ deva śatru niṣūdanaḥ mad ca ripūn daha śastra varma āyudhān yodhān rakṣa smān ca ripūn daha iti dhvaja mantraḥ kumuda airāvaṇau padmaḥ puṣpadantaḥ atha vāmanaḥ supratīka uñjanaḥ nīlaḥ ete aṣṭau devayonayaḥ eteṣām putra pautrāḥ ca balāni aṣṭau samāśritāḥ bhadraḥ mandraḥ mṛgaḥ ca eva gajaḥ saṃkīrṇaḥ eva ca vanevane prasūtāḥ te kari yonim mahā gajāḥ tvām vasavaḥ rudrāḥ ādityāḥ sa marut gaṇāḥ śrīḥ te somāt balam viṣṇoḥ tejaḥ sūryāt javaḥ nilāt sthairyam meroḥ jayam rudrāt yaśaḥ devāt puraṃdarāt yuddhe rakṣantu nāgāḥ tvām diśaḥ ca saha daivataiḥ aśvinaḥ saha gandharvaiḥ pāntu tvām sarvatas sadā iti hasti mantraḥ hutabhuj vasavaḥ rudrāḥ vāyuḥ somaḥ mahā ṛṣayaḥ nāga kiṃnara gandharva yakṣa bhūta gaṇa āgrahāḥ pramathāḥ ca saha ādityaiḥ bhūteśaḥ mātṛbhiḥ saha mad senāpatiḥ skandaḥ varuṇaḥ ca āśritāḥ tvayi pradahantu ripūn sarvān rājā vijayam ṛcchatu yāni prayuktāni aribhiḥ dūṣaṇāni samantataḥ etāni para śatrūṇām hatāni te tejasā śobhitā asi tathā eva adya śobhamānā astu bhūpateḥ nīlām śvetām imām dṛṣṭvā naśyantu adya nṛpa arayaḥ sadyas svasthāḥ bhavanti sma tvad vātena apamārjitāḥ pūtanā revatī nāmnā kālarātriḥ iti yā smṛtā dahantu āśu ripūn sarvān patāke tvā upāgatāḥ iti patākā mantraḥ asiḥ ca ripu hā khaḍgaḥ tīkṣṇa karmā durāsadaḥ iti aṣṭa te nāmāni svayam uktāni vedhasā te guruḥ devaḥ maheśvaraḥ hiraṇyam ca śarīram te dhātā devaḥ janārdanaḥ tvam sapatnānām ghoṣāt hṛdaya kampana yathā jīmūta ghoṣeṇa hṛṣyanti vara vāraṇāḥ tathā astu tava śabdena harṣaḥ asmākam mudā āvahaḥ yathā jīmūta śabdena strīṇām trāsaḥ abhijāyate mām sarvadā rakṣa sākam sāyaka sattamaiḥ iti cāpa mantraḥ puṇyaḥ tvam śaṅkha puṣpāṇām maṅgalānām ca maṅgalam bhava protsāraya āśu duritam ca amaraiḥ amara vallabhaiḥ iti cāmara mantraḥ sarva āyudhānām prathamā nirmitā asi pinākinā śūla āyudhāt viniṣkṛṣya kṛtvā muṣṭi parigraham caṇḍikāyāḥ pradattā asi sarva duṣṭa nibarhini tathā vistāritā ca asi devānām pratipāditā sattva aṅga bhūtā asi sarva aśubha nivāriṇi churike rakṣa mām nityam śāntim yaccha namaḥ astu te iti churikā mantraḥ protsāraṇāya duṣṭānām ca tāḍaya āśu ripūn sarvān hemadaṇḍaiḥ namaḥ astu te duḥkha hā dharma daḥ śāntaḥ sarva ariṣṭa vināśanaḥ ete aṣṭau saṃnidhau yasmāt tava siṃhā mahā balā tvayi sthitaḥ śivaḥ sākṣāt tvayi śakra sura īśvaraḥ aṣṭamyām dhāvanam kṛtvā pūrvāhṇe snānam ācaret durgām kāñcana mūrtim raupyām vā paittalām vārkṣā caitrīm tāmrām vā adhibhavāt kṛtvā dāru vicitra toraṇa vinyastām śobhane sthāne puratas vinyasta dṛṣṭām vicitra gṛha madhya gām snātām kuṅkuma candana gandhaiḥ catur samaiḥ cīra paṭṭaiḥ carcita gātrām devīm kusumaiḥ abhyarcya tām bahubhiḥ puṣyamāṇa kīrtiḥ taiḥ dvi jananaiḥ janita paritoṣaiḥ divā anvitaḥ naredraḥ svayam prayacchet purohitaiḥ sārdham bilva pattreṇa arcanena m madhu madhu kālī bhadrakālī kapālinī durgā śivā kṣamā dhātrī svāhā svadhā namaḥ astu te amṛta udbhavaḥ śrīvṛkṣaḥ mahādevī priyaḥ sadā durgā saṃpūjanīyā ca tad dināt droṇapuṣpayā sā ca abhīṣṭā sureśānyāḥ tathā rūḍha vraṇa āyutaḥ tatas khaḍgam namaskṛtya śatrūṇām māna mardanam icchet sva vijayam rājyam subhikṣam ca ātmanaḥ nṛpa punar punar praṇamya atha dhyāyet ca hṛdaye śivām mahiṣa ghnīm bahu bhujām kumārīm siṃha vāhinīm dānavān tarjayatī ca khaḍga uddhata karām śubhām tatas jaya jaya ākāraiḥ stavam kuryāt imam tatas sarva maṅgala māṅgalye śive sarva artha sādhake śaraṇye tryambake gauri nārāyaṇi namaḥ astu te bilva pattra kṛta āmāle durge aham śaraṇam gataḥ kṛtvā evam arcām kauravya aṣṭamyām jāgaram niśi evam hṛṣṭaiḥ niśām nītvā prabhāte ca aruṇa udaye pātayet mahiṣān meṣān agratas nata kaṃdharān śatam ca api śata ardham vā tad ardham vā yathā icchayā kāpālikebhyaḥ tat deyam dāsī dāsa janaiḥ tathā vibhajya sarvam kaunteyaiḥ suhṛd sambandhi bandhuṣu tatas uparāhṇa samaye navamyām syandane sthitām bhavānīm bhrāmayet rāṣṭre svayam rājā sa sainyavān sahasraiḥ puruṣaiḥ vā api ratha yuktaiḥ su śikṣitaiḥ śanais śanais adhikayā dīptyā prajvala dīpakaiḥ ākṛṣṭa khaḍgaiḥ vīraiḥ ca dhātu raktaiḥ gajaiḥ tathā nadadbhiḥ śaṅkha paṭahaiḥ nṛtyadbhiḥ vārayauvataiḥ alaṃkṛtābhiḥ nārībhiḥ bālakaiḥ su vibhūṣitaiḥ bhūtebhyaḥ tu balim dadyāt mantreṇa anena sa āmiṣam sa raktam sa jalam sa annam gandha puṣpa akṣa taiḥ yutam trīn trīn vārān triśūleṇa diś vidikṣu kṣipet balim balim gṛhṇantu imam devāḥ ādityāḥ vasavaḥ tathā marutaḥ atha aśvinaḥ rudrāḥ suparṇāḥ pannagāḥ grahāḥ asurāḥ yātudhānāḥ ca mātaraḥ ca piśācakāḥ śākinyaḥ yakṣa vetālāḥ yoginyaḥ pūtanāḥ śivāḥ jṛmbhakāḥ siddha gandharvāḥ vyālāḥ vidyādharāḥ dharāḥ dikpālāḥ lokapālāḥ ca ye ca vighna vināyakāḥ jagantām śānti kartāraḥ brahma ādyāḥ ca mahā ṛṣayaḥ sa vighnam mama pāpam te śāmyantu paripanthinaḥ saumyāḥ bhavantu tṛptāḥ ca bhūtāḥ pretāḥ sukha āvahāḥ iti evam bhrāmayet rāṣṭre durgām devī rathe sthitām atha utpanneṣu vipreṣu bhūtaśāntim samācaret yena vighnāḥ na jāyante yātrā saṃpūrṇa tām vrajet evam ye kurvate yātrām rājānaḥ anye api mānavāḥ mahānavamyām nandāyām putrakāḥ hṛṣṭa mānasāḥ te sarve pāpa nirmuktāḥ yānti bhāgavatām purīm na teṣām śāvakaḥ na agniḥ na caurāḥ na vināyakāḥ vighnam kurvanti rāja indraiḥ yeṣām tuṣṭā maheśvarī bhavanti bhaktāḥ puruṣāḥ bhagavatyāḥ kim vacyate iti eṣa te samākhyātaḥ durgā devyāḥ mahā utsavaḥ paṭhatām śṛṇvatām ca eva sarva aśubha vināśanaḥ śūla agra bhinna mahiṣa asura pṛṣṭha viṣṭa amṛt khāta khaḍga rucira aṅgada bāhu daṇḍām abhyarcya pañcavadana anugatām navamyām durgām su durga gahanāni taranti martyāḥ ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde mahānavamīvratavarṇanam nāma aṣṭatriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca sā devī hi arcitā nityam bhūṣaṇaiḥ bhūṣitā svakaiḥ sva chattra ghaṇṭā piṭakaiḥ kiṃkiṇī baddha budbudaiḥ tām dṛṣṭvā dānavāḥ naṣṭāḥ bhayāt eva raṇe hatāḥ gatāḥ tatas prabhṛti tām divyām indrayaṣṭim yajanti te devāḥ sarve gaṇāḥ sarve hṛṣṭāḥ tuṣṭāḥ yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ atas svargam gataḥ rājā bhūri puṇya vaśāt vasuḥ tasmai datā mahā indreṇa vasu yaṣṭiḥ pragṛhyatām mahyām saṃpūjayāmāsa cakre ca indra maham vasuḥ yeṣu deśeṣu manujāḥ bhakti bhāva puraḥsarāḥ pūjayiṣyanti varṣa ante mayā dattam mahā dhvajam teṣu deśeṣu muditāḥ prajāḥ roga vivarjitāḥ prabhūta annāḥ dharma yuktāḥ vṛṣa medhāḥ mahā utsavāḥ bhaviṣyanti su veṣāḥ ca subhāṣāḥ ca subhūṣaṇāḥ śrutvā etat vacanam rājā vasuḥ vasumatām varaḥ hi tatas cakre varṣe varṣe mahā utsavam śravaṇe sthāpayet yaṣṭim snāna vastraiḥ prapūjitām dairghyena viṃśati karām sāra dāru mayām śubhām indra sthāne purā uddiṣṭe indramātṛka saṃjñake vastraiḥ vicitraiḥ saṃvītām piṭikā alaṃkṛtām tathā piṭikānām mahā rāja kramam ca kathayāmi te tṛtīyam śvetakam citram aṣṭa asra piṭakam śubham caturtham indragopāla vṛttam mātṛ samāvṛtam pañcamam ca aṣṭa koṇam tu śuklam dhātu vicitritam kṛṣṇa karṇikayā ṣaṣṭham vṛttam budbuda śobhitam saptamam ca aṣṭa koṇam tu śuddham vidyādharaiḥ yutam aṣṭamam piṭakam vṛttam varatrā sūtra veṣṭitam nava graha yutam dīptam navamam ca sa candrikam brahma viṣṇu īśa sahitam daśamam śiva saṃsthitam kṛṣṇam ekādaśam vṛttam yama yuktam yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ param dvādaśamam śuklam dhvajadīrgham trayodaśam puṣpa sraj dāma ghaṇṭā cāmara carcitam bandhayitvā candra pādaiḥ rajjubhiḥ sthūṇikām naraiḥ śanais utthāpayet pārthaiḥ hutvā vaiśvānaram dvijān dakṣiṇābhiḥ ca saṃpūjya guḍa pāyasa pūpakaiḥ mahā utsavam rājā dināni nava sapta vā prekṣaṇīyaiḥ mahā dānaiḥ naṭaiḥ gītaiḥ kathānakaiḥ veśyā aṅganā naraiḥ hṛṣṭaiḥ dyūta krīḍā mahā utsavaiḥ rātrau prajāgaraḥ kāryaḥ rakṣaṇāya prayatnāt kāka ulūka kapotānām yena pātaḥ na vidyate kākāt bhavati durbhikṣam kauśikāt mriyate nṛpaḥ tatas rakṣet sadā udyataḥ yāvat tu nīyate sthānāt anyasmāt aindrāt dhvajaḥ indra dhvaja samutthānam pramādāt na kṛtam yadi tatas dvādaśame varṣe kartavyam na antare punar bāhu daṇḍe vadet pīḍām jaṭhare jāṭharam bhayam mitra nāśaḥ sthūṇikāsu padātayaḥ tasmāt yatnāt puraṃdaram utthāpya pūjayet bhaktyā divārātram atandritaḥ sauvarṇam raupyakam kṛtvā pūrṇam utthāpayet dhvajam mantikam pauṣṭikam kṛtvā dvijebhyaḥ annam pradāpayet trapusaiḥ karkaṭībhiḥ ca nālikeraiḥ kapitthakaiḥ bījapūraiḥ sa nāraṅgaiḥ bhakṣya annaiḥ vividhaiḥ tathā pūjā artham sarva lokasya pūjā iyam pratigṛhyatām maraṇāt bharaṇīm yāvat pūjām kṛtvā vidhānāt rātrau visarjayet śakram mantreṇa anena pāṇḍavaiḥ sārtham sura asura gaṇaiḥ puraṃdara śatakrato evam yaḥ kurute yātrām indraketoḥ yudhiṣṭhira parjanyaḥ kāma varṣī syāt tasmin rāṣṭre na saṃśayaḥ mṛtyu kṛtaḥ bhayam vijitya śatrūn samare vaśe kṛtvā mahī talam bhuktvā rājyam ciraṃkālam indra loke mahīyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde mahendradhvajamahotsavavarṇanam nāma ekonacatvāriṃśadutaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca purā vāmana rūpeṇa yācayitvā dharām imām bali yajñe hariḥ sarvam krāntavan vikramaiḥ tribhiḥ indrāya dattavan rājyam balim pātāla vāsinam kṛtvā daitya pateḥ vāsam ahorātram punar nṛpaiḥ kārttike kṛṣṇa pakṣasya pañcadaśyām niśāgame yatheṣṭa ceṣṭāḥ daityānām rājyam teṣām mahī tale uvāca niśśeṣeṇa hṛṣīkeśa kaumudīm brūhi mama prabho tasyām kā devatā bhavet praharṣaḥ nirdiṣṭaḥ krīḍā kā atra prakīrtitā śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca tasmin kṛṣṇa pakṣe ca caturdaśyām dina udaye avaśyam eva kartavyam snānam naraka bhīrubhiḥ sītā loṣṭa samāyukta sa kaṇṭaka dala anvitān hara pāpam apāmārgaiḥ bhrāmyamāṇam punar punar mama apahara sarvaśas apāmārga namaḥ te tu śarīram mama śodhaya iti apāmārga bhramaṇa mantraḥ tatas ca tarpaṇam kāryam dharmarājasya nāmbhiḥ yamāya dharmarājāya mṛtyave ca antakāya ca vaivasvatāya kālāya sarva bhūta kṣayāya ca pradātavyaḥ dīpaḥ saṃpūjya devatāḥ tatas pradoṣa samaye dīpān dadyāt manoramān brahma viṣṇu śiva ādīnām bhavaneṣu maṭheṣu ca kūṭāgāreṣu caityeṣu sabhāsu ca nadīṣu ca prākāra udyāna vāpīṣu pratolī niṣkuṭeṣu ca siddhārha buddha cāmuṇḍā bhairava āyataneṣu ca mandurāsu viviktāsu hastiśālāsu ca eva hi evam prabhāta samaye amāvāsyāyām narādhipa snātvā devān pitṝn bhaktyā saṃpūjya atha praṇamya ca kṛtvā tu pārvaṇam śrāddham dadhi kṣīra ghṛta ādibhiḥ adya rājyam baleḥ lokāḥ yatheṣṭam modyatām iti lokaḥ ca api parasmin hṛṣyet sudhā dhavalita ajire vṛkṣa candana mālā āḍhyaiḥ carcite ca gṛhe gṛhe nṛtya vāditra saṃghuṣṭe samprajvalita dīpake anyonya prīti saṃhṛṣṭa datta lābhena vai jane tāmbūla hṛṣṭa vadane kuṅkuma kṣoda carcite dukūla paṭṭa nepathye svarṇa māṇikya bhūṣite tad adbhuta udbhaṭa śṛṅgāra pradarśita kutūhale yuvatī jana saṃkīrṇa vastra ujjvala vihāriṇi dīpa mālā ākule ramye vidhvasta dhvānta saṃcaye pradoṣe doṣa rahite śasta doṣa āgame śubhe śaśi pūrṇa mukhābhiḥ ca kanyābhiḥ kṣipta taṇḍulam nīrājanam prakartavyam vṛkṣa śākhāsu dīpakaiḥ bhrāmyamāṇaḥ nataḥ mūrghni manujānām janādhipaḥ vrajet yātrā vihāra saṃcāre jayajīva iti vādinā avalokayitum ramyam padbhyām eva śanais śanais tad śobhām purīm paśyet kṛta rakṣām svakaiḥ naraiḥ tam dṛṣṭvā mahat āścaryam ṛddhim ca eva ātmanaḥ śubhām tāvat nagara nārībhiḥ śūrpa ḍiṇḍima vādanaiḥ niṣkrāmyate prahṛṣṭābhiḥ alakṣmī sva gṛha aṅgaṇāt veśyā vilāsinī sārdham svasti maṅgala kāriṇī piṣṭaka udvartana pare guru śuśrūṣaṇa ākule dvija abhivādana pare sukha rājya abhivīkṣaṇe suvāsinībhyaḥ dāne ca dīyamāne yadṛcchayā sat bhāvena eva santoṣyāḥ devāḥ sat puruṣāḥ dvijāḥ itare ca anna pānena vāc pradānena paṇḍitāḥ ca yathā sāmanta nṛpati indhanaiḥ padātīn aṅga saṃlagnān graiveya kaṭakaiḥ svakān svayam rājā toṣayet sa janān bhṛtyān pṛthak pṛthak yathārham toṣayitvā tu tatas malla naṭān bhaṭān vṛṣabhān mahiṣān ca eva yudhyamānān paraiḥ saha gajān aśvān ca yodhān ca padātīn samalaṃkṛtān mañca ārūḍhaḥ svayam paśyet naṭa nartaka cāraṇān bhruddhāpayet ānayet ca go mahiṣī ādikam tatas tatas uparāhṇa samaye pūrvāyām diśi bhārataiḥ mārga pālīm prabadhnīyāt tuṅga stambhe atha pādape kuśa kāśa mayām divyām sambhave bahubhiḥ vṛtām pūjayitvā gajān vājīn sārdhe yāma traye gate kṛte home dvijendraiḥ tu gṛhṇīyāt mārgapālikām rāṣṭra bhojyena dhārābhiḥ sahasreṇa śatena vā sva śakti apekṣayā vā api gṛhṇīyāt vāma bhojanaiḥ mātuḥ kulam pitṛ kulam ātmānam saha bandhubhiḥ saṃtārayet sa sakalam mārga pālīm dadāti yaḥ nīrājanam ca tatra eva kāryam rājñe jaya pradam mārga pāli talena ittham hayāḥ gāvaḥ gajāḥ vṛṣāḥ rājānaḥ rājaputrāḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ śūdra jātayaḥ mārga pālim samullaṅghya nīrujaḥ syāt sukhī sadā pūjām kuryāt naraḥ sākṣāt bhūmau maṇḍalake kṛte balim ālikhya daitya indram varṇakaiḥ pañca raṅgakaiḥ sarva ābharaṇa saṃpūrṇam vindhyāvalyā saha āsitam tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tatas tatas saṃpūrṇa hṛṣṭa vadanam kirīṭa utkaṭa kuṇḍalam dvibhujam daitya rājānam kārayitvā nṛpaḥ svayam gṛhasya madhye śālāyām viśālāyām tatas arcayet bhrātṛ mantri janaiḥ sārdham saṃtuṣṭaḥ vandibhiḥ stutaḥ madya māṃsa surā lehya dīpa vartī upahārakaiḥ mantreṇa anena rāja indraiḥ sa mantrī sa purohitaḥ bhaviṣya indra sura arāte pūjā iyam pratigṛhyatām evam pūjām nṛpaḥ kṛtvā rātrau jāgaraṇam tatas bhārayet prekṣaṇīya ādi naṭa kṣatra kathānakaiḥ lokaḥ ca api gṛhasya ante śayyāyām śukla taṇḍulaiḥ saṃsthāpya bali rājānam phalaiḥ puṣpaiḥ ca pūjayet yāni tāni akṣayāṇi āhuḥ mayā evam saṃpradarśitam yat asyām dīyate dānam su alpam vā yadi vā bahu tat akṣayam bhavet sarvam viṣṇoḥ prīti karam param viṣṇunā vasudhā labdhā prītena balaye punar upakāra karaḥ dattaḥ ca asurāṇām mahā utsavaḥ tatas prabhṛti rāja indra pravṛttā kaumudī punar loka śoka harā kāmyā dhana puṣṭi sukha āvahā bhū śabdena mahī jñeyā harṣe tatas param dhātu jñaiḥ naigama jñaiḥ ca tena eṣā kaumudī smṛtā modante janāḥ yasyām nānā bhāvaiḥ parasparā hṛṣṭāḥ tuṣṭāḥ sukha āyattāḥ tena eṣā kaumudī smṛtā tasmāt dīyante asyām yudhiṣṭhira artha arthe pārtha bhūmau ca tena eṣā kaumudī smṛtā ekam evam ahorātram varṣe varṣe viśām pate dattam dānava rājasya ādarśam iva bhū tale yaḥ karoti nṛpaḥ rāṣṭram tasya vyādhi bhayam kutas kutas īti bhayam tatra na asti mṛtyu kṛtam bhayam subhikṣam kṣemam ārogyam sarva sampadaḥ uttamāḥ nīrujaḥ ca janāḥ sarve sarva upadrava varjitāḥ kaumudī karaṇāt rājñ bhavati iha mahī tale yaḥ yādṛśeṇa bhāvena tiṣṭhati asyām yudhiṣṭhira harṣa dainya ādi rūpeṇa tasya varṣam prayāti hi rudite roditi varṣam hṛṣṭaḥ varṣam prahṛṣyati tasmāt prahṛṣṭaiḥ tuṣṭaiḥ ca kartavyā kaumudī naraiḥ vaiṣṇavī dānavī ca iyam tithiḥ paitrā yudhiṣṭhira yat kūṣmāṇḍa ādāna ramyam kuvalaya khaṇḍaiḥ ca dhātuka abhadram dīpa utsave janita sarva jana pramodām kurvanti ye sumanasaḥ balirāja pūjām dāna upabhoga sukha vṛddhi śata ākulānām harṣeṇa varṣam iha pārthivaiḥ yāti teṣām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde dīpālikotsavavarṇanam nāma catvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sarva kāma āptaye kṛtyam katham śāntika pauṣṭikam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śrī kāmaḥ śānti kāmaḥ vā graha yajñam samārabhet dṛṣṭi āyuḥ puṣṭi kāmaḥ vā tathā eva abhicaran punar pravakṣyāmi purāṇa śruti bhāṣitām grahān graha adhidevān ca sthāpya homam samārabhet graha yajñaḥ tridhā proktaḥ purāṇa śruti kovidaiḥ tṛtīyaḥ koṭi homaḥ tu sarva kāma phala pradaḥ ayutena āhutīnām ca nava graha makhaḥ smṛtaḥ tasya tāvat vidhim vakṣye purāṇa śruti bhāṣitam saṃsthāpanāya devānām caturasrām udañc plavām agni praṇayanam kṛtvā tasyām āvāhayet surān devānām tatra saṃsthāpyā viṃśatiḥ dvādaśa adhikā sūryaḥ somaḥ mahīputraḥ budhaḥ jīvaḥ sitorkajaḥ rāhuḥ ketuḥ iti proktāḥ graha āloka hita āvahāḥ tāmrakāt sphaṭikāt raktacandanāt svarṇa jau ubhau rajatāt āyasāt ca eva grahāḥ kāryāḥ kramāt amī uttareṇa gurum vidyāt budham pūrvottareṇa tu pūrveṇa bhārgavam vidyāt somam dakṣiṇa pūrvake bhū bhū sthāpayet śukla taṇḍulaiḥ rāja amātyān mahā rājaiḥ taṇḍulaiḥ sthāpayet atha bhāskarasya īśvaram vidyāt umām ca śaśinaḥ tathā brahmānam ca guroḥ vidyāt śukrasya api śacīpatim śanaiścarasya tu yamam rāhoḥ kālam tathā eva ca agniḥ apaḥ kṣitiḥ viṣṇuḥ indraḥ sauvarṇa devatāḥ prajāpatiḥ ca sūryaḥ ca brahmā pratyadhidevatāḥ mahā devī tathā durgām vāyum ākāśam eva ca sāvitrīm ca tathā lakṣmīm umām ca sahabhartṛkām mandara āhū tathā kṛṣṇau dhūmram ketu guṇam viduḥ graha varṇāni deyāni vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca gandhāḥ ca balayaḥ ca eva dhūpāḥ guggula pūrvakāḥ dadyāt aṅgārakāya saṃyāvam budhāya kṣīra ṣaṣṭikam meṣa māṃsam tu rāhave pañcaratna samāyuktam pañca bhaṅga yutam tathā sthāpayet avraṇam kumbham varuṇam tatra vinyaset ca mṛdam ānīya rāja indraiḥ sarva oṣadhi jala anvitām sarve samudrāḥ saritaḥ saraḥ prasravaṇāni ca māyāntu yajamānasya durita kṣaya kārakāḥ evam āvāhayitvā tān sarvān nṛpati sattamaiḥ udumbara śamī dūrvā kuśāḥ ca samidhaḥ kramāt ekaikasya ca aṣṭaśatam aṣṭāviṃśati vā punar hotavyāḥ madhu sarpibhyām dadhnā vā pāyasena vā prādeśa mātrāḥ ṛjavaḥ viśākhāḥ viphalāḥ śubhāḥ devānām api sarveṣām upāṃśu parama artha vid ākṛṣṇena imam devāḥ agniḥ mūrdhā divaḥ kramāt udbudhyasva iti bodhyaḥ ca yathāsaṃkhyam udāhṛtāḥ śannodevī iti ca kayā ketum kṛṇvan iti iti ca hotavyam yadvat ājyam carum bhakṣyāṇi vā punar mantraiḥ daśa āhutīḥ dattvā homaḥ vyāhṛtibhiḥ tatas udak mukhāḥ prāc mukhāḥ ca kuryuḥ brāhmaṇa puṃgavāḥ āpaḥ hiṣṭāḥ iti umāyāḥ tu śyena iti svāminaḥ tathā iti indra ādi devatānām tu indrāya juhuyāt punar navā yamasya ayam gauḥ ca iti evam homaḥ prakīrtitaḥ citraguptasya vā jātaiḥ paurāṇikāḥ viduḥ budhāḥ agnim dūtam vṛṇīmahe agnim iti vahneḥ udāhṛtaḥ indram yamam varuṇam iti ayam mantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ bhūmeḥ pṛthivī antarikṣam iti vedeṣu paṭhyate tat iti viṣṇoḥ udāhṛtaḥ varuṇaḥ pavanaḥ ca eva dhanādhyakṣaḥ tathā śivaḥ brahmanā sahitaḥ śeṣaḥ dikpālāḥ pātu te sadā kīrtiḥ lakṣmīḥ dhṛtiḥ medhāḥ puṣṭiḥ śraddhā kriyā matiḥ buddhiḥ lajjā śānti puṣṭī kāntiḥ tuṣṭiḥ ca mātaraḥ etāḥ tvām abhiṣicantu dharmapatnyaḥ samāgatāḥ mad bhaumaḥ budha jīva sita arka jāḥ abhiṣicantu rāhuḥ ketuḥ ca tarpitāḥ deva dānava gandharvāḥ yakṣa rākṣasa pannagāḥ deva patnyaḥ drumāḥ nāgāḥ daityāḥ ca apsarasām gaṇāḥ astrāṇi sarva śastrāṇi rājānaḥ vāhanāni ca auṣadhāni ca ratnāni kālasya avayavāḥ ca ye saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailāḥ tīrthāni jaladāḥ nadāḥ ete tvām abhiṣiṃcantu sarva kāma artha siddhaye tatas śukla ambara dharaḥ śukla gandha anulepanaḥ sarva gandha samāyuktaḥ snātaḥ śraddhā samanvitaḥ yajamānaḥ sa patnīkān siddhi dān tān samāhitān dakṣiṇābhiḥ prayatnena pūjayet gata vismayaḥ sūryāya kapilām dhenum dadyāt śaṅkham tathā indave budhāya jātarūpam ca gurave pīta vāsasī hastāśvam daityagurave kṛṣṇa aṅgām arka sūnave suvarṇena samā kāryā yajamānena dakṣiṇā sarveṣām athavā dadyāt guruḥ vā yena tuṣyati su mantreṇa pradātavyāḥ sarvāḥ sarva artha dakṣiṇāḥ kapile sarva devānām pūjanīyā asi rohiṇī tīrtha deva mayā yasmāt atas śāntim prayaccha mama puṇyaḥ tvam śaṅkha puṇyānām maṅgalānām ca maṅgalam viṣṇunā vidhṛtaḥ nityam atas śāntim prayaccha mama dharmaiḥ tvam vṛṣa rūpeṇa jagat ānanda kārakaḥ tad aṣṭamūrteḥ adhiṣṭhānam atas śāntim prayaccha mama tad ananta puṇya phala dam atas śāntim prayaccha mama pradānāt tasya mama viṣṇuḥ atas śāntim prayacchatu kapilaḥ tu aśva rūpeṇa yasmāt amṛta sambhavaḥ candra arka vāhanaḥ nityam atas śāntim prayaccha mama yasmāt tvam pṛthivī sarvā dheno vai kṛṣṇa saṃjñitā sarva pāpa harā nityam atas śāntim prayaccha mama yasmāt āyasaiḥ karmāṇi te adhīnāni sarvadā lāṅgalāni āyudha ādīni tasmāt śāntim prayaccha mama yasmāt tvam chāga yajñānām aṅga tvena vyavasthitaḥ gavām aṅgeṣu sthanti bhuvanāni caturdaśa yasmāt a śūnyam śayanam keśavasya śivasya ca mama api a śūnyā astu tathā janmani janmani yathā ratneṣu sarveṣu sarve devāḥ vyavasthitāḥ tathā śāntim prayacchantu ratna dānena mama surāḥ yathā bhūmi pradānasya kalām na arhanti ṣoḍaśām mama śāntim bhūme dānāt bhavati api evam saṃpūjayet bhaktyā vitta śāṭhya vivarjitaḥ sapta aśvaḥ sapta rajjuḥ ca dvi bhujaḥ syāt sadā raviḥ mahā ambara dharaḥ daśa aśvaḥ śveta bhūṣaṇaḥ gadā pāṇiḥ dvi bāhuḥ ca kartavyaḥ vara daḥ śaśī rakta mālya ambara dharaḥ karṇikāra samam dyutiḥ nandanaḥ khaḍga carma gadā pāṇiḥ vidheyaḥ bhūmi nandanaḥ pīta mālya ambara dharaḥ pīta gandha anulepanaḥ yat yat yat yat yat yat tat tat tat tat daṇḍinaḥ vara dau kāryau sa akṣasūtra kamaḍalū indranīla dyutiḥ śūlī vara daḥ gṛdhra vāhanaḥ bāṇa bāṇāsana dharaḥ kartavyaḥ arkasutaḥ sadā śārdūla vadanaḥ khaḍgī varmī śūlī vara pradaḥ nīla siṃhāsana sthaḥ ca rāhuḥ atra praśasyate dhūmrāḥ dvi bāhavaḥ sarve gadinaḥ vikṛta ānanāḥ sarve kirīṭinaḥ kāryāḥ grahāḥ loka hita āvahāḥ sva aṅgulena ucchritāḥ sarve śatam aṣṭa uttaram tadā graha svarūpam etat te vyākhyātam pāṇḍu nandana etat jñātvā prayatnena pūjā kāryā vicakṣaṇaiḥ mahā pūjām yonena tu ārabhate naraḥ yaḥ tu pīḍā karaḥ nityam mālya vittasya vā grahaḥ tam tu yatnena saṃpūjya śeṣān api arcayet budhaḥ grahāḥ gāvaḥ narendrāḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ ca viśeṣataḥ pūjitāḥ pūjayanti ete nirdahanti avamānitāḥ tasmāt na dakṣiṇā hīnam kartavyam bhūtim icchatā saṃpūrṇāyām dakṣiṇāyām yasmāt ekaḥ api tuṣyati vivāha utsava yajñeṣu pratiṣṭhā ādiṣu karmasu kathitaḥ ayuta homaḥ ayam lakṣa homam atas śṛṇu sarva kāma āptaye yasmāt lakṣa homam viduḥ budhāḥ kṛtvā kārayet daśa hastam atha aṣṭau vā hastān kuryāt vidhānāt prāñc udañc pravaṇām bhūmim kārayet yatnatas naraḥ prāguttaram samāsādya pradeśam maṇḍapasya tu mahat kārayet kuṇḍam yathāvat lakṣaṇa anvitam māna hīnam ca apraśastam aneka bhaya dam bhavet yasmāt tasmāt su saṃpūrṇam śāntikuṇḍam vidhīyate asmāt daśaguṇaḥ proktaḥ lakṣa home svayambhunā saṃsthāpanāya devānām vapra traya samāvṛtam dvi aṅgulaḥ tatra vistāraḥ sarveṣām kathyate budhaiḥ daśa aṅgula ucchritā bhittiḥ sthaṇḍilasya tathā upari tasmin āvāhayet devān pūrvavat puṣpa taṇḍulaiḥ bhās abhimukhāḥ sarvāḥ sthāpyāḥ pratyadhidevatāḥ sthāpanīyāḥ muni śreṣṭhāḥ na antareṇa parāṅmukhāḥ sama pīna śarīraḥ tu vāhanam parameṣṭhinaḥ mama prayam sahasrāṇām śatam hutvā samidh saṃkhyā ādikam punar audumbarām atha ārdrām ca vakra koṭara varjitām bāhu mātrām srucam kṛtvā tatas stambha dvaya upari ghṛta dhārām tathā samyak agneḥ upari pātayet pāṭhayet sūktam āgneyam vaiṣṇavam raudram aindavam mahāvaiśvānaram sāma jyeṣṭhasāma ca pāṭhayet pāma krodha vihīnena ṛtvigbhyaḥ śānta cetasaḥ atha vai ṛtvijau śāntau dvau eva tu ati kovidau tadvat ca daśa ca aṣṭau vā lakṣa home api ṛtvijaḥ tavyāḥ śaktitas tadvat catvāraḥ vā vimatsarāḥ dadyāt ca pāṇḍava śreṣṭhaiḥ bhūṣaṇāni api śaktitas śayanāni ca vastrāṇi haimāni kaṭakāni ca pratipādayet na kuryāt dakṣiṇā hīnam vitta śāṭhyena mānavaḥ adadat lobha mohābhyām kula kṣayam avāpnuyāt anna dānam yathā śaktyā dātavyam bhūtim icchatā rāṣṭram hanyāt aṅga hīnaḥ mantra hīnaḥ tu ṛtvijaḥ adakṣiṇaḥ yajamānam na asti yajña samaḥ ripuḥ tasmāt pīḍā karaḥ nityam yaḥ eva bhavati grahaḥ dakṣiṇābhiḥ prayatnena bahūn vā bahu vittavān yatas sarvān avāpnoti kurvan kāmān vidhānāt yāvat kalpa śatāni aṣṭa atha mokṣam avāpnuyāt sa tam kāmam avāpnoti padam ca ānantyam aśnute bhāryā arthī śobhanām bhāryām kumārī ca śubham patim bhraṣṭa rājyaḥ tathā rājyam śrī kāmaḥ śriyam āpnuyāt yam yam prārthayate kāmam tam tam āpnoti puṣkalam śāntim nava graha mayām durita upaśāntim rājñ karoti bahunā vidhivat dvijendraiḥ navagrahalakṣahomavidhivarṇanam nāma ekacatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca rājā saṃvaraṇaḥ pūrvam pratiṣṭhāne pura uttame babhūva sa mahābhāgaḥ śāstra artha kuśalaḥ balī brahmaṇyaḥ pitṛ bhaktaḥ ca deva brāhmaṇa pūjakaḥ tasya atha kurvataḥ rājyam samyak pālayataḥ prajāḥ ājagāma mahā yogī sanakaḥ brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ dattvā tasya āsanam rājā praṇamya śirasā tathā pūjayitvā arghya pādya ādyaiḥ ātmānam vinivedya ca itihāsa purāṇa uktāḥ cakāra vividhāḥ kathāḥ rājarṣīṇām purāṇām ca caritāni yathā artha vid tatas kathā antare rājā kāryam manasi saṃsthitam hitāya pṛthivīśānām jagantaḥ ca ātmanaḥ tathā uvāca nirghāte pāṃśu varṣe ca gṛha bhaṅge tathā eva ca janma nakṣatra pīḍāsu anāvṛṣṭi bhayeṣu ca jvareṣu grahapīḍāsu durbhikṣe rāṣṭra vigrahe prabrūhi me dvijaśreṣṭhaiḥ tathā ārogya pradam nṛṇām śṛṇu rājñ pravakṣyāmi śānti karma hi anuttamam brahmahatyā ādi pāpāni yena naśyanti tad kṣaṇāt praśamam yānti mahat saṃpadyate sukham bhava devāgāre nadī tīre vane vā bhavane api vā śubha nakṣatra yoge ca vāre pūrva guṇa anvite yajamānasya ānukūlye koṭi homam samācaret pūjayitvā prayatnena brāhmaṇam vedapāragam vastraiḥ vibhūṣaṇaiḥ ca eva gandha mālya anulepanaiḥ tvam naḥ gatiḥ pitā mātā tvam gatiḥ tvam parāyaṇaḥ pañca homa artham atulam śānti artham sārvakāmikam purohitaḥ tatas prājñaḥ śukla ambara dharaḥ śuciḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ veda saṃvṛttaiḥ puṇyaiḥ yuktaḥ samāhitaiḥ bhūmi bhāge same śuddhe prāñc udañc pravaṇe tathā puṇyāham vācayet pūrvam kṛtvā viprān su pūjitān jaghanyam tu tad ardhena śakti kāla ādi apekṣayā madhye tu maṇḍapasya api kuṇḍam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ aṣṭa hasta pramāṇena āyāmena tathā eva ca mekhalā tritayam tasya dvādaśa aṅgula vistatam tad pramāṇām tathā yonim kurvīta su samāhitaḥ bhāgasya pūrva bhāge tu vedim kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ catur hastām samām ca eva hasta mātra ucchritaḥ nṛpa sthānam tat sarva bhūtānām kuryāt yatnena buddhimān uda lipya tatas bhūmim maṇḍapasya samīpatas mahā bhāga vinyaset kalaśān tatra jala pūrṇān caturdaśa aśvattha plakṣa cūta ādyaiḥ pallavaiḥ upaśobhitān prakalpayet sthāpayet dikṣu sarvāsu toraṇāni vicakṣaṇaḥ evam saṃbhṛta sambhāraiḥ purodhāḥ su samāhitaḥ sthāpayitvā surān vedau vakṣyamāṇān ariṃdamaiḥ brāhmaṇam pūrva bhāge tu madhye devam janārdanam aiśānyām ca grahān sarvān āgneyyām marutaḥ tathā vāyum saumyām tathā aiśānyām lokapālān krameṇa tu evam saṃsthāpya vibudhān yathāsthānam nṛpa uttamaiḥ mahā ādityāḥ vasavaḥ rudrāḥ lokapālāḥ tathā grahāḥ brahmā janārdanaḥ ca eva śūlapāṇiḥ bhaga akṣi hā atra saṃnihitāḥ sarve bhavantu sukha bhāginaḥ mayā bhaktyā upapāditām ca śubham sarve yajña karma samāhitāḥ evam saṃpūjayitvā tān devān yatnena śuddha dhīḥ kuryāt saṃskāra karaṇam yathā uktam veda cintakaiḥ tatas samāhvayet vahnim nāmnā khyātam alābhe tu ca yathālābham niyojayet vidyā vṛddhān vayas vṛddhān gṛhasthān saṃyata indriyān sva karma niyatān jñāna śīlān śāntān dvijottamān ciṃtayet tatra deveśam pañcāsyam nṛpaiḥ pāvakam dhūmāyamāne vṛthak hotavyam jvalite nale ṛgbhiḥ pūrvā mukhaiḥ homaḥ yajurbhiḥ ca uttarā mukhaiḥ sāmabhiḥ paścime kāryaḥ atharvabhiḥ dakṣiṇā mukhaiḥ bhāgau tu pūrvam hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ brahmānam pūrvam api etat sarvam paścāt samācaret praṇava ādibhiḥ tad liṅgaiḥ svāhākāra anta yojitaiḥ ca tilāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ ghṛta abhyaktāḥ kiṃcid yava samanvitāḥ hotavyāḥ koṭi home tu samidhaḥ ca palāśa jāḥ tu dadyāt pūrṇāhutim śubhām pūrṇāhutayaḥ samākhyātāḥ koṭi home narādhipaiḥ sahasrāṇi nṛpa śreṣṭhaiḥ daśa śāstra viśāradaiḥ prārambha dinam ārabhya brāhmaṇaiḥ brahma vādibhiḥ krodha lobha ādayaḥ doṣāḥ varjanīyāḥ prayatnāt yajamānena rāja indraiḥ savarga kāmān abhīpsitā uvāca kathaṃcana niyamāt brahmacaryāt vā duṣkaraḥ hi iti mama matiḥ nirodhaḥ atra brāhmaṇānām bhṛśayya ādiṣu duṣkaraḥ kāryāt gurutayā yasmāt parva kāla ādi apekṣayā kāryasya gurutām jñātvā na eva kuryāt aparvaṇi yathā saṃkṣepāt kāryaḥ koṭi homaḥ tathā śṛṇu kṛtvā kuṇḍa śatam divyam yathoktam hasta saṃmitam ekaikasmin tatas kuṇḍe śatam viprān niyojayet sadyas pakṣe tu viprāṇām sahasram parikīrtitam homam kuryuḥ dvijāḥ sarve kuṇḍe kuṇḍe yathā uditam yathā kuṇḍa bahu tve api rājasūye mahā kratau tathā kuṇḍa śate api atra ghṛtārciṣi vitānite ekaḥ eva bhavet yajñaḥ koṭi homaḥ na saṃśayaḥ evam yat kriyate kṣipram vyākulaiḥ kārya gauravāt śatānanaḥ saḥ vijñeyaḥ koṭi homaḥ na saṃśayaḥ svalpaiḥ ahobhiḥ kāryaḥ syāt varṣā kāla ādike api vā tadā daśaguṇaḥ kāryaḥ koṭi homaḥ vijānatā te api vijñāna śīlāḥ syuḥ vratavantaḥ jita indriyāḥ bhūpaiḥ kuṇḍa dvayam kṛtvā vibhajya ca vibhāvasum homam kuryuḥ dvijāḥ bhūyas saṃskṛtya vidhi pūrvakam śatam tatra niyojyam syāt viprāṇām pravibhajya vai evam ca dvi mukham kāryaḥ koṭi homaḥ vicakṣaṇaiḥ yadā tu sva icchayā yajñam yajamānaḥ samāpayet yathā lābha sthitaiḥ vipraiḥ jñāna śīlaiḥ vicakṣaṇaiḥ na saṃkhyā niyamaḥ ca atra brāhmaṇānām narottamaiḥ māsya anukarma vat bahu vighnaḥ ca kālena tasmāt saṃkṣepam ācaret yatas hi citta vitta ādyam āyuḥ ca eva asthiram sadā atas saṃkṣepāt kāryam dharma kāryam praśasyate tatas tu dīkṣayet vid prān hotṛṃśca śraddhayā anvitaḥ niṣkaiḥ ca kaṅkaṇaiḥ ca eva kuṇḍalaiḥ vividhaiḥ nṛpaiḥ ca eva dātavyam aśvānām ca tadā dīna andha kṛpaṇān sarvān vastra ādyaiḥ ca api pūjayet tatas ca avabhṛtham snāyāt taiḥ ghaṭaiḥ pūrva kalpitaiḥ lakṣa homa ukta mantreṇa sadā vijaya kāriṇā anāvṛṣṭi bhayam ca eva utpāta bhayam eva ca durbhikṣam graha pīḍā ca praśamam yāti bhū tale bhogān avāpya manasaḥ abhimatān prakāmam te yānti śakra sadanam su viśuddha sattvāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde koṭihomavidhivarṇanam nāma dvicatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ mahāśānti vidhi varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mahāśāntim pravakṣyāmi mahādevena bhāṣitām pārthivānām hita arthāya mahā dustara tāriṇīm nṛpa abhiṣeke sā kāryā yātrā kāle nṛpasya tu prasūtau mūla gaṇḍa ante yamalasya tu saṃbhave chattrāṇām ca dhvajānām ca sva sthānāt patane bhuvi praveśe veśmanaḥ tathā krūra grahānām vakra tve janma ādiṣu viśeṣataḥ janmani dvādaśe ca eva caturthe vā aṣṭame tathā yadā syuḥ guru mandāḥ a a arāḥ sūryaḥ ca eva viśeṣataḥ yuddhe grahānām sarveṣām sūrya śītāṃśu kīlake veśmanaḥ ca tulā bhaṅge garbheṣu aśvatarīṣu ca ravi induvoḥ uparāgeṣu mahāśāntiḥ praśasyate sarvāṇi durnimittāni praśamam yānti sarvathā tām kuryuḥ brāhmaṇāḥ pañca kula śīla samanvitāḥ catur vedāḥ tri vedāḥ ca dvi vedāḥ ca api pāṇḍavaiḥ mātharvaṇāḥ viśeṣeṇa bahu ṛcāḥ yaju saṃyutāḥ śucayaḥ śruta saṃpannāḥ japa homa parāyaṇāḥ pārāka nakta ādyaiḥ kṛtakāya viśodhanāḥ pūrvam ārādhya mantraiḥ tu prārabheta kriyām tatas daśa dvādaśa hastam vā maṇḍapam kārayet śubham māgneyyām kārayet kuṇḍam hasta mātram su śobhanam mekhalā traya saṃyuktam yonyā ca api vibhūṣitam baddha candana mālam ca toraṇa alaṃkṛtam tathā mahā ambara dharaḥ snātāḥ śukla mālya anulepanāḥ tatas ca pañca kalaśān tasyām vedyām niyojayet hi āgneya ādiṣu koṇeṣu pañcamam madhyatas tathā tri asra alaṃkṛte padme cūta pallava śobhite auṣadhīḥ pañcaratnāni rocanām candanam tathā siddhārthakān śamī dūrvāḥ kuśān vrīhiḥ yavān tathā apāmārgam phalavatīm nyagrodha udumbarau tathā plakṣa aśvattha kapitthān ca priyaṅgu cūta pallavān hasti danta mṛdam ca eva koṇa kumbheṣu nikṣipet puṇya tīrtha udaka annam ca dhānyam gavyam ca madhyame kūrcam vācam iti idam ca vahni kumbha abhimantraṇam mantreṇa mantraṇam vāyugocare īśāvāsyam caturthasya kumbhasya ca abhimantraṇam phalaiḥ ca nārikela ādyaiḥ dīpakaiḥ kumbha pūjanam potasupraṇītena mantreṇa viniśeṣayet kṛtvā ca āvaraṇam vahneḥ ājya saṃskāram eva ca tatas puruṣasūktena pāyasa śrapaṇam bhavet abhighārya atha saṃsiddham tathā saṃsthāpayet bhuvi tad aṣṭādaśa pramāṇa idhmān dadyāt atha śamī mayān pālāśī samidhaḥ sapta tathā sapta iti dāpayet hutvā pūrva krameṇa tu juhuyāt āhutīḥ sapta jātavedasaḥ iti ṛcā sthālīpākasya juhuyāt punar vai jātavedasā yamāya iti ca sapta anyāḥ svāhā antāḥ juhuyāt tatas idam viṣṇuḥ tatas sapta juhuyāt āhutīḥ nṛpa nakṣatrebhyaḥ tatas svāhā saptaviṃśat atha āhutīḥ yat karmaṇā eti juhuyāt tatas sviṣṭakṛtam punar tatas tu tūrya nirghoṣaiḥ kāhalā śaṅkha niḥsvanaiḥ kṛtvā pañcabhiḥ kalaśaiḥ pūrṇaiḥ mantraiḥ ebhiḥ yathākramam sahasrākṣeṇa prathamam tatas ca eva śatā yuṣā sajoṣasā ca indra iti viśvāni iti ṛgbhiḥ eva ca bhūtam astu iti ca tatas snāpayeyuḥ samāhitāḥ tatas diśām balim dadyāt vicitra anna samāyutam snātasya brāhmaṇāḥ sarve paṭheyuḥ śāntim uttamām mata toyena dhārām ca pātayitvā puṇya aha vācanam kṛtvā śānti karma samāpayet kṣitim hiraṇyam vāsāṃsi śayanāni āsanāni ca viprebhyaḥ dakṣiṇām dadyāt yathā śaktyā vimatsaraḥ dīna anātha viśiṣṭebhyaḥ śrotriyebhyaḥ ca dāpayet āyuḥ ca labhate dīrgham śatrūn vijayate kṣaṇāt durgāṇi ca asya sidyanti putrān ca labhate śubhān yathā śastra prahārāṇām kavacam vāraṇam bhavet tathā daiva upaghātānām śāntiḥ bhavati vāraṇam dayā dākṣiṇya yuktasya sarve sa anugrahāḥ grahāḥ yaḥ kārayet sakala doṣa harām samarthām śāntim praśāṃta hṛdayaḥ puruṣaḥ sadā eva iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde mahāśāṃtividhivarṇanam nāma tricatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ gaṇanātha śānti varṇanam uvāca śāntim kathaya deveśaiḥ gaṇanāthasya mama vibho yām kṛtvā sarva durgāṇi tarate mānavaḥ akhilaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śāntim vakṣyāmi rāja indra gaṇanātha priyām parām yasyāḥ ācaraṇena eva sarva ariṣṭa kṣayaḥ bhavet tatra avagāhate atyartham jalam muṇḍān ca paśyati kāṣāya vāsasaḥ ca eva kravyādān adhirohati saṃsīdati tena upasṛṣṭaḥ labhate na rājyam rāja nandanaḥ kumārī na ca bhartāram apatyam garbhiṇī tathā mācārya tvam śrotriyaḥ ca na śiṣyaḥ adhyāpanam tathā na ca āpnoti na ca sugandha kuṅkuma ālipta śarīra śirasaḥ tathā bhadrāsana upaviṣṭasya svasti vācya dvijān śubhān aśva sthānāt gaja sthānāt valmīkāt saṃgamāt hradāt mṛttikām rocanām gandhān guggulam ca apsu nikṣipet yadā hṛtā hi eka vaṇaiḥ manubhiḥ kalaśaiḥ hradāt carmaṇi ānaḍuhe rakte sthāpya bhadrāsanam tathā sahasrākṣam śatadhāram ṛṣiṇā vacanam kṛtam tena tvām abhiṣiṃcāmi pāvamānāḥ punaṃtu te bhagam te varuṇaḥ rājā bhagam sūryaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ yat te keśeṣu daurbhāgyam sīmante yat ca mūrdhani lalāṭe karṇayoḥ akṣiṇoḥ apaḥ tat ghnantu te sadā snātasya sārṣapam tailam sruveṇa audumbareṇa ca mitaḥ ca samitaḥ ca eva tathā sāla kaṭaṃkaṭau pūṣmāṇḍaḥ rājaputraḥ ca ante svāhā samanvitaiḥ dadyāt catuṣpathe śūrpe kuśān āstīrya sarvaśas kṛtā kṛtān taṇḍulān ca palala odanam eva ca matsyān pakvān tathā eva āmān māṃsam etāvat eva tu puṣpam citram sugandham ca surām ca trividhām api mūlakam pūri ka apūpam tathā eva uṇḍeraka srajam dūrvām sarva prapuṣpāṇām dattvā arghyam pūrṇa maḍalām vināyakasya jananīm upatiṣṭhet tatas oṃ abikām putrān dehi dhanam dehi sarva kāmān ca dehi me tatas śukla ambara dharaḥ śukla mālya anulepanaḥ evam vināyakam pūjya grahān ca eva vidhānāt ca karmaṇām phalam āpnoti śriyam āpnoti ca uttamām mad aditiḥ tathā pūjām tilakam svāminaḥ tathā śveta arkasya tu yaḥ mūle mahāgaṇapatiḥ kṛtaḥ sarva lakṣaṇa saṃpūrṇaḥ saḥ api siddhi karaḥ smṛtaḥ saṃjapyate śucau deśe vighnam na atra hi dehinaḥ kṣīṇa bhāgyaḥ api puruṣaḥ pūjitaḥ ca nareśvaraḥ ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde gaṇanāthaśāṃtivarṇanam nāma catuścatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca bandhane saṃnirodha iṅgāḥ vyādhīnām samprapīḍane katham mokṣaḥ bhavet tasya sādhya asādhyam bravīhi me gargeṇa kauśikaḥ pṛṣṭaḥ idam vacanam abravīt kṛttikāsu yadā kaścid vyādhim saṃpratipadyate tri rātram rohiṇīṣu ca mṛgaśīrṣe pañca rātram ārdrā prāṇa viyojinī ca māsa dvayam tathā svātau viśākhā viṃśatiḥ dināḥ maitre ca eva daśa aham tu jyeṣṭhā ca eva ardha māsikā mūlena jāyate mokṣaḥ ca āṣāḍhāsu tri pañcakam uttarā dina viṃśatyā dvau māsau śravaṇena tu dhaniṣṭhāyām ardha māsam vāruṇe tu daśa ahakaiḥ nava bhādrapada āṛkṣe uttarāsu tri pañcakam revatī daśa rātram tu ahorātram tathā aśvinī prāṇaiḥ viyojayet nityam gargaiḥ na asti atra saṃśayaḥ kauśikena samādiṣṭaḥ nakṣatra vyādhi sambhavaḥ daivajñena api jñātavyam nakṣatram atha janmanā kṣīravṛkṣasya samidhaḥ juhuyāt aśva daivate madhu ca prayatnena ghṛta aktāḥ sita taṇḍulāḥ payasā sarpiṣā sākam bṛhaspati adhidaivate homaḥ proktaḥ priyaṅgūnām nakṣatre yāma daivate sāvitre dadhi homaḥ utra tvāṣṭram citraudanam haviḥ ha ap daivatye śāli bījaiḥ vaiśvadevam tu kārayet raktāḥ ca taṇḍulāḥ ca eva hotavyāḥ viṣṇu daivate vāruṇe pārijātānām puṣpāṇām homaḥ iṣyate raktāḥ ca taṇḍulāḥ ca eva hotavyāḥ viṣṇu daivate tasmin phalāni akhaṇḍāni juhuyāt aṣṭa uttaram śatam sāvitrī homam ekam tu brahmā abhihitavan purā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde nakṣatrahomavidhivarṇanam nāma paṃca catvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca aparādha śatam yena kṣayam yāti śṛṇuṣva tat uvāca śrī vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājñ mahā bāho aparādha śata vratam yena anuṣṭhita mātreṇa kāma mokṣau labheta nā prāyaścittāni aśeṣāṇi sarva pāpa apanuttaye tāni api akṛtāni syuḥ iti ha uvāca padmajaḥ pāpam gurutaram ca api dahyate tūla rāśi vat tat tat tat śruṇuṣva gadataḥ mama anāśrami tvam prathamaḥ anagni tā vrata hīna tā adātṛ tvam aśaucam ca nirdaya tvam spṛhālu tā akṣāṃtiḥ jana pīḍā ca māyi tvam api amaṅgalam kṣata vrata tvam nāstikyam veda nindā kaṭhora tā dambhaḥ śāṭhyam ca dhaurtyam ca kaṭuka uktiḥ pramāda tā bhāryā mātṛ suta ādīnām tyāgaḥ ca a pūjya pūjanam mad bhakta hāniḥ japa tyāgaḥ pañcayajña vivarjanam saṃdhyā tarpaṇa homānām hāniḥ agneḥ praṇāśanam paiśunyam paradāreṣu dānam veśyā abhigāmi tā apātra dānam ca alpam ca mūlikākulī bhakṣaṇam antyaja āgamanam mātṛ tyāgaḥ pitṛ vivarjanam bhāryā saṃgraha kāri tā indriya ajaya māyi tvam vidyā vismaraṇam tathā śāstra tyāgaḥ ṛṇam citra karma ca anaṅga dhāvanam bhāryā putra suta ādīnām vikrayaḥ paśu maithunam taḍāga āgamane vṛttam vidyā vikraya kāri tā vṛtti lopaḥ mahīpālaiḥ yācaka tvam ku mitra tā bhrūṇahatyā para annam ca śūdra annasya niṣevaṇam hi mārta trāṇa vivarjanam guru dāra abhigāmi tvam saṃyogaḥ ca api taiḥ saha anye api vividhāḥ saṃti proktāḥ prādhānyāt tu amī tathā api ete na śakyante vaktum yasmāt anaṃtakāḥ tad aparādha sahasrāṇi lakṣa koṭi śatāni ca naśyanti tad kṣaṇāt nūnam satyeśasya anupūjanāt kapilaḥ paścima āsye tu vārāhaḥ ca uttare sthitaḥ padma kaumodakī śaṅkha cakra āyudha vidhāraṇam vāme ca adhas tathā dakṣe ūrdhve paścāt adhas nṛpaiḥ pāda adhastāt viniṣkrāntā gaṅgā pūtā sadā nṛbhiḥ tathā ca anyat tad nāmāni ca mama śṛṇu ca vijayā ca eva jayantī pāpa nāśinī unmīlinī vañjulī ca trispṛśā atha vivardhanā śukla ambara dharam saumyam prahṛṣṭa vadanam śivam sarva ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyam bhukti mukti pradam harim pūjayet ca prayatnena vidhinā yena tam śṛṇu mārgaśīrṣa ādi māseṣu dvādaśasu api sarvadā dvādaśyām api amāyām vai aṣṭamyām ca sita asite yata upavāsaḥ śuddha ātmā kuryāt vratam ataṃdritaḥ evam tu niyamam kṛtvā danta dhāvana pūrvakam gacchet tatas taḍāge vā puṣkariṇyām gṛhe api vā snātvā tu naityakam karma kṛtvā naimittikam tatas sauvarṇam kārayet devam pūrva uktam satya rūpiṇam mahā aṣṭaka yutam lakṣmyā yuktam padmāsana sthayā tad karṇikā gatam devam śakti vṛnda samanvitam mantra sambhāra saṃsthitaḥ om kṣīrasāgara kallole snāhi pāpa niṣūdanaiḥ yajñopavīta dānena kuru mām sarva pāvanam satyanāthaiḥ namaḥ tubhyam mūrta amūrta svarūpiṇe mahā bhāga kapilā divya bhūdhara vārāha acyuta yajñeśa lakṣmī kāntaiḥ nṛpa īśvaraiḥ paśum putram ca me dehi pāpa śatro nirañjana saṃkarṣaṇa mahā vīrya sarva īśaiḥ amita vikramaiḥ trāhi mām sarva duḥkhebhyaḥ ramayā saha mādhavaiḥ pūjā ca iyam mayā dattā pitāmaha jagadguro gṛhāṇa jagat īśāna nārāyaṇa namaḥ astu te dhanam guptam mahīpālaiḥ sarva pāpa apanuttaye dānam dadyāt mahā rājaiḥ hi aśaktau tad abhāvataḥ saṃvatsare tatas pūrṇe kuryāt udyāpanam budhaḥ pūrvavat pūjayet evam bahu sambhāravi staraiḥ anujñām prārthayet viprān pāpa ghvaṃsaḥ mama astu vai tatas sarvam brāhmaṇāya samarpya ca kṣamāpayet tat phalam koṭi guṇitam vratasya asya niṣevaṇāt yaḥ paṭhet śṛṇuyāt vā api sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate aśaktaḥ tu tathā śaktaḥ vitta śāṭhya vivarjitaḥ kṛte vai kriyamāṇe tu kartā phalam avāpnuyāt tad aparādha śata agha ogham vratena anena nāśayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde aparādhaśatavratavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kāñcana vrata varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca vāsudevam jagannātham sthiti saṃyama kārakam parāvarāṇām sraṣṭāram purāṇam param avyayam jagannātham jagantaḥ kāraṇa ātmakam lakṣmī provāca rāja indraiḥ pāda saṃvāhane sthitā praṣṭavyam kiṃcid icchāmi praṣṭum praśna vidām vara prakuruṣva mahābhāga dayām kṛtvā mama upari uttamam sarva varṇānām vratānām api ca uttamam uvāca gṛhasthaḥ ca āśramāṇām ca varṇānām brāhmaṇaḥ yathā yathā nadīṣu sarvāsu jāhnavī loka viśrutā hradānām udadhiḥ śreṣṭhaḥ devānām viṣṇuḥ uttamaḥ strīṇām devāḥ yathā lakṣmī tathā idam vratam uttamam na gaṅgā na kurukṣetram na kāśī na ca puṣkaram gauryā devyā kṛtam pūrvam śaṃkareṇa mahātmanā rāmeṇa sītayā sārdham rājyam prāpya kṛtam purā pārtha pāṇḍavaiḥ vana vāsibhiḥ rambhayā menayā vā api paulomyā satyabhāmayā hāṇḍilyā ca api arundhatyā urvaśyā deva dattayā kṛtam vratam idam bhadram saubhāgya sukha kāmyayā pātāle nāga kanyābhiḥ kṛtam etat su śobhanam gāyatryā ca sarasvatyā sāvitryā brahma bhāryayā anyābhiḥ sarva nārībhiḥ sarva kāma phala īpsubhiḥ tasmāt te aham pravakṣyāmi sarva pāpa praṇāśanam vasu prīti karam ramyam vratānām paramam śṛṇu brahma hā mucyate pāpāt surāpaḥ vasu hārakaḥ guru bhāryā abhigāmī ca hi eteṣām saṃgamī ca yaḥ māna kūṭam tulā kūṭam kanyā vṛttiḥ gavām vratī agamyā āgamanaḥ yaḥ tu māṃsa āśī vṛṣalī patiḥ yaḥ tu syāt bhūbhiḥ hartā tathā eva ca ebhiḥ sarvaiḥ mahā pāpaiḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ kāñcana ākhyā purī nāma vratam trailokya viśrutam yaḥ karoti naraḥ devi nārī vā bhakti saṃyutā tasmin māse ca kartavyā kāñcana ākhyā purī śubhā śukla kṛṣṇa tṛtīyāyām ekādaśyām ca pūrṇimā saṃkrāntiḥ vā mahābhāge kuhūḥ vā ca aṣṭamī tithiḥ parvasu anyeṣu sarveṣu dātavyā kāñcanī purī vratī snātvā tu pūrvāhṇe nadī ādau vimale jale mṛttikā ālambhanam kāryam mantreṇa anena suvrate uddhṛtā asi yathāpūrvam viṣṇunā kroḍa rūpiṇā lokānām upakāra artham vandanāt siddhi kāma dā tasmāt tvam vaṃditā pāpam hara mama aneka janma jam iti mṛttikā mantraḥ apaḥ tu viśvayoniḥ hi viṣṇunā nirmitāḥ svayam sāṃnidhyam tīrtha sahitam kartavyam mama sāṃpratam iti am mantraḥ anena vidhinā snātvā yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ maham āgamya śuddha ātmā na alapan piśunān tu rāt bāṇḍinaḥ vikarma sthān dhūrtān ca kitavāt śaṭhān prakṣālya pāṇi vadanam kuryāt tu ācamanam tatas dvādaśa akṣara mantreṇa tat jalam ca abhimantrayet mayā vediḥ catur stambha samanvitā catur hasta pramāṇena kāryā ca eva su śobhanā vastreṇa āveṣṭitāḥ stambhāḥ vitāna vara maṇḍitāḥ puṣpa mālā anvitāḥ kāryāḥ divya dhūpa adhivāsitāḥ madhye tu maṇḍalam kāryam padma ākhyam varṇakaiḥ śubhaiḥ yena dṛṣṭena deveśi sarva pāpa kṣayaḥ bhavet agre tu kalaśaḥ kāryaḥ jala pūrṇaḥ su śobhanaḥ sa kalpitavyaḥ prayatnāt samāyuktam tasya upariṣṭāt saṃsthāpya kāṃcana ākhyām purīm śubhām catuṣpalā hi uttamā syāt dvi palā madhyamā smṛtā sāmānya eka palā kāryā kalaśaiḥ tu samanvitā modakān sthāpayet divyān samantāt sundara ākṛtīn cātuścaraṇikān tatra viprān āvāhya sundari pratiṣṭhām kārayet tasya veda mantraiḥ su śobhanaiḥ tasyāḥ madhye nyaset viṣṇum haimam lakṣmyā samanvitam netre ratna maye kārye daśanāḥ vajra bhūṣitāḥ muktāphala mayam tasya bhūṣaṇam parikalpayet aṅgam svarṇa mayam kāryam śaṅkha cakra gadā āyudham pañcāmṛtena deveśam snāpya nārāyaṇam vibhum śeṣāḥ varṇāḥ purāṇa uktaiḥ tān śṛṇuṣva mama priye vāsudevāya pādau tu gulphau saṃkarṣaṇāya ca trailokya nāthāya guhye jñāna mayāya vai kaṭim dāmodarāya iti udaram hṛdayam viśva rūpiṇe nityam hi pūjayet devi uraḥ śrīvatsa dhāriṇe yaṇṭham kaustubha nāthāya āsyam yajña mukhāya ca tad anta kāriṇe bāhū svaiḥ nāmaiḥ āyudhāni ca śriyam prapūjayet devīm devyāḥ mantraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ indra ādi lokapālānām pūjā kāryā yathākramam nava grahānām homaḥ ca kartavyaḥ vighna nāśanaḥ pūjā gaṇapateḥ kāryā tathā homaḥ vidhānāt pāyasam ghṛtapūrān ca modakān pūrikāḥ tathā mālikā ādi naivedyam pheṇikāḥ śarkarāḥ tathā dīpān daśa diśaḥ dadyāt pārthivān raktavartikān etena tu viśāla akṣe mūlamantreṇa dāpayet puṣpa mālā anvitān kṛtvā candanena vibhūṣitān sahasra śīrṣa ādibhiḥ mantraiḥ japadbhiḥ brāhmaṇa uttamaiḥ ṣoḍaśa atha sa patnīkān pūjayet ca yathāvidhi bhūṣayet ca śubhaiḥ vastraiḥ tathā alaṃkāraṇa ādibhiḥ matvā dvijaḥ pūjyaḥ lakṣmīm matvā ca brāhmaṇīm chattram ca upānahau ca eva aṅguli ābharaṇam tathā mad śayyām sa upaskarām ca eva vastreṇa ācchādya yatnatas purīm ghaṭāpayet pūrvam vastreṇa ācchādya yastaḥ yathā kuryāt prayāseṇa yathā kartā na paśyati dīpān tu dīpitān tatra ānayet yajña maṇḍapam śrutavān śāstra vid prājñaḥ kṛta sarva agha saṃkṣayaḥ mābadhya netre su prājñaḥ ācāryaḥ tam idam vadet sarva kāma
