ājyabhāgau tu pūrvam hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ tatas sarva samīpe tu snātaḥ śukla ambaraḥ śuciḥ puṣpa dhūpaiḥ atha abhyarcya vāsobhiḥ sa phala akṣataiḥ tatas pradakṣiṇīkṛtya mantrān etān udīrayet namaḥ namaḥ pāpa vināśinībhyaḥ brahmāṇḍa loka īśvara pālanābhyaḥ āśā śata ādhikya phala pradābhyaḥ digbhyaḥ tathā kalpalatā vadhūbhyaḥ yā yasya śaktiḥ paramā pradiṣṭā vede purāṇe sura sattamasya tām pūjayāmi iha pareṇa sāmnā sā me śubham yacchatu tām nataḥ asmi evam uccārya tāḥ sarvāḥ brāhmaṇebhyaḥ nivedayet ha saḥ āśāḥ parayā bhaktyā tāḥ tāḥ saṃkalpya cetasi tatas kṣamāpayet viprān praṇipatya sa dakṣiṇān mahā śakti vṛtaḥ paścāt etya rājñ rasātalam yā ca nārī mahā rājaiḥ dānam etat prayacchati yaḥ ca paśyet dīyamānam dattam yaḥ ca anumodate śṛṇoti vācyamānam ca saḥ api pretya vimucyate yāḥ śakra vahni yama nairṛta pāśa hastāḥ vāta indu rāja śiva keśava śambhu śaktayaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde kalpalatādānavidhivarṇanam nāma ekonāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ a dhyāyaḥ uvāca bhagavan kṣatriyaiḥ śūraiḥ sva vīrya upātta saṃcayaiḥ kāni dānāni deyāni pavitrāṇi śubhāni ca anyaiḥ vā puruṣaiḥ kṛṣṇaiḥ adharma bhaya bhīrubhiḥ viśeṣa vihitam dānam kathayasva mahāmate śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śṛṇu bhūpālaiḥ bhadram te dāna dharmam anuttamam bhīpānām hitāya ca na saṃśayaḥ bahu rūpāṇi nānā śāstra uditāni ca go dāna ādīni rāja indraiḥ pradhānāni na saṃśayaḥ kim tu pradhānam ekam te dānam vakṣyāmi bhārata yat sarvam śukraḥ provāca bhārataiḥ uvāca śṛṇu daitya pate dānam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam mad mad mad mad mad mad mad mad mad mad tasyām ayane ca eva grahaṇe śaśi sūryayoḥ dānam etat pradātavyam viṣuve sūrya saṃkrame saṃsthāpya dāru jam divyam hema paṭṭaiḥ alaṃkṛtam puṣpa prakara saṃkīrṇe prāñc udañc pravaṇe śubhe tha vā goṣṭhe vicitre vā gṛha aṃgaṇe kṛtvā tasyām saṃsthāpayet devān brahma ādīn kathayāmi te madhye brahmā pratiṣṭhāpyaḥ pūjayet praṇavena tam viṣṇuḥ uttaratas sthāpyaḥ pauruṣeṇa tam arcayet sūktena rudram raudreṇa dakṣiṇasyām samarcayet grahān sūrya mukhān ca eva vidhivat pūjayet tathā pūjayet gandha kusumaiḥ śveta vastraiḥ sa candanaiḥ śaṅkha bherī mṛdaṅgānām śabdaiḥ sarvatragāmibhiḥ bhaṇḍam kṛtvā vidhānena hasta mātra pramāṇāt māgneyyām diśi rāja indraiḥ brāhmaṇān tatra pūjayet catuḥ ca āraṇikān viprān pūjitān brahma bhūṣaṇaiḥ homa upakaraṇam sarvam melayitvā tilān ghṛtam māghārau ājyabhāgau tu hutvā prāgvat ca tau tatas graha yajña uditaiḥ ca eva grahānām homaḥ iṣyate evam yajña vidhim kṛtvā yajamānaḥ dvijaiḥ saha hema paṭṭaiḥ su tilakaiḥ śobhitau śaṅkha cāmaraiḥ mahāmātra anvitau ca eva sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitau evam vidhim tatas kṛtvā ratham tam sa gajam naraḥ bhūṣitam kaṇṭha kaṭakaiḥ karṇaveṣṭa aṅgulīyakaiḥ baddha tūṇim dhanuṣpāṇim bahu carma vibhūṣitam phaḍga dhenukayā naddham hāra alaṃkṛta vigraham ratham pradakṣiṇīkṛtya gṛhīta kusuma añjaliḥ imam uccārayet mantram sarva pāpa praṇāśanam padmaḥ puṣpadantaḥ atha vāmanaḥ tat tat tat aṣṭa devayonayaḥ teṣām vaṃśa prasūtau tu bala rūpa samanvitau rathaḥ ayam yajñapuruṣaḥ brāhmaṇa utra śivaḥ svayam mama ibha ratha dānena prīyetām śiva keśavau iti uccārya mahābhāge pūjayitvā punar punar sva dāra niratam śāntam veda vedāṅga pāragam mādvāram anugacchet ca praṇipatya gṛham viśet tatas yajña avasāne tu dīna andha ādīn jaḍān kṛśān kuṇḍa maṇḍapa sambhāra bhūṣaṇa ācchādana ādikam hayau lakṣaṇa saṃyuktau khalīna alaṃkṛta ānanau vicitra vastu saṃvītau kaṇṭha ābharaṇa bhūṣitau tam pradakṣiṇam āvṛttya mantram etam udīrayet rathaḥ ayam savitā sākṣāt vedāḥ ca amī turaṃgamāḥ tat tat tat prayacchantu sukham mama māropayet gṛhāt dvāram yāvat etam anuvrajet tasmāt vāha ratham rājyam tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu apsaras gaṇa saṃkīrṇe vimāne sūrya varcase divya bhoga anvitaḥ śrīmān kāma cārī vaset divi puṇya kṣayāt iha abhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ putra pautra anvitaḥ ca eva ciraṃjīvī priya atithiḥ ekena aśvena aśva rathaḥ kathyate veda vādibhiḥ dāna mantrāḥ te eva uktāḥ phalam tatra nigadyate yacchanti ye ratha varam su dhura akṣa cakram vikrānta vāraṇa yutam turaga anvitam vā sa upaskaram kanaka paṭṭa vicitri tāgam te syandanena surarāja puram prayānti tatra śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde gajarathāśvarathadānavidhivarṇanam nāma aśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ha dānāni anyāni mama kṛṣṇa kathayasva yadu uttamaiḥ maṅgalyāni pavitrāṇi sarva pāpa harāṇi ca mādhavaiḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca dānāni bahu rūpāṇi kathitāni mayā te kathitāni mayā tubhyam kathayiṣyāmi yāni ca kāmyaḥ dāna vidhiḥ pārtha kriyamāṇaḥ prayatnāt jñeyam niṣka śatam sarva dāneṣu vidhiḥ uttamaḥ evam vṛkṣa ratha indrāṇām dhenvaḥ kṛṣṇa ajinasya ca aśaktasya api kṛṣṭaḥ ayam pañca sauvarṇikaḥ vidhiḥ atas anyūnena yaḥ dadyāt mahā dānam narādhipaiḥ pratigṛhṇāti vā tasya duḥkha śoka āvaham bhavet ādau tāvat pravakṣyāmi kāla ākhyam puruṣam te sapta sāgara dānam ca mahā bhūta ghaṭan tathā suvarṇa aśvaḥ smṛtaḥ ṣaṣṭhaḥ suvarṇa aśva rathaḥ aparaḥ sarva dāna uttamam rājñ kṛṣṇājinam atha aṣṭamam puṇyam dinam atha āsādya bhūmi bhāge same śubhe caturthyām vā caturdaśyām viṣṭau vā pāṇḍu nandana pumān kṛṣṇa tilaiḥ kāryaḥ raupya dantaḥ suvarṇa dṛś khaḍga udyata karaḥ dīrṇaḥ japā kusuma kuṇḍalaḥ rakta ambara dharaḥ sragvī śaṅkha mālā vibhūṣitaḥ tīkṣṇa asi pattra dhanuṣā visphārita kaṭi taṭaḥ upānah yuga yuktaḥ hi kṛṣṇa kambalaiḥ pārśva gaḥ gṛhīta māṃsa piṇḍaḥ ca vāme kara tale tathā evaṃvidham naram kṛtvā gṛhīta kusuma añjaliḥ sva gṛhya ukta vidhānena śatam aṣṭa uttaram yajet yajamānaḥ prasanna ātmā imam mantram udīrayet brahma viṣṇu śiva ādīnām tvam asādhyaḥ asi suvrata pūjitaḥ tvam mayā bhaktyā prārthitaḥ ca tathā sukham evam saṃpūjayitvā tam brāhmaṇāya nivedayet brahmānam prathamam pūjya vāsobhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ tathā dakṣiṇām śaktitas dadyāt praṇipatya visarjayet hānte sūrya bhavanam bhittvā yāti param padam puṇya kṣayāt iha abhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ saṃpūjya kālapuruṣam vidhivat dvijāya dattvā śubha aśubha phala udaya hetu bhūtaḥ roga antare sakala doṣa maye ca dehī no vadhya bhāvam upagacchati tad prabhāvāt iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde kālapuruṣadānavidhivarṇanam nāma ekāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi pārtha dānam anuttamam saptasāgarakam nāma sarva pāpa praṇāśanam puṇyam dinam atha āsādya yuga ādi grahaṇa ādikam tārayet sapta kuṇḍāni kāñcanāni vicakṣaṇaḥ prādeśa mātrāṇi tathā ratni mātrāṇi vā punar tat kuryāt saptaśatāt ūrdhvam ā sahasrāt ca śaktitas saṃsthāpyāni ca sarvāṇi kṛṣṇājina tila upari prathamam pūrayet kuṇḍam lavaṇena vicakṣaṇaḥ dvitīyam payasā tadvat tṛtīyam sarpiṣā punar tadvat saptamam tīrtha vāriṇā sthāpayet lavaṇasya ante brahmānam kāñcanam śubham madhye tu pārvatīm sarveṣu sarva ratnāni dhānyāni ca samantataḥ sthāpayet puruṣa śreṣṭhaiḥ yathālābham yathāsukham tatas parva samīpe tu snātaḥ śukla ambaraḥ gṛhī tris pradakṣiṇam āvṛtya mantrān etān udīrayet namaḥ vaḥ sarva sindhūnām ādhārebhyaḥ sanātanāḥ jantūnām prāṇa debhyaḥ ca samudrebhyaḥ namaḥ namaḥ pūrṇāḥ sarve bhavantaḥ vai kṣāraiḥ kṣīra ghṛta aikṣavaiḥ tasmāt agha ogha vidhvaṃsam kurudhvam mama mānadāḥ alakṣmīḥ praśamam yātu lakṣmīḥ ca astu gṛhe mama evam uccārya tān dadyāt brāhmaṇebhyaḥ yudhiṣṭhira bahūnām etat uddiṣṭam dānam ekasya vā punar deyam vā sarva sāmānyam kriyā vipra anurūpatas tasya gṛhāt na calati lakṣmīḥ yāvat kula aṣṭakam pūjyamānaḥ sura gaṇaiḥ siddha vidyādhara uragaiḥ iti dadāti rasa amara saṃyutān śucira vismaya dān iha sāgarān haimān vidhāya jaladhīn vitarasva śaktyā prāpnoṣi yena sarasāṇi samīhitāni mahābhūta ghaṭa dāna varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mahābhūtaghaṭam nāma mahāpātaka nāśanam puṇyām tithim samāsādya su anulipte gṛha aṅgaṇe punar kārayet kāñcanam kumbham mahāratna anvitam punar prādeśāt aṅgula śatam yāvat kuryāt pramāṇāt mahatyā pañca palāt ūrdhvam ā śatāt ca narottamaiḥ kṣīra ājya pūritam kṛtvā kalpavṛkṣa samanvitam padmāsana gatāḥ tatra brahma viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ lokapālāḥ mahā indrāḥ ca sva vāhana samāsthitāḥ ṛgvedaḥ sa akṣasūtraḥ ca yajurvedaḥ sa paṅkajaḥ vīṇā dhārī sāmavedaḥ hi atharvā sraj śubha anvitaḥ tad purāṇa vedaḥ vara daḥ sa akṣasūtra kamaṇḍaluḥ pādukā upānaha chatram cāmara agrya āsana āyudhān tris pradakṣiṇam āvṛtya mantram etam udīrayet mahābhūta mayaḥ ca ayam tasmāt śāntim dadātu me atra sannihitāḥ devāḥ sthāpitāḥ viśvakarmaṇā te me śāntim prayacchantu bhakti bhāvena pūjitāḥ iti evam pūjayitvā tu mahābhūta ghaṭam naraḥ brāhmaṇam pūjayitvā tu bhūṣaṇa ācchādana ādibhiḥ mahābhūta ghaṭam dadyāt parvakāle yata vrataḥ punar pradakṣiṇīkṛtya brāhmaṇam tam kṣamāpayet puṇya kṣayāt iha abhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ajeyaḥ śatru saṃghātaiḥ mahā balaiḥ parākramaḥ aṣṭāpada uttama ghaṭam vimalam vidhāya brahma īśa keśava yutam saha lokapālaiḥ bhaktyā viprāya dehi te dāna śataiḥ kim anyaiḥ śayyā dāna vidhi varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mad pāṇḍu kula udvahaiḥ mayyā dānam prayacchanti sarvadā eva dvijottamāḥ anityam jīvitam yasmāt kaḥ nyaḥ paścāt pradāsyati tāvat sa bandhuḥ sa pitā yāvat jīvati bhārata mṛtaḥ mṛtaḥ iti jñātvā kṣaṇāt snehaḥ nivartate tasmāt svayam pradātavyam śayyā bhojya jala ādikam ātmā eva yaḥ hi na ātmānam dāna bhogaiḥ samarcayet tasmāt śayyām samāsādya sāra dāru mayīm dṛḍhām danta pattra citām ramyām hima paṭṭaiḥ alaṃkṛtām haṃsa tūlī praticchannām subhagām sa upadhānikām pracchādana paṭī yuktām gandha dhūpa adhivāsitām tasyām saṃsthāpayet haimam harim lakṣmī samanvitam ucchīrṣake dhṛtam ca eva kalaśam parikalpayet vijñeyam pāṇḍavaiḥ sadā sa nidrā kalpakam budhaiḥ tāmbūlam kuṅkuma kṣoda karpūra agaru candanam pārśveṣu sthāpayet śaktyā saptadhānyāni ca eva hi tad pañca varṇa vitānakam mad śayyām evaṃvidhām kṛtvā brāhmaṇāya upadāpayet namaḥ te sarva deva īśaiḥ śayyā dānam kṛtam mayā yathā na kṛṣṇa śayanam śūnyam sāgara jātayā mama api a śūnyā astu tathā janmani janmani tathā vidhiḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ dadāti yadi dharma artham mānavaḥ bāndhave mṛte viśeṣam ca atra rāja indra kathyamānam nibodha mama yat iṣṭam ca tathā asya āsīt tat sarvam parikalpayet taḥ eva puruṣaḥ haimaḥ tasya antam sthāpayet tathā pūjayitvā pradātavyaḥ mṛtaśayyā yathā uditā sukham vasati asau jantuḥ śayyā dāna prabhāvāt pīḍayanti na tam yāmyāḥ puruṣāḥ bhīṣaṇa ānanāḥ mābhūtasaṃplavam yāvat tiṣṭhet pātaka varjitaḥ mad pradānam amalam te pāṇḍu putra saṃkīrtitam sakala saukhya ānidhānam etat dadāti vidhivat svayam eva nāke talpe vikalpa rahitaḥ sa vibhāti satyam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde śayyādānavidhivarṇanam nāma caturaśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca tat te aham saṃpravakṣyāmi dānam māna vivardhanam dāna kālaḥ sadā tasya munibhiḥ parikīrtitaḥ puṇyaiḥ puṇya dinam pārthaiḥ prāpyate jīvitaiḥ na ca loha jām prakṛtim bhavyām kārayitvā ātmanaḥ nṛpa abhīṣṭa vāhana gatām iṣṭa alaṃkāra saṃyutām abhīṣṭa loka sahitām sarva upaskara saṃyutām tatas paṭṭa paṭī vastraiḥ chāditām ratna bhūṣitām kuṅkumena anulipta aṅgām karpūra aguru vāsitām strī ced dadāti śayane śayitām kārayet svayam yat yat iṣṭatamam kiṃcid tat sarvam pārśvatas nyaset upakāra karam strīṇām sva śarīre ca yat bhavet tat sarvam sthāpayet pārśve svayam saṃcintya cetasi pūjayitvā lokapālān gṛhān devīm vināyakam śukla ambaraḥ snātvā gṛhīta kusuma añjaliḥ manaḥ pratimā ca iyam sarva upakaraṇaiḥ yutā ātmā śaṃbhuḥ śivaḥ śauriḥ śakraḥ sura gaṇaiḥ vṛtaḥ tasmāt ātma pradānena mama ātmā suprasīdatu iti uccārya tatas dadyāt brāhmaṇāya yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ brāhmaṇaḥ ca api gṛhṇīyāt kodāt iti ca kīrtayan tatas pradakṣiṇīkṛtya praṇipatya visarjayet yaḥ pumān atha vā nārī śṛṇuyāt phalam āpnuyāt sāgram varṣa śatam divyam svarga loke suraiḥ vṛtaḥ abhīṣṭa phala dānena hi abhīṣṭa phala bhāj bhavet tatra eva sarva kāmānām phala bhāj bhavate nṛpaḥ iṣṭa bandhu janaiḥ sārdham na viyogam kadācana prāpnoti puruṣaḥ rājñ svarge ca ānantyam aśnute yaḥ ca ātmanaḥ pratikṛtim varavāhana sthāḥ haimīm vidhāya dhana dhānya samākulām ca sa upaskaram dvijavarāya dadāti bhaktyā candra arka vat sa divi bhāti hi rājarājaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde ātmapratikṛtidānavidhivarṇanam nāma pañcāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ hiraṇya aśva dāna vidhi varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca sāṃpratam saṃpravakṣyāmi hiraṇyāśva vidhim param yasya prasādāt puruṣaḥ śāśvatam phalam aśnute puṇyam dinam atha āsādya pātram vā api guṇa adhikam haktitas tri palāt ūrdhvam āśatāt ca narottamaiḥ khalīna alaṃkṛta mukham kārayet hema vājinam mukharam sa unnata skandham dṛḍha jānum sa vāladhim saṃpūjya kusumaiḥ śvetaiḥ caṇakān vinivedya ca tatas parva samīpe tu gṛhīta kusuma añjaliḥ imam uccārayet mantram purāṇa uktam yata vrataḥ tvam eva saptadhā bhūtvā chandas rūpeṇa bhāskaram yasmāt dhārayase lokān atas pāhi sanātanaiḥ pradakṣiṇam tatas kṛtvā praṇipatya visarjayet anena vidhinā rājñ hiraṇyāśvam alaṃkṛtam dattvā pāpa kṣayāt bhānoḥ lokam āpnoti śāśvatam purāṇa śravaṇam tadvat kārayet bhojanāt anu ittham hiraṇya aśva vidhim karoti yaḥ su puṇyam āsādya dinam narendra yaḥ vā śṛṇoti atha vā smaret vā haimāśva dānam abhinandati dīyamānam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde hiraṇyāśvadānavidhivarṇanam nāma ṣaḍaśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ hiraṇya aśva ratha dāna vidhi varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi te pāṇḍu kula udvahaiḥ puṇyam hemaratham nāma mahāpātaka nāśanam tilān kṛtvā kāñcanam sthāpayet ratham catur asram mahābhāga catur cakram sa kūbaram brahmānam agratas kṛtvā gṛhīta pragraham śubham indranīlena kumbhena dhvaja rūpeṇa saṃyutam lokapāla aṣṭaka upetam padmarāga dala anvitam catvāraḥ pūrṇa kalaśāḥ dhānyāni aṣṭādaśa eva tu tat yat yat yat tat tat tat tat evaṃvidham pūjayitvā mālya gandha anulepanaiḥ puṇyam kālam tatas prāpya snātaḥ saṃpūjya devatāḥ tris pradakṣiṇam āvṛtya gṛhīta kusuma añjaliḥ śukla mālya ambara dharaḥ imam mantram udīrayet namaḥ namaḥ pāpa vināśanāya viśvātmane deva turaṃgamāya hātrām adhīśāya bhava abhavāya rathasya dānāt mama dehi śāntim vasu aṣṭaka āditya marut gaṇānām tvam eva dhātā paramam nidhānam dedīpyamāna vapuṣā ca jita prabhāvam ākramya maḍalam akhaṇḍala caṇḍabhānoḥ ciram saha āste iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde hiraṇyāśvarathadānavidhivarṇanam nāma saptāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kṛṣṇa ajina dāna vidhi varṇanam uvāca kṛṣṇa ajina pradānasya vidhi kālam mama anagha brāhmaṇam ca samācakṣva tatra mama saṃśayaḥ mahān śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca yuga ādiṣu uparāgeṣu saṃkrāntau dina saṃkṣaye māghyām vā grahapīḍāsu duḥsvapna adbhuta darśane deyam etat mahā dānam dravya mātra āgame tathā āhitāgniḥ dvijaḥ yaḥ ca veda vedāṅga pāragaḥ purāṇa abhirataḥ dakṣaḥ deyam tasmai ca pārthivaiḥ yathā yena vidhānena tat mama nigadataḥ śṛṇu mādau eva samāstīrya śobhitam vastram āvikam kartavyam rukma śṛṅgam tat raupya dantam tathā eva ca muktā dāmnā tu lāṅgūlam tila channam tathā eva ca tilaiḥ kṛtvā śiraḥ rājñ vāsasā ācchādayet budhaḥ suvarṇena abhitas kuryāt alaṃkuryāt viśeṣataḥ kāṃsya pātrāṇi catvāri teṣu dadyāt yathākramam ghṛtam kṣīram dadhi kṣaudram evam dattvā yathāvidhi kṛṣṇaḥ kṛṣṇa malaḥ devaiḥ kṛṣṇa ajina varaḥ tathā tvad dāna apāsta pāpasya prīyatām mama namaḥ namaḥ trayastriṃśat surāṇām ca ādhāre tvam vyavasthitaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ asi mūrtimān sākṣāt kṛṣṇājina namaḥ astu te evam pradakṣiṇīkṛtya praṇipatya punar punar tad pratigrāhakam vipram veda vedāṅga pāragam snātam vastra yuga ācchannam sva śaktyā vā api alaṃkṛtam anena vidhinā dattvā yathāvat kṛṣṇa mārgaṇam samagram bhūmi dānasya phalam prāpnoti mānavaḥ tilān kṛtvā hiraṇyam madhu sarpiṣī sarvān lokān caranti eva kāmacārāḥ viyat gatāḥ ābhūtasaṃplavam yāvat svargam prāptāḥ na saṃśayaḥ na ca asti bhuvanatraye tat sarvam nāśam āyāti dattvā kṛṣṇājinam kṣaṇāt kṛṣṇa īkṣaṇam kṛṣṇa mṛgasya carma dattvā dvijedrāya samāhita ātmā yathoktam etat maraṇam na śocet prāpnoti abhīṣṭam manasaḥ phalam yat tatra śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde kṛṣṇājinadānavidhivratavarṇanam nāma aṣṭāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca yasya pradānāt bhavanam vaiṣṇavam yāti mānavaḥ parva kālam samāsādya saṃkrāntau grahaṇe api vā kuryāt deva ratha ākāram ratham maṇi vibhūṣitam dhvaje ca garuḍam kuryāt kūbara agre vināyakam lokapāla aṣṭaka upetam brahma arka śiva saṃyutam madhye nārāyaṇa upetam lakṣmī puṣṭi samanvitam bhṛṣṇājina tila droṇam kṛtvā tam sthāpayet ratham nānā phala samāyuktam upariṣṭāt vitānakam bhavet pañca palāt ūrdhvam ā śatāt ca narottamaiḥ tris pradakṣiṇam āvṛtya gṛhīta kusuma añjaliḥ namaḥ namaḥ śaṃkara padmaja arka lokeśa vidyādhara vāsudevaiḥ yat tat padam parama guhyatamam purāṇam ānanda hetu gaṇa rūpa vimukta bandhāḥ yoga eka māna sadṛśaḥ munayaḥ samādhau paśyanti tattvam asi nāthaiḥ rathaiḥ iti rūḍhaḥ yasmāt tvam eva bhava sāgara saṃplutānām ānanda bhāṇḍa cita madhya ga pāna pātram vidyādhara amara muni indra gaṇa abhijuṣṭam prāpnoti asau padam atīndriyam indumauleḥ prāpnoti asau padam atīndriyam indumauleḥ bandhūn hemahastirathadānavidhivarṇanam nāma ekonanavati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca viśvacakram iti khyātam sarva pāpa vināśanam tasya api ardham kaniṣṭham syāt viśvacakram udāhṛtam tatas cakram bhramat nemi aṣṭaka āvṛtam nābhi padme sthitam viṣṇum yoga ārūḍham caturbhujam madhya sthe devī aṣṭaka samāvṛtam dvitīya āvaraṇe tadvat pūrvatas jalaśāyinam atriḥ bhṛguḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca brahmā kaśyapaḥ eva ca matsyaḥ kūrmaḥ varāhaḥ ca nārasiṃhaḥ utha vāmanaḥ rāmaḥ rāmaḥ ca kṛṣṇaḥ ca buddhaḥ kalkī ca te daśa tṛtīya āvaraṇe gaurī manubhiḥ yutā caturthe dvādaśa ādityāḥ vedāḥ catvāraḥ eva ca pañcame pañca bhūtāni rudrāḥ ca ekādaśa eva tu lokapāla aṣṭakam ṣaṣṭhe diś mātaṃgāḥ tathā eva ca astrāṇi sarvāṇi maṅgalāni ca kārayet antarā antarataḥ devān vinyaset aṣṭame punar daśa hastam tatas kṛtvā patākā toraṇa anvitam maṇḍapam kuṇḍam ekam ca kārayet vastra saṃyutam bhū ajina upari gatam viśva cakram vidhānāt tathā aṣṭādaśa dhānyāni rasāḥ ca lavaṇa ādayaḥ pūrṇa kumbha aṣṭakam tadvat vastra mālya vibhūṣitam phalāni dāpayet pārśve pañca varṇa vitānakam adhivāsya tatas cakram paścāt homam samācaret cātuścaraṇikān tatra brāhmaṇān caturaḥ atha vā homam kuryuḥ jita ātmānaḥ vastra ābharaṇa bhūṣitāḥ cakra pratiṣṭhitānām tu surāṇām homaḥ iṣyate tatas maṅgala śabdena snātaḥ śukla ambaraḥ gṛhī homa adhivāsana aṃte tu gṛhīta kusuma añjaliḥ imam uccārayan mantram kṛtvā tat tris pradakṣiṇam namaḥ viśvaṃbharāya iti viśva cakra ātmane namaḥ paramānanda rūpī tvam pāhi naḥ pāpa kardamāt tejaḥ mayam idam yasmāt sadā paśyanti sūrayaḥ hṛdi tatra guṇa atītam viśvacakram namāmi aham anyonya ādhāra rūpeṇa praṇamāmi sthitau iha āyudham ca adhivāsaḥ ca tasmāt śāntim dadātu me yad bhagavant lokam āsādya catur bāhu nara āvṛtam praṇamet vā atha yaḥ kṛtvā viśvacakram dine dine tasmāt cakram sadā kāryam dhāryam ca sva gṛhe naraiḥ jam atha sudarśana tām prayāti śatroḥ madana sudarśana tām ca kāminībhyaḥ sa sudarśana keśava anurūpaḥ kanaka sudarśana dāna dagdha pāpaḥ kṛta guru duritaḥ api ṣoḍaśa ara pravitaraṇāt pravara ākṛtiḥ murāreḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde viśvacakradānavidhivarṇanam nāma navati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhuvana pratiṣṭhā varṇanam uvāca pratiṣṭhā śāśvatā kena dānena madhusūdana sat gatim ca tathā yānti sarve pitṛ pitāmahāḥ saṃtatiḥ ca akṣayā loke vibhavaḥ ca api puṣkalaḥ sthāpanāt sarva devānām katham syāt yadunandana tat ācakṣva mahābhāgaiḥ dānena niyamena vā śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca sādhu pṛṣṭam tvayā rājñ lokānām upakārakam śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ bhūtvā guhyam paramam uttamam bhuvanānām samāsena pratiṣṭhām kathayāmi te deva asurāḥ tathā nāgāḥ gandharvāḥ yakṣa rākṣasāḥ pretāḥ piśācāḥ bhūtāḥ ca sthāpitāḥ syuḥ na saṃśayaḥ sapta hastam paṭam kṛtvā catur asram su saṃhatam abhinna aṅgam dṛḍham śuddham śuddha sphaṭika varcasam cāturvarṇyakam ānīya vicitram citrakarmaṇi yuvānam vyādhi rahitam bhavyam citra karam śubham saṃpūjayitvā yatnena divya vāsas vibhūṣaṇaiḥ śaṅkha bherī ninādaiḥ ca gīta maṅgala nisvanaiḥ puṇya aha jaya ghoṣaiḥ ca brāhmaṇān pūjyet tatas mahā bhūṣaṇaiḥ tathā diśāsu lokapālānām puras aṣṭau sura saṃyutāḥ sapta dvīpavatī pṛthvī sapta ca eva kula acalāḥ sāgarāḥ sapta ca atra eva nadyaḥ hradāḥ sarāṃsi ca pātālāḥ sapta ca atra eva sapta svarga vibhūtayaḥ brahma viṣṇu śiva ādīnām bhuvanāni yathākramam deva dānava gandharvāḥ yakṣa rākṣasa pannagāḥ suparṇa ādyāḥ ca vihagāḥ nāgāḥ ca airāvata ādayaḥ evaṃvidham paṭam rājñ kārayitvā su śobhanam tat tejasā vṛtam bhūyas mahatā ugreṇa sarvatas tejaḥ tat vāyunā vāyuḥ ākāśena samāvṛtaḥ bhūtādinā tathā ākāśam bhūtādiḥ mahantā tathā avyaktena mahant ca eva vyāptaḥ vai śuddhi lakṣaṇaḥ avyaktam tamasā vyāptam tamaḥ ca rajasā tathā evam āvaraṇa upetam brahmāṇḍam akhilam nṛpaiḥ puruṣeṇa āvṛtam sarvam sa bāhya abhyantaram tathā etat sarvam paṭa stham tu kṛtvā citra mayam sudhīḥ pūjayet yena vidhinā tat samāsena mama śṛṇu puratas maṇḍapam tasya vicitram kārayet budhaḥ tatra kuṇḍāni catvāri catur asrāṇi kārayet yajña upakaraṇa upetau vastra ābharaṇa bhūṣitau paṭe sthitānām devānām mantraiḥ oṃkāra pūrvakaiḥ yajamānaḥ tatas snātaḥ sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitaḥ mad kuryāt pūjām agre paṭasya tu brahmāṇḍa udara vartīni bhuvanāni caturdaśa tāni saṃnihitāni atra pūjitāni bhavantu mama brahmā viṣṇuḥ tathā rudraḥ hi ādityāḥ vasavaḥ tathā pūjitāḥ su pratiṣṭhāḥ ca bhavantu satatam mama evam paṭam tam saṃpūjya kṛtvā ca eva pradakṣiṇam bhakṣyān nānāvidhān ca eva naivedyam tatra dāpayet śaṅkha tūrya ninādaiḥ ca jāgaram kārayet tatas punar prabhāte vimale snātvā śuciḥ alaṃkṛtaḥ pūrva ukta vidhinā anena punar saṃpūjya tam paṭam tatas kṛtvā go śatena vicakṣaṇaḥ athavā go yugam dadyāt ekaikaḥ syāt alaṃkṛtam upānahau tathā chatram gṛha upakaraṇāni ca yat yat iṣṭatamam kiṃcid sarvam dadyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ tatas prakalpayet yānam nāga yuktam alaṃkṛtam alābhe vāji saṃyuktam patākā dhvaja śālinam sahasram dakṣiṇām dattvā tatas tu āropayet paṭam brāhmaṇam vā rathena atha nayet devālayam budhaḥ tatrastham sthāpayet nītvā gandhaiḥ puṣpaiḥ ca dhūpayet pūjā tatra api mahatī kartavyā bhūtim icchatā candrātapattram ghaṇṭām ca dhvaja ādyam dāpayet sudhīḥ yathāśaktyā ca rāja indraiḥ gurum gaurava yantritaḥ abhyarcya dakṣiṇābhiḥ ca brāhmaṇān ca visarjayet dīna andha kṛpaṇānām ca bhojanam ca api a vāritam kuryāt naraḥ vā nārī vā pratiṣṭhām sārvalaukikām kulam ca tāritam tena sat putreṇa yudhiṣṭhira yāvat ca devatāgāre paṭaḥ tiṣṭhati pūjitaḥ dānena kīrtiḥ yāvanti martya lokeṣu gīyate vaset puṇya kṣayāt iha abhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ putra pautra anvitaḥ śrīmān dīrgha āyūḥ ati dhārmikaḥ daśa janmāni rāja indraiḥ jāyamānaḥ punar punar śrūyate ca purā rājā rajiḥ nāma mahā balaḥ cakravartī dṛḍha matiḥ jita ariḥ vijita indriyaḥ mahā balam sarvam dattavan tridivam punar mahā indrāya mahābhāga sarvam nihata kaṇṭakam sa kadācid sabhā madhye yāvat āste mahī patiḥ tāvat tatra ājagāma atha pulastyaḥ brahmanaḥ sutaḥ hi śiṣyaiḥ parivṛtaḥ śrīmān veda vedāṅga pāragaiḥ datta arghaḥ tu tadā tena upaviṣṭaḥ varāsane śuśubhe parayā lakṣmyā pitāmahaḥ iva aparaḥ atha tam pūjayitvā agre madhuparkeṇa pārthivaḥ papraccha vinaya upetaḥ kathām ātma udbhavām nṛpaḥ hrīḥ iyam mama dharma jña tejaḥ ca avyāhatam bhuvi balam puṣṭim dhanam dhānyam putra pautram tathā uttamam śṛṇu rājñ kathām etām ātmīyām su manoharām kathā iyam abhinirvṛttā śṛṇuṣva aiśvarya varddhinīm māsīḥ tvam vaiśya jātīyaḥ vārāṇasyām nara uttamaiḥ dāna āśrayāḥ bahuvidhāḥ vratāni vividhāni ca prasaṅgeṇa kadācid ca pratiṣṭhā bhauvanā tvayā śrutā rāja indraiḥ vidhivat kṛtā ca vahu puṇya dā aparāṇi api janmāni sapta rājā bhaviṣyasi paścāt yogi kule bhūtvā nirvāṇam samavāpsyasi etat te sarvam ākhyātam yat mām paripṛcchasi nārī vā puruṣaḥ vā api pratiṣṭhām bhauvanām tu yaḥ iti uktvā saḥ muniḥ tatra rājānam śaṃsita vrataḥ yayau adarśanam tatra sūrye vaiśvānara upamaḥ mayā iyam adhunā te dāna niṣṭhā tat na asti yat na kurute bhuvana pratiṣṭhā tat iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde bhuvanapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam nāma ekanavati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca śrutaḥ dāna vidhiḥ sarvaḥ prasādāt te nakṣatra dānasya idānīm dāna kalpam pracakṣva me śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam devakyāḥ ca eva saṃvādam deva ṛṣeḥ nāradasya ca dvārakām anusaṃjātam nāradam devadarśanam papraccha idam tathā praśnam devakī dharma darśiṇī tasyāḥ saṃpṛcchamānāyāḥ devarṣiḥ nāradaḥ tatas ha vidhivat sarvam yat tat śṛṇu viśām pate nakṣatra yogam vakṣyāmi sarva pātaka nāśanam kṛttikāsu mahābhāga pāyasena sa sarpiṣā saṃtarpya brāhmaṇān sādhūn lokān prāpnoti anuttamān rohiṇyām pāṇḍava śreṣṭhaiḥ māṃsaiḥ annena sarpiṣā saṃtarpya brāhmaṇān sādhūn lokān prāpnoti anuttamān tad dānam dātavyam ānṛṇya artham dvijātaye mārdrāyām kṛsarām dattvā tila miśrā samāhitaḥ pūṣān punarvasau dattvā ghṛta pūrṇān su pācitān yaśasvī rūpa saṃpannaḥ sat janaḥ jāyate kule puṣye tu kāñcanam dattvā kṛtam vā akṛtam eva vā bhāsvaram tathā raupyam yaḥ su rūpam prayacchati maghāsu tila pūrṇāni vardhamānāni mānavaḥ pradāya paśumān ca eva putravān ca prajāyate phālgunī pūrva samaye vaḍabām dvija puṃgave dattvā puṇya kṛtān lokān prāpnoti sura sevitān uttarā phālgunī yoge dattvā sauvarṇa paṅkajam haste tu hastinam dattvā kāñcanam śaktitas kṛtam yāti asau śakra sadanam vara vāraṇa dhūrgataḥ citrāsu vṛṣabham dattvā puṇyānām puṇyam uttamam svātiṣu ca dhanam dattvā yat abhīṣṭam iha ātmanaḥ prāpnoti ca śubhān lokān iha loke mahat yaśaḥ mahā rāja dhuraṃdhara vibhūṣitam sa upaskaram ca śakaṭam sa dhānyam vastra saṃvṛtam dattvā prīṇāti sa pituḥ pretya ca ānantyam aśnute na ca durgāṇi avāpnoti raurava ādīni mānavaḥ dattvā yatheṣṭam viprebhyaḥ gatim iṣṭām sa gacchati dattvā prāvaraṇāni ca svarge varṣa śatam sāgram āste sura gaṇaiḥ vṛtaḥ tathā kālaśākam ca viprebhyaḥ dattvā martyaḥ sa mūlakam iti ca gacchati mūle mūla phalam dattvā brāhmaṇebhyaḥ samāhitaḥ pitṝn prīṇayate sarvān gatim prāpnoti anuttamām atha pūrvāsu aṣāḍhāsu dadhi pātrāṇi mānavaḥ putra pautraiḥ parivṛtaḥ paśumān dhanavān tathā uda matham sa sarpiṣkam prabhūta madhu phāṇitam dattvā uttarāsu aṣāḍhāsu sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt mad pustakam śreṣṭham pradadāti iha yaḥ naraḥ sva icchayā yāti yānena sarvān lokān na saṃśayaḥ ca tathā śatabhiṣā yoge dattvā sa agaru candanam prāpnoti apsarasām loke pretya gandhān ca śobhanān pūrvabhādrapada yoge rājamāṣān pradāpayet pitṝn prīṇāti sakalān pretya ca ānantyam aśnute tasya upadohanām dhenum revatyām yaḥ prayacchati sa pretya kāmān ādāya dātāram upagacchati ratham aśva samāyuktam dattvā aśvinyām narottamaiḥ hasti aśva ratha saṃpūrṇe varcasvī jāyate kule gāvaḥ prabhūtāḥ prāpnoti naraḥ pretya yaśaḥ tathā iti eṣa dakṣiṇa uddeśaḥ proktaḥ nakṣatra yogāt sarva pāpa praśamanaḥ sarva upadrava nāśanaḥ vittam śraddhā ca rāja indraiḥ kāraṇam ca atra kathyate tat yaḥ dadāti vibhave sati sādhu vṛtte kim tena pārthaiḥ na kṛtam bhavati iha loke iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde nakṣatradānavidhivarṇanam nāma dvinavati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca tithi dānam idānīm te kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira mānasam vācikam ca api karma jam yat agham bhavet sarvam praśamam āyāti dānena anena pāṇḍavaiḥ tathā śrāvaṇe kārttike caitre vaiśākhe phālgune tathā ca tīrthe devālaye goṣṭhe gṛhe vā niyata ātmavān yat dadāti nara śreṣṭhaḥ tat ānantyāya kalpate sauvarṇam aravindam ca kārayitvā aṣṭa pattrakam puṣpaiḥ dhūpaiḥ pūjayitvā viprāya pratipāda yet īpsitān labhate kāmān niṣkāmaḥ brahma sātmya tām vahnim pūjya dvitīyāyām bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar iti kramāt tila ājyena śatam hutvā dattvā pūrṇāhutim tatas tu sauvarṇam sthāpayet tāmra bhājane guḍa ājya pūrite rājñ toya pūrṇa ghaṭa upari yāvat jīva kṛtāt pāpāt mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ mṛtaḥ vahni puram yāti prāha idam nāradaḥ muniḥ tṛtīyāyām mahā rāja rādhām svarṇa mayīm śubhām jīrakam kaṭukam ca eva guḍam pārtheṣu dāpayet puṣpa dhūpaiḥ sa naivedyaiḥ pūjayitvā dvijātaye prāsādāḥ yatra sauvarṇāḥ nadyaḥ pāyasa kardamāḥ gandharva apsarasaḥ yatra tatra te yānti mānavāḥ nārī vā tad guṇaiḥ yuktā bhavati iha na saṃśayaḥ caturthyām vāraṇam haimam palāt ūrdhvam su śobhanam kāmayitvā aṅkuśa yutam tila droṇa upari nyaset tatas tu brāhmaṇe dadyāt gaṇeśaḥ prīyatām iti kārya ārambheṣu sarveṣu tasya vighnam na jāyate vāraṇāḥ sapta janmāni bhavanti mada vihvalāḥ kṣīra ājya pattra madhya stham pūjayitvā pradāpayet dvijam saṃpūjya vāsobhiḥ praṇipatya kṣamāpayet prāyaścittam tathā proktam nāga daṣṭasya śambhunā madhyamāyām śakti samopetam kumāram śikhivāhanam tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat taṇḍulena atha śikhare vāsobhiḥ pūjya bhaktyāḥ madhyamāyām skandam yathāśakti kṛtvā skandam hiraṇmayam namaskṛtya tatas dadyāt brāhmaṇāya kuṭumbine iha bhūtim parām prāpya pretya svarge mahīyate mad brāhmaṇa tām eti brāhmaṇaḥ brahma loka tām saptamyām bhāskaram pūjya brāhmaṇān aśvam uttamam dadyāt alaṃkṛta grīvam sa paryāṇam sa dakṣiṇam gandharvāḥ tuṣṭim āyānti datte aśve samalaṃkṛte aṣṭamyām vṛṣabham śvetam avyaṅga aṅgam dhuraṃdharam sita vastra yuga channam ghaṇṭā ābharaṇa bhūṣitam dadyāt praṇamya viprāya prīyatām vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ pradakṣiṇam tatas kṛtvā ā dvāra antam anuvrajet vṛṣa skandhe pratiṣṭhanti bhuvanāni caturdaśa tasmāt vṛṣabha dānena dattā bhavati bhāratī navamyām kāñcanam siṃham kārayitvā sva śaktitas muktāphala aṣṭaka yutam nīla vastra avaguṇṭhitam dadyāt devīm anusmṛtya duṣṭa daitya nibarhaṇām dvijāti pravarāya ittham sarvān kāmān samaśnute yāntāra vana durgeṣu caura vyālā kule pathini hiṃsakāḥ tam na hiṃsanti dānasya asya prabhāvāt mṛtaḥ devī puram yāti pūjyamānaḥ sura asuraiḥ puṇya kṣayāt iha abhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ daśamyām nṛpa śārdūlaiḥ daśa āśāḥ svarṇa nirmitāḥ lavaṇe ca guḍe kṣīre niṣpāveṣu tileṣu ca anena vidhinā yaḥ tu pumān strī vā atha vā punar nirvāpayati rāja indra tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu sakalāḥ tasya sarva āśāḥ yāḥ kāścid manasā icchitāḥ ekādaśyām garutmantam kārayitvā hiraṇmayam yathāśaktyā tāmra pātre ghṛtasya upari pūjitam pañcāgni abhirate vipre purāṇa jñe viśeṣataḥ gām vṛṣam mahiṣīm hemam saptadhānyāni aja āvikam puṣpāṇi ca vicitrāṇi gandhān ca uccāvacān bahūn yathāśaktyā melayitvā vastraiḥ ācchādayet navaiḥ dvādaśyām dvādaśa etāni brāhmaṇebhyaḥ nivedayet ekasya vā mahā rājaiḥ yat phalam tat niśāmaya iha kīrtim parām prāpya bhuktvā bhogān yathā īpsitān tatas viṣṇupuram yāti sevyamānaḥ apsaroṇaṇaiḥ karma kṣayāt iha abhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ yajña yājī dānapatiḥ jīvet ca śaradām śatam snāpayet brāhmaṇān ca atra trayodaśyām trayodaśa bhojayīta su miṣṭa annam dakṣiṇām vinivedayet yathāśaktyā hema khaṇḍān dharma ātmā prīyatām iti dharmarājāya kālāya citraguptāya daṇḍine mṛtyave kṣaya rūpāya antakāya yamāya ca mahiṣa sthāya devāya nāmāni iha trayodaśa yaḥ karoti mahā rājaiḥ pūjām etām manoramām yama mārga gataḥ paścāt duḥkham na āpnoti asau pumān puṇya kṣayāt iha abhyetya saḥ sukhī nīrujaḥ bhavet mahiṣam su śubham kumbham caturdaśyām payas bhṛtam tam karṣakeṇa saṃyuktam hemnaḥ sat vastra saṃyutam ghaṇṭā ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyam vṛṣabhena samanvitam yaḥ dadyāt śiva bhaktāya brāhmaṇāya kuṭumbine vṛṣam dattvā nara śreṣṭhaiḥ śiva loke mahīyate paurṇamāsyām vṛṣotsargam kārayitvā vidhānāt dadyāt viprāya saṃkalpya vāsa ulaṃkāra bhūṣaṇaiḥ kṣīroda arṇava saṃbhūtaiḥ trailokya aṅgaṇa dīpakaiḥ umā pateḥ śiras ratna śivam yaccha namaḥ namaḥ apsarobhiḥ parivṛtaḥ yāvat ābhūtasaṃplavam te brahma viṣṇu bhuvaneṣu sukham vihṛtya yānti ekatām saha śivena na saṃśayaḥ mama iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde tithidānavarṇanam nāma trinavati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mad kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira dharaṇyai yat purā proktam varāha vapuṣā mayā mahā pāpa ādi doṣa ghnam pūjitam dharma sattamaiḥ deyam saṃkramaṇe bhānoḥ grahaṇe dvādaśīṣu atha yajña utsava vivāheṣu duḥsvapna adbhuta darśane tadā eva dāna kālaḥ syāt adhruvam jīvitam yatas kurukṣetra ādi tīrtheṣu gaṅgā ādyāsu nadīṣu ca pureṣu ca pavitreṣu araṇyeṣu vaneṣu ca deyam purāṇa vidhinā brāhmaṇāya kuṭumbine kuśaiḥ āstīrya tām pārthaiḥ praṇava akṣara maṃtritaiḥ upariṣṭāt tilaiḥ teṣām varāham parikalpayet drauṇaiḥ caturbhiḥ saṃpūrṇam tad ardhena atha vā punar māḍhakena atha kurvīta vitta śāṭhyam na kārayet rājatām kārayet daṃṣṭām padmarāga vibhūṣitām śaṅkham ca sthāpayet pārśve vanamālām hiraṇmayām puṣpaiḥ vā kārayet vidvāḥ pādau rūpya mayau tathā daṃṣṭra agra lagna vasudhām sauvarṇām kārayet śubhām sarva dhānya rasa upetām vastra alaṃkṛta vigrahām romarājim kuśaiḥ kṛtvā gandha puṣpaiḥ atha arcayet nava graha makhaḥ kāryaḥ homaḥ ca atra tilaiḥ smṛtaḥ mahā īśa praduṣṭāni sarva pāpa phalāni ca marda marda mahā daṃṣṭraiḥ bhāsvat kanaka kakuṇḍalaiḥ śaṅkha cakra asi hastāya hiraṇya akṣa antakāya ca haṃṣṭra uddhṛta dharā bhṛte trayī mūrtimate namaḥ tatas tam brāhmaṇe dadyāt vastra alaṃkāra bhūṣitam evam dattvā mahīnāthaiḥ varāham sarva kāma dam yathāśaktyā samuddhṛtā varāhena vasuṃdharā brāhmaṇa kṣatriya viśām strīṇām śūdra janasya ca etat sādhāraṇam dānam śaiva vaiṣṇava yoginām viprāya veda vidvase nṛvarāha rūpam dattvā tila amala suvarṇa mayam sa vastram iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛpṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde varāhadānavidhivarṇanam nāma caturnavati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca rudreṇa yat purā proktam nāradāya mahātmane meroḥ pradānam vakṣyāmi daśadhā punar eva te purāṇeṣu ca vedeṣu yajñeṣu adhyayaneṣu ca tasmāt vidhānam vakṣyāmi parvatānām anukramāt prathamaḥ dhānyaśailaḥ syat dvitīyaḥ lavaṇācalaḥ paścamaḥ tilaśailaḥ syāt ṣaṣṭhaḥ kārpāsaparvataḥ saptamaḥ ghṛtaśailaḥ ca rasaśailaḥ tathā aṣṭamaḥ rājataḥ navamaḥ tadvat daśamaḥ śarkarācalaḥ vakṣye vidhānam eteṣām yathāvat anupūrvaśas ha śukla pakṣe tṛtīyāyām uparāge śaśi kṣaye śuklāyām pañcadaśyām vā puṇya ṛkṣe vā pradhānatas dhānyaśaila ādayaḥ deyāḥ yathāśāstram vijānatā tīrthe vā āyatane vā api goṣṭhe vā saṃgame api vā prāc udak pravaṇam tatra prāc mukham vā vidhānāt āstīrya madhyamaḥ pañcaśatikaḥ kaniṣṭhaḥ syāt tribhiḥ śataiḥ yaḥ syāt ca gārutmata nīlaratnaiḥ saumyena vaiḍūrya saroja rāgaiḥ hrīkhaṇḍa khaṇḍaiḥ abhitas latā anvitaḥ śuddha śilā talaḥ syāt brahmā atha viṣṇuḥ bhagavān purāriḥ divākaraḥ api atra hiraṇmayaḥ syāt mad anyaḥ ca surācalaḥ syāt pūrveṇa kṛṣṇāni ca dakṣiṇena paścāt atha kesarāṇi raktāni ca eva uttaratas dalāni raupyāḥ mahendra pramukhāḥ tathā aṣṭau saṃsthāpayet lokapatīn krameṇa manorama phala āliḥ ca samantataḥ syāt manorama āmālya vilepana ādyā ittham niveśya amara śailam api unmanāḥ tu viṣkambha gaṇān krameṇa turīya bhāgena caturdiśam ca saṃsthāpayet puṣpa vilepana ādyān kāmena kāñcana mayena virājamānam ākārayet kusuma vastra vilepana āḍhyam kṣīra aruṇoda sarasā atha tathā vanena raupyeṇa śakti ghaṭitena virājamānam saṃsthāpya tam vipula śailam atha uttareṇa śailam supārśvam api māṣa mayam su vapram rātrau ca jāgaram anuddhata gīta tūryaiḥ āvāhanam ca kathayāmi śiloccayānām tvam eva bhagavant īśaḥ brahmā viṣṇuḥ divākaraḥ mūrta amūrta param bījam atas pāhi sanātanaiḥ yasmāt tvam lokapālānām viśvamūrteḥ ca mandiram keśava arka vasūnām ca tasmāt śāntim prayaccha me tasmāt mām uddhara aśeṣaiḥ duḥkha saṃsāra sāgarāt yasmāt cūḍāmaṇiḥ jambūdvīpe tvam gandhamādanaḥ hiraṇya maya pāṣāṇaḥ tasmāt śāntim prayaccha mama supārśva rājase nityam atas śrīḥ akṣayā astu mama evam āmantrya tān sarvān prabhāte vimale punar śeṣān ca pañca tān dadyāt ṛtvigbhyaḥ kramaśas nṛpaiḥ gāvaḥ deyāḥ catustriṃśat athavā daśa bhārata hi śaktitas sapta vā aṣṭau vā evam dadyāt aśaktimān parvatānām aśeṣāṇām eṣaḥ eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ grahānām lokapālānām brahma ādīnām agaiḥ saha sva mantreṇa eva sarveṣu homaḥ śaileṣu śasyate vidhānam sarva śailānām kramaśas śṛṇu bhārataiḥ dāna kāleṣu ye mantrāḥ parvateṣu ca yat phalam annam brahma yatas proktam anne prāṇāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ apsaras gaṇa gandharvaiḥ ākīrṇena virājatā vimānena divaḥ pṛṣṭhe sa yāti ṛṣi sevitaḥ puṇya kṣaye rāja rājyam āpnoti iha na saṃśayaḥ dhānyācalam kanaka vṛkṣa virājamānam viṣkambha parvata yutam sura siddha juṣṭam iti śrī bhaviṣye purāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde dhānyaparvatadānavidhivarṇanam nāma paṃcanavati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi lavaṇācalam uttamam uttamaḥ ṣoḍaśa droṇaḥ kartabyaḥ lavaṇācalaḥ vitta hīnaḥ yathāśaktyā droṇāt ardham tu kārayet caturtha aṃśena viṣayān parvatān kārayet pṛthak brahma ādīnām ca sarvadā śirāṃsi kāma deva ādīn tadvat tatra niveśayet kuryāt jāgaram atra api dāna mantrān nibodha mama saubhāgya rasa saṃbhūtaḥ yatas ayam lavaṇorasaḥ dāna ātmaka tvena ca mām pāhi pāpāt naga uttamaiḥ tasmāt anna rasāḥ sarve na utkṛṣṭāḥ lavaṇam vinā yasmāt parvata rūpeṇa pāhi saṃsāra sāgarāt puṇya kṣayāt iha abhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ putra pautraiḥ parivṛtaḥ jīvet ca śaradām śatam mahat kurvanti ye lavaṇaiḥ parvata sampradānam saṃprāpnuvanti divi te su mahat vimānam tatra apsaras gaṇa sura asura sevyamānāḥ tiṣṭhanti hṛṣṭa manasaḥ divi vṛddha mānāḥ na iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde lavaṇaparvatadānavidhivarṇanam nāma ṣaṇṇavati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca tribhiḥ bhāraiḥ kaniṣṭhaḥ syāt tad ardhena alpakaḥ mataḥ tadvat āmantraṇam pūjām hema vṛkṣa sura arcanam viṣkambha parvatāḥ tatra sarāṃsi vana devatāḥ homam jāgaraṇam tadvat lokapāla adhivāsanam yathā deveṣu viśvātmā pravaraḥ ayam janārdanaḥ sāmavedaḥ tu vedānām mahādevaḥ tu yoginām praṇavaḥ sarva mantrāṇām nārīṇām pārvatī yathā tathā rasāṇām pravaraḥ sadā ca ikṣurasaḥ mataḥ mama tasmāt parām lakṣmīm prayaccha guḍaparvata sura asurāṇām sarveṣām nāga yakṣa ṛkṣa yantriṇām ca api pāhi sarvadā saṃpūjyamānaḥ gandharvaiḥ gauṃrī loke mahīyate punar kalpa śata ante tu saptadvīpā adhipaḥ bhavet mad āyus ārogya saṃpannaḥ śatrubhiḥ ca aparājitaḥ mahābhāgā āsīt rājñī mahābhāgā sulabhā nāma suvratā maruttasya priyā bhāryā rūpa yauvana śālinī tasya bhāryā śatāni āsan sapta rājñaḥ mahātmanaḥ tāḥ dāsyaḥ iva vākyāni kuryuḥ tasyāḥ sadā eva hi atha kālena mahatā durvāsāḥ ṛṣi sattamaḥ tad abhyāśam bhramamāṇaḥ yadṛcchayā tasya atha satkriyām kṛttvā dattvā ca argham yathāvidhi uvāca śṛṇuṣva avahitā subhrūḥ ātma vṛttam purātanam hanta sarvam subhage te vṛttam aśeṣatas tvam āsīḥ vaiśyaiḥ mahiṣī girivraja pure purā dhārmikā satya śīlā ca pati vrata parāyaṇā tatra śrutaḥ tvayā vatse brāhmaṇānām samīpatas purā dāna vidhiḥ kṛtsnaḥ sthitayā pati saṃnidhau tasya dānasya māhātmyāt tvayā bhuktam varānane rājyam janmāni catvāri niḥsapatnam an ākulam bhūtam ca evam avaśyam ca guḍaparvata dāna jam kathā te varārohe yāsye tvam bhava gatim ca śāśvatām lebhe saubhāgyam rūpam eva ca dānam etat praśaṃsanti strīṇām rāja viśeṣataḥ pūrva uktam ca phalam prāpya kṛtakṛtyaḥ abhijāyate prati iṣṭa sundara darī sravaṇa ākulena gandharva siddha vanitā śata sevitena ti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde guḍācaladānavidhivarṇanam nāma saptanavati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca yasya prasādāt bhavanam vairicyam yāti mānavaḥ uttamaḥ pala sāhasraḥ madhyamaḥ pañcabhiḥ śataiḥ dadyāt eka palāt ūrdhvam yathāśaktyā vicakṣaṇaḥ sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra devaḥ maheśvaraḥ tatra varṣa śatam tiṣṭhet tatas yāti parām gatim hemācalāt param dānam na ca anyat vidyate kvacid haimam mahīndra maṇi śṛṅga śataiḥ upetam loka adhipa aṣṭaka yutam sahitam muni indraiḥ yaḥ śaktimān vitarati iha gaṇeśa loke kalpam kumāra vat asau śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi tilaśailam vidhānāt tilāḥ pavitram atulam pavitrāṇām ca pāvanam madhu kaiṭabha nāmnau āstām diti sutau purā madhunā saha tatra abhūt yuddham viṣṇoḥ anāratam sahasram kila varṣāṇām na vyajīvata dānavaḥ tatra svedaḥ mahān āsīt kruddhasya atha gadābhṛtaḥ patitaḥ ca dharā pṛṣṭhe kaṇaśas lavaśas tathā samuttasthuḥ tilāḥ māṣāḥ kuśāḥ ca kuru nandana hataḥ ca hariṇā yuddhe sa madhuḥ balinām varaḥ medasā tasya vasudhā rañjitā sakalā tadā medinī iti tatas saṃjñām avāpa acala dhāriṇī ūcuḥ tvayā dhṛtam jagant deva tvayā sṛṣṭam tathā eva ca tasmāt tvad aṅgāt jātāḥ tilāḥ santu jagat hitāḥ na hi daityāḥ piśācāḥ vā vipram kurvanti bhārataiḥ śrutvā surāṇām tat vākyam viṣṇuḥ tān idam abravīt tilāḥ bhavantu rakṣā artham trayāṇām jagantām api tu devānām saṃpradadyāt tila udakam bhakṣe pitṝṇām ca snātvā śraddhā samanvitaḥ tilaiḥ sapta aṣṭabhiḥ vā api samarpita jala añjaliḥ tilaiḥ abhyukṣitam sarvam pavitram syāt na saṃśayaḥ pradadyāt dvijamukhyāya dānam tasya akṣayam bhavet tribhiḥ kaniṣṭhaḥ rāja indraiḥ tilaśailaḥ prakīrtitaḥ pūrvavat ca aparam sarvam viṣkambha parvata ādikam dānam annam pravakṣyāmi yathāvat nṛpa sattamaiḥ tilāḥ kuśāḥ ca māṣāḥ ca tasmāt śam naḥ bhavatu iha saḥ vaiṣṇavam padam yāti punarāvṛtti durlabham puṇya kṣayāt iha abhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ nārī vā tasya patnī syāt rūpa saubhāgya saṃyutā mad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad puṇyasya samam phalam avāpnuyāt hi dānam tilācala samam yadi ca anyat asti tad bhūtaiḥ śāstra nicayam pravicārya buddhyā yaiḥ varjitā pitṛ kriyā na ca homa karma teṣām pradānam iha kim na karoti śarma iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde tilācaladānavidhivarṇanam nāma ekonadviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi kārpāsācalam uttamam paramam sarva dānānām priyam sarva divaukasām deśa kālau samāsādya dhanam śraddhām ca yatnatas pūrva uktena vidhānena kṛtvā sarvam aśeṣatas bhāreṇa alpa dhanaḥ dadyāt vitta śāṭhya vivarjitaḥ prabhātāyām tu śarvaryām imam mantram udīrayet tvam eva āvaraṇam yasmāt lokānām iha sarvadā rūpavān subhagaḥ vāgmī śrīmān atula vikramaḥ pañca janmāni nārī vā jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ nāma dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi ghṛtācalam anuttamam tejas amṛta mayam divyam mahāpātaka nāśanam pañcāśat ghṛta kumbhānām uttamaḥ syāt ghṛtācalaḥ alpa vittaḥ tu kurvīta yathāśaktyā vidhānāt śāleya taṇḍulānām ca kumbhān ca parivinyaset tat tat tat tat tathā anuccaiḥ yathāśobham vidhānāt veṣṭayet śukla vāsobhiḥ ikṣu daṇḍa phala ādikaiḥ prabhātāyām tu gurave vinivedayet mantreṇa anena kaunteyaiḥ tat śṛṇuṣva vadāmi te saṃyogāt ghṛtam utpannam yasmāt amṛta tejase tasmāt ghṛtācalaḥ ca asmāt prīyatām mama śaṃkaraḥ pāhi mahāpātaka yuktaḥ api lokam āyāti śāṃkaram haṃsa sārasa saṃyukte kiṅkiṇī jāla mālite viharet pitṛbhiḥ sārdham yāvat ābhūtasaṃplavam hi ājya acalam pracala kuṇḍala sundarībhiḥ saṃsevyamānam iha ye vitaranti martyāḥ nāma eka adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi ratnācalam anuttamam yad pradānāt naraḥ yāti lokān saptarṣi sevitān madhyamaḥ pañcaśatikaḥ tri śatena avaraḥ smṛtaḥ caturtha aṃśena viṣkambha parvatāḥ syuḥ samantataḥ pūrveṇa vajra gomedaiḥ dakṣiṇena indranīlakaiḥ puṣparāga yutaḥ kāryaḥ vidvobhiḥ gandhamādanaḥ vaiḍūrya vidrumaiḥ paścāt sāvitraḥ vipula acalaḥ tadvat āvāhanam kṛtvā vṛkṣān devān ca kāñcanām pūrvavat guru ṛtvigbhyām imān mantrān udīrayet yathā deva gaṇāḥ sarve sarva ratneṣu avasthitāḥ yasmāt ratna pradānena tuṣṭim eti janārdanaḥ pūjā ratna pradānena tasmāt naḥ pāhi sarvadā sa yāti vaiṣṇavam lokam amara īśvara pūjitam yāvat kalpa śatam sāgram uṣitvā iha narādhipaiḥ rūpa ārogya guṇa upetaḥ saptadvīpā adhipaḥ bhavet brahmahatyā ādikam kiṃcid atra ca amutra vā kṛtam tat sarvam nāśam āyāti giriḥ vajra hataḥ yathā nāma dvayadhikadviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca sahasreṇa palānām tu uttamaḥ rajatācalaḥ aśaktaḥ viṃśateḥ ūrdhvam kārayet bhaktyāḥ sadā viṣkambha parvatān tadvat turīya aṃśena kalpayet pūrvavat rājatān kuryāt mandara ādīn vidhānāt kaladhauta mayān tadvat lokeśān kārayet nṛpaiḥ brahma viṣṇu śiva ādīn ca nitambaḥ atra hiraṇmayaḥ rājatam syāt yat anyeṣām sarvam tat iha kāñcanam śeṣam ca pūrvavat kṛtvā homa jāgaraṇa ādikam ca imam mantram paṭhan dadyāt darbha pāṇiḥ vimatsaraḥ pitṝṇām vallabham yasmāt śarma dam śaṃkarasya ca rajatam pāhi tasmāt naḥ ghorāt saṃsāra sāgarāt gavām ayuta dānasya phalam prāpnoti mānavaḥ soma loke sa gandharva kiṃnara apsarasām gaṇaiḥ pūjyamānaḥ vaset vidvāḥ yāvat ābhūtasaṃplavam yacchanti ye sukṛtinaḥ virajaḥ vi śokam gacchanti te gata malāḥ nṛpa soma lokam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde raupyācaladānavidhivarṇanam nāma tri adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi śarkarācalam uttamam yasya pradānāt viṣṇu arka rudrāḥ tuṣyanti sarvadā aṣṭabhiḥ śarkarā bhāraiḥ uttamaḥ syāt mahā acalaḥ bhāreṇa eva ardha bhāreṇa kuryāt yaḥ ca alpa vittavān viṣkambha parvatān kuryāt turīya aṃśena mānavaḥ mandāraḥ pārijātaḥ ca tṛtīyaḥ kalpapādapaḥ haricandana saṃtānau pūrva paścima bhāgayoḥ niveśyau sarva śaileṣu viśeṣāt śarkarācale jambu vṛkṣa tale kāryaḥ garunmant gandhamādane prāc mukhaḥ hema mūrtiḥ ca haṃsaḥ syāt vipula acale haimī śreyas arthibhiḥ kāryā surabhiḥ dakṣiṇāmukhā dhānya parvata vat sarvam āvāhana makha ādikam bhyaḥ caturaḥ śailān imān mantrān udīrayet saubhāgya amṛta sāraḥ ayam paramaḥ śarkarā yutaḥ yasmāt ānanda kārī tvam bhava śailendraiḥ sarvadā amṛtam pibatām ye tu niṣpetuḥ bhuvi śīkarāḥ devānām tad samutthaḥ asi pāhi naḥ śarkarācala mahāśaila pāhi saṃsāra sāgarāt candra ādi sa arci saṃkāśam adhiruhya anujīvibhiḥ saha eva yānam ātiṣṭhet sa tu viṣṇupade divi tatas kalpa śata ante tu saptadvīpā adhipaḥ bhavet svayam vā kṣāraiḥ lavaṇam aśnīyāt tad anujñayā bhavanti śataśas yena rājānaḥ api parājitāḥ yathā icchā rūpa dhārī ca manuṣyaḥ api apavāritaḥ tasya bhānumatī nāma bhāryā trailokya sundarā lakṣmīḥ iva ca rūpeṇa nirjitā amara sundarā rājñaḥ tasya agra mahiṣī prāṇebhyaḥ api garīyāḥ daśa nārī sahasrāṇām madhye śrīḥ iva rājate vismaya āviṣṭa hṛdayaḥ vasiṣṭham ṛṣi sattamam uvāca purā līlāvatī nāma veśyā śiva parāyaṇā tayā dattaḥ caturdaśyām gurave lavaṇācalaḥ hema vṛkṣa amaraiḥ sārdham yathāvat vidhi pūrvakaḥ śūdraḥ suvarṇakāraḥ tu nāmnā śauṇḍaḥ bhavat tadā bhṛtyaḥ līlāvatī gehe tena haimāḥ vinirmitāḥ ati rūpeṇa saṃpannān ghaṭayitvā tatas hṛdi dharma kārya matim jñātvā na agṛhīta kathaṃcana ujjvālitāḥ tu tad patnyā sauvarṇa amara pādapāḥ līlāvatī gṛhe pārśve paricaryā ca pārthivaiḥ kṛtam tābhyām praharṣeṇa dvija śuśrūṣaṇa ādikam sā tu līlāvatī veśyā kālena mahatā nṛpa na mūlyam ādāt veśyāyāḥ sa bhavān iha sāṃpratam sapta dvīpa patiḥ jātaḥ sūrya ayuta sama prabhaḥ samyak ujjvalitāḥ patnī sā iyam bhānumatī te tasmāt kṛtam tat parikarma rātrau anuddhatābhyām lavaṇācalasya tasmāt ca lokeṣu aparājitaḥ tvam ārogya saubhāgya yutā ca lakṣmīḥ tasmāt tvam api atra vidhāna pūrvam dhānyācala ādīn daśadhā kuruṣva dhānyācala ādīn kramaśas purāreḥ lokam jagāma amara pūjyamānaḥ yaḥ ca adhanaḥ paśyati dīyamānam meroḥ pradānam iha dharma paraḥ manuṣyaḥ śṛṇoti bhaktyā parayā apramādī vikalmaṣaḥ saḥ api divam prayāti yaḥ kuryāt kimu nṛpa puṃgavaiḥ iha samyak śānta ātmā hari hara puram eti jantuḥ nāma catur adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sa rahasyaḥ sa mantraḥ ca prārambha udyāpanaiḥ saha snāna kramaḥ ca viditaḥ vijñātāḥ ca utsavāḥ mayā dāna dharmaḥ tu aśeṣeṇa śrutaḥ sarva artha darśitaḥ ha vratam kathayatā kṛṣṇaiḥ tāḥ tāḥ saṃśritya devatāḥ devānām devakīputra nānātvam saṃpradarśitam vyāsa ādyaiḥ munibhiḥ sarvaiḥ dhyāna yoga parāyaṇaiḥ varṇa āśrama ācāra dharmaḥ kasmāt na atra pradarśitaḥ ete mahā ṛṣayaḥ tuṣṭāḥ śrotu kāmāḥ bhavat vacaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca ca śaknoti vaktum yadi sarasvatī yad yad yad yad iti dharmaḥ prakīrtitaḥ maheśvaraḥ smṛtaḥ sūryaḥ sūryaḥ pāvakaḥ ucyate pāvakaḥ kārttikeya usau kārttikeyaḥ vināyakaḥ gaurī lakṣmī ca sāvitrī śakti bhedāḥ prakīrtitāḥ devam devīm samuddiśya yaḥ karoti vratam naraḥ bahu prakārā vasudhā bhedāḥ sa agni anila ambhasām trayī dharma anugam pārthaiḥ ekam tatra api kāraṇam yaḥ ca eva te mayā khyātaḥ vrata dāna vidhiḥ paraḥ saphalaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ sat ācāravatām satām na punanti vedāḥ yadi api adhītāḥ saha ṣaḍbhiḥ aṅgaiḥ chandāṃsi enam mṛtyu kāle tyajanti nīḍam śakuntāḥ iva jāta pakṣāḥ yathā toyam śva dṛtau vā yathā payaḥ duṣṭam syāt sthāna doṣeṇa vṛtta hīne tathā śubham ācārāt hi cyutaḥ jantuḥ na kulīnaḥ na dhārmikaḥ tat kṛmayaḥ kim na jāyante kusumeṣu sugandhiṣu hīna jāti prasūtaḥ api śauca ācāra samanvitaḥ sarva dharma artha kuśalaḥ sakulīnaḥ satām varaḥ ācāra kuśalaḥ rājñ iha ca amutra nandate uvāca sat ācāram aham kṛṣṇa śrotum icchāmi śāśvatam sarvam dharma mayaḥ kaḥ atra sat ācāraḥ prakīrtitaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca ācāra prabhavaḥ dharmaḥ santaḥ ca ācāra lakṣaṇāḥ sādhūnām ca yathā vṛttam saḥ sat ācāraḥ ucyate tasmāt kuryāt iha ācāram yaḥ icchet gatim ātmanaḥ api pāpa śarīrasya ācāraḥ hanti alakṣaṇam adṛṣṭam aśrutam vedam puruṣam dharma cāriṇam svāni karmāṇi kurvāṇam tam janam kurute priyam ye nāstikāḥ naiṣṭhikāḥ ca guru śāstra atilaṃghinaḥ a dharma jñāḥ durācārāḥ te bhavanti gata āyuṣaḥ sarva lakṣaṇa hīnaḥ api yaḥ sat ācāravān naraḥ śraddadhāna unasūyaḥ ca sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt brāhmaṇa anala gaḥ sūryāt na meheta kadācana udak mukhaḥ divārātrau utsargam dakṣiṇā mukhaḥ utthāya ācamya tiṣṭheta pūrvām saṃdhyām samāhitaḥ evam eva uttarām saṃdhyām samupāsīta vāgyataḥ na īkṣeta ādityam udyantam na astam yāntam kadācana bhūyuḥ upāsate yena pūrvām dvijāḥ saṃdhyām na paścimām sarvān tān dhārmikaḥ rājā śūdra karmaṇi yojayet purīṣayoḥ śirasā prāvṛtena eva samāstīrya tṛṇaiḥ mahīm grāma āvasatha tīrthānām kṣetrāṇām ca eva vartmani na mūtram adhitiṣṭheta na kṛṣṭe na ca go vraje antar jalāt āvasathāt valmīkāt mūṣaka sthalāt kṛta śauca avaśiṣṭāḥ ca varjayet pañca vai mṛdaḥ deva arcana ādi kāryāṇi tathā guru abhivādanam mā ācāmet prayataḥ samyak prāc mukha udak mukhaḥ api vā trivarga sādhane yat ca sadā kāryam vipaścitā pādena kāryam pāratryam pādam kuryāt ca saṃcaye ardhena āhāra caraṇa nitya naimittika antakam prasādhana ādarśa darśanam danta dhāvanam pūrvāhṇe eva kāryāṇi devatānām ca pūjanam dūrāt āvasathāt mūtram dūrāt pāda avasecanam ucchiṣṭa utsarjanam dūrāt sadā kāryam hita eṣiṇā loṣṭa mardī tṛṇa chedī nakha khādī ca yaḥ naraḥ nitya ucchiṣṭaḥ saṃkara kṛt na iha āyuḥ viṃdate mahat nagnām para striyam na īkṣet na paśyet ātmanaḥ śakṛt udakyā darśana sparśam kuryāt sambhāṣaṇam na ca na apsu mūtram purīṣam vā maithunam vā samācaret na adhitiṣṭhet śakṛt mūtre keśa bhasma kapālikān tuṣa aṅgāra asthi śīrṇāni rañju vastra ādikāni ca na namet vidvāḥ na āsanam ca api dāpayet brāhmaṇān praṇamet vidvāḥ āsanam ca api dāpayet tāñjaliḥ upāsīta gacchantam pṛṣṭhatas nviyāt na ca asīt āsane bhinne bhinnam kāṃsyam ca varjayet ucchiṣṭaḥ na spṛśet śīrṣam sarve prāṇāḥ tad āśrayāḥ keśa grahān prahārān ca śirasi etāni varjayet na anyatra putra śiṣyābhyām śiphayā tāḍanam smṛtam na pāṇibhyām saṃhatābhyām kaṃḍūyet ātmanaḥ śiraḥ na ca abhīkṣṇam śiraḥsnānam kāryam niṣkāraṇam naraiḥ apraśastam niśi snānam rāhoḥ anyatra darśanāt madhu snānam tu tailena na aṅgam kiṃcid upaspṛśet tila piṣṭam ca na aśnīyāt tathā asya āyuḥ na hīyate duṣkṛtam na guroḥ bhūyāt kruddham ca enam prasādayet parīvādam na śṛṇuyāt anyeṣām api jalpatām sadā anupahataḥ tiṣṭhet praśastāḥ ca tathā oṣadhīḥ bibhṛyāt su snigdha amala keśaḥ ca sugandhiḥ cāru veṣa dhṛk sitāḥ sumanasaḥ hṛdyāḥ bibhṛyāt ca naraḥ sadā priyam ca na anṛtam brūyāt na anya doṣān udīrayet na anya āśritam tathā vairam rocayet puruṣa īśvaraḥ na duṣṭa yānam ārohet kūla chāyāḥ na saṃśrayet bandhakī bandhakī bhartṛ kṣudra anṛta kathaiḥ saha tathā ati vyaya śīlaiḥ ca parivāda rataiḥ śaṭhaiḥ budhaḥ maitrīm na kurvīta na ekaḥ pathinam āśrayet pradīptam veśma na viśet na ārohet śikharam taroḥ na kuryāt danta saṃvarṣam na kuryāt cala nāsikām na a saṃspṛṣṭa mukhaḥ brūyāt śvāsa kāsau ca varjayet nakhān na vādayet śindyāt na nakhaiḥ ca mahīm likhet pādena na ākramet pādam na pūjya abhimukham nayeta catuṣpatham caitya tarum śmaśāna upavanāni ca duṣṭa strī saṃnikarṣam ca varjayet niśi sarvadā snāna ārdrām dharaṇīm ca eva dūratas parivarjayet pathī deyaḥ brāhmaṇebhyaḥ rājbhyaḥ strībhyaḥ eva ca vidyā adhikasya gurviṇyāḥ bhāra ārtasya mahīyasaḥ mūka andha badhirāṇām ca mattasya unmattakasya ca na hi īdṛśam anāyuṣyam loke kiñcana vidyate yādṛśam puruṣasya iha para dāra upasevanam na ca īrṣyā strīṣu kartavyā dārāḥ rakṣyāḥ prayatnāt anāyuṣyā bhavet īrṣyā tasmāt tām parivarjayet hīna aṅga anadhika aṅgān ca vidyā hīnān ca na ākṣipet mahā rājaiḥ niśīthe bhojana kriyāḥ tadvat na upaviśet prājñaḥ pādena ākramya vāsanam na ca ati rakta vāsāḥ syāt citra asita dharaḥ api vā na ca kuryāt viparyāsam vāsasaḥ na vibhūṣaṇe striyam kṛśām na avajānīyāt dīrgham āyuḥ jijīviṣuḥ brāhmaṇam kṣatriyam sarvam sarve hi āśīviṣa upamāḥ hanyāt āśīviṣaḥ kruddhaḥ yāvat spṛśati daṃṣṭrayā brāhmaṇaḥ sa kulam hanyāt dhyāne na avekṣitena ca na ati kalyam na ati sāyam na ca madhyam dine tathā na ajñātaiḥ saha gantavyam na ekena bahubhiḥ saha nāruṃtudaḥ syāt na parokṣa vādī na sahī nataḥ rohate ca agninā dagdham vanam paraśuṇā hatam nāstikyam veda nindā ca devatānām ca kutsanam na brāhmaṇam parivadet na nakṣatrāṇi darśayet tithim pakṣasya na brūyāt yayā asya āyuḥ na riṣyate tejaḥ niṣṭhīvya vāsaḥ ca paridhāya ācamet budhaḥ tatra nityam vaset prājñaḥ kṛtakṛtyaḥ patau sukham paurāḥ su saṃhatāḥ yatra satata nyāya vartinaḥ yasmin kṛṣīvalāḥ rāṣṭre prāyaśas na atibhāṣiṇaḥ yatra auṣadhāni aśeṣāṇi vaset tatra vicakṣaṇaḥ jigīṣuḥ pūrva vairam ca janaḥ ca virata utsavaḥ ṛṇa pradātā vaidyaḥ ca śrotriyaḥ sa jalā nadī na ca rātrau mahā rājaiḥ dīrgha rājyam abhīpsatā hemakāra gṛhe ca annam aśnīyāt na ca viśvaset bhinnabhāṇḍam ca khaṭvām ca kukkuram kukkuṭam tathā catvāri ye ca vṛkṣāḥ sa kaṇṭakāḥ bhinna bhāṇḍe baliḥ prāyas khadvāyām ca iha niścayaḥ vṛkṣa mūle piśācānām sarveṣām eva saṃsthitiḥ atas teṣām tale bhujan aśnute pūya śoṇitam asaṃskṛta anna bhuj mūtram bāla ādi prabhavam svayam suvāsinīm gurviṇīm ca vṛddhām bāla āturān tathā bhojayet saṃskṛta annena prathamam caramam gṛhī kuryāt prathamām brahmaṇe dadyāt prajānām pataye tatas tṛtīyām ca eva guhyebhyaḥ kaśyapāya tathā parām tatas ca anumate dadyāt dattvā gṛhabalim tatas dadyāt atha dharitrīṇām dadyāt tu maṇika trayam prācya ādi krama yogena indra ādīnām balim kṣipet brahmaṇe ca antarikṣāya sūryāya ca yathākramam yathāvidhi yathānyāyam brāhmaṇāya upapādayet puṇya gandha ambara dharaḥ mālya dhārī nareśvaraiḥ na prāc mukha udak mukhaḥ vā api na ca eva anya manāḥ naraḥ dattvā tu bhuṃkte śiṣṭebhyaḥ kṣudhitebhyaḥ tathā gṛhī praśasta śuddha pātreṣu bhuñjīta akupitaḥ nṛpa pātre na adeśe ca nareśvaraiḥ nā kāle na ati saṃkīrṇe dattvā agram ca naraḥ mahī aśnīyāt tad mayaḥ bhūtvā pūrvam tu madhuram rasam lavaṇa ugrau tatas paścāt kaṭu tīkṣṇa ādikam tatas mārdavam puruṣaḥ aśnan vai madhye ca kaṭhina aśanam alakṣmī kovidāreṣu sarvadā eva kṛta ālayā yathāvat punar ācāmet pāṇī prakṣālya yatnatas tad abhīṣṭa devatānām ca kurvīta smaraṇam naraḥ prāṇa apāna samānānām udāna vyānayoḥ tathā anna puṣṭi karam ca astu mama adya avyāhatam sukham anāyāsa pradāyi iti kuryāt karmāṇi atandritaḥ saṃdhyāyām pathikaḥ kaścid samāgacchati bhārataiḥ pāda śauca āsanaiḥ prahvaḥ svāgata uktyā ca pūjayet tat eva aṣṭaguṇam puṃsām sūrye haṃsa mukhe gate gacchet śayyām a sphuṭitām api dāru mayīm nṛpa na aviśālām na vā bhagnām na asamām malinām na ca na ca jantu mayām śayyām samātiṣṭhet anāpadi prāñci diśi śiraḥ śastam yāmyāyām api bhūpate sadā eva svapatām puṃsām viparītam tu roga dam bhavati upagamaḥ śastaḥ sapatnyām hi avanīpate puṇya ṛkṣe ca śubhe kāle putrāḥ yugmāsu rātriṣu na ca asnātām striyam gacchet garbhiṇīm na rajasvalām na aniṣṭām vai na kupitām na aśastām na ca rogiṇīm na adakṣiṇām na anya kāmām na akāmām na anya yoṣitam su kṣāmām atyabhuktām ca svayam ca ebhiḥ guṇaiḥ yutaḥ snātaḥ sugandha dhṛk dhṛṣṭaḥ na śrāntaḥ kṣudhitaḥ api vā sa kāmaḥ sa anurāgaḥ ca vyavāyam puruṣaḥ vrajet caturdaśyām tathā aṣṭamyām pañcadaśyām ca parvasu taila abhyaṅgam tathā bhogān yoṣitaḥ ca vivarjayet kṣura karmaṇi ca ante ca strī sambhoge ca bhārata snāyīta cailavān prātar kaṭa bhūmim upetya ca guroḥ pativratānām ca tathā yajña tapasvinām yugapad jalam agnim ca bibhṛyāt na vicakṣaṇaḥ na ācakṣīta dhayatīm gām jalam na añjalinā pibet bhīta āśvāsana kṛt sādhuḥ svargaḥ tasya avyayam phalam na ūrdhvam tu pattana dvāram nirīkṣya paryaṭet naraḥ yuga mātram mahī pṛṣṭhe naraḥ gacchet vilokayan śeṣa ahe tu api śeṣān ca vaśya ātmā yaḥ nirasyati tasya dharma artha kāmānām hāniḥ na alpā api jāyate khādeta paiśunyam ca vivarjayet saṃyāvam kṛsaram māṃsam śaṣkulī pāyasam tathā ajāḥ ca na avakarṣeta tāḥ bahis dhārayanti ca rakta mālyam na dhāryam syāt śuklam dhāryam tu paṇḍitaiḥ raktam śirasi dhāryam ca tathā pāneyam iti api yā mālā sā na duṣyati karhicit anyat arcāsu devānām anyat dhāryam sabhāsu ca pippalam ca vaṭam ca eva śīrṇa śleṣmāntakam tathā udubaram na khādeta bhava arthī puruṣa uttamaḥ bhūmau pārāvatāḥ dhanyāḥ śukāḥ ca saha sārikāḥ bhavanti ete tathā pāpāḥ tathā vai tilapāyikāḥ sarpiṣī jala agnī ca eva bibhṛyāt gṛhe nityam iti sthitiḥ hasti pṛṣṭhe aśva pṛṣṭhe ca ratha caryāsu ca eva hi prajā pālana yuktaḥ ca na kṣāntim labhate nṛpa yajña śāstram ca vijñāya śabda śāstram ca bhārataiḥ gāṃdharva śāstram vijñeyam kalāḥ jñeyāḥ ca bhārataiḥ purāṇam itihāsam ca tathā ākhyānāni yāni ca eṣa te lakṣaṇa uddeśaḥ ācārasya prakīrtitaḥ śeṣāḥ ca vedyāḥ vṛddhebhyaḥ pratyāhāryāḥ narādhipaiḥ bhūti jananaḥ ācāraḥ kīrti vardhanaḥ ācārāt vardhate hi āyuḥ ācāraḥ hanti alakṣaṇam āgamānām hi sarveṣām ācāraḥ śreṣṭhaḥ ucyata mad bhagavant paramaḥ dharmaḥ ācārāt vardhate dhanam puṇyam yaśasyam āyuṣyam svargyam svastyayanam mahat sarva varṇa anukampā artham mayā etat samudāhṛtam tasmāt sadā eva vidvasā avahitena rājñ śāstra uditaḥ hi anudinam paripālanīyaḥ nāma pañca adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca dīrgha āyuḥ ārogya kula ādi vṛddhi yuktaḥ pumān yena guṇa anvitaḥ syāt śrī bhagavant uvāca tvayā pṛṣṭam idam samyak amutra akṣaya kārakam rahasyam te pravakṣyāmi yat purāṇa vidaḥ viduḥ tasmin nārāyaṇasya arccām arcayet indu nāmabhiḥ atha vā brahma nakṣatram paurṇamāsyām prajāyate tadā snānam naraḥ kuryāt pañcagavyam ca sarṣapaiḥ māpyāyasva iti ca japet vidvāḥ aṣṭaśatam punar parayā bhaktyā pākhaṇḍa ālāpa varjitaḥ somāya vara dāya atha viṣṇave ca namaḥ namaḥ pūjayet phala puṣpaiḥ ca soma nāmāni kīrtayet somāya śāṃtāya namaḥ astu pādau ananta nāmne hi anu jānu jaṅghe haru dvayam ca api vṛkodarāya saṃpūjayet meḍhram anaṅga bāhave namaḥ namaḥ kāma sukha pradāya kaṭiḥ śaśāṅkasya samarcanīyā tathā udaram ca api amṛta udarāya nābhiḥ su pūjyā vidhi locanāya mad āsyam namaḥ candramasebhipūjyam oṣṭhau kumud khaṇḍa vana priyāya nāsā ca nāthāya vana oṣadhīnām hi ānanda dāya atha punar bhruvoḥ ca netra dvayam nīla kumud priyāya ca indīvara śyāma karāya ca uraḥ yad yad adhvara vaṃditāya karṇa dvayam daitya niṣūdanāya lalāṭam indoḥ udadhipriyāya keśā suṣumṇā adhipateḥ prapūjyāḥ śiraḥ śaśāṃkāya namaḥ asurāreḥ viśveśvarāya iti namaḥ kirīṭam devīm ca saṃpūjya sugandha dhūpa nevadya puṣpa ādibhiḥ indupatnīm deyaḥ prabhāte sa hiraṇya vāri kumbhaḥ manaḥ pāpa vināśanāya saṃprāśya go mūtram amāṃsam annam akṣāram aṣṭau atha viṃśatim ca upoṣya bhuktvā itihāsam śṛṇuyāt kadamba nīlotpala ketakāni jātī sarojam śatapattrikā ca amlāna kubjān atha sinduvāra puṣpam punar nārada mallikāyāḥ muktam ca viṣṇoḥ karavīra puṣpam śrī campakam candramasaḥ ca deyam śrāvaṇa ādiṣu māseṣu kramāt etāni sarvadā vrata ante śayanam dadyāt darpaṇa upaskara anvitam rohiṇa candra mithunam kārayitvā tu kāñcanam candraḥ ṣaṣ aṅgulaḥ kāryaḥ rohiṇī catur aṅgulā muktāphala aṣṭaka yutam sita netra paṭa āvṛtam bha kumbha upari kāṃsya pātra akṣata anvitam pūrvāhṇe śāli ikṣu phala saṃyutam mahā āsyām raupya khura samanvitām sa vastra bhājanām dhenum tathā śaṅkham ca śobhanam bhūṣaṇaiḥ dvija dāmpatyam alaṃkṛtya guṇa anvitam yathā na rohiṇī kṛṣṇa śayanam tyajya gacchati yathā tvam eva sarveṣām parama ānanda mukti daḥ idam eva pitṝṇām ca sarvadā vallabham mune nārī vā rohiṇī candraśayanam vā samācaret iti paṭhati śṛṇoti vā yaḥ ittham madhu mathana arcanam indu kīrtanena nāma pañca adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ mad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mayā pārtha kāma arthau na prakāśitaḥ naraḥ kim phalam āpnoti pātayan bhaviṣya uttaram etat te kathitam pāṇḍu nandana sat ācāravatām puṃsām vrata dāna samuccayaḥ yat dṛṣṭam itihāseṣu purāṇeṣu ca bhārataiḥ ṛṣīṇām puratas pārtha kuṇṭhā bhavati bhāratī na etat prakāśanīyam hi dāmbhikāya śaṭhāya vā sādhu vṛttāya dāntāya satya ārjava ratāya ca etat ākhyāyamānam hi śubhām utpādayet gatim sāmānyam etat sura sattamānām varṇa āśramāṇām ca narendra candra mayā purāṇam te sauhṛdena dharmaḥ svayam pārtha bhavān iha tvam dharma artha vid dṛṣṭa parāvaraḥ ca yāsyāmi aham dvāravatīm punar ca yajñam sameṣyāmi mahā utsave ca tat sarvam hi vaśe viditvā na eva anutāpaḥ bhavatā atra kāryaḥ iti uktavan yātu kāmaḥ prahṛṣṭaḥ saṃpūjitaḥ pāṇḍu sutaiḥ mahātmā pṛṣṭvā hi sarvam jagāma viprān praṇipatya kṛṣṇaḥ pāṇḍu tanayasya ca yat pradiṣṭam vyāsena tat kṛtam aho muni puṃgavena jayati parāśara sūnuḥ satyavatī hṛdaya nandanaḥ vyāsaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde samāpti varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇasya dvārakām prati gamana varṇanam nāma sapta adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vṛttāntāḥ māyā ca vaiṣṇavā yasmāt saṃsāre doṣa kīrtanam pāpa bhedaḥ tatas tasmāt śubha aśubha vinirṇayaḥ śakaṭa vrata māhātmyam tilaka vrata kīrtanam aśoka karavīra ākhyam vratam tasmāt ca kokilam dvitīyā vrata māhātmyam aśūnya śayanam tathā kāma ākhyā tu tṛtīyā ca meghapālīvratam tathā pañcāgni sādhanā ramyā tṛtīyāvratam uttamam tri rātram goṣpadam nāma harakālī vratam tathā lalitā ākhyā tṛtīyā ca yoga ākhyā ca tathā aparā umāmaheśvaram nāma tathā rambhātṛtīyakam tṛtīyā ca ārdra ānanda karā tathā tathā śrīpañcamī nāma ṣaṣṭhī śoka praṇāśinī phalaṣaṣṭhī ca mandāraṣaṣṭhīvratam atha ucyate lalitāvrata ṣaṣṭhī ca ṣaṣṭhī kārttika saṃjñitā mahat tapaḥ saptamā ca vibhūṣā saptamā tathā maṇḍapa vidhiḥ trayodaśī iti saptamī ca tathā eva abhayasaptamī kalyāṇasaptamī nāma śarkarāsaptamīvratam saptamī kamala ākhyā ca tathā anyā śubhasaptamī budhāṣṭamīvratam nāma tathā janma aṣṭamīvratam dūrvā kṛṣṇā aṣṭamī proktā anayāvratam aṣṭamī aṣṭamī arka aṣṭamī ca atha vṛkṣa navamīvratam dhvaja ākhyā navamī ca eva ulkā ākhyā navamī tathā tathā āśā daśamīvratam rohiṇīm hari śambhu brahma sūrya aviyogakam govatsadvādaśī nāma vratam uktam tatas param nīrājanadvādaśī ca bhīṣmapañcakam eva ca mallikā ākhyā dvādaśī ca bhīmā dvādaśika uttamā akhaṇḍadvādaśī nāma tiladvādaśī atas param sukṛtadvādaśī nāma dharaṇīvratam eva ca viśokadvādaśī nāma vibhūti dvādaśīvratam puṣya ṛkṣa dvādaśī ca eva dvādaśī śravaṇa ṛkṣa gā anaṅgadvādaśī ca eva aṅgapādavratam tathā nimba arka karavīra atha yamāḥ darśa trayodaśī tathā mās mās ca caturdaśī aṣṭamī dine vaiśākhī kārttikī māghī vratam etat anantaran kārttikyām kṛttikā yoge kṛttikāvratam īritam phālgune pūrṇimāyām tu vratam pūrṇa manoratham nāma anantavratam eva ca bratam hi sāṃbharāyiṇyam nakṣatrapuruṣa vratam mucyate bhāmadānavratam nāma vṛntākavidhiḥ eva ca arghaḥ śukra bṛhaspatyoḥ pañcāśīti vratāni ca māghasnānam nitya snānam rudrastāna vidhiḥ tathā candrārka grahaṇe snānam vidhiḥ ca anna aśane tathā vāpī kūpa taḍāgānām utsargaḥ vṛkṣa yājanam deva pūjā dīpa dāna vṛṣotsarga vidhiḥ tathā bhūtamātrī ca śrāvaṇyām rakṣā bandha vidhiḥ tathā dīpālikāyām tu homaḥ lakṣa homa vidhiḥ tathā bhoṭi homaḥ mahā aśītiḥ gaṇanāthasya śātikā dhenuḥ navanītasya ca aparā suvarṇadhenuḥ ca tathā deva kāryam cikīrṣubhiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde saṃkṣiptānukramaṇikākathanam nāma aṣṭa uttara dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti caturtham uttara parva samāptaḥ ayam bhaviṣyapurāṇa granthaḥ maṅgala ācaraṇa chattra abhiṣic yudhiṣṭhira mahat rāja prati vyāsa ādi aneka mahā ṛṣi māhātmya varṇana ślo mahāśānti vidhi varṇana ślo gaṇanātha śānti vidhi varṇanam ślo. kāñcanapurī vrata varṇanam ślo kanyā pradāna māhātmya varṇanam ślo. brāhmaṇa śuśrūṣā vidhi varṇana ślo vṛṣa dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. kāñcana dhenu dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. ṭīkā vṛṣabha dāna vidhi varṇanam mahiṣī dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo bhūmi dāna vidhi varṇana ślo sauvarṇa pṛthivī dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo āpākadānavidhivarṇanam ślo gṛha dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. anna dāna māhātmya varṇana ślo sthālīdāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. dāsī dāna vidhi varṇana ślo prapā dāna vidhi varṇana ślo vidyā dāna vidhi varṇana ślo tulāpuruṣa dāna vidhi varṇana ślo brahmāṇḍa dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. kalpavṛkṣa dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. ślo. mahābhūta ghaṭa dāna vidhi varṇana ślo śayyā dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. ātma pratikṛti dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. hiraṇya aśva dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo hiraṇya aśva ratha dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. kṛṣṇājina dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. bhuvana pratiṣṭhā māhātmya varṇana ślo varāha dāna vidhi varṇana ślo guḍācala dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo kārpāsācala dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. ghṛtācala dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo. śarkarācala dāna vidhi varṇanam ślo sat ācāra dharma varṇanam ślo. rohiṇīcandraśayanavrata māhātmya varṇanam ślo. jaimini saṃvāda samāptiḥ śrī kṛṣṇa dvārakām prati gamana varṇana ślo araṇya vāsa muṣitaḥ yudhiṣṭhira nṛpaḥ vaśī prāptaḥ trailokya nāthena kṛṣṇena paramātmanā mad ad ca govindam papraccha ca yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca kena vratena deveśa vāñchitam prāpyate phalam niṣpāpāḥ sakalāḥ lokāḥ bhavanti janma janmani śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca indra ādyaiḥ lokapālaiḥ ca tat mama kathayataḥ śṛṇu śukla pakṣe caturdaśyām māsi bhādrapade tathā tasya anuṣṭhāna mātreṇa sarva pāpam praṇaśyati uvāca kṛṣṇa kaḥ ayam tvayā ākhyātaḥ yaḥ anantaḥ iti saṃjñitaḥ yaḥ ayam śeṣaḥ ca nāgaḥ ca anantaḥ takṣakaḥ smṛtaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca yaḥ kāle upapadyate kalā kāṣṭhā muhūrta ādi dina rātri vyavasthayā pakṣaḥ māsaḥ ṛtuḥ varṣam yuga kalpa vyavasthayā saḥ aham kālaḥ avatīrṇaḥ asmi bhuvaḥ bhāra avatāraṇāt dānavānām vināśāya vasudeva tanūdbhavam anantam viddhi mām pārtha kṛṣṇam viṣṇum harim śivam brahmānam bhāskaram śeṣam sarvvavyāpinam īśvaram pratyaya artham mayā pārtha viśvarūpam tat uvāca ananta vrata māhātmyam vidhim vidhi vidām vara kim puṇyam kim phalam tasya anuṣṭhānam ca tasya kim kena vā tat kṛtam pūrvam loke kena prakāśitam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca āsīt purā kṛta yuge sumantuḥ nāma vai dvijaḥ vaśiṣṭha gotra jaḥ vidvān śīlavān vijita indriyaḥ tasya abhavat dīkṣā satī satyavrate sthitā cāritra śīla sampannā surūpā bhṛgu vaṃśa jā tasyāḥ kālena saṃjātā duhitrī sarva lakṣaṇā śīlā nāmnā suśīlā sā vardhate pitṛ veśmani mātā tasyāḥ tu kālena jvara dāha prapīḍitā kṛtam sumantunā tasyāḥ karma yat pāralaukikam tatas sumantuḥ saṃtyajya duḥkham śokam kramāt punar devalasya muneḥ kanyām karkaśām pariṇītavān sā karkaśā ati duḥśīlā sadā niṣṭhura bhāṣiṇī adakṣāḥ dakṣāḥ bhojana karmaṇi tu santuṣṭāḥ ruṣṭāḥ bandhu janān prati karoti sakhibhiḥ sārdham śiśu krīḍām anuttamām catur aṅgaka varṇaiḥ ca rakta pīta sita asitaiḥ svastikam padma śaṅkhau ca maṇḍayantī punar punar kurvantī pratyaham bālā devatā atithi pūjanam gṛha kṛtye sadā dakṣā pituḥ atyanta vallabhā kālena kiyatā vipraḥ tām dṛṣṭvā yauvana udgatām tatas dava vaśāt tatra kauṇḍinyaḥ samupāgataḥ muni śreṣṭhaḥ mahābhāgaḥ kulīnaḥ dharma tatparaḥ manasā cintayāmāsa sumantuḥ sutapāḥ sudhīḥ asmai bhāgya vaśāt śīlā pratipādyā prayatnāt iti kṛtvā matim vipraḥ dadau kanyām śubhe dine kanyām alaṅkṛtām sādhvīm śīlām candra nibha ānanām sumantuḥ karkaśām prāha jāmātre dehi dakṣiṇām dakṣiṇā rahitam karma niṣphalam jāyate yatas sā tu tad vacanam śrutvā karkaśā kupitā abhavat alaṃkāram samānīya svakīyam ca api bandhanam nikṣipya nibhṛte sthāne karkaśāṇi agṛhṛm yayau sumantuḥ ca ati dīna ātmā lajjitaḥ ca abhavat tadā tatas vivāham nirvvartya kauṇḍinyaḥ api nija āśramam go yāne tām samāropya śīlām ādāya vai yayau tatas sā pathini gacchantī śīlā candra nibha ānanā dadarśa śīlāḥ nārīṇām samūham vrata cāriṇām puṃsām vṛndam ca tatra iva rakta pīta ambara āsanam dṛṣṭvā samūham nārīṇām satī papraccha sa ādaram vinaya avanatā sādhvī praṇipatya sureśvaram ūcuḥ mahendre ca dhvaja ākārāsu yaṣṭiṣu natvā sarasi yaḥ snātvā ananta arcanam ārabhet kṛtvā darbha mayam devam vāri vāja samanvitam anantam devadeveśam caturbāhum kirīṭinam atasī puṣpa saṃkāśam kāñcana aṅgada bhūṣaṇam śaṅkha cakra gadā śārṅgam vividha āyudha dhāriṇam māridhānyām tathā anantam bhagavantam niyojayet maṇḍale puṣpa nevedyam dhūpa vastra anulepanam dattvā ca pūjayet bhaktyā anantam viśva rūpiṇam piṣṭaka artham vrīhi cūrṇam yava godhūmayoḥ ca vā eteṣām prāpyate yat tu tat grāhyam prastha saṃjñitam pūjayitvā tathā devam gandha puṣpaiḥ yathākramam śrutvā kathām tatas tasya kuṅkama aktam su ḍorakam pumān tu dakṣiṇe bāhau tadā anantam prapūjayet nirvvarttya pūjām devasya pūpam bhuktvā yathāsukham visṛjya dakṣiṇām dattvā praṇamya ca yathāsukham śīlā śrutvā vacaḥ tāsām yathā tābhiḥ udāhṛtam na kāra sā bāhau vaddhā ḍorakam uttamam pūpa prastham ca sāṃ kṛtvā bhuktvā ca eva tathā eva ca tena ananta prasādena gṛham go dhana saṃkulam tadā āśramam śriyā yuktam dhana dhānya samanvitam vividha atithi sampūrṇam nānā ratnaiḥ vibhūṣitam hastā ca maṇi kāñcībhiḥ muktā ābharaṇa bhūṣitā divya aṅgā śīla sampannā sāvitrī pratimā yathā kadācid upaviṣṭā sā vahnikuṇḍam samāgatā tauṇḍinyaḥ api viśet roṣāt dṛṣṭvā ḍoram anantakam mūle ca baddham eva prayatnāt papraccha krodha vacasā bhṛkuṭī kuṭilam mukham kim idam ḍorakam haste baddhvā bhārye atra tiṣṭhasi uvāca anantam devadevasya prameyam ḍorakam śubham kare baddham vidhānena śṛṇu mama vacanam prabho na jānāsi katham nātha tat evam jagat īśvaram mīlā vākyam tatas śrutvā kauṇḍinyaḥ kupitaḥ abhavat iti vatvā ākṛṣya kupitaḥ kupitaḥ kṣiptam jvālā ākule vahnau nirbhartsya bahudhā priyām tatas sā saṃbhramāt śīlā hāhā kṛtvā pradhāvitā vahneḥ sūtram samādāya kṣīra madhye tatas akṣipat ananta ākṣepa doṣeṇa dāridryam patitam gṛhe gātre malina tā prāptā cakṣus nidrām tathā eva ca śūnyāni gṛha rūpāṇi dagdhāni vahninā kvacid nirīkṣya sva puram vipraḥ cintayāmāsa cetasā atha śīlā vivarṇā sā duḥkhitā pati doṣataḥ vicacāra purīm sarvām śūnya āgāra samanvitām mama api duṣkṛtam karma kṛtam vā me vigarhitam ananta ākṣepa doṣeṇa mama api gatiḥ īdṛśā anantam yatra paśyāmi tatra yāsyāmi durmatiḥ tatas jagāma kauṇḍinyaḥ vanam vyāghra ādi saṅkulam vratasya anveṣaṇam karttum pādau draṣṭum tathā hareḥ tatra apaśyat ca tam vṛkṣam phala puṣpa samanvitam varjitam pakṣi saṃghātaiḥ kīṭaiḥ ca eva viśeṣataḥ tam apṛcchat tvayā anantaḥ kvacid dṛṣṭaḥ mahā druma sa ca uvāca mahā vṛkṣaḥ na anantam vedmi bho dvija tatas gacchan dadarśa agre vṛṣa śreṣṭham vane sthitam tam apṛcchat ayam vipraḥ anantaḥ vīkṣitaḥ tvayā vṛṣabhaḥ tam uvāca idam viṣaṇṇam brāhmaṇam prati yadi anantam aham jāne tadā mama gatiḥ īdṛśā nānā māyā pracarantam mada garjana darpitam sa tam dṛṣṭvā dṛṣṭavan kimu tatas vrajan dadarśa agre ramyam puṣkariṇī dvayam bhramaraiḥ cakravākaiḥ ca haṃsa kāraṇḍavaiḥ yutam puṣkariṇyau ūcatuḥ ta na jānīvaḥ harim kvacid kim karomi kva gacchāmi katham paśyāmi tam vibhum tatas kṛpālu hṛdayaḥ deveśaḥ deva pūjitaḥ tad kṣaṇāt bhagavant viṣṇuḥ dvija pratyakṣam āgataḥ mṛddha brāhmaṇa rūpeṇa provāca vacanam dvijam uttiṣṭha uttiṣṭha vipra indraiḥ tyaja duḥkham sukhī bhava anantam darśayiṣyāmi kṛṣṇam viṣṇum harim śivam brāhmaṇam tam samādāya pātāla vartmanā purīm tām purīm darśayāmāsa tatas ca antardadhe dvijaḥ sa tām dadarśa kauṇḍinyaḥ purīm trailokya durllabhām divya nārī naraiḥ yuktām maṇi ratna vibhūṣitām suvarṇa racitām sarvām veṣṭitām takṣaka ādibhiḥ viśvarūpam jagannātham caturbāhum kirīṭinam śaṅkha cakra gadā padma dhāriṇam garuḍadhvajam dakṣiṇe vilasat lakṣmīm vāme krīḍat sarasvatīm sapta phaṇā samāyuktam divya siṃhāsane sthitam evam rūpam jagannātham dṛṣṭvā bhaktyā stutiḥ kṛtā jagāma bhūmau śirasā anantasya samīpatas sahasranāmne puruṣāya śāśvate sahasra koṭi yuga dhāriṇe namaḥ ajñānena mayā deva yat kṛtam pāpa karmaṇā tat sarvam kṛpayā śaṃsa kṣamasva madhusūdana atha kauṇḍinya viprasya stutim śrutvā janārddanaḥ tuṣṭaḥ aham brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha bhaktyā te viśeṣataḥ mahāṃ gṛhāṇa vipra indra tuṣṭaḥ asmi tyaja vismayam uvāca sva karma phala bhogena yām yām yonim vrajāmi aham tasyām tasyām hṛṣīkeśaiḥ hari bhaktiḥ dṛḍhā astu mama ati pramādāt mohāt vā yat mayā duṣkṛtam kṛtam tat āgaḥ kṣamyatām nātha praṇamāmi punar punar dāridra nāśanam dharmam viṣṇu lokam tathā akṣayam uvāca pūrṇaḥ manorathaḥ deva mama ca adya viśeṣataḥ kaḥ cūtaḥ kaḥ vṛṣaḥ kā gauḥ kim tat puṣkariṇī dvayam kaḥ kharaḥ kuñjaraḥ kaḥ vā kaḥ vā vṛddha dvijottamaḥ kṛpayā kathayasva adya pathini dṛṣṭaḥ mayā vibho mad anantaḥ uvāca yaḥ ca āmra vṛkṣaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ hi vipraḥ vidyāsu garvitaḥ upasthitāya śiṣyāya vidyām yasmāt na dattavān tena karma vipākena vṛkṣa tvam prāpya tiṣṭhati dattam paryuṣitam dravyam svādu bhuktam svayam yatas vṛṣabha tvam samāsādya tatas tiṣṭhati nirjane viprāya vasudhām dattvā niṣphalām śasya varjitām tena asau go tvam āsādya tṛṇa madhye pradhāvati dharma adharmau vijānīyāt yat tat puṣkariṇī dvayam bhuktvā bhogān ca vipulān saṃprāpsyasi mahat padam ananta ākhyam mahā puṇyam varṣāṇām ca caturdaśam śīlayā saha dharma ātmā sukham bhuktvā manorathān viṣṇuḥ okam samāsādya rarāja śīlayā saha iti bhaviṣyapurāṇe ananta vratam samāptam
